title_en: All people that on earth do dwell

lines.en: Psalm 100
All people that on earth do dwell,
Sing to the Lord with cheerful voice;
Him serve with fear, his praise forthtell,
lines.ko: 그분은 두려움으로 섬기시며 그분을 찬양할 것입니다.

lines.en: Come ye before him and rejoice.
The Lord ye know is God indeed;
Without our aid he did us make;
lines.ko: 우리의 도움 없이 그는 우리를 만들었습니다.

lines.en: We are his folk, he doth us feed,
lines.ko: 우리는 그분의 백성입니다. 그분은 우리에게 먹이를 주시고,

lines.en: And for his sheep he doth us take.
lines.ko: 그리고 그분은 그분의 양을 위해 우리를 취하십니다.

lines.en: O enter then his gates with praise,
Approach with joy his courts unto;
Praise, laud, and bless his name always,
lines.ko: 그 이름을 항상 찬양하고 찬송하며 송축하라

lines.en: For it is seemly so to do.
lines.ko: 왜냐하면 그렇게 하는 것 같기 때문입니다.

lines.en: For why? the Lord our God is good,
His mercy is for ever sure;
His truth at all times firmly stood,
lines.ko: 그분의 진리는 언제나 굳게 서 있었고,

lines.en: And shall from age to age endure.

title_en: God, my King, thy might confessing
title_ko: 나의 왕이신 하나님, 당신의 능력을 고백합니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: From Psalm 145
God, my King, thy might confessing,
lines.ko: 나의 왕이신 하나님, 당신의 능력을 고백합니다.

lines.en: Ever will I bless thy name;
lines.ko: 나는 언제까지나 당신의 이름을 송축할 것입니다.

lines.en: Day by day thy throne addressing,
Still will I thy praise proclaim.
Honor great our God befitteth;
lines.ko: 우리 하느님께 합당하게 큰 영광을 돌리십시오.

lines.en: Who his majesty can reach?
Age to age his work transmitteth,
Age to age his power shall teach.
lines.ko: 나이가 들수록 그의 능력은 가르칠 것입니다.

lines.en: They shall talk of all thy glory,
lines.ko: 그들은 당신의 모든 영광에 대해 이야기할 것입니다.

lines.en: On thy might and greatness dwell,
Speak of thy dread acts the story,
And thy deeds of wonder tell.
Nor shall fail from memory's treasure
Works by love and mercy wrought;
Works of love surpassing measure;
Works of mercy passing thought.
Full of kindness and compassion,
Slow to anger, vast in love,
God is good to all creation;
All his works his goodness prove.
lines.ko: 그분의 모든 일은 그분의 선하심을 증명합니다.

lines.en: All thy works, O Lord, shall bless thee;
lines.ko: 여호와여, 당신이 하시는 모든 일이 당신을 축복할 것입니다.

lines.en: Thee shall all thy saints adore:
lines.ko: 당신의 모든 성도들은 당신을 찬양할 것입니다.

lines.en: King supreme shall they confess thee,
lines.ko: 최고의 왕이여, 그들이 당신을 고백할 것입니다.

lines.en: And proclaim thy sovereign power.

title_en: From all that dwell below the skies

lines.en: From Psalm 117
lines.id: Biarlah bumi dan langit Dan semuanya rendah
Puji Tuhan yang darinya segala berkat mengalir,
Yang Maha Kuasa, Tuhan Allah Semesta Alam,
Ayah dan Anak dan Roh Kudus! Amin.

lines.en: From all that dwell below the skies
Let the Creator's praise arise:
Let the Redeemer's name be sung
Through every land, by every tongue.
Eternal are thy mercies, Lord;
Eternal truth attends thy Word:
Thy praise shall sound from shore to shore
Till suns shall rise and set no more.

alt_titles: From all that dwell below the skies (tune 2)
title_id: Dari Semua Yang Tinggal Di Bawah Langit

title_en: All praise to God, who reigns above
title_ko: 위의 모든 것을 다스리시는 하나님께 찬양을 드립니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: All praise to God, who reigns above,
lines.ko: 위의 모든 것을 다스리시는 하나님께 찬양을 드립니다.

lines.en: The God of all creation,
The God of wonders, pow'r, and love,
The God of our salvation!
With healing balm my soul he fills,
The God who every sorrow stills,
To God all praise and glory!
What God's almighty pow'r hath made
His gracious mercy keepeth;
By morning dawn or evening shade
His watchful eye ne'er sleepeth;
lines.ko: 그분의 주의 깊은 눈은 결코 잠들지 않으십니다.

lines.en: Within the kingdom of his might,
Lo, all is just and all is right,
lines.ko: 보라, 모든 것이 정의롭고 모든 것이 옳다.

lines.en: To God all praise and glory!
I cried to him in time of need:
lines.ko: 나는 필요할 때 그분께 이렇게 외쳤습니다.

lines.en: Lord God, O, hear my calling!
lines.ko: 주 하나님, 오, 나의 부르심을 들어주소서!

lines.en: For death he gave me life indeed
lines.ko: 죽음을 위해 그분은 나에게 참된 생명을 주셨습니다

lines.en: And kept my feet from falling.
lines.ko: 그리고 내 발이 넘어지지 않게 지켜 주셨습니다.

lines.en: For this my thanks shall endless be;
lines.ko: 이에 대한 나의 감사는 끝이 없을 것입니다.

lines.en: O thank him, thank our God, with me,
lines.ko: 오 그에게 감사합니다, 나와 함께 계신 우리 하느님께 감사드립니다.

lines.en: To God all praise and glory!
The Lord forsaketh not his flock,
lines.ko: 여호와께서는 자기 양 떼를 버리지 아니하시고

lines.en: His chosen generation;
He is their refuge and their rock,
Their peace and their salvation.
As with a mother's tender hand
He leads his own, his chosen band,
lines.ko: 그는 자신이 선택한 밴드를 이끌고 있습니다.

lines.en: To God all praise and glory!
Ye who confess Christ's holy name,
To God give praise and glory!
Ye who the Father's power proclaim,
To God give praise and glory!
All idols under foot be trod,
lines.ko: 발 아래 있는 모든 우상은 짓밟히고,

lines.en: The Lord is God! the Lord is God!
To God all praise and glory!
Then come before his presence now
lines.ko: 그렇다면 지금 그의 임재 앞으로 나오라

lines.en: And banish fear and sadness;
To your Redeemer pay your vow
And sing with joy and gladness:
Though great distress my soul befell,
The Lord, my God, did all things well,
lines.ko: 나의 하나님 여호와께서 모든 일을 선하게 행하셨으니

lines.en: To God all praise and glory!

title_en: Mighty God, while angels bless thee
title_ko: 전능하신 하나님, 천사들이 당신을 축복하는 동안 (자체번역)

lines.en: Mighty God, while angels bless thee,
lines.ko: 전능하신 하나님, 천사들이 당신을 축복할 동안,

lines.en: May a mortal sing thy name?
lines.ko: 필멸의 인간이 당신의 이름을 부를 수 있습니까?

lines.en: Lord of men as well as angels,
Thou art every creature's theme.
Alleluia! Alleluia! Alleluia! Amen.
Lord of every land and nation,
Ancient of eternal days,
Sounded through the wide creation
Be thy just and lawful praise.
For the grandeur of thy nature,
Grand beyond the seraph's thought;
For created works of power,
Works with skill and kindness wrought.
But thy rich, thy free redemption,
lines.ko: 그러나 당신의 부자, 당신의 값없는 구원,

lines.en: Dark through brightness all along,
Thought is poor, and poor expression,
Who dare sing that awful song?
lines.ko: 누가 감히 그 끔찍한 노래를 부르나요?

lines.en: Brightness of the Father's glory,
Shall thy praise unuttered lie?
lines.ko: 당신의 찬양이 말로 표현할 수 없이 거짓이겠습니까?

lines.en: Fly, my tongue, such guilty silence,
lines.ko: 날아라, 내 혀여, 그 죄스러운 침묵이여,

lines.en: Sing the Lord who came to die:
From the highest throne in glory,
To the cross of deepest woe,
All to ransom guilty captives,
lines.ko: 모든 죄를 지은 포로들을 대속하기 위해,

lines.en: Flow my praise, for ever flow.

title_en: All ye that fear Jehovah's Name

lines.en: Psalm 22:23ff.
All ye that fear Jehovah's Name,
His glory tell, his praise proclaim;
lines.ko: 그분의 영광을 선포하고, 그분의 찬미를 선포하십시오.

lines.en: Ye children of his chosen race,
Stand ye in awe before his face,
Stand ye in awe before his face.
The suffering one he has not spurned,
Who unto him for succor turned;
From him he has not hid his face,
But answered his request in grace,
But answered his request in grace.
O Lord, thy goodness makes me raise
lines.ko: 오 여호와여 주의 선하심이 나를 일으키시나니

lines.en: Amid thy people songs of praise;
lines.ko: 주의 백성 가운데서 찬양의 노래를 부르며

lines.en: Before all them that fear thee, now
lines.ko: 이제 당신을 경외하는 모든 자 앞에서

lines.en: I worship thee and pay my vow,
lines.ko: 나는 당신을 경배하고 나의 서원을 이행합니다.

lines.en: I worship thee and pay my vow.
lines.ko: 나는 당신을 숭배하고 나의 서원을 이행합니다.

lines.en: The Lord's unfailing righteousness
All generations shall confess,
From age to age shall men be taught
What wondrous works the Lord has wrought
What wondrous works the Lord has wrought.

title_en: Now blessed be the Lord our God

lines.en: Now blessed be the Lord our God,
The God of Israel,
For he alone doth wondrous works
In glory that excel.
And blessed be his glorious Name
To all eternity:
The whole earth let his glory fill.
lines.ko: 온 땅이 그의 영광을 가득 채울지어다.

lines.en: Amen, so let it be.

title_en: Angel voices, ever singing

lines.en: Angel voices, ever singing
Round thy throne of light,
Angel harps, for ever ringing,
Rest not day nor night;
Thousands only live to bless thee,
lines.ko: 수천 명이 당신을 축복하기 위해 살고 있습니다.

lines.en: And confess thee
Lord of might.
Thou who art beyond the farthest
lines.ko: 가장 먼 곳 너머에 계신 당신

lines.en: Mortal eye can scan,
Can it be that thou regardest
Songs of sinful man?
Can we feel that thou art near us,
lines.ko: 당신이 우리 가까이에 계시다는 것을 우리는 느낄 수 있습니까?

lines.en: And wilt hear us?
Yea, we can.
Yea, we know thy love rejoices
lines.ko: 그래요, 우리는 당신의 사랑이 기뻐한다는 것을 압니다.

lines.en: O'er each work of thine;
Thou didst ears and hands and voices
For thy praise combine;
Craftsman's art and music's measure
For thy pleasure
Didst design.
Here, great God, today we offer
Of thine own to thee;
And for thine acceptance proffer,
All unworthily,
Hearts and minds, and hands and voices,
In our choicest
Melody.
Honor, glory, might, and merit,
Thine shall ever be,
Father, Son, and Holy Spirit,
Blessed Trinity:
Of the best that thou hast given
lines.ko: 당신이 주신 가장 좋은 것 중에서

lines.en: Earth and heaven
Render thee.

title_en: Hallelujah! ... In his temple

lines.en: From Psalm 150
Hallelujah! Hallelujah!
In his temple God be praised;
In the high and heavenly places
Be the sounding anthem raised.
Hallelujah! Hallelujah! Hallelujah! Amen.
Hallelujah! praise Jehovah
For his mighty acts of fame;
Excellent his might and greatness;
Fitting praises then proclaim.
Hallelujah! praise Jehovah
With the trumpet's joyful sound,
Praise with harp and praise with organ,
Let his glorious praise abound.
lines.ko: 그분의 영광스러운 찬양이 풍성하게 되기를 바랍니다.

lines.en: Hallelujah! Hallelujah!
All that breathe, Jehovah praise;
Let the voices God has given
Joyful anthems to him raise.

title_en: O come, my soul, bless thou the Lord

lines.en: From Psalm 103
O come, my soul, bless thou the Lord thy maker,
lines.ko: 오라, 내 영혼아, 너를 지으신 여호와를 송축하라.

lines.en: And all within me bless his holy name;
lines.ko: 내 속에 있는 모든 것이 그분의 거룩한 이름을 송축합니다.

lines.en: Bless thou the Lord, forget not all his mercies,
lines.ko: 여호와를 송축하라 그 모든 긍휼을 잊지 말지어다

lines.en: His pardoning grace and saving love proclaim.
lines.ko: 그분의 용서하시는 은혜와 구원하시는 사랑이 선포됩니다.

lines.en: Bless him for ever, wondrous in might,
lines.ko: 그 능력이 놀랍고, 그를 영원히 찬양하라.

lines.en: Bless him, his servants that in his will delight.
lines.ko: 그분의 뜻을 기뻐하는 그분의 종들아, 그분을 축복하여라.

lines.en: Good is the Lord and full of kind compassion,
Most slow to anger, plenteous in love;
Rich is his grace to all that humbly seek him,
lines.ko: 겸손히 그분을 찾는 모든 사람에게 그분의 은혜가 풍성하며

lines.en: Boundless and endless as the heavens above.
His love is like a father's to his children,
lines.ko: 그의 사랑은 자식에 대한 아버지의 사랑 같으니

lines.en: Tender and kind to all who fear his name;
lines.ko: 그의 이름을 경외하는 모든 사람에게 자비와 자비를 베푸시며

lines.en: For well he knows our weakness and our frailty,
lines.ko: 그분께서는 우리의 연약함과 연약함을 잘 아시며,

lines.en: He knows that we are dust, he knows our frame.
lines.ko: 그분은 우리가 흙임을 아시고 우리의 틀도 아십니다.

lines.en: We fade and die like flowers that grow in beauty,
lines.ko: 우리는 아름답게 자라는 꽃처럼 시들고 죽습니다.

lines.en: Like tender grass that soon will disappear;
But evermore the love of God is changeless,
lines.ko: 그러나 언제나 하나님의 사랑은 변치 않으십니다.

lines.en: Still shown to those who look to him in fear.
lines.ko: 여전히 두려움 속에서 그분을 바라보는 사람들에게 보여집니다.

lines.en: High in the heavens his throne is fixed for ever,
lines.ko: 그의 보좌는 하늘에 높음으로 영원히 견고하니라

lines.en: His kingdom rules o'er all from pole to pole;
lines.ko: 그분의 왕국은 극에서 극까지 모든 것을 다스립니다.

lines.en: Bless ye the Lord through all his wide dominion,
lines.ko: 주님의 모든 넓은 통치로 주님을 송축하십시오.

lines.en: Bless his most holy name, O thou my soul.
lines.ko: 오 나의 영혼아, 그의 가장 거룩한 이름을 송축하라.

title_en: O that I had a thousand voices
title_ko: 오 나에게 천 개의 목소리가 있었다면 (자체번역)

lines.en: O that I had a thousand voices
lines.ko: 오 나에게 천 개의 목소리가 있었다면

lines.en: To praise my God with thousand tongues!
lines.ko: 천개의 방언으로 나의 하나님을 찬양하게 하소서!

lines.en: My heart, which in the Lord rejoices,
Would then proclaim in grateful songs
To all, wherever I might be,
What great things God hath done for me.
lines.ko: 하나님께서 나에게 얼마나 큰 일을 행하셨는가.

lines.en: O all ye pow'rs that he implanted,
Arise, and silence keep no more;
lines.ko: 일어나라. 그러면 침묵이 더 이상 지속되지 않을 것이다.

lines.en: Put forth the strength that he hath granted,
Your noblest work is to adore.
lines.ko: 당신의 가장 고귀한 일은 숭배하는 것입니다.

lines.en: O my soul and body, be ye meet
With heartfelt praise your Lord to greet!
All creatures that have breath and motion,
That throng the earth, the sea, and sky,
Now join me in my heart's devotion,
Help me to raise his praises high.
lines.ko: 그분을 높이 찬양할 수 있도록 도와주소서.

lines.en: My utmost pow'rs can never aright
lines.ko: 내 최선의 힘은 결코 제대로 될 수 없어

lines.en: Declare the wonders of his might.
O father, deign thou, I beseech thee,
To listen to my earthly lays;
A nobler strain in heaven shall reach thee,
lines.ko: 하늘의 더 고귀한 긴장이 당신에게 닿을 것입니다.

lines.en: When I with angels hymn thy praise
lines.ko: 내가 천사들과 함께 당신을 찬양할 때

lines.en: And learn amid their choirs to sing
lines.ko: 그리고 그들의 합창단 속에서 노래하는 법을 배우세요

lines.en: Loud hallelujahs to my King.
lines.ko: 나의 왕께 큰 소리로 할렐루야를 외칩니다.

title_en: Exalt the Lord, his praise proclaim

lines.en: Exalt the Lord, his praise proclaim;
All ye his servants, praise his name,
lines.ko: 그분의 모든 종들아, 그분의 이름을 찬양하여라.

lines.en: Who in the Lord's house ever stand
And humbly serve at his command.
The Lord is good, his praise proclaim;
Since it is pleasant, praise his name;
lines.ko: 그 이름이 즐겁으니 그 이름을 찬양할지어다

lines.en: His people for his own he takes
lines.ko: 그분은 자신의 백성을 자신의 것으로 삼으시고

lines.en: And his peculiar treasure makes.
I know the Lord is high in state,
Above all gods our Lord is great;
The Lord performs what he decrees,
In heaven and earth, in depths and seas.
He makes the vapors to ascend
In clouds from earth's remotest end;
lines.ko: 지구의 가장 먼 끝에서 구름 속에;

lines.en: The lightnings flash at his command,
He holds the tempest in his hand.
Exalt the Lord, his praise proclaim;
All ye his servants, praise his name,
lines.ko: 그분의 모든 종들아, 그분의 이름을 찬양하여라.

lines.en: Who in the Lord's house ever stand
And humbly serve at his command.
For ever praise and bless his name,
And in the church his praise proclaim;
In Zion is his dwelling place;
Praise ye the Lord, show forth his grace.

title_en: O worship the King all glorious above

lines.en: O worship the king all glorious above,
lines.id: Wahai sembahlah Raja, yang mulia di atas,

lines.en: O gratefully sing his power and his love;
lines.id: Dan dengan penuh rasa syukur menyanyikan kasih-Nya yang menakjubkan:

lines.en: Our shield and defender, the ancient of days,
lines.id: Perisai dan Pembela Kami, Yang Purba Harinya,

lines.en: Pavilioned in splendor, and girded with praise.
lines.id: Dipakai dalam kemegahan, dan disandang dengan pujian.

lines.en: O tell of his might, O sing of his grace,
lines.id: O ceritakan keperkasaan-Nya, dan nyanyikan rahmat-Nya,

lines.en: Whose robe is the light, whose canopy space.
lines.ko: 그 옷은 햇빛 그 집은 궁창
lines.id: Yang penjelajahannya adalah cahaya, yang ruang kanopinya.

lines.en: His chariots of wrath the deep thunderclouds form,
lines.id: Kereta amarahnya membentuk awan guntur yang dalam,

lines.en: And dark is his path on the wings of the storm.
lines.id: Dan gelaplah jalan-Nya di atas sayap badai.

lines.en: The earth with its store of wonders untold,
lines.id: Bumi dengan segudang keajaiban yang tak terhitung,

lines.en: Almighty, thy pow'r hath founded of old;
lines.ko: 가득한 이 땅 다 주의 조화
lines.id: Ya ampun, kekuatan-Mu sudah ada sejak lama

lines.en: Hath stablished it fast by a changeless decree,
lines.id: Telah menikamnya dengan cepat dengan keputusan tanpa perubahan,

lines.en: And round it hath cast, like a mantle, the sea.
lines.id: Dan disekelilingnya terbentang laut bagaikan mantel.

lines.en: Thy bountiful care what tongue can recite?
lines.id: Anak-anak yang lemah dari debu, dan lemah seperti lemah,

lines.en: It breathes in the air; it shines in the light;
lines.id: Kepada-Mu kami percaya, dan kami tidak mendapati Engkau gagal.

lines.en: It streams from the hills; it descends to the plain;
lines.id: Rahmat-Mu sungguh lembut! betapa tegasnya sampai akhir!

lines.en: And sweetly distils in the dew and the rain.
lines.ko: 그 자비 영원히 변함 없어라 아멘
lines.id: Pembuat, Pelaku, Penebus Ulang, dan Teman kami!

lines.en: Frail children of dust, and feeble as frail,
In thee do we trust, nor find thee to fail;
Thy mercies how tender, how firm to the end,
Our Maker, Defender, Redeemer, and Friend!
O measureless might! ineffable love!
While angels delight to hymn thee above,
The humbler creation, though feeble their lays,
With true adoration shall lisp to thy praise.

title_id: Wahai Sembahlah Raja Yang Maha Mulia

title_en: Stand up, and bless the Lord

lines.en: Stand up, and bless the Lord,
Ye people of his choice;
Stand up, and bless the Lord your God
With heart and soul and voice.
Though high above all praise,
Above all blessing high,
Who would not fear his holy name,
lines.ko: 그 거룩한 이름을 두려워하지 아니할 자가 누구이뇨

lines.en: And laud, and magnify?
O for the living flame,
From his own altar brought,
To touch our lips, our minds inspire,
And wing to heav'n our thought!
lines.ko: 그리고 우리 생각을 높이는데 날개를 달아라!

lines.en: God is our strength and song,
And his salvation ours;
Then be his love in Christ proclaimed
lines.ko: 그렇다면 그리스도 안에 있는 그분의 사랑이 선포되게 하십시오

lines.en: With all our ransomed pow'rs.
Stand up and bless the Lord;
The Lord your God adore:
Stand up, and bless his glorious Name
Henceforth for evermore.

title_en: Come, let us sing unto the Lord

lines.en: Psalm 98
Come, let us sing unto the Lord
New songs of praise with sweet accord;
For wonders great by him are done,
His hand and arm the victory won.
The great salvation of our God
Is seen through all the earth abroad;
Before the heaven's wondering sight
He hath revealed his truth and right.
He called to mind his truth and grace
In promise made to Israel's race;
And unto earth's remotest bound
Glad tidings of salvation sound.
All lands, to God lift up your voice;
Sing praise to him, with shouts rejoice,
With voice of joy and loud acclaim
Let all unite and praise his name.
lines.ko: 다 함께 연합하여 그 이름을 찬양할지어다

lines.en: Praise God with harp, with harp sing praise,
With voice of psalms his glory raise;
With trumpets, cornets, gladly sing
And shout before the Lord, the king.
Let earth be glad, let billows roar
And all that dwell from shore to shore;
lines.ko: 이 해안에서 저 해안까지 거주하는 모든 자들,

lines.en: Let floods clap hands with one accord,
Let hills rejoice before the Lord.
For lo, he comes; at his command
All nations shall in judgment stand;
lines.ko: 모든 나라가 심판을 받게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: In justice robed and throned in light,
lines.ko: 정의 안에서 빛의 옷을 입고 보좌를 두셨으니

lines.en: The Lord shall judge, dispensing right.
lines.ko: 주님께서 판단하시고 공의를 베풀어 주실 것입니다.

title_en: Praise the Lord:  ye heavens adore him

lines.en: Praise the Lord: ye heavens adore him;
Praise him, angels, in the height;
Sun and moon, rejoice before him;
Praise him, all ye stars and light.
Praise the Lord, for he hath spoken;
Worlds his mighty voice obeyed:
lines.ko: 전 세계에서 그의 강력한 목소리가 순종했습니다.

lines.en: Laws which never shall be broken
For their guidance hath he made.
Praise the Lord, for he is glorious;
Never shall his promise fail:
lines.ko: 그분의 약속은 결코 실패하지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: God hath made his saints victorious;
Sin and death shall not prevail.
Praise the God of our salvation;
Hosts on high, his pow'r proclaim;
lines.ko: 높은 곳에 주인이 계시고, 그의 능력이 선포됩니다.

lines.en: Heaven and earth and all creation,
Laud and magnify his name.
Worship, honor, glory, blessing,
Lord, we offer unto thee;
Young and old, thy praise expressing,
In glad homage bend the knee.
All the saints in heaven adore thee;
lines.ko: 하늘에 있는 모든 성인이 당신을 찬양합니다.

lines.en: We would bow before thy throne:
As thine angels serve before thee,
lines.ko: 당신의 천사들이 당신 앞에서 봉사하는 것처럼,

lines.en: So on earth thy will be done.

title_en: Ye holy angels bright

lines.en: Ye holy angels bright,
Who wait at God's right hand,
Or through the realms of light
Fly at your Lord's command,
Assist our song,
For else the theme
Too high doth seem
For mortal tongue.
Ye blessed souls at rest,
Who ran this earthly race,
And now, from sin released,
Behold the Saviour's face,
God's praises sound,
As in his sight
With sweet delight
Ye do abound.
All nations of the earth,
Extol the world's great King;
With melody and mirth
His glorious praises sing;
For he still reigns,
And will bring low
The proudest foe
That him disdains.
Sing forth Jehovah's praise,
Ye saints, that on him call!
Him magnify always
His holy churches all!
In him rejoice,
And there proclaim
His holy name
With sounding voice.
My soul, bear thou thy part,
Triumph in God above;
With a well-tuned heart
Sing thou the songs of love;
Thou art his own,
Who precious blood
Shed for thy good
His love made known.
Away, distrustful care!
I have thy promise, Lord:
To banish all despair,
I have thine oath and word:
lines.ko: 나는 당신의 맹세와 약속을 가지고 있습니다:

lines.en: And therefore I
Shall see thy face
And there thy grace
Shall magnify.
With thy triumphant flock,
Then I shall numbered be;
Built on th'eternal rock,
His glory we shall see.
lines.ko: 우리는 그분의 영광을 보게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: The heavens so high
With praise shall ring
And all shall sing
In harmony.

title_en: Thee we adore, eternal Lord

lines.en: Thee we adore, eternal Lord!
We praise thy name with one accord.
Thy saints, who here thy goodness see,
lines.ko: 여기에서 당신의 선하심을 보시는 당신의 성도들이여,

lines.en: Through all the world do worship thee.
To thee aloud all angels cry,
lines.ko: 당신께 큰 소리로 모든 천사들이 부르짖습니다.

lines.en: The heavens and all the pow'rs on high:
lines.ko: 하늘과 높은 곳에 있는 모든 힘:

lines.en: Thee, holy, holy, holy king,
Lord God of hosts, they ever sing.
lines.ko: 만군의 여호와 하나님, 그들은 항상 노래합니다.

lines.en: Apostles join the glorious throng,
And prophets swell th'immortal song;
Thy martyrs' noble army raise
Eternal anthems to thy praise.
From day to day, O Lord, do we
Exalt and highly honor thee!
Thy name we worship and adore,
World without end, for evermore.

title_en: O come, let us sing to the Lord

lines.en: Psalm 95:1-6
lines.ko: 다 나와 찬송 부르세 한 소리 높여서
lines.id: Ayo, marilah kita bernyanyi untuk Tuhan,
Kepada-Nya suara kita meninggi
Dengan suara riang gembira marilah kita ke Batu Karang
Atas pujian penyelamatan kami.

lines.en: O come, let us sing to the Lord,
lines.ko: 그 보좌 앞에 엎드려 한 없는 감사와
lines.id: Marilah kita sebelum kehadiran-Nya datang

lines.en: To him our voices raise;
lines.id: Dengan pujian, dan suara syukur

lines.en: With joyful noise let us the rock
lines.id: Marilah kita menyanyikan mazmur bagi-Nya dengan penuh rahmat,

lines.en: Of our salvation praise.
lines.id: Dan membuat suara gembira.

lines.en: Let us before his presence come
lines.id: Karena Tuhan adalah Tuhan yang agung, dan Raja yang agung

lines.en: With praise, and thankful voice;
lines.ko: 저 깊은 물과 높은 산 다 다스리시네
lines.id: Di atas semua dewa Dia adalah.

lines.en: Let us sing psalms to him with grace,
lines.id: Kedalaman bumi ada di tangan-Nya

lines.en: And make a joyful noise.
lines.id: Ketinggian bukit kita adalah milik-Nya.

lines.en: For God's a great God, and great king;
lines.ko: 다 나와 찬송 드리세 다 같이 엎드려
lines.id: Oh, marilah kita menyembah Dia

lines.en: Above all gods he is.
lines.ko: 주 앞에 무릎 꿇고서 창조주 기리세 아멘
lines.id: Mari kita sujud, bersama-sama,

lines.en: The depths of earth are in his hand;
lines.id: Dan berlutut di hadapan Tuhan,

lines.en: The heights of hills are his.
lines.id: Tuan kami, biarkan kami terjatuh.

lines.en: To him the spacious sea belongs,
For he the same did make;
The dry land also from his hands
Its form at first did take.
O come, and let us worship him;
Let us bow down withal,
And on our knees before the Lord,
Our Maker, let us fall.

title_id: O Marilah Kita Bernyanyi Bagi Tuhan

title_en: Give to our God immortal praise

lines.en: From Psalm 136
Give to our God immortal praise;
Mercy and truth are all his ways,
Wonders of grace to God belong:
Repeat his mercies in your song.
Give to the Lord of lords renown;
The King of kings with glory crown:
lines.ko: 영광의 왕관을 쓴 왕 중의 왕:

lines.en: His mercies ever shall endure,
When lords and kings are known no more.
lines.ko: 군주와 왕이 더 이상 알려지지 않을 때.

lines.en: He built the earth, he spread the sky,
And fixed the starry lights on high:
Wonders of grace to God belong:
Repeat his mercies in your song.
He fills the sun with morning light;
He bids the moon direct the night:
His mercies ever shall endure
When suns and moons shall shine no more.
lines.ko: 해와 달이 더 이상 빛나지 않을 때.

lines.en: He sent his Son with power to save
From guilt, and darkness, and the grave:
Wonders of grace to God belong
Repeat his mercies in your song.
Through this vain world he guides our feet,
lines.ko: 이 헛된 세상을 통하여 그분께서 우리 발을 인도하시며

lines.en: And leads us to his heavenly seat:
lines.ko: 그리고 우리를 그분의 하늘 보좌로 인도하십니다.

lines.en: His mercies ever shall endure,
When this vain world shall be no more.
lines.ko: 이 헛된 세상이 더 이상 존재하지 않을 때.

title_en: God moves in a mysterious way

lines.en: God moves in a mysterious way
His wonders to perform;
He plants his footsteps in the sea,
And rides upon the storm.
Deep in unfathomable mines
lines.ko: 헤아릴 수 없는 광산 깊은 곳

lines.en: Of never-failing skill
He treasures up his bright designs,
lines.ko: 그는 자신의 빛나는 디자인을 소중히 간직하고 있습니다.

lines.en: And works his sovereign will.
Ye fearful saints, fresh courage take;
lines.ko: 너희 두려운 성도들이여, 새로운 용기를 가져라.

lines.en: The clouds ye so much dread
Are big with mercy, and shall break
In blessings on your head.
Judge not the Lord by feeble sense,
But trust him for his grace;
Behind a frowning providence
He hides a smiling face.
His purposes will ripen fast,
Unfolding every hour;
The bud may have a bitter taste,
But sweet will be the flow'r.
Blind unbelief is sure to err,
And scan his work in vain.
God is his own interpreter,
And he will make it plain.
lines.ko: 그리고 그는 그것을 분명히 할 것입니다.

title_en: Great God, how infinite art thou

lines.en: Great God, how infinite art thou!
How poor and weak are we!
Let the whole race of creatures bow,
And pay their praise to thee.
Thy throne eternal ages stood,
Ere seas or stars were made:
Thou art the ever living God,
Were all the nations dead.
Eternity, with all its years,
Stands present in thy view;
To thee there's nothing old appears;
To thee there's nothing new.
Our lives through various scenes are drawn,
lines.ko: 다양한 장면을 통해 우리의 삶이 그려지며,

lines.en: And vexed with trifling cares;
While thine eternal thought moves on
Thine undisturbed affairs.
Great God, how infinite art thou!
How poor and weak are we!
Let the whole race of creatures bow,
And pay their praise to thee.

title_en: O Light that knew no dawn

lines.en: O light that knew no dawn,
That shines to endless day,
All things in earth and heav'n
Are lustred by thy ray;
No eye can to thy throne ascend,
lines.ko: 어떤 눈도 주의 보좌에 오르지 못하며

lines.en: Nor mind thy brightness comprehend.
lines.ko: 당신의 밝기가 이해되는지 신경 쓰지 마십시오.

lines.en: Thy grace, O Father, give,
That I may serve in fear;
Above all boons, I pray,
Grant me thy voice to hear;
lines.ko: 제가 들을 수 있도록 당신의 목소리를 주소서.

lines.en: From sin thy child in mercy free,
lines.ko: 죄로부터 당신의 자녀를 자비로이 해방시켜 주소서.

lines.en: And let me dwell in light with thee:
lines.ko: 그리고 내가 당신과 함께 빛 속에 거하게 하소서.

lines.en: That, cleansed from stain of sin,
I may meet homage give,
And, pure in heart, behold
Thy beauty while I live;
Clean hands in holy worship raise,
lines.ko: 깨끗한 손을 들어 거룩한 예배를 드리며,

lines.en: And thee, O Christ my Saviour, praise.
lines.ko: 그리고 나의 구주 그리스도여, 당신을 찬양합니다.

lines.en: In supplication meek
To thee I bend the knee;
O Christ, when thou shalt come,
In love remember me,
And in thy kingdom, by thy grace,
Grant me a humble servant's place.
Thy grace, O Father, give,
I humbly thee implore;
And let thy mercy bless
Thy servant more and more.
lines.ko: 당신의 종은 점점 더 많아지고 있습니다.

lines.en: All grace and glory be to thee,
From age to age eternally.

title_en: O God, the Rock of Ages

lines.en: O God, the Rock of Ages,
lines.ko: 오 만세 반석이신 주 우리 하나님
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, Batu Karang A-ges,

lines.en: Who evermore hast been,
lines.ko: 저 창조 이전부터 또 영원 하도록
lines.id: Siapa lagi yang pernah,

lines.en: What time the tempest rages,
lines.ko: 한없는 영광 중에 그 보좌 있으니
lines.id: Jam berapa hama melanda,

lines.en: Our dwelling place serene:
lines.id: Tempat tinggal kami se-rene:

lines.en: Before thy first creations,
lines.id: Sebelum ciptaan-Mu yang pertama,

lines.en: O Lord, the same as now,
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, sama seperti sekarang,

lines.en: To endless generations
lines.id: Untuk generasi tanpa akhir The

lines.en: The Everlasting Thou!
lines.id: Engkau yang abadi!

lines.en: Our years are like the shadows
lines.ko: 이 인생 사는 것이 뜬 구름 같으며
lines.id: Tahun-tahun kita seperti bayangan

lines.en: On sunny hills that lie,
lines.ko: 저 푸른 동산 안의 꽃송이 같도다
lines.id: Di bukit-bukit cerah yang terhampar,

lines.en: Or grasses in the meadows
lines.ko: 풀 위의 이슬 같고 잠 속의 꿈 같이
lines.id: Atau rumput di padang rumput

lines.en: That blossom but to die;
lines.ko: 이 세상 모든 영광 곧 사라지도다
lines.id: Itu mekar tapi mati

lines.en: A sleep, a dream, a story
lines.id: Tidur, mimpi, cerita,

lines.en: By strangers quickly told,
lines.id: Oleh orang asing dengan cepat diberitahu,

lines.en: And unremaining glory
lines.id: Kemuliaan yang tidak dapat dipertahankan lagi

lines.en: Of things that soon are old.
lines.id: Tentang hal-hal yang segera menjadi tua.

lines.en: O thou who canst not slumber,
lines.ko: 한 없는 사랑으로 늘 깨어 지키사
lines.id: Wahai Engkau yang tidak terpuruk,

lines.en: Whose light grows never pale,
lines.ko: 큰 자비 베푸시고 늘 인도 하시니
lines.id: Yang cahayanya tidak pernah pucat,

lines.en: Teach us aright to number
lines.ko: 내 평생 짧은 세월 빛나게 살도록
lines.id: Ajari kami hak untuk berhitung

lines.en: Our years before they fail;
lines.ko: 참 빛인 성령으로 날 채워주소서 아멘
lines.id: Tahun-tahun kita sebelum mereka gagal

lines.en: On us thy mercy lighten,
lines.id: Pada kami belas kasihan-Mu menerangi,

lines.en: On us thy goodness rest,
lines.id: Kebaikan-Mu bertumpu pada kami,

lines.en: And let thy Spirit brighten
lines.id: Dan biarlah Roh-Mu menerangi hati

lines.en: The hearts thyself hast blessed.
lines.id: Dirimu telah diberkati. Amin.

lines.en: Lord, crown our faith's endeavor
With beauty and with grace,
Till, clothed in light for ever,
We see thee face to face:
A joy no language measures;
A fountain brimming o'er;
An endless flow of pleasures;
An ocean without shore.

title_id: Ya Tuhan, Batu Karang Segala Zaman

title_en: The Lord has heard and answered prayer

lines.en: The Lord has heard and answered prayer
And saved his people in distress;
This to the coming age declare,
That they his holy name may bless.
lines.ko: 그의 거룩한 이름이 찬송을 받게 하소서.

lines.en: The Lord, exalted on his throne,
Looked down from heaven with pitying eye
To still the lowly captive's moan
And save his people doomed to die.
lines.ko: 그리고 죽을 운명에 처한 그의 백성을 구하십시오.

lines.en: All men in Zion shall declare
His gracious name with one accord,
When kings and nations gather there
To serve and worship God the Lord.
Before my journey is complete
My vigor fails, my years decline;
lines.ko: 내 활력은 쇠퇴하고 내 나이는 쇠퇴합니다.

lines.en: My God, O spare me, I entreat;
The days of life are wholly thine.
The earth and heavens shall pass away,
Like vesture worn and laid aside,
But changeless thou shalt live for aye,
lines.ko: 그러나 변함없이 당신은 영원히 살 것입니다.

lines.en: Thy years for ever shall abide.
Thou, O Jehovah, shalt endure,
Thy throne for ever is the same;
And to all generations sure
Shall be thy great memorial name.
lines.ko: 당신의 위대한 기념 이름이 될 것입니다.

lines.en: Thy servants' children shall remain
For evermore before thy face;
Enduring honor they shall gain,
lines.ko: 그들은 영원한 명예를 얻게 될 것이며,

lines.en: Established ever in thy grace.

title_en: Our God our Help in ages past
title_ko: 지난 시대에 우리를 도우시는 우리 하나님 (자체번역)

lines.en: Our God, our help in ages past,
lines.ko: 지난 시대에 우리를 도우신 우리 하나님,

lines.en: Our hope for years to come,
lines.ko: 앞으로 몇 년 동안 우리의 희망은,

lines.en: Our shelter from the stormy blast,
And our eternal home.
Under the shadow of thy throne
Thy saints have dwelt secure;
Sufficient is thine arm alone,
And our defense is sure.
Before the hills in order stood,
Or earth received her frame,
From everlasting thou art God,
To endless years the same.
A thousand ages in thy sight
Are like an evening gone;
Short as the watch that ends the night
Before the rising sun.
The busy tribes of flesh and blood,
With all their lives and cares,
Are carried downward by thy flood,
lines.ko: 주의 홍수로 말미암아 아래로 휩쓸려 내려가매

lines.en: And lost in following years.
Time, like an ever-rolling stream,
Bears all its sons away;
They fly forgotten, as a dream
Dies at the opening day.
Our God, our help in ages past,
lines.ko: 지난 시대에 우리를 도우신 우리 하나님,

lines.en: Our hope for years to come,
lines.ko: 앞으로 몇 년 동안 우리의 희망은,

lines.en: Be thou our guard while troubles last,
lines.ko: 환난이 지속되는 동안 우리의 보호자가 되십시오.

lines.en: And our eternal home.

alt_titles: Our God our Help in ages past (tune 2)

title_en: Great is thy faithfulness

lines.en: Great is thy faithfulness, O God my father,
lines.ko: 오 신실 하신 주 내 아버지여
lines.id: “Besarlah keimanan-Mu,” ya Allah Bapaku

lines.en: There is no shadow of turning with thee:
lines.id: Tidak ada bayangan untuk berpaling kepada-Mu

lines.en: Thou changest not, thy compassions, they fail not;
lines.id: Thou chang-est not, Thy com-pas-sions, They fail not

lines.en: As thou hast been thou for ever wilt be.
lines.id: Sebagaimana Engkau selama-lamanya, Engkau pun akan demikian.

lines.ko: 오 신실 하신 주 오 신실 하신 주
lines.id: "Great is Thy faith-ful-ness! Great is Thy faith-ful-ness!"
Pagi demi pagi saya melihat belas kasihan baru
Segala yang kubutuhkan telah disediakan oleh tangan-Mu,

lines.ko: 오 신실 하신 주 나의 구주
lines.id: “Besarlah kesetiaan-Mu,” Tuhan, kepadaku!

lines.en: "Great is thy faithfulness! Great is thy faithfulness!"
lines.id: Sum-mer and win-ter, and spring-time and har-vest,

lines.en: Morning by morning new mercies I see:
lines.ko: 해와 달 별들도 다 주의 것
lines.id: Matahari, bulan dan bintang pada lintasannya di atas,

lines.en: All I have needed thy hand hath provided
lines.id: Bergabunglah dengan seluruh alam dalam kesaksian manusia,

lines.en: "Great is thy faithfulness," Lord unto me!
lines.id: Kepada kesetiaan, belas kasihan, dan cinta-Mu yang besar.

lines.ko: 오 신실 하신 주 오 신실 하신 주
lines.id: "Great is Thy faith-ful-ness! Great is Thy faith-ful-ness!"
Pagi demi pagi saya melihat belas kasihan baru
Segala yang kubutuhkan telah disediakan oleh tangan-Mu,

lines.ko: 오 신실 하신 주 나의 구주
lines.id: “Besarlah kesetiaan-Mu,” Tuhan, kepadaku!

lines.en: Summer and winter, and springtime and harvest,
lines.id: Maafkan dosa dan kedamaian yang abadi,

lines.en: Sun, moon and stars in their courses above,
lines.id: Kehadiran-Mu yang terkasih untuk menyemangati dan membimbing

lines.en: Join with all nature in manifold witness
lines.id: Strength for to-day and bright hope for to-morrow,

lines.en: To thy great faithfulness, mercy and love.
lines.id: Segala berkah menjadi milikku, dengan sepuluh ribu pasir di sisinya!

lines.ko: 오 신실 하신 주 오 신실 하신 주
lines.id: "Great is Thy faith-ful-ness! Great is Thy faith-ful-ness!"
Pagi demi pagi saya melihat belas kasihan baru
Segala yang kubutuhkan telah disediakan oleh tangan-Mu,

lines.ko: 오 신실 하신 주 나의 구주
lines.id: “Besarlah kesetiaan-Mu,” Tuhan, kepadaku!

lines.en: Pardon for sin and a peace that endureth,
Thine own dear presence to cheer and to guide;
Strength for today and bright hope for tomorrow,
Blessings all mine, with ten thousand beside.
Thomas O. Chisholm

Copyright 1923, renewal 1951, Hope Publishing Company, Carol Stream, IL 60188. All rights reserved. Used by permission. If you wish to print, copy, cut/paste or duplicate these lyrics you must obtain permission from Hope Publishing Company, 380 South Main Place, Carol Stream, IL 60188 (800/323-1049).

title_en: Hast thou not known, hast thou not heard

lines.en: Hast thou not known, hast thou not heard
That firm remains on high
lines.ko: 그 회사는 여전히 높은 순위를 유지하고 있다

lines.en: The everlasting throne of him
Who formed the earth and sky?
Art thou afraid his power shall fail
When comes thine evil day?
And can an all-creating arm
lines.ko: 그리고 모든 것을 창조하는 팔이 있을 수 있습니까?

lines.en: Grow weary or decay?
Supreme in wisdom as in power
The Rock of Ages stands,
Though him thou canst not see, nor trace
lines.ko: 비록 그 사람을 볼 수도 없고 추적할 수도 없으나

lines.en: The working of his hands.
He gives the conquest to the weak,
Supports the fainting heart,
And courage in the evil hour
His heavenly aids impart.
Mere human pow'r shall fast decay,
lines.ko: 단순한 인간의 힘은 빠르게 쇠퇴할 것입니다.

lines.en: And youthful vigor cease,
But they who wait upon the Lord
In strength shall still increase.
They with unwearied feet shall tread
The path of life divine,
With growing ardor onward move,
With growing brightness shine.
On eagles' wings they mount, they soar,
Their wings are faith and love,
Till, past the cloudy regions here,
They rise to heaven above.

title_en: Praise Jehovah, all ye nations

lines.en: Psalm 117
Praise Jehovah, all ye nations,
All ye people, praise proclaim;
For his grace and lovingkindness,
O sing praises to his name.
Great to us hath been his mercy,
Ever faithful is his word;
Through all ages it endureth.
Hallelujah, praise the Lord.

title_en: Let us with a gladsome mind

lines.en: From Psalm 136
Let us with a gladsome mind,
Praise the Lord, for he is kind:
For his mercies aye endure,
Ever faithful, ever sure.
Let us blaze his name abroad,
For of gods he is the God:
He with all-commanding might
lines.ko: 그는 모든 것을 지휘하는 힘을 가지고

lines.en: Filled the new-made world with light:
All things living he doth feed;
lines.ko: 그분은 살아 있는 모든 것을 먹이십니다.

lines.en: His full hand supplies their need:
lines.ko: 그분의 온전한 손길이 그들의 필요를 공급하십니다.

lines.en: He his chosen race did bless
In the wasteful wilderness:
He hath with a piteous eye
Looked upon our misery:
Let us therefore warble forth
His high majesty and worth:

title_en: My God, how wonderful thou art
title_ko: 나의 하나님, 당신은 얼마나 놀라운 분이십니까? (자체번역)

lines.en: My God, how wonderful thou art,
lines.ko: 나의 하나님, 당신은 얼마나 놀라운 분이십니까?

lines.en: Thy majesty how bright!
How beautiful thy mercy-seat,
In depths of burning light!
How dread are thine eternal years,
O everlasting Lord,
By holy angels, day and night,
Incessantly adored!
O how I fear thee, living God,
lines.ko: 오, 살아계신 하나님, 내가 얼마나 당신을 두려워하는지,

lines.en: With deepest, tenderest fears;
And worship thee with trembling hope,
And penitential tears.
Yet I may love thee too, O Lord,
lines.ko: 그러나 오 주님, 나도 당신을 사랑할 수 있습니다.

lines.en: Almighty as thou art;
For thou hast stooped to ask of me
The love of my poor heart.
No earthly father loves like thee,
lines.ko: 이 땅의 아버지 어느 누구도 너만큼 사랑하지 않으니,

lines.en: No mother half so mild
Bears and forbears, as thou hast done
With me, thy sinful child.
lines.ko: 나와 함께, 당신의 죄 많은 아이.

lines.en: How wonderful, how beautiful,
The sight of thee will be,
Thine endless wisdom, boundless power,
And aweful purity!

title_en: The God of Abraham praise

lines.en: The God of Abraham praise,
lines.id: Puji Tuhan A-braham,

lines.en: Who reigns enthroned above;
lines.ko: 온 천하 만민 주 앞에 찬송하네
lines.id: Yang bertakhta di atas

lines.en: Ancient of everlasting days,
lines.ko: 이 천지 만물도 주 앞에 엎드려
lines.id: Kuno dari hari-hari yang abadi,

lines.en: And God of love:
lines.id: Dan Tuhan cinta.

lines.en: Jehovah! great I AM!
lines.id: Je-ho-vah, hebatnya AKU,

lines.en: By earth and heav'n confessed;
lines.id: Demi bumi dan surga diakui

lines.en: I bow and bless the sacred name,
lines.id: Aku bersujud dan memberkati Nama sa-cred,

lines.en: For ever blest.
lines.id: Berkah selamanya.

lines.en: The God of Abraham praise,
lines.ko: 주 언약 하신 것 끝까지 지키니
lines.id: Dia sendiri telah bersumpah,

lines.en: At whose supreme command
lines.id: Aku bergantung pada sumpah-Nya

lines.en: From earth I rise, and seek the joys
lines.ko: 주 얼굴 뵈올 때 내 맘이 기쁘고
lines.id: Aku akan, dengan sayap elang yang terangkat ke atas,

lines.en: At his right hand:
lines.id: Ke surga

lines.en: I all on earth forsake,
lines.id: Aku akan memegang wajah-Nya,

lines.en: Its wisdom, fame, and power;
lines.id: Aku akan kuasa-Nya,

lines.en: And him my only portion make,
lines.id: Dan nyanyikan keajaiban rahmat-Nya

lines.en: My Shield and Tower.
lines.id: Selama-lamanya.

lines.en: He by himself hath sworn,
lines.ko: 왕의 왕 되신 주 하늘에 계시니
lines.id: Tuhan yang berkuasa di tempat tinggi

lines.en: I on his oath depend;
lines.ko: 이 세상 죄악 이기신 구주 예수
lines.id: Malaikat agung bernyanyi,

lines.en: I shall, on eagle's wings upborne,
lines.id: Dan seruan "Suci, suci, suci",

lines.en: To heav'n ascend:
lines.ko: 뭇 성도 함께 영원히 늘 섬기네
lines.id: "Raja Yang Maha Perkasa!"

lines.en: I shall behold his face,
lines.id: Siapa yang dulu dan sekarang sama,

lines.en: I shall his power adore,
lines.id: Dan terlebih lagi adalah:

lines.en: And sing the wonders of his grace
lines.id: Je-ho-vah, Ayah, hebatnya AKU,

lines.en: For evermore.
lines.id: Kami menyembah Engkau.

lines.en: The goodly land I see,
lines.id: Seluruh tuan rumah yang menang

lines.en: With peace and plenty blest,
lines.id: Bersyukurlah kepada Tuhan di tempat tinggi

lines.en: A land of sacred liberty
lines.id: "Salam, Ayah, Putra, dan Roh Kudus!"

lines.en: And endless rest;
lines.ko: 주 앞에 나도 엎드려 경배하네 아멘
lines.id: Mereka selalu menangis.

lines.en: There milk and honey flow,
lines.id: Salam, Tuhannya A-braham, dan Tuhanku!

lines.en: And oil and wine abound,
lines.id: Saya bergabung dengan orang-orang surgawi

lines.en: And trees of life for ever grow,
lines.id: Segala keperkasaan dan keagungan adalah milik-Mu,

lines.en: With mercy crowned.
lines.id: Dan pujian yang tiada habisnya.

lines.en: There dwells the Lord our King,
The Lord our righteousness;
Triumphant over the world and sin,
The Prince of Peace
On Zion's sacred height
His kingdom still maintains,
And glorious with his saints in light
For ever reigns.
The whole triumphant host
Give thanks to God on high;
Hail Father, Son, and Holy Ghost,
They ever cry:
Hail Abraham's God and mine!
I join the heavenly lays
All might and majesty are thine,
And endless praise.

title_en: Lord, thou hast searched me, and dost know

lines.en: Lord, thou hast searched me, and dost know
Where'er I rest, where'er I go;
Thou knowest all that I have planned,
lines.ko: 당신은 내가 계획한 모든 것을 아시고,

lines.en: And all my ways are in thy hand.
lines.ko: 나의 모든 길은 주의 손에 있습니다.

lines.en: My words from thee I cannot hide;
lines.ko: 내 말을 당신께 숨길 수 없습니다.

lines.en: I feel thy power on every side;
lines.ko: 나는 모든 면에서 당신의 능력을 느낍니다.

lines.en: O wondrous knowledge, awful might,
Unfathomed depth, unmeasured height!
lines.ko: 가늠할 수 없는 깊이, 가늠할 수 없는 높이!

lines.en: Where can I go apart from thee,
lines.ko: 당신을 떠나 내가 어디로 갈 수 있겠습니까?

lines.en: Or whither from thy presence flee?
In heaven? It is thy dwelling fair;
In death's abode? Lo, thou art there.
lines.ko: 죽음의 거처에서? 보라, 너 거기 있구나.

lines.en: If I the wings of morning take,
And far away my dwelling make,
The hand that leadeth me is thine,
And my support thy power divine.
lines.ko: 그리고 나는 당신의 신성한 힘을 지지합니다.

lines.en: If deepest darkness cover me,
The darkness hideth not from thee;
To thee both night and day are bright,
The darkness shineth as the light.

title_en: All that I am I owe to thee
title_ko: 나의 모든 것은 당신에게 빚진 것입니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: All that I am I owe to thee,
lines.ko: 내가 가진 모든 것은 당신에게 빚진 것입니다.

lines.en: Thy wisdom, Lord, has fashioned me;
I give my Maker thankful praise,
Whose wondrous works my soul amaze.
lines.ko: 그분의 놀라운 업적에 내 영혼이 놀랐습니다.

lines.en: Ere into being I was brought,
Thine eye did see, and in thy thought
My life in all its perfect plan
Was ordered ere my days began.
Thy thoughts, O God, how manifold,
lines.ko: 오 하나님, 당신의 생각은 얼마나 다양합니까?

lines.en: More precious unto me than gold!
I muse on their infinity,
lines.ko: 나는 그들의 무한함에 대해 곰곰이 생각한다.

lines.en: Awaking I am still with thee.
lines.ko: 깨어났을 때 나는 여전히 당신과 함께 있습니다.

lines.en: The wicked thou wilt surely slay,
From me let sinners turn away;
They speak against the name divine,
I count God's enemies as mine.
lines.ko: 나는 하나님의 원수를 내 것으로 여깁니다.

lines.en: Search me, O God, my heart discern,
lines.ko: 하나님이여 나를 살피사 내 마음이 분별하오니

lines.en: Try me, my inmost thought to learn;
lines.ko: 나를 시험해 보세요. 배우고자 하는 내 마음속 깊은 생각;

lines.en: And lead me, if in sin I stray,
lines.ko: 그리고 나를 인도해 주십시오. 내가 죄 가운데서 방황한다면,

lines.en: To choose the everlasting way.

title_en: Immortal, invisible, God only wise
title_ko: 불멸의 존재, 보이지 않는 존재, 오직 지혜로우신 하나님 (자체번역)

lines.en: Immortal, invisible, God only wise,
lines.ko: 불멸의 존재, 눈에 보이지 않는 존재, 오직 지혜로우신 하나님,

lines.en: In light inaccessible hid from our eyes,
lines.ko: 우리 눈에 감춰진 접근할 수 없는 빛 속에,

lines.en: Most blessed, most glorious, the Ancient of Days,
lines.ko: 가장 복되시고 가장 영광로우시며 옛적부터 항상 계신 분이시여,

lines.en: Almighty, victorious, thy great Name we praise.
lines.ko: 전능하시고 승리하신 당신의 크신 이름을 찬양합니다.

lines.en: Unresting, unhasting, and silent as light,
Nor wanting, nor wasting, thou rulest in might;
lines.ko: 부족함도 없고 낭비함도 없으시며 권능으로 다스리시나이다

lines.en: Thy justice like mountains high soaring above
lines.ko: 당신의 정의는 높이 솟아오른 산과 같으니

lines.en: Thy clouds which are fountains of goodness and love.
Great Father of Glory, pure Father of Light,
lines.ko: 위대하신 영광의 아버지, 순수하신 빛의 아버지,

lines.en: Thine angels adore thee, all veiling their sight;
lines.ko: 당신의 천사들은 모두 당신의 눈을 가리고 당신을 경배합니다.

lines.en: All praise we would render; O help us to see
lines.ko: 우리는 모든 찬양을 드릴 것입니다. 오 우리가 볼 수 있도록 도와주세요

lines.en: 'Tis only the splendor of light hideth thee!
lines.ko: 오직 빛의 광채만이 당신을 숨기고 있는 것입니다!

title_en: Now unto Jehovah, ye sons of the mighty
title_ko: 너희 용사들의 아들들아 이제 여호와께로 돌아가라 (자체번역)

lines.en: Now unto Jehovah, ye sons of the mighty,
lines.ko: 너희 용사들의 아들들아 이제 여호와께로 돌아가라

lines.en: All glory and strength and dominion accord;
Ascribe to him glory, and render him honor,
lines.ko: 그에게 영광을 돌리고 그에게 존귀를 돌려라.

lines.en: In beauty of holiness worship the Lord.
The voice of Jehovah comes down on the waters;
In thunder the God of the glory draws nigh.
lines.ko: 우레 가운데 영광의 하나님이 가까이 오시느니라.

lines.en: Lo, over the waves of the wide-flowing waters
lines.ko: Lo, 넓게 흐르는 물의 파도 너머로

lines.en: Jehovah as King is enthroned on high!
lines.ko: 왕이신 여호와께서는 높은 곳에 좌정해 계십니다!

lines.en: The voice of Jehovah is mighty, is mighty;
The voice of Jehovah in majesty speaks:
lines.ko: 위엄 있는 여호와의 음성은 이렇게 말합니다.

lines.en: The voice of Jehovah the cedars is breaking;
Jehovah the cedars of Lebanon breaks.
Each one, in his temple, his glory proclaimeth.
lines.ko: 각 사람이 그의 성전에서 그의 영광을 선포하느니라.

lines.en: He sat on the flood; he is King on his throne.
lines.ko: 그분은 홍수 위에 앉으셨습니다. 그는 왕좌에 앉은 왕이다.

lines.en: Jehovah all strength to his people imparteth;
lines.ko: 여호와께서는 자기 백성에게 모든 힘을 주시고

lines.en: Jehovah with peace ever blesseth his own.
lines.ko: 여호와께서는 언제나 자신의 백성을 평화롭게 축복하십니다.

title_en: God is our refuge and our strength

lines.en: Psalm 46
God is our refuge and our strength,
Our ever present aid,
And, therefore, though the earth remove,
We will not be afraid;
Though hills amidst the seas be cast,
Though foaming waters roar,
Yea, though the mighty billows shake
The mountains on the shore.
A river flows whose streams make glad
The city of our God,
The holy place wherein the Lord
Most high has his abode;
lines.ko: 가장 높으신 분이 거처를 갖고 계십니다.

lines.en: Since God is in the midst of her,
Unmoved her walls shall stand,
lines.ko: 그녀의 성벽은 흔들리지 않고 서 있을 것입니다.

lines.en: For God will be her early help,
When trouble is at hand.
The nations raged, the kingdoms moved,
But when his voice was heard
The troubled earth was stilled to peace
Before his mighty word.
The Lord of hosts is on our side,
Our safety to secure,
The God of Jacob is for us
A refuge strong and sure.
O come, behold what wondrous works
lines.ko: 오, 와서 보라, 놀라운 일들이 일어나는구나

lines.en: Jehovah's hand has wrought;
Come, see what desolation great
lines.ko: 와서 그 황폐함이 얼마나 큰지 보라

lines.en: He on the earth has brought.
To utmost ends of all the earth
He causes war to cease;
The weapons of the strong destroyed,
He makes abiding peace.
Be still and know that I am God,
lines.ko: 가만히 있어 내가 하나님 됨을 알지어다

lines.en: O'er all exalted high;
The subject nations of the earth
My name shall magnify.
The Lord of Hosts is on our side,
Our safety to secure,
The God of Jacob is for us
A refuge strong and sure.

title_en: The praises of thy wonders, Lord

lines.en: The praises of thy wonders, Lord,
The heavens shall express;
And in the congregation
Of saints thy faithfulness.
Thou hast an arm that's full of power:
lines.ko: 당신은 권능으로 가득 찬 팔을 갖고 계십니다.

lines.en: Thy hand is great in might;
And thy right hand exceedingly
Exalted is in height.
Justice and judgment of thy throne
Are made the dwelling place;
Mercy, accompanied with truth,
Shall go before thy face.
O greatly blessed the people are
lines.ko: 아 이 백성은 큰 축복을 받았도다

lines.en: The joyful sound that know;
In brightness of thy face, O Lord,
They ever on shall go.
Because the glory of their strength
Doth only stand in thee;
And in thy favor shall our horn
And pow'r exalted be.
For God is our defense; and he
To us doth safety bring:
The Holy One of Israel
Is our almighty King.

title_en: When Israel out of Egypt went

lines.en: Psalm 114
When Israel out of Egypt went,
From people of a speech unknown,
The Lord among his people dwelt,
And there he set his royal throne.
lines.ko: 그리고 거기에 그는 자신의 왕좌를 놓았습니다.

lines.en: The sea beheld and fled away,
The Jordan's waters backward turned,
The lofty mountains and the hills
With trembling awe our God discerned.
What aileth thee, O troubled sea?
lines.ko: 오, 요동하는 바다여, 너는 무슨 일이냐?

lines.en: Thou Jordan, why thy riven tide?
Ye mountains and ye little hills,
Why thus dismayed on every side?
O tremble, earth, before the Lord,
In presence of Jehovah fear,
Beneath whose touch the flinty rock
Became a fount of waters clear.

title_en: Ye righteous, in the Lord rejoice

lines.en: Psalm 33:1-12
Ye righteous, in the Lord rejoice;
It well becomes the good man's voice
To sing Jehovah's praise.
With harp and hymn of gladness sing,
Your gift of sweetest music bring,
To him a new song raise.
For upright is Jehovah's word;
And all the doings of the Lord
In faithfulness are wrought.
In justice and in judgment right
The Lord doth ever take delight;
With goodness earth is fraught.
Jehovah's word the heavens hath made,
And all the host of them arrayed
His breath has caused to be.
He rolls the waters heap on heap;
He stores away the mighty deep
In garners of the sea.
Let all the earth Jehovah fear,
Let all that dwell both far and near
lines.ko: 먼 곳과 가까운 곳 모두에 사는 모든 자들을 허락하소서

lines.en: In awe before him stand;
For, lo, he spake and it was done,
And all his sovereign power begun,
Stood fast at his command.
He makes the nations' counsels vain,
The plans the peoples would maintain
Are thwarted by his hand.
Jehovah's counsel stands secure,
His purposes of heart endure,
For evermore they stand.
O truly is the nation blessed
lines.ko: 아 정말 이 나라는 복 받았도다

lines.en: Whose God, before the world confessed,
Jehovah is alone;
And blessed the people is whom he
Has made his heritage to be,
And chosen for his own.

title_en: O God, most holy are thy ways
title_ko: 오 하느님, 당신의 길은 지극히 거룩합니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: O God, most holy are thy ways,
lines.ko: 오 하느님, 당신의 길은 지극히 거룩합니다.

lines.en: And who like thee deserves my praise?
lines.ko: 너처럼 내 칭찬을 받기에 합당한 사람이 누구이겠는가?

lines.en: Thou only doest wondrous things,
The whole wide world thy glory sings;
Thine outstretched arm thy people saved,
lines.ko: 주의 편 팔로 주의 백성을 구원하셨으니

lines.en: Though sore distressed and long enslaved.
lines.ko: 몹시 괴로워하고 오랫동안 노예 생활을 했지만.

lines.en: O God, from thee the waters fled,
The depths were moved with mighty dread,
The swelling clouds their torrents poured,
And o'er the earth the tempest roared;
'Mid lightning's flash and thunder's sound
Great trembling shook the solid ground.
Thy way was in the sea, O God,
Through mighty waters, deep and broad;
None understood but God alone,
lines.ko: 오직 하나님 외에는 아무도 이해하지 못하였으니

lines.en: To man thy footsteps were unknown;
But safe thy people thou didst keep,
lines.ko: 그러나 당신께서는 당신 백성을 안전하게 지키셨으며,

lines.en: Almighty Shepherd of thy sheep.

title_en: Round the Lord in glory seated
title_ko: 영광 중에 앉아 계신 주님 주위에 (자체번역)

lines.en: Round the Lord in glory seated,
lines.ko: 영광 중에 앉아 계신 주님 주위에,

lines.en: Cherubim and seraphim
Filled his temple, and repeated
Each to each the alternate hymn:
"Lord thy glory fills the heaven,
lines.ko: "주님, 당신의 영광이 하늘에 가득 차 있습니다.

lines.en: Earth is with its fulness stored;
Unto thee be glory given,
Holy, holy, holy Lord!"
Heaven is still with glory ringing,
Earth takes up the angels' cry,
"Holy, holy, holy," singing,
"Lord of hosts, the Lord most high."
With his seraph train before him,
With his holy church below,
Thus conspire we to adore him,
Bid we thus our anthem flow:
"Lord, thy glory fills the heaven,
Earth is with its fulness stored;
Unto thee be glory given,
Holy, holy, holy Lord!"
Thus thy glorious Name confessing,
We adopt thine angels' cry,
"Holy, holy, holy," blessing
Thee, the Lord of Hosts most high.

title_en: God the Lord is King

lines.en: From Psalm 99
God the Lord is King: before him
Earth with all thy nations, wait!
lines.ko: 당신의 모든 나라와 함께 지구여, 기다려라!

lines.en: Where the cherubim adore him,
Sitteth he in royal state:
He is holy; He is holy;
Blessed, only Potentate!
God the Lord is King of glory,
Zion, tell the world his fame;
Ancient Israel, the story
Of his faithfulness proclaim:
He is holy; He is holy;
Holy is his awful name.
Laws divine to them were spoken
From the pillar of the cloud;
Sacred precepts, quickly broken!
Fiercely then his vengeance flowed:
He is holy; He is holy;
To the dust their hearts were bowed.
But their Father God forgave them
lines.ko: 그러나 그들의 아버지 하나님이 그들을 용서하셨으니

lines.en: When they sought his face once more:
lines.ko: 그들이 다시 한 번 그의 얼굴을 찾았을 때:

lines.en: Ever ready was to save them,
Tenderly did he restore:
He is holy; He is holy;
We too will his grace implore.

title_en: O Lord most high, with all my heart
title_ko: 오 지극히 높으신 주님, 내 마음을 다해 (자체번역)

lines.en: O Lord most high, with all my heart
lines.ko: 오 지극히 높으신 주님, 내 마음을 다해

lines.en: Thy wondrous works I will proclaim;
I will be glad and give thee thanks
And sing the praises of thy name.
The Lord, the everlasting King,
Is seated on his judgment throne;
The righteous Judge of all the world
Will make his perfect justice known.
Jehovah will a refuge prove,
A refuge strong for all oppressed,
A safe retreat, where weary souls
In troublous times may surely rest.
lines.ko: 어려운 시기에는 반드시 쉴 수 있습니다.

lines.en: All they, O Lord, that know thy Name
lines.ko: 여호와여 주의 이름을 아는 자는 다

lines.en: Their confidence in thee will place,
For thou hast ne'er forsaken them
lines.ko: 당신은 결코 그들을 버리지 않으셨기 때문입니다

lines.en: Who earnestly have sought thy face.
Sing praises to the Lord most high,
To him who doth in Zion dwell;
Declare his mighty deeds abroad,
His deeds among the nations tell.
lines.ko: 민족들 가운데서 그분이 하신 일이 말해줍니다.

title_en: O Lord, be thou my helper true
title_ko: 오 주님, 당신은 나를 돕는 진실한 분이 되십시오 (자체번역)

lines.en: Psalm 12
O Lord, be thou my helper true,
For just and godly men are few;
The faithful who can find?
lines.ko: 충실한 사람을 누가 찾을 수 있습니까?

lines.en: From truth and wisdom men depart,
With flattering lips and double heart
They speak their evil mind.
The lips that speak, the truth to hide,
The tongues of arrogance and pride,
That boastful words employ,
False-speaking tongues that boast their might,
That own no law, that know no right,
Jehovah will destroy.
Because the poor are sore oppressed,
lines.ko: 가난한 사람들이 심한 억압을 받고 있기 때문에

lines.en: Because the needy are distressed,
And bitter are their cries,
The Lord will be their helper strong;
lines.ko: 주님은 그들의 든든한 조력자가 되실 것입니다.

lines.en: To save them from contempt and wrong
Jehovah will arise.
Jehovah's promises are sure,
His words are true, his words are pure
lines.ko: 그의 말은 진실하고 그의 말은 순수하다

lines.en: As silver from the flame.
Though base men walk on every side,
His saints are safe, whate'er betide,
lines.ko: 그의 성도들은 안전합니다. 무슨 일이 있어도

lines.en: Protected by his name.

title_en: O Lord, thou Judge of all the earth

lines.en: O Lord, thou Judge of all the earth,
To whom all vengeance doth belong,
Arise and show thy glory forth,
Requite the proud, condemn the wrong.
How long, O Lord, in boastful pride
Shall wicked men triumphant stand?
How long shall they afflict thy saints
lines.ko: 그들이 주의 성도들을 어느 때까지 괴롭게 하리이까

lines.en: And scorn thy wrath, thy dreadful hand?
lines.ko: 그리고 당신의 무서운 손이여, 당신의 분노를 비웃으시겠습니까?

lines.en: Be wise, ye fools and brutish men;
Shall not he see who formed the eye?
lines.ko: 눈을 지으신 분이 누구인지 보지 못하겠느냐?

lines.en: Shall not he hear who formed the ear,
And judge, who reigneth, God most high?
lines.ko: 심판관이여, 지극히 높으신 하나님이 누구로 다스리시느냐?

lines.en: The Lord will judge in righteousness,
From him all truth and knowledge flow;
The foolish thoughts of wicked men,
How vain they are the Lord doth know.
lines.ko: 그들이 얼마나 헛된 것인지 주님께서는 아십니다.

lines.en: That man is blest whom thou, O Lord,
lines.ko: 여호와여, 당신이 복을 받은 사람은 바로 그 사람입니다.

lines.en: With chastening hand dost teach thy will,
For in the day when sinners fall
That man in peace abideth still.
Unless the Lord had been my help,
My life had quickly passed away;
But when my foot had almost slipped,
lines.ko: 그런데 발이 거의 미끄러질 뻔했을 때,

lines.en: O Lord, thy mercy was my stay.
lines.ko: 오 주님, 당신의 자비가 제가 머물렀던 곳이었습니다.

lines.en: Amid the doubts that fill my mind
lines.ko: 내 마음을 가득 채운 의심들 속에서

lines.en: Thy comforts, Lord, bring joy to me;
lines.ko: 주님, 당신의 위로가 제게 기쁨이 되게 하소서.

lines.en: Can wickedness, though throned in might,
Have fellowship, O Lord, with thee?
The wicked, in their might arrayed,
Against the righteous join their power,
lines.ko: 의로운 자들을 대항하여 그들의 힘이 합세하여

lines.en: But to the Lord I flee for help,
lines.ko: 그러나 나는 여호와께로 도망하여 도움을 구합니다.

lines.en: He is my Refuge and my Tower.

title_en: O Jehovah, hear my words
title_ko: 오 여호와여, 내 말을 들어 주십시오 (자체번역)

lines.en: Psalm 5
O Jehovah, hear my words,
lines.ko: 오 여호와여, 내 말을 들어 주십시오.

lines.en: To my thoughts attentive be;
Hear my cry, my King, my God,
lines.ko: 나의 부르짖음을 들으소서 나의 왕이시요 나의 하나님이시여

lines.en: I will make my prayer to thee.
With the morning light, O Lord,
Thou shalt hear my voice arise,
lines.ko: 너는 내 목소리가 일어나는 것을 듣게 될 것이다.

lines.en: And expectant I will bring
Prayer as morning sacrifice.
Thou, Jehovah, art a God
Who delightest not in sin;
Evil shall not dwell with thee,
Nor the proud thy favor win.
Evil doers thou dost hate,
Lying tongues thou wilt defeat;
God abhors the man who loves
Violence and base deceit.
In the fulness of thy grace
To thy house I will repair;
Bowing toward thy holy place,
In thy fear to worship there.
lines.ko: 두려움 속에서 그곳에서 예배를 드리는 것입니다.

lines.en: Lead me in thy righteousness,
Let my foes assail in vain;
Lest my feet be turned aside,
Make thy way before me plain.
lines.ko: 내 앞에서 네 길을 평탄하게 하라.

lines.en: False and faithless are my foes,
lines.ko: 거짓되고 신실하지 못한 것이 나의 원수들이요

lines.en: In their mouth no truth is found;
lines.ko: 그들의 입에서는 진리를 찾을 수 없습니다.

lines.en: Deadly are the words they speak,
All their thoughts with sin abound.
lines.ko: 그들의 모든 생각은 죄로 가득 차 있습니다.

lines.en: Bring, O God, their plans to naught,
Hold them guilty in thy sight,
For against thee and thy law
They have set themselves to fight.
O let all that trust thy care
lines.ko: 오 모든 사람이 당신의 보살핌을 믿게 해주세요

lines.en: Ever glad and joyful be;
Let them joy who love thy name,
lines.ko: 주의 이름을 사랑하는 자들로 기쁨을 누리게 하소서

lines.en: Safely guarded, Lord, by thee.
For a blessing from thy store
To the righteous thou wilt yield;
Thou wilt compass him about
With thy favor as a shield.

title_en: My trust is in the Lord

lines.en: My trust is in the Lord:
How say ye then to me,
"Now like a bird from peril haste,
And to your mountain flee?"
Lo, sinners bend the bow
With arrow fixed for flight;
And stealthily in darkness go
The true in heart to smite.
What can the righteous do,
What can for them avail,
When all foundations are destroyed,
And all the pillars fail?
The Lord in Zion dwells,
The Lord is throned on high;
His eyes behold the sons of men
Their hearts and ways to try.
The Lord the righteous proves;
But those who scorn the right,
Who love deceit and violence
Are hateful in his sight.
For righteous is the Lord,
He loveth righteousness,
And with a gracious countenance
The upright he will bless.

title_en: Hallelujah! Raise, O raise

lines.en: Psalm 113
Hallelujah! Raise, O raise
To our God the song of praise;
All his servants join to sing
lines.ko: 그의 종들이 다 모여 노래를 부르느니라

lines.en: God our Saviour and our King.
Blessed be for evermore
That dread Name which we adore:
Round the world his praise be sung
Through all lands, in every tongue.
O'er all nations God alone,
Higher than the heav'ns his throne;
Who is like to God most high,
lines.ko: 지극히 높으신 하나님과 같은 자가 누구이뇨

lines.en: Infinite in majesty!
Yet to view the heav'ns he bends;
lines.ko: 그러나 heav'ns를 보기 위해 그는 구부린다;

lines.en: Yea, to earth he condescends;
Passing by the rich and great,
For the low and desolate.
He can raise the poor to stand
lines.ko: 그분은 가난한 자를 일으켜 세워 주실 수 있습니다

lines.en: With the princes of the land;
Wealth upon the needy shower:
Set him with the high in power.
He the broken spirit cheers:
Turns to joy the mourner's tears;
Such the wonders of his ways;
Praise his name, for ever praise!

title_en: Praise to the Lord, the Almighty

lines.en: Praise to the Lord, the Almighty, the King of creation!
lines.ko: 다 찬양 하여라 전능 왕 창조의 주께
lines.id: Segala puji bagi Tuhan, Yang Maha Perkasa, Raja segala ciptaan!

lines.ko: 내 혼아 주 찬양 평강과 구원의 주님
lines.id: Wahai jiwaku, pujilah Dia, karena Dialah kesehatan dan keselamatanmu!
Kalian semua yang mendengar, Sekarang mendekatlah ke Bait Suci-Nya
Bergabunglah dengan saya dalam ad-o-ra-tion yang menyenangkan!

lines.en: O my soul, praise him, for he is thy health and salvation!
lines.id: Puji bagi Tuhan, yang atas segala sesuatunya memerintah dengan begitu menakjubkan,

lines.ko: 포근한 날개 밑 늘 품어 주시는 주님
lines.id: Melindungimu di bawah sayap-Nya, ya, dengan lembut menopangnya!
Apakah kamu tidak melihat bagaimana keinginanmu selama ini
Dikabulkan dalam apa yang Dia perintahkan

lines.en: All ye who hear,
lines.id: Puji Tuhan, hai, biarlah semua yang ada dalam diriku memuja Dia!

lines.ko: 이 세상 만물이 주 앞에 다 나와 찬양
lines.id: Semua yang mempunyai hidup dan nafas, datanglah sekarang dengan puji-pujian di hadapan-Nya!
Biarkan kalimat "A-man!" Suara dari umat-Nya sebuah keuntungan.
Dengan senang hati jika kita memuja Dia.

lines.en: Now to his temple draw near,
Join me in glad adoration.
Praise to the Lord, who o'er all things so wondrously reigneth,
Shelters thee under his wings, yea, so gently sustaineth!
Hast thou not seen
How thy desires e'er have been
Granted in what he ordaineth?
Praise to the Lord, who doth prosper thy work and defend thee!
Surely his goodness and mercy here daily attend thee;
Ponder anew
What the Almighty will do,
If with his love he befriend thee!
Praise thou the Lord, who with marvelous wisdom hath made thee,
Decked thee with health, and with loving hand guided and stayed thee.
How oft in grief
Hath not he brought thee relief,
Spreading his wings to o'ershade thee!
Praise to the Lord! O let all that is in me adore him!
All that hath life and breath, come now with praises before him.
Let the Amen
Sound from his people again;
Gladly for aye we adore him.

title_id: Segala puji bagi Tuhan Yang Maha Esa

title_en: When all thy mercies, O my God

lines.en: When all thy mercies, O my God,
My rising soul surveys,
Transported with the view, I'm lost
In wonder, love, and praise.
Unnumbered comforts to my soul
lines.ko: 내 영혼에 셀 수 없는 위로가 되다

lines.en: Thy tender care bestowed,
Before my infant heart conceived
From whom those comforts flowed.
When worn with sickness, oft hast thou
With health renewed my face;
And, when in sins and sorrows sunk,
Revived my soul with grace.
Ten thousand thousand precious gifts
My daily thanks employ;
Nor is the least a cheerful heart
lines.ko: 또한 최소한 마음이 유쾌한 것도 아니다.

lines.en: That tastes those gifts with joy.
Through every period of my life
Thy goodness I'll pursue;
And after death, in distant worlds,
The glorious theme renew.
Through all eternity to thee
A joyful song I'll raise;
For O, eternity's too short
To utter all thy praise.

title_en: High in the heavens, Eternal God

lines.en: High in the heavens, eternal God,
Thy goodness in full glory shines;
Thy truth shall break through every cloud
lines.ko: 당신의 진실은 모든 구름을 뚫고 나올 것입니다

lines.en: That veils and darkens thy designs.
lines.ko: 그것은 당신의 계획을 가리고 어둡게 합니다.

lines.en: For ever firm thy justice stands,
As mountains their foundations keep;
Wise are the wonders of thy hands;
Thy judgments are a mighty deep.
Thy providence is kind and large,
Both man and beast thy bounty share;
lines.ko: 사람과 짐승 모두 당신의 은혜를 공유합니다.

lines.en: The whole creation is thy charge,
But saints are thy peculiar care.
My God, how excellent thy grace,
lines.ko: 나의 하나님, 당신의 은혜가 어찌 그리 아름다운지요.

lines.en: Whence all our hope and comfort spring!
lines.ko: 우리의 모든 희망과 위로가 어디서 오는가!

lines.en: The sons of Adam in distress
Fly to the shadow of thy wing.
From the provisions of thy house
We shall be fed with sweet repast;
lines.ko: 우리는 달콤한 음식을 먹게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: There mercy like a river flows,
And brings salvation to our taste.
lines.ko: 그리고 우리 입맛에 맞게 구원을 가져다줍니다.

lines.en: Life, like a fountain, rich and free,
Springs from the presence of my Lord;
And in thy light our souls shall see
lines.ko: 그리고 당신의 빛 속에서 우리 영혼은 보게 될 것입니다

lines.en: The glories promised in thy Word.

alt_titles: High in the heavens, eternal God

title_en: Hallelujah, praise Jehovah, O my soul

lines.en: Psalm 146
Hallelujah, praise Jehovah,
O my soul, Jehovah praise;
I will sing the glorious praises
Of my God through all my days.
lines.ko: 나의 모든 날 동안 나의 하나님.

lines.en: Put no confidence in princes,
Nor for help on man depend;
lines.ko: 도움을 받기 위해 사람에게 의존하지도 않습니다.

lines.en: He shall die, to dust returning,
And his purposes shall end.
Happy is the man that chooses
Israel's God to be his aid;
lines.ko: 이스라엘의 하나님이 그의 도움이 되실 것입니다.

lines.en: He is blessed whose hope of blessing
On the Lord his God is stayed.
Heaven and earth the Lord created,
Seas and all that they contain;
He delivers from oppression,
Righteousness he will maintain.
Food he daily gives the hungry,
lines.ko: 그분께서는 날마다 배고픈 이들에게 음식을 주시고,

lines.en: Sets the mourning prisoner free,
Raises those bowed down with anguish,
Makes the sightless eyes to see.
lines.ko: 앞이 보이지 않는 눈을 보게 만듭니다.

lines.en: Well Jehovah loves the righteous,
And the stranger he befriends,
lines.ko: 그리고 그는 친구가 된 낯선 사람,

lines.en: Helps the fatherless and widow,
Judgment on the wicked sends.
Hallelujah, praise Jehovah,
O my soul, Jehovah praise;
I will sing the glorious praises
Of my God through all my days.
lines.ko: 나의 모든 날 동안 나의 하나님.

lines.en: Over all God reigns for ever,
lines.ko: 모든 것을 다스리시는 하나님은 영원히 다스리시며

lines.en: Through all ages he is king;
Unto him, thy God, O Zion,
Joyful hallelujahs sing.

title_en: For ever settled in the heavens

lines.en: For ever settled in the heavens
Thy Word, O Lord, shall firmly stand;
Thy faithfulness shall never fail;
lines.ko: 당신의 신실함은 결코 실패하지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: The earth abides at thy command.
Thy word and works unmoved remain,
Thine every purpose to fulfil;
All things are thine and thee obey,
lines.ko: 만물이 다 당신의 것이니 당신은 순종하소서

lines.en: And all as servants wait thy will.
lines.ko: 그리고 모두는 종으로서 당신의 뜻을 기다립니다.

lines.en: I should have perished in my woe
Had not I loved thy law divine;
lines.ko: 내가 주의 법을 신성하게 사랑하지 아니하였더면

lines.en: That law I never can forget;
lines.ko: 나는 그 법을 결코 잊을 수 없습니다.

lines.en: O save me, Lord, for I am thine.
lines.ko: 오 주님, 저를 구원해 주십시오. 나는 당신의 것입니다.

lines.en: The wicked would destroy my soul,
But in thy truth is refuge sure;
Exceeding broad is thy command,
And in perfection shall endure.

title_en: Thy mercy and thy truth, O Lord
title_ko: 오 주님, 당신의 자비와 당신의 진리 (자체번역)

lines.en: Psalm 36:5-10
Thy mercy and thy truth, O Lord,
lines.ko: 오 주님, 당신의 자비와 당신의 진리,

lines.en: Transcend the lofty sky;
Thy judgments are a mighty deep,
And as the mountains high.
Lord, thou preservest man and beast;
Since thou art ever kind,
Beneath the shadow of thy wings
We may a refuge find.
With the abundance of thy house
We shall be satisfied,
From rivers of unfailing joy
Our thirst shall be supplied.
The fountain of eternal life
Is found alone with thee,
And in the brightness of thy light
We clearly light shall see.
lines.ko: 우리는 분명히 빛을 보게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: From those that know thee may thy love
lines.ko: 당신을 아는 사람들로부터 당신의 사랑을 받을 수 있기를 바랍니다

lines.en: And mercy never depart,
And may thy justice still protect
lines.ko: 그리고 당신의 정의가 여전히 보호되기를 바랍니다

lines.en: And bless the upright heart.

title_en: O Splendor of God's glory bright

lines.en: O Splendor of God's glory bright,
lines.ko: 찬란한 주의 영광은 영원히 빛난 광채요
lines.id: Wahai kemegahan kemuliaan Tuhan yang cemerlang,

lines.en: From light eternal bringing light,
lines.ko: 참 빛을 비춘 예수는 생명의 빛이 되신다
lines.id: Dari cahaya abadi yang membawa cahaya

lines.en: Thou light of light, light's living Spring,
lines.id: Wahai Cahaya kehidupan, sumber cahaya yang hidup,

lines.en: True Day, all days illumining:
lines.id: Hari yang sebenarnya, sepanjang hari il-lu-min-ing.

lines.en: Come, very Sun of heaven's love,
lines.ko: 올바른 일을 힘쓰며 이 맘의 탐욕 버리고
lines.id: Konfirmasikan keinginan kita untuk melakukan yang benar,

lines.en: In lasting radiance from above,
lines.ko: 불 같은 믿음 가지고 늘 주를 사랑하리라
lines.id: Dan peliharalah hati kami dari penyakit iri hati

lines.en: And pour the Holy Spirit's ray
lines.id: Biarlah imannya menyala kembali,

lines.en: On all we think or do today.
lines.id: Dan benci yang palsu, dan cinta dan yang benar.

lines.en: And now to thee our prayers ascend,
lines.ko: 온 천지만물 성부께 온 성도 모두 성자께
lines.id: Wahai hari yang menyenangkan

lines.en: O Father, glorious without end;
lines.ko: 보혜사 성령 힘 입어 영원히 찬양 합니다 아멘
lines.id: Dengan pikiran sejernih sinar pagi,

lines.en: We plead with sovereign grace for pow'r
lines.id: Dengan iman bagaikan ombak tengah hari yang bersinar terang,

lines.en: To conquer in temptation's hour.
lines.id: Jiwa kami tidak ternaungi oleh malam.

lines.en: Confirm our will to do the right,
lines.ko: 다 나와 찬송 드리세 다 같이 엎드려
lines.id: Segala puji bagi Allah Bapa,

lines.en: And keep our hearts from envy's blight;
lines.ko: 주 앞에 무릎 꿇고서 창조주 기리세 아멘
lines.id: Segala puji bagiMu, Putra kekal,

lines.en: Let faith her eager fires renew,
lines.id: Siapa, dengan Spir-it, yang kita kagumi

lines.en: And hate the false, and love the true.
lines.id: Selama-lamanya dan selama-lamanya. Amin.

lines.en: O joyful be the passing day
lines.ko: 다 나와 찬송 부르세 한 소리 높여서
lines.id: Mari kita semua keluar dan menyanyikan lagu pujian, meninggikan suara kita

lines.en: With thoughts as pure as morning's ray,
lines.id: Aku memuji Tuhan dengan hati gembira yang meluap-luap.

lines.en: With faith like noontide shining bright,
Our souls unshadowed by the night.
Dawn's glory gilds the earth and skies,
lines.ko: 그 보좌 앞에 엎드려 한 없는 감사와
lines.id: Saya sujud di hadapan takhta dan mengucapkan terima kasih yang tak ada habisnya.

lines.en: Let him, our perfect Morn, arise,
lines.id: Nyanyikan pujian tanpa henti untuk menghormati Juruselamat kita

lines.en: The work in God the Father one,
The Father imaged in the Son.

lines.id: Tuhan yang benar dan tinggi, Raja segala raja

lines.ko: 저 깊은 물과 높은 산 다 다스리시네
lines.id: Dia berkuasa atas perairan dalam dan pegunungan tinggi.

lines.ko: 다 나와 찬송 드리세 다 같이 엎드려
lines.id: Mari kita semua keluar dan menyanyikan lagu pujian. Mari kita semua sujud bersama.

lines.ko: 주 앞에 무릎 꿇고서 창조주 기리세 아멘
lines.id: Berlutut di hadapan Tuhan, Pencipta Kristus, Amin

title_id: Wahai Kemegahan Kemuliaan Tuhan Yang Cerah

title_en: O God, no longer hold thy peace
title_ko: 오 하나님, 더 이상 침묵하지 마십시오 (자체번역)

lines.en: From Psalm 83
O God, no longer hold thy peace,
lines.ko: 오 하느님, 더 이상 침묵하지 마시고,

lines.en: No longer silent be;
Thine enemies lift up their head
To fight thy saints and thee.
Against thine own, whom thou dost love,
Their craft thy foes employ;
They think to cut thy people off,
Thy church they would destroy.
Thine ancient foes, conspiring still,
lines.ko: 당신의 고대 적들은 여전히 음모를 꾸미고 있습니다.

lines.en: With one consent agree,
And they who with thy people strive
Make war, O God, with thee.
O God, who in our fathers' time
Didst smite our foes and thine,
So smite thine enemies today
Who in their pride combine.
Make them like dust and stubble blown
Before the whirlwind dire,
In terror driv'n before the storm
lines.ko: 폭풍우가 오기 전에 공포 속에서 운전해

lines.en: Of thy consuming fire.
Confound them in their sin till they
lines.ko: 그들의 죄로 그들을 혼란에 빠지게 하여 마침내

lines.en: To thee for pardon fly,
Till in dismay they, trembling, own
lines.ko: 그들은 당황하여 떨며 자신을 소유할 때까지

lines.en: That thou art God Most High.

title_en: The Lord is King! lift up thy voice

lines.en: The Lord is King! Lift up thy voice,
O earth; and all ye heavens, rejoice:
From world to world the joy shall ring,
The Lord omnipotent is king.
The Lord is King! Who then shall dare
Resist his will, distrust his care,
lines.ko: 그의 뜻에 저항하고, 그의 보살핌을 불신하며,

lines.en: Or murmur at his wise decrees,
lines.ko: 아니면 그분의 지혜로운 법령에 대해 불평할지어다.

lines.en: Or doubt his royal promises?
The Lord is King! Child of the dust,
The judge of all the earth is just;
Holy and true are all his ways:
Let every creature speak his praise.
Alike pervaded by his eye,
All parts of his dominion lie;
lines.ko: 그의 통치의 모든 부분이 놓여 있습니다.

lines.en: This world of ours, and worlds unseen,
lines.ko: 우리의 이 세계, 보이지 않는 세계,

lines.en: And thin the boundary between.
lines.ko: 그리고 그 사이의 경계를 얇게 만드세요.

lines.en: One Lord, one empire, all secures;
lines.ko: 하나의 군주, 하나의 제국, 모두가 안전합니다.

lines.en: He reigns, and life and death are yours:
lines.ko: 그가 다스리시니 삶과 죽음이 당신의 것입니다.

lines.en: Through earth and heaven one song shall ring,
lines.ko: 땅과 하늘에 하나의 노래가 울릴 것이다.

lines.en: "The Lord omnipotent is King!"

title_en: Jehovah reigns; let earth be glad

lines.en: From Psalm 97
Jehovah reigns; let earth be glad,
And all the isles their joy make known;
With clouds and darkness he is clad,
On truth and justice rests his throne.
lines.ko: 진리와 정의 위에 그분의 보좌가 놓여 있습니다.

lines.en: Consuming fire destroys his foes,
Around the world his lightnings blaze;
lines.ko: 전 세계에서 그의 번개가 타오르고 있습니다.

lines.en: The trembling earth his presence knows,
The mountains melt before his gaze.
The heavens his righteousness proclaim,
Through earth his glory shines abroad;
lines.ko: 땅을 통하여 그분의 영광이 널리 빛나고 있습니다.

lines.en: From idol worship turn with shame
And bow before the living God.
Thy church rejoices to behold
Thy judgments in the earth, O Lord;
Thy glory to the world unfold,
Supreme o'er all be thou adored.
All ye that truly love the Lord,
Hate sin, for he is just and pure;
lines.ko: 죄를 미워하십시오. 그는 의롭고 순결하시기 때문입니다.

lines.en: To saints his help he will accord
And keep them in his love secure.
lines.ko: 그리고 그들을 그분의 사랑 안에서 안전하게 지키십시오.

lines.en: For good men light and joy are sown
To bless them in the harvest time;
Ye saints, your joy in God make known
lines.ko: 성도들아 하나님 안에서 너희의 기쁨을 알게 하라

lines.en: And ever praise his name sublime.
lines.ko: 그리고 언제나 그분의 이름을 숭고하게 찬양하십시오.

title_en: God, the Lord, a King remaineth

lines.en: From Psalm 93
God, the Lord, a king remaineth,
Robed in his own glorious light;
lines.ko: 그 자신의 영광스러운 빛으로 옷을 입으셨습니다.

lines.en: God hath robed him, and he reigneth;
He hath girded him with might.
Alleluia! Alleluia!
God is King in depth and height.
In her everlasting station
Earth is poised, to swerve no more;
lines.ko: 지구는 더 이상 방향을 바꾸지 않을 준비가 되어 있습니다.

lines.en: Thou hast laid thy throne's foundation
From all time where thought can soar
lines.ko: 생각이 솟아오를 수 있는 모든 시간부터

lines.en: Alleluia! Alleluia!
Lord, thou art for evermore.
Lord, the waterfloods have lifted,
Ocean floods have lift their roar;
Now they pause where they have drifted,
lines.ko: 이제 그들은 표류하던 곳에서 멈춰 섰다.

lines.en: Now they burst upon the shore
Alleluia! Alleluia!
For the ocean's sounding store.
With all tones of waters blending,
Glorious is the breaking deep;
Glorious, beauteous without ending,
God who reigns on heaven's high steep.
lines.ko: 하늘의 높은 가파른 곳을 다스리시는 하나님.

lines.en: Alleluia! Alleluia!
Songs of ocean never sleep.
Lord, the words thy lips are telling
Are the perfect verity:
Of thine high eternal dwelling
Holiness shall inmate be.
Alleluia! Alleluia!
Pure is all that lives with thee.
lines.ko: 당신과 함께 사는 모든 것은 순수합니다.

title_en: Rejoice, ye people, homage give

lines.en: From Psalm 47
Rejoice, ye people, homage give,
To God with voice of triumph sing;
He ruleth in dread majesty,
The great, the universal king.
He putteth nations under us
And maketh us triumphant stand;
He giveth for our heritage
His promised rest, a goodly land.
God hath ascended with a shout,
Jehovah with the trumpet's sound;
Sing praise to God our King, sing praise,
Yea, let his glorious praise abound.
lines.ko: 그렇습니다. 그분의 영광스러운 찬양이 넘쳐나게 하십시오.

lines.en: Our God is King of all the earth,
With thoughtful heart his praise make known,
lines.ko: 사려 깊은 마음으로 그분의 찬양을 알리십시오.

lines.en: O'er all the nations God doth reign,
Exalted on his holy throne.
To praise and serve our covenant God
The princes of the earth draw nigh;
All kingly pow'rs belong to him,
He is exalted, God most high.
lines.ko: 그분은 높임을 받으시고, 가장 높으신 하나님이십니다.

title_en: Before Jehovah's awful throne

lines.en: Before Jehovah's awful throne,
lines.ko: 온 천하 만물 우러러 다 주를 찬양하여라
lines.id: Semua makhluk Tuhan dan Raja kita,

lines.en: Ye nations, bow with sacred joy:
lines.ko: 할렐루야 할렐루야 저 금빛 나는 밝은 해
lines.id: Angkat suaramu dan bernyanyilah bersama kami

lines.en: Know that the Lord is God alone,
lines.ko: 저 은빛 나는 밝은 달 하나님을 찬양하라
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Al-le-lu-ia!

lines.en: He can create, and he destroy.
lines.id: Engkau membakar matahari dengan sinar keemasan,

lines.en: His sovereign pow'r, without our aid,
lines.ko: 힘차게 부는 바람아 떠 가는 묘한 구름아
lines.id: Engkau menderu-deru angin yang begitu kencang,

lines.en: Made us of dust, and formed us men;
lines.ko: 할렐루야 할렐루야 저 돋는 장한 아침 해
lines.id: Hai awan yang berlayar di surga lama sekali,

lines.en: And when like wandering sheep we strayed,
lines.ko: 저 지는 고운 저녁 놀 하나님을 찬양하라
lines.id: Oh-, pujilah Dia! Al-le-lu-ia!

lines.en: He brought us to his fold again.
lines.id: Engkau bangun pagi, bergembira dalam pujian,

lines.en: We are his people, we his care,
lines.ko: 저 흘러가는 맑은 물 다 주를 노래하여라
lines.id: Engkau mengalirkan air, murni dan jernih,

lines.en: Our souls, and all our mortal frame;
lines.ko: 할렐루야 할렐루야 저 조화 많은 밝은 불
lines.id: Jadikanlah musik agar Tuhanmu mendengarnya,

lines.en: What lasting honors shall we rear,
lines.ko: 그 빛과 열을 내어서 하나님을 찬양하라
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Al-le-lu-ia!

lines.en: Almighty Maker, to my name?
lines.id: Tembakanmu begitu hebat dan cemerlang,

lines.en: We'll crowd thy gates with thankful songs,
lines.ko: 저 귀한 땅은 날마다 한없는 복을 펼치어
lines.id: Ibu bumi yang terkasih, yang hari demi hari

lines.en: High as the heavens our voices raise;
lines.ko: 할렐루야 할렐루야 땅 위의 꽃과 열매들
lines.id: Berkat tersingkap dalam perjalanan kita,

lines.en: And earth, with her ten thousand tongues,
lines.id: Oh-, pujilah Dia! Al-le-lu-ia!

lines.en: Shall fill thy courts with sounding praise.
lines.id: Bunga dan buah yang tumbuh di dalam dirimu,

lines.en: Wide as the world is thy command,
lines.ko: 너 선한 마음 가진 자 늘 용서하며 살아라
lines.id: Dan kalian semua yang berhati lembut,

lines.en: Vast as eternity thy love;
lines.ko: 할렐루야 할렐루야 큰 고통 슬픔 지닌 자
lines.id: Untuk memberi kepada orang lain, ambillah bagianmu.

lines.en: Firm as a rock thy truth must stand,
lines.ko: 네 근심 주께 맡겨라 하나님을 찬양하라
lines.id: Oh-, bernyanyilah! Al-le-lu-ia!

lines.en: When rolling years shall cease to move.
lines.id: Kamu yang rindu menanggung derita dan duka,

title_id: Semua Makhluk Tuhan Dan Raja Kita

title_en: God is known among his people

lines.en: From Psalm 76
God is known among his people,
Every mouth his praises fill;
lines.ko: 모든 입에 그분의 찬양이 가득 차 있습니다.
