lines.en: From of old he has established
His abode on Zion's hill;
There he broke the sword and arrow,
Bade the noise of war be still.
Excellent and glorious art thou,
With thy trophies from the fray;
Thou hast slain the valiant-hearted,
Wrapped in sleep of death are they;
When thine anger once is risen,
lines.ko: 당신의 분노가 한 번 솟아올랐을 때,

lines.en: Who can stand in that dread day?
lines.ko: 그 무서운 날에 누가 설 수 있겠습니까?

lines.en: When from heaven thy sentence sounded,
All the earth in fear was still,
While to save the meek and lowly
God in judgment wrought his will;
lines.ko: 하나님은 심판을 통해 자신의 뜻을 이루셨습니다.

lines.en: E'en the wrath of man shall praise thee,
Thy designs it shall fulfil.
Vow and pay ye to Jehovah,
Him your God for ever own;
All men, bring your gifts before him
lines.ko: 모든 남자들아 너희 예물을 그 앞에 가져오라

lines.en: Worship him, and him alone;
Mighty kings obey and fear him,
Princes bow before his throne.

title_en: With glory clad, with strength arrayed

lines.en: From Psalm 93
With glory clad, with strength arrayed,
The Lord, that o'er all nature reigns,
The world's foundations strongly laid,
And the vast fabric still sustains.
How surely stablished is thy throne,
Which shall no change or period see!
lines.ko: 어떤 변화나 기간도 볼 수 없을 것입니다!

lines.en: For thou, O Lord, and thou alone,
Art God from all eternity.
The floods, O Lord, lift up their voice,
And toss the troubled waves on high;
But God above can still their noise,
lines.ko: 그러나 위에 계신 하나님은 그들의 소음을 잠잠케 하실 수 있습니다.

lines.en: And make the angry sea comply.
Thy promise, Lord, is ever sure,
And they that in thy house would dwell,
lines.ko: 그리고 당신 집에 살고자 하는 사람들은,

lines.en: That happy station to secure,
Must still in holiness excel.

title_en: Sing to the Lord, sing his praises

lines.en: From Psalm 96
lines.id: Datanglah, Engkau Sumber berkah,

lines.en: tune my heart to sing Thy grace
lines.ko: 한량없이 자비하심 측량 할 길 없도다
lines.id: selaraskan hatiku untuk menyanyikan rahmat-Mu

lines.en: Streams of mer-cy, nev-er ceas-ing,
lines.id: Aliran belas kasihan yang tidak pernah berhenti,

lines.en: Call for songs of loud-est praise.
lines.ko: 구속하신 그 사랑을 항상 찬송 합니다
lines.id: Panggilan untuk lagu pujian yang paling keras.

lines.en: Sing to the Lord, sing his praise, all ye peoples,
lines.ko: 주의 크신 도움 받아 이 때 까지 왔으니
lines.id: Di sini saya menaikkan Eb-en-e-zer saya

lines.en: New be your song as new honors ye pay;
lines.id: Di sini, dengan bantuan-Mu, aku datang

lines.en: Sing of his majesty, bless him for ever,
lines.ko: 하나님의 품을 떠나 죄에 빠진 우리를
lines.id: Dan aku berharap, demi keridhaan-Mu,

lines.en: Show his salvation from day to day.
lines.id: Aman untuk tiba di rumah.

lines.en: Tell of his wondrous works, tell of his glory,
lines.ko: 주의 귀한 은혜 받고 일생 빚진 자 되네
lines.id: Oh anugerah betapa besarnya hutang-atau

lines.en: Till through the nations his name is revered;
lines.ko: 주의 은혜 사슬되사 나를 주께 매소서
lines.id: Setiap hari aku dibatasi untuk itu

lines.en: Praise and exalt him, for he is almighty,
lines.ko: 우리 맘은 연약하여 범죄 하기 쉬우니
lines.id: Biarlah rahmat itu sekarang, seperti belenggu,

lines.en: God over all let the Lord be feared.
lines.id: Ikatkan hatiku yang lemah padaMu.

lines.en: Vain are the heathen gods, idols and helpless;
God made the heavens, and his glory they tell;
Honor and majesty shine out before him,
Beauty and strength in his temple dwell.
Give unto God most high glory and honor,
Come with your offerings and humbly draw near;
In holy beauty now worship Jehovah,
Tremble before him with godly fear.
Make all the nations know God reigns for ever;
Earth is established as he did decree;
Righteous and just is the King of the nations,
Judging the people with equity.
Let heaven and earth be glad; waves of the ocean,
Forest and field, exultation express;
For God is coming, the Judge of the nations,
Coming to judge in his righteousness.

title_en: The earth, with all that dwell therein
title_ko: 땅과 그 안에 거하는 모든 것 (자체번역)

lines.en: From Psalm 24
The earth, with all that dwell therein,
lines.ko: 땅과 그 안에 거하는 모든 것은

lines.en: With all its wealth untold,
lines.ko: 그 모든 부를 이루 말할 수 없이,

lines.en: Belongs to God who founded it
Upon the seas of old.
What man shall stand before the Lord
lines.ko: 어떤 사람이 주님 앞에 설 수 있겠습니까?

lines.en: On Zion's holy hill?
The clean of hand, the pure of heart,
The just who do his will.
Lo, such are they that seek for God,
lines.ko: 보라, 하나님을 찾는 이들이 바로 이 사람들이니라.

lines.en: And blest by him they live;
To them his perfect righteousness
The God of grace will give.
Ye everlasting doors, give way,
Lift up your heads, ye gates!
For now, behold, to enter in
The King of Glory waits.
Who is this glorious King that comes
To claim his sovereign right?
It is the Lord omnipotent,
All conquering in his might.
Ye everlasting doors, give way,
Lift up your heads, ye gates!
For now, behold, to enter in
The King of Glory waits.
Who is this glorious King that comes
To claim his rightful throne?
The Lord of hosts, he is the King
Of Glory, God alone.

title_en: Kingdoms and thrones to God belong

lines.en: From Psalm 68:32-35
Kingdoms and thrones to God belong;
Crown him ye nations, in your song;
lines.ko: 너희 민족들아, 너희 노래로 그에게 왕관을 씌우라.

lines.en: His wondrous names and powers rehearse;
lines.ko: 그분의 놀라운 이름과 능력이 연습되고 있습니다.

lines.en: His honors shall enrich your verse.
lines.ko: 그의 명예는 당신의 시를 풍요롭게 할 것입니다.

lines.en: He shakes the heavens with loud alarms;
How terrible is God in arms!
lines.ko: 팔을 안고 계신 하나님은 얼마나 무서운 분이십니까!

lines.en: In Israel are his mercies known,
Israel is his peculiar throne.
Proclaim him King, pronounce him blest;
lines.ko: 그를 왕으로 선포하고 그를 축복한다고 선포하십시오.

lines.en: He's your Defence, your Joy, your Rest;
lines.ko: 그분은 당신의 방어자이시며, 당신의 기쁨이시며, 당신의 휴식이십니다.

lines.en: When terrors rise, and nations faint,
God is the strength of every saint.

title_en: Not unto us, O Lord of heaven
title_ko: 오 하늘의 주님, 우리에게는 그렇지 않습니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: Not unto us, O Lord of heav'n,
lines.ko: 오 하늘의 주님이시여, 우리에게는 그렇지 않습니다.

lines.en: But unto thee be glory given;
In love and truth thou dost fulfil
The counsels of thy sovereign will;
Though nations fail thy pow'r to own,
lines.ko: 비록 국가들이 당신의 소유 능력을 상실하더라도,

lines.en: Yet thou dost reign, and thou alone.
Let Israel trust in God alone,
The Lord whose grace and power are known;
To him your full allegiance yield,
And he will be your help and shield;
lines.ko: 그러면 그분은 여러분의 도움과 방패가 되실 것입니다.

lines.en: All those who fear him God will bless,
lines.ko: 그를 경외하는 자에게는 하나님이 다 복을 주시리니

lines.en: His saints have proved his faithfulness.
All ye that fear him and adore,
The Lord increase you more and more;
lines.ko: 주님께서 여러분을 점점 더 늘려 가십니다.

lines.en: Both great and small who him confess,
You and your children he will bless.
lines.ko: 그분은 당신과 당신의 자녀를 축복하실 것입니다.

lines.en: Yea, we will ever bless his Name;
lines.ko: 그렇습니다. 우리는 그분의 이름을 영원히 송축할 것입니다.

lines.en: Praise ye the Lord, his praise proclaim.

title_en: Lord, with glowing heart I'd praise thee

lines.en: Lord, with glowing heart I'd praise thee
For the bliss thy love bestows,
For the pard'ning grace that saves me,
And the peace that from it flows;
Help, O God, my weak endeavor;
lines.ko: 오 하느님, 나의 약한 노력을 도와주소서.

lines.en: This dull soul to rapture raise;
Thou must light the flame, or never
Can my love be warmed to praise.
lines.ko: 내 사랑이 따뜻해져서 찬양받을 수 있을까요?

lines.en: Praise, my soul, the God that sought thee,
lines.ko: 내 영혼아, 너를 찾으신 하느님을 찬양하여라.

lines.en: Wretched wand'rer far astray;
Found thee lost, and kindly brought thee
From the paths of death away;
Praise, with love's devoutest feeling,
Him who saw thy guilt-born fear,
lines.ko: 당신의 죄책감으로 인한 두려움을 보신 분,

lines.en: And, the light of hope revealing,
Bade the blood-stained cross appear.
Praise thy Saviour God that drew thee
To that cross, new life to give,
Held a blood-sealed pardon to thee,
Bade thee look to him and live;
Praise the grace whose threats alarmed thee,
lines.ko: 위협으로 인해 당신을 놀라게 하신 은혜를 찬양합니다.

lines.en: Roused thee from thy fatal ease,
Praise the grace whose promise warmed thee,
lines.ko: 당신을 따뜻하게 해주신 약속의 은혜를 찬양합니다.

lines.en: Praise the grace that whispered peace.
Lord, this bosom's ardent feeling
Vainly would my lips express;
Low before thy footstool kneeling,
lines.ko: 당신의 발판 앞에 낮게 무릎을 꿇고,

lines.en: Deign thy suppliant's prayer to bless:
Let thy love, my soul's chief treasure,
lines.ko: 내 영혼의 가장 큰 보물인 당신의 사랑을

lines.en: Love's pure flame within me raise,
lines.ko: 내 안에 사랑의 순수한 불꽃이 솟아오릅니다.

lines.en: And, since words can never measure,
lines.ko: 그리고 말로는 결코 측정할 수 없기 때문에,

lines.en: Let my life show forth thy praise.

title_en: Praise, my soul, the King of heaven

lines.en: Praise, my soul, the King of heaven,
lines.ko: 내 영혼아 찬양하라 주님 앞에 엎드려
lines.id: Pujilah jiwaku, Raja surga

lines.en: To his feet thy tribute bring;
lines.ko: 구속하신 넓은 은혜 높이 찬양 하여라
lines.id: Bawa upetimu ke kakinya

lines.en: Ransomed, healed, restored, forgiven,
lines.id: Ran-somed, disembuhkan, disimpan kembali untuk diberikan,

lines.en: Who like me, his praise should sing?
lines.id: Semakin banyak pujian-pujian-Nya dinyanyikan

lines.en: Praise him, praise him,
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Al-le-lu-ia!

lines.en: Praise him, praise him,
lines.id: Pujilah Raja yang kekal.

lines.en: Praise the everlasting King.
Praise him for his grace and favor
lines.id: Pujilah Dia atas rahmat dan nikmat-Nya

lines.en: To our fathers in distress;
lines.id: Kepada ayah kami yang kesusahan

lines.en: Praise him still the same for ever,
lines.id: Puji Dia masih sama seperti dulu,

lines.en: Slow to chide, and swift to bless;
lines.id: Lambat menegur, dan cepat memberkati

lines.en: Praise him, praise him,
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Al-le-lu-ia!

lines.en: Praise him, praise him,
lines.id: Mulia dalam kesetiaan-Nya.

lines.en: Glorious in his faithfulness.
Father-like, he tends and spares us;
lines.ko: 우리 약함 아시는 주 항상 지켜 주시고
lines.id: Seperti Bapa, Dia merawat dan menyelamatkan kita

lines.en: Well our feeble frame he knows;
lines.id: Ya, kerangka lemah kita. Dia tahu

lines.en: In his hands he gently bears us,
lines.id: Di tangan-Nya Dia dengan lemah lembut memikul kita,

lines.en: Rescues us from all our foes;
lines.id: Menyelamatkan kita dari semua musuh kita

lines.en: Praise him, praise him,
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Al-le-lu-ia!

lines.en: Praise him, praise him,
lines.id: Luas namun rahmat-Nya mengalir.

lines.en: Widely as his mercy goes.
Angels, help us to adore him;
lines.ko: 천사들아 우리 함께 주께 찬양 드리세
lines.id: Para bidadari di ketinggian, a-memuja Dia,

lines.en: Ye behold him face to face;
lines.ko: 성도들아 모두 모여 주께 경배 하여라
lines.id: Lihatlah Dia muka dengan muka

lines.en: Sun and moon, bow down before him,
lines.id: Orang Suci menang, bersujud di hadapan-Nya,

lines.en: Dwellers all in time and space.
lines.id: Berkumpul dari setiap ras

lines.en: Praise him, praise him,
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Al-le-lu-ia!

lines.en: Praise him, praise him,
lines.id: Pujilah bersama kami Tuhan yang penuh kasih karunia.

lines.en: Praise with us the God of grace.

title_en: Great God of wonders! all thy ways
title_ko: 위대하신 경이의 하나님! 네 모든 길 (자체번역)

lines.en: Great God of wonders! all thy ways
lines.ko: 위대하신 경이의 하나님! 네 모든 길

lines.en: Are worthy of thyself divine;
And the bright glories of thy grace
Among thine other wonders shine:
Who is a pardoning God like thee?
Or who has grace so rich and free?
lines.ko: 아니면 그토록 풍성하고 값없는 은혜를 받은 사람이 누구입니까?

lines.en: Pardon from an offended God!
Pardon for sins of deepest dye!
Pardon bestowed through Jesus' blood!
Pardon that brings the rebel nigh!
O may this glorious, matchless love,
lines.ko: 오, 이 영광스럽고 비교할 수 없는 사랑이여,

lines.en: This God-like miracle of grace,
Teach mortal tongues, like those above,
To raise this song of lofty praise:

title_en: O bless the Lord, my soul

lines.en: O bless the Lord, my soul;
Let all within me join,
lines.ko: 내 안의 모든 사람이 동참하게 하소서.

lines.en: And aid my tongue to bless his name,
lines.ko: 내 혀가 그분의 이름을 찬양할 수 있도록 도와주소서.

lines.en: Whose favors are divine.
O bless the Lord, my soul,
Nor let his mercies lie
lines.ko: 또한 그분의 자비가 거짓말을 하지 못하게 하십시오

lines.en: Forgotten in unthankfulness,
And without praises die.
'Tis he forgives thy sins,
'Tis he relieves thy pain,
'Tis he that heals thy sicknesses,
lines.ko: 네 병을 고치시는 이가 곧 이시니라

lines.en: And makes thee young again.
He crowns thy life with love,
lines.ko: 그분은 사랑으로 당신의 삶에 왕관을 씌우시며,

lines.en: When ransomed from the grave;
He that redeemed my soul from hell
Hath sovereign power to save.
He fills the poor with good;
lines.ko: 그분은 가난한 사람들을 좋은 것으로 채워 주십니다.

lines.en: He gives the sufferers rest;
lines.ko: 그분은 고통 받는 자들에게 안식을 주시고

lines.en: The Lord hath judgments for the proud,
And justice for th'oppressed.
His wondrous works and ways
He made by Moses known;
But sent the world his truth and grace
lines.ko: 그러나 그의 진리와 은혜를 세상에 보내셨느니라

lines.en: By his beloved Son.

title_en: O love of God, how strong and true

lines.en: O love of God, how strong and true!
lines.id: Bersukacitalah, Tuhan adalah Raja

lines.en: Eternal, and yet ever new;
lines.id: Tuan dan Rajamu a-dore!

lines.en: Uncomprehended and unbought,
lines.ko: 네 맘 열어 한 소리로 기뻐 주를 찬양하라
lines.id: Bersukacitalah, mengucap syukur, dan bernyanyi,

lines.en: Beyond all knowledge and all thought.
lines.id: Dan menang lagi.

lines.en: O love of God, how deep and great!
lines.id: Kerajaannya tidak mungkin gagal

lines.en: Far deeper than man's deepest hate;
lines.id: Dia memerintah bumi dan surga.

lines.en: Self-fed, self-kindled like the light,
lines.ko: 네 맘 열어 한 소리로 기뻐 주를 찬양하라
lines.id: Kunci kematian dan neraka

lines.en: Changeless, eternal, infinite.
lines.id: Apakah kepada Yesus kita diberikan.

lines.en: O heavenly love, how precious still,
lines.ko: 죄 짐을 벗은 후 주 앞에 가리니
lines.id: Yesus, Juruselamat, memerintah,

lines.en: In days of weariness and ill,
lines.id: Tuhan kebenaran dan cinta.

lines.en: In nights of pain and helplessness,
lines.ko: 네 맘 열어 한 소리로 기뻐 주를 찬양하라
lines.id: Ketika Dia telah membersihkan noda kita,

lines.en: To heal, to comfort, and to bless!
lines.id: Dia mengambil tempat duduk-Nya di atas.

lines.en: O wide embracing, wondrous love!
lines.ko: 참 소망 가지고 그 날을 기리며
lines.id: Bergembiralah kembali dalam pengharapan yang mulia!

lines.en: We read thee in the sky above,
lines.ko: 주 다시 오실 때 기쁘게 맞으리
lines.id: Tuhan kami, Hakim akan datang

lines.en: We read thee in the earth below,
lines.ko: 네 맘 열어 한 소리로 기뻐 주를 찬양하라 아멘
lines.id: Dan angkatlah hamba-hamba-Nya

lines.en: In seas that swell, and streams that flow.
lines.id: Ke rumah abadi mereka.

lines.en: We read thee best in him who came
To bear for us the cross of shame;
Sent by the Father from on high,
Our life to live, our death to die.
We read thy power to bless and save,
Even in the darkness of the grave;
Still more in resurrection light
We read the fulness of thy might.
O love of God, our shield and stay
Through all the perils of our way!
Eternal love, in thee we rest,
For ever safe, for ever blest.

title_en: The man who once has found abode

lines.en: The man who once has found abode,
Within the secret place of God
Shall with Almighty God abide,
And in his shadow safely hide.
lines.ko: 그리고 그의 그림자 속에 안전하게 숨어 있습니다.

lines.en: I therefore of the Lord will say,
He is my Refuge and my Stay;
lines.ko: 그분은 나의 피난처이시며 나의 머무시는 분이십니다.

lines.en: My Citadel of strength is he
My God in whom my trust shall be.
For he shall with his watchful care
Preserve thee from the fowler's snare;
Yea, he shall be thy sure defense
lines.ko: 그렇습니다, 그는 당신의 확실한 방어자가 될 것입니다

lines.en: Against the deadly pestilence.
His outspread pinions shall thee hide,
lines.ko: 그의 펼쳐진 날개를 너는 숨길 것이며,

lines.en: Beneath his wings shalt thou confide.
lines.ko: 그분의 날개 아래서 당신은 비밀을 털어놓으십시오.

lines.en: His faithfulness shall ever be
A shield and buckler unto thee.
No nightly terrors shall alarm,
No deadly shaft by day shall harm;
lines.ko: 낮에는 어떤 치명적인 화살도 해를 끼치지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: Nor pestilence that walks by night,
Nor plagues that waste in noonday light.
lines.ko: 한낮의 빛 속에서 낭비되는 재앙도 아닙니다.

lines.en: Because his angels he commands
To bear thee safely in their hands,
To guard thy ways, lest left alone,
lines.ko: 네 길을 지켜 홀로 버려지지 않게 하려 하심이니라

lines.en: Thou dash thy foot against a stone.
Because he set his love on me,
From danger I will set him free.
Because to him my name is known,
lines.ko: 그 사람에게는 내 이름이 알려져 있기 때문이다.

lines.en: On high I'll set him as mine own.
lines.ko: 높은 곳에서는 내가 그를 내 소유로 삼겠다.

title_en: Bow down thine ear, O Lord, and hear

lines.en: Psalm 86:1-11
Bow down thine ear, O Lord, and hear,
For I am poor and great my need;
Preserve my soul, for thee I fear;
lines.ko: 내 영혼을 지켜주소서. 내가 당신을 경외하기 때문입니다.

lines.en: O God, thy trusting servant heed.
lines.ko: 오 하느님, 당신을 신뢰하는 종은 귀를 기울이십시오.

lines.en: O Lord, be merciful to me,
For all the day to thee I cry;
Rejoice thy servant, for to thee
I lift my soul, O Lord most high.
lines.ko: 오 가장 높으신 주님, 내 영혼을 들어 올립니다.

lines.en: For thou, O Lord, art good and kind,
And ready to forgive thou art;
lines.ko: 그리고 당신은 용서할 준비가 되어 있습니다.

lines.en: Abundant mercy they shall find
Who call on thee with all their heart.
lines.ko: 온 마음을 다해 당신을 부르는 사람들입니다.

lines.en: O Lord, incline thine ear to me,
lines.ko: 오 주님, 나에게 귀를 기울여 주십시오.

lines.en: My voice of supplication heed,
lines.ko: 나의 간구하는 목소리에 귀를 기울여 주십시오.

lines.en: In trouble I will cry to thee,
For thou wilt answer when I plead.
There is no God but thee alone,
Nor works like thine, O Lord most high,
lines.ko: 오 가장 높으신 주님, 당신처럼 일하지도 않으십니다.

lines.en: All nations shall surround thy throne
And their Creator glorify.
In all thy deeds how great thou art!
lines.ko: 당신의 모든 행위에서 당신은 얼마나 위대합니까!

lines.en: Thou one true God, thy way make clear;
lines.ko: 유일하신 참 하나님이시여, 주의 길을 평탄하게 하소서.

lines.en: Teach me with undivided heart
To trust thy truth, thy Name to fear.
lines.ko: 당신의 진리를 신뢰하고, 당신의 이름을 두려워하십시오.

title_en: With grateful heart my thanks I bring

lines.en: From Psalm 138
lines.ko: 다 감사드리세 온 맘을 주께 바쳐
lines.id: Sekarang terima kasih kepada kami semua, Tuhan kami

lines.en: With heart and hands and voic-es,
lines.ko: 그 섭리 놀라워 온 세상 기뻐하네
lines.id: Dengan hati, tangan, dan suara,

lines.en: Who won-drous things hath done,
lines.ko: 예부터 주신 복 한없는 그 사랑
lines.id: Siapa yang telah melakukan banyak hal,

lines.en: In whom His world re-joic-es
lines.id: Kepada siapa dunia-Nya bersukacita

lines.en: With grateful heart my thanks I bring,
lines.id: Oh, semoga Tuhan yang pemurah ini

lines.en: Before the great thy praise I sing:
lines.id: Sepanjang hidup kita berada di dekat kita,

lines.en: I worship in thy holy place
lines.ko: 몸과 맘 병들 때 은혜로 지키사
lines.id: Dengan hati yang selalu gembira

lines.en: And praise thee for thy truth and grace;
lines.id: Dan kedamaian yang diberkati untuk menghibur kita

lines.en: For truth and grace together shine
lines.id: Dan peliharalah kami dalam rahmat-Nya,

lines.en: In thy most holy Word divine.
lines.id: Dan tuntunlah kami ketika kebingungan,

lines.en: I cried to thee and thou didst save,
lines.id: Segala puji dan syukur kepada Tuhan

lines.en: Thy Word of grace new courage gave;
lines.id: Sang Ayah sekarang diberikan,

lines.en: The kings of earth shall thank thee, Lord,
lines.id: Putra, dan Dia yang memerintah

lines.en: For they have heard thy wondrous word;
lines.id: Bersama mereka di surga tertinggi,

lines.en: Yea, they shall come with songs of praise,
lines.id: Tuhan yang kekal,

lines.en: For great and glorious are thy ways.
lines.id: Yang dipuja oleh bumi dan surga,

lines.en: O Lord, enthroned in glory bright,
Thou reignest in the heavenly height;
The proud in vain thy favor seek,
But thou hast mercy for the meek;
Through trouble though my pathway be,
Thou wilt revive and strengthen me.
Thou wilt stretch forth thy mighty arm
To save me when my foes alarm;
The work thou hast for me begun
Shall by thy grace be fully done;
For ever mercy dwells with thee;
O Lord, my Maker, think on me.

title_id: Sekarang Terima Kasih Kami Semua Tuhan Kami

title_en: The Lord's my Shepherd, I'll not want
title_ko: 주님은 나의 목자시니 나는 원치 아니하노라 (자체번역)

lines.en: Psalm 23
The Lord's my Shepherd, I'll not want;
lines.ko: 주님은 나의 목자시니 나는 원하지 않습니다.

lines.en: He makes me down to lie
In pastures green; he leadeth me
The quiet waters by.
My soul he doth restore again;
And me to walk doth make
Within the paths of righteousness,
E'en for his own name's sake.
Yea, though I walk in death's dark vale,
lines.ko: 그래요, 내가 죽음의 어두운 골짜기를 걷는다 할지라도

lines.en: Yet will I fear none ill,
lines.ko: 그러나 나는 아무도 아프지 않을 것을 두려워하지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: For thou art with me; and thy rod
lines.ko: 당신이 나와 함께 계시기 때문입니다. 그리고 너의 지팡이

lines.en: And staff me comfort still.
My table thou hast furnished
In presence of my foes;
My head thou dost with oil anoint,
And my cup overflows.
Goodness and mercy all my life
Shall surely follow me:
And in God's house for evermore
My dwelling place shall be.

alt_titles: The Lord's my Shepherd, I'll not want (tune 2)
The Lord's my Shepherd, I'll not want (tune 3)
The Lord's my Shepherd, I'll not want (tune 4)

title_en: Under his wings, under his wings
title_ko: 그의 날개 아래, 그의 날개 아래 (자체번역)

lines.en: From Psalm 91
Under the care of my God, the Almighty,
Safe in the secret place of the Most High!
lines.ko: 지극히 높으신 분의 은밀한 곳에는 안전합니다!

lines.en: He is my Refuge, the Lord is my Fortress,
lines.ko: 그는 나의 피난처시요 여호와는 나의 요새시니

lines.en: Him I am trusting when trouble is nigh.
lines.ko: 환난이 가까웠을 때 나는 그분을 신뢰합니다.

lines.en: Under his wings, under his wings,
lines.ko: 그의 날개 아래, 그의 날개 아래서,

lines.en: Safe in the refuge hide thee;
Trusting his truth and faithfulness,
No evil can betide thee.
lines.ko: 어떤 악도 당신을 이길 수 없습니다.

lines.en: Be not afraid for the terror of midnight,
Nor for the arrow that hasteth to slay;
Fear not the pestilence walking in darkness,
lines.ko: 흑암 중에 행하는 전염병을 두려워하지 말라

lines.en: Nor the destroyer that wasteth by day.
Seek the Most High for thy sure habitation,
lines.ko: 너의 확실한 처소를 위하여 지극히 높으신 이에게 구하라

lines.en: Unto Jehovah for refuge now fly;
There shall no evil befall thee nor harm thee,
lines.ko: 어떤 재앙도 네게 닥치지 아니하며 해를 끼치지도 아니하리니

lines.en: Unto thy dwelling no plague shall come nigh.
lines.ko: 당신의 거처에는 어떤 재앙도 가까이 오지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: Love thou the Lord, surely he will deliver;
lines.ko: 너는 여호와를 사랑하라. 그가 반드시 구원하시리라.

lines.en: He will exalt thee and answer thy prayer;
lines.ko: 그분께서 너를 높이시고 네 기도에 응답하실 것이다.

lines.en: He will be with thee to honor and give thee
lines.ko: 그가 너와 함께 있어 네게 존귀함과 은총을 주시리라

lines.en: Life without end, his salvation to share.
lines.ko: 끝이 없는 생명, 그분의 구원을 나누어 주십시오.

alt_titles: Under the care of my God, the Almighty

title_en: Though troubles assail us

lines.en: Though troubles assail us, and dangers affright,
lines.ko: 다 찬양 하여라 전능 왕 창조의 주께
lines.id: Segala puji bagi Tuhan, Yang Maha Perkasa, Raja segala ciptaan!

lines.en: Though friends should all fail us, and foes all unite,
lines.ko: 내 혼아 주 찬양 평강과 구원의 주님
lines.id: Wahai jiwaku, pujilah Dia, karena Dialah kesehatan dan keselamatanmu!

lines.en: Yet one thing secures us, whatever betide,
lines.id: Kalian semua yang mendengar, Sekarang mendekatlah ke Bait Suci-Nya

lines.en: The promise assures us, "The Lord will provide."
lines.id: Bergabunglah dengan saya dalam ad-o-ra-tion yang menyenangkan!

lines.en: The birds, without garner or storehouse, are fed;
lines.id: Puji bagi Tuhan, yang atas segala sesuatunya memerintah dengan begitu menakjubkan,

lines.en: From them let us learn to trust God for our bread:
lines.ko: 포근한 날개 밑 늘 품어 주시는 주님
lines.id: Melindungimu di bawah sayap-Nya, ya, dengan lembut menopangnya!

lines.en: His saints what is fitting shall ne'er be denied
lines.id: Apakah kamu tidak melihat bagaimana keinginanmu selama ini

lines.en: So long as 'tis written, "The Lord will provide."
lines.id: Dikabulkan dalam apa yang Dia perintahkan

lines.en: When Satan assails us to stop up our path,
lines.id: Puji Tuhan, hai, biarlah semua yang ada dalam diriku memuja Dia!

lines.en: And courage all fails us, we triumph by faith.
lines.ko: 이 세상 만물이 주 앞에 다 나와 찬양
lines.id: Semua yang mempunyai hidup dan nafas, datanglah sekarang dengan puji-pujian di hadapan-Nya!

lines.en: He cannot take from us, though oft he has tried,
lines.id: Biarkan kalimat "A-man!" Suara dari umat-Nya sebuah keuntungan.

lines.en: This heart-cheering promise, "The Lord will provide."
lines.id: Dengan senang hati jika kita memuja Dia.

lines.en: No strength of our own, and no goodness we claim;
Yet, since we have known of the Saviour's great name,
In this our strong tower for safety we hide:
The Lord is our power, "The Lord will provide."

title_id: Segala puji bagi Tuhan Yang Maha Esa

title_en: How firm a foundation, ye saints of the Lord

lines.en: How firm a foundation, ye saints of the Lord,
lines.ko: 너희 주님의 성도들아, 얼마나 견고한 기초인가?

lines.en: Is laid for your faith in his excellent Word!
lines.ko: 당신의 믿음을 위해 그분의 탁월한 말씀이 놓여 있습니다!

lines.en: What more can he say than to you he hath said,
lines.ko: 그분께서 당신에게 말씀하신 것 외에 무엇을 더 말씀하실 수 있겠습니까?

lines.en: You who unto Jesus for refuge have fled?
"Fear not, I am with thee, O be not dismayed;
lines.ko: “두려워하지 말라 내가 너와 함께 있느니라 놀라지 말라

lines.en: I, I am thy God, and will still give thee aid;
lines.ko: 나, 나는 너의 하나님이고, 앞으로도 너를 도와줄 것이다.

lines.en: I'll strengthen thee, help thee, and cause thee to stand,
lines.ko: 내가 너를 강하게 하고, 도와주고, 너를 세워주겠다.

lines.en: Upheld by my righteous, omnipotent hand.
lines.ko: 나의 의롭고 전능하신 손이 지탱해 주십니다.

lines.en: "When through the deep waters I call thee to go,
lines.ko: "내가 너를 깊은 물 가운데로 지나가라고 부를 때,

lines.en: The rivers of woe shall not thee overflow;
For I will be with thee thy troubles to bless,
lines.ko: 내가 너와 함께 있어 네 환난을 축복할 것임이니라

lines.en: And sanctify to thee thy deepest distress.
lines.ko: 그리고 당신의 가장 깊은 고통을 당신에게 거룩하게 하소서.

lines.en: "When through fiery trials thy pathway shall lie,
lines.ko: "불 같은 시련을 통과할 때 네 길이 놓여 있을 것이다.

lines.en: My grace, all sufficient, shall be thy supply;
lines.ko: 나의 은혜가 네게 충분히 공급될 것이다.

lines.en: The flame shall not hurt thee; I only design
lines.ko: 불꽃이 당신을 해칠 수 없습니다. 나는 디자인만 한다

lines.en: Thy dross to consume, and thy gold to refine.
lines.ko: 네 찌꺼기를 소모하고 네 금을 정제하라.

lines.en: "E'en down to old age all my people shall prove
lines.ko: "나이가 들수록 내 백성은 모두 증명할 것이다.

lines.en: My sovereign, eternal, unchangeable love;
And when hoary hairs shall their temples adorn,
Like lambs they shall still in my bosom be borne.
lines.ko: 어린 양처럼 그들은 여전히 내 품에 안겨 있을 것입니다.

lines.en: "The soul that on Jesus hath leaned for repose,
I will not, I will not desert to his foes;
lines.ko: 나는 그의 원수들에게 항복하지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: That soul, though all hell should endeavor to shake,
lines.ko: 그 영혼은, 온 지옥이 흔들려고 애쓰더라도,

lines.en: I'll never, no, never, no, never forsake."
lines.ko: 나는 결코, 아니, 결코, 아니, 결코 버리지 않을 것이다."

title_en: A mighty Fortress is our God

lines.en: A mighty fortress is our God,
lines.ko: 내 주는 강한 성이요 방패와 병기되시니
lines.id: Benteng yang perkasa adalah Tuhan kita,

lines.en: A bulwark never failing;
lines.id: Sebuah Bul-wark tidak pernah gagal

lines.en: Our helper he amid the flood
lines.ko: 옛 원수 마귀는 이때도 힘을 써
lines.id: Penolong Kami Dia di tengah banjir

lines.en: Of mortal ills prevailing.
lines.ko: 모략과 권세로 무기를 삼으니 천하에 누가 당하랴
lines.id: Dari penyakit fana yang sudah ada sebelumnya.

lines.en: For still our ancient foe
lines.id: Karena musuh lama kita masih berusaha untuk membuat kita celaka

lines.en: Doth seek to work us woe;
lines.id: Keahlian dan kekuatannya luar biasa

lines.en: His craft and power are great;
lines.id: Dan, dipersenjatai dengan kebencian yang kejam,

lines.en: And armed with cruel hate,
lines.id: Di bumi tidak ada yang setara dengan-Nya.

lines.en: On earth is not his equal.
Did we in our own strength confide,
lines.ko: 내 힘만 의지할 때는 패할 수밖에 없도다
lines.id: Apakah kita dengan kekuatan kita sendiri mengaku,

lines.en: Our striving would be losing;
lines.ko: 힘 있는 장수 나와서 날 대신 하여 싸우네
lines.id: Perjuangan kita akan sia-sia

lines.en: Were not the right Man on our side,
lines.ko: 이 장수 누군가 주 예수 그리스도 만군의 주로다
lines.id: Bukankah Manusia yang tepat ada di pihak kita,

lines.en: The Man of God's own choosing.
lines.id: Pilihan Manusia Tuhan sendiri.

lines.en: Dost ask who that may be?
lines.id: Jangan bertanya siapakah itu Kristus Yesus, itu Dia,

lines.en: Christ Jesus, it is he,
lines.id: Tuhan Sab-a-oth Namanya,

lines.en: Lord Sabaoth his name,
lines.id: Dari zaman ke zaman sama saja,

lines.en: From age to age the same,
lines.id: Dan Dia harus memenangkan pertempuran itu.

lines.en: And he must win the battle.
And though this world, with devils filled,
lines.ko: 이 땅에 마귀 들끓어 우리를 삼키려 하나
lines.id: Meskipun dunia ini penuh dengan setan,

lines.en: Should threaten to undo us,
lines.id: Jika mengancam untuk membatalkan tindakan kita,

lines.en: We will not fear, for God hath willed
lines.ko: 친척과 재물과 명예와 생명을 다 빼앗긴대도
lines.id: Kami tidak akan takut, karena Tuhan telah menghendakinya

lines.en: His truth to triumph through us.
lines.ko: 진리는 살아서 그 나라 영원하리라 아멘
lines.id: Kebenarannya akan menang melalui kita

lines.en: The prince of darkness grim,
lines.id: Biarkan barang-barang dan orang-orang baik pergi, begitu pula kehidupan fana ini

lines.en: We tremble not for him;
lines.id: Tubuh yang mungkin mereka bunuh

lines.en: His rage we can endure,
lines.id: Kebenaran Tuhan masih tetap ada

lines.en: For lo! his doom is sure;
lines.id: Kerajaan-Nya adalah untuk selama-lamanya.

lines.en: One little word shall fell him.
That Word above all earthly powers,
No thanks to them, abideth;
The Spirit and the gifts are ours
Through him who with us sideth;
Let goods and kindred go,
This mortal life also;
The body they may kill:
God's truth abideth still;
His kingdom is for ever.

title_id: Benteng yang Perkasa Adalah Tuhan Kita

title_en: Unto the hills around do I lift up

lines.en: Psalm 121
lines.ko: 내 눈을 들어 두루 살피니 산악이라
lines.id: Ke bukit-bukit aku harus mendaki

lines.ko: 날 돕는 구원 어디서 오나 그 어디서
lines.id: Mataku yang rindu
Oh, dari manakah keselamatanku akan datang,
Dari situlah bangkit
Dari Tuhan, Tuhan datang bantuanku yang pasti,
Dari Tuhan Tuhan yang menjadikan langit dan bumi.

lines.en: Unto the hills around do I lift up
lines.ko: 주께서 나의 가는 곳 마다 지키시며
lines.id: Dia tidak akan membiarkan kakimu digerakkan:

lines.en: My longing eyes:
lines.ko: 졸지도 않고 깨어 계셔서 늘 지키네
lines.id: Kamu akan aman.

lines.en: O whence for me shall my salvation come,
lines.id: Kelopak mata-Nya tidak akan terpuruk tanpa rasa peduli,

lines.en: From whence arise?
lines.id: Siapa yang menjagamu.

lines.en: From God the Lord doth come my certain aid,
lines.id: Lihatlah, Dia tidak pernah tidur, Dia tidak pernah terpuruk

lines.en: From God the Lord, who heaven and earth hath made.
lines.id: Yang menjaga Is-Rael di dalam Kesucian-Nya.

lines.en: He will not suffer that thy foot be moved:
lines.id: Ye-ho-vah sendiri adalah penjaga sejatimu,

lines.en: Safe shalt thou be.
lines.id: Naunganmu yang tidak berubah

lines.en: No careless slumber shall his eyelids close,
lines.id: Je-ho-vah pertahananmu di tangan kananmu

lines.en: Who keepeth thee.
lines.id: Dirinya telah membuat.

lines.en: Behold our God, the Lord, he slumbereth ne'er,
lines.id: Dan engkau tidak akan pernah terkena sinar matahari di siang hari

lines.en: Who keepeth Israel in his holy care.
lines.id: Tidak ada bulan yang akan menyakitimu di malam yang sunyi.

lines.en: Jehovah is himself thy keeper true,
lines.id: Dari setiap kejahatan jahat Dia akan menjaga jiwamu,

lines.en: Thy changeless shade;
lines.ko: 내 모든 죄를 사해주시고 늘 지키네
lines.id: Dari setiap dosa

lines.en: Jehovah thy defense on thy right hand
lines.id: Yehuwa akan menjaga kepergianmu,

lines.en: Himself hath made.
lines.id: Anda masuk.

lines.en: And thee no sun by day shall ever smite;
lines.id: Di atas engkau mengawasi, Dia yang kami puja

lines.en: No moon shall harm thee in the silent night.
lines.id: Akan menjagamu mulai sekarang, ya, selama-lamanya. Amin.

lines.en: From every evil shall he keep thy soul,
From every sin:
Jehovah shall preserve thy going out,
Thy coming in.
Above thee watching, he whom we adore
Shall keep thee henceforth, yea, for evermore.

title_id: Ke Bukit Sekitar Apakah Saya Angkat

title_en: We praise thee, O God, our Redeemer, Creator

lines.en: We praise thee, O God, our Redeemer, Creator,
lines.id: Kami memuji Engkau, ya Tuhan, Penebus kami, Pencipta,

lines.en: In grateful devotion our tribute we bring.
lines.id: Sebagai bentuk pengabdian yang penuh rasa syukur, upeti kami bawa

lines.en: We lay it before thee, we kneel and adore thee,
lines.id: Kami merebahkannya di hadapanMu, kami berlutut dan memujaMu,

lines.en: We bless thy holy name, glad praises we sing.
lines.id: Kami memuji nama suci-Mu, pujian senang kami nyanyikan.

lines.en: We worship thee, God of our fathers, we bless thee;
lines.id: Kami menyembah Engkau, ya Allah nenek moyang kami, kami memberkati Engkau

lines.en: Through life's storm and tempest our guide hast thou been.
lines.id: Melalui badai dan badai kehidupan, Panduan kami telah Anda lalui

lines.en: When perils o'ertake us, escape thou wilt make us,
lines.id: Ketika bahaya menimpa kami, Engkau akan membuat kami melarikan diri,

lines.en: And with thy help, O Lord, our battles we win.
lines.id: Dan dengan bantuan-Mu, ya Tuhan, perjuangan kami kami menangkan.

lines.en: With voices united our praises we offer,
lines.id: Dengan suara yang tidak menyebutkan pujian yang kami berikan,

lines.en: To thee, great Jehovah, glad anthems we raise.
lines.id: BagiMu, Ye-ho-vah yang agung, senang sekali lagu-lagu yang kami angkat.

lines.en: Thy strong arm will guide us, our God is beside us,
lines.id: Lengan kuatmu akan membimbing kami, Tuhan kami ada di samping kami,

lines.en: To thee, our great Redeemer, for ever be praise.
lines.id: BagiMu, Penebus kami yang agung, selalu terpuji.

title_id: Kami Memuji Engkau, ya Tuhan, Penebus kami, Pencipta

title_en: O praise the Lord, for he is good

lines.en: Psalm 107:1-9
O praise the Lord, for he is good,
His mercies still endure;
Thus say the ransomed of the Lord,
lines.ko: 여호와의 속량함을 받은 자가 이같이 말하노라

lines.en: From all their foes secure.
He gathered them from out the lands,
From north, south, east and west.
They strayed in desert's pathless way,
lines.ko: 그들은 사막의 길 없는 길에서 방황했고,

lines.en: No city found for rest.
Their weary soul within them faints
lines.ko: 그들의 지친 영혼은 그 속에서 기진맥진해집니다

lines.en: When thirst and hunger press;
In trouble then they cried to God,
lines.ko: 그 때에 그들이 환난 중에 하나님께 부르짖어 이르되

lines.en: He saved them from distress.
He made the way before them straight,
lines.ko: 그가 그들 앞에서 길을 곧게 하시고

lines.en: Himself became their guide,
That they might to a city go
Wherein they might abide.
O that men would Jehovah praise
lines.ko: 오, 사람들이 여호와를 찬양할 수 있다면

lines.en: For all his kindness shown,
And for his works so wonderful
Which he to men makes known!
Because the longing soul by him
With food is satisfied;
The hungry soul that looks to him
With goodness is supplied.

title_en: The tender love a father has

lines.en: From Psalm 103:13-18
The tender love a father has
For all his children dear,
Such love the Lord bestows on them
Who worship him in fear.
The Lord remembers we are dust,
And all our frailty knows;
lines.ko: 그리고 우리의 모든 연약함은 알고 있습니다.

lines.en: Man's days are like the tender grass,
And as the flower he grows.
The flower is withered by the wind
That smites with blighting breath;
So man is quickly swept away
Before the blast of death.
Unchanging is the love of God,
From age to age the same,
Displayed to all who do his will
lines.ko: 그의 뜻을 행하는 모든 사람에게 나타나신다

lines.en: And reverence his Name.
Those who his gracious cov'nant keep
The Lord will ever bless;
Their children's children shall rejoice
To see his righteousness.

title_en: Now thank we all our God

lines.en: Now thank we all our God
lines.ko: 다 감사드리세 온 맘을 주께 바쳐
lines.id: Sekarang terima kasih kepada kami semua, Tuhan kami

lines.en: With heart and hands and voices,
lines.ko: 그 섭리 놀라워 온 세상 기뻐하네
lines.id: Dengan hati, tangan, dan suara,

lines.en: Who wondrous things hath done,
lines.ko: 예부터 주신 복 한없는 그 사랑
lines.id: Siapa yang telah melakukan banyak hal,

lines.en: In whom his world rejoices;
lines.id: Kepada siapa dunia-Nya bersukacita

lines.en: Who from our mothers' arms,
lines.id: Siapa, dari pelukan ibu kita,

lines.en: Hath blessed us on our way
lines.id: Telah memberkati kita dalam perjalanan kita

lines.en: With countless gifts of love,
lines.id: Dengan hadiah cinta yang tak terhitung jumlahnya

lines.en: And still is ours today.
lines.id: Dan masih menjadi milik kita saat ini.

lines.en: O may this bounteous God
lines.id: Oh, semoga Tuhan yang pemurah ini

lines.en: Through all our life be near us
lines.id: Sepanjang hidup kita berada di dekat kita,

lines.en: With ever joyful hearts
lines.ko: 몸과 맘 병들 때 은혜로 지키사
lines.id: Dengan hati yang selalu gembira

lines.en: And blessed peace to cheer us;
lines.id: Dan kedamaian yang diberkati untuk menghibur kita

lines.en: And keep us in his grace,
lines.id: Dan peliharalah kami dalam rahmat-Nya,

lines.en: And guide us when perplexed,
lines.id: Dan tuntunlah kami ketika kebingungan,

lines.en: And free us from all ills
lines.id: Dan bebaskan kami dari segala penyakit

lines.en: In this world and the next.
lines.id: Di dunia ini dan di akhirat.

lines.en: All praise and thanks to God,
lines.id: Segala puji dan syukur kepada Tuhan

lines.en: The Father, now be given,
lines.id: Sang Ayah sekarang diberikan,

lines.en: The Son, and him who reigns
lines.id: Putra, dan Dia yang memerintah

lines.en: With them in highest heaven,
lines.id: Bersama mereka di surga tertinggi,

lines.en: The one eternal God
lines.id: Tuhan yang kekal,

lines.en: Whom earth and heav'n adore;
lines.id: Yang dipuja oleh bumi dan surga,

lines.en: For thus it was, is now,
lines.id: Karena dulu, sekarang,

lines.en: And shall be evermore.
lines.id: Dan akan selalu lebih baik lagi.

title_id: Sekarang Terima Kasih Kami Semua Tuhan Kami

title_en: Holy, Holy, Holy, Lord God Almighty

lines.en: Holy, Holy, Holy, Lord God Almighty!
lines.id: Suci, Suci, Suci! Ya Tuhan, Tuhan Yang Maha Perkasa!

lines.en: Early in the morning our song shall rise to thee;
lines.ko: 이른 아침 우리 주를 찬송 합니다
lines.id: Pagi-pagi sekali Lagu kami akan terdengar untukmu

lines.en: Holy, Holy, Holy, merciful and mighty!
lines.id: Suci, Suci, Suci! Penyayang dan Perkasa!

lines.en: God in three Persons, blessed Trinity!
lines.id: Tuhan dalam tiga Pribadi, trinitas yang terberkati!

lines.en: Holy, Holy, Holy, all the saints adore thee,
lines.ko: 거룩 거룩 거룩 주의 보좌 앞에
lines.id: Suci, Suci, Suci! Semua orang suci memuja-Mu,

lines.en: Casting down their golden crowns around the glassy sea;
lines.id: Melemparkan mahkota emas mereka mengelilingi lautan kaca

lines.en: Cherubim and seraphim falling down before thee,
lines.id: Cher-u-bim dan ser-a-phim jatuh di hadapan-Mu,

lines.en: Who wert, and art, and evermore shalt be.
lines.id: Yang mana, dan seni, dan lebih banyak lagi yang akan terjadi.

lines.en: Holy, Holy, Holy, though the darkness hide thee,
lines.ko: 거룩 거룩 거룩 주의 빛난 영광
lines.id: Suci, Suci, Suci! Kegelapan menyembunyikan Engkau,

lines.en: Though the eye of sinful man thy glory may not see,
lines.ko: 모든 죄인 눈 어두워 볼 수 없도다
lines.id: Mata manusia berdosa mungkin tidak melihat kemuliaan-Mu

lines.en: Only thou art holy; there is none beside thee
lines.id: Hanya saja, Engkau Kudus! tidak ada seorang pun selain Engkau,

lines.en: Perfect in power, in love, and purity.
lines.id: Per-fakta dalam kekuatan cinta, dan kemurnian.

lines.en: Holy, Holy, Holy, Lord God Almighty!
lines.id: Suci, Suci, Suci! Ya Tuhan, Tuhan Yang Maha Perkasa!

lines.en: All thy works shall praise thy Name, in earth and sky and sea;
lines.ko: 천지 만물 모두 주를 찬송 합니다
lines.id: Segala karya-Mu akan memuji nama-Mu, di bumi, di langit, dan di laut

lines.en: Holy, Holy, Holy, merciful and mighty!
lines.id: Suci, Suci, Suci! Penyayang dan Perkasa!

lines.en: God in three Persons, blessed Trinity!
lines.ko: 성 삼위 일체 우리 주로다 아멘
lines.id: Tuhan dalam Tiga Pribadi, Trinitas yang terberkati!

title_id: Suci Suci Suci! Tuhan Allah Yang Mahakuasa

title_en: Father of heaven, whose love profound

lines.en: Father of heav'n, whose love profound
A ransom for our souls hath found,
Before thy throne we sinners bend;
lines.ko: 당신의 보좌 앞에 우리 죄인들이 몸을 굽혔습니다.

lines.en: To us thy pardoning love extend.
Almighty Son, incarnate Word,
Our Prophet, Priest, Redeemer, Lord,
Before thy throne we sinners bend;
lines.ko: 당신의 보좌 앞에 우리 죄인들이 몸을 굽혔습니다.

lines.en: To us thy saving grace extend.
lines.ko: 당신의 구원의 은혜가 우리에게 미치게 하소서.

lines.en: Eternal Spirit, by whose breath
The soul is raised from sin and death,
Before thy throne we sinners bend;
lines.ko: 당신의 보좌 앞에 우리 죄인들이 몸을 굽혔습니다.

lines.en: To us thy quickening power extend.
Jehovah! Father, Spirit, Son,
Mysterious Godhead, Three in One,
Before thy throne we sinners bend;
lines.ko: 당신의 보좌 앞에 우리 죄인들이 몸을 굽혔습니다.

lines.en: Grace, pardon, life, to us extend.

title_en: Come, thou Almighty King

lines.en: Come, thou Almighty King,
lines.id: Datanglah, Engkau Raja Yang Maha Perkasa

lines.en: Help us thy name to sing,
lines.id: Bantu kami menyanyikan Nama-Mu. Bantu kami memuji:

lines.en: Help us to praise:
lines.id: Ayah, maha mulia, O'er semua yang menang,

lines.en: Father, all glorious,
lines.id: Datanglah, dan berkuasalah atas kami, Yang Lanjut Usianya.

lines.en: O'er all victorious,
Come, and reign over us,
Ancient of days.
Come, thou Incarnate Word,
lines.id: Datanglah, Engkau Sabda yang Menjelma,

lines.en: Gird on thy mighty sword,
lines.id: Siapkan pedang-Mu yang perkasa, Doa kami panjatkan:

lines.en: Our prayer attend:
lines.id: Datanglah, dan umat-Mu memberkati, Dan sukseskan Firman-Mu

lines.en: Come and thy people bless,
lines.id: Semangat Kekudusan, Pada kami turun.

lines.en: And give thy Word success;
Spirit of holiness,
On us descend.
Come, Holy Comforter,
lines.id: Ayo, Penghibur Suci,

lines.en: Thy sacred witness bear
lines.id: Kesaksianmu yang kredibel di saat-saat yang menyenangkan ini:

lines.en: In this glad hour:
lines.id: Engkau yang maha kuasa, Kini berkuasa di setiap hati,

lines.en: Thou who almighty art,
lines.id: Dan jangan pernah berpisah dari kami, Semangat kekuatan.

lines.en: Now rule in every heart,
And ne'er from us depart,
Spirit of power.
To the great One in Three
lines.id: Kepada Yang Agung dari Tiga

lines.en: Eternal praises be,
lines.id: Pujian abadi, Oleh karena itu, lebih-lebih lagi.

lines.en: Hence evermore.
lines.id: Yang Mulia Yang Mulia Semoga kita dapat melihat dengan mulia,

lines.en: His sovereign majesty
lines.id: Dan untuk selamanya Cinta dan cinta A-men.

lines.en: May we in glory see,
And to eternity
Love and adore.

title_en: O God, we praise thee; and confess
title_ko: 오 하나님, 우리가 당신을 찬양합니다. 그리고 고백하다 (자체번역)

lines.en: O God, we praise thee; and confess
lines.ko: 오 하나님, 우리가 당신을 찬양합니다. 그리고 고백하다

lines.en: That thou the only Lord
And Everlasting Father art,
By all the earth adored.
To thee all angels cry aloud;
lines.ko: 모든 천사들이 당신을 향해 큰 소리로 부르짖습니다.

lines.en: To thee the pow'rs on high,
Both cherubim and seraphim,
Continually do cry:
O holy, holy, holy  Lord,
Whom heavenly hosts obey,
The world is with the glory filled
Of thy majestic ray.
The apostles' glorious company,
And prophets crowned with light,
With all the martyrs' noble host,
Thy constant praise recite.
The holy church throughout the world,
O Lord, confesses thee,
That thou eternal Father art,
Of boundless majesty;
Thine honored, true, and only Son;
And Holy Ghost, the Spring
Of never-ceasing joy: O Christ,
Of glory thou art King.

title_en: Lord, keep us steadfast in thy Word
title_ko: 주님, 우리를 당신의 말씀에 굳게 지키게 하소서 (자체번역)

lines.en: Lord, keep us steadfast in thy Word;
lines.ko: 주님, 우리를 당신의 말씀에 굳게 지키게 하소서.

lines.en: Curb those who fain by craft and sword
Would wrest the kingdom from thy Son
And set at naught all he hath done.
lines.ko: 그리고 그가 행하신 모든 것을 무시하셨습니다.

lines.en: Lord Jesus Christ, thy power make known,
lines.ko: 주 예수 그리스도시여, 주의 능력을 알게 하소서

lines.en: For thou art Lord of lords alone;
Defend thy Christendom that we
May evermore sing praise to thee.
O comforter of priceless worth,
Send peace and unity on earth.
Support us in our final strife
And lead us out of death to life.
lines.ko: 그리고 우리를 죽음에서 생명으로 인도해 주옵소서.

title_en: All glory be to thee, Most High

lines.en: All glory be to thee, Most High,
lines.id: Cinta ilahi, semua cinta ex-cel-ling,

lines.en: To thee all adoration;
lines.ko: 우리 맘에 항상 계셔 온전하게 하소서
lines.id: Kegembiraan surga, turun ke bumi!

lines.en: In grace and truth thou drawest nigh
lines.ko: 우리 주는 자비하사 사랑 무한 하시니
lines.id: Perbaiki dalam diri kami tempat tinggal-Mu yang sederhana

lines.en: To offer us salvation;
lines.id: Segala kemurahan-Mu yang setia dimahkotai.

lines.en: Thou showest thy good will to men,
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, Engkau penuh belas kasihan

lines.en: And peace shall reign on earth again;
lines.id: Kasih-Mu yang murni dan tak terbatas.

lines.en: We praise thy Name for ever.
lines.id: Kunjungi kami dengan keselamatan-Mu

lines.en: We praise, we worship thee, we trust,
lines.id: Bernafaslah, oh, hiruplah Roh kasih-Mu

lines.en: And give thee thanks for ever,
lines.ko: 복과 은혜 사랑 받아 평안하게 하소서
lines.id: Dalam setiap payudara yang bermasalah!

lines.en: O Father, for thy rule is just
lines.ko: 첨과 끝이 되신 주님 항상 인도 하셔서
lines.id: Marilah kita semua di dalam Engkau di dalam dirinya

lines.en: And wise, and changes never;
lines.ko: 마귀 유혹 받는 것을 속히 끊게 하소서
lines.id: Mari kita temukan istirahat kedua itu.

lines.en: Thy hand almighty o'er us reigns,
lines.id: Hilangkan kecenderungan kita untuk berbuat dosa

lines.en: Thou doest what thy will ordains;
lines.id: Al-pha dan O-me-ga menjadi.

lines.en: 'Tis well for us thou rulest.
lines.id: Akhir dari iman, sebagai Permulaannya,

lines.en: O Jesus Christ, our God and Lord,
lines.id: Ayo, Yang Maha Kuasa, ke De-liver-er

lines.en: Son of the Heavenly Father,
lines.id: Biarlah kami menerima kembali seluruh hidup-Mu.

lines.en: O thou who hast our peace restored,
lines.ko: 주께 영광 항상 돌려 천사처럼 섬기며
lines.id: Tiba-tiba kembali, dan tidak pernah,

lines.en: The straying sheep dost gather,
lines.id: Bait-Mu tidak akan pernah lagi pergi.

lines.en: Thou Lamb of God, to thee on high
lines.id: Kepadamu kami akan selalu memberkati,

lines.en: Out of the depths we sinners cry:
lines.id: Layani Engkau sebagai tuan rumah-Mu di atas,

lines.en: Have mercy on us, Jesus!
lines.id: Berdoalah dan pujilah Engkau tanpa henti,

lines.en: O Holy Spirit, precious gift,
lines.id: Selesaikanlah ciptaan-Mu yang baru

lines.en: Thou Comforter unfailing,
lines.ko: 주의 크신 구원 받아 온전하게 하소서
lines.id: Biarlah kita menjadi murni dan tanpa noda.

lines.en: From Satan's snares our souls uplift,
lines.id: Marilah kami mengarungi keselamatan-Mu yang besar,

lines.en: And let thy power, availing,
lines.ko: 크신 사랑 감격하여 경배하게 하소서 아멘
lines.id: Tersimpan kembali secara sempurna pada-Mu:

lines.en: Avert our woes and calm our dread.
lines.id: Berubah dari kemuliaan ke dalam kemuliaan,

lines.en: For us the Saviour's blood was shed;
lines.id: Sampai di surga kita mengambil tempat kita,

lines.en: We trust in thee to save us.
lines.id: Sampai kami melemparkan mahkota kami ke hadapan-Mu,

title_en: Lord, my weak thought in vain would climb
title_ko: 주님, 나의 약한 생각이 헛되이 올라갈 것입니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: Lord, my weak thought in vain would climb
lines.ko: 주님, 나의 약한 생각이 헛되이 올라갈 것입니다

lines.en: To search the starry vault profound;
In vain would wing her flight sublime
lines.ko: 헛되이 그녀의 비행은 숭고하게 날개를 달았을 것입니다

lines.en: To find creation's utmost bound.
But weaker yet that thought must prove
lines.ko: 하지만 그 생각은 더 약하지만 증명되어야 합니다

lines.en: To search thy great eternal plan,
lines.ko: 당신의 위대하고 영원한 계획을 탐구하기 위해,

lines.en: Thy sovereign counsels, born of love
Long ages ere the world began.
When my dim reason would demand
Why that, or this, thou dost ordain,
By some vast deep I seem to stand,
lines.ko: 어느 광대한 깊은 곳에서 나는 서 있는 것 같다.

lines.en: Whose secrets I must ask in vain.
When doubts disturb my troubled breast,
lines.ko: 의심이 불안한 내 가슴을 어지럽힐 때,

lines.en: And all is dark as night to me,
lines.ko: 그리고 나에게는 모든 것이 밤처럼 어둡습니다.

lines.en: Here, as on solid rock, I rest,
lines.ko: 여기, 단단한 바위 위에 있는 것처럼 나는 쉬고 있다.

lines.en: That so it seemeth good to thee.
Be this my joy, that evermore
Thou rulest all things at thy will;
lines.ko: 당신은 당신의 뜻대로 모든 것을 다스리십니다.

lines.en: Thy sovereign wisdom I adore,
And calmly, sweetly, trust thee still.
lines.ko: 그리고 조용하고 다정하게 당신을 여전히 신뢰하십시오.

title_en: Whate'er my God ordains is right
title_ko: 나의 하나님이 정하신 것은 무엇이든지 옳으니이다 (자체번역)

lines.en: Whate'er my God ordains is right:
lines.ko: 나의 하나님이 정하신 것은 다 옳으니이다

lines.en: Holy his will abideth;
I will be still whate'er he doth;
lines.ko: 나는 그가 무엇을 하든 여전히 그럴 것이다.

lines.en: And follow where he guideth:
He is my God: though dark my road,
lines.ko: 그는 나의 하나님이시니 내 길이 어두울지라도

lines.en: He holds me that I shall not fall:
lines.ko: 그분은 내가 넘어지지 않도록 나를 붙드십니다.

lines.en: Wherefore to him I leave it all.
lines.ko: 그러므로 나는 모든 것을 그에게 맡깁니다.

lines.en: Whate'er my God ordains is right:
lines.ko: 나의 하나님이 정하신 것은 다 옳으니이다

lines.en: He never will deceive me;
lines.ko: 그는 결코 나를 속이지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: He leads me by the proper path;
I know he will not leave me:
lines.ko: 나는 그가 나를 떠나지 않을 것이라는 것을 압니다.

lines.en: I take, content, what he hath sent;
lines.ko: 나는 그가 보낸 것을 만족스럽게 받아들입니다.

lines.en: His hand can turn my griefs away,
lines.ko: 그분의 손이 내 슬픔을 돌이킬 수 있고,

lines.en: And patiently I wait his day.
lines.ko: 그리고 나는 그의 날을 참을성있게 기다립니다.

lines.en: Whate'er my God ordains is right:
lines.ko: 나의 하나님이 정하신 것은 다 옳으니이다

lines.en: Though now this cup, in drinking,
May bitter seem to my faint heart,
lines.ko: 내 희미한 마음에 쓰라린 것처럼 보일 수 있습니다.

lines.en: I take it, all unshrinking:
My God is true; each morn anew
lines.ko: 나의 하나님은 진실하시도다. 매일 아침 새롭게

lines.en: Sweet comfort yet shall fill my heart,
lines.ko: 달콤한 위안이 내 마음을 가득 채울 것입니다.

lines.en: And pain and sorrow shall depart.
Whate'er my God ordains is right:
lines.ko: 나의 하나님이 정하신 것은 다 옳으니이다

lines.en: Here shall my stand be taken;
Though sorrow, need, or death be mine,
lines.ko: 비록 슬픔, 궁핍, 죽음이 나의 것일지라도

lines.en: Yet am I not forsaken;
My Father's care is round me there;
lines.ko: 내 아버지의 보살핌이 내 주위에 있습니다.

lines.en: He holds me that I shall not fall:
lines.ko: 그분은 내가 넘어지지 않도록 나를 붙드십니다.

lines.en: And so to him I leave it all.
lines.ko: 그래서 나는 그에게 모든 것을 맡깁니다.

title_en: How vast the benefits divine

lines.en: How vast the benefits divine
lines.id: Mari umat Kristiani, bergabunglah untuk bernyanyi

lines.en: Which we in Christ possess!
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Amin.

lines.en: We are redeemed from guilt and shame
lines.id: Pujian yang nyaring bagi Kristus Raja kita

lines.en: And called to holiness.
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Amin.

lines.en: But not for works which we have done,
lines.id: Biarkan semua, dengan hati dan suara,

lines.en: Or shall hereafter do,
lines.id: Di hadapan takhta-Nya kembali bersukacita

lines.en: Hath God decreed on sinful men
lines.id: Pujian adalah pilihan-Nya yang penuh rahmat

lines.en: Salvation to bestow.
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Amin.

lines.en: The glory, Lord, from first to last,
lines.id: Ayo, angkat hatimu tinggi-tinggi

lines.en: Is due to thee alone;
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Amin.

lines.en: Aught to ourselves we dare not take,
lines.id: Biarkan pujian memenuhi langit

lines.en: Or rob thee of thy crown.
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Amin.

lines.en: Our glorious Surety undertook
lines.id: Dia adalah Pemandu dan Teman kita

lines.en: To satisfy for man,
lines.id: Bagi kita Dia akan merendahkan

lines.en: And grace was given us in him
lines.id: Cintanya tidak akan pernah berakhir:

lines.en: Before the world began.
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Amin.

lines.en: This is thy will, that in thy love
lines.id: Pujilah Kristus kita yang mendapat keuntungan

lines.en: We ever should abide;
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Amin.

lines.en: That earth and hell should not prevail
lines.id: Hidup tidak akan mengakhiri ketegangan

lines.en: To turn thy Word aside.
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Amin.

lines.en: Not one of all the chosen race
lines.id: Di pantai yang penuh kebahagiaan di surga

lines.en: But shall to heav'n attain,
lines.id: Kebaikannya akan kita kagumi,

lines.en: Partake on earth the purposed grace
lines.id: Bernyanyi selamanya,

lines.en: And then with Jesus reign.
lines.id: "Al-le-lu-ia! A-men.MASUKKAN

title_id: Mari umat Kristiani, Bergabunglah untuk Bernyanyi

title_en: 'Tis not that I did choose thee

lines.en: 'Tis not that I did choose thee,
For, Lord, that could not be;
lines.ko: 주님, 그런 일은 있을 수 없습니다.

lines.en: This heart would still refuse thee,
lines.ko: 이 마음은 여전히 당신을 거부할 것입니다.

lines.en: Hadst thou not chosen me.
Thou from the sin that stained me
Hast cleansed and set me free;
Of old thou hast ordained me,
That I should live to thee.
lines.ko: 내가 당신을 위해 살아야 한다는 것입니다.

lines.en: 'Twas sovereign mercy called me
And taught my op'ning mind;
The world had else enthralled me,
To heavenly glories blind.
My heart owns none before thee,
lines.ko: 내 마음은 당신 앞에 아무것도 소유하지 않습니다.

lines.en: For thy rich grace I thirst;
This knowing, if I love thee,
Thou must have loved me first.

title_en: O thou my soul, bless God the Lord
title_ko: 오 내 영혼아 주 하나님을 송축하라 (자체번역)

lines.en: O thou my soul, bless God the Lord;
lines.ko: 오 내 영혼아, 주 하나님을 송축하라.

lines.en: And all that in me is
lines.ko: 그리고 내 안에 있는 모든 것은

lines.en: Be stirred up his holy name
To magnify and bless.
Bless, O my soul, the Lord thy God,
lines.ko: 내 영혼아, 네 하나님 여호와를 송축하라.

lines.en: And not forgetful be
Of all his gracious benefits
He hath bestowed on thee.
Such pity as a Father hath
And shows his children dear,
Like pity shows the Lord to such
lines.ko: 동정심이 그런 사람들에게 주님을 보여주는 것처럼

lines.en: As worship him in fear.
Yea, unto them that fear the Lord
His mercy never ends;
And to their children's children still
His righteousness extends;
To such as keep his covenant
Nor from it go astray,
Who his commandments bear in mind
And faithfully obey.

title_en: Father of peace, and God of love

lines.en: Father of peace, and God of love,
We own thy power to save,
lines.ko: 우리는 구원할 당신의 능력을 소유하고 있습니다.

lines.en: That pow'r by which our Shepherd rose
Victorious o'er the grave.
Him from the dead thou brought'st again,
lines.ko: 그를 죽은 자 가운데서 다시 데려오셨으니

lines.en: When by his sacred blood
Confirmed and sealed for evermore
Th'eternal covenant stood.
O may thy Spirit seal our souls,
lines.ko: 오, 당신의 영이 우리 영혼을 봉인하시기를,

lines.en: And mould them to thy will,
That our weak hearts no more may stray,
lines.ko: 우리의 약한 마음이 더 이상 방황하지 않도록,

lines.en: But keep thy cov'nant still;
That all we think and all we do
lines.ko: 우리가 생각하는 모든 것, 우리가 하는 모든 것

lines.en: Be pleasing in thy sight,
Through Jesus Christ, to whom be praise
In endless glory bright.

title_en: A debtor to mercy alone

lines.en: A debtor to mercy alone,
Of covenant mercy I sing;
Nor fear, with thy righteousness on,
My person and off'ring to bring.
The terrors of law and of God
With me can have nothing to do;
My Saviour's obedience and blood
Hide all my transgressions from view.
lines.ko: 내 모든 범법을 보이지 않게 숨기십시오.

lines.en: The work which his goodness began,
The arm of his strength will complete;
His promise is Yea and Amen,
And never was forfeited yet.
Things future, nor things that are now,
Nor all things below or above,
Can make him his purpose forgo,
lines.ko: 그 사람의 목적을 잊게 만들 수도 있고,

lines.en: Or sever my soul from his love.
lines.ko: 아니면 그의 사랑에서 내 영혼을 끊으십시오.

lines.en: My name from the palms of his hands
Eternity will not erase;
Impressed on his heart it remains,
In marks of indelible grace.
Yes, I to the end shall endure,
As sure as the earnest is given;
More happy, but not more secure,
The glorified spirits in heav'n.

title_en: Arise, O Lord, our God, arise

lines.en: From Psalm 132
lines.ko: 주 하나님 지으신 모든 세계 내 마음 속에 그리어 볼 때
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, Tuhanku! Saat aku merasa takjub

lines.en: con-sid-er all the worlds Thy hands have made,
lines.ko: 하늘의 별 울려 퍼지는 뇌성 주님의 권능 우주에 찼네
lines.id: pertimbangkan seluruh dunia yang telah dibuat oleh tangan-Mu,

lines.en: I see the stars, I hear the rall-ing thun-der,
lines.ko: 후렴 : 주님의 높고 위대하심을 내 영혼이 찬양하네
lines.id: Aku melihat bintang-bintang, aku mendengar gemuruh guntur,

lines.en: Thy pow'r through out the un-i-verse dis-played,
lines.ko: 주님의 높고 위대하심을 내 영혼이 찬양하네
lines.id: Kekuatanmu di seluruh jagat raya ditampilkan,

lines.en: Arise, O Lord, our God, arise
lines.ko: 숲 속이나 험한 산 골짝에서 지저귀는 저 새소리들과
lines.id: Saat melewati hutan dan hutan terbuka aku mengembara

lines.en: And enter now into thy rest;
lines.ko: 고요하게 흐르는 시냇물은 주님의 솜씨 노래 하도다
lines.id: Dan dengarlah kicauan burung yang merdu di pepohonan

lines.en: O let this house be thine abode,
lines.id: Saat aku melihat ke bawah dari puncak gunung yang megah

lines.en: For ever with thy presence blest.
lines.id: Dan dengarkan aliran sungai dan rasakan angin sepoi-sepoi

lines.en: Thy gracious covenant, Lord, fulfil,
lines.ko: 주 하나님 독생자 아낌없이 우리를 위해 보내 주셨네
lines.id: Dan ketika saya berpikir bahwa Allah, Putra-Nya tidak menyayangkan,

lines.en: Turn not away from us thy face;
lines.ko: 십자가에 피 흘려 죽으신 주 내 모든 죄를 대속 하셨네
lines.id: Mengirim Dia untuk mati, aku hampir tidak dapat menerimanya-

lines.en: Establish thou Messiah's throne
lines.id: Bahwa di kayu salib bebanku dengan senang hati memikulnya,

lines.en: And let him reign within this place.
lines.id: Dia berdarah dan mati untuk menghapus dosaku-

lines.en: Thy Zion thou hast chosen, Lord,
lines.ko: 내 주 예수 세상에 다시 올 때 저 천국으로 날 인도하리
lines.id: Ketika Kristus akan datang dengan sorak sorai

lines.en: And thou hast said, I love her well,
lines.ko: 나 겸손히 엎드려 경배 하며 영원히 주를 찬양 하리라
lines.id: Dan bawalah aku pulang, betapa sukacitanya memenuhi hatiku!

lines.en: This is my constant resting place,
lines.id: Kemudian dia akan membungkuk dengan hormat yang rendah hati

lines.en: And here will I delight to dwell.
lines.id: Dan di sana nyatakan, Tuhanku, betapa hebatnya Engkau!

lines.en: I will abundantly provide
For Zion's good, the Lord hath said;
I will supply her daily need
And satisfy her poor with bread.

title_id: Ya Tuhan, Tuhanku! Saat aku berada di Keajaiban Luar Biasa

title_en: My song for ever shall record

lines.ko: 만 입이 내게 있으면 그 입 다 가지고
lines.id: Oh, ada seribu bahasa yang bisa bernyanyi

lines.en: My great Re-deem-er's praise,
lines.ko: 내 구주 주신 은총을 늘 찬송 하겠네
lines.id: Pujian saya yang luar biasa,

lines.en: My song for ever shall record
lines.id: Tuanku yang pemurah dan Tuhanku,

lines.en: The tender mercies of the Lord;
lines.ko: 그 크신 영광 널리 펴 다 알게 하소서
lines.id: Membantu saya untuk menyatakan,

lines.en: Thy faithfulness will I proclaim,
lines.id: Untuk menyebar ke seluruh bumi secara luas,

lines.en: And every age shall know thy name.
lines.id: Kehormatan Nama-Mu.

lines.en: I sing of mercies that endure,
lines.ko: 내 주의 귀한 이름이 날 위로 하시고
lines.id: Ya Tuhan! Nama yang memikat ketakutan kita,

lines.en: For ever builded firm and sure,
lines.ko: 이 귀에 음악 같으니 참 희락 되도다
lines.id: Itu membuat kesedihan kita berhenti

lines.en: Of faithfulness that never dies,
lines.id: Ini musik di telinga orang berdosa,

lines.en: Established changeless in the skies.
lines.id: Inilah kehidupan, kesehatan, dan kedamaian.

lines.en: Behold God's truth and grace displayed,
lines.ko: 내 죄의 권세 깨뜨려 그 결박 푸시고
lines.id: Dia mematahkan kuasa dosa yang dibatalkan,

lines.en: For he has faithful cov'nant made,
lines.ko: 이 추한 맘을 피로써 곧 정케 하셨네 아멘
lines.id: Dia membebaskan tahanan itu

lines.en: And he has sworn that David's Son
lines.id: Darahnya mampu membuat hal yang paling kotor menjadi bersih

lines.en: Shall ever sit upon his throne.
lines.id: Darahnya tersedia untukku. Amin.

lines.en: For him my mercy shall endure,
My cov'nant made with him is sure;
His throne and race I will maintain
For ever, while the heavens remain.
Blessed be the Lord for evermore,
Whose promise stands from days of yore.
His word is faithful now as then;
Blessed be his Name, Amen, Amen.

title_en: Come, sound his praise abroad

lines.en: From Psalm 95
Come, sound his praise abroad,
And hymns of glory sing:
Jehovah is the sovereign God,
The universal King.
He formed the deeps unknown,
lines.ko: 그분은 알려지지 않은 깊은 곳을 만드셨고,

lines.en: He gave the seas their bound;
The wat'ry worlds are all his own,
lines.ko: 물이 가득한 세상은 모두 그 분의 것입니다.

lines.en: And all the solid ground.
Come, worship at his throne;
Come, bow before the Lord:
We are his works, and not our own;
lines.ko: 우리는 그분의 작품이지 우리 자신의 작품이 아닙니다.

lines.en: He formed us by his word.
Today attend his voice,
Nor dare provoke his rod;
Come, like the people of his choice,
And own your gracious God.

title_en: The spacious firmament on high

lines.en: The spacious firmament on high,
lines.ko: 저 높고 푸른 하늘과 수 없는 빛난 별들을
lines.id: Cakrawala luas di tempat tinggi,

lines.en: With all the blue ethereal sky,
lines.ko: 지으신 이는 창조주 그 솜씨 크고 크셔라
lines.id: Dengan semua langit biru yang sesungguhnya,

lines.en: And spangled heavens, a shining frame,
lines.ko: 날마다 뜨는 저 태양 하나님 크신 권능을
lines.id: Dan langit yang terbentang, bingkai yang bersinar,

lines.en: Their great
lines.ko: 만 백성 모두 보라고 만방에 두루 비치네
lines.id: Pro-klaim besar mereka:
Matahari yang tak lelah, dari hari ke hari,
Apakah kekuatan Penciptanya terlihat,
Dan mempublikasikannya ke semua negeri
Hasil karya tangan yang maha kuasa.

lines.ko: 해지고 황혼 깃들 때 동편에 달이 떠올라
lines.id: Segera setelah nuansa malam mulai menyelimuti,

lines.ko: 밤마다 귀한 소식을 이 땅에 두루 전하네
lines.id: Bulan mengambil kisah menakjubkan,

lines.ko: 행성과 항성 모든 별 저마다 제 길 돌면서
lines.id: Dan setiap malam ke bumi yang mendengarkan

lines.ko: 창조의 기쁜 소식을 온 세상 널리 전하네
lines.id: Mengulangi kembali kisah kelahirannya:
Sementara semua bintang disekelilingnya terbakar,
Dan semua planet pada gilirannya,
Konfirmasikan beritanya saat bergulir,
Dan sebarkan kebenaran dari satu kutub ke kutub lainnya.

lines.ko: 엄숙한 침묵 속에서 뭇 별이 제 길 따르며
lines.id: Bagaimana jika semuanya diam saja

lines.ko: 지구를 싸고 돌 때에 들리는 소리 없어도
lines.id: Bergerak mengitari bola terestrial yang gelap ini

lines.ko: 내 마음 귀가 열리면 그 말씀 밝히 들리네
lines.id: Meskipun tidak ada suara atau suara yang nyata

lines.ko: 우리를 지어내신 이 대 주재 성부 하나님 아멘
lines.id: Di tengah-tengah bola bercahaya dapat ditemukan
Di telinga nalar mereka semua kembali bergembira,
Dan keluarkan suara yang mulia
Bernyanyi selamanya, saat mereka bersinar,
“Tangan yang menciptakan kita adalah tangan ilahi.” Amin.

title_en: The heavens declare thy glory

lines.en: From Psalm 19:1-6, 14
The heav'ns declare thy glory,
The firmament thy pow'r;
Day unto day the story
Repeats from hour to hour;
Night unto night replying,
Proclaims in every land,
O Lord, with voice undying,
The wonders of thy hand.
The sun with royal splendor
Goes forth to chant thy praise,
And moonbeams soft and tender
Their gentler anthem raise;
Over every tribe and nation
The music strange is poured,
The song of all creation
To thee, creation's Lord.
All heaven on high rejoices
lines.ko: 높은 곳에 있는 모든 하늘이 기뻐하리라

lines.en: To do its Maker's will,
The stars with solemn voices
Resound thy praises still;
So let my whole behavior,
Thoughts, words, and actions be,
O Lord, my Strength, my Saviour,
lines.ko: 오 주님, 나의 힘, 나의 구원자,

lines.en: One ceaseless song to thee.

title_en: Hallelujah, praise Jehovah

lines.en: Hallelujah, praise Jehovah,
From the heavens praise his Name;
Praise Jehovah in the highest,
All his angels, praise proclaim.
All his hosts, together praise him,
lines.ko: 그의 모든 집주인이 함께 그를 찬양하고

lines.en: Sun and moon and stars on high;
lines.ko: 높은 곳에는 해와 달과 별들이 있고

lines.en: Praise him, O ye heav'ns of heavens,
lines.ko: 오 너희 하늘의 하늘들아, 그를 찬양하라.

lines.en: And ye floods above the sky.
lines.ko: 그리고 너희는 하늘 위로 홍수가 난다.

lines.en: Let them praises give Jehovah,
For his name alone is high,
And his glory is exalted,
And his glory is exalted,
And his glory is exalted,
Far above the earth and sky.
Let them praises give Jehovah,
They were made at his command;
Them for ever he established,
His decree shall ever stand.
From the earth, O praise Jehovah,
All ye seas, ye monsters all,
Fire and hail and snow and vapors,
Stormy winds that hear his call.
All ye fruitful trees and cedars,
lines.ko: 너희 모든 열매 맺는 나무들과 백향목들아,

lines.en: All ye hills and mountains high;
Creeping things and beasts and cattle,
Birds that in the heavens fly,
Kings of earth, and all ye people,
Princes great, earth's judges all;
Praise his Name, young men and maidens,
Aged men, and children small.

alt_titles: Let them praises give Jehovah

title_en: I sing the almighty power of God

lines.en: I sing th'almighty pow'r of God,
That made the mountains rise,
That spread the flowing seas abroad,
And built the lofty skies.
I sing the goodness of the Lord
That filled the earth with food;
He formed the creatures with his word,
And then pronounced them good.
Lord! how thy wonders are displayed
Where'er I turn mine eye!
If I survey the ground I tread,
lines.ko: 내가 밟고 있는 땅을 조사해 보면,

lines.en: Or gaze upon the sky.
There's not a plant or flower below
But makes thy glories known;
And clouds arise, and tempests blow,
By order from thy throne.
Creatures as numerous as they be
Are subject to thy care;
There's not a place where we can flee,
lines.ko: 우리가 도망칠 수 있는 곳은 없어요.

lines.en: But God is present there.

title_en: Lord, our Lord, thy glorious Name

lines.en: Psalm 8:1-6, 9
lines.ko: 우리 주님 예수께 기쁜 찬송 드리세
lines.id: Marilah kita memuji Tuhan kita Yesus dengan penuh sukacita

lines.ko: 하늘 높은 곳에도 주의 영광 넘치네
lines.id: Kemuliaan Tuhan berlimpah-limpah bahkan di surga yang tertinggi

lines.en: Lord, our Lord, thy glorious Name
lines.id: Kekuatan besarmu telah mengikat kekuatan kegelapan.

lines.en: All thy wondrous works proclaim;
lines.id: Kalahkan musuhmu dan biarkan keinginanmu terlaksana.

lines.en: In the heav'ns with radiant signs
Evermore thy glory shines.
Infant lips thou dost ordain
Wrath and vengeance to restrain;
Weakest means fulfil thy will,
Mighty enemies to still.
Moon and stars in shining height
lines.ko: 밤 하늘의 별들도 주의 영광 찬양해
lines.id: Bahkan bintang-bintang di langit malam pun memuji kemuliaan Tuhan

lines.en: Nightly tell their Maker's might;
lines.ko: 무엇으로 그 영광 비교할 수 있으랴
lines.id: Apa yang bisa dibandingkan dengan kehebatannya?

lines.en: When thy wondrous heav'ns I scan,
Then I know how weak is man.
What is man that he should be
Loved and visited by thee,
Raised to an exalted height,
Crowned with honor in thy sight?
With dominion crowned he stands
lines.ko: 우리 주님 오시면 사랑 은혜 넘치고
lines.id: Ketika Tuhan kita datang, Dia akan dipenuhi dengan cinta dan rahmat.

lines.en: O'er the creatures of thy hands;
lines.ko: 영광스런 면류관 내게 씌워 주시네 아멘
lines.id: Engkau memahkotai aku dengan mahkota yang mulia, Amin.

lines.en: All to him subjection yield
In the sea and air and field.
Lord, our Lord, thy glorious Name
All thy wondrous works proclaim;
Thine the Name of matchless worth,
Excellent in all the earth.

title_id: Ya Tuhan, Tuhan kami, NamaMu yang Mulia

title_en: Praise ye, praise ye the Lord

lines.en: From Psalm 148
lines.ko: 내 주는 강한 성이요 방패와 병기되시니
lines.id: Benteng yang perkasa adalah Tuhan kita,

lines.en: A Bul-wark nev-er fail-ing
lines.id: Sebuah Bul-wark tidak pernah gagal

lines.en: Our Help-er He a-mid the flood
lines.ko: 옛 원수 마귀는 이때도 힘을 써
lines.id: Penolong Kami Dia di tengah banjir

lines.en: Of mor-tal ills pre-vail-ing.
lines.ko: 모략과 권세로 무기를 삼으니 천하에 누가 당하랴
lines.id: Dari penyakit fana yang sudah ada sebelumnya.

lines.en: Praise ye, praise ye the Lord
lines.ko: 내 힘만 의지할 때는 패할 수밖에 없도다
lines.id: Apakah kita dengan kekuatan kita sendiri mengaku,

lines.en: In yonder heav'nly height;
lines.ko: 힘 있는 장수 나와서 날 대신 하여 싸우네
lines.id: Perjuangan kita akan sia-sia

lines.en: Ye angels, all his hosts,
lines.ko: 이 장수 누군가 주 예수 그리스도 만군의 주로다
lines.id: Bukankah Manusia yang tepat ada di pihak kita,

lines.en: In joyful praise unite;
lines.id: Pilihan Manusia Tuhan sendiri.

lines.en: O sun and moon, declare his might,
lines.id: Jangan bertanya siapakah itu Kristus Yesus, itu Dia,

lines.en: Show forth his praise, ye stars of light.
lines.id: Tuhan Sab-a-oth Namanya,

lines.en: Praise him, ye highest heav'ns,
lines.ko: 이 땅에 마귀 들끓어 우리를 삼키려 하나
lines.id: Meskipun dunia ini penuh dengan setan,

lines.en: Praise him, ye clouds that roll,
lines.id: Jika mengancam untuk membatalkan tindakan kita,

lines.en: Created by his pow'r
lines.ko: 친척과 재물과 명예와 생명을 다 빼앗긴대도
lines.id: Kami tidak akan takut, karena Tuhan telah menghendakinya

lines.en: And under his control,
lines.ko: 진리는 살아서 그 나라 영원하리라 아멘
lines.id: Kebenarannya akan menang melalui kita

lines.en: Ye heavens that stand eternally,
lines.id: Biarkan barang-barang dan orang-orang baik pergi, begitu pula kehidupan fana ini

lines.en: Established by his firm decree.
lines.id: Tubuh yang mungkin mereka bunuh

lines.en: Ye creatures in the sea
And creatures on the earth,
Your mighty Maker praise
And tell his matchless worth;
Praise him, ye stormy winds that blow,
Ye fire and hail, ye rain and snow.
Ye hills and mountains, praise,
Each tree and beast and bird;
Ye kings and realms of earth,
Now let your praise be heard;
By high and low, by young and old,
Be all his praise and glory told.
By all let God be praised,
For he alone is great;
Above the earth and heav'n
He reigns in glorious state;
Praise him, ye saints, who know his grace
And ever dwell before his face.

title_id: Benteng yang Perkasa Adalah Tuhan Kita

title_en: This is my Father's world

lines.en: This is my Father's world,
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, Mahakuasa! Raja, siapa or-dain-est

lines.en: And to my list'ning ears,
lines.ko: 저 솔로몬의 옷보다 더 고운 백합화
lines.id: Guntur penjelasan-Mu, pedang-Mu yang menyambar petir

lines.en: All nature sings, and round me rings
lines.ko: 주 찬송하는 듯 저 맑은 새소리
lines.id: Tunjukkan kasih-Mu di tempat tinggi di mana Engkau berkuasa

lines.en: The music of the spheres.
lines.ko: 내 아버지의 지으신 그 솜씨 깊도다
lines.id: Berilah kami kedamaian di waktu kami, ya Tuhan.

lines.en: This is my Father's world:
I rest me in the thought
Of rocks and trees, of skies and seas;
His hand the wonders wrought.
This is my Father's world,
lines.id: Tuhan Yang Maha Penyayang! Bumi telah for-sak-en

lines.en: The birds their carols raise,
lines.ko: 저 아침해와 저녁 놀 밤 하늘 빛난 별
lines.id: Kelemahlembutan dan belas kasihan, dan meremehkan firman-Mu

lines.en: The morning light, the lily white,
lines.id: Jangan biarkan murka-Mu dalam terornya terbangun

lines.en: Declare their Maker's praise.
lines.ko: 다 주 하나님 영광을 잘 드러내도다
lines.id: Berilah kami kedamaian di waktu kami, ya Tuhan.

lines.en: This is my Father's world:
He shines in all that's fair;
In the rustling grass I hear him pass,
He speaks to me everywhere.
This is my Father's world,
lines.id: Tuhan Yang Maha Benar! Manusia telah menentang Engkau

lines.en: O let me ne'er forget
lines.ko: 저 산에 부는 바람과 잔잔한 시냇물
lines.id: Namun untuk selamanya menepati janji-Mu

lines.en: That though the wrong seems oft so strong,
lines.ko: 그 소리 가운데 주 음성 들리니
lines.id: Kepalsuan dan kekeliruan tidak akan tinggal di sisi-Mu

lines.en: God is the ruler yet.
lines.ko: 주 하나님의 큰 뜻을 나 알 듯 하도다 아멘
lines.id: Berilah kami kedamaian di waktu kami, ya Tuhan.

lines.en: This is my Father's world:
The battle is not done;
Jesus who died shall be satisfied,
And earth and heav'n be one.

lines.id: Demikian pula umat-Mu, dengan pengabdian yang penuh syukur,
Pujilah Dia yang menyelamatkan mereka dari bahaya dan pedang,
Bernyanyi dalam paduan suara dari lautan ke lautan,
Damai sejahtera bagi bangsa-bangsa dan puji bagi Tuhan. Amin.

title_en: My soul, bless the Lord

lines.en: From Psalm 104
My soul, bless the Lord! the Lord is most great,
lines.ko: 내 영혼아, 주님을 찬양하라! 주님은 가장 위대하시며,

lines.en: With glory arrayed, majestic his state;
The light is his garment, the skies are his shade,
lines.ko: 빛은 그의 옷이요, 하늘은 그의 그늘이요,

lines.en: And over the waters his courts he has laid.
lines.ko: 그리고 물 위에 그분의 뜰을 마련하셨습니다.

lines.en: He rides on the clouds, the wings of the storm,
lines.ko: 그는 구름을 타고, 폭풍의 날개를 타고,

lines.en: The lightning and wind his mission perform;
The earth he has founded her station to keep,
lines.ko: 그가 지키기 위해 그녀의 기지를 세운 지구,

lines.en: And wrapped as a vesture about her the deep.
lines.ko: 그리고 그녀의 깊은 곳을 옷으로 감쌌습니다.

lines.en: He waters the hills with rain from the skies,
lines.ko: 그분은 하늘에서 내린 비로 언덕에 물을 주시며,

lines.en: And plentiful grass and herbs he supplies,
lines.ko: 그리고 그가 공급하는 풍부한 풀과 약초,

lines.en: Supplying the cattle, and blessing man's toil
With bread in abundance with wine and with oil.
The trees which the Lord has planted are fed,
lines.ko: 여호와께서 심으신 나무들이 먹을 것을 얻나니

lines.en: And over the earth their branches are spread;
lines.ko: 그리고 그 가지들이 땅 위에 펼쳐져 있습니다.

lines.en: They keep in their shelter the birds of the air,
The life of each creature the Lord makes his care.
Thy Spirit, O Lord, makes life to abound,
lines.ko: 여호와여 주의 영이 생명을 풍성하게 하시며

lines.en: The earth is renewed, and fruitful the ground;
To God ascribe glory and wisdom and might,
Let God in his creatures for ever delight.
lines.ko: 하나님께서 그의 피조물을 영원히 기뻐하시게 하십시오.

lines.en: Rejoicing in God, my thought shall be sweet,
lines.ko: 하나님 안에서 기뻐하면 내 생각이 달콤하리라

lines.en: While sinners depart in ruin complete;
My soul, bless Jehovah, his Name be adored,
lines.ko: 내 영혼아 여호와를 송축하라 그 이름이 흠숭을 받으시며

lines.en: Come, praise him, ye people, and worship the Lord.
lines.ko: 너희 백성들아, 와서 그를 찬양하고 여호와께 경배하여라.

title_en: Thy might sets fast the mountains

lines.en: From Psalm 65:6-13
Thy might sets fast the mountains;
Strength girds thee evermore
To calm the raging peoples
And still the ocean's roar.
Thy majesty and greatness
Are through all lands confessed,
And joy on earth thou sendest
lines.ko: 그리고 당신이 보내신 이 땅의 기쁨

lines.en: Afar from east to west.
To bless the earth thou sendest
From thine abundant store
The waters of the springtime,
Enriching it once more.
The seed by thee provided
Is sown o'er hill and plain,
And thou with gentle showers
Dost bless the springing grain.
The year with good thou crownest,
The earth thy mercy fills,
The wilderness is fruitful,
And joyful are the hills;
With corn the vales are covered,
The flocks in pastures graze;
All nature joins in singing
A joyful song of praise.

title_en: Praise to God, immortal praise

lines.en: Praise to God, immortal praise,
For the love that crowns our days;
Bounteous Source of every joy,
Let thy praise our tongues employ.
Flocks that whiten all the plain,
Yellow sheaves of ripened grain,
Clouds that drop their fatt'ning dews,
Suns that temp'rate warmth diffuse;
All that spring with bounteous hand
Scatters o'er the smiling land;
All that liberal autumn pours
From her rich o'erflowing stores;
These to thee, my God, we owe,
lines.ko: 나의 하나님, 우리는 이것을 당신께 빚지고 있습니다.

lines.en: Source whence all our blessings flow;
And for these my soul shall raise
lines.ko: 그리고 이것들을 위해 내 영혼이 일으켜 세우리라

lines.en: Grateful vows and solemn praise.
Sing we to our God above
Praise eternal as his love;
Praise him, all ye heav'nly host,
Father, Son, and Holy Ghost.

title_en: With songs and honors sounding loud

lines.en: From Psalm 147:7-8, 15-18
With songs and honors sounding loud
Address the Lord on high;
Over the heav'ns he spreads his cloud,
lines.ko: 하늘 위에 그는 그의 구름을 펴시며

lines.en: And waters veil the sky.
He sends his show'rs of blessing down
To cheer the plains below;
He makes the grass the mountains crown,
And corn in valleys grow.
His steady counsels change the face
Of the declining year;
He bids the sun cut short his race,
lines.ko: 그는 태양이 그의 경주를 중단시키도록 명령합니다.

lines.en: And wintry days appear.
His hoary frost, his fleecy snow,
lines.ko: 그의 흰 서리, 그의 부드러운 눈,

lines.en: Descend and clothe the ground;
The liquid streams forbear to flow,
In icy fetters bound.
He sends his word, and melts the snow;
The fields no longer mourn;
He calls the warmer gales to blow,
lines.ko: 그는 더 따뜻한 강풍을 불러 불어넣고,

lines.en: And bids the spring return.
The changing wind, the flying cloud,
Obey his mighty word;
With songs and honors sounding loud
Praise ye the sovereign Lord.

title_en: Praise, Lord, for thee in Zion waits

lines.id: Datanglah, Engkau Raja Yang Maha Perkasa

lines.en: Help us Thy Name to sing Help us to praise:
lines.id: Bantu kami menyanyikan Nama-Mu. Bantu kami memuji:

lines.en: Fa-ther, all-glo-ri-ous, O'er all vic-to-ti-ous,
lines.id: Ayah, maha mulia, O'er semua yang menang,

lines.en: Come, and reign o-ver us, An-cient of Days.
lines.id: Datanglah, dan berkuasalah atas kami, Yang Lanjut Usianya.

lines.en: Praise, Lord, for thee in Zion waits;
lines.id: Datanglah, Engkau Sabda yang Menjelma,

lines.en: Prayer shall besiege thy temple gates:
lines.id: Siapkan pedang-Mu yang perkasa, Doa kami panjatkan:

lines.en: All flesh shall to thy throne repair,
lines.id: Datanglah, dan umat-Mu memberkati, Dan sukseskan Firman-Mu

lines.en: And find, through Christ, salvation there.
lines.id: Semangat Kekudusan, Pada kami turun.

lines.en: Our spirits faint; our sins prevail;
lines.id: Ayo, Penghibur Suci,

lines.en: Leave not our trembling hearts to fail:
lines.id: Kesaksianmu yang kredibel di saat-saat yang menyenangkan ini:

lines.en: O thou that hearest prayer, descend,
lines.id: Engkau yang maha kuasa, Kini berkuasa di setiap hati,

lines.en: And still be found the sinner's friend.
lines.id: Dan jangan pernah berpisah dari kami, Semangat kekuatan.

lines.en: How blest thy saints! how safely led,
lines.id: Kepada Yang Agung dari Tiga

lines.en: How surely kept, how richly fed!
lines.id: Pujian abadi, Oleh karena itu, lebih-lebih lagi.

lines.en: Saviour of all in earth and sea,
lines.id: Yang Mulia Yang Mulia Semoga kita dapat melihat dengan mulia,

lines.en: How happy they who rest in thee!
lines.id: Dan untuk selamanya Cinta dan cinta A-men.

lines.en: Thy hand sets fast the mighty hills,
Thy voice the troubled ocean stills;
Evening and morning hymn thy praise,
And earth thy bounty wide displays.
The year is with thy goodness crowned;
Thy clouds drop wealth the world around;
Through thee the deserts laugh and sing,
And nature smiles, and owns her King.
Lord, on our souls thine influence pour;
The moral waste within restore:
O let thy love our springtide be,
And make us all bear fruit to thee.

title_en: None other Lamb, none other Name
title_ko: 다른 어린 양은 없고, 다른 이름은 없습니다. (자체번역)

lines.en: None other Lamb, none other Name,
lines.ko: 다른 어린양도 없고 다른 이름도 없고

lines.en: None other Hope in heav'n or earth or sea,
lines.ko: 하늘이나 땅이나 바다에는 다른 희망이 없습니다.

lines.en: None other Hiding place from guilt and shame,
lines.ko: 죄책감과 수치심으로부터 숨을 곳은 다른 곳이 없습니다.

lines.en: None beside thee!
My faith burns low, my hope burns low;
lines.ko: 나의 믿음은 타오르고, 나의 희망은 타오르고 있습니다.

lines.en: Only my heart's desire cries out in me
lines.ko: 오직 내 마음의 갈망만이 내 안에서 부르짖는다

lines.en: By the deep thunder of its want and woe,
Cries out to thee.
Lord, thou art Life, though I be dead;
Love's fire thou art, however cold I be:
lines.ko: 당신은 사랑의 불입니다. 내가 아무리 차갑더라도:

lines.en: Nor heav'n have I, nor place to lay my head,
lines.ko: 나에게는 하늘도 없고 머리 둘 곳도 없으니

lines.en: Nor home, but thee.

title_en: Thou art the Way:  to thee alone

lines.en: Thou art the Way: to thee alone
From sin and death we flee;
And he who would the Father seek
Must seek him, Lord, by thee.
lines.ko: 주님, 당신 곁에서 그분을 찾아야 합니다.

lines.en: Thou art the Truth: thy Word alone
True wisdom can impart;
lines.ko: 참된 지혜는 나누어 줄 수 있습니다.

lines.en: Thou only canst inform the mind,
And purify the heart.
Thou art the Life: the rending tomb
Proclaims thy conquering arm,
And those who put their trust in thee
Nor death nor hell shall harm.
lines.ko: 죽음도 지옥도 해를 끼치지 못할 것입니다.

lines.en: Thou art the Way, the Truth, the Life:
Grant us that Way to know,
lines.ko: 우리에게 알 수 있는 길을 주소서,

lines.en: That Truth to keep, that Life to win,
lines.ko: 지켜야 할 진리, 승리해야 할 생명,

lines.en: Whose joys eternal flow.

title_en: Shepherd of tender youth

lines.en: Shepherd of tender youth,
Guiding in love and truth
Through devious ways:
Christ, our triumphant King,
We come thy name to sing;
lines.ko: 우리는 당신의 이름을 노래하기 위해 왔습니다.

lines.en: Hither our children bring,
