To shout thy praise.
Thou art our holy Lord,
The all-subduing Word,
Healer of strife:
Thou didst thyself abase,
That from sin's deep disgrace
Thou mightest save our race,
lines.ko: 당신은 우리 종족을 구원하실 수 있습니다.

lines.en: And give us life.
Thou art the Great High Priest,
Thou hast prepared the feast
Of heavenly love:
While in our mortal pain,
None calls on thee in vain:
Help thou dost not disdain,
Help from above.
Ever be thou our Guide,
Our Shepherd and our Pride,
Our Staff and Song:
Jesus, thou Christ of God,
By thy perennial Word,
Lead us where thou hast trod;
lines.ko: 당신이 밟으신 곳으로 우리를 인도해 주소서.

lines.en: Make our faith strong.
So now and till we die,
Sound we thy praises high,
And joyful sing:
Infants, and the glad throng
Who to thy church belong,
Unite to swell the song
To Christ our King.

title_en: O Saviour, precious Saviour

lines.en: O Saviour, precious Saviour,
Whom yet unseen we love,
lines.ko: 아직 보이지 않는 사람을 우리는 사랑합니다.

lines.en: O Name of might and favor,
All other names above;
We worship thee, we bless thee,
To thee alone we sing;
We praise thee, and confess thee
Our holy Lord and King.
O Bringer of salvation,
Who wondrously hast wrought,
Thyself the revelation
Of love beyond our thought;
We worship thee, we bless thee,
To thee alone we sing;
We praise thee, and confess thee
Our gracious Lord and King.
In thee all fulness dwelleth,
All grace and power divine:
The glory that excelleth,
O Son of God, is thine;
We worship thee, we bless thee,
To thee alone we sing;
We praise thee, and confess thee
Our glorious Lord and King.
O grant the consummation
Of this our song above
In endless adoration,
And everlasting love;
Then shall we praise and bless thee
Where perfect praises ring,
And evermore confess thee
Our Saviour and our King.

title_en: O Lord, how shall I meet thee
title_ko: 오 주님, 내가 어떻게 당신을 만나겠습니까? (자체번역)

lines.en: O Lord, how shall I meet thee,
lines.ko: 오 주님, 내가 어떻게 당신을 만나겠습니까?

lines.en: How welcome thee aright?
Thy people long to greet thee,
lines.ko: 당신의 백성이 당신에게 인사하기를 갈망하고 있습니다.

lines.en: My hope, my heart's delight!
O, kindle, Lord, most holy,
lines.ko: 오, 빛을 발하소서, 주님, 지극히 거룩하신 분이시여,

lines.en: Thy lamp within my breast
To do in spirit lowly
All that may please thee best.
lines.ko: 그 모든 것이 당신을 가장 기쁘게 할 것입니다.

lines.en: Love caused thine incarnation,
Love brought thee down to me;
Thy thirst for my salvation
Procured my liberty.
O love beyond all telling,
That led thee to embrace,
In love all love excelling,
Our lost and fallen race!
Rejoice, then, ye sad-hearted,
Who sit in deepest gloom,
lines.ko: 가장 깊은 어둠 속에 앉아 있는 사람,

lines.en: Who mourn o'er joys departed
And tremble at your doom.
Despair not, he is near you,
lines.ko: 절망하지 마십시오. 그분은 당신 가까이에 계십니다.

lines.en: Yea, standing at the door,
Who best can help and cheer you
lines.ko: 당신을 가장 잘 돕고 응원해줄 수 있는 사람

lines.en: And bids you weep no more.
lines.ko: 그리고 더 이상 울지 말라고 하십니다.

lines.en: Sin's debt, that fearful burden,
Let not your soul distress;
Your guilt the Lord will pardon
And cover by his grace.
He comes, for men procuring
The peace of sin forgiv'n,
For all God's sons securing
Their heritage in heav'n.

title_en: O Christ, our hope, our heart's desire
title_ko: 오 그리스도, 우리의 희망이요, 우리 마음의 소망이시요 (자체번역)

lines.en: O Christ, our hope, our heart's desire,
lines.ko: 오 그리스도, 우리의 희망이요, 우리 마음의 소망이시며,

lines.en: Redemption's only spring!
Creator of the world art thou,
Its Saviour and its King.
How vast the mercy and the love
Which laid our sins on thee,
And led thee to a cruel death,
To set thy people free.
But now the bands of death are burst,
The ransom has been paid;
And thou art on thy Father's throne,
lines.ko: 그리고 너는 네 아버지의 보좌에 있으니,

lines.en: In glorious robes arrayed.
O Christ, be thou our lasting joy,
lines.ko: 오 그리스도여, 우리의 영원한 기쁨이 되소서.

lines.en: Our ever great reward!
Our only glory may it be
lines.ko: 우리의 유일한 영광이 될 수 있습니다

lines.en: To glory in the Lord.

title_en: O love, how deep, how broad, how high
title_ko: 오 사랑이여, 얼마나 깊고, 얼마나 넓고, 얼마나 높은가 (자체번역)

lines.en: O, love, how deep, how broad, how high,
lines.ko: 오, 사랑이여, 얼마나 깊고, 얼마나 넓고, 얼마나 높습니까?

lines.en: How passing thought and fantasy,
That God, the Son of God, should take
lines.ko: 하나님의 아들이신 하나님이 취하셔야 할 것은

lines.en: Our mortal form for mortals' sake!
For us baptized, for us he bore
lines.ko: 우리를 위해 세례를 받았고, 그분은 우리를 위해 낳으셨습니다.

lines.en: His holy fast, and hungered sore,
For us temptations sharp he knew,
lines.ko: 그분은 우리에게 날카로운 유혹이 있음을 아셨습니다.

lines.en: For us the tempter overthrew.
For us to wicked men betrayed,
Scourged, mocked, in crown of thorns arrayed;
lines.ko: 채찍질을 당하고 조롱을 당하고 가시관을 썼으며

lines.en: For us he bore the cross's death,
For us at length gave up his breath.
For us he rose from death again,
lines.ko: 우리를 위하여 그는 죽음에서 다시 살아나셨고

lines.en: For us he went on high to reign,
lines.ko: 그분은 우리를 위해 높이 올라가 통치하셨습니다.

lines.en: For us he sent his Spirit here
lines.ko: 우리를 위해 그분의 성령을 여기에 보내셨습니다.

lines.en: To guide, to strengthen and to cheer.
All honor, laud, and glory be,
O Jesus, virgin-born, to thee;
Whom with the Father we adore,
lines.ko: 우리가 아버지와 함께 그분을 흠숭하는 분,

lines.en: And Holy Ghost, for evermore.

title_en: Of the Father's love begotten

lines.en: Of the Father's love begotten
lines.id: Dunia diciptakan oleh firman Tuhan

lines.en: Ere the worlds began to be,
lines.id: Dialah Alfa dan Omega, Yang Awal dan Yang Akhir.

lines.en: He is Alpha and Omega,
lines.ko: 지난 날과 장래 일을 모두 주관 하시네
lines.id: Anda mengendalikan segala sesuatu di masa lalu dan masa depan.

lines.en: He the source, the ending he,
lines.id: selamanya selamanya selamanya

lines.en: Of the things that are, that have been,
And that future years shall see.
This is he whom heav'n-taught singers
lines.id: Seluruh surga memuji, bahkan para malaikat pun memuji.

lines.en: Sang of old with one accord,
lines.ko: 만국 백성 경배하네 우리의 왕 하나님께
lines.id: Orang-orang dari segala bangsa menyembah Tuhan, Raja kita.

lines.en: Whom the Scriptures of the prophets
lines.ko: 모든 입술 열어 찬양 목소리를 합하여
lines.id: Bukalah seluruh bibirmu dan satukan suaramu dalam pujian

lines.en: Promised in their faithful word;
lines.id: selamanya selamanya selamanya

lines.en: Now he shines, the long-expected;
Let creation praise its Lord.
O ye heights of heav'n, adore him;
lines.ko: 성부 성자 성령 주님 삼위 일체 하나님께
lines.id: Kepada Allah Tritunggal, Bapa, Putra dan Roh Kudus

lines.en: Angel hosts, his praises sing;
lines.id: Saya akan menyanyikan pujian terima kasih dan terus-menerus memuji Anda.

lines.en: All dominions, bow before him,
lines.ko: 존귀 영광 주의 권세 영원하신 승리를
lines.id: Kehormatan, kemuliaan, kekuasaan, kemenangan abadi

lines.en: And extol our God and King;
lines.id: Selamanya dan selamanya Amin

lines.en: Let no tongue on earth be silent,
Ev'ry voice in concert ring.
Thee let age and thee let manhood,
Thee let boys in chorus sing;
Matrons, virgins, little maidens,
With glad voices answering;
Let their guileless songs reecho,
And their heart its music bring.
Christ, to thee, with God the Father,
And, O Holy Ghost, to thee,
Hymn, and chant, and high thanksgiving,
And unwearied praises be,
Honor, glory, and dominion,
And eternal victory.

title_en: The people that in darkness sat

lines.en: The people that in darkness sat
A glorious light have seen;
The light has shined on them who long
In shades of death have been.
To hail thee, Sun of Righteousness,
The gathering nations come;
They joy as when the reapers bear
lines.ko: 그들은 추수꾼이 열매를 맺을 때처럼 기뻐합니다

lines.en: Their harvest treasures home.
For thou their burden dost remove
And break the tyrant's rod,
As in the day when Midian fell
Before the sword of God.
To us a Child of hope is born,
To us a Son is giv'n,
And on his shoulder ever rests
All pow'r in earth and heaven.
His name shall be the Prince of Peace,
lines.ko: 그 이름은 평강의 왕이라 할 것이요

lines.en: The Everlasting Lord,
The Wonderful, the Counsellor,
The God by all adored.
His righteous government and pow'r
Shall over all extend;
On judgment and on justice based,
His reign shall have no end.
Lord Jesus, reign in us, we pray,
lines.ko: 주 예수님, 우리 안에 다스리시옵소서 기도합니다.

lines.en: And make us thine alone,
Who with the Father ever art
And Holy Spirit, one.

title_en: At the Name of Jesus every knee shall bow

lines.en: At the Name of Jesus
lines.ko: 그 맑고 환한 밤중에 뭇 천사 내려와
lines.id: Itu terjadi pada tengah malam yang cerah,

lines.en: Ev'ry knee shall bow,
lines.ko: 그 손에 비파 들고서 다 찬송 하기를
lines.id: Lagu kuno yang mulia itu,

lines.en: Every tongue confess him
lines.ko: 평강의 왕이 오시니 다 평안 하여라
lines.id: Dari para malaikat yang membungkuk di dekat bumi,

lines.en: King of Glory now.
lines.ko: 그 소란하던 세상이 다 고요 하도다
lines.id: Untuk menyentuh kecapi emas mereka

lines.en: 'Tis the Father's pleasure
lines.id: “Damai di bumi, niat baik terhadap manusia.

lines.en: We should call him Lord,
lines.id: Dari Raja surga yang maha pemurah.”

lines.en: Who from the beginning
lines.id: Dunia berada dalam keheningan yang khusyuk

lines.en: Was the mighty word.
lines.id: Mendengar para malaikat bernyanyi.

lines.en: At his voice creation
lines.ko: 뭇 천사 날개 펴고서 이 땅에 내려와
lines.id: Masih melalui langit yang terbelah mereka datang,

lines.en: Sprang at once to sight,
lines.ko: 그 때에 부른 노래가 또 다시 들리니
lines.id: Dengan sayap damai yang tak terbentang,

lines.en: All the angel faces,
lines.ko: 이 슬픔 많은 세상에 큰 위로 넘치고
lines.id: Dan musik surgawi mereka tetap melayang

lines.en: All the hosts of light,
lines.ko: 온 세상 기뻐 뛰놀며 다 찬송 하도다
lines.id: Wahai seluruh dunia yang lelah

lines.en: Thrones and dominations,
lines.id: Di atas, datarannya menyedihkan dan rendah

lines.en: Stars upon their way,
lines.id: Mereka membungkuk pada sayap yang melayang,

lines.en: All the heav'nly orders
lines.id: Dan setiap kali terdengar suara Ba-bel

lines.en: In their great array.
lines.id: Malaikat yang diberkati bernyanyi.

lines.en: Humbled for a season
lines.ko: 이 괴롬 많은 세상에 짐 지고 가는 자
lines.id: Dan kamu, di bawah beban hidup yang menghancurkan,

lines.en: To receive a name
lines.ko: 그 험한 준령 넘느라 온 몸이 곤하나
lines.id: Yang bentuknya membungkuk rendah,

lines.en: From the lips of sinners
lines.ko: 이 죄악 세상 살 동안 새 소망 가지고
lines.id: Siapa yang bekerja keras sepanjang perjalanan pendakian,

lines.en: Unto whom he came,
lines.ko: 저 천사 기쁜 찬송을 들으며 쉬어라
lines.id: Dengan langkah yang menyakitkan dan lambat,

lines.en: Faithfully he bore it
lines.id: Lihatlah sekarang, untuk saat-saat bahagia dan emas

lines.en: Spotless to the last,
lines.id: Ayo cepat di sayap

lines.en: Brought it back victorious,
lines.id: Wahai istirahat di tepi jalan yang lelah,

lines.en: When from death he passed.
lines.id: Dan dengarkan para malaikat bernyanyi.

lines.en: In your hearts enthrone him;
lines.ko: 옛 선지 예언 응하여 베들레헴 성에
lines.id: Sebab, hari-hari sudah semakin dekat,

lines.en: There let him subdue
lines.ko: 주 예수 탄생 하시니 온 세상 구주라
lines.id: Oleh para penyair yang dinubuatkan,

lines.en: All that is not holy,
lines.ko: 저 천사 기쁜 노래를 또 다시 부르니
lines.id: Ketika, dengan tahun-tahun yang terus berputar,

lines.en: All that is not true:
lines.ko: 온 세상 사는 사람들 다 화답 하도다
lines.id: Tibalah zaman emas

lines.en: Crown him as your Captain
lines.id: Ketika perdamaian meliputi seluruh bumi

lines.en: In temptation's hour:
lines.id: Kemegahan kunonya melayang,

lines.en: Let his will enfold you
lines.id: Dan seluruh dunia mengembalikan lagu tersebut

lines.en: In its light and pow'r.
lines.id: Yang kini dinyanyikan para malaikat.

lines.en: Brothers, this Lord Jesus
Shall return again,
With his Father's glory,
With his angel train;
For all wreaths of empire
Meet upon his brow,
And our hearts confess him
King of Glory now.

title_id: Itu terjadi pada tengah malam yang cerah

title_en: My heart doth overflow

lines.en: From Psalm 45:1-10
lines.ko: 오 베들레헴 작은 골 너 잠들었느냐
lines.id: Wahai kota kecil beth-le-hem,

lines.en: How still we see thee lie
lines.id: Betapa masih kami melihatmu berbohong

lines.en: A-bove thy deep and dream-less sleep
lines.ko: 저 놀라운 빛 지금 캄캄한 이 밤에
lines.id: Di atas tidurmu yang nyenyak dan tanpa mimpi

lines.en: The si-lent stars go by:
lines.ko: 온 하늘 두루 비춘 줄 너 어찌 모르나
lines.id: Bintang-bintang yang diam berlalu:

lines.en: My heart doth overflow,
lines.ko: 온 세상 모든 사람들 잠자는 동안에
lines.id: Karena Kristus lahir dari Maria

lines.en: A goodly theme is mine;
lines.id: Dan mengumpulkan semuanya,

lines.en: My eager tongue with joyful song
lines.ko: 저 새벽별이 홀로 그 일을 아는 듯
lines.id: Saat manusia tidur, para malaikat tetap terjaga

lines.en: Doth praise the King divine.
lines.ko: 밤새껏 귀한 그 일을 말없이 지켰네
lines.id: Jam tangan cinta mereka yang tak terkalahkan.

lines.en: Supremely fair thou art,
lines.id: Wahai bintang pagi, bersama-sama

lines.en: Thy lips with grace o'erflow;
lines.id: Proklamasikan kelahiran suci

lines.en: His richest blessings evermore
lines.id: Dan pujian bernyanyi untuk Tuhan Raja,

lines.en: Doth God on thee bestow.
lines.id: Dan kedamaian bagi manusia di bumi.

lines.en: Now gird thee with thy sword,
lines.ko: 오 놀라우신 하나님 큰 선물 주시니
lines.id: Betapa diam-diamnya, betapa diam-diamnya

lines.en: O strong and mighty one,
lines.ko: 주 믿는 사람 마음에 큰 은혜 받도다
lines.id: Hadiah yang menakjubkan telah diberikan!

lines.en: In splendid majesty arrayed,
lines.ko: 이 죄악 세상 사람 주 오심 모르나
lines.id: Maka Allah memberi bagian pada hati manusia

lines.en: More glorious than the sun.
lines.ko: 주 영접하는 사람들 그 맘에 오시네
lines.id: Berkah dari surga-Nya.

lines.en: Triumphantly ride forth
lines.id: Tidak ada telinga yang dapat mendengar kedatangan-Nya,

lines.en: For meekness, truth, and right;
lines.id: Namun di dunia yang penuh dosa ini,

lines.en: Thine arm shall gain the victory
lines.id: Dimana jiwa-jiwa yang lemah lembut akan tetap menerima Dia,

lines.en: In wondrous deeds of might.
lines.id: Kristus yang terkasih masuk.

lines.en: Thy strength shall overcome
lines.ko: 오 베들레헴 예수님 내 맘에 오셔서
lines.id: Wahai Anak Suci Betlehem!

lines.en: All those that hate the King,
lines.ko: 내 죄를 모두 사하고 늘 함께 하소서
lines.id: Turunlah kepada kami, kami berdoa

lines.en: And under thy dominion strong
lines.ko: 저 천사들의 소식 나 기뻐 들으니
lines.id: Buanglah dosa kita, dan masuklah

lines.en: The nations thou shalt bring.
lines.ko: 오 임마누엘 예수님 내 맘에 오소서 아멘
lines.id: Lahirlah di dalam diri kami hari ini.

lines.en: Thy royal throne, O God,
lines.id: Kita mendengar malaikat Natal

lines.en: For evermore shall stand;
lines.id: Berita gembira menceritakannya

lines.en: Eternal truth and justice wield
lines.id: O datanglah kepada kami, tinggallah bersama kami,

lines.en: The sceptre in thy hand.
lines.id: Tuhan kami Em-man-u-el.

lines.en: Since thou art sinless found,
The Lord, thy God confessed,
Anointeth thee with perfect joy,
Thou art supremely blessed.
Thy garments breathe of myrrh
And spices sweet and rare;
Glad strains of heav'nly music ring
Throughout thy palace fair.
Amid thy glorious train
Kings' daughters waiting stand,
And fairest gems bedeck thy bride,
The queen at thy right hand.
O royal bride, give heed,
And to my words attend;
For Christ, the King, forsake the world
And ev'ry former friend.

title_en: O could I speak the matchless worth
title_ko: 오, 비길 데 없는 가치를 말할 수 있을까요? (자체번역)

lines.en: O could I speak the matchless worth,
lines.ko: 오, 제가 비교할 수 없는 가치를 말할 수 있을까요?

lines.en: O could I sound the glories forth
lines.ko: 오, 내가 영광을 외칠 수 있을까요?

lines.en: Which in my Saviour shine,
lines.ko: 나의 구세주 안에서 빛을 발하는 것,

lines.en: I'd soar, and touch the heavenly strings,
lines.ko: 나는 솟아오를 것이고, 하늘의 줄을 만질 것이고,

lines.en: And vie with Gabriel while he sings
lines.ko: 그리고 노래하는 동안 가브리엘과 경쟁을 해보세요

lines.en: In notes almost divine.
I'd sing the precious blood he spilt,
My ransom from the dreadful guilt
Of sin, and wrath Divine:
I'd sing his glorious righteousness,
In which all perfect, heavenly dress
My soul shall ever shine.
I'd sing the characters he bears,
lines.ko: 나는 그가 갖고 있는 캐릭터를 노래할 것이다.

lines.en: And all the forms of love he wears,
lines.ko: 그리고 그가 입는 모든 형태의 사랑,

lines.en: Exalted on his throne:
In loftiest songs of sweetest praise,
lines.ko: 가장 감미로운 찬양의 가장 고상한 노래 속에서,

lines.en: I would to everlasting days
Make all his glories known.
Well, the delightful day will come
When my dear Lord will bring me home,
lines.ko: 사랑하는 주님께서 나를 집으로 데려가실 때,

lines.en: And I shall see his face;
lines.ko: 그리고 나는 그의 얼굴을 볼 것이다.

lines.en: Then with my Saviour, brother, friend,
lines.ko: 그러면 나의 구세주, 형제, 친구와 함께

lines.en: A blest eternity I'll spend,
Triumphant in his grace.

title_en: Let us love, and sing, and wonder

lines.en: Let us love, and sing, and wonder,
Let us praise the Saviour's name!
He has hushed the law's loud thunder,
He has quenched Mount Sinai's flame;
He has washed us with his blood,
He has brought us nigh to God.
Let us love the Lord who bought us,
Pitied us when enemies,
lines.ko: 적들이 있을 때 우리를 불쌍히 여기셨고,

lines.en: Called us by his grace, and taught us,
lines.ko: 그의 은혜로 우리를 부르사 우리를 가르치셨으니

lines.en: Gave us ears and gave us eyes:
He has washed us with his blood,
He presents our souls to God.
Let us sing, though fierce temptation
Threaten hard to bear us down!
For the Lord, our strong salvation,
Holds in view the conqueror's crown,
He who washed us with his blood,
Soon will bring us home to God.
lines.ko: 곧 우리를 하나님의 집으로 데려갈 것입니다.

lines.en: Let us wonder; grace and justice
Join, and point to mercy's store;
When through grace in Christ our trust is,
lines.ko: 그리스도 안에 있는 은혜로 말미암아 우리의 신뢰가

lines.en: Justice smiles, and asks no more:
lines.ko: 정의는 웃으며 더 이상 묻지 않습니다.

lines.en: He who washed us with his blood,
Has secured our way to God.
Let us praise, and join the chorus
Of the saints enthroned on high;
lines.ko: 높은 곳에 보좌에 앉은 성도들에 대하여

lines.en: Here they trusted him before us,
lines.ko: 여기서 그들은 우리보다 먼저 그를 믿었습니다.

lines.en: Now their praises fill the sky:
lines.ko: 이제 그들의 찬양이 하늘을 가득 채웁니다.

lines.en: "Thou hast washed us with thy blood;
Thou art worthy, Lamb of God!"

title_en: Hail, thou once despised Jesus

lines.en: Hail, thou once despised Jesus,
Hail, thou Galilean King!
Thou didst suffer to release us:
lines.ko: 당신은 우리를 해방시키기 위해 고통을 당하셨습니다.

lines.en: Thou didst free salvation bring.
Hail, thou agonizing Saviour,
Bearer of our sin and shame!
By thy merits we find favor;
Life is given through thy name.
Paschal Lamb, by God appointed,
All our sins were on thee laid;
By almighty love anointed,
Thou hast full atonement made:
All thy people are forgiven
Through the virtue of thy blood;
Opened is the gate of heaven,
Peace is made 'twixt man and God.
Jesus, hail! enthroned in glory,
There for ever to abide;
All the heav'nly hosts adore thee,
Seated at thy Father's side:
There for sinners thou art pleading;
There thou dost our place prepare;
Ever for us interceding,
Till in glory we appear.
Worship, honor, power, and blessing
Thou art worthy to receive:
Loudest praises without ceasing,
Meet it is for us to give.
Help, ye bright angelic spirits,
Bring your sweetest, noblest lays;
lines.ko: 가장 달콤하고 고귀한 평신도를 가져 오십시오.

lines.en: Help to sing our Saviour's merits,
Help to chant Immanuel's praise.

title_en: Fairest Lord Jesus, Ruler of all nature

lines.en: Fairest Lord Jesus, Ruler of all nature,
lines.ko: 만유의 주재 존귀하신 예수 사람이 되신 하나님
lines.id: Tuhan Yesus yang paling adil, Penguasa seluruh alam,

lines.en: Son of God and Son of Man!
lines.ko: 나 사모하여 영원히 섬길 내 영광 되신 주로다
lines.id: Wahai Engkau Tuhan dan manusia Putra

lines.en: Thee will I cherish, thee will I honor,
lines.id: Engkau akan kuhormati,

lines.en: Thou, my soul's glory, joy, and crown.
lines.id: Engkaulah kemuliaan, kegembiraan dan mahkota jiwaku.

lines.en: Fair are the meadows, fair are the woodlands,
lines.ko: 화려한 동산 무성한 저 수목 다 아름답고 묘하나
lines.id: Padang rumputnya indah, Hutannya masih lebih indah,

lines.en: Robed in the blooming garb of spring:
lines.ko: 순전한 예수 더 아름다워 봄 같은 기쁨 주시네
lines.id: Mengenakan pakaian musim semi yang mekar

lines.en: Jesus is fairer, Jesus is purer,
lines.id: Yesus lebih adil, Yesus lebih murni,

lines.en: Who makes the woeful heart to sing.
lines.id: Yang membuat hati sedih bernyanyi.

lines.en: Fair is the sunshine, fair is the moonlight,
lines.ko: 광명한 해와 명랑한 저 달빛 수 많은 별들 빛나나
lines.id: Cerahnya sinar matahari, Lebih cerah lagi cahaya bulan,

lines.en: And all the twinkling, starry host:
lines.ko: 주 예수 빛은 더 찬란하여 참 비교 할 수 없도다 아멘
lines.id: Dan semua tuan rumah yang berkelap-kelip dan menatap

lines.en: Jesus shines brighter, Jesus shines purer
lines.id: Yesus bersinar lebih terang, Yesus bersinar lebih murni,

lines.en: Than all the angels heav'n can boast.
lines.id: Dari semua malaikat yang bisa dibanggakan surga. Amin.

lines.en: Beautiful Saviour! Lord of the nations!
Son of God and Son of Man!
Glory and honor, praise, adoration,
Now and for evermore be thine.

title_en: Crown his head with endless blessing

lines.en: Crown his head with endless blessing,
lines.id: Mendengar! malaikat-malaikatnya bernyanyi,

lines.en: Who, in God the Father's name,
lines.ko: 영광 돌려 보내세 구주 오늘 나셨네
lines.id: “Kemuliaan bagi Raja yang baru lahir

lines.en: With compassions never ceasing,
lines.ko: 크고 작은 나라들 기뻐 화답 하여라
lines.id: Damai di bumi, dan belas kasihan yang lembut,

lines.en: Comes salvation to proclaim.
lines.ko: 영광 받을 왕의 왕 베들레헴 나신 주
lines.id: Tuhan dan orang-orang berdosa berdamai!”

lines.en: Joy-ful, all ye na-tions, rise,
lines.ko: 영광 받을 왕의 왕 베들레헴 나신 주
lines.id: Penuh sukacita, hai bangsa-bangsa, bangkitlah,

lines.en: Hail, ye saints, who know his favor,
lines.id: Kristus, yang dipuja oleh surga tertinggi,

lines.en: Who within his gates are found,
lines.ko: 처녀 몸에 나셔서 사람 몸을 입었네
lines.id: Kristus, Tuhan yang kekal!

lines.en: Hail, ye saints, th'exalted Saviour,
lines.id: Di kemudian hari, lihatlah Dia datang,

lines.en: Let his courts with praise resound.
lines.ko: 영광 돌려 보내며 높이 찬양 하여라
lines.id: Keturunan dari rahim Perawan.

lines.en: Veiled in flesh the God-head see
lines.ko: 영광 돌려 보내며 높이 찬양 하여라
lines.id: Terselubung dalam daging, kepala Tuhan melihatnya

lines.en: Jesus, thee our Saviour hailing,
lines.id: Salam Pangeran Perdamaian yang dilahirkan di surga!

lines.en: Thee our God in praise we own;
lines.ko: 세상 빛이 되시며 우리 생명 되시네
lines.id: Salam Matahari Kebenaran!

lines.en: Highest honors, never failing,
lines.id: Terang dan hidup bagi semua yang Dia bawakan,

lines.en: Rise eternal round thy throne.
lines.id: Bangkit dengan kesembuhan di sayap-Nya.

lines.en: Mild He lays His glo-ry by,
lines.ko: 영생하게 하시니 왕께 찬양 하여라 아멘
lines.id: Dengan lembut Dia memberikan kemuliaan-Nya,

lines.en: Now, ye saints, his power confessing,
In your grateful strains adore;
For his mercy, never ceasing,
Flows, and flows for evermore.

title_en: When morning gilds the skies

lines.en: When morning gilds the skies,
lines.id: Malaikat-malaikat yang telah kami dengar di tempat tinggi,

lines.en: My heart awaking cries
lines.id: Bernyanyi manis di dataran,

lines.en: May Jesus Christ be praised:
lines.id: Dan pegunungan di baliknya

lines.en: Alike at work and prayer
lines.id: Gema mendukung alunan kegembiraan mereka.

lines.en: To Jesus I repair;
lines.id: Glo-ri-a di ex-cel-sis De-o

lines.en: May Jesus Christ be praised.
lines.id: Glo-ri-a di ex-cel-sis De-o

lines.en: When sleep her balm denies,
lines.id: Para penggembala, mengapa ini ju-bi-lee

lines.en: My silent spirit sighs,
lines.id: Mengapa kegembiraanmu berlangsung lama

lines.en: May Jesus Christ be praised:
lines.id: Katakan kabar apa yang mungkin terjadi,

lines.en: When evil thoughts molest,
lines.id: Yang menginspirasi lagu surgawi Anda.

lines.en: With this I shield my breast,
lines.id: Glo-ri-a di ex-cel-sis De-o

lines.en: May Jesus Christ be praised.
lines.id: Glo-ri-a di ex-cel-sis De-o

lines.en: Does sadness fill my mind?
lines.id: Datanglah ke Beth-le-hem dan lihatlah,

lines.en: A solace here I find,
lines.id: Dia yang kelahirannya dinyanyikan oleh para malaikat

lines.en: May Jesus Christ be praised:
lines.id: Ayo dore dengan lutut tertekuk,

lines.en: Or fades my earthly bliss?
lines.id: Bayi Kristus, Raja yang baru lahir.

lines.en: My comfort still is this,
lines.id: Glo-ri-a di ex-cel-sis De-o

lines.en: May Jesus Christ be praised.
lines.id: Glo-ri-a di ex-cel-sis De-o

lines.en: In heav'n's eternal bliss
lines.ko: 구유 안에 누이신 어린 아기 예수께
lines.id: Lihat di dalam palungan yang diletakkan,

lines.en: The loveliest strain is this,
lines.ko: 우리들도 다 함께 기쁜 찬송 부르자
lines.id: Yesus, Tuhan langit dan bumi!

lines.en: May Jesus Christ be praised:
lines.id: Bumi dan surga meminjamkan bantuanmu,

lines.en: The powers of darkness fear,
lines.id: Bersama kami menyanyikan kelahiran Juruselamat kami.

lines.en: When this sweet chant they hear,
lines.id: Glo-ri-a di ex-cel-sis De-o

lines.en: May Jesus Christ be praised.
lines.id: Glo-ri-a di ex-cel-sis De-o A-men.

lines.en: Let earth's wide circle round
In joyful notes resound,
May Jesus Christ be praised:
Let air and sea and sky,
From depth to height, reply,
May Jesus Christ be praised.
Be this, while life is mine,
My canticle divine,
May Jesus Christ be praised:
Be this th'eternal song,
Through all the ages on,
May Jesus Christ be praised.

title_id: Malaikat yang Telah Kami Dengar Di Tempat Tinggi

title_en: Wondrous King, all-glorious

lines.en: Wondrous King, all glorious,
lines.id: Kami tiga raja O-ri-ent adalah,

lines.en: Sovereign Lord victorious,
lines.ko: 산을 넘고 물을 건너 별 따라 왔도다
lines.id: Membawa hadiah-hadiah yang kita lalui jauh-jauh

lines.en: O, receive our praise with favor!
lines.ko: 후렴 : 오 탄일 밤의 밝은 별 아름답고 빛난 별
lines.id: Ladang dan air mancur, tegalan dan gunung,

lines.en: From thee welled God's kindness
lines.ko: 아기 예수 계신 곳에 우리 인도 하여라
lines.id: Mengikuti bintang Anda.

lines.en: Though we in our blindness
lines.id: Wahai bintang keajaiban, bintang malam,

lines.en: Strayed from thee, our blessed Saviour.
lines.id: Bintangi dengan keindahan kerajaan yang cerah,

lines.en: Strengthen thou,
lines.id: Memimpin di wilayah barat, masih terus berjalan,

lines.en: Help us now;
lines.id: Bimbing kami menuju cahaya-Mu yang sempurna.

lines.en: Let our tongues be singing,
Thee our praises bringing.
Heavens, spread the story
lines.id: Terlahir sebagai Raja di dataran Beth-le-hem,

lines.en: Of our Maker's glory,
lines.id: Emas kubawa untuk memahkotai Dia keuntungan,

lines.en: All the pomp of earth obscuring.
lines.id: Raja selamanya, tidak pernah berhenti

lines.en: Sun, thy rays be sending,
lines.id: Atas kita semua untuk memerintah.

lines.en: Thy bright beams expending,
lines.id: Wahai bintang keajaiban, bintang malam,

lines.en: Light to all the earth assuring.
lines.id: Bintangi dengan keindahan kerajaan yang cerah,

lines.en: Moon and star,

lines.en: My gracious Master and my God,
Assist me to proclaim,
To spread through all the earth abroad,
The honors of thy Name.
Jesus, the Name that charms our fears,
That bids our sorrows cease;
'Tis music in the sinner's ears,
'Tis life, and health, and peace.
He breaks the power of reigning sin,
He sets the pris'ner free;
His blood can make the foulest clean,
His blood availed for me.
He speaks and, listening to his voice,
New life the dead receive;
The mournful, broken hearts rejoice;
The humble poor believe.
Hear him, ye deaf; his praise, ye dumb,
Your loosened tongues employ;
Ye blind, behold your Savior come;
And leap, ye lame, for joy.

title_en: O Christ, our King, Creator, Lord
title_ko: 오 그리스도, 우리의 왕, 창조주, 주님 (자체번역)

lines.en: O Christ, our King, Creator, Lord,

lines.en: Saviour of all who trust thy Word,
lines.ko: 당신의 말씀을 믿는 모든 사람의 구원자시여,

lines.en: To them who seek thee ever near,
Now to our praises bend thine ear.
lines.ko: 이제 우리의 찬양에 귀를 기울여 주십시오.

lines.en: In thy dear cross a grace is found
It flows from every streaming wound
Whose pow'r our inbred sin controls,
lines.ko: 우리의 타고난 죄가 누구의 힘을 통제하는지,

lines.en: Breaks the firm bond, and frees our souls.
lines.ko: 굳건한 결속을 깨뜨리고 우리의 영혼을 해방시킵니다.

lines.en: Thou didst create the stars of night;
Yet thou hast veiled in flesh thy light,

lines.en: Hast deigned a mortal form to wear,
A mortal's painful lot to bear.
When thou didst hang upon the tree,
The quaking earth acknowledged thee;
When thou didst here yield up thy breath,
The world grew dark as shades of death.
Now in the Father's glory high,
Great Conqueror, nevermore to die,
lines.ko: 위대한 정복자, 더 이상 죽지 않으시는 분,

lines.en: Us by thy mighty pow'r defend,
And reign through ages without end.

lines.id: Membawa rasa sakit dan duka ke dalam hatiku,
Basuhlah aku dengan darah Anak Domba,
Dan aku akan menjadi lebih putih dari salju.
Lebih putih dari salju,

Basuhlah aku dengan darah Anak Domba,
Dan aku akan menjadi lebih putih dari salju.

lines.id: Dan Salib Tubuh-Nya datang

lines.id: Yesus, ke sumber mata air-Mu,

lines.en: Sick and helpless, and ready to die.

Bersihkan aku dengan pencucian ilahi-Mu,
Dan aku akan menjadi lebih putih dari salju.
Lebih putih dari salju,
Lebih putih dari salju
Basuhlah aku dengan darah Anak Domba,
Dan aku akan menjadi lebih putih dari salju, kawan.

lines.en: "Lord, whence are those blood-drops all the way

lines.id: Dia tertusuk duri.

lines.en: "Lord, whence are thy hands so rent and torn?
They're pierced tonight by many a thorn."
But all thro' the mountains, thunder riv'n,

lines.id: Sang penggembala sangat senang hingga dia berteriak dengan keras.

lines.en: And up from the rocky steep,

lines.id: Bergembiralah semuanya, aku telah menemukan dombaku yang hilang.

lines.en: And the angels echoed around the throne,
"Rejoice, for the Lord brings back his own!"

title_en: Lovingkindness, lovingkindness

lines.en: Joy to the world! The Lord is come

lines.id: Sukacita bagi dunia! Tuhan telah datang

lines.id: Biarkan bumi menerima kembali Rajanya

lines.en: Let ev-ery heart pre-pare Him room,
lines.id: Biarlah setiap hati menyediakan ruang untuk-Nya,

lines.en: And heav'n and na-ture sing,
lines.id: Dan surga dan alam bernyanyi,

lines.en: And heav'n and na-ture sing,
lines.id: Dan surga dan alam bernyanyi,

lines.en: And heav'n and heav'n and na-ture sing.
lines.id: Dan surga, surga, dan alam bernyanyi.

lines.en: And sing thy great Redeemer's praise:
lines.ko: 구세주 탄생 했으니 다 찬양 하여라
lines.id: Sukacita bagi bumi! Sang Juruselamat berkuasa

lines.en: He justly claims a song from me,
lines.ko: 온 세상 죄를 사하려 주 예수 오셨네
lines.id: Jangan biarkan dosa dan kesedihan bertambah lagi,

lines.en: His lovingkindness is so free.
lines.ko: 은혜와 진리 되신 주 다 주관 하시니
lines.id: Dia memerintah dunia dengan kebenaran dan kasih karunia,

lines.en: Lovingkindness, lovingkindness,
His lovingkindness is so free.
He saw me ruined in the fall,
Yet loved me not withstanding all,
And saved me from my lost estate,
His lovingkindness is so great.
Lovingkindness, lovingkindness,
His lovingkindness is so great.
Through mighty hosts of cruel foes,
Where earth and hell my way oppose,
He safely leads my soul along,
His lovingkindness is so strong.
Lovingkindness, lovingkindness,
His lovingkindness is so strong.
So when I pass death's gloomy vale,
And life and mortal pow'rs shall fail,
O may my last expiring breath
His lovingkindness sing in death.
Lovingkindness, lovingkindness,
His lovingkindness sing in death.
Then shall I mount, and soar away
To the bright world of endless day;
There shall I sing, with sweet surprise,
His lovingkindness in the skies,
Lovingkindness, lovingkindness,
His lovingkindness in the skies.

lines.en: Thou hast bid me gaze upon thee,

Thou hast made me whole.
Jesus, I am resting, resting
lines.ko: 저 동방에 별 하나가 이상한 빛을 비추어
lines.id: Mereka mendongak dan melihat sebuah bintang

lines.id: Bersinar di timur, jauh melampaui mereka

lines.id: Tepat di atas tempat Yesus dibaringkan.

lines.en: Yes, I rest in thee, Beloved,
lines.id: No-el, No-el, No-el, No-el,

lines.en: Know what wealth of grace is thine,
lines.id: Lahirlah Raja Is-ra-el.

lines.en: Know thy certainty of promise
And have made it mine.
Simply trusting thee, Lord Jesus,

lines.en: Meets, supplies its every need,

lines.en: Compasseth me round with blessings:
Thine is love indeed.
Ever lift thy face upon me
As I work and wait for thee;
Resting 'neath thy smile, Lord Jesus,
Earth's dark shadows flee.
Brightness of my Father's glory,
Sunshine of my Father's face,
Keep me ever trusting, resting,
Fill me with thy grace.

title_en: Jesus, my Saviour, look on me

lines.en: Jesus, my Saviour, look on me,
For I am weary and oppressed;
I come to cast myself on thee:
lines.ko: 나는 당신에게 나 자신을 맡기러 왔습니다:

lines.en: Thou are my Rest.
Look down on me, for I am weak;
I feel the toilsome journey's length;
Thine aid omnipotent I seek:
Thou art my Strength.
I am bewildered on my way,
Dark and tempestuous is the night;
O send thou forth some cheering ray:
Thou art my Light.
I hear the storms around me rise;
lines.ko: 내 주변에서 폭풍이 몰아치는 소리가 들립니다.

lines.en: But when I dread th'impending shock,
lines.ko: 그러나 내가 임박한 충격을 두려워할 때,

lines.en: My spirit to the refuge flies:
Thou art my Rock.
Standing alone on Jordan's brink,
In that tremendous latest strife,
Thou wilt not suffer me to sink:
lines.ko: 당신은 나를 가라앉히지 않게 하실 것입니다.

lines.en: Thou art my Life.
Thou wilt my every want supply,
lines.ko: 당신은 내가 원하는 모든 것을 공급해 주실 것입니다.

lines.en: E'en to the end, whatever befall;
Through life, in death, eternally,
Thou art my all.

title_en: The King of Love my Shepherd is

lines.en: Once in roy-al Da-vid's cit-y
lines.ko: 옛날 임금 다윗성에 낮은 마구 있더니
lines.id: Suatu ketika di kota kerajaan David-y

lines.en: Stood a low-ly cat-tle shed,
lines.id: Berdiri di kandang ternak yang rendah,

lines.en: Where a moth-er laid her ba-by
lines.id: Dimana seorang ibu membaringkan bayinya

lines.en: In a man-ger for His bed:
lines.id: Di palungan untuk tempat tidur-Nya:

lines.en: Ma-ry was that moth-er mild,
lines.id: Ma-ry adalah ibu yang lembut,

lines.en: Je-sus Christ her lit-tle child.
lines.id: Yesus Kristus, anak kecilnya.

lines.en: The King of Love my Shepherd is,
lines.id: Dia turun ke bumi dari surga-en

lines.en: Whose goodness faileth never;
lines.ko: 착하셔라 어릴 때에 모친 순종 하시고
lines.id: Dan, melalui masa kanak-kanak-Nya yang menakjubkan,

lines.en: I nothing lack if I am his
lines.ko: 하늘에서 오신 예수 우리 위해 죽으사
lines.id: Dan mata kita pada akhirnya akan melihat Dia,

lines.en: And he is mine for ever.
Where streams of living water flow
My ransomed soul he leadeth,
And, where the verdant pastures grow,
With food celestial feedeth.
Perverse and foolish oft I strayed,
But yet in love he sought me,
And on his shoulder gently laid,
And home, rejoicing, brought me.
In death's dark vale I fear no ill
With thee, dear Lord, beside me;
Thy rod and staff my comfort still,
Thy cross before to guide me.
Thou spread'st a table in my sight;
Thine unction grace bestoweth;
And O what transport of delight
From thy pure chalice floweth.
And so through all the length of days
Thy goodness faileth never;
Good Shepherd, may I sing thy praise
Within thy house for ever.

title_en: One there is, above all others

lines.en: One there is, above all others,
Well deserves the name of Friend;
His is love beyond a brother's,
Costly, free, and knows no end:
lines.ko: 비용이 많이 들고 무료이며 끝이 없습니다.

lines.en: They who once his kindness prove
Find it everlasting love.
Which of all our friends, to save us,
lines.ko: 우리 친구 중 누가 우리를 구하려고

lines.en: Could or would have shed his blood?
But our Jesus died to have us
lines.ko: 그러나 우리 예수님은 우리를 갖기 위해 죽으셨습니다.

lines.en: Reconciled in him to God.
This was boundless love indeed;
Jesus is a Friend in need.
When he lived on earth abased,
lines.ko: 그가 이 땅에서 비천한 삶을 살았을 때,

lines.en: "Friend of sinners" was his name,
Now above all glory raised,
He rejoices in the same;
Still he calls them brethren, friends,
lines.ko: 그럼에도 불구하고 그는 그들을 형제, 친구,

lines.en: And to all their wants attends.
lines.ko: 그리고 그들이 원하는 모든 것이 이루어집니다.

lines.en: Could we bear from one another
What he daily bears from us?
Yet this glorious Friend and Brother
Loves us though we treat him thus:
lines.ko: 우리가 그를 이렇게 대하더라도 그는 우리를 사랑합니다.

lines.en: Though for good we render ill,
He accounts us brethren still.
O for grace our hearts to soften!
lines.ko: 오, 우리 마음을 부드럽게 하는 은혜가 필요합니다!

lines.en: Teach us, Lord, at length to love,
lines.ko: 주님, 마침내 우리에게 사랑을 가르쳐 주십시오.

lines.en: We, alas! forget too often
What a Friend we have above.
But when home our souls are brought,
We will love thee as we ought.

title_en: Majestic sweetness sits enthroned

lines.en: Majestic sweetness sits enthroned
lines.ko: 빛나고 높은 보좌와 그 위에 앉으신

lines.id: Di atas alis Juruselamat

lines.en: His head with radiant glories crowned,
lines.id: Kepalanya dimahkotai dengan kemuliaan yang cemerlang,

lines.en: His lips with grace over flow.
lines.id: Bibirnya dengan anggun mengalir,
Bibirnya mengalir dengan anggun.

lines.en: No mortal can with him compare,

lines.en: Among the sons of men;

lines.id: Di antara anak-anak manusia

lines.en: Fairer is he than all the fair
lines.id: Lebih adil Dia daripada segala yang adil

lines.en: That fill the heavenly train.
lines.id: Yang mengisi kereta surgawi,
Yang mengisi kereta surgawi.

lines.en: He saw me plunged in deep distress,
lines.ko: 영 죽을 나를 살리려 그 영광 떠나서
lines.id: Dia melihatku terjerumus dalam kesusahan yang mendalam,

lines.en: He flew to my relief;
lines.ko: 그 부끄러운 십자가 날 위해 지셨네 날 위해 지셨네
lines.id: Dan terbang ke kelegaanku

lines.en: For me he bore the shameful cross,
lines.id: Bagiku Dia memikul Salib yang memalukan,

lines.en: And carried all my grief.
lines.id: Dan membawa semua kesedihanku,
Dan membawa semua kesedihanku.

lines.en: To him I owe my life and breath,
lines.ko: 나 이제 생명 있음은 주님의 은혜요
lines.id: Kepada-Nya aku berhutang nyawa dan nafasku,

lines.en: And all the joys I have;
lines.ko: 저 사망 권세 이기니 큰 기쁨 넘치네 큰 기쁨 넘치네
lines.id: Dan semua kebahagiaan yang saya miliki

lines.en: He makes me triumph over death,
lines.id: Dia membuatku menang atas kematian,

lines.en: And saves me from the grave.
lines.id: Dan selamatkan aku dari kubur,
Dan menyelamatkanku dari kubur.

lines.en: To heav'n, the place of his abode,
lines.ko: 주님의 보좌 있는데 천한 몸 이르러
lines.id: Karena dari karunia-Nya aku menerima,

lines.en: He brings my weary feet;
lines.ko: 그 영광 몸 소 뵈올 때 내 기쁨 넘치리 내 기쁨 넘치리 아멘
lines.id: Demikianlah bukti cinta ilahi,

lines.en: Shows me the glories of my God,
lines.id: Seandainya aku memberi seribu hati,

lines.en: And makes my joys complete.
lines.id: Tuhan, semua itu harus menjadi milik-Mu,
Tuhan, semua itu harus menjadi milik-Mu. Amin.

lines.en: Since from his bounty I receive
Such proofs of love divine,
Had I a thousand hearts to give,
Lord, they should all be thine.

title_id: Manisnya Yang Luar Biasa Duduk Bertahta

title_en: Sweetest note in seraph song

lines.en: The great Physician now is near,
lines.ko: 그 어린 주 예수 눌 자리 없어
lines.id: Jauh di dalam palungan, Tidak ada tempat tidur bayi untuk tempat tidur,

lines.en: The sympathizing Jesus;
lines.id: Tuhan Yesus yang kecil Meletakkan kepala-Nya yang manis.

lines.en: He speaks the drooping heart to cheer;
lines.id: Bintang-bintang di langit Melihat ke bawah di mana Dia berbaring,

lines.id: Taruhan kecil Tuhan Yesus, Dia tidak menangis,

lines.id: Dan tetaplah di buaianku Untuk menonton lul-la-by.

lines.id: Beradalah di dekatku, Tuhan Yesus, aku mohon kepada-Mu untuk tinggal

lines.en: No other name but Jesus;
lines.id: Dekat denganku selamanya, Dan cintai aku, aku berdoa.

lines.en: O how my soul delights to hear

lines.id: Memberkati semua anak-anak terkasih Dalam perawatan lembut-Mu,

lines.id: Dan bawalah kami ke surga, Untuk tinggal bersamaMu di sana.

lines.en: And when to that bright world above
We rise to be with Jesus,
We'll sing around the throne of love
His Namethe Name of Jesus.

lines.id: Lihatlah, Raja Kemuliaan menunggu

lines.id: Raja segala raja sudah dekat

lines.en: The Saviour of the world is here.
lines.id: Juruselamat dunia ada di sini!

lines.en: Life and salvation he doth bring,
Wherefore rejoice and gladly sing:
We praise thee, Father, now,
Creator, wise art thou!
A Helper just he comes to thee,

lines.id: Lemparkan lebar-lebar portal hatimu

lines.id: Jadikan itu kuil, atur bagiannya

lines.en: His scepter, pity in distress.
lines.id: Dihiasi dengan doa, cinta, dan kegembiraan.

lines.en: The end of all our woe he brings;
Wherefore the earth is glad and sings:
We praise thee, Saviour, now,
Mighty in deed art thou!
O blest the land, the city blest,
lines.ko: 오 나의 주 내 마음에 곧 드사 함께 계시며
lines.id: Anggap ulang, ayo! Aku membuka lebar-lebar

lines.id: Hatiku untukmu di sini, Tuhan, tinggallah.

lines.en: To whom this King in triumph comes!
lines.id: Rahmat dan kasih-Mu dalam diriku kembali terungkap.

lines.en: The cloudless sun of joy he is,
Who bringeth pure delight and bliss.
We praise thee, Spirit, now,
Our Comforter art thou!.

Akan datang kepadamu, hai Is-ra-el!

Dan menyebabkan kita di jalannya untuk pergi.

Akan datang kepadamu, hai Is-ra-el!

lines.en: O come, O come, thou Lord of might,

Akan datang kepadamu, hai Is-ra-el!

lines.en: O come, thou Rod of Jesse, free
Thine own from Satan's tyranny;
From depths of hell thy people save,
And give them victory o'er the grave.
O come, thou Dayspring from on high
And cheer us by thy drawing nigh;
Disperse the gloomy clouds of night,
And death's dark shadows put to flight.
O come, thou Key of David, come
And open wide our heav'nly home;
Make safe the way that leads on high,
And close the path to misery.

alt_titles: Rejoice! Rejoice! Emmanuel shall come to thee, O Israel

title_en: Comfort, comfort ye my people

lines.en: He no more will see or heed.
lines.id: Saat separuh dihabiskan adalah malam.

lines.en: She hath suffered many a day
Now her griefs have passed away;

For the herald's voice is crying

lines.id: Bunga ini, yang wanginya lembut

lines.id: Dan mencerahkan setiap beban.

lines.en: Let the valleys rise to meet him,
And the hills bow down to greet him.
Make ye straight what long was crooked,
Make the rougher places plain;
Let your hearts be true and humble,
As befits his holy reign.
For the glory of the Lord
Now o'er earth is shed abroad;
And all flesh shall see the token,
That his word is never broken.

Sejauh mana kutukan itu ditemukan.

lines.en: He rules the world with truth and grace,
lines.ko: 은혜와 진리 되신 주 다 주관 하시니
lines.id: Dia memerintah dunia dengan kebenaran dan kasih karunia,

lines.en: And makes the nations prove
lines.ko: 만국 백성 구주 앞에 다 경배 하여라 다 경배 하여라
lines.id: Dan membuat bangsa-bangsa membuktikannya

lines.en: The glories of his righteousness,
lines.id: Kemuliaan atas kebenaran-Nya

lines.en: And wonders of his love.
lines.id: Dan keajaiban cinta-Nya,
Dan keajaiban cinta-Nya,
Dan keajaiban, keajaiban kasih-Nya.

title_en: All my heart this night rejoices
title_ko: 이 밤 내 마음은 모두 기뻐 (자체번역)

lines.en: All my heart this night rejoices
lines.ko: 이 밤 내 마음은 모두 기뻐

lines.en: As I hear
Far and near
Sweetest angel voices.
"Christ is born," their choirs are singing
Till the air
Everywhere
Now with joy is ringing.
Forth today the Conqueror goeth,
Who the foe,
Sin and woe,
Death and hell, o'erthroweth.
God is man, man to deliver;
His dear Son
Now is one
With our blood forever.
Shall we still dread God's displeasure,
lines.ko: 우리는 여전히 하나님의 불쾌하심을 두려워해야 합니까?

lines.en: Who, to save,
Freely gave
His most cherished treasure?
To redeem us, he hath given
lines.ko: 우리를 구속하시기 위하여 하나님께서 우리를 구원하셨으니

lines.en: His own Son
From the throne
Of his might in heaven.
He becomes the Lamb that taketh
Sin away
And for aye
Full atonement maketh.
For our life his own he tenders;
lines.ko: 우리의 생명을 위해 그분은 자신의 생명을 돌보십니다.

lines.en: And our race,
By his grace,
Meet for glory renders.
Hark! a voice from yonder manger,
Soft and sweet,
Doth entreat:
"Flee from woe and danger,
Brethren, from all ills that grieve you
lines.ko: 형제들이여, 여러분을 슬프게 하는 모든 질병으로부터

lines.en: You are freed;
All you need
I will surely give you."
Come, then, banish all your sadness,
lines.ko: 자, 그럼 당신의 모든 슬픔을 없애십시오.

lines.en: One and all,
Great and small;
Come with songs of gladness.
Love him who with love is glowing;
Hail the star,
Near and far
Light and joy bestowing.
Dearest Lord, thee will I cherish.
Though my breath
Fail in death,
Yet I shall not perish,
But with thee abide for ever
There on high,
In that joy
Which can vanish never.

title_en: O come, all ye faithful

lines.en: O come, all ye faithful,
lines.ko: 참 반가운 성도여 다 이리 와서
lines.id: Hai, datanglah kalian semua yang setia, penuh kegembiraan, dan penuh kemenangan,

lines.en: Joyful and triumphant,
lines.id: Ayolah, ayolah kamu ke Beth-le-hem!

lines.en: O come ye, O come ye to Bethlehem;
lines.id: Datang dan lihatlah Dia, terlahir sebagai Raja para malaikat!

lines.en: Come and behold him
lines.id: O ayo, mari kita memuja Dia, ayo, mari kita memuja Dia,

lines.en: Born the King of angels;
lines.id: Ayolah, marilah kita memuja Dia, Kristus Tuhan!

lines.en: O come, let us adore him,
lines.id: Wahai Bernyanyilah, paduan suara para malaikat, bernyanyilah dalam ex-ul-ta-tion,

lines.en: O come, let us adore him,
lines.id: O bernyanyilah, kalian semua penghuni surga yang cemerlang!

lines.en: O come, let us adore him,
lines.ko: 주 하나님 앞에 늘 영광을 돌려
lines.id: Kemuliaan bagi Tuhan, segala kemuliaan di tempat yang maha tinggi!

lines.en: Christ the Lord.
lines.id: O ayo, mari kita memuja Dia, ayo, mari kita memuja Dia,
Ayolah, marilah kita memuja Dia, Kristus Tuhan!

lines.en: God of God, Light of Light;
lines.id: Demi Tuhan dari Tuhan yang benar, Penebus Ilahi dunia ini,

lines.en: Lo, he abhors not the Virgin's womb:
lines.id: Dalam kasih karunia merendahkan diri menjadi manusia sejati,

lines.en: Very God, Begotten, not created;
lines.id: Tidak akan melepaskan rahim perawan, yang manis dan rendah hati
O ayo, mari kita memuja Dia, ayo, mari kita memuja Dia,
Ayolah, marilah kita memuja Dia, Kristus Tuhan!

lines.en: Sing, choirs of angels;
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, kami menyambut Engkau, lahir pagi yang bahagia ini,

lines.en: Sing in exultation,
lines.id: Ya Yesus, bagi-Mu segala kemuliaan diberikan

lines.en: Sing, all ye citizens of heaven above;
lines.ko: 늘 감사한 찬송을 주 앞에 드려
lines.id: Sabda Bapa, kini menampakkan diri dalam wujud manusia!

lines.en: Glory to God in the highest;
lines.id: O ayo, mari kita memuja Dia, ayo, mari kita memuja Dia,
Ayolah, marilah kita memuja Dia, Kristus Tuhan!

lines.en: Yea, Lord, we greet thee,
Born this happy morning:
Jesus, to thee be glory given;
Word of the Father,
Late in flesh appearing;

title_id: O Ayo, Kalian Semua yang Setia

title_en: O little town of Bethlehem

lines.en: O little town of Bethlehem,
lines.ko: 오 베들레헴 작은 골 너 잠들었느냐
lines.id: Wahai kota kecil beth-le-hem,

lines.en: How still we see thee lie;
lines.id: Betapa masih kami melihatmu berbohong

lines.en: Above thy deep and dreamless sleep
lines.ko: 저 놀라운 빛 지금 캄캄한 이 밤에
lines.id: Di atas tidurmu yang nyenyak dan tanpa mimpi

lines.en: The silent stars go by:
lines.ko: 온 하늘 두루 비춘 줄 너 어찌 모르나
lines.id: Bintang-bintang yang diam berlalu:

lines.en: Yet in thy dark streets shineth
lines.id: Namun di jalananmu yang gelap bersinar

lines.en: The everlasting light;
lines.id: Cahaya yang abadi

lines.en: The hopes and fears of all the years
lines.id: Harapan dan ketakutan selama bertahun-tahun

lines.en: Are met in thee tonight.
lines.id: Bertemu denganmu malam ini.

lines.en: For Christ is born of Mary;
lines.ko: 온 세상 모든 사람들 잠자는 동안에
lines.id: Karena Kristus lahir dari Maria

lines.en: And gathered all above,
lines.id: Dan mengumpulkan semuanya,

lines.en: While mortals sleep, the angels keep
lines.ko: 저 새벽별이 홀로 그 일을 아는 듯
lines.id: Saat manusia tidur, para malaikat tetap terjaga

lines.en: Their watch of wondering love.
lines.ko: 밤새껏 귀한 그 일을 말없이 지켰네
lines.id: Jam tangan cinta mereka yang tak terkalahkan.

lines.en: O morning stars together
lines.id: Wahai bintang pagi, bersama-sama

lines.en: Proclaim the holy birth;
lines.id: Proklamasikan kelahiran suci

lines.en: And praises sing to God the King,
lines.id: Dan pujian bernyanyi untuk Tuhan Raja,

lines.en: And peace to men on earth.
lines.id: Dan kedamaian bagi manusia di bumi.

lines.en: How silently, how silently
lines.ko: 오 놀라우신 하나님 큰 선물 주시니
lines.id: Betapa diam-diamnya, betapa diam-diamnya

lines.en: The wondrous gift is given!
lines.ko: 주 믿는 사람 마음에 큰 은혜 받도다
lines.id: Hadiah yang menakjubkan telah diberikan!

lines.en: So God imparts to human hearts
lines.ko: 이 죄악 세상 사람 주 오심 모르나
lines.id: Maka Allah memberi bagian pada hati manusia

lines.en: The blessings of his heav'n.
lines.ko: 주 영접하는 사람들 그 맘에 오시네
lines.id: Berkah dari surga-Nya.

lines.en: No ear may hear his coming,
lines.id: Tidak ada telinga yang dapat mendengar kedatangan-Nya,

lines.en: But in this world of sin,
lines.id: Namun di dunia yang penuh dosa ini,

lines.en: Where meek souls will receive him still,
lines.id: Dimana jiwa-jiwa yang lemah lembut akan tetap menerima Dia,

lines.en: The dear Christ enters in.
lines.id: Kristus yang terkasih masuk.

lines.en: O holy Child of Bethlehem,
lines.ko: 오 베들레헴 예수님 내 맘에 오셔서
lines.id: Wahai Anak Suci Betlehem!

lines.en: Descend to us, we pray;
lines.ko: 내 죄를 모두 사하고 늘 함께 하소서
lines.id: Turunlah kepada kami, kami berdoa

lines.en: Cast out our sin, and enter in,
lines.ko: 저 천사들의 소식 나 기뻐 들으니
lines.id: Buanglah dosa kita, dan masuklah

lines.en: Be born in us today.
lines.ko: 오 임마누엘 예수님 내 맘에 오소서 아멘
lines.id: Lahirlah di dalam diri kami hari ini.

lines.en: We hear the Christmas angels
lines.id: Kita mendengar malaikat Natal

lines.en: The great glad tidings tell;
lines.id: Berita gembira menceritakannya

lines.en: O come to us, abide with us,
lines.id: O datanglah kepada kami, tinggallah bersama kami,

lines.en: Our Lord Emmanuel.
lines.id: Tuhan kami Em-man-u-el.

title_en: Behold, a Branch is growing

lines.en: Behold, a Branch is growing
Of loveliest form and grace,
As prophets sung, foreknowing;
It springs from Jesse's race
And bears one little Flow'r
lines.ko: 그리고 작은 Flow'r 하나를 품고 있어요

lines.en: In midst of coldest winter,
At deepest midnight hour.
Isaiah hath foretold it
In words of promise sure,
And Mary's arms enfold it,
A virgin meek and pure.
Through God's eternal will
This Child to her is given
At midnight calm and still.
The shepherds heard the story,
Proclaimed by angels bright,
How Christ, the Lord of Glory,
Was born on earth this night.
To Bethlehem they sped
And in the manger found him,
As angel heralds said.
This Flower whose fragrance tender
With sweetness fills the air,
Dispels with glorious splendor
The darkness everywhere.
True man, yet very God;
From sin and death he saves us
And lightens every load.
O Saviour, Child of Mary,
Who felt our human woe;
lines.ko: 우리 인간의 비애를 느낀 사람은 누구입니까?

lines.en: O Saviour, King of Glory,
Who dost our weakness know,
Bring us at length, we pray,
To the bright courts of heaven
And to the endless day.

title_en: As with gladness men of old

lines.en: As with gladness men of old
Did the guiding star behold;
As with joy they hailed its light,
Leading onward, beaming bright;
So, most gracious God, may we
Evermore be led to thee.
As with joyful steps they sped
To that lowly cradle bed,
There to bend the knee before
Him whom heaven and earth adore;
So may we with willing feet
lines.ko: 그러니 우리도 기꺼이 발을 딛을 수 있기를 바랍니다

lines.en: Ever seek thy mercy-seat.
As they offered gifts most rare
lines.ko: 그들은 가장 희귀한 선물을 제공했기 때문에

lines.en: At that cradle rude and bare;
So may we with holy joy,
lines.ko: 그리하여 우리가 거룩한 기쁨을 누리게 하소서,

lines.en: Pure, and free from sin's alloy,
All our costliest treasures bring,
lines.ko: 우리의 가장 값비싼 보물은 모두 가져오는데,

lines.en: Christ, to thee, our heav'nly King.
lines.ko: 그리스도, 우리의 하늘에 계신 왕이신 당신께.

lines.en: Holy Jesus, ev'ry day
Keep us in the narrow way;
And, when earthly things are past,
Bring our ransomed souls at last
Where they need no star to guide,
Where no clouds thy glory hide.
lines.ko: 구름 없는 곳에 당신의 영광이 숨어 있습니다.

lines.en: In the heav'nly country bright
Need they no created light;
Thou its Light, its Joy, its Crown,
Thou its Sun which goes not down;
There for ever may we sing
lines.ko: 그곳에서 우리는 영원히 노래할 수 있습니다

lines.en: Alleluias to our King.

title_en: All praise to thee, Eternal Lord
title_ko: 영원하신 주님, 모든 찬양을 당신께 드립니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: All praise to thee, Eternal Lord,
lines.ko: 영원하신 주님, 당신께 모든 찬미를 드립니다.

lines.en: Clothed in a garb of flesh and blood;
Choosing a manger for thy throne,
While worlds on worlds are thine alone.
Once did the skies before thee bow;
lines.ko: 한때 당신이 절하기 전에 하늘이 그랬습니다.

lines.en: A Virgin's arms contain thee now:
lines.ko: 이제 처녀의 팔에 당신이 담겨 있습니다.

lines.en: Angels who did in thee rejoice
Now listen for thine infant voice.
A little Child, thou art our Guest,
That weary ones in thee may rest;
lines.ko: 네 안에 지친 자들이 쉬게 하소서.

lines.en: Forlorn and lowly is thy birth,
That we may rise to heav'n from earth.
lines.ko: 우리는 땅에서 천국으로 올라갈 수 있습니다.

lines.en: Thou comest in the darksome night
To make us children of the light,
To make us, in the realms divine,
Like thine own angels round thee shine.
lines.ko: 당신 주위에 있는 당신의 천사들처럼 빛나십시오.

lines.en: All this for us thy love hath done;
lines.ko: 당신의 사랑이 우리를 위해 이 모든 일을 해 주셨습니다.

lines.en: By this to thee our love is won:
For this we tune our cheerful lays,
lines.ko: 이를 위해 우리는 쾌활한 레이를 조정합니다.

lines.en: And shout our thanks in ceaseless praise.

title_en: While shepherds watched their flocks

lines.en: While shepherds watched their flocks by night,
All seated on the ground,
The angel of the Lord came down,
And glory shone around.
"Fear not," said hefor mighty dread
lines.ko: "두려워하지 마세요." 그는 엄청난 두려움에 떨면서 말했습니다.

lines.en: Had seized their troubled mind
"Glad tidings of great joy I bring
To you and all mankind.
"To you in David's town this day,
Is born of David's line,
The Saviour, who is Christ, the Lord,
And this shall be the sign.
"The heav'nly Babe you there shall find
lines.ko: "당신이 거기서 찾을 수 있는 하늘의 아기

lines.en: To human view displayed,
All meanly wrapped in swathing bands,
lines.ko: 모두 천으로 싸인 띠로 싸여 있고,

lines.en: And in a manger laid."
Thus spake the seraph, and forthwith
Appeared a shining throng
Of angels praising God, who thus
Addressed their joyful song:
lines.ko: 그들의 즐거운 노래에 대해 이렇게 말했습니다.

lines.en: "All glory be to God on high,
lines.ko: "모든 영광이 높은 곳에 계신 하나님께 있사옵나이다.

lines.en: And to the earth be peace:
Good will henceforth, from heav'n to men,
Begin and never cease!"

title_en: It came upon the midnight clear

lines.en: It came upon the midnight clear,
lines.ko: 그 맑고 환한 밤중에 뭇 천사 내려와
lines.id: Itu terjadi pada tengah malam yang cerah,

lines.en: That glorious song of old,
lines.ko: 그 손에 비파 들고서 다 찬송 하기를
lines.id: Lagu kuno yang mulia itu,

lines.en: From angels bending near the earth
lines.ko: 평강의 왕이 오시니 다 평안 하여라
lines.id: Dari para malaikat yang membungkuk di dekat bumi,

lines.en: To touch their harps of gold;
lines.ko: 그 소란하던 세상이 다 고요 하도다
lines.id: Untuk menyentuh kecapi emas mereka

lines.en: "Peace on the earth, good will to men,
lines.id: “Damai di bumi, niat baik terhadap manusia.

lines.en: From heaven's all-gracious King:"
lines.id: Dari Raja surga yang maha pemurah.”

lines.en: The world in solemn stillness lay,
lines.id: Dunia berada dalam keheningan yang khusyuk

lines.en: To hear the angels sing.
lines.id: Mendengar para malaikat bernyanyi.

lines.en: Still through the cloven skies they come,
lines.ko: 뭇 천사 날개 펴고서 이 땅에 내려와
lines.id: Masih melalui langit yang terbelah mereka datang,

lines.en: With peaceful wings unfurled,
lines.ko: 그 때에 부른 노래가 또 다시 들리니
lines.id: Dengan sayap damai yang tak terbentang,

lines.en: And still their heav'nly music floats
lines.ko: 이 슬픔 많은 세상에 큰 위로 넘치고
lines.id: Dan musik surgawi mereka tetap melayang

lines.en: O'er all the weary world:
lines.ko: 온 세상 기뻐 뛰놀며 다 찬송 하도다
lines.id: Wahai seluruh dunia yang lelah

lines.en: Above its sad and lowly plains
lines.id: Di atas, datarannya menyedihkan dan rendah

lines.en: They bend on hov'ring wing,
lines.id: Mereka membungkuk pada sayap yang melayang,

lines.en: And ever o'er its Babel sounds
lines.id: Dan setiap kali terdengar suara Ba-bel

lines.en: The blessed angels sing.
lines.id: Malaikat yang diberkati bernyanyi.

lines.en: And ye, beneath life's crushing load,
lines.ko: 이 괴롬 많은 세상에 짐 지고 가는 자
lines.id: Dan kamu, di bawah beban hidup yang menghancurkan,

lines.en: Whose forms are bending low,
lines.ko: 그 험한 준령 넘느라 온 몸이 곤하나
lines.id: Yang bentuknya membungkuk rendah,

lines.en: Who toil along the climbing way
lines.ko: 이 죄악 세상 살 동안 새 소망 가지고
lines.id: Siapa yang bekerja keras sepanjang perjalanan pendakian,

lines.en: With painful steps and slow,
lines.ko: 저 천사 기쁜 찬송을 들으며 쉬어라
lines.id: Dengan langkah yang menyakitkan dan lambat,

lines.en: Look now! for glad and golden hours
lines.id: Lihatlah sekarang, untuk saat-saat bahagia dan emas

lines.en: Come swiftly on the wing:
lines.id: Ayo cepat di sayap

lines.en: O rest beside the weary road,
lines.id: Wahai istirahat di tepi jalan yang lelah,

lines.en: And hear the angels sing.
lines.id: Dan dengarkan para malaikat bernyanyi.

lines.en: For lo, the days are hastening on,
lines.ko: 옛 선지 예언 응하여 베들레헴 성에
lines.id: Sebab, hari-hari sudah semakin dekat,

lines.en: By prophet bards foretold,
lines.ko: 주 예수 탄생 하시니 온 세상 구주라
lines.id: Oleh para penyair yang dinubuatkan,

lines.en: When with the ever-circling years
lines.ko: 저 천사 기쁜 노래를 또 다시 부르니
lines.id: Ketika, dengan tahun-tahun yang terus berputar,

lines.en: Comes round the age of gold;
lines.ko: 온 세상 사는 사람들 다 화답 하도다
lines.id: Tibalah zaman emas

lines.en: When peace shall over all the earth
lines.id: Ketika perdamaian meliputi seluruh bumi

lines.en: Its ancient splendors fling,
lines.id: Kemegahan kunonya melayang,

lines.en: And the whole world give back the song
lines.id: Dan seluruh dunia mengembalikan lagu tersebut

lines.en: Which now the angels sing.
lines.id: Yang kini dinyanyikan para malaikat.

title_id: Itu terjadi pada tengah malam yang cerah

title_en: Hail, thou ever-blessed morn!

lines.en: See, amid the winter's snow,
Born for us on earth below,
lines.ko: 저 아래 땅에서 우리를 위해 태어나셨으니

lines.en: See the tender Lamb appears,
Promised from eternal years.
Hail, thou ever blessed morn!
Hail, redemption's happy dawn!
Sing through all Jerusalem,
Christ is born in Bethlehem.
Lo, within a manger lies
He who built the starry skies:
He who, throned in height sublime,
Sits amid the cherubim.
Say, ye holy shepherds, say,
What your joyful news today?
Wherefore have ye left your sheep
On the lonely mountain steep?
"As we watched at dead of night,
Lo! we saw a wondrous light;
Angels singing, peace on earth,
Told us of the Saviour's birth."
lines.ko: 우리에게 구세주의 탄생에 관해 이야기해 주었습니다."

lines.en: Sacred Infant, all divine,
What a tender love was thine,
Thus to come from highest bliss
Down to such a world as this!
Teach, O teach us, holy Child,
lines.ko: 가르쳐주소서, 오 거룩하신 아드님, 우리에게 가르쳐주소서.

lines.en: By thy face so meek and mild,
Teach us to resemble thee,
In thy sweet humility.

alt_titles: See, amid the winter's snow

title_en: Good Christian men, rejoice

lines.en: Good Christian men, rejoice,
With heart, and soul, and voice;
Give ye heed to what we say:
Jesus Christ is born today;
Earth and heav'n before him bow,
And he is in the manger now.
Christ is born today!
Good Christian men, rejoice,
With heart, and soul, and voice;
Now ye hear of endless bliss:
lines.ko: 이제 당신은 끝없는 행복에 대해 듣습니다.

lines.en: Jesus Christ was born for this!
He hath op'ed the heavenly door,
And man is blessed evermore.
Christ was born for this!
Good Christian men, rejoice,
With heart, and soul, and voice;
Now ye need not fear the grave:
lines.ko: 이제 너희는 무덤을 두려워할 필요가 없느니라.

lines.en: Jesus Christ was born to save!
Calls you one and calls you all
To gain his everlasting hall.
Christ was born to save!

title_en: God rest you merry, gentlemen

lines.en: God rest you merry, gentlemen,
lines.id: Tuhan mengistirahatkanmu, tuan-tuan,

lines.en: Let nothing you dismay,
lines.id: Jangan biarkan apa pun yang membuat Anda kecewa,

lines.en: Remember Christ our Saviour
lines.id: Kembalikan Kristus Juruselamat kita

lines.en: Was born on Christmas day,
lines.ko: 오 기쁘다 반가운 소식 주 오셨네
lines.id: Lahir pada Hari Natal

lines.en: To save us all from Satan's power
lines.id: Untuk menyelamatkan kita semua dari kekuatan Setan

lines.en: When we were gone astray;
lines.id: Saat kami tersesat.
Wahai kabar kenyamanan dan kegembiraan, Kenyamanan dan kegembiraan
Wahai kabar kenyamanan dan kegembiraan!

lines.en: O tidings of comfort and joy, comfort and joy,
lines.id: Dari Tuhan, Bapa Surgawi kita

lines.en: O tidings of comfort and joy, comfort and joy.
lines.ko: 그 전한 기쁜 소식은 이 세상 구원할
lines.id: Malaikat yang diberkati datang
Dan kepada para penggembala tertentu

lines.ko: 오 기쁘다 반가운 소식 주 오셨네
lines.id: Membawa kabar yang sama
Bagaimana hal itu lahir di Beth-le-hem
Nama Anak Allah.
Wahai kabar kenyamanan dan kegembiraan, Kenyamanan dan kegembiraan
Wahai kabar kenyamanan dan kegembiraan!

lines.en: From God our heav'nly Father,
lines.ko: 그 천사들이 전한 말 무서워 말아라
lines.id: “Kalau begitu, jangan takut,” kata malaikat itu,

lines.en: A blessed angel came;
lines.id: “Jangan biarkan apa pun membuatmu takut,

lines.en: And unto certain shepherds
lines.ko: 저 하늘에 영광 영광 땅에는 평화라
lines.id: Hari ini lahirlah Juruselamat

lines.en: Brought tidings of the same:
lines.ko: 오 기쁘다 반가운 소식 주 오셨네
lines.id: Dari seorang Perawan murni yang cerah,

lines.en: How that in Bethlehem was born
lines.id: Untuk membebaskan semua orang yang percaya kepada-Nya

lines.en: The son of God by name.
lines.id: Dari kekuatan dan keperkasaan Setan."
Wahai kabar kenyamanan dan kegembiraan, Kenyamanan dan kegembiraan
Wahai kabar kenyamanan dan kegembiraan!

lines.en: 'Fear not then,' said the angel,
'Let nothing you affright,
This day is born a Saviour
Of a pure virgin bright,
To free all those who trust in him
From Satan's power and might.'
The shepherds at those tidings
Rejoiced much in mind,
And left their flocks afeeding,
In tempest, storm, and wind:
And went to Bethlehem straightway,
The Son of God to find.

alt_titles: O tidings of comfort and joy, comfort and joy

title_en: Silent night! Holy night

lines.en: Silent night! Holy night!
lines.ko: 고요한 밤 거룩한 밤 어둠에 묻힌 밤
lines.id: Malam sunyi, malam suci,

lines.en: All is calm, all is bright
lines.ko: 주의 부모 앉아서 감사기도 드릴 때
lines.id: Semuanya tenang, semuanya cerah

lines.en: Round yon virgin mother and Child.
lines.ko: 아기 잘도 잔다 아기 잘도 잔다
lines.id: Disekelilingmu Ibu dan Anak Perawan,

lines.en: Holy infant, so tender and mild,
lines.id: Ho-ly In-fant begitu lembut dan lembut,

lines.en: Sleep in heavenly peace.
lines.id: Tidurlah dalam kedamaian surgawi,
Tidurlah dalam kedamaian surgawi.

lines.ko: 고요한 밤 거룩한 밤 영원이 둘린 밤
lines.id: Malam sunyi, malam suci,

lines.en: Shepherds quake at the sight!
lines.ko: 천군 천사 나타나 기뻐 노래 불렀네
lines.id: Kegelapan berlalu, semuanya terang

lines.en: Glories stream from heav'n afar,
lines.id: Para penggembala mendengar para malaikat bernyanyi,

lines.en: Heavenly hosts sing: Alleluia,
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Salam raja!

lines.en: Christ, the Saviour, is born!
lines.id: Kristus Juru Selamat telah lahir,
Kristus Juru Selamat telah lahir!

lines.en: Silent night! Holy night!
lines.ko: 고요한 밤 거룩한 밤 동방의 박사들
lines.id: Malam sunyi, malam suci,

lines.ko: 별을 보고 찾아와 끊어 경배 드렸네
lines.id: Bintang penuntun, pinjamkan cahayamu

lines.en: Radiant beams from thy holy face,

lines.en: With the dawn of redeeming grace,
lines.id: Hadiah dan penghormatan kepada raja kita!

lines.en: Jesus, Lord at thy birth.
lines.id: Kristus Juru Selamat telah lahir,
Kristus Juru Selamat telah lahir.

lines.id: Malam sunyi, malam suci,

lines.ko: 그의 얼굴 광채가 세상 빛이 되었네
lines.id: Anak Tuhan, cahaya cinta yang murni,
Sinar-sinar cemerlang dari wajah-Mu yang kudus,
Dengan fajar peninjauan kembali anugerah,
Yesus, Tuhan, pada saat kelahiran-Mu,
Yesus, Tuhan, pada saat kelahiran-Mu. Amin.

title_en: Hark, the glad sound! the Saviour comes

lines.en: Hark, the glad sound! the Saviour comes,
The Saviour promised long:
Let every heart prepare a throne,
And every voice a song.
On him the spirit, largely poured,
Exerts his sacred fire;
Wisdom and might, and zeal and love,
His holy breast inspire.
He comes, the pris'ners to release,
In Satan's bondage held;
The gates of brass before him burst,
The iron fetters yield.
He comes, the broken heart to bind,
The bleeding soul to cure;
And with the treasures of his grace
To enrich the humble poor.
lines.ko: 겸손한 가난한 사람들을 풍요롭게 하기 위해서입니다.

lines.en: Our glad hosannas, Prince of Peace,
Thy welcome shall proclaim;
And heav'n's eternal arches ring
With thy beloved Name.

title_en: To us a Child of hope is born

lines.en: To us a child of hope is born,
To us a son is giv'n,
Him shall the tribes of earth obey,
Him all the hosts of heaven
His name shall be the Prince of Peace,
lines.ko: 그 이름은 평강의 왕이라 할 것이요

lines.en: For evermore adored,
The Wonderful, the Counsellor,
The great and mighty Lord;
His power, increasing, still shall spread,
lines.ko: 그의 힘은 점점 더 커질 것이며, 여전히 퍼져나갈 것입니다.

lines.en: His reign no end shall know;
Justice shall guard his throne above,
And peace abound below.
To us a Child of hope is born,
To us a Son is giv'n,
The Wonderful, the Counsellor,
The mighty Lord of heaven.

title_en: Angels, from the realms of glory

lines.en: Angels, from the realms of glory,
lines.ko: 영광 나라 천사들아 땅 끝까지 날면서
lines.id: Para malaikat, dari alam kemuliaan,

lines.en: Wing your flight o'er all the earth;
lines.id: Terbangkan penerbanganmu ke seluruh bumi

lines.en: Ye who sang creation's story,
lines.id: Kamu yang menyanyikan kisah penciptaan,

lines.en: Now proclaim Messiah's birth;
lines.id: Sekarang nyatakan kelahiran Messi-si-ah:
Datang dan beribadah, datang dan beribadah,
Sembahlah Kristus, Raja yang baru lahir.

lines.en: Come and worship, come and worship,
lines.ko: 들에 있던 목자들이 밤에 양떼 지킬 때
lines.id: Para penggembala, di ladang sedang menawar,

lines.en: Worship Christ, the newborn King.
lines.id: Mengawasi kawanan ternakmu di malam hari,
Tuhan bersama manusia kini memihak,
Di sana menyinari Cahaya bayi:
Datang dan beribadah, datang dan beribadah,
Sembahlah Kristus, Raja yang baru lahir.

lines.en: Shepherds in the fields abiding,
lines.id: Sa-ges, tinggalkan kontemplasimu,

lines.en: Watching o'er your flocks by night,
lines.ko: 구주 예수 나신 것을 널리 증거 하였네
lines.id: Penglihatan yang lebih terang terpancar jauh

lines.en: God with man is now residing,
lines.id: Carilah keinginan besar bangsa-bangsa,

lines.en: Yonder shines the infant light:
lines.id: Kamu telah melihat bintang kelahiran-Nya:
Datang dan beribadah, datang dan beribadah,
Sembahlah Kristus, Raja yang baru lahir.

lines.en: Sages, leave your contemplations,
lines.id: Para suci di depan altar yang membungkuk,

lines.en: Brighter visions beam afar;
lines.ko: 영광 중에 나타나신 주의 얼굴 뵈었네
lines.id: Menonton lama dalam harapan dan ketakutan,

lines.en: Seek the great Desire of nations;
lines.id: Tiba-tiba Tuhan turun,

lines.en: Ye have seen his natal star:
lines.id: Di kuil-Nya akan muncul:
Datang dan beribadah, datang dan beribadah,
Sembahlah Kristus, Raja yang baru lahir.

lines.en: Saints before the altar bending,
lines.id: Semua ciptaan, ikut memuji

lines.en: Watching long in hope and fear,
lines.ko: 우리 모두 소리 높여 삼위 일체 찬양해
lines.id: Tuhan, Bapa, Roh, Putra,

lines.en: Suddenly the Lord, descending,
lines.ko: 경배하세 경배하세 나신 왕께 절하세 아멘
lines.id: Semakin meninggikan suara Anda

lines.en: In his temple shall appear;
lines.id: Menuju Tiga dalam Satu yang abadi.
Datang dan beribadah, datang dan beribadah,
Sembahlah Kristus, Raja yang baru lahir.

lines.en: All creation, join in praising
God the Father, Spirit, Son;
Evermore your voices raising
To th'eternal Three in One:

title_en: Saviour of the nations, come

lines.en: Saviour of the nations, come,
Virgin's Son, make here thy home!
lines.ko: 동정녀의 아들이시여, 이곳을 당신의 집으로 만드십시오!

lines.en: Marvel now, O heav'n and earth,
That the Lord chose such a birth.
Not of flesh and blood the Son,
lines.ko: 혈과 육으로 난 것이 아닌 아들,

lines.en: Offspring of the Holy One;
Born of Mary ever blest
God in flesh is manifest.
Wondrous birth! O wondrous child
Of the virgin undefiled!
Though by all the world disowned,
Still to be in heav'n enthroned.
From the Father forth he came
And returneth to the same,
Captive leading death and hell,
High the song of triumph swell!
Thou, the Father's only Son,
Hast o'er sin the vict'ry won.
Boundless shall thy kingdom be;
When shall we its glories see?
lines.ko: 우리는 언제 그 영광을 보게 될까요?

lines.en: Praise to God the Father sing,
Praise to God the Son, our King,
Praise to God the Spirit be
Ever and eternally.

title_en: From heaven high I come to you
title_ko: 나는 하늘 높은 곳에서 당신에게 왔습니다. (자체번역)

lines.en: From heaven high I come to you,
lines.ko: 나는 하늘 높은 곳에서 당신에게 왔습니다.

lines.en: I bring you tidings good and new;
lines.ko: 나는 여러분에게 좋은 소식과 새로운 소식을 전합니다.

lines.en: Glad tidings of great joy I bring,
lines.ko: 내가 큰 기쁨의 기쁜 소식을 가져오노라.

lines.en: Whereof I now will say and sing:
lines.ko: 이제 나는 이에 대해 말하고 노래하겠습니다.

lines.en: To you this night is born a child
Of Mary, chosen virgin mild;
This little child, of lowly birth,
Shall be the joy of all the earth.
This is the Christ, our God and Lord,
Who in all need shall aid afford;
lines.ko: 도움이 필요한 사람은 누구에게 도움을 받을 수 있습니까?

lines.en: He will himself your Saviour be
lines.ko: 그분은 친히 당신의 구주가 되실 것입니다

lines.en: From all your sins to set you free.
lines.ko: 너희 모든 죄에서 너희를 자유케 하려 함이니라

lines.en: These are the tokens ye shall mark:
lines.ko: 너희가 표시해야 할 표는 다음과 같다.

lines.en: The swaddling-clothes and manger dark:
There ye shall find the Infant laid
lines.ko: 거기에 아기가 누워 있는 것을 보게 될 것이다

lines.en: By whom the heav'ns and earth were made.
Now let us all with gladsome cheer
lines.ko: 이제 우리 모두 즐거운 마음으로 응원합시다

lines.en: Go with the shepherds and draw near
To see the precious gift of God,
lines.ko: 하나님께서 주신 귀한 선물을 보기 위해

lines.en: Who hath his own dear Son bestowed.
Welcome to earth, thou noble Guest,
lines.ko: 고귀한 손님이여, 땅에 오신 것을 환영합니다.

lines.en: Through whom the sinful world is blest!
lines.ko: 죄 많은 세상이 그분을 통해 축복을 받습니다!

lines.en: In my distress thou com'st to me;
lines.ko: 내가 고난을 당할 때 당신은 나에게 오셨습니다.

lines.en: What thanks shall I return to thee?
lines.ko: 내가 당신께 어떤 감사를 드려야 합니까?

title_en: Brightest and best of the sons of the morning
title_ko: 아침의 아들들 중 가장 밝고 멋진 (자체번역)

lines.en: Brightest and best of the sons of the morning,
lines.ko: 아침의 아들들 중 가장 밝고 훌륭하며,

lines.en: Dawn on our darkness, and lend us thine aid;
lines.ko: 우리의 어둠이여, 우리에게 당신의 도움을 빌려주십시오.

lines.en: Star of the East, the horizon adorning,
Guide where our infant Redeemer is laid.
lines.ko: 우리의 아기 구세주가 누워 있는 곳을 안내해 주십시오.

lines.en: Cold on his cradle the dewdrops are shining;
lines.ko: 그의 요람 위에서는 이슬방울이 차갑게 빛나고 있다.

lines.en: Low lies his head with the beasts of the stall;
lines.ko: 그의 머리는 마구간의 짐승들과 함께 낮게 누워 있습니다.

lines.en: Angels adore him in slumber reclining,
lines.ko: 천사들은 기대어 잠들어 있는 그를 경배합니다.

lines.en: Maker and Monarch, and Lord over all.
lines.ko: 창조주이시며 군주이시며 모든 것 위에 계신 주님이십니다.

lines.en: Say, shall we yield him, in costly devotion,
lines.ko: 말하라, 우리가 값비싼 헌신으로 그를 양보할 것인가?

lines.en: Odours of Edom, and offerings divine,
Gems of the mountain and pearls of the ocean,
Myrrh from the forest or gold from the mine?
Vainly we offer each ample oblation,
lines.ko: 헛되이 우리는 각각의 풍성한 헌금을 바칩니다.

lines.en: Vainly with gifts would his favor secure;
lines.ko: 헛되이 선물을 주면 그의 호의를 얻을 수 있을 것이다.

lines.en: Richer by far is the heart's adoration;
Dearer to God are the prayers of the poor.
lines.ko: 하느님께는 가난한 이들의 기도가 더 소중합니다.

lines.en: Brightest and best of the sons of the morning,
lines.ko: 아침의 아들들 중 가장 밝고 훌륭하며,

lines.en: Dawn on our darkness, and lend us thine aid;
lines.ko: 우리의 어둠이여, 우리에게 당신의 도움을 빌려주십시오.

lines.en: Star of the East, the horizon adorning,
Guide where our infant Redeemer is laid.
lines.ko: 우리의 아기 구세주가 누워 있는 곳을 안내해 주십시오.

title_en: Hark! the herald angels sing

lines.en: Hark! the herald angels sing,
lines.id: Mendengar! malaikat-malaikatnya bernyanyi,

lines.en: "Glory to the newborn King:
lines.ko: 영광 돌려 보내세 구주 오늘 나셨네
lines.id: “Kemuliaan bagi Raja yang baru lahir

lines.en: Peace on earth, and mercy mild,
lines.ko: 크고 작은 나라들 기뻐 화답 하여라
lines.id: Damai di bumi, dan belas kasihan yang lembut,

lines.en: God and sinners reconciled!"
lines.ko: 영광 받을 왕의 왕 베들레헴 나신 주
lines.id: Tuhan dan orang-orang berdosa berdamai!”

lines.en: Joyful, all ye nations, rise,
lines.ko: 영광 받을 왕의 왕 베들레헴 나신 주
lines.id: Penuh sukacita, hai bangsa-bangsa, bangkitlah,

lines.en: Join the triumph of the skies;
lines.id: Bergabunglah dengan kemenangan di angkasa

lines.en: With th'angelic host proclaim,
lines.id: Dengan pro-klaim tuan rumah malaikat,

lines.en: "Christ is born in Bethlehem!"
lines.id: "Kristus lahir di Betlehem!"
Mendengar! malaikat-malaikatnya bernyanyi,
"Kemuliaan bagi Raja yang baru lahir"

lines.en: Hark! the herald angels sing,
lines.id: Kristus, yang dipuja oleh surga tertinggi,

lines.en: "Glory to the newborn King."
lines.ko: 처녀 몸에 나셔서 사람 몸을 입었네
lines.id: Kristus, Tuhan yang kekal!
Di kemudian hari, lihatlah Dia datang,

lines.ko: 영광 돌려 보내며 높이 찬양 하여라
lines.id: Keturunan dari rahim Perawan.

lines.ko: 영광 돌려 보내며 높이 찬양 하여라
lines.id: Terselubung dalam daging, kepala Tuhan melihatnya
Salam kepada Dewa yang Menjelma
Senang seperti manusia dengan laki-laki untuk tinggal,
Ya Tuhan, Em-man-u-el kami.
Mendengar! malaikat-malaikatnya bernyanyi,
"Kemuliaan bagi Raja yang baru lahir"

lines.en: Christ, by highest heav'n adored,
lines.id: Salam Pangeran Perdamaian yang dilahirkan di surga!

lines.en: Christ, the everlasting Lord!
lines.ko: 세상 빛이 되시며 우리 생명 되시네
lines.id: Salam Matahari Kebenaran!

lines.en: Late in time behold him come,
lines.id: Terang dan hidup bagi semua yang Dia bawakan,

lines.en: Offspring of the Virgin's womb.
lines.id: Bangkit dengan kesembuhan di sayap-Nya.

lines.en: Veiled in flesh the Godhead see;
lines.ko: 영생하게 하시니 왕께 찬양 하여라 아멘
lines.id: Dengan lembut Dia memberikan kemuliaan-Nya,

lines.en: Hail th'incarnate Deity,
lines.id: Terlahir sebagai orang yang tidak akan mati lagi,

lines.en: Pleased as man with men to dwell,
lines.id: Lahir untuk membesarkan putra-putra bumi,

lines.en: Jesus, our Emmanuel.
lines.id: Lahir untuk memberi mereka kelahiran kedua.
Mendengar! malaikat-malaikatnya bernyanyi,
"Kemuliaan bagi Raja yang baru lahir" A-men.

lines.en: Hail, the heav'n-born Prince of Peace!
Hail, the Sun of Righteousness!
Light and life to all he brings,
Ris'n with healing in his wings.
Mild he lays his glory by,
Born that man no more may die,
Born to raise the sons of earth,
Born to give them second birth.

title_en: Who is this so weak and helpless

lines.en: Who is this so weak and helpless,
Child of lowly Hebrew maid,
Rudely in a stable sheltered,
Coldly in a manger laid?
'Tis the Lord of all creation,
Who this wondrous path hath trod;
He is God from everlasting,
And to everlasting God.
Who is this, a Man of Sorrows,
Walking sadly life's hard way,
Homeless, weary, sighing, weeping
Over sin and Satan's sway?
'Tis our God, our glorious Saviour,
Who above the starry sky
Now for us a place prepareth,
Where no tear can dim the eye.
Who is this? behold him shedding
Drops of blood upon the ground!
Who is this, despised, rejected,
Mocked, insulted, beaten, bound?
'Tis our God, who gifts and graces
On his church now poureth down;
Who shall smite in holy vengeance
All his foes beneath his throne.
Who is this that hangeth dying
While the rude world scoffs and scorns,
Numbered with the malefactors,
Torn with nails, and crowned with thorns?
'Tis the God who ever liveth
'Mid the shining ones on high,
In the glorious golden city,
Reigning everlastingly.

title_en: Thou didst leave thy throne

lines.en: Thou dost reign on high with a kingly crown,
lines.ko: 당신은 왕의 면류관으로 높은 곳에서 통치하시며,

lines.en: Thy cross is my only plea.
When heav'n's arches shall ring,

At thy coming to victory,
Let thy voice call me home,

lines.en: Saying, "Yet there is room,
There is room at my side for thee."
lines.ko: 내 옆에 너를 위한 자리가 있다."

title_en: Praise the Saviour, now and ever

lines.en: Praise the Saviour now and ever;
Praise him all beneath the skies;
Prostrate lying, suffering, dying
On the cross, a sacrifice.
Victory gaining, life obtaining,
Now in glory he doth rise.
Man's work faileth, Christ's availeth;
lines.ko: 인간의 일은 실패하고 그리스도는 유익을 얻습니다.

lines.en: He is all our righteousness;
He, our Saviour, has for ever
Set us free from dire distress.
Through his merit we inherit
Light and peace and happiness.
Sin's bonds severed; we're delivered;
Christ has bruised the serpent's head;
Death no longer is the stronger;
lines.ko: 죽음은 더 이상 더 강하지 않습니다.

lines.en: Hell itself is captive led.
Christ has risen from death's prison;
O'er the tomb he light has shed.
For his favor, praise for ever
Unto God the Father sing;
Praise the Saviour, praise him ever,
Son of God, our Lord and King.
Praise the Spirit; through Christ's merit,
He doth us salvation bring.

title_en: Man of Sorrows!

lines.en: Lifted up was he to die,
"It is finished!" was his cry:
Now in heav'n exalted high:
Hallelujah! what a Saviour!
When he comes, our glorious King,
All his ransomed home to bring,
Then anew this song we'll sing:
Hallelujah! what a Saviour!

title_en: Not all the blood of beasts

lines.en: Not all the blood of beasts
On Jewish altars slain,
Could give the guilty conscience peace,
lines.ko: 죄 있는 양심에게 평안을 줄 수 있으며,

lines.en: Or wash away the stain:
But Christ, the heavenly Lamb
Takes all our sins away,
A sacrifice of nobler name
And richer blood than they.
lines.ko: 그리고 그들보다 더 풍부한 피를 가지고 있습니다.

lines.en: My faith would lay her hand
lines.ko: 내 믿음은 그녀의 손을 얹을 것입니다

lines.en: On that dear head of thine,
While like a penitent I stand,
And there confess my sin.
My soul looks back to see
The burdens thou didst bear,
When hanging on the cursed tree,
And knows her guilt was there.
lines.ko: 그리고 그녀의 죄책감이 거기에 있었다는 것을 알고 있습니다.

lines.en: Believing, we rejoice
To see the curse remove;
We bless the Lamb with cheerful voice,
And sing his bleeding love.
lines.ko: 그리고 그의 피 흘리는 사랑을 노래하십시오.

lines.en: Who was the guilty? who brought this upon thee?
Alas, my treason, Jesus, hath undone thee.
'Twas I, Lord Jesus, I it was denied thee:
I crucified thee.
Lo, the good Shepherd for the sheep is offered:
The slave hath sinned, and the Son hath suffered:
For man's atonement, while he nothing heedeth,
God intercedeth.
For me, kind Jesus, was thine incarnation,
Thy mortal sorrow, and thy life's oblation:
Thy death of anguish and thy bitter passion,
For my salvation.
Therefore, kind Jesus, since I cannot pay thee,
I do adore thee, and will ever pray thee
Think on thy pity and thy love unswerving,
Not my deserving.

alt_titles: Ah, holy Jesus, how hast thou offended (tune 2)

title_en: His are the thousand sparkling rills
title_ko: 그의 것은 수천 개의 반짝이는 릴리입니다. (자체번역)

lines.en: His are the thousand sparkling rills
lines.ko: 그의 것은 수천 개의 반짝이는 릴리입니다.

lines.en: That from a thousand fountains burst,
And fill with music all the hills;
lines.ko: 그리고 모든 언덕을 음악으로 가득 채우십시오.

lines.en: And yet he saith, "I thirst."
All fiery pangs on battlefields,
On fever beds where sick men toss,
Are in that human cry he yields
lines.ko: 그 인간의 외침 속에 그는 굴복하고 있습니까?

lines.en: To anguish on the cross.
But more than pains that racked him then
Was the deep longing thirst divine
That thirsted for the souls of men;
Dear Lord! and one was mine.
lines.ko: 사랑하는 주님! 그리고 하나는 내 것이었어요.

lines.en: O love most patient, give me grace;
lines.ko: 오, 가장 오래 참는 사랑이시여, 나에게 은혜를 베푸소서.

lines.en: Make all my soul athirst for thee;
lines.ko: 내 영혼을 다 당신께 목말라하게 하소서.

lines.en: That parched dry lip, that fading face,
lines.ko: 그 메마른 입술, 그 희미해진 얼굴,

lines.en: That thirst, were all for me.

title_en: O dearest Jesus, what law hast thou broken
title_ko: 오 사랑하는 예수님, 당신은 무슨 법을 어겼습니까? (자체번역)

lines.en: O dearest Jesus, what law hast thou broken
lines.ko: 오 사랑하는 예수님, 당신은 무슨 법을 어겼습니까?

lines.en: That such sharp sentence should on thee be spoken?
lines.ko: 당신에게 그런 날카로운 선고가 내려져야 합니까?

lines.en: Of what great crime hast thou to make confession,
lines.ko: 당신은 얼마나 큰 죄를 자백해야 합니까?

lines.en: What dark transgression?
They crown thy head with thorns, they smite, they scourge thee;
lines.ko: 그들은 가시관으로 네 머리에 관을 씌우고 너를 때리고 채찍질한다.
