lines.en: With cruel mockings to the cross they urge thee;
lines.ko: 그들은 십자가에 대하여 잔인한 조롱으로 당신을 촉구합니다.

lines.en: They give thee gall to drink, they still decry thee;
lines.ko: 그들은 당신에게 쓸개를 마시게 하면서도 여전히 당신을 비난합니다.

lines.en: They crucify thee.
Whence come these sorrows, whence this mortal anguish?
lines.ko: 이 슬픔은 어디서 오는가? 이 필멸의 고뇌는 어디서 오는가?

lines.en: It is my sins for which thou, Lord, must languish;
lines.ko: 주님, 당신께서 괴로워하셔야 할 것은 나의 죄입니다.

lines.en: Yea, all the wrath, the woe, thou dost inherit,
lines.ko: 그렇습니다, 모든 진노와 비애는 당신이 물려받은 것입니다.

lines.en: This I do merit.
What punishment so strange is suffered yonder!
The Shepherd dies for sheep that loved to wander;
lines.ko: 목자는 방황하기를 좋아하는 양을 위해 죽었습니다.

lines.en: The master pays the debt his servants owe him,
lines.ko: 주인은 종들이 빚진 빚을 갚아 주고,

lines.en: Who would not know him.
The sinless Son of God must die in sadness;
lines.ko: 죄 없으신 하나님의 아들은 슬픔 가운데 죽어야 했습니다.

lines.en: The sinful child of man may live in gladness;
lines.ko: 죄 많은 인간의 아들은 기쁨 속에 살 수 있습니다.

lines.en: Man forfeited his life and is acquitted,
lines.ko: 인간은 목숨을 잃었고 무죄 판결을 받았습니다.

lines.en: God is committed.

title_en: 'Tis midnight; and on Olive's brow

lines.en: 'Tis midnight; and on Olive's brow
lines.id: O datanglah dan berkabunglah bersamaku sebentar

lines.en: The star is dimmed that lately shone:
lines.id: Hai, datanglah ke sisi Juruselamat

lines.en: 'Tis midnight; in the garden now
lines.ko: 오 때로 그 일로 나는 떨려 떨려 떨려
lines.id: O ayo, bersama-sama mari kita berkabung:

lines.en: The suffering Saviour prays alone.
lines.id: Yesus, Tuhan kami, disalibkan!

lines.en: 'Tis midnight; and, from all removed,
lines.id: Apakah kita tidak punya air mata untuk ditumpahkan bagi-Nya,

lines.en: Emmanuel wrestles lone with fears:
lines.ko: 주님 그 나무 위에 달릴 때
lines.id: Sementara tentara mengejek dan musuh menghalau

lines.en: E'en the disciple that he loved
lines.ko: 오 때로 그 일로 나는 떨려 떨려 떨려
lines.id: Ah! lihat betapa sabarnya Dia menggantung:

lines.en: Heeds not his master's grief and tears.
lines.id: Yesus, Tuhan kami, disalibkan!

lines.en: 'Tis midnight; and, for others' guilt,
lines.id: Tujuh kali Dia berbicara, tujuh kata cinta

lines.en: The Man of Sorrows weeps in blood:
lines.ko: 해가 그 밝은 빛을 잃을 때
lines.id: Dan selama tiga jam keheningannya menangis

lines.en: Yet he that hath in anguish knelt
lines.ko: 오 때로 그 일로 나는 떨려 떨려 떨려
lines.id: Untuk belas kasihan pada jiwa manusia:

lines.en: Is not forsaken by his God.
lines.id: Yesus, Tuhan kami, disalibkan!

lines.en: 'Tis midnight; from the heavenly plains
lines.id: Wahai kasih Tuhan, wahai dosa manusia!

lines.en: Is borne the song that angels know:
lines.ko: 주님 그 무덤 속에 뉘일 때
lines.id: Dalam tindakan yang menakutkan ini kekuatanmu diuji,

lines.en: Unheard by mortals are the strains
lines.ko: 오 때로 그 일로 나는 떨려 떨려 떨려
lines.id: Dan kemenangan tetap ada dengan cinta:

lines.en: That sweetly soothe the Saviour's woe.
lines.id: Yesus, Tuhan kami, disalibkan!

title_id: Apakah Anda Ada Saat Anda Menyalibkan Tuhanku?

title_en: Throned upon the awful tree

lines.en: Throned upon the awful tree,
King of grief, I watch with thee.
lines.ko: 슬픔의 왕이시여, 나는 당신과 함께 지켜봅니다.

lines.en: Darkness veils thine anguished face:
lines.ko: 어둠이 당신의 괴로운 얼굴을 가리고 있습니다.

lines.en: None its lines of woe can trace:
lines.ko: 누구도 그 비애의 노선을 추적할 수 없습니다:

lines.en: None can tell what pangs unknown
lines.ko: 누구도 알 수 없는 고통이 무엇인지 말할 수 없습니다.

lines.en: Hold thee silent and alone.
Silent through those three dread hours,
lines.ko: 그 두려운 세 시간 동안 침묵을 지키며,

lines.en: Wrestling with the evil pow'rs,
Left alone with human sin,
Gloom around thee and within,
lines.ko: 당신 주위와 내면에는 어둠이 깔려 있습니다.

lines.en: Till th'appointed time is nigh,
Till the Lamb of God may die.
Hark, that cry that peals aloud
lines.ko: 들어봐, 큰 소리로 울리는 그 외침

lines.en: Upward through the whelming cloud!
Thou, the Father's only Son,
Thou, his own Anointed One,
Thou dost ask himcan it be?
lines.ko: 당신은 그에게 물어보나요? 그럴 수 있나요?

lines.en: "Why hast thou forsaken me?"
Lord, should fear and anguish roll
Darkly o'er my sinful soul,
lines.ko: 어둡게 내 죄 많은 영혼 위에,

lines.en: Thou, who once wast thus bereft
That thine own might never be left,
lines.ko: 당신의 것이 결코 남지 않을지도 모르며,

lines.en: Teach me by that bitter cry
In the gloom to know thee nigh.
lines.ko: 어둠 속에서도 당신을 가까이서 알 수 있습니다.

title_en: There is a green hill far away

lines.en: There is a green hill far away,
lines.ko: 저 멀리 푸른 언덕에 그 십자가 위에
lines.id: Ada bukit hijau di kejauhan,

lines.en: Without a city wall,
lines.ko: 주 예수 나를 위하여 못 박히셨도다
lines.id: Tanpa tembok kota,

lines.en: Where the dear Lord was crucified,
lines.ko: 후렴 : 그 귀한 주의 사랑이 날 구원하시니
lines.id: Dimana Tuhan terkasih disalibkan,

lines.en: Who died to save us all.
lines.ko: 그 사랑 나도 본받아 주 위해 힘쓰리 아멘
lines.id: Siapa yang mati untuk menyelamatkan kita semua.
Ya ampun, sayang sekali Dia telah mencintai,
Dan kita juga harus mengasihi Dia,
Dan percayalah pada darah-Nya yang telah menebus,
Dan cobalah melakukan pekerjaan-pekerjaan-Nya.

lines.en: We may not know, we cannot tell,
lines.ko: 그 흉한 십자가에서 한 없는 고통을
lines.id: Kita mungkin tidak tahu, kita tidak bisa mengatakannya

lines.en: What pains he had to bear;
lines.ko: 이 세상 사람 위하여 당하신 것 일세
lines.id: Betapa sakitnya Dia harus menanggungnya

lines.en: But we believe it was for us
lines.id: Tapi kami yakin itu untuk kami

lines.en: He hung and suffered there.
lines.id: Dia digantung dan menderita di sana.
Ya ampun, sayang sekali Dia telah mencintai,
Dan kita juga harus mengasihi Dia,
Dan percayalah pada darah-Nya yang telah menebus,
Dan cobalah melakukan pekerjaan-pekerjaan-Nya.

lines.en: He died that we might be forgiv'n,
lines.ko: 그 흘린 보배 피로써 날 속량 했으니
lines.id: Tidak ada hal baik lainnya

lines.en: He died to make us good,
lines.id: Untuk menanggung harga dosa

lines.en: That we might go at last to heav'n,
lines.id: Dia hanya bisa membuka kunci gerbangnya

lines.en: Saved by his precious blood.
lines.id: Dari surga dan biarkan kami masuk.
Ya ampun, sayang sekali Dia telah mencintai,
Dan kita juga harus mengasihi Dia,
Dan percayalah pada darah-Nya yang telah menebus,
Dan cobalah melakukan pekerjaan-pekerjaan-Nya. Amin.

lines.en: There was no other good enough
To pay the price of sin;
He only could unlock the gate
Of heav'n, and let us in.
O dearly, dearly has he loved,
And we must love him too,
And trust in his redeeming blood,
And try his works to do.

title_en: By the cross of Jesus standing

lines.en: By the cross of Jesus standing,
Love our straitened souls expanding,
lines.ko: 우리의 궁핍한 영혼이 확장되는 것을 사랑하고,

lines.en: Taste we now the peace and grace!
Health from yonder tree is flowing,
Heavenly light is on it glowing,
lines.ko: 그 위에는 천상의 빛이 비치고 있고,

lines.en: From the blessed Suff'rer's face.
Here is pardon's pledge and token,
Guilt's strong chain for ever broken,
Righteous peace securely made;
Brightens now the brow once shaded,
lines.ko: 이제 한 번 그늘진 눈썹을 밝게하고,

lines.en: Freshens now the face once faded,
lines.ko: 한때 퇴색했던 얼굴을 이제 상쾌하게 해주고,

lines.en: Peace with God now makes us glad.
lines.ko: 이제 하나님과의 평화가 우리를 기쁘게 합니다.

lines.en: All the love of God is yonder,
Love above all thought and wonder,
Perfect love that casts out fear!
Strength, like dew, is here distilling,
Glorious life our souls is filling,
Life eternal, only here!
Here the living water welleth;
Here the Rock, now smitten, telleth
Of salvation freely giv'n:
This the fount of love and pity,
This the pathway to the city,
This the very gate of heav'n.

title_en: When I survey the wondrous cross

lines.en: When I survey the wondrous cross
lines.ko: 주 달려 죽은 십자가 우리가 생각할 때에
lines.id: Ada bukit hijau di kejauhan,

lines.en: On which the Prince of glory died,
lines.ko: 세상에 속한 욕심을 헛된 줄 알고 버리네
lines.id: Tanpa tembok kota,

lines.en: My richest gain I count but loss,
lines.id: Dimana Tuhan terkasih disalibkan,

lines.en: And pour contempt on all my pride.
lines.id: Siapa yang mati untuk menyelamatkan kita semua.
Ya ampun, sayang sekali Dia telah mencintai,
Dan kita juga harus mengasihi Dia,
Dan percayalah pada darah-Nya yang telah menebus,
Dan cobalah melakukan pekerjaan-pekerjaan-Nya.

lines.en: Forbid it, Lord, that I should boast,
lines.ko: 죽으신 구주 밖에는 자랑을 말게 하소서
lines.id: Kita mungkin tidak tahu, kita tidak bisa mengatakannya

lines.en: Save in the death of Christ my God:
lines.ko: 보혈의 공로 힘 입어 교만한 맘을 버리네
lines.id: Betapa sakitnya Dia harus menanggungnya

lines.en: All the vain things that charm me most,
lines.id: Tapi kami yakin itu untuk kami

lines.en: I sacrifice them to his blood.
lines.id: Dia digantung dan menderita di sana.
Ya ampun, sayang sekali Dia telah mencintai,
Dan kita juga harus mengasihi Dia,
Dan percayalah pada darah-Nya yang telah menebus,
Dan cobalah melakukan pekerjaan-pekerjaan-Nya.

lines.en: See, from his head, his hands, his feet,
lines.ko: 못 박힌 손 발 보오니 큰 자비 나타 내셨네
lines.id: Tidak ada hal baik lainnya

lines.en: Sorrow and love flow mingled down:
lines.ko: 가시로 만든 면류관 우리를 위해 쓰셨네
lines.id: Untuk menanggung harga dosa

lines.en: Did e'er such love and sorrow meet,
lines.id: Dia hanya bisa membuka kunci gerbangnya

lines.en: Or thorns compose so rich a crown?
lines.id: Dari surga dan biarkan kami masuk.
Ya ampun, sayang sekali Dia telah mencintai,
Dan kita juga harus mengasihi Dia,
Dan percayalah pada darah-Nya yang telah menebus,
Dan cobalah melakukan pekerjaan-pekerjaan-Nya. Amin.

lines.en: Were the whole realm of nature mine,
lines.ko: 온 세상 만물 가져도 주 은혜 못 다 갚겠네
lines.id: Bahkan jika aku memiliki segalanya di dunia ini, aku tidak akan mampu membalas semua anugerah Tuhan.

lines.en: That were a present far too small;
lines.ko: 놀라운 사랑 받은 나 몸으로 제물 삼겠네 아멘
lines.id: Setelah menerima cinta yang begitu luar biasa, aku akan menjadikan tubuhku sebagai korban, Amin.

lines.en: Love so amazing, so divine,
Demands my soul, my life, my all.

title_id: Saat Saya Menyurvei Salib yang Menakjubkan

title_en: Hark! the voice of love and mercy

lines.en: Hark! the voice of love and mercy
Sounds aloud from Calvary;
See, it rends the rocks asunder,
Shakes the earth, and veils the sky:
"It is finished!"
Hear the dying Saviour cry.
"It is finished!" O what pleasure
Do these precious words afford;
lines.ko: 이 귀중한 말을 감당할 수 있습니까?

lines.en: Heavenly blessings, without measure,
Flow to us from Christ the Lord:
"It is finished!"
Saints the dying words record.
Finished all the types and shadows
Of the ceremonial law;
Finished all that God had promised;
Death and hell no more shall awe:
lines.ko: 죽음과 지옥도 더 이상 두려워하지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: "It is finished!"
Saints, from hence your comfort draw.
lines.ko: 성도 여러분, 이로써 여러분은 위로를 얻습니다.

lines.en: Tune your harps anew, ye seraphs,
Join to sing the glorious theme;
All in earth, and all in heaven,
lines.ko: 땅에 있는 모든 것, 하늘에 있는 모든 것,

lines.en: Join to praise Emmanuel's Name:
Alleluia!
Glory to the bleeding Lamb!

title_en: There is a fountain filled with blood

lines.en: There is a fountain filled with blood,
lines.id: Ada sebuah air mancur yang penuh dengan darah

lines.en: Drawn from Immanuel's veins;
lines.id: Diambil dari urat nadi Im-man-uel

lines.en: And sinners, plunged beneath that flood,
lines.id: Dan para pendosa, yang terjerumus ke dalam banjir itu,

lines.en: Lose all their guilty stains.
lines.id: Hilangkan semua noda rasa bersalah mereka:
Hilangkan semua noda rasa bersalah mereka,
Hilangkan semua noda rasa bersalah mereka
Dan para pendosa, yang terjerumus ke dalam banjir itu,
Hilangkan semua noda rasa bersalah mereka.

lines.en: The dying thief rejoiced to see
lines.ko: 저 도적 회개 하고서 보혈에 씻었네
lines.id: Pencuri yang sekarat itu kembali bersukacita melihatnya

lines.en: That fountain in his day;
lines.ko: 저 도적 같은 이 몸도 죄 씻기 원하네
lines.id: Air mancur itu pada zamannya

lines.en: And there have I, as vile as he,
lines.ko: 죄 씻기 원하네 죄 씻기 원하네
lines.id: Dan di sanalah aku, meskipun jahat seperti dia,

lines.en: Washed all my sins away.
lines.ko: 저 도적 같은 이 몸도 죄 씻기 원하네
lines.id: Cucilah semua dosaku:
Cucilah semua dosaku,
Cucilah semua dosaku
Dan di sanalah aku, meskipun jahat seperti dia,
Cucilah semua dosaku.

lines.en: E'er since by faith I saw the stream
lines.ko: 죄 속함 받은 백성은 영생을 얻겠네
lines.id: Anak Domba yang sekarat, darah-Mu yang berharga

lines.en: Thy flowing wounds supply,
lines.ko: 샘솟듯 하는 피 권세 한 없이 크도다
lines.id: Tidak akan pernah kehilangan kekuatannya,

lines.en: Redeeming love has been my theme,
lines.ko: 한 없이 크도다 한 없이 크도다
lines.id: Sampai seluruh Gereja Tuhan ditebus,

lines.en: And shall be till I die.
lines.ko: 샘솟듯 하는 피 권세 한 없이 크도다
lines.id: Selamat, jangan berbuat dosa lagi:
Selamat, jangan berbuat dosa lagi,
Selamat, jangan berbuat dosa lagi
Sampai seluruh Gereja Tuhan ditebus,
Selamat, jangan berbuat dosa lagi:

lines.en: Dear dying Lamb, thy precious blood
lines.ko: 날 정케 하신 피 보니 그 사랑 한없네
lines.id: Sejak saat itu, dengan iman aku melihat sungai itu

lines.en: Shall never lose its power,
lines.ko: 살 동안 받는 사랑을 늘 찬송 하겠네
lines.id: Luka-lukamu mengalir,

lines.en: Till all the ransomed church of God
lines.ko: 늘 찬송 하겠네 늘 찬송 하겠네
lines.id: Menganggap kembali cinta telah menjadi temaku,

lines.en: Be saved, to sin no more.
lines.ko: 살 동안 받는 사랑을 늘 찬송 하겠네
lines.id: Dan akan terus sampai aku mati:
Dan akan terus sampai aku mati,
Dan akan begitu sampai aku mati
Menganggap kembali cinta telah menjadi temaku,
Dan akan terus sampai aku mati:

lines.ko: 이 후에 천국 올라가 더 좋은 노래로
lines.id: Saat lidahnya terbata-bata dan terbata-bata

lines.ko: 날 구속하신 은혜를 늘 찬송 하겠네
lines.id: Kebohongan yang dipinjamkan dosa di dalam kubur,

lines.ko: 늘 찬송 하겠네 늘 찬송 하겠네
lines.id: Kemudian dalam lagu yang lebih mulia dan lebih manis,

lines.ko: 날 구속 하신 은혜를 늘 찬송 하겠네 아멘
lines.id: Aku akan menyanyikan kekuatan-Mu untuk menyelamatkan:
Aku akan menyanyikan kekuatan-Mu untuk menyelamatkan,
Aku akan menyanyikan kekuatan-Mu untuk menyelamatkan
Kemudian dalam lagu yang lebih mulia dan lebih manis,
Aku akan menyanyikan kekuatan-Mu untuk menyelamatkan. Amin.

title_en: Sweet the moments, rich in blessing

lines.en: Sweet the moments, rich in blessing,
Which before the cross I spend,
Life, and health, and peace possessing
From the sinner's dying friend.
Here I rest, in wonder viewing
lines.ko: 여기 나는 경이로움을 바라보며 쉬고 있다

lines.en: All my sins on Jesus laid,
Here I see redemption flowing
lines.ko: 여기서 나는 구원이 흐르는 것을 봅니다

lines.en: From the sacrifice he made.
Here I find the dawn of heaven,
While upon the cross I gaze
See my trespasses forgiven,
And my songs of triumph raise.
O that, near the cross abiding,
I may to the Saviour cleave,
Nought with him my heart dividing,
lines.ko: 그와 함께 내 마음을 나누는 것은 아무것도 아닙니다.

lines.en: All for him content to leave.
lines.ko: 그에게는 모든 것이 떠나는 데 만족합니다.

title_en: Glory be to Jesus

lines.en: Glory be to Jesus,
Who in bitter pains
Poured for me the life-blood
lines.ko: 나를 위해 생명의 피를 부어 주셨네

lines.en: From his sacred veins!
Grace and life eternal
In that blood I find;
Blest be his compassion,
Infinitely kind!
Blest through endless ages
Be the precious stream
Which from endless torments
Did the church redeem!
Abel's blood for vengeance
Pleaded to the skies;
But the blood of Jesus
For our pardon cries.
Oft as earth exulting
Wafts its praise on high,
Angel hosts rejoicing
Make their glad reply.
Lift we, then, our voices,
Swell the mighty flood,
Louder still and louder
Praise the precious blood!

title_en: O thou the Eternal Son of God

lines.en: O thou th'Eternal Son of God,
The Lamb for sinners slain,
lines.ko: 죄인들을 위한 어린 양이 죽임을 당하셨으니

lines.en: We worship, while thy head is bowed
lines.ko: 당신의 머리를 숙이시는 동안 우리는 경배합니다

lines.en: In agony and pain.
None tread with thee the holy place;
lines.ko: 아무도 당신과 함께 거룩한 곳을 밟지 않습니다.

lines.en: Thou sufferest alone;
Thine is the perfect sacrifice
Which only can atone.
Thou Great High Priest, thy glory-robes
lines.ko: 당신의 위대한 대제사장, 당신의 영광의 옷

lines.en: Today are laid aside;
And human sorrow, Son of Man,
Thy Godhead seem to hide.
lines.ko: 당신의 신격은 숨어 있는 것 같습니다.

lines.en: The cross is sharp, but in thy woe
lines.ko: 십자가는 날카로우나 네게 화가 있을 것이요

lines.en: This is the lightest part;
Our sin it is which pierces thee,
And breaks thy sacred heart.
Who love thee most, at thy dear cross
lines.ko: 당신의 소중한 십자가에서 당신을 가장 사랑하는 사람

lines.en: Will truest, Lord, abide;
Make thou that cross our only hope,
lines.ko: 우리의 유일한 희망을 건너는 당신을 만드십시오.

lines.en: O Jesus crucified.

title_en: Stricken, smitten, and afflicted

lines.en: Stricken, smitten, and afflicted,
See him dying on the tree!
lines.ko: 그가 나무 위에서 죽어가는 모습을 보세요!

lines.en: 'Tis the Christ by man rejected;
Yes, my soul, 'tis he, 'tis he.
lines.ko: 그래요, 내 영혼은 바로 그 사람입니다.

lines.en: 'Tis the long-expected Prophet,
lines.ko: 오랫동안 기다려온 선지자가 바로 이 분입니다.

lines.en: David's Son, yet David's Lord;
By his Son God now has spoken:
lines.ko: 하나님은 이제 자기 아들을 통하여 말씀하셨다.

lines.en: 'Tis the true and faithful Word.
Tell me, ye who hear him groaning,
lines.ko: 그의 탄식을 듣는 너희여, 내게 말하라.

lines.en: Was there ever grief like his?
Friends through fear his cause disowning,
lines.ko: 친구들은 두려움으로 인해 자신의 대의명분을 부인하고,

lines.en: Foes insulting his distress;
Many hands were raised to wound him,
lines.ko: 그를 상하게 하려고 많은 손이 들었고

lines.en: None would interpose to save;
lines.ko: 누구도 구원을 위해 개입하지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: But the deepest stroke that pierced him
lines.ko: 하지만 그를 꿰뚫은 가장 깊은 일격은

lines.en: Was the stroke that Justice gave.
Ye who think of sin but lightly
Nor suppose the evil great
Here may view its nature rightly,
lines.ko: 여기서는 그 본성을 바르게 볼 수 있으며,

lines.en: Here its guilt may estimate.
lines.ko: 여기에서 그의 죄책감이 평가될 수 있습니다.

lines.en: Mark the Sacrifice appointed,
See who bears the awful load;
lines.ko: 누가 그 엄청난 짐을 지고 있는지 보십시오.

lines.en: 'Tis the Word, the Lord's Anointed,
Son of Man and Son of God.
Here we have a firm foundation,
lines.ko: 여기에 우리는 확고한 기초를 가지고 있습니다.

lines.en: Here the refuge of the lost;
Christ's the Rock of our salvation,
His the name of which we boast.
Lamb of God, for sinners wounded,
Sacrifice to cancel guilt!
None shall ever be confounded
Who on him their hope have built.

title_en: O Jesus, we adore thee

lines.en: O Jesus, we adore thee,
Upon the cross, our King!
We bow our hearts before thee,
Thy gracious name we sing.
That name hath brought salvation,
That name in life our stay,
Our peace, our consolation,
When life shall fade away.
Yet doth the world disdain thee,
Still passing by the cross;
Lord, may our hearts retain thee;
lines.ko: 주님, 우리 마음이 당신을 붙잡게 해주세요.

lines.en: All else we count but loss.
lines.ko: 우리가 계산하는 다른 모든 것은 손실뿐입니다.

lines.en: Ah, Lord, our sins arraigned thee,
lines.ko: 아, 주님, 우리의 죄가 당신을 괴롭혔습니다.

lines.en: And nailed thee to the tree:
Our pride, our Lord, disdained thee;
lines.ko: 우리의 교만함, 우리 주님이 당신을 경멸하였습니다.

lines.en: Yet deign our hope to be.
O glorious King, we bless thee,
lines.ko: 오 영광스러운 왕이시여, 우리는 당신을 찬양합니다.

lines.en: No longer pass thee by;
O Jesus, we confess thee
The Son enthroned on high.
Lord, grant to us remission;
Life through thy death restore;
Yea, grant us the fruition
Of life for evermore.

title_en: Sing, my tongue, how glorious battle
title_ko: 내 혀여 노래하라, 얼마나 영광스러운 전투인가 (자체번역)

lines.en: Sing, my tongue, how glorious battle
lines.ko: 내 혀여 노래하라, 얼마나 영광스러운 전투인가

lines.en: Glorious victory became;
And above the cross, his trophy,
lines.ko: 그리고 십자가 위에는 그의 트로피가 있고,

lines.en: Tell the triumph and the fame:
Tell how he, the earth's Redeemer,
By his death for man o'ercame.
Thirty years fulfilled among us
Perfect life in low estate
Born for this, and self-surrendered,
To his passion dedicate,
On the cross the Lamb is lifted,
For his people immolate.
Unto God be laud and honor:
To the Father, to the Son,
To the mighty Spirit, glory
Ever three and ever One:
Power and glory in the highest
lines.ko: 가장 높은 곳에 있는 권세와 영광

lines.en: While eternal ages run.

title_en: Alas! and did my Saviour bleed

lines.en: Alas! and did my Saviour bleed,
lines.ko: 만왕의 왕 내 주께서 왜 고초 당했나
lines.id: Sayang! dan apakah Juruselamatku berdarah,

lines.en: And did my Sovereign die!
lines.ko: 이 벌레 같은 날 위해 그 보혈 흘렸네
lines.id: Dan apakah pemerintahan Sov-ku mati

lines.en: Would he devote that sacred head
lines.ko: 십자가 십자가 내가 처음 볼 때에
lines.id: Maukah Dia mengabdikan kepala suci itu

lines.en: For such a worm as I!
lines.id: Untuk cacing seperti saya

lines.ko: 오늘 믿고서 내 눈 밝았네 참 내 기쁨 영원하도다
lines.id: Di Salib, di Salib, tempat aku pertama kali melihat terang,
Dan beban hatiku pun bergulir
Di sanalah dengan iman aku dapat melihat kembali,
Dan sekarang aku bahagia sepanjang hari!

lines.en: Was it for crimes that I had done
lines.ko: 주 십자가 못 박힘은 속죄함 아닌가
lines.id: Apakah karena kejahatan yang telah saya lakukan,

lines.en: He groaned upon the tree!
lines.ko: 그 긍휼함과 큰 은혜 말할 수 없도다
lines.id: Dia mengerang di atas pohon

lines.en: Amazing pity! grace unknown!
lines.ko: 십자가 십자가 내가 처음 볼 때에
lines.id: A-maz-ing pit-y, kasih karunia yang tidak diketahui,

lines.en: And love beyond degree!
lines.id: Dan cinta yang luar biasa!

lines.ko: 오늘 믿고서 내 눈 밝았네 참 내 기쁨 영원하도다
lines.id: Di Salib, di Salib, tempat aku pertama kali melihat terang,
Dan beban hatiku pun bergulir
Di sanalah dengan iman aku dapat melihat kembali,
Dan sekarang aku bahagia sepanjang hari!

lines.en: Well might the sun in darkness hide,
lines.ko: 늘 울어도 그 큰 은혜 다 갚을 수 없네
lines.id: Tak ada air mata kesedihan yang bisa terbayar kembali

lines.en: And shut his glories in,
lines.ko: 나 주님께 몸 바쳐서 주의 일 힘쓰리
lines.id: Hutang cinta yang aku miliki.

lines.en: When Christ, the mighty Maker, died
lines.ko: 십자가 십자가 내가 처음 볼 때에
lines.id: Di sini, Tuhan, aku memberikan diriku sendiri

lines.en: For man the creature's sin.
lines.id: Hanya ini yang bisa kulakukan!

lines.ko: 오늘 믿고서 내 눈 밝았네 참 내 기쁨 영원하도다
lines.id: Di Salib, di Salib, tempat aku pertama kali melihat terang,
Dan beban hatiku pun bergulir
Di sanalah dengan iman aku dapat melihat kembali,
Dan sekarang aku bahagia sepanjang hari!

lines.en: Thus might I hide my blushing face
While his dear cross appears;
Dissolve my heart in thankfulness,
And melt mine eyes in tears.
But drops of grief can ne'er repay
The debt of love I owe;
Here, Lord, I give myself away,
'Tis all that I can do.

title_en: Jesus Christ, our Lord most holy
title_ko: 지극히 거룩하신 우리 주 예수 그리스도 (자체번역)

lines.en: Jesus Christ, our Lord most holy,
lines.ko: 지극히 거룩하신 우리 주 예수 그리스도시여,

lines.en: Lamb of God so pure and lowly,
Blameless, blameless, on the cross art offered,
lines.ko: 흠 없고 흠 없고 십자가에 예술을 바쳤으니

lines.en: Sinless, sinless, for our sins hast suffered.
lines.ko: 죄가 없고 죄가 없습니다. 왜냐하면 우리의 죄가 고통을 받았기 때문입니다.

lines.en: Weep now, all ye wretched creatures,
lines.ko: 너희 모든 비참한 피조물들아, 이제 울라.

lines.en: As ye view his gracious features.
Jesus, Jesus, on the cross is dying,
Nature, nature, in dark gloom is sighing.
lines.ko: 자연, 자연, 어두운 어둠 속에서 한숨을 쉬고 있습니다.

lines.en: Christ, his last word having spoken,
Bows his head as life is broken.
Mournful, mournful, stands his mother weeping,
lines.ko: 슬프다, 슬프다, 그의 어머니가 서서 울고 있다,

lines.en: Loved ones, loved ones, silent watch are keeping.
lines.ko: 사랑하는 사람, 사랑하는 사람, 조용히 지켜보고 있습니다.

lines.en: The great veil was torn asunder,
Earth did quake 'mid roars of thunder,
Boulders, boulders, into bits were breaking;
Sainted, sainted dead from death were waking.
As his side with spear was riven,
Blood and water forth were given.
Jesus, Jesus, sinners' only Saviour,
Mercy, mercy, grant to us for ever.

title_en: The day of resurrection

lines.en: The day of resurrection!
Earth, tell it out abroad;
The Passover of gladness,
The Passover of God.
From death to life eternal,
From this world to the sky,
Our Christ hath brought us over
With hymns of victory.
Our hearts be pure from evil,
That we may see aright
The Lord in rays eternal
Of resurrection-light;
And, listening to his accents,
May hear, so calm and plain,
His own "All hail!" and hearing,
May raise the victor strain.
Now let the heav'ns be joyful,
Let earth her song begin;
Let the round world keep triumph,
And all that is therein;
lines.ko: 그리고 그 안에 있는 모든 것;

lines.en: Invisible and visible,
Their notes let all things blend,
lines.ko: 그들의 노트는 모든 것을 섞이게 하고,

lines.en: For Christ the Lord hath risen,
Our joy that hath no end.

title_en: Jesus Christ is risen today

lines.en: Jesus Christ is risen today, Alleluia!
lines.ko: 무덤에 머물러 예수 내 구주 새벽 기다렸네 예수 내 주
lines.id: Rendah di dalam kubur Dia meletakkan Yesus Juruselamatku!

lines.en: Our triumphant holy day, Alleluia!
lines.id: Menunggu hari yang akan datang Yesus, Tuhanku!

lines.en: Who did once, upon the cross, Alleluia!
lines.ko: 어두움을 이기시고 나와서 성도 함께 길이 다스리시네
lines.id: Bangkit dari kubur Dia bangkit,

lines.en: Suffer to redeem our loss. Alleluia!
lines.id: Dengan kemenangan besar atas musuh-musuhnya:

lines.en: Hymns of praise then let us sing, Alleluia!
lines.ko: 헛되이 지키네 예수 내 구주 헛되이 봉하네 예수 내 주
lines.id: Sia-sia mereka menjaga tempat tidur-Nya Yesus Juruselamatku!

lines.en: Unto Christ our heav'nly King, Alleluia!
lines.id: Sia-sia mereka menyegel Yesus yang mati, Tuhanku!

lines.en: Who endured the cross and grave, Alleluia!
lines.ko: 어두움을 이기시고 나와서 성도 함께 길이 다스리시네
lines.id: Bangkit dari kubur Dia bangkit,

lines.en: Sinners to redeem and save. Alleluia!
lines.id: Dengan kemenangan besar atas musuh-musuhnya:

lines.en: But the pains which he endured, Alleluia!
lines.ko: 거기 못 가두네 예수 내 구주 우리를 살리네 예수 내 주
lines.id: Kematian tidak dapat menahan mangsanya Yesus Juruselamatku!

lines.en: Our salvation have procured; Alleluia!
lines.id: Dia merobek jeruji itu, Ya Tuhanku!

lines.en: Now above the sky he's King, Alleluia!
lines.ko: 어두움을 이기시고 나와서 성도 함께 길이 다스리시네
lines.id: Bangkit dari kubur Dia bangkit,

lines.en: Where the angels ever sing. Alleluia!
lines.id: Dengan kemenangan besar atas musuh-musuhnya:

lines.en: Sing we to our God above, Alleluia!
Praise eternal as his love; Alleluia!
Praise him, all ye heavenly host, Alleluia!
Father, Son, and Holy Ghost. Alleluia!

title_id: Rendah di dalam Kubur Dia Berbaring

title_en: Welcome, happy morning! Age to age shall say

lines.en: "Welcome, happy morning!"
lines.ko: 즐겁도다 이 날 세세에 할 말
lines.id: "Selamat datang, selamat pagi!" Usia ke usia akan berkata

lines.en: Age to age shall say:
lines.id: Neraka hari ini sudah lenyap! Surga dimenangkan hari ini!

lines.en: Hell today is vanquished;
lines.id: Lihat! orang mati tetap hidup, Tuhan selamanya,

lines.en: Heaven is won today.
lines.id: Dia, Pencipta sejati mereka, Semua karya-Nya dikagumi

lines.en: Lo! the Dead is living,
lines.ko: 후렴 : 즐겁도다 이 날 세세에 할 말
lines.id: "Selamat datang, selamat pagi!" Usia ke usia akan berkata

lines.en: God for evermore!
lines.id: Neraka hari ini sudah lenyap! Surga dimenangkan hari ini!

lines.en: Him, their true Creator,
All his works adore.
"Welcome, happy morning!"
lines.id: Bumi mengakui kegembiraannya, Mendandaninya untuk musim semi,

lines.en: Age to age shall say:
lines.id: Semua hadiah baru dikembalikan dengan Raja-Nya yang kembali:

lines.en: Hell today is vanquished,
lines.id: Mekar di setiap padang rumput, Daun di setiap dahan,

lines.en: Heav'n is won today.
lines.id: Ucapkan dukacita-Nya yang telah berakhir, Salam kemenangan-Nya sekarang.
"Selamat datang, selamat pagi!" Usia ke usia akan berkata
Neraka hari ini sudah lenyap! Surga dimenangkan hari ini!

lines.en: Maker and Redeemer,
lines.id: Engkau, penulis kehidupan, Kematian telah berlalu,

lines.en: Life and health of all,
lines.id: Menapaki jalan kegelapan, Raja yang Menyimpan Kekuatan:

lines.en: Thou, from heav'n beholding
lines.id: Datanglah, Benar dan Setia, Sekarang penuhi Firman-Mu,

lines.en: Human nature's fall,
lines.id: Ini adalah pagi ketiga-Mu yang Bangkit, ya Tuhan yang terkubur!

lines.en: Of the Father's Godhead
lines.id: "Selamat datang, selamat pagi!" Usia ke usia akan berkata

lines.en: True and only Son,
lines.id: Neraka hari ini sudah lenyap! Surga dimenangkan hari ini! Amin.

lines.en: Manhood to deliver,
Manhood didst put on.
Thou, of life the author,
Death didst undergo,
Tread the path of darkness,
Saving strength to show;
Come then, true and faithful,
Now fulfil thy word,
'Tis thine own third morning;
Rise, O buried Lord.
Loose the souls long-prisoned,
Bound with Satan's chain;
Thine that now are fallen
Raise to life again;
Show thy face in brightness,
Bid the nations see;
Bring again our daylight;
Day returns with thee.

title_en: Come, ye faithful, raise the strain

lines.en: Come, ye faithful, raise the strain
Of triumphant gladness;
God hath brought his Israel
Into joy from sadness;
Loosed from Pharaoh's bitter yoke
Jacob's sons and daughters;
Led them with unmoistened foot
Through the Red Sea waters.
'Tis the spring of souls today;
Christ hath burst his prison,
And from three days' sleep in death
As a sun hath risen;
All the winter of our sins,
Long and dark, is flying
From his light, to whom we give
Laud and praise undying.
Now the queen of seasons, bright
With the day of splendor,
With the royal feast of feasts,
Comes its joy to render;
Comes to glad Jerusalem,
Who with true affection
Welcomes in unwearied strains
Jesus' resurrection.
Neither might the gates of death,
Nor the tomb's dark portal,
Nor the watchers, nor the seal
Hold thee as a mortal:
But today amidst the twelve
Thou didst stand, bestowing
That thy peace, which evermore
Passeth human knowing.

title_en: Alleluia ... the strife is over

lines.en: Alleluia! Alleluia! Alleluia!
The strife is o'er, the battle done;
The victory of life is won;
The song of triumph has begun.
Alleluia!
The pow'rs of death have done their worst,
But Christ their legions hath dispersed:
Let shouts of holy joy outburst.
Alleluia!
The three sad days have quickly sped;
He rises glorious from the dead:
All glory to our risen head!
lines.ko: 우리의 부활하신 머리에 모든 영광을 돌리소서!

lines.en: Alleluia!
He closed the yawning gates of hell;
The bars from heav'n's high portals fell:
Let hymns of praise his triumphs tell.
lines.ko: 그의 승리를 찬양하는 찬송가로 말하게 하소서.

lines.en: Alleluia!
Lord, by the stripes which wounded thee,
From death's dread sting thy servants free,
That we may live and sing to thee,
lines.ko: 우리가 살아서 당신께 노래할 수 있도록,

lines.en: Alleluia!

title_en: Lift up, lift up your voices now

lines.en: Lift up, lift up your voices now;
The whole wide world rejoices now:
The Lord hath triumphed gloriously,
The Lord shall reign victoriously.
In vain with stone the cave they barred;
lines.ko: 그들은 돌로 동굴을 막았으나 헛된 일이었다.

lines.en: In vain the watch kept ward and guard:
Majestic from the spoiled tomb,
In pomp of triumph Christ is come.
He binds in chains the ancient foe;
A countless host he frees from woe,
And heav'n's high portal open flies,
lines.ko: 그리고 heav'n의 높은 포털이 열려 날아갑니다.

lines.en: For Christ has ris'n, and man shall rise.
And all he did, and all he bare,
lines.ko: 그리고 그가 행한 모든 것과 그가 낳은 모든 것,

lines.en: He gives us as our own to share;
lines.ko: 그분은 우리를 공유할 수 있는 것으로 주셨습니다.

lines.en: And hope and joy and peace begin,
For Christ has won, and man shall win.
lines.ko: 그리스도께서 승리하셨고 사람도 승리할 것이기 때문입니다.

lines.en: O Victor, aid us in the fight,
And lead through death to realms of light:
lines.ko: 그리고 죽음을 거쳐 빛의 영역으로 인도합니다.

lines.en: We safely pass where thou hast trod;
lines.ko: 우리는 당신이 밟으신 곳을 안전하게 지나갑니다.

lines.en: In thee we die to rise to God.
lines.ko: 당신 안에서 우리는 죽어 하나님께로 올라갑니다.

lines.en: Thy flock, from sin and death set free,
lines.ko: 당신의 양 떼는 죄와 사망에서 해방되어

lines.en: Glad alleluias raise to thee;
And ever with the heavenly host
Praise Father, Son, and Holy Ghost.

title_en: Jesus lives! thy terrors now can no longer
title_ko: 예수님은 살아 계십니다! 당신의 공포는 이제 더 이상 할 수 없습니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: Jesus lives! thy terrors now
lines.ko: 예수님은 살아 계십니다! 지금 네 공포는

lines.en: Can no longer, death, appall us;
lines.ko: 더 이상 죽음이 우리를 놀라게 할 수 없습니다.

lines.en: Jesus lives! by this we know
lines.ko: 예수님은 살아 계십니다! 이것으로 우리는 알고 있다

lines.en: Thou, O grave, canst not enthrall us.
lines.ko: 오, 무덤이여, 당신은 우리를 사로잡을 수 없습니다.

lines.en: Alleluia!
Jesus lives! henceforth is death
But the gate of life immortal;
This shall calm our trembling breath,
When we pass its gloomy portal.
lines.ko: 우리가 그 우울한 문을 통과할 때.

lines.en: Alleluia!
Jesus lives! for us he died;
lines.ko: 예수님은 살아 계십니다! 우리를 위해 그분은 죽으셨습니다.

lines.en: Then, alone to Jesus living,
Pure in heart may we abide,
lines.ko: 마음이 청결한 우리가 머물 수 있게 하소서.

lines.en: Glory to our Saviour giving.
Alleluia!
Jesus lives! our hearts know well
lines.ko: 예수님은 살아 계십니다! 우리 마음은 잘 알고 있어

lines.en: Naught from us his love shall sever;
lines.ko: 그분의 사랑은 우리에게서 아무 것도 끊지 않으실 것입니다.

lines.en: Life, nor death, nor powers of hell
Tear us from his keeping ever.
Alleluia!
Jesus lives! to him the throne
Over all the world is given:
May we go where he has gone,
lines.ko: 그가 갔던 곳으로 우리가 갈 수 있기를,

lines.en: Rest and reign with him in heaven.
Alleluia!

title_en: Alleluia! ... hearts to heaven

lines.en: Alleluia! Alleluia!
Hearts to heav'n and voices raise;
Sing to God a hymn of gladness,
Sing to God a hymn of praise:
He who on the cross a victim
For the world's salvation bled.
Jesus Christ, the King of Glory,
Now is risen from the dead.
Christ is risen, Christ the firstfruits
Of the holy harvest field,
Which will all its full abundance
At his second coming yield:
lines.ko: 그의 두 번째 수확량은 다음과 같습니다.

lines.en: Then the golden ears of harvest
Will their heads before him wave,
lines.ko: 그 앞에서 그들의 머리가 흔들릴 것인가,

lines.en: Ripened by his glorious sunshine
From the furrows of the grave.
Alleluia! Alleluia!
Glory be to God on high;
lines.ko: 높은 곳에 계신 하나님께 영광을 돌립니다.

lines.en: Alleluia to the Saviour,
Who has won the victory;
Alleluia to the Spirit,
Fount of love and sanctity;
Alleluia! Alleluia!
To the Triune Majesty.

title_en: Christ the Lord is risen today

lines.en: "Christ the Lord is risen today," Alleluia!
lines.id: Tuhan benar-benar telah bangkit

lines.en: Sons of men and angels say; Alleluia!
lines.id: Kuburan telah menjadi mangsa terakhirnya!

lines.en: Raise your joys and triumphs high; Alleluia!
lines.id: Bersama Dia akan muncul benih tebusan,

lines.en: Sing ye heav'ns, and earth, reply: Alleluia!
lines.id: Untuk memerintah di hari tanpa akhir.

lines.en: Vain the stone, the watch, the seal; Alleluia!
lines.id: Tuhan benar-benar telah bangkit!

lines.en: Christ has burst the gates of hell: Alleluia!
lines.id: Saat para malaikat merawat, dengarlah:

lines.en: Death in vain forbids his rise; Alleluia!
lines.id: Sampai ke pelataran surga, dengan cepat,

lines.en: Christ hath opened Paradise. Alleluia!
lines.id: Beruang yang penuh kegembiraan.

lines.en: Lives again our glorious King; Alleluia!
lines.id: Lalu bangunkan kecapi emasmu

lines.en: Where, O death, is now thy sting? Alleluia!
lines.id: Dan mainkan setiap akord yang ceria

lines.en: Once he died, our souls to save; Alleluia!
lines.id: Bergabunglah, semua paduan suara surgawi yang cemerlang,

lines.en: Where thy victory, O grave? Alleluia!
lines.id: Untuk menyanyikan ri-sen Tuhan kami.

lines.en: Soar we now where Christ has led, Alleluia!
lines.id: Tuhan benar-benar telah bangkit!

lines.en: Following our exalted Head; Alleluia!
lines.id: Dia hidup, untuk tidak mati lagi

lines.en: Made like him, like him we rise: Alleluia!
lines.id: Dia hidup, alasan orang berdosa memohon,

lines.en: Ours the cross, the grave, the skies. Alleluia!
lines.id: Kutukan dan rasa malu siapa yang Dia tanggung. Amin.

lines.en: Hail, the Lord of earth and heav'n! Alleluia!
Praise to thee by both be giv'n; Alleluia!
Thee we greet triumphant now; Alleluia!
Hail, the Resurrection Thou! Alleluia!

title_en: Low in the grave he lay

lines.en: Low in the grave he lay
lines.ko: 무덤에 머물러 예수 내 구주 새벽 기다렸네 예수 내 주
lines.id: Rendah di dalam kubur Dia meletakkan Yesus Juruselamatku!

lines.en: Jesus, my Saviour,
lines.id: Menunggu hari yang akan datang Yesus, Tuhanku!

lines.en: Waiting the coming day
lines.ko: 어두움을 이기시고 나와서 성도 함께 길이 다스리시네
lines.id: Bangkit dari kubur Dia bangkit,

lines.en: Jesus, my Lord.
lines.id: Dengan kemenangan besar atas musuh-musuhnya:
Dia bangkit sebagai Pemenang dari dunia gelap,
Dan Dia hidup selama-lamanya bersama orang-orang kudus-Nya untuk memerintah,
Dia bangkit! Dia bangkit!
Hal-le-lu-jah! Kristus
a-mawar!

lines.en: Up from the grave he arose
lines.ko: 헛되이 지키네 예수 내 구주 헛되이 봉하네 예수 내 주
lines.id: Sia-sia mereka menjaga tempat tidur-Nya Yesus Juruselamatku!

lines.en: With a mighty triumph o'er his foes.
lines.id: Sia-sia mereka menyegel Yesus yang mati, Tuhanku!

lines.en: He arose a victor from the dark domain,
lines.ko: 어두움을 이기시고 나와서 성도 함께 길이 다스리시네
lines.id: Bangkit dari kubur Dia bangkit,

lines.en: And he lives for ever with his saints to reign.
lines.id: Dengan kemenangan besar atas musuh-musuhnya:

lines.en: He arose! He arose! Hallelujah! Christ arose!
lines.id: Dia bangkit sebagai Pemenang dari dunia gelap,
Dan Dia hidup selama-lamanya bersama orang-orang kudus-Nya untuk memerintah,
Dia bangkit! Dia bangkit!
Hal-le-lu-jah! Kristus
a-mawar!

lines.en: Vainly they watch his bed
lines.ko: 거기 못 가두네 예수 내 구주 우리를 살리네 예수 내 주
lines.id: Kematian tidak dapat menahan mangsanya Yesus Juruselamatku!

lines.en: Jesus, my Saviour;
lines.id: Dia merobek jeruji itu, Ya Tuhanku!

lines.en: Vainly they seal the dead
lines.ko: 어두움을 이기시고 나와서 성도 함께 길이 다스리시네
lines.id: Bangkit dari kubur Dia bangkit,

lines.en: Jesus, my Lord.
lines.id: Dengan kemenangan besar atas musuh-musuhnya:
Dia bangkit sebagai Pemenang dari dunia gelap,
Dan Dia hidup selama-lamanya bersama orang-orang kudus-Nya untuk memerintah,
Dia bangkit! Dia bangkit!
Hal-le-lu-jah! Kristus
a-mawar!

lines.en: Death cannot keep his prey
Jesus, my Saviour;
He tore the bars away
Jesus, my Lord.

alt_titles: Up from the grave he arose
title_id: Rendah di dalam Kubur Dia Berbaring

title_en: Christ Jesus lay in death's strong bands
title_ko: 그리스도 예수께서는 죽음의 강한 결박에 매여 계셨습니다. (자체번역)

lines.en: Christ Jesus lay in death's strong bands,
lines.ko: 그리스도 예수께서는 죽음의 강한 결박에 매여 계셨습니다.

lines.en: For our offenses given;
But now at God's right hand he stands
lines.ko: 그러나 이제는 그가 하나님 우편에 서 계시느니라

lines.en: And brings us life from heaven;
lines.ko: 그리고 우리에게 하늘에서 생명을 가져다 주십니다.

lines.en: Therefore let us joyful be
And sing to God right thankfully
Loud songs of hallelujah. Hallelujah!
It was a strange and dreadful strife
When life and death contended;
The victory remained with life,
The reign of death was ended;
Holy Scripture plainly saith
That death is swallowed up by death,
His sting is lost for ever. Hallelujah!
Here the true Paschal Lamb we see,
lines.ko: 여기 우리가 보는 참된 유월절 양이 있습니다.

lines.en: Whom God so freely gave us;
lines.ko: 하나님이 우리에게 이 사람을 값없이 주셨으니

lines.en: He died on the accursed tree
So strong his love!to save us.
lines.ko: 우리를 구원하기 위한 그분의 사랑이 너무나 강합니다.

lines.en: See, his blood doth mark our door;
lines.ko: 보십시오, 그의 피는 우리 문에 표시가 되어 있습니다.

lines.en: Faith points to it, death passes o'er,
And Satan cannot harm us. Hallelujah!
lines.ko: 그리고 사탄은 우리에게 해를 끼칠 수 없습니다. 할렐루야!

lines.en: So let us keep the festival
Whereto the Lord invites us;
Christ is himself the Joy of all,
The Sun that warms and lights us.
By his grace he doth impart
Eternal sunshine to the heart;
The night of sin is ended. Hallelujah!
Then let us feast this joyful day
lines.ko: 그럼 우리 이 즐거운 날을 즐기자

lines.en: On Christ, the Bread of heaven;
The Word of grace hath purged away
The old and evil leaven.
Christ alone our souls will feed,
He is our meat and drink indeed;
Faith lives upon no other. Hallelujah!
lines.ko: 믿음은 다른 어떤 것에도 적용되지 않습니다. 할렐루야!

title_en: Jesus, Lord, Redeemer

lines.en: Jesus, Lord, Redeemer,
Once for sinners slain,
lines.ko: 한 번 죽임을 당한 죄인들을 위하여,

lines.en: Crucified in weakness,
Raised in pow'r to reign,
Dwelling with the Father,
Endless in thy days,
Unto thee be glory,
Honor, blessing, praise.
Faithful ones, communing,
Toward the close of day,
Desolate and weary,
Met thee in the way.
So, when sun is setting,
Come to us, and show
All the truth, and in us
Make our hearts to glow.
In the upper chamber,
Where the ten, in fear,
Gathered sad and troubled,
There thou didst appear.
So, O Lord, this evening,
Bid our sorrow cease;
Breathing on us, Saviour,
Say, "I give you peace."

title_en: How calm and beautiful the morn

lines.en: How calm and beautiful the morn
That gilds the sacred tomb,
Where Christ the crucified was borne,
lines.ko: 십자가에 못 박힌 그리스도가 태어난 곳,

lines.en: And veiled in midnight gloom!
O weep no more the Saviour slain;
lines.ko: 오, 구주께서 죽임을 당하셨으니 더 이상 울지 마십시오.

lines.en: The Lord is ris'n; he lives again.
Ye mourning saints, dry ev'ry tear
For your departed Lord;
Behold the place, he is not here,
The tomb is all unbarred;
The gates of heath were closed in vain:
The Lord is ris'n; he lives again.
Now cheerful to the house of prayer
Your early footsteps bend;
The Saviour will himself be there,
Your Advocate and Friend:
Once by the law your hopes were slain,
lines.ko: 한 번 율법으로 말미암아 너희 소망이 죽임을 당하였고

lines.en: But now in Christ ye live again.
lines.ko: 그러나 이제 너희는 그리스도 안에서 다시 살리라.

lines.en: How tranquil now the rising day!
'Tis Jesus still appears,
A risen Lord to chase away
Your unbelieving fears:
O weep no more your comforts slain;
lines.ko: 오 더 이상 당신의 위로가 죽임을 당하여 울지 마십시오.

lines.en: The Lord is ris'n; he lives again.
And when the shades of evening fall,
When life's last hour draws nigh,
If Jesus shine upon the soul,
How blissful then to die!
lines.ko: 그렇다면 죽는다는 것은 얼마나 행복한 일입니까!

lines.en: Since he has ris'n that once was slain,
lines.ko: 그는 한때 살해당한 ris'n을 갖고 있기 때문에,

lines.en: Ye die in Christ to live again.
lines.ko: 너희는 다시 살기 위해 그리스도 안에서 죽는다.

title_en: Lo, God to heaven ascendeth

lines.en: Lo, God to heav'n ascendeth!
Throughout its regions vast
With shouts triumphant blendeth
The trumpet's thrilling blast:
Sing praise to Christ the Lord;
Sing praise with exultation,
King of each heathen nation,
The God of hosts adored!
With joy is heav'n resounding
Christ's glad return to see;
Behold the saints surrounding
The Lord who set them free.
Bright myriads, thronging, come;
The cherub band rejoices,
And loud seraphic voices
All welcome Jesus home.
lines.ko: 모두가 예수님의 집에 오신 것을 환영합니다.

lines.en: Our place he is preparing;
To heav'n we, too, shall rise,
With him his glory sharing,
Be where our Treasure lies.
Bestir thyself, my soul!
Where Jesus Christ has entered,
There let thy hope be centered;
Press onward toward the goal.
Let all our thoughts be winging
lines.ko: 우리의 모든 생각이 날개짓을 하게 해주세요

lines.en: To where thou didst ascend,
And let our hearts be singing:
"We seek thee, Christ, our Friend,
Thee, God's exalted Son,
Our Life, and Way to heaven,
To whom all pow'r is given,
Our Joy and Hope and Crown."

title_en: See, the Conqueror mounts in triumph

lines.en: See, the Conqu'ror mounts in triumph;
lines.ko: 만왕의 왕 내 주께서 왜 고초 당했나
lines.id: Sayang! dan apakah Juruselamatku berdarah,

lines.en: See the King in royal state,
lines.ko: 이 벌레 같은 날 위해 그 보혈 흘렸네
lines.id: Dan apakah pemerintahan Sov-ku mati

lines.en: Riding on the clouds, his chariot,
lines.ko: 십자가 십자가 내가 처음 볼 때에
lines.id: Maukah Dia mengabdikan kepala suci itu

lines.en: To his heav'nly palace gate:
lines.id: Untuk cacing seperti saya

lines.en: Hark! the choirs of angel voices
lines.ko: 오늘 믿고서 내 눈 밝았네 참 내 기쁨 영원하도다
lines.id: Di Salib, di Salib, tempat aku pertama kali melihat terang,

lines.en: Joyful Alleluias sing
lines.id: Dan beban hatiku pun bergulir

lines.en: And the portals high are lifted
lines.id: Di sanalah dengan iman aku dapat melihat kembali,

lines.en: To receive their heav'nly King.
lines.id: Dan sekarang aku bahagia sepanjang hari!

lines.en: Who is this that comes in glory,
lines.ko: 주 십자가 못 박힘은 속죄함 아닌가
lines.id: Apakah karena kejahatan yang telah saya lakukan,

lines.en: With the trump of jubilee?
lines.ko: 그 긍휼함과 큰 은혜 말할 수 없도다
lines.id: Dia mengerang di atas pohon

lines.en: Lord of battles, God of armies,
lines.ko: 십자가 십자가 내가 처음 볼 때에
lines.id: A-maz-ing pit-y, kasih karunia yang tidak diketahui,

lines.en: He has gained the victory;
lines.id: Dan cinta yang luar biasa!

lines.en: He who on the cross did suffer,
lines.ko: 오늘 믿고서 내 눈 밝았네 참 내 기쁨 영원하도다
lines.id: Di Salib, di Salib, tempat aku pertama kali melihat terang,

lines.en: He who from the grave arose,
lines.id: Dan beban hatiku pun bergulir

lines.en: He has vanquished sin and Satan,
lines.id: Di sanalah dengan iman aku dapat melihat kembali,

lines.en: He by death has spoiled his foes.
lines.id: Dan sekarang aku bahagia sepanjang hari!

lines.en: Thou hast raised our human nature
lines.ko: 늘 울어도 그 큰 은혜 다 갚을 수 없네
lines.id: Tak ada air mata kesedihan yang bisa terbayar kembali

lines.en: In the clouds to God's right hand;
lines.ko: 나 주님께 몸 바쳐서 주의 일 힘쓰리
lines.id: Hutang cinta yang aku miliki.

lines.en: There we sit in heav'nly places,
lines.ko: 십자가 십자가 내가 처음 볼 때에
lines.id: Di sini, Tuhan, aku memberikan diriku sendiri

lines.en: There with thee in glory stand:
lines.id: Hanya ini yang bisa kulakukan!

lines.en: Jesus reigns, adored by angels,
lines.ko: 오늘 믿고서 내 눈 밝았네 참 내 기쁨 영원하도다
lines.id: Di Salib, di Salib, tempat aku pertama kali melihat terang,

lines.en: Man with God is on the throne;
lines.id: Dan beban hatiku pun bergulir

lines.en: Mighty Lord, in thine ascension
lines.id: Di sanalah dengan iman aku dapat melihat kembali,

lines.en: We by faith behold our own.
lines.id: Dan sekarang aku bahagia sepanjang hari!

title_en: A hymn of glory let us sing

lines.en: A hymn of glory let us sing;
New songs thro'out the world shall ring:
lines.ko: 전 세계에 새로운 노래가 울릴 것이다:

lines.en: Christ, by a road before untrod,
Ascendeth to the throne of God.
Alleluia!
The holy apostolic band
Upon the Mount of Olives stand;
And with his followers they see
lines.ko: 그리고 그의 추종자들과 함께 그들은 본다

lines.en: Jesus' resplendent majesty.
To whom the angels, drawing nigh,
"Why stand and gaze upon the sky?
This is the Saviour," thus they say;
"This is his noble triumph day."
"Again shall ye behold him so
As ye today have seen him go,
lines.ko: 오늘 너희가 그가 가는 것을 본 것처럼

lines.en: In glorious pomp ascending high,
Up to the portals of the sky."

title_en: All his work is ended

lines.en: Golden harps are sounding, angel voices ring,
lines.ko: 황금 하프가 울려퍼지고, 천사의 목소리가 울리고,

lines.en: Pearly gates are opened, opened for the King:
Christ, the King of glory, Jesus King of love,
lines.ko: 그리스도, 영광의 왕, 사랑의 왕 예수,

lines.en: Is gone up in triumph to his throne above.
lines.ko: 승리하여 위에 있는 그의 보좌에 올라가셨느니라.

lines.en: All his work is ended, joyfully we sing:
lines.ko: 그의 모든 일은 끝났고 우리는 기쁘게 노래합니다.

lines.en: Jesus hath ascended: Glory to our King!
lines.ko: 예수님께서 승천하셨습니다. 우리 왕께 영광을 돌립니다!

lines.en: He who came to save us, he who bled and died,
lines.ko: 우리를 구원하러 오신 분, 피를 흘리시며 돌아가신 분,

lines.en: Now is crowned with glory at his Father's side.
lines.ko: 이제 그의 아버지 곁에서 영광의 관을 쓰셨느니라.

lines.en: Never more to suffer, never more to die,
lines.ko: 더 이상 고통받지 않고, 더 이상 죽지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: Jesus, King of glory, is gone up on high.
Praying for his children in that blessed place,
lines.ko: 그 축복받은 곳에서 그의 자녀들을 위해 기도하며,

lines.en: Calling them to glory, sending them his grace;
lines.ko: 그들을 영광으로 부르시고 그의 은혜를 보내시며

lines.en: His bright home preparing, faithful ones for you;
lines.ko: 그의 밝은 집이 너희를 위하여 예비하고 신실한 자들을 준비하며

lines.en: Jesus ever liveth, ever loveth too.
lines.ko: 예수님은 언제나 살아 계시고 언제나 사랑하십니다.

alt_titles: Golden harps are sounding

title_en: The golden gates are lifted up

lines.en: The golden gates are lifted up,
The doors are opened wide;
The King of Glory is gone in
Unto his Father's side.
Thou art gone up before us, Lord,
To make for us a place,
That we may be where now thou art,
lines.ko: 지금 당신이 계신 곳에 우리도 있게 하소서.

lines.en: And look upon God's face.
And ever on our earthly path
A gleam of glory lies,
A light still breaks behind the cloud
lines.ko: 구름 뒤에서 빛이 아직도 부서지고 있다

lines.en: That veiled thee from our eyes.
Lift up our hearts, lift up our minds:
lines.ko: 우리의 마음을 들어 올리십시오. 우리의 생각을 들어 올리십시오.

lines.en: Let thy dear grace be giv'n,
That, while we wander here below,
Our treasure be in heav'n;
That where thou art, at God's right hand,
lines.ko: 네가 있는 곳은 하나님 우편에 있는 곳이니라.

lines.en: Our hope, our love, may be:
lines.ko: 우리의 희망, 우리의 사랑은 다음과 같습니다.

lines.en: Dwell thou in us, that we may dwell
lines.ko: 우리 안에 거하사 우리로 하여금 거하게 하소서

lines.en: For evermore in thee.

title_en: The Head that once was crowned with thorns

lines.en: The Head that once was crowned with thorns
Is crowned with glory now;
A royal diadem adorns
The mighty Victor's brow.
The highest place that heav'n affords
Is his, is his by right,
lines.ko: 그의 것, 그의 것, 당연히 그의 것,

lines.en: The King of kings and Lord of lords,
And heav'n's eternal Light:
The Joy of all who dwell above,
The Joy of all below
To whom he manifests his love,
And grants his Name to know.
To them the cross, with all its shame,
lines.ko: 그들에게는 그 모든 부끄러움과 함께 십자가가

lines.en: With all its grace, is giv'n;
Their name an everlasting name,
Their joy the joy of heav'n.
They suffer with their Lord below,
lines.ko: 그들은 아래에서 그들의 주님과 함께 고난을 당하고

lines.en: They reign with him above;
Their profit and their joy to know
The myst'ry of his love.
The cross he bore is life and health,
Though shame and death to him;
His people's hope, his people's wealth,
lines.ko: 그의 백성의 희망, 그의 백성의 부,

lines.en: Their everlasting theme.

title_en: Crown him with many crowns

lines.en: Crown him with many crowns,
lines.id: Mahkotai Dia dengan banyak mahkota,

lines.en: The Lamb upon his throne;
lines.ko: 저 천사 기쁜 노래가 온 땅에 퍼지네
lines.id: Anak Domba di atas takhta-Nya

lines.en: Hark! how the heav'nly anthem drowns
lines.ko: 내 혼아 깨어서 주 찬송 하여라
lines.id: Dengarkan! Bagaimana makhluk surgawi tenggelam

lines.en: All music but its own:
lines.ko: 온 백성 죄를 속하신 만왕의 왕일세
lines.id: Semua musik kecuali musiknya sendiri:

lines.en: Awake, my soul, and sing
lines.id: A-Bangun, jiwaku, dan bernyanyi

lines.en: Of him who died for thee,
lines.id: Tentang Dia yang mati untukmu,

lines.en: And hail him as thy matchless King
lines.id: Dan pujilah Dia sebagai Rajamu yang tiada tandingannya

lines.en: Through all eternity.
lines.id: Melalui semua kekekalan.

lines.en: Crown him the Lord of love;
lines.id: Mahkotakan Dia sebagai Penguasa Cinta

lines.en: Behold his hands and side,
lines.ko: 그 손과 몸의 상처가 영광 중 빛나네
lines.id: Lihatlah tangan dan sisi-Nya,

lines.en: Rich wounds, yet visible above,
lines.id: Luka yang kaya, namun terlihat di atas,

lines.en: In beauty glorified:
lines.ko: 고난의 신비 알고자 늘 흠모 하도다
lines.id: Dalam keindahan yang mulia:

lines.en: No angel in the sky
lines.id: Tidak ada sudut di langit

lines.en: Can fully bear that sight,
lines.id: Dapat sepenuhnya menahan pemandangan itu

lines.en: But downward bends his burning eye
lines.id: Namun matanya yang menyala-nyala membungkuk ke bawah

lines.en: At mysteries so bright.
lines.id: Di misteri begitu cerah.

lines.en: Crown him the Lord of peace;
lines.id: Mahkotai Dia dengan Tuhan perdamaian

lines.en: Whose pow'r a scepter sways
lines.ko: 온 세상 전쟁 그치고 참 평화 오겠네
lines.id: Yang kekuatannya bergoyang

lines.en: From pole to pole, that wars may cease,
lines.ko: 주 보좌 앞에서 온 백성 엎드려
lines.id: Dari kutub ke kutub, agar peperangan dapat berhenti,

lines.en: Absorbed in prayer and praise:
lines.ko: 그 한량 없는 영광을 늘 찬송 합니다 아멘
lines.id: Terserap dalam doa dan pujian:

lines.en: His reign shall know no end;
lines.id: Pemerintahannya tidak akan ada habisnya

lines.en: And round his pierced feet
lines.id: Dan di sekeliling kaki-Nya yang terpotong-potong

lines.en: Fair flowers of Paradise extend
lines.id: Bunga indah dari Par-a-dise ex-tend

lines.en: Their fragrance ever sweet.
lines.id: Keharuman mereka selalu manis, A-men.

lines.en: Crown him the Lord of years,
The Potentate of time;
Creator of the rolling spheres,
Ineffably sublime:
All hail, Redeemer, hail!
For thou hast died for me:
Thy praise shall never, never fail
Throughout eternity.

title_en: Look, ye saints, the sight is glorious

lines.en: Look, ye saints, the sight is glorious;
lines.ko: 영광스런 주를 보라 고난 받은 그 모습
lines.id: Lihatlah, wahai orang-orang kudus, pemandangannya sungguh menakjubkan

lines.en: See the Man of Sorrows now;
lines.id: Lihat "Pria yang penuh kesedihan" sekarang,

lines.en: From the fight returned victorious,
lines.ko: 왕의 왕이 되신 주께 면류관을 드리세
lines.id: Dari pertarungan kembali menjadi pemenang

lines.en: Ev'ry knee to him shall bow:
lines.ko: 왕의 왕이 되신 주께 면류관을 드리세
lines.id: Setiap orang yang berlutut kepada-Nya akan bertelut!

lines.en: Crown him! crown him!
lines.id: Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia! Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia!

lines.en: Crowns become the Victor's brow.
lines.id: Raja di atas segala raja, dan Tuan di atas segala tuan,
Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia! Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia!
Raja di atas segala raja, dan Tuan di atas segala tuan.

lines.en: Crown the Saviour, angels, crown him;
lines.ko: 보좌 위에 계신 주께 면류관을 드리세
lines.id: Mahkotai Juruselamat! Malaikat, mahkotai Dia!

lines.en: Rich the trophies Jesus brings;
lines.ko: 천군천사 소리 높여 주를 찬송 하도다
lines.id: Kaya akan piala yang Yesus berikan

lines.en: In the seat of pow'r enthrone him,
lines.ko: 왕의 왕이 되신 주께 면류관을 드리세
lines.id: Di kursi kekuasaan bertahtalah Dia,

lines.en: While the vault of heaven rings:
lines.ko: 왕의 왕이 되신 주께 면류관을 드리세
lines.id: Sementara kubah surga berdering.

lines.en: Crown him! crown him!
lines.id: Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia! Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia!

lines.en: Crown the Saviour King of kings.
lines.id: Raja di atas segala raja, dan Tuan di atas segala tuan,
Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia! Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia!
Raja di atas segala raja, dan Tuan di atas segala tuan.

lines.en: Sinners in derision crowned him
lines.id: Orang-orang berdosa di de-ris-ion memahkotai Dia,

lines.en: Mocking thus the Saviour's claim;
lines.id: Dengan demikian mengejek klaim Juruselamat

lines.en: Saints and angels crowd around him,
lines.ko: 왕의 왕이 되신 주께 면류관을 드리세
lines.id: Para suci dan malaikat berkerumun di sekeliling-Nya,

lines.en: Own his title, praise his Name:
lines.ko: 왕의 왕이 되신 주께 면류관을 드리세
lines.id: Miliki gelar-Nya, pujilah nama-Nya.

lines.en: Crown him! crown him!
lines.id: Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia! Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia!

lines.en: Spread abroad the Victor's fame!
lines.id: Raja di atas segala raja, dan Tuan di atas segala tuan,
Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia! Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia!
Raja di atas segala raja, dan Tuan di atas segala tuan.

lines.en: Hark! those bursts of acclamation!
lines.ko: 만민들의 찬송 소리 하늘 높이 퍼진다
lines.id: Dengar, ledakan seru itu!

lines.en: Hark! those loud triumphant chords!
lines.ko: 하늘 보좌 바라보니 기쁨 한량 없도다
lines.id: Hark, akord kemenangan yang nyaring itu!

lines.en: Jesus takes the highest station;
lines.ko: 왕의 왕이 되신 주께 면류관을 드리세
lines.id: Yesus mengambil posisi tertinggi,

lines.en: O what joy the sight affords!
lines.ko: 왕의 왕이 되신 주께 면류관을 드리세 아멘
lines.id: Oh, betapa menyenangkannya pemandangan itu

lines.en: Crown him! crown him!
lines.id: Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia! Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia!

lines.en: King of kings, and Lord of lords.
lines.id: Raja di atas segala raja, dan Tuan di atas segala tuan,
Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia! Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia!
Raja di atas segala raja, dan Tuan di atas segala tuan.

title_en: All hail the power of Jesus' Name

lines.en: All hail the power of Jesus' Name!
Let angels prostrate fall;
Bring forth the royal diadem,
And crown him Lord of all.
lines.ko: 그리고 그를 모든 것의 주님으로 삼으십시오.

lines.en: Crown him, ye martyrs of your God
lines.ko: 그에게 왕관을 씌워라, 너희 하느님의 순교자들아

lines.en: Who from his altar call;
Extol the Stem of Jesse's rod,
And crown him Lord of all.
lines.ko: 그리고 그를 모든 것의 주님으로 삼으십시오.

lines.en: Ye seed of Israel's chosen race,
Ye ransomed of the fall,
Hail him who saves you by his grace,
lines.ko: 그의 은혜로 너희를 구원하시는 이를 찬송할지어다

lines.en: And crown him Lord of all.
lines.ko: 그리고 그를 모든 것의 주님으로 삼으십시오.

lines.en: Sinners, whose love can ne'er forget
lines.ko: 사랑을 결코 잊을 수 없는 죄인들

lines.en: The wormwood and the gall,
Go spread your trophies at his feet,
lines.ko: 가서 그의 발 앞에 트로피를 펼쳐놓으세요.

lines.en: And crown him Lord of all.
lines.ko: 그리고 그를 모든 것의 주님으로 삼으십시오.

lines.en: Let ev'ry kindred, ev'ry tribe,
On this terrestrial ball,
To him all majesty ascribe,
And crown him Lord of all.
lines.ko: 그리고 그를 모든 것의 주님으로 삼으십시오.

lines.en: O that with yonder sacred throng
lines.ko: 오 저 신성한 군중과 함께하는 것

lines.en: We at his feet may fall;
lines.ko: 우리는 그분의 발 앞에 넘어질 수도 있습니다.

lines.en: We'll join the everlasting song,
And crown him Lord of all.
lines.ko: 그리고 그를 모든 것의 주님으로 삼으십시오.

alt_titles: All hail the power of Jesus' Name (tune 3)
All hail the power of Jesus' Name (tune 2)

title_en: Blessing and honor and glory and power

lines.en: Blessing and honor and glory and power,
Wisdom and riches and strength evermore
Give ye to him who our battle hath won,
Whose are the Kingdom, the crown, and the throne.
Soundeth the heav'n of the heav'ns with his Name;
lines.ko: 그의 이름으로 하늘의 하늘을 울려 퍼지게 하십니다.

lines.en: Ringeth the earth with his glory and fame;
Oceans and mountain, stream, forest, and flower
Echo his praises and tell of his power.
Ever ascendeth the song and the joy;
Ever descendeth the love from on high;
Blessing and honor and glory and praise
This is the theme of the hymns that we raise.
Give we the glory and praise to the Lamb;
Take we the robe and the harp and the palm;
Sing we the song of the Lamb that was slain,
lines.ko: 죽임을 당하신 어린 양의 노래를 부르자

lines.en: Dying in weakness, but rising to reign.

title_en: Blessed Jesus, at thy word

lines.en: Blessed Jesus, at thy word
We are gathered all to hear thee;
lines.ko: 우리는 당신의 말을 듣기 위해 모두 모였습니다.

lines.en: Let our hearts and souls be stirred
Now to seek and love and fear thee,
lines.ko: 이제 당신을 찾고 사랑하고 경외하게 되었으니

lines.en: By thy teachings, sweet and holy,
Drawn from earth to love thee solely.
All our knowledge, sense, and sight
Lie in deepest darkness shrouded
Till thy Spirit breaks our night
lines.ko: 당신의 영이 우리의 밤을 깨뜨릴 때까지

lines.en: With the beams of truth unclouded.
Thou alone to God canst win us;
Thou must work all good within us.
lines.ko: 당신은 우리 안에서 모든 선한 일을 하셔야 합니다.

lines.en: Glorious Lord, thyself impart,
Light of Light, from God proceeding;
Open thou our ears and heart,
Help us by thy Spirit's pleading;
Hear the cry thy people raises,
Hear and bless our prayers and praises.
lines.ko: 우리의 기도와 찬양을 듣고 축복해 주십시오.

lines.en: Father, Son, and Holy Ghost,
Praise to thee and adoration!
Grant that we thy Word may trust
lines.ko: 우리가 당신의 말씀을 신뢰할 수 있게 하소서

lines.en: And obtain true consolation
While we here below must wander,
lines.ko: 우리가 여기 이 땅에서 방황해야 하는 동안,

lines.en: Till we sing thy praises yonder.
lines.ko: 우리가 저 곳에서 당신을 찬양할 때까지.

title_en: I heard the voice of Jesus say

lines.en: I heard the voice of Jesus say,
"Come unto me and rest;
Lay down, thou weary one, lay down
Thy head upon my breast."
lines.ko: 네 머리를 내 가슴 위에 두라."

lines.en: I came to Jesus as I was,
Weary and worn and sad,
I found in him a resting place,
And he has made me glad.
I heard the voice of Jesus say,
"Behold, I freely give
The living water; thirsty one,
Stoop down and drink, and live."
I came to Jesus, and I drank
Of that life-giving stream;
My thirst was quenched, my soul revived,
lines.ko: 내 갈증이 해소되었고 내 영혼이 살아났으며

lines.en: And now I live in him.
lines.ko: 그리고 이제 나는 그 안에 살고 있습니다.

lines.en: I heard the voice of Jesus say,
"I am this dark world's Light;
Look unto me, thy morn shall rise,
lines.ko: 나를 바라보라 네 아침이 뜰 것이요

lines.en: And all thy day be bright."
I looked to Jesus, and I found
In him my Star, my Sun;
lines.ko: 그 안에 나의 별, 나의 태양;

lines.en: And in that light of life I'll walk,
lines.ko: 그리고 그 생명의 빛 속에서 나는 걸을 것입니다.

lines.en: Till trav'ling days are done.

title_en: Jesus, my great High Priest

lines.en: Jesus, my great High Priest,
Offered his blood and died;
My guilty conscience seeks
No sacrifice beside.
His pow'rful blood did once atone,
lines.ko: 그의 강력한 피가 한 번 속죄했고,

lines.en: And now it pleads before the Throne.
lines.ko: 그리고 이제 그것은 왕좌 앞에서 간청합니다.

lines.en: To this dear Surety's hand
Will I commit my cause;
He answers and fulfills
His Father's broken laws.
Behold my soul at freedom set;
My Surety paid the dreadful debt.
My Advocate appears
For my defense on high;
The Father bows his ears
And lays his thunder by.
Not all that hell or sin can say
lines.ko: 지옥이나 죄가 말할 수 있는 모든 것이 아닙니다

lines.en: Shall turn his heart, his love, away.
lines.ko: 그의 마음과 그의 사랑을 떠나게 하리라.

lines.en: Should all the hosts of death
And pow'rs of hell unknown
lines.ko: 그리고 알 수 없는 지옥의 힘

lines.en: Put their most dreadful forms
Of rage and mischief on,
I shall be safe, for Christ displays
lines.ko: 나는 안전할 것입니다. 그리스도께서 보여주실 것입니다.

lines.en: His conqu'ring pow'r and guardian grace.

title_en: Arise, my soul, arise

lines.en: Arise, my soul, arise,
Shake off thy guilty fears:
The bleeding Sacrifice
In my behalf appears:
Before the Throne my Surety stands,
lines.ko: 왕좌 앞에 나의 보증인이 서 있으니,

lines.en: My name is written on his hands.
lines.ko: 내 이름이 그의 손에 적혀 있습니다.

lines.en: He ever lives above,
For me to intercede,
His all-redeeming love,
His precious blood to plead;
His blood atoned for ev'ry race,
And sprinkles now the throne of grace.
Five bleeding wounds he bears,
lines.ko: 그가 짊어진 다섯 개의 출혈 상처,

lines.en: Received on Calvary;
They pour effectual prayers,
They strongly plead for me;
Forgive him, O forgive, they cry,
lines.ko: 그를 용서하세요, 오 용서하세요, 그들이 울부짖습니다.

lines.en: Nor let that ransomed sinner die!
lines.ko: 또한 대속받은 죄인이 죽게 두지 마십시오!

lines.en: My God is reconciled;
His pard'ning voice I hear;
He owns me for his child,
lines.ko: 그는 그의 아이를 위해 나를 소유하고 있습니다.

lines.en: I can no longer fear;
lines.ko: 나는 더 이상 두려워할 수 없습니다.

lines.en: With confidence I now draw nigh,
lines.ko: 나는 이제 확신을 갖고 가까이 다가갑니다.

lines.en: And "Father, Abba, Father!" cry.

title_en: Hail to the Lord's Anointed

lines.en: Hail to the Lord's Anointed,
lines.ko: 주님의 기름 부음 받은 자에게 찬송을 보내어,

lines.en: Great David's greater Son!
Hail, in the time appointed,
His reign on earth begun!
He comes to break oppression,
To set the captive free,
To take away transgression,
And rule in equity.
He comes with succor speedy
To those who suffer wrong;
To help the poor and needy,
And bid the weak be strong;
To give them songs for sighing,
lines.ko: 그들에게 한숨을 위한 노래를 주기 위해,

lines.en: Their darkness turn to light,
Whose souls, condemned and dying,
Were precious in his sight,
He shall come down like showers
Upon the fruitful earth;
And love, joy, hope, like flowers,
Spring in his path to birth;
Before him on the mountains
Shall peace, the herald, go;
And righteousness, in fountains,
From hill to valley flow.
O'er ev'ry foe victorious,
He on his throne shall rest,
lines.ko: 그는 그의 보좌에서 안식을 취하실 것이며,

lines.en: From age to age more glorious,
All-blessing and all-blessed;
The tide of time shall never
His covenant remove;
His Name shall stand for ever
That Name to us is Love.

title_en: Hark! ten thousands harps and voices

lines.en: Hark! ten thousand harps and voices
lines.id: Mendengar! sepuluh ribu harpa dan suara-suara

lines.en: Sound the note of praise above;
lines.id: Bunyikan nada pujian di atas

lines.en: Jesus reigns, and heav'n rejoices;
lines.id: Yesus memerintah, dan surga bersukacita

lines.en: Jesus reigns, the God of love:
lines.ko: 후렴 : 할렐루야 할렐루야 할렐루야 아멘 아멘
lines.id: Yesus memerintah, Tuhan yang penuh kasih:

lines.en: See, he sits on yonder throne;
lines.id: Lihat, Dia duduk di takhta sana

lines.en: Jesus rules the world alone.
lines.id: Yesus memerintah dunia sendirian.
Al-le-lu-ia! Al-le-lu-ia!
Al-le-lu-ia! Amin.

lines.en: Alleluia! Amen.
lines.id: Raja kemuliaan, memerintah selamanya,
Mahkotamu yang abadi

lines.ko: 하늘 보좌 계신 주님 세상 주관 하시도다
lines.id: Tidak ada satu pun dari kasih-Mu yang akan terputus
Mereka yang telah Engkau jadikan milik-Mu:
Benda-benda bahagia dari rahmat-Mu,
Ditakdirkan untuk menatap wajah-Mu.
Al-le-lu-ia! Al-le-lu-ia!
Al-le-lu-ia! Amin.

lines.en: King of glory, reign for ever,
lines.ko: 하나님의 크신 섭리 그 뜻대로 되도다
lines.id: Selamatkan, cepatlah kemunculan-Mu,

lines.en: Thine an everlasting crown;
lines.id: Bawalah, hai, bawalah hari yang mulia,

lines.en: Nothing from thy love shall sever
lines.ko: 주여 속히 임하셔서 기쁜 날을 주옵소서
lines.id: Ketika, pemanggilan yang mengerikan,

lines.en: Those whom thou hast made thine own:
lines.id: Langit dan bumi akan berlalu:

lines.en: Happy objects of thy grace,
lines.id: Lalu dengan kecapi emas kita akan bernyanyi,

lines.en: Destined to behold thy face.
lines.id: "Maha Suci, Maha Suci Raja kita!"
Al-le-lu-ia! Al-le-lu-ia!
Al-le-lu-ia! Amin. Amin.

lines.en: Saviour, hasten thine appearing;
Bring, O bring the glorious day,
When, the awful summons hearing,
Heav'n and earth shall pass away:
Then with golden harps we'll sing,
"Glory, glory to our King!"

title_id: Mendengar! Sepuluh Ribu Harpa dan Suara

title_en: Rejoice, the Lord is King

lines.en: Rejoice, the Lord is King:
lines.id: Bersukacitalah, Tuhan adalah Raja
Tuan dan Rajamu a-dore!

lines.ko: 네 맘 열어 한 소리로 기뻐 주를 찬양하라
lines.id: Bersukacitalah, mengucap syukur, dan bernyanyi,
Dan menang lagi.
Angkat hatimu, angkat suaramu!
Bergembiralah kembali, saya katakan, Bergembiralah kembali!

lines.en: Your Lord and King adore;
lines.id: Kerajaannya tidak mungkin gagal
Dia memerintah bumi dan surga.

lines.ko: 네 맘 열어 한 소리로 기뻐 주를 찬양하라
lines.id: Kunci kematian dan neraka
Apakah kepada Yesus kita diberikan.
Angkat hatimu, angkat suaramu!
Bergembiralah kembali, saya katakan, Bergembiralah kembali!

lines.en: Rejoice, give thanks and sing,
lines.ko: 죄 짐을 벗은 후 주 앞에 가리니
lines.id: Yesus, Juruselamat, memerintah,
Tuhan kebenaran dan cinta.

lines.ko: 네 맘 열어 한 소리로 기뻐 주를 찬양하라
lines.id: Ketika Dia telah membersihkan noda kita,
Dia mengambil tempat duduk-Nya di atas.
Angkat hatimu, angkat suaramu!
Bergembiralah kembali, saya katakan, Bergembiralah kembali!

lines.en: And triumph evermore:
lines.ko: 참 소망 가지고 그 날을 기리며
lines.id: Bergembiralah kembali dalam pengharapan yang mulia!

lines.ko: 주 다시 오실 때 기쁘게 맞으리
lines.id: Tuhan kami, Hakim akan datang

lines.ko: 네 맘 열어 한 소리로 기뻐 주를 찬양하라 아멘
lines.id: Dan angkatlah hamba-hamba-Nya
Ke rumah abadi mereka.
Angkat hatimu, angkat suaramu!
Bergembiralah kembali, saya katakan, Bergembiralah kembali!

lines.en: Lift up your heart, lift up your voice;
Rejoice, again I say, rejoice.
Jesus, the Saviour reigns,
The God of truth and love;
When he had purged our stains
He took his seat above:
His kingdom cannot fail,
He rules o'er earth and heav'n;
The keys of death and hell
Are to our Jesus giv'n:
He sits at God's right hand
Till all his foes submit,
And bow to his command
And fall beneath his feet:

title_en: O wherefore do the nations rage

lines.en: From Psalm 2
O wherefore do the nations rage,
And kings and rulers strive in vain,
Against the Lord of earth and heav'n
To overthrow Messiah's reign?
Their strength is weakness in the sight
Of him who sits enthroned above;
He speaks, and judgments fall on them
Who tempt his wrath and scorn his love.
lines.ko: 그분의 진노를 시험하고 그분의 사랑을 멸시하는 자입니다.

lines.en: By God's decree his Son receives
lines.ko: 하나님의 뜻에 따라 그의 아들이 받으신다

lines.en: The nations for his heritage;
The conqu'ring Christ supreme shall reign
As King of kings, from age to age.
Be wise, ye rulers of the earth,
And serve the Lord with godly fear;
With rev'rent joy confess the Son
While yet in mercy he is near.
lines.ko: 아직 자비로우신 동안 그분은 가까이 계십니다.

lines.en: Delay not, lest his anger rise,
lines.ko: 지체하지 말라 그의 분노가 솟아오르지 않게 하소서

lines.en: And ye should perish in your way;
lines.ko: 그리고 너희는 너희 길에서 멸망할 것이다.

lines.en: Lo, all that put their trust in him
Are blest indeed, and blest for aye.
lines.ko: 참으로 축복을 받았고, 물론 축복을 받았습니다.

title_en: Who is this that comes from Edom

lines.en: Who is this that comes from Edom,
All his raiment stained with blood;
lines.ko: 그의 옷은 온통 피에 젖어 있었습니다.

lines.en: To the slave proclaiming freedom;
Bringing and bestowing good:
Glorious in the garb he wears,
Glorious in the spoils he bears?
'Tis the Saviour, now victorious,
Trav'ling onward in his might;
'Tis the Saviour, O how glorious
To his people is the sight!
Jesus now is strong to save,
Mighty to redeem the slave.
Why that blood his raiment staining?
lines.ko: 왜 그 피가 그의 옷을 더럽혔나요?

lines.en: 'Tis the blood of many slain;
Of his foes there's none remaining,
None the contest to maintain:
Fall'n they are, no more to rise,
lines.ko: Fall'n 그들은 더 이상 일어날 수 없습니다.

lines.en: All their glory prostrate lies.
Mighty Victor, reign for ever,
Wear the crown so dearly won;
Never shall thy people, never
lines.ko: 결코 당신의 백성은 그렇지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: Cease to sing what thou hast done:
Thou hast fought thy people's foes;
Thou wilt heal thy people's woes.
lines.ko: 당신은 당신 백성의 고통을 고쳐 주실 것입니다.

title_en: Unto the Lord Jehovah said

lines.en: Psalm 110
Unto my Lord Jehovah said,
"At my right hand I throne thee,
Till at thy feet, in triumph laid,
lines.ko: 당신의 발 앞에 승리를 안길 때까지,

lines.en: Thy foes their ruler own thee."
lines.ko: 당신의 적들이 그들의 통치자가 당신을 소유하고 있습니다."

lines.en: From Zion shall Jehovah send
Thy scepter, till before thee bend
The knees of proud rebellion.
Thy saints, to greet thy day of might,
lines.ko: 당신의 성도들이여, 당신의 권능의 날을 맞이하게 하소서.

lines.en: In holy raiment muster;
As dewdrops in the morning light
Thy youths around thee cluster.
Jehovah sware and made decree,
"Thou, King of Righteousness, shalt be
A royal Priest for ever."
The Lord at thy right hand shall bring
On rulers desolation;
The Lord shall smite each heathen king,
lines.ko: 여호와께서 이방 왕들을 다 치실 것이요

lines.en: And judge each rebel nation,
He, swiftly marching in his wrath,
Shall quaff the brook upon his path,
And lift his head in glory.
lines.ko: 그리고 영광 중에 그의 머리를 드십시오.

title_en: O God, thy judgments give the King
title_ko: 오 하나님, 당신의 판단이 왕에게 임하게 하소서 (자체번역)

lines.en: O God, thy judgments give the King,
lines.ko: 오 하느님, 당신의 판결이 왕에게 주어졌으니,

lines.en: His Son thy righteousness;
With right he shall thy people judge,
Thy poor with uprightness.
And then the mountains shall bring forth
To all the people peace;
The hills because of righteousness
Their blessing shall increase.
The people's poor ones he shall judge,
The needy's children bless;
And he will break in pieces those
lines.ko: 그리고 그는 그것들을 조각조각 부숴버릴 것이다

lines.en: Who would the poor oppress.
The just shall flourish in his days,
And prosper in his reign;
And while the moon endures he shall
Abundant peace maintain.
His large and great dominion shall
From sea to sea extend;
It from the River shall reach forth
To earth's remotest end.
Yea, kings shall all before him bow,
lines.ko: 그렇습니다, 왕들은 모두 그 앞에 절할 것입니다.

lines.en: All nations shall obey;
He'll save the needy when he cries,
lines.ko: 그가 울 때에 궁핍한 자를 구원하며

lines.en: The poor who hath no stay.
Now blessed be the Lord our God,
The God of Israel,
For he alone doth wondrous works
In glory that excel.
And blessed be his glorious Name
To all eternity.
The whole earth let his glory fill;
lines.ko: 온 땅이 그의 영광을 가득 채울지어다.

lines.en: Amen, so let it be.

title_en: Wake, awake, for night is flying

lines.en: "Wake, awake, for night is flying,"
The watchmen on the heights are crying;
"Awake, Jerusalem, at last!"
Midnight hears the welcome voices,
And at the thrilling cry rejoices:
"Come forth, ye virgins, night is past!
The Bridegroom comes; awake,
Your lamps with gladness take; Alleluia!
And for his marriage feast prepare,
For you must go to meet him there."
lines.ko: 당신은 그를 만나러 그곳으로 가야 하기 때문입니다."

lines.en: Zion hears the watchmen singing,
And all her heart with joy is springing;
lines.ko: 그리고 그녀의 온 마음은 기쁨으로 솟아오르고 있습니다.

lines.en: She wakes, she rises from her gloom:
lines.ko: 그녀는 잠에서 깨어나 어둠 속에서 일어납니다.

lines.en: For her Lord comes down all-glorious,
The Strong in grace, in truth Victorious,
lines.ko: 은혜 안에 강하시고 진실로 승리하시는 분,

lines.en: Her Star is ris'n, her Light is come!
lines.ko: 그녀의 별은 ris'n이고, 그녀의 빛이 왔습니다!

lines.en: Ah, come, thou blessed Lord,
O Jesus, Son of God, Alleluia!
We follow till the halls we see
Where thou hast bid us sup with thee.
lines.ko: 당신이 우리에게 당신과 함께 저녁식사를 청한 곳입니다.

lines.en: Now let all the heav'ns adore thee,
lines.ko: 이제 모든 하늘이 당신을 숭배하게 하십시오.

lines.en: And men and angels sing before thee,
lines.ko: 그리고 사람들과 천사들이 당신 앞에서 노래합니다.

lines.en: With harps and cymbal's clearest tone;
Of one pearl each shining portal,
lines.ko: 각각의 빛나는 문에는 하나의 진주가 있고,

lines.en: Where we are with the choir immortal
lines.ko: 우리가 불멸의 합창단과 함께 있는 곳

lines.en: Of angels round thy dazzling throne;
lines.ko: 당신의 눈부신 보좌 주위에는 천사들이 있습니다.

lines.en: Nor eye hath seen, nor ear
lines.ko: 눈으로 본 적도 없고 귀로 본 적도 없다.

lines.en: Hath yet attained to hear what there is ours.
lines.ko: 아직 우리의 것이 무엇인지 들어볼 수 있게 되었습니다.

lines.en: But we rejoice, and sing to thee
Our hymn of joy eternally.

title_en: Light of the lonely pilgrim's heart

lines.en: Light of the lonely pilgrim's heart,
Star of the coming day,
Arise, and with thy morning beams
lines.ko: 일어나라, 그리고 너의 아침 햇살과 함께

lines.en: Chase all our griefs away.
Come, blessed Lord, bid ev'ry shore
lines.ko: 오세요, 축복받은 주님, 모든 해안으로 인도해주세요

lines.en: And answ'ring island sing
The praises of thy royal Name,
And own thee as their King.
Bid the whole earth, responsive now
To the bright world above,
Break forth in rapturous strains of joy
lines.ko: 황홀한 기쁨의 긴장 속에서 터져 나오세요

lines.en: In mem'ry of thy love.
Lord, Lord, thy fair creation groans,
lines.ko: 주님, 주님, 당신의 아름다운 창조물이 신음합니다.

lines.en: The air, the earth, the sea,
In unison with all our hearts,
And calls aloud for thee.
Come, then, with all thy quick'ning pow'r,
lines.ko: 그렇다면, 당신의 모든 빠른 능력을 가지고 오십시오.

lines.en: With one awak'ning smile,
And bid the serpent's trail no more
lines.ko: 그리고 더 이상 뱀의 흔적을 따르지 마세요

lines.en: Thy beauteous realms defile.
Thine was the cross, with all its fruits
lines.ko: 당신의 것은 십자가와 그 모든 열매였습니다

lines.en: Of grace and peace Divine:
Be thine the crown of glory now,
The palms of vict'ry thine.

title_en: Rejoice, all ye believers

lines.en: Rejoice, all ye believers,
And let your lights appear;
The evening is advancing,
And darker night is near:
The Bridegroom is arising,
And soon he draweth nigh;
Up, pray, and watch, and wrestle:
At midnight comes the cry.
See that your lamps are burning;
Replenish them with oil;
And wait for your salvation,
The end of earthly toil.
The watchers on the mountain
Proclaim the Bridegroom near,
Go meet him as he cometh,
With Alleluias clear.
Ye saints, who here in patience
Your cross and suff'rings bore,
Shall live and reign for ever,
When sorrow is no more:
Around the throne of glory
The Lamb ye shall behold,
In triumph cast before him
Your diadems of gold.
Our Hope and Expectation,
O Jesus, now appear;
Arise, thou Sun so longed for,
O'er this benighted sphere.
With hearts and hands uplifted,
We plead, O Lord to see
lines.ko: 오 주님, 우리가 볼 수 있도록 간구합니다

lines.en: The day of earth's redemption
That brings us unto thee.

title_en: Ten thousand times ten thousand

lines.en: Ten thousand times ten thousand
In sparkling raiment bright,
The armies of the ransomed saints
Throng up the steeps of light:
'Tis finished, all is finished,
Their fight with death and sin:
Fling open wide the golden gates
And let the victors in.
What rush of alleluias
Fill all the earth and sky!
What ringing of a thousand harps
Bespeaks the triumph nigh!
O day, for which creation
And all its tribes were made;
O joy, for all its former woes
lines.ko: 오 기쁨이여, 이전의 모든 불행에 대하여

lines.en: A thousand fold repaid!
O then what raptured greetings
On Canaan's happy shore;
What knitting severed friendships up
Where partings are no more!
Then eyes with joy shall sparkle,
That brimmed with tears of late;
Orphans no longer fatherless,
lines.ko: 고아들은 더 이상 아버지 없는 사람들이 아니며,

lines.en: Nor widows desolate.
Bring near thy great salvation,
Thou Lamb for sinners slain;
lines.ko: 당신은 죽임을 당한 죄인들을 위한 어린양이십니다.

lines.en: Fill up the roll of thine elect,
Then take thy pow'r, and reign:
Appear, Desire of nations,
Thine exiles long for home;
Show in the heav'n thy promised sign;
lines.ko: 당신의 약속된 표징을 하늘에서 보여 주소서.

lines.en: Thou Prince and Saviour, come.

title_en: Thou art coming, O my Saviour

lines.en: Thou art coming, O my Saviour,
Thou art coming, O my King,
In thy beauty all resplendent,
lines.ko: 당신의 아름다움 속에서 모든 것이 빛나고,

lines.en: In thy glory all transcendent;
lines.ko: 당신의 영광 속에는 모든 것이 초월적입니다.

lines.en: Well may we rejoice and sing:
lines.ko: 그럼 우리는 기뻐하며 노래할 수 있습니다:

lines.en: Coming! in the opening east
Herald brightness slowly swells:
Coming! O my glorious Priest,
Hear we not thy golden bells?
Thou art coming, thou art coming:
lines.ko: 당신은 오고 계십니다, 당신은 오고 계십니다:

lines.en: We shall meet thee on thy way,
lines.ko: 우리는 당신의 길에서 당신을 만날 것입니다,

lines.en: We shall see thee, we shall know thee,
lines.ko: 우리는 당신을 볼 것입니다, 우리는 당신을 알게 될 것입니다,

lines.en: We shall bless thee, we shall show thee
All our hearts could never say:
lines.ko: 우리 마음은 결코 다음과 같이 말할 수 없습니다.

lines.en: What an anthem that will be,
Ringing out our love to thee,
lines.ko: 당신을 향한 우리의 사랑을 울려 퍼지게 하소서.

lines.en: Pouring out our rapture sweet
At thine own all-glorious feet.
O the joy to see thee reigning,
lines.ko: 오, 당신이 다스리시는 모습을 보니 기쁘고,

lines.en: Thee, my own beloved Lord!
Ev'ry tongue thy Name confessing,
Worship, honor, glory, blessing
Brought to thee with glad accord;
Thee, my Master and my Friend,
Vindicated and enthroned;
Unto earth's remotest end
Glorified, adored, and owned.

title_en: The King shall come when morning dawns

lines.en: The King shall come when morning dawns,
And light triumphant breaks;
When beauty gilds the eastern hills,
lines.ko: 아름다움이 동쪽 언덕을 금빛으로 물들일 때,

lines.en: And life to joy awakes.
Not as of old a little child
To bear and fight and die,
But crowned with glory like the sun
That lights the morning sky.
O brighter than the rising morn
When he, victorious rose,
And left the lonesome place of death
Despite the rage of foes;
O brighter than that glorious morn
lines.ko: 오 저 찬란한 아침보다 더 빛나네

lines.en: Shall this fair morning be,
When Christ, our King, in beauty comes,
lines.ko: 우리 왕 그리스도께서 아름다운 모습으로 오실 때,

lines.en: And we his face shall see.
lines.ko: 그리고 우리는 그의 얼굴을 보게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: The King shall come when morning dawns,
And earth's dark night is past:
O haste the rising of that morn,
The day that aye shall last;
And let the endless bliss begin
By weary saints foretold,
When right shall triumph over wrong,
lines.ko: 옳은 것이 그른 것을 이길 때,

lines.en: And truth shall be extolled.
The King shall come when morning dawns,
And light and beauty brings:
Hail Christ the Lord! thy people pray,
lines.ko: 주님이신 그리스도를 찬양합니다! 당신의 백성은 기도합니다.

lines.en: Come quickly, King of kings.

title_en: Lo! he comes, with clouds descending

lines.en: Lo! he comes, with clouds descending,
lines.ko: 대속하신 구주께서 구름 타고 오실 때
lines.id: Lihat! Dia datang, dengan awan yang turun,

lines.en: Once for favored sinners slain;
lines.ko: 천만 성도 함께 모여 주의 뒤를 따르네
lines.id: Sekali untuk orang-orang berdosa yang disembelih

lines.en: Thousand thousand saints attending
lines.id: Ribuan orang suci sedang merawat

lines.en: Swell the triumph of his train:
lines.id: Kembangkan kemenangan kereta-Nya.

lines.en: Alleluia! Alleluia!
lines.id: Al-le-lu-jah Al-le-lu-jah

lines.en: God appears on earth to reign.
lines.id: Tuhan muncul di bumi untuk memerintah.

lines.en: Ev'ry eye shall now behold him,
lines.ko: 엄숙하신 주의 위풍 모든 사람 뵈올 때
lines.id: Setiap mata sekarang akan memandang Dia,

lines.en: Robed in dreadful majesty;
lines.ko: 주를 팔고 십자가에 못을 박던 자들이
lines.id: Berjubah dalam keagungan yang mengerikan!

lines.en: Those who set at naught and sold him,
lines.ko: 슬피 울고 가슴 치며 참 메시야 뵙겠네
lines.id: Mereka yang tidak menghasilkan apa-apa dan menjual Dia,

lines.en: Pierced, and nailed him to the tree,
lines.id: Menusuk dan memakukannya pada pohon,

lines.en: Deeply wailing, deeply wailing,
lines.id: Ratapan mendalam, Ratapan mendalam,

lines.en: Shall the true Messiah see.
lines.id: Akankah Mes-si-ah yang sejati melihat.

lines.en: Ev'ry island, sea, and mountain,
lines.ko: 주가 당한 고난 흔적 모든 사람 볼 때에
lines.id: Sekarang penebusan kembali, yang sudah lama dinantikan,

lines.en: Heav'n and earth, shall flee away;
lines.ko: 구원받은 모든 성도 주께 경배 드리네
lines.id: Lihat dalam kemegahan sol-emn ap-pear!

lines.en: All who hate him must, confounded,
lines.id: Semua orang kudusNya, ditolak oleh manusia,

lines.en: Hear the trump proclaim the day;
