lines.id: Sekarang kita akan menemui Dia di udara

lines.en: Come to judgment! Come to judgment!
lines.id: Al-le-lu-jah Al-le-lu-jah

lines.en: Come to judgment, come away!
lines.id: Lihatlah hari Tuhan muncul.

lines.en: Now Redemption, long expected,
lines.id: Ya, A-laki-laki biarkan semua memuja-Mu,

lines.en: See in solemn pomp appear!
lines.ko: 왕의 왕이 되신 주를 우리 환영 하겠네
lines.id: Tinggi di singgasana kekal-Mu:

lines.en: All his saints, by man rejected,
lines.ko: 할렐루야 할렐루야 주여 어서 오소서 아멘
lines.id: Selamat, ambillah kekuasaan dan kemuliaan

lines.en: Now shall meet him in the air:
lines.id: Klaim raja-don untuk milik-Mu.

lines.en: Alleluia! Alleluia!
lines.id: O, cepatlah datang, O, cepatlah datang!

lines.en: See the day of God appear!
lines.id: Tuhan yang kekal turun. Amin.

lines.en: Yea, Amen! let all adore thee,
High on thine eternal throne;
Saviour, take the pow'r and glory,
Claim the kingdom for thine own:
O come quickly, O come quickly:
Alleluia! come, Lord, come.

title_id: Lihat! Dia Datang, dengan Awan Turun

title_en: Christ is coming! let creation

lines.en: Christ is coming! let creation
From her groans and travail cease;
Let the glorious proclamation
Hope restore and faith increase:
Christ is coming! Christ is coming!
Come thou blessed Prince of Peace.
Earth can now but tell the story
lines.ko: 지구는 이제 이야기를 할 수 밖에 없습니다

lines.en: Of thy bitter cross and pain;
She shall yet behold thy glory,
lines.ko: 그녀는 이제 당신의 영광을 보게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: When thou comest back to reign:
Christ is coming! Christ is coming!
Let each heart repeat the strain.
Long thine exiles have been pining,
Far from rest, and home, and thee:
But, in heav'nly vestures shining,
They their loving Lord shall see:
lines.ko: 그들의 사랑이신 주님께서는 그들을 보실 것입니다:

lines.en: Christ is coming! Christ is coming!
Haste the joyous jubilee.
With that blessed hope before us,
lines.ko: 우리 앞에 있는 그 복된 소망을 가지고,

lines.en: Let no harp remain unstrung;
Let the mighty advent chorus
Onward roll from tongue to tongue:
"Christ is coming! Christ is coming!
Come, Lord Jesus, quickly come!"

title_en: The mighty God, the Lord, hath spoken

lines.en: Psalm 50:1-6
The mighty God, the Lord,
Hath spoken unto all;
From rising to the setting sun,
He unto earth doth call.
From Zion, his own hill,
Where perfect beauty dwells,
Jehovah hath his glory shown,
In brightness that excels.
Our God shall surely come,
And silence shall not keep;
Before him fire shall waste, and storms
lines.ko: 그 앞에서는 불이 소멸되고 폭풍이 몰아치리라

lines.en: Tempestuous round him sweep.
He to the heav'ns above
Shall then send forth his call,
And likewise to the earth, that he
May judge his people all.
lines.ko: 그분의 백성을 모두 심판하실 수 있습니다.

lines.en: "Together let my saints
Unto me gathered be,
Those that by sacrifice have made
A covenant with me."
Then shall the heav'ns declare
His righteousness abroad;
Because the Lord himself is judge,
Yea, none is judge, but God.
lines.ko: 그렇습니다. 재판관은 하나님 외에는 아무도 없습니다.

title_en: Great God, what do I see and hear
title_ko: 위대하신 하나님, 내가 보고 듣는 것은 무엇입니까? (자체번역)

lines.en: Great God, what do I see and hear!
lines.ko: 위대하신 하나님, 내가 무엇을 보고 듣는가!

lines.en: The end of things created!
The Judge of mankind doth appear
On clouds of glory seated!
The trumpet sounds; the graves restore
The dead which they contained before:
Prepare, my soul, to meet him.
lines.ko: 내 영혼아, 그를 만날 준비를 하여라.

lines.en: The dead in Christ shall first arise,
lines.ko: 그리스도 안에서 죽은 자들이 먼저 일어나고,

lines.en: At the last trumpet's sounding,
Caught up to meet him in the skies,
With joy their Lord surrounding;
No gloomy fears their souls dismay;
lines.ko: 우울한 사람은 영혼의 낙담을 두려워하지 않습니다.

lines.en: His presence sheds eternal day
On those prepared to meet him.
But sinners, filled with guilty fears,
lines.ko: 그러나 죄에 대한 두려움으로 가득 찬 죄인들은

lines.en: Behold his wrath prevailing;
For they shall rise, and find their tears
lines.ko: 그들은 일어나서 그들의 눈물을 발견할 것임이라

lines.en: And sighs are unavailing:
The day of grace is past and gone;
Trembling they stand before the throne,
All unprepared to meet him.
lines.ko: 모두 그를 만날 준비가 되어 있지 않았습니다.

lines.en: Great God, what do I see and hear!
lines.ko: 위대하신 하나님, 내가 무엇을 보고 듣는가!

lines.en: The end of things created!
The Judge of mankind doth appear
On clouds of glory seated!
Beneath his cross I view the day
lines.ko: 그의 십자가 아래서 나는 그날을 봅니다

lines.en: When heav'n and earth shall pass away,
And thus prepare to meet him.

title_en: Day of judgment! day of wonders

lines.en: Day of judgment! day of wonders!
Hark! the trumpet's awful sound,
Louder than a thousand thunders,
Shakes the vast creation round.
How the summons
Will the sinner's heart confound!
See the Judge, our nature wearing,
lines.ko: 판사님을 보세요, 우리의 본성은 옷을 입고 있습니다.

lines.en: Clothed in majesty divine;
You who long for his appearing
Then shall say, This God is mine!
lines.ko: 그러면 말하기를, 이 신은 내 것이다!

lines.en: Gracious Saviour,
Own me in that day as thine.
At his call the dead awaken,
Rise to life from earth and sea;
All the pow'r of nature, shaken
By his looks, prepare to flee.
lines.ko: 그의 외모를 보고 도망갈 준비를 하세요.

lines.en: Careless sinner,
What will then become of thee?
But to those who have confessed,
Loved and served the Lord below,
He will say, Come near, ye blessed,
lines.ko: 그가 이르시되 가까이 오라 복된 자들아

lines.en: See the kingdom I bestow;
You for ever
Shall my love and glory know.

title_en: That day of wrath, that dreadful day
title_ko: 그 진노의 날, 그 두려운 날 (자체번역)

lines.en: That day of wrath, that dreadful day
lines.ko: 그 진노의 날, 그 두려운 날

lines.en: When heav'n and earth shall pass away!
What pow'r shall be the sinner's stay?
lines.ko: 죄인이 머무를 수 있는 힘은 무엇입니까?

lines.en: How shall he meet that dreadful day?
lines.ko: 그 무서운 날을 어떻게 맞이할 것인가?

lines.en: When, shriveling like a parched scroll,
The flaming heav'ns together roll;
When louder yet, and yet more dread,
Swells the high trump that wakes the dead;
O on that day, that wrathful day
lines.ko: 아 그 날, 그 분노의 날

lines.en: When man to judgment wakes from clay,
lines.ko: 사람이 심판에 이르러 진흙에서 깨어날 때에

lines.en: Be thou the trembling sinner's stay,
lines.ko: 당신은 떨고 있는 죄인의 거처가 되십시오.

lines.en: Though heav'n and earth shall pass away.

title_en: O quickly come, dread Judge of all

lines.en: O quickly come, dread Judge of all;
lines.ko: 나의 사랑하는 책 비록 해어졌으나 어머니의 무릎 위에 앉아서
lines.id: Ada sebuah Kitab yang berharga dan berharga,

lines.en: For, awful though thine advent be,
lines.ko: 재미있게 듣던 말 그 때 일을 지금도 내가 잊지 않고 기억 합니다
lines.id: Meskipun itu sudah usang dan ketinggalan jaman sekarang,

lines.en: All shadows from the truth will fall,
lines.ko: 후렴 : 귀하고 귀하다 우리 어머니가 들려 주시던
lines.id: Yang mengingatkan kembali hari-hari bahagia yang sudah lama berlalu,

lines.en: And falsehood die, in sight of thee:
lines.ko: 재미있게 듣던 말 이 책 중에 있으니 이 성경 심히 사랑 합니다
lines.id: Saat aku berdiri di pangkuan ibu,

lines.en: O quickly come; for doubt and fear
lines.id: Dengan tangannya di atas alisku,

lines.en: Like clouds dissolve when thou art near.
lines.id: Dan aku mendengar suaranya dengan nada lembut dan rendah.

lines.en: O quickly come, great King of all;
lines.ko: 옛날 용맹스럽던 다니엘의 경험과 유대 임금 다윗 왕의 역사와
lines.id: Saat dia membaca cerita-cerita di atas,

lines.en: Reign all around us, and within;
lines.ko: 주의 선지 엘리야 바람타고 하늘에 올라가던 일을 기억 합니다
lines.id: Dari orang-orang perkasa di masa lalu,

lines.en: Let sin no more our souls enthrall,
lines.id: Tentang Je-seph dan Daniel dan cobaan mereka,

lines.en: Let pain and sorrow die with sin:
lines.id: Tentang Da-vid kecil yang berani,

lines.en: O quickly come; for thou alone
lines.id: Yang akhirnya menjadi raja

lines.en: Canst make thy scattered people one.
lines.id: Tentang Setan dengan berbagai tipu muslihat jahatnya.

lines.en: O quickly come, true Life of all;
lines.ko: 예수 세상 계실 때 많은 고난 당하고 십자가에 달려 죽임 당한 일
lines.id: Kemudian dia membaca tentang kasih Yesus,

lines.en: For death is mighty all around;
lines.ko: 어머니가 읽으며 눈물 많이 흘린 것 지금 까기 내가 기억 합니다
lines.id: Saat Dia memberkati anak-anak terkasih,

lines.en: On ev'ry home his shadows fall,
lines.id: Bagaimana Dia menderita, mengeluarkan darah dan mati di atas pohon,

lines.en: On ev'ry heart his mark is found:
lines.id: Dari beban perhatian-Nya yang berat,

lines.en: O quickly come; for grief and pain
lines.id: Lalu dia mengeringkan air mataku yang mengalir

lines.en: Can never cloud thy glorious reign.
lines.id: Dengan ciumannya saat dia mengatakan itu untukku.

lines.en: O quickly come, sure Light of all;
lines.ko: 그 때 일은 지나고 나의 눈에 환하오 어머니의 말씀 기억하면서
lines.id: Nah, hari-hari itu sudah berlalu dan berlalu,

lines.en: For gloomy night broods o'er our way;
lines.ko: 나도 시시때때로 성경 말씀 읽으며 주의 뜻을 따라 살려합니다
lines.id: Namun anggota tubuh mereka masih tetap hidup,

lines.en: And weakly souls begin to fall
lines.id: Dan Buku tua tercinta setiap hari telah menjadi panduan saya,

lines.en: With weary watching for the day:
lines.id: Dan aku berusaha melakukan kehendak-Nya,

lines.en: O quickly come; for round thy throne
lines.id: Seperti yang diajarkan ibuku padaku saat itu,

lines.en: No eye is blind, no night is known.
lines.id: Dan selalu di hatiku, kata-kata-Nya tinggal.

title_id: Ada Buku yang Tersayang dan Berharga

title_en: Spirit, strength of all the weak

lines.en: Spirit, strength of all the week,
Giving courage to the meek,
Teaching faltering tongues to speak;
Hear us, Holy Spirit.
Spirit, aiding all who yearn
More of truth divine to learn,
And with deeper love to burn;
lines.ko: 그리고 더욱 깊은 사랑으로 불타오르게 하소서.

lines.en: Hear us, Holy Spirit.
Spirit, Fount of faith and joy,
Giving peace without alloy,
Hope that nothing can destroy;
lines.ko: 그 무엇도 파괴할 수 없기를 바랍니다.

lines.en: Hear us, Holy Spirit.
Source of love and light Divine,
With that hallowing grace of thine,
More and more upon us shine;
lines.ko: 우리에게 점점 더 많은 빛이 비춰지고 있습니다.

lines.en: Hear us, Holy Spirit.
Holy, loving, as thou art,
Come and live within our heart,
Never from us to depart;
Hear us, Holy Spirit.
May we soon, from sin set free,
Where thy work may perfect be,
Jesus' face with rapture see:
Hear us, Holy Spirit.

title_en: Gracious Spirit, Dove Divine

lines.en: Gracious Spirit, Dove Divine,
Let thy light within me shine;
All my guilty fears remove,
Fill me full of heav'n and love.
Speak thy pard'ning grace to me,
Set the burdened sinner free;
lines.ko: 무거운 짐을 진 죄인을 자유롭게 하시고

lines.en: Lead me to the Lamb of God,
Wash me in his precious blood.
lines.ko: 그분의 보배로운 피로 나를 씻어 주소서.

lines.en: Life and peace to me impart;
Seal salvation on my heart;
Breathe thyself into my breast,
Earnest of immortal rest.
Let me never from thee stray,
lines.ko: 내가 결코 당신에게서 벗어나지 않게 하소서.

lines.en: Keep me in the narrow way,
Fill my soul with joy divine,
lines.ko: 내 영혼을 신성한 기쁨으로 채워 주소서.

lines.en: Keep me, Lord, for ever thine.
lines.ko: 주님, 저를 영원히 당신의 것으로 지켜 주소서.

title_en: Holy Ghost, dispel our sadness

lines.en: Holy Ghost, dispel our sadness,
Pierce the clouds of sinful night;
Come, thou source of sweetest gladness,
Breathe thy life, and spread they light.
Loving Spirit, God of peace,
Great distributor of grace,
Rest upon this congregation;
Hear, O hear our supplication.
From that height which knows no measure,
As a gracious show'r descend;
Bringing down the richest treasure
Man can wish, or God can send.
lines.ko: 사람이 원할 수도 있고, 하나님이 보내실 수도 있습니다.

lines.en: O thou Glory, shining down
From the Father and the Son,
Grant us thine illumination;
Rest upon this congregation.
Come, thou best of all donations
lines.ko: 오세요, 당신은 모든 기부 중에서 가장 좋은 것입니다

lines.en: God can give, or we implore;
lines.ko: 하나님은 주실 수도 있고, 우리가 간청할 수도 있습니다.

lines.en: Having thy sweet consolations
We need wish for nothing more.
lines.ko: 우리는 더 이상 바랄 것이 없습니다.

lines.en: Come with unction and with pow'r,
On our souls thy graces show'r;
lines.ko: 우리 영혼에 당신의 은총이 드러나게 하소서.

lines.en: Author of the new creation,
Make our hearts thy habitation.

title_en: Come, O come, thou quick'ning Spirit

lines.en: Come, O come, thou quick'ning Spirit,
God from all eternity!
May thy power never fail us;
lines.ko: 당신의 능력이 우리를 결코 실망시키지 않기를 바랍니다.

lines.en: Dwell within us constantly.
Then shall truth and life and light
Banish all the gloom of night.
Grant our hearts in fullest measure
Wisdom, counsel, purity,
That we ever may be seeking
Only that which pleaseth thee.
Let thy knowledge spread and grow,
lines.ko: 당신의 지식이 널리 퍼지고 성장하게 하십시오.

lines.en: Working error's overthrow.
Show us, Lord, the path of blessing;
lines.ko: 주님, 우리에게 축복의 길을 보여 주소서.

lines.en: When we trespass on our way,
Cast, O Lord, our sins behind thee
lines.ko: 주님, 우리 죄를 당신 뒤에 던져 주소서

lines.en: And be with us day by day.
Should we stray, O Lord, recall;
lines.ko: 오 주님, 우리가 길을 잃었다면 기억해 주십시오.

lines.en: Work repentance when we fall.
Holy Spirit, strong and mighty,
Thou who makest all things new,
Make thy work within us perfect
lines.ko: 우리 안에서 하시는 일을 완전하게 하옵소서

lines.en: And the evil foe subdue.
Grant us weapons for the strife
And with vict'ry crown our life.
lines.ko: 그리고 승리의 왕관으로 우리의 삶을 살아갑니다.

title_en: Come to our poor nature's night

lines.en: Come to our poor nature's night,
lines.ko: 무한하신 주 성령 우리 어둔 성품에
lines.id: Tuhan Yang rahmat-Nya melimpah, selalu agung,

lines.en: With thy blessed inward light,
lines.id: Peduli pada setiap orang yang beriman, satu demi satu.

lines.en: Holy Ghost, the Infinite,
lines.id: Ya-ter-hari dan hari ini dan sepanjang masa,

lines.en: Comforter Divine.
lines.id: Tetap saja Dia menjaga semua orang yang percaya kepada Putra-Nya.
Ya Tuhan, berikan Hadiah, inilah yang kami sebut,
Kirimkan hadiah roh-itu yang kita doakan!
Dengan nyala api yang murni dan membara di atas kita semua,
Kirimkan Spir-it secara penuh hari ini!

lines.en: We are sinfulcleanse us, Lord;
lines.ko: 우리 죄를 씻으사 피곤한 자 힘주시며
lines.id: Biarlah noda nafsu dan dosa kita ternoda,

lines.en: Sick and faintthy strength afford;
lines.id: Dikonsumsi dalam semangat-nyala api yang panas.

lines.en: Lostuntil by thee restored,
lines.id: Jadikan kami suci, ya Tuhan, dan bersih luar dan dalam

lines.en: Comforter Divine.
lines.id: Jadikan kami tahir, Tuhan, dalam nama Kristus Yesus!
Ya Tuhan, berikan Hadiah, inilah yang kami sebut,
Kirimkan hadiah roh-itu yang kita doakan!
Dengan nyala api yang murni dan membara di atas kita semua,
Kirimkan Spir-it secara penuh hari ini!

lines.en: Like the dew thy peace distill;
lines.id: Anak Domba Allah, yang telah disembelih demi kita, orang-orang berdosa

lines.en: Guide, subdue our wayward will,
lines.id: Tanpa cacat, sayang selamanya.

lines.en: Things of Christ unfolding still,
lines.id: Dengan kekuatan rasa sakit yang tidak dapat diketahui itu,

lines.en: Comforter Divine.
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, selamatkan mereka yang menantikan Engkau di sini!
Ya Tuhan, berikan Hadiah, inilah yang kami sebut,
Kirimkan hadiah roh-itu yang kita doakan!
Dengan nyala api yang murni dan membara di atas kita semua,
Kirimkan Spir-it secara penuh hari ini!

lines.en: With us, for us, intercede,
lines.id: Jauh dan luas, ke seluruh daratan di bawah langit

lines.en: And, with voiceless groanings, plead
lines.id: Kami hanya ingin berbagi kedalaman rahmat-Nya.

lines.en: Our unutterable need,
lines.id: Jadi, berikan kami pakaian, Tuhan, dengan kekuatan, kekuatan dari tempat tinggi,

lines.en: Comforter Divine.
lines.id: Kirimkan kami keluar dengan kekuatan-Mu dari tempat ini!
Ya Tuhan, berikan Hadiah, inilah yang kami sebut,
Kirimkan hadiah roh-itu yang kita doakan!
Dengan nyala api yang murni dan membara di atas kita semua,
Kirimkan Spir-it secara penuh hari ini! Amin.

lines.en: In us Abba, Father! cry,
lines.id: Sesuai dengan perkataan Yesus, aku memanggilmu Bapa.

lines.en: Earnest of the bliss on high,
lines.id: Ajari aku dengan jelas, Penghibur,

lines.en: Seal of immortality,
Comforter Divine.
Search for us the depths of God;
lines.ko: 영생하는 인친 표 기업 얻을 증거니
lines.id: Apakah ini bukti bahwa Anda akan mendapatkan meterai hidup kekal dan ditemani?

lines.en: Upwards by the starry road,
lines.id: Bimbing aku ke surga, Penghibur.

lines.en: Bear us to thy high abode,
Comforter Divine.

title_id: Datanglah ke Malam Alam Kita yang Miskin

title_en: Come, Holy Ghost, in love

lines.en: Come, Holy Ghost, in love
Shed on us from above
Thine own bright ray:
Divinely good thou art;
Thy sacred gifts impart
To gladden each sad heart:
lines.ko: 각각의 슬픈 마음을 기쁘게 하기 위해:

lines.en: O come today.
Come, tend'rest Friend and best,
lines.ko: 오세요, 편히 쉬세요 친구이자 최고의 친구여,

lines.en: Our most delightful Guest,
With soothing pow'r:
Rest, which thy weary know;
Shade, 'mid the noontide glow;
Peace, when deep griefs o'erflow,
Cheer us this hour.
Come, Light serene, and still
Our inmost bosoms fill;
Dwell in each breast:
We know no dawn but thine;
lines.ko: 우리는 당신의 새벽 외에는 새벽을 알지 못합니다.

lines.en: Send forth thy beams divine
On our dark souls to shine,
And make us blest.
Exalt our low desires;
Extinguish passion's fires;
His praise employ;
Give virtue's rich reward;
Victorious death accord,
And, with our glorious Lord,
Eternal joy.

title_en: Come, dearest Lord, descend and dwell

lines.en: Come, dearest Lord, descend and dwell
By faith and love in ev'ry breast;
Then shall we know and taste and feel
lines.ko: 그럼 우리가 알고, 맛보고, 느낄 수 있을까요?

lines.en: The joys that cannot be expressed.
Come, fill our hearts with inward strength;
lines.ko: 오셔서 우리 마음을 내적인 힘으로 채워 주십시오.

lines.en: Make our enlarged souls possess
And learn the height, and breadth, and length
Of thine unmeasurable grace.
Now to the God whose pow'r can do
lines.ko: 이제 능력으로 할 수 있는 하나님께

lines.en: More than our thoughts or wishes know,
Be everlasting honors done
By all the church, through Christ his Son.
lines.ko: 온 교회로 말미암아 그의 아들 그리스도로 말미암아

title_en: Come, O Creator, Spirit blest

lines.en: Come, O Creator Spirit blest,
And in our hearts take up thy rest;
lines.ko: 그리고 우리 마음 속에 당신의 안식을 취하십시오.

lines.en: Spirit of grace, with heav'nly aid
Come to the souls whom thou hast made.
Thou art the Comforter, we cry,
Sent to the earth from God Most High,
lines.ko: 지극히 높으신 하나님께서 이 땅에 보내신

lines.en: Fountain of life and Fire of love,
And our Anointing from above.
Bringing from heav'n our sev'nfold dow'r,
lines.ko: 하늘에서 우리 일곱 배의 지참금을 가져와,

lines.en: Sign of our God's right hand of pow'r,
O blessed Spirit, promised long,
Thy coming wakes the heart to song.
Make our dull minds with rapture glow,
lines.ko: 우리의 둔한 마음을 환희로 빛나게 하시고,

lines.en: Let human hearts with love o'erflow;
lines.ko: 인간의 마음에 사랑이 흘러 넘치도록 하십시오.

lines.en: And, when our feeble flesh would fail,
lines.ko: 그리고 우리의 연약한 육체가 쇠약해질 때,

lines.en: May thine immortal strength prevail.
Far from our souls the foe repel,
lines.ko: 우리 영혼에서 멀리 떨어진 적들이 격퇴하고,

lines.en: Grant us in peace henceforth to dwell;
lines.ko: 이제부터 우리가 평화롭게 살도록 허락해 주십시오.

lines.en: Ill shall not come, nor harm betide,
lines.ko: 나는 오지 않을 것이고, 해를 끼치지도 않을 것이다.

lines.en: If only thou wilt be our Guide.
Show us the Father, Holy One,
Help us to know th'Eternal Son;
lines.ko: 우리가 영원하신 아들을 알 수 있도록 도와주세요.

lines.en: Spirit Divine, for evermore
Thee will we trust and thee adore.

title_en: To thee, O Comforter Divine

lines.en: To thee, O Comforter Divine
lines.id: Lebih dekat, ya Tuhan, kepada-Mu,

lines.en: For all thy grace and pow'r benign,
lines.id: Lebih dekat kepada-Mu!

lines.en: Sing we Alleluia.
lines.ko: 내 일생 소원은 늘 찬송 하면서
lines.id: Meskipun itu sebuah salib

lines.en: That rais-eth me
lines.id: Itu membangkitkan semangatku

lines.en: To thee, whose faithful love had place
lines.ko: 내 고생 하는 것 옛 야곱이
lines.id: Thn-der-er, Matahari terbenam,

lines.en: In God's great covenant of grace,
lines.id: Kegelapan menyelimutiku,

lines.en: Sing we Alleluia.
lines.id: Istirahatku seperti batu

lines.en: Yet in my dreams I'd be
lines.id: Namun dalam mimpiku, aku akan menjadi seperti itu

lines.en: To thee, whose faithful voice doth win
lines.id: Disanalah jalannya muncul

lines.en: The wand'ring from the ways of sin,
lines.id: Langkah menuju surga

lines.en: Sing we Alleluia.
lines.ko: 천사 날 부르니 늘 찬송 하면서
lines.id: Semua yang Engkau kirimkan kepadaku

lines.en: In mer-cy given
lines.id: Dalam belas kasihan diberikan

lines.en: To thee, whose faithful pow'r doth heal,
lines.id: Lalu, dengan pikiranku yang terjaga

lines.en: Enlighten, sanctify, and seal,
lines.id: Bawalah dengan pujian-Mu,

lines.en: Sing we Alleluia.
lines.ko: 숨질 때 되도록 늘 찬송 하면서
lines.id: Dari kesedihanku yang membara

lines.en: Beth-el I'll raise
lines.id: Beth-el akan kubesarkan

lines.en: To thee, whose faithful truth is shown
By ev'ry promise made our own,
Sing we Alleluia.
To thee, our Teacher and our Friend,
Our faithful Leader to the end,
Sing we Alleluia.
To thee, by Jesus Christ sent down,
Of all his gifts the sum and crown,
Sing we Alleluia.
To thee, who art with God the Son
And God the Father ever One
Sing we Alleluia.

title_en: O Spirit of the living God

lines.en: O Spirit of the living God,
In all thy plenitude of grace,
Where'er the foot of man hath trod,
Descend on our apostate race.
Give tongues of fire and hearts of love
To preach the reconciling word;
Give pow'r and unction from above,
Whene'er the joyful sound is heard.
Be darkness, at thy coming, light;
lines.ko: 당신이 오실 때에는 어둠이 되십시오. 빛이 되십시오.

lines.en: Confusion, order in thy path;
lines.ko: 혼란이여, 당신의 길을 질서 있게 하십시오.

lines.en: Souls without strength inspire with might;
Bid mercy triumph over wrath.
O Spirit of the Lord, prepare
All the round earth her God to meet;
Breathe thou abroad like morning air,
Till hearts of stone begin to beat.
Baptize the nations; far and nigh
The triumphs of the cross record;
The Name of Jesus glorify,
Till every kindred call him Lord.
lines.ko: 모든 족속이 그를 주님이라 부를 때까지.

lines.en: God from eternity hath willed
All flesh shall his salvation see:
So be the Father's love fulfilled,
The Saviour's suff'rings crowned through thee.
lines.ko: 구주의 고난이 당신을 통해 관을 씌웠습니다.

title_en: Come, Holy Spirit, come

lines.en: Come, Holy Spirit, come;
Let thy bright beams arise;
Dispel the darkness from our minds,
And open all our eyes.
Cheer our desponding hearts,
Thou heav'nly Paraclete;
Give us to lie with humble hope
lines.ko: 우리가 겸손한 희망으로 거짓말을 할 수 있게 해주세요

lines.en: At our Redeemer's feet.
Revive our drooping faith;
Our doubts and fears remove;
And kindle in our breasts the flames
Of never-dying love.
Convince us of our sin;
Then lead to Jesus' blood,
And to our wond'ring view, reveal
The secret love of God.
'Tis thine to cleanse the heart,
To sanctify the soul,
To pour fresh life in ev'ry part,
lines.ko: 모든 부분에 신선한 생명을 부어주기 위해,

lines.en: And new create the whole.
Dwell, therefore, in our hearts;
Our minds from bondage free;
Then we shall know and praise and love
lines.ko: 그러면 우리는 알고 찬양하고 사랑할 것입니다.

lines.en: The Father, Son, and Thee.

title_en: Spirit of God, that moved of old

lines.en: Spirit of God, that moved of old
Upon the waters' darkened face,
Come, when our faithless hearts are cold,
lines.ko: 오소서, 믿음 없는 우리 마음이 차가울 때,

lines.en: And stir them with an inward grace.
Thou that art pow'r and peace combined,
All highest strength, all purest love,
lines.ko: 모든 최고의 힘, 가장 순수한 사랑,

lines.en: The rushing of the mighty wind,
The brooding of the gentle dove.
Come, give us still thy pow'rful aid,
lines.ko: 오셔서 여전히 우리에게 당신의 강력한 도움을 주소서.

lines.en: And urge us on, and make us thine;
lines.ko: 그리고 우리를 격려하여 당신의 것으로 만드십시오.

lines.en: Nor leave the hearts that once were made
Fit temples for thy grace divine.
lines.ko: 당신의 신성한 은혜를 위해 사원에 적합합니다.

lines.en: Nor let us quench thy sev'nfold light;
lines.ko: 당신의 일곱 배의 빛을 우리가 꺼뜨리지 않게 하소서.

lines.en: But still with softest breathings stir
lines.ko: 하지만 여전히 가장 부드러운 호흡으로 저어주세요

lines.en: Our wayward souls, and lead us right,
lines.ko: 우리의 길 잃은 영혼이여, 우리를 바르게 이끌어 주소서.

lines.en: O Holy Ghost, the Comforter.

title_en: Break thou the bread of life

lines.en: Break thou the bread of life,
lines.id: Pecahkanlah roti hidup, ya Tuhan, kepadaku,

lines.en: Dear Lord, to me,
lines.id: Seperti Engkau memecah-mecahkan roti Di tepi laut.

lines.en: As thou didst break the loaves
lines.id: Di luar halaman suci aku mencariMu, Tuhan

lines.en: Beside the sea;
lines.id: Semangatku rindu pada-Mu, hai Firman yang hidup!

lines.en: Throughout the sacred page
I seek thee, Lord,
My spirit pants for thee,
O living Word.
Bless thou the truth, dear Lord,
lines.id: Engkaulah roti hidup, ya Tuhan, bagiku,

lines.en: To me, to me,
lines.id: Firman-Mu yang kudus adalah kebenaran yang menyelamatkan aku.

lines.en: As thou didst bless the bread
lines.id: Beri aku makan dan hidup bersamaMu di atas.

lines.en: By Galilee;
lines.id: Ajari aku untuk mencintai kebenaran-Mu, Karena Engkaulah cinta.

lines.en: Then shall all bondage cease,
All fetters fall;
And I shall find my peace,
My All in all.
Thou art the Bread of Life,
lines.id: Terberkatilah kebenarannya, ya Tuhan, Bagiku, bagiku,

lines.en: O Lord, to me,
lines.id: Seperti Engkau memberkati roti Oleh Gal-i-lee.

lines.en: Thy holy Word the truth
lines.id: Maka semua ikatan akan lenyap, Semua belenggu akan runtuh,

lines.en: That saveth me;
lines.id: Dan aku akan menemukan kedamaianku, Segalanya dalam Segalanya.

lines.en: Give me to eat and live
With thee above;
Teach me to love thy truth,
For thou art love.
O send thy Spirit, Lord,
lines.id: O kirimkan Roh-Mu, Tuhan, Sekarang kepadaku,

lines.en: Now unto me,
lines.id: Agar Dia menyentuh mataku dan membuatku melihat:

lines.en: That he may touch mine eyes,
lines.id: Tunjukkan padaku kebenaran yang tersembunyi di dalam Firman-Mu,

lines.en: And make me see:
lines.id: Dan di dalam Kitab-Mu yang diwahyukan kembali aku melihat Tuhan. Amin.

lines.en: Show me the truth concealed
Within thy Word,
And in thy Book revealed
I see the Lord.

title_en: Thy Word is like a garden, Lord

lines.en: Thy Word is like a garden, Lord,
With flowers bright and fair;
And ev'ry one who seeks may pluck
lines.ko: 그리고 찾는 사람은 누구나 뽑을 수 있습니다

lines.en: A lovely cluster there.
Thy Word is like a deep, deep mine;
lines.ko: 당신의 말씀은 깊고 깊은 광산과 같습니다.

lines.en: And jewels rich are rare
Are hidden in its mighty depths
lines.ko: 그 거대한 깊이 속에 숨겨져 있어요

lines.en: For ev'ry searcher there.
Thy Word is like a starry host:
lines.ko: 당신의 말씀은 별이 빛나는 호스트와 같습니다.

lines.en: A thousand rays of light
Are seen to guide the traveler,
And make his pathway bright.
Thy Word is like an armory,
Where soldiers may repair,
And find, for life's long battle day,
lines.ko: 그리고 인생의 긴 전투의 날을 위해,

lines.en: All needful weapons there.
O may I love thy precious Word,
lines.ko: 오, 당신의 소중한 말씀을 사랑하게 하소서.

lines.en: May I explore the mine,
May I its fragrant flowers glean,
May light upon me shine.
O may I find my armor there,
lines.ko: 오, 거기서 내 갑옷을 찾을 수 있을까요?

lines.en: Thy Word my trusty sword;
I'll learn to fight with ev'ry foe
lines.ko: 나는 모든 적과 싸우는 법을 배울 것이다

lines.en: The battle of the Lord.

title_en: The Spirit breathes upon the Word

lines.en: The Spirit breathes upon the Word,
And brings the truth to sight;
Precepts and promises afford
A sanctifying light.
A glory gilds the sacred page,
Majestic, like the sun:
It gives a light to ev'ry age;
It gives, but borrows none.
lines.ko: 그것은 주기는 하지만 아무것도 빌리지 않습니다.

lines.en: The Hand that gave it still supplies
lines.ko: 그것을 준 손이 아직도 공급하고 있다

lines.en: The gracious light and heat:
His truths upon the nations rise;
They rise, but never set.
Let everlasting thanks be thine
For such a bright display
As makes a world of darkness shine
With beams of heav'nly day.
My soul rejoices to pursue
The steps of him I love.
Till glory break upon my view
In brighter worlds above.

title_en: Father of mercies, in thy Word

lines.en: Father of mercies, in thy Word
What endless glory shines;
Forever be thy Name adored
For these celestial lines.
Here may the wretched sons of want
lines.ko: 여기에 빈곤의 비참한 아들들이 있을 수 있습니다

lines.en: Exhaustless riches find
Riches above what earth can grant
lines.ko: 땅이 줄 수 있는 것 이상의 부를

lines.en: And lasting as the mind.
Here the Redeemer's welcome voice
Spreads heav'nly peace around;
And life and everlasting joys
Attend the blissful sound.
O may these heav'nly pages be
My ever dear delight;
And still new beauties may I see,
lines.ko: 그리고 여전히 새로운 아름다움을 볼 수 있을지도 모릅니다.

lines.en: And still increasing light.
Divine Instructor, gracious Lord,
Be thou for ever near;
Teach me to love thy sacred Word,
lines.ko: 당신의 거룩한 말씀을 사랑하도록 가르쳐 주소서.

lines.en: And view my Saviour there.

title_en: Thy servant, blessed by thee, shall live

lines.en: From Psalm 119:17-24
lines.id: Ada sebuah air mancur yang penuh dengan darah

lines.en: Drawn from Im-man-uel's veins
lines.id: Diambil dari urat nadi Im-man-uel

lines.en: And sin-ners, plunged be-neath that flood,
lines.id: Dan para pendosa, yang terjerumus ke dalam banjir itu,

lines.en: Lose all their guilt-y stains:
lines.id: Hilangkan semua noda rasa bersalah mereka:

lines.en: Thy servant, blessed by thee, shall live
lines.ko: 저 도적 회개 하고서 보혈에 씻었네
lines.id: Pencuri yang sekarat itu kembali bersukacita melihatnya

lines.en: And keep thy Word with awe;
lines.ko: 저 도적 같은 이 몸도 죄 씻기 원하네
lines.id: Air mancur itu pada zamannya

lines.en: Lord open thou mine eyes to see
lines.ko: 죄 씻기 원하네 죄 씻기 원하네
lines.id: Dan di sanalah aku, meskipun jahat seperti dia,

lines.en: The wonders of thy law.
lines.ko: 저 도적 같은 이 몸도 죄 씻기 원하네
lines.id: Cucilah semua dosaku:

lines.en: A pilgrim in the earth am I,
lines.ko: 죄 속함 받은 백성은 영생을 얻겠네
lines.id: Anak Domba yang sekarat, darah-Mu yang berharga

lines.en: Thy will to me reveal;
lines.ko: 샘솟듯 하는 피 권세 한 없이 크도다
lines.id: Tidak akan pernah kehilangan kekuatannya,

lines.en: To know thy truth my spirit yearns,
lines.ko: 한 없이 크도다 한 없이 크도다
lines.id: Sampai seluruh Gereja Tuhan ditebus,

lines.en: Consumed with ardent zeal.
lines.ko: 샘솟듯 하는 피 권세 한 없이 크도다
lines.id: Selamat, jangan berbuat dosa lagi:

lines.en: Thou dost rebuke the proud, O Lord,
lines.ko: 날 정케 하신 피 보니 그 사랑 한없네
lines.id: Sejak saat itu, dengan iman aku melihat sungai itu

lines.en: Who hate thy holy Name;
lines.ko: 살 동안 받는 사랑을 늘 찬송 하겠네
lines.id: Luka-lukamu mengalir,

lines.en: But since I keep thy righteous laws,
lines.ko: 늘 찬송 하겠네 늘 찬송 하겠네
lines.id: Menganggap kembali cinta telah menjadi temaku,

lines.en: Deliver me from shame.
lines.ko: 살 동안 받는 사랑을 늘 찬송 하겠네
lines.id: Dan akan terus sampai aku mati:

lines.en: I on thy statutes meditate,
lines.ko: 이 후에 천국 올라가 더 좋은 노래로
lines.id: Saat lidahnya terbata-bata dan terbata-bata

lines.en: Though evil men deride;
lines.ko: 날 구속하신 은혜를 늘 찬송 하겠네
lines.id: Kebohongan yang dipinjamkan dosa di dalam kubur,

lines.en: Thy faithful Word is my delight,
lines.ko: 늘 찬송 하겠네 늘 찬송 하겠네
lines.id: Kemudian dalam lagu yang lebih mulia dan lebih manis,

lines.en: My counselor and guide.
lines.ko: 날 구속 하신 은혜를 늘 찬송 하겠네 아멘
lines.id: Aku akan menyanyikan kekuatan-Mu untuk menyelamatkan:

title_en: Christ in his Word draws near

lines.en: Christ in his Word draws near;
Hush, moaning voice of fear,
He bids thee cease;
With songs sincere and sweet
Let us arise, and meet
Him who comes forth to greet
Our souls with peace.
Rising above thy care,
Meet him as in the air,
O weary heart;
Put on joy's sacred dress;
Lo, as he comes to bless,
Quite from thy weariness
Set free thou art.
For works of love and praise
He brings thee summer days,
Warm days and bright;
Winter is past and gone,
Now he, salvation's Sun,
Shineth on ev'ry one
With mercy's light.
From the bright sky above,
Clad in his robes of love,
'Tis he, our Lord!
Dim earth itself grows clear,
As his light draweth near:
O let us hush and hear
His holy Word.

title_en: God in the gospel of his Son

lines.en: God, in the gospel of his Son,
Makes his eternal counsels known;
Where love in all its glory shines,
And truth is drawn in fairest lines.
lines.ko: 그리고 진실은 가장 공정한 선으로 그려집니다.

lines.en: Here sinners of a humble frame
May taste his grace, and learn his Name;
lines.ko: 그분의 은혜를 맛보고 그분의 이름을 배우게 하소서.

lines.en: May read, in characters of blood,
The wisdom, pow'r, and grace of God.
The pris'ner here may break his chains;
lines.ko: 여기 있는 죄수는 그의 사슬을 끊을 수도 있습니다.

lines.en: The weary rest from all his pains;
lines.ko: 그의 모든 고통으로부터 지친 안식을 누리게 하시고

lines.en: The captive feel his bondage cease;
lines.ko: 포로들은 자신의 속박이 사라진 것을 느낀다.

lines.en: The mourner find the way of peace.
Here faith reveals to mortal eyes
lines.ko: 여기서 믿음은 죽을 수밖에 없는 사람의 눈에 드러납니다.

lines.en: A brighter world beyond the skies;
Here shines the light which guides our way
lines.ko: 여기에 우리의 길을 인도하는 빛이 빛난다

lines.en: From earth to realms of endless day.
O grant us grace, Almighty Lord,
lines.ko: 오, 전능하신 주님, 우리에게 은혜를 베푸소서.

lines.en: To read and mark thy holy Word;
lines.ko: 당신의 거룩한 말씀을 읽고 표시하게 하소서.

lines.en: Its truths with meekness to receive,
And by its holy precepts live.

title_en: The heavens declare thy glory, Lord

lines.en: The heav'ns declare thy glory, Lord
In every star thy wisdom shines;
But when our eyes behold thy Word,
lines.ko: 그러나 우리 눈이 주의 말씀을 볼 때에는

lines.en: We read thy Name in fairer lines.
lines.ko: 우리는 당신의 이름을 더 공정한 방식으로 읽습니다.

lines.en: The rolling sun, the changing light,
And nights and days, thy pow'r confess
But the blest volume thou hast writ
lines.ko: 그러나 당신이 쓴 가장 축복받은 책은

lines.en: Reveals thy justice and thy grace
Sun, moon, and stars convey thy praise
lines.ko: 해와 달과 별들이 당신의 찬양을 전합니다

lines.en: Round the whole earth, and never stand;
lines.ko: 온 땅을 돌고 결코 서지 마십시오.

lines.en: So when thy truth began its race,
lines.ko: 그러므로 당신의 진실이 경주를 시작했을 때,

lines.en: It touched and glanced on ev'ry land.
Nor shall thy spreading gospel rest
lines.ko: 당신이 전파하는 복음도 쉬지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: Till through the world thy Truth has run;
Till Christ has all the nations blessed
That see the light, or feel the sun.
Great Sun of Righteousness, arise;
Bless the dark world with heav'nly light:
Thy gospel makes the simple wise,
lines.ko: 당신의 복음은 단순한 사람을 현명하게 만들고,

lines.en: Thy laws are pure, thy judgments right.
lines.ko: 주의 법은 순수하고 주의 판단은 옳으니이다.

lines.en: Thy noblest wonders here we view
lines.ko: 여기서 우리는 당신의 가장 고귀한 경이로움을 봅니다

lines.en: In souls renewed, and sins forgiv'n:
Lord, cleanse my sins, my soul renew,
lines.ko: 주님, 내 죄를 씻어주시고 내 영혼을 새롭게 하소서

lines.en: And make thy Word my guide to heav'n
lines.ko: 그리고 당신의 말씀을 천국으로의 인도자로 삼으소서

title_en: How shall the young direct their way
title_ko: 젊은이들이 자기 길을 어떻게 지도할 것인가 (자체번역)

lines.en: How shall the young direct their way?
lines.ko: 젊은이들은 그들의 길을 어떻게 지도할 것인가?

lines.en: What light shall be their perfect guide?
lines.ko: 어떤 빛이 그들의 완벽한 안내자가 될 것인가?

lines.en: Thy Word, O Lord, will safely lead,
lines.ko: 주님, 당신의 말씀이 안전하게 인도하실 것입니다.

lines.en: If in its wisdom they confide.
Sincerely I have sought thee, Lord,
O let me not from thee depart;
lines.ko: 오 나로 하여금 당신에게서 떠나지 않게 하소서.

lines.en: To know thy will and keep from sin
lines.ko: 주의 뜻을 알고 죄에서 떠나게 하소서

lines.en: Thy Word I cherish in my heart.
lines.ko: 당신의 말씀을 내 마음에 소중히 여기나이다.

lines.en: O blessed Lord, teach me thy law,
lines.ko: 오 복되신 주님, 당신의 법을 나에게 가르쳐 주십시오.

lines.en: Thy righteous judgments I declare;
Thy testimonies make me glad,
For they are wealth beyond compare.
lines.ko: 왜냐하면 그들은 비교할 수 없는 부이기 때문입니다.

lines.en: Upon thy precepts and thy ways
My heart will meditate with awe;
Thy Word shall be my chief delight,
lines.ko: 당신의 말씀은 나의 최고의 기쁨이 될 것입니다.

lines.en: And I will not forget thy law.
lines.ko: 그리고 나는 당신의 법을 잊지 않을 것입니다.

title_en: How precious is the book divine

lines.en: How precious is the book divine,
By inspiration given,
Bright as a lamp its doctrines shine,
To guide our souls to heav'n.
It sweetly cheers our drooping hearts,
In this dark vale of tears;
Life, light and joy it still imparts
lines.ko: 생명과 빛과 기쁨은 여전히 전해지고 있습니다

lines.en: And quells our rising fears.
This lamp, through all the tedious night
Of life, shall guide our way,
Till we behold the clearer light
Of an eternal day.

title_en: Lord, thy Word abideth

lines.en: Lord, thy Word abideth
And our footsteps guideth;
Who its truth believeth
Light and joy receiveth.
When our foes are near us,
lines.ko: 우리의 적이 우리 가까이에 있을 때,

lines.en: Then thy Word doth cheer us;
lines.ko: 그러면 당신의 말씀이 우리에게 용기를 줍니다.

lines.en: Word of consolation,
Message of salvation.
When the storms are o'er us,
And dark clouds before us,
lines.ko: 그리고 우리 앞에 검은 구름이 있고,

lines.en: Then its light directeth
And our way protecteth.
Who can tell the pleasure,
lines.ko: 누가 그 기쁨을 말할 수 있겠습니까?

lines.en: Who recount the treasure,
By thy Word imparted
To the simple-hearted?
Word of mercy, giving
Succor to the living;
Word of life, supplying
Comfort to the dying!
O that we, discerning
Its most holy learning,
Lord, may love and fear thee,
Evermore be near thee.

title_en: O Word of God Incarnate

lines.en: O Word of God Incarnate,
lines.ko: 참 사람 되신 말씀 하늘의 지혜요
lines.id: Ya Sabda Tuhan yang Menjelma,

lines.en: O Wisdom from on high,
lines.ko: 변하지 않는 진리 온 세상 빛이라
lines.id: Wahai Kebijaksanaan dari tempat tinggi,

lines.en: O Truth unchanged, unchanging,
lines.id: Wahai Kebenaran yang tidak berubah, tidak berubah,

lines.en: O light of our dark sky;
lines.ko: 내 길에 등불 되니 늘 찬송하리라
lines.id: Wahai Cahaya langit kita yang gelap:

lines.en: We praise thee for the radiance
lines.id: Kami memuji Engkau atas pancaran cahayanya

lines.en: That from the hallowed page,
lines.id: Itu dari halaman hal-lowed,

lines.en: A lantern to our footsteps
lines.id: Sebuah lentera di langkah kaki kita,

lines.en: Shines on from age to age.
lines.id: Bersinar dari zaman ke zaman.

lines.en: The church from her dear Master
lines.ko: 주께서 세운 교회 이 말씀 받아서
lines.id: Gereja dariMu Tuannya,

lines.en: Received the gift divine,
lines.ko: 그 귀한 빛을 비춰 온 세상 밝힌다
lines.id: Menerima kembali hadiah ilahi,

lines.en: And still that light she lifteth
lines.id: Dan tetap saja cahaya itu dia angkat

lines.en: O'er all the earth to shine.
lines.id: O'er seluruh bumi bersinar.

lines.en: It is the golden casket,
lines.id: Itu adalah peti mati sa-cred

lines.en: Where gems of truth are stored;
lines.id: Dimana permata kebenaran disimpan

lines.en: It is the heav'n-drawn picture
lines.id: Itu adalah gambaran surga

lines.en: Of Christ, the living Word.
lines.id: DariMu, Firman yang hidup.

lines.en: It floateth like a banner
lines.id: Itu melayang seperti spanduk

lines.en: Before God's host unfurled;
lines.id: Sebelum pasukan Tuhan terbentang,

lines.en: It shineth like a beacon
lines.ko: 이 고해 같은 세상 나 평생 지낼 때
lines.id: Itu bersinar seperti suar

lines.en: Above the darkling world.
lines.ko: 그 말씀 나의 길에 등불이 되도다
lines.id: Di atas dunia yang gelap.

lines.en: It is the chart and compass
lines.id: Itu adalah Bagan dan Kompas

lines.en: That o'er life's surging sea,
lines.id: Itu adalah lautan kehidupan yang bergelombang,

lines.en: 'Mid mists and rocks and quicksands,
lines.id: 'Di tengah kabut, bebatuan, dan pasir hisap,

lines.en: Still guides, O Christ, to thee.
lines.id: Masih membimbing, ya Kristus, kepada-Mu.

lines.en: O make thy church, dear Saviour,
lines.ko: 주님의 몸 된 교회 빛나는 등 되어
lines.id: O, jadikanlah Gereja-Mu, Juruselamat yang terkasih,

lines.en: A lamp of purest gold,
lines.ko: 이 세상 만민 앞에 비추게 하소서
lines.id: Sebuah lampu dari emas paling murni,

lines.en: To bear before the nations
lines.id: Untuk menanggung dihadapan bangsa-bangsa

lines.en: Thy true light, as of old.
lines.ko: 주 얼굴 볼 때까지 잘 가게 하소서 아멘
lines.id: Cahaya sejatimu seperti dulu.

lines.en: O teach thy wand'ring pilgrims
lines.id: Wahai ajarilah para peziarah wan-d'ring-Mu

lines.en: By this their path to trace,
lines.id: Dengan ini jalan mereka untuk dilacak,

lines.en: Till, clouds and darkness ended,
lines.id: Hingga awan dan kegelapan berakhir,

lines.en: They see thee face to face.
lines.id: Mereka melihat-Mu secara langsung. Amin.

title_en: Christ is made the sure Foundation

lines.en: Christ is made the sure foundation,
Christ the Head and Cornerstone,
Chosen of the Lord and precious,
Binding all the church in one;
Holy Zion's help for ever
And her confidence alone.
All that dedicated city,
Dearly loved of God on high,
lines.ko: 높은 곳에 계신 하나님의 사랑을 받은 자여,

lines.en: In exultant jubilation
Pours perpetual melody;
God the One in Three adoring
In glad hymns eternally.
To this temple, where we call thee,
Come, O Lord of hosts today:
With thy wonted lovingkindness
Hear thy people as they pray;
And thy fullest benediction
Shed within its walls alway.
Here vouchsafe to all thy servants
lines.ko: 여기 당신의 모든 종들에게 보증을 베푸소서

lines.en: What they ask of thee to gain,
What they gain from thee for ever
lines.ko: 그들이 당신에게서 영원히 얻는 것은 무엇입니까?

lines.en: With the blessed to retain,
And hereafter in thy glory
Evermore with thee to reign.
Laud and honor to the Father,
Laud and honor to the Son,
Laud and honor to the Spirit,
Ever Three and ever One,
One in might, and One in glory,
While unending ages run.

title_en: Glorious things of thee are spoken

lines.en: Glorious things of thee are spoken,
lines.ko: 시온성과 같은 교회 그의 영광 한없다
lines.id: Hal-hal mulia tentangmu dibicarakan,

lines.en: Zion, city of our God;
lines.ko: 허락하신 말씀 대로 주가 친히 세웠다
lines.id: Zi-on, kota Tuhan kita

lines.en: He whose word cannot be broken
lines.ko: 반석 위에 세운 교회 흔들 자가 누구랴
lines.id: Dia yang perkataannya tidak dapat dilanggar

lines.en: Formed thee for his own abode:
lines.ko: 모든 원수 에워싸도 아무 근심 없도다
lines.id: Membentukmu untuk tempat tinggalnya sendiri

lines.en: On the Rock of Ages founded,
lines.id: Di Batu A-ges ditemukan,

lines.en: What can shake thy sure repose?
lines.id: Apa yang bisa menggoyahkan posisimu yang pasti

lines.en: With salvation's walls surrounded,
lines.id: Dengan dikelilingi tembok keselamatan,

lines.en: Thou may'st smile at all thy foes.
lines.id: Kamu mungkin akan tersenyum pada semua musuhmu.

lines.en: See the streams of living waters,
lines.id: Lihatlah, aliran air yang hidup,

lines.en: Springing from eternal love,
lines.id: Muncul dari cinta abadi,

lines.en: Well supply thy sons and daughters,
lines.ko: 이런 물이 흘러 가니 목마를 자 누구랴
lines.id: Kami akan membekali putra dan putrimu,

lines.en: And all fear of want remove;
lines.ko: 주의 은혜 풍족 하여 넘치고도 넘친다
lines.id: Dan semua ketakutan ingin kembali pindah

lines.en: Who can faint, while such a river
lines.id: Siapa yang bisa pingsan, sementara seperti sungai

lines.en: Ever flows their thirst t'assuage?
lines.id: Ever-er mengalirkan rasa haus mereka

lines.en: Grace which, like the Lord, the giver,
lines.id: Anugerah yang, seperti Tuhan, pemberi,

lines.en: Never fails from age to age.
lines.id: Tidak pernah gagal dari zaman ke zaman.

lines.en: Round each habitation hov'ring,
lines.ko: 주의 은혜 내가 받아 시온 백성 되는 때
lines.id: Selamat, jika dari kota Zi-on

lines.en: See the cloud and fire appear
lines.id: Saya meskipun rahmat seorang anggota,

lines.en: For a glory and a cov'ring,
lines.ko: 세상 헛된 모든 영광 아침 안개 같으나
lines.id: Biarkan dunia meremehkan atau mengasihani,

lines.en: Showing that the Lord is near:
lines.ko: 주의 자녀 받을 복은 영원 무궁하도다 아멘
lines.id: Aku akan bermegah atas nama itu,

lines.en: Thus deriving from their banner
lines.id: Memudar adalah kesenangan dunia,

lines.en: Light by night and shade by day,
lines.id: Semua kemegahan dan pertunjukan kebanggaannya

lines.en: Safe they feed upon the manna
lines.id: Kegembiraan yang utuh dan harta yang abadi

lines.en: Which he gives them when they pray.
lines.id: Hanya anak-anak Zi-on yang tahu. Amin.

lines.en: Saviour, if of Zion's city
I, through grace, a member am,
Let the world deride or pity,
I will glory in thy Name:
Fading is the worldling's pleasure,
All his boasted pomp and show;
Solid joys and lasting treasure
None but Zion's children know.

title_en: The Church's one Foundation

lines.en: The church's one Foundation
lines.ko: 교회의 참된 터는 우리 주 예수라
lines.id: Satu-satunya Fondasi Gereja

lines.en: Is Jesus Christ her Lord;
lines.ko: 그 귀한 말씀 위에 이 교회 세웠네
lines.id: Apakah Yesus Kristus, Tuhannya.

lines.en: She is his new creation
lines.ko: 주 예수 강림 하사 피 흘려 샀으니
lines.id: Dia adalah ciptaan-Nya yang baru

lines.en: By water and the Word:
lines.ko: 땅 위의 모든 교회 주님의 신부라
lines.id: Melalui air dan perkataan.

lines.en: From heav'n he came and sought her
lines.id: Dari surga Dia datang dan mencarinya

lines.en: To be his holy bride;
lines.id: Untuk menjadi mempelai wanita-Nya yang kudus

lines.en: With his own blood he bought her,
lines.id: Dengan darah-Nya sendiri Dia membelinya,

lines.en: And for her life he died.
lines.id: Dan untuk hidupnya Dia mati.

lines.en: Elect from ev'ry nation,
lines.ko: 온 세계 모든 교회 한 몸을 이루어
lines.id: Pilihan dari setiap bangsa,

lines.en: Yet one o'er all the earth,
lines.ko: 한 주님 섬기면서 한 믿음 가지네
lines.id: Namun di seluruh bumi

lines.en: Her charter of salvation
lines.ko: 한 이름 찬송 하고 한 성경 읽으며
lines.id: Piagam penyelamatannya

lines.en: One Lord, one faith, one birth;
lines.ko: 다 같은 소망 품고 늘 은혜 받도다
lines.id: Satu Tuhan, satu keyakinan, satu kelahiran

lines.en: One holy Name she blesses,
lines.id: Satu nama suci yang dia berkati

lines.en: Partakes one holy food.
lines.id: Par-mengambil satu makanan suci

lines.en: And to one hope she presses,
lines.id: Dan dengan satu harapan dia menekannya,

lines.en: With ev'ry grace endued.
lines.id: Dengan rahmat yang sudah jatuh tempo.

lines.en: Though with a scornful wonder
lines.ko: 땅 위의 모든 교회 주 안에 있어서
lines.id: Dan dia di bumi memiliki persatuan

lines.en: Men see her sore oppressed,
lines.id: Bersama Tuhan, Tiga dalam Satu,

lines.en: By schisms rent asunder,
lines.ko: 오 주여 복을 주사 저 성도들같이
lines.id: Dan persekutuan manis yang mistis

lines.en: By heresies distressed,
lines.ko: 우리도 주와 함께 늘 살게 하소서 아멘
lines.id: Dengan mereka yang istirahatnya dimenangkan

lines.en: Yet saints their watch are keeping,
lines.id: Oh, yang bahagia dan suci!

lines.en: Their cry goes up, "How long?"
lines.id: Tuhan, berilah kami rahmat agar kami,

lines.en: And soon the night of weeping
lines.id: Seperti mereka, orang yang lemah lembut dan rendah hati,

lines.en: Shall be the morn of song.
lines.id: Di tempat tinggi boleh tinggal bersamaMu. Amin.

lines.en: The church shall never perish!
Her dear Lord to defend,
To guide, sustain and cherish
Is with her to the end;
Though there be those that hate her,
And false sons in her pale,
Against or foe or traitor
She ever shall prevail.
'Mid toil and tribulation,
And tumult of her war,
She waits the consummation
Of peace for evermore;
Till with the vision glorious
Her longing eyes are blest,
And the great church victorious
Shall be the church at rest.
Yet she on earth hath union
With the God the Three in One,
And mystic sweet communion
With those whose rest is won:
O happy ones and holy!
Lord, give us grace that we,
Like them, the meek and lowly,
On high may dwell with thee.

title_en: How sweet and awful is the place

lines.en: How sweet and awful is the place
With Christ within the doors,
While everlasting love displays
The choicest of her stores.
While all our hearts and all our songs
lines.ko: 우리의 모든 마음과 우리의 모든 노래가

lines.en: Join to admire the feast,
Each of us cry, with thankful tongues,
"Lord, why was I a guest?
"Why was I made to hear thy voice,
And enter while there's room,
When thousands make a wretched choice,
lines.ko: 수천 명이 비참한 선택을 할 때,

lines.en: And rather starve than come?"
lines.ko: 오는 것보다 굶는 게 낫지 않을까요?"

lines.en: 'Twas the same love that spread the feast
That sweetly drew us in;
Else we had still refused to taste,
lines.ko: 그렇지 않으면 우리는 여전히 맛을 거부했고,

lines.en: And perished in our sin.
Pity the nations, O our God,
lines.ko: 우리 하나님이여 이방 나라들을 불쌍히 여기소서

lines.en: Constrain the earth to come;
Send thy victorious Word abroad,
And bring the strangers home.
We long to see thy churches full,
lines.ko: 우리는 당신의 교회가 가득 차는 것을 보고 싶습니다.

lines.en: That all the chosen race
May, with one voice and heart and soul,
Sing thy redeeming grace.

title_en: Behold! the mountain of the Lord

lines.en: Behold! the mountain of the Lord
In latter days shall rise
On mountain tops above the hills,
And draw the wond'ring eyes.
To this the joyful nations round,
All tribes and tongues, shall flow;
Up to the hill of God, they'll say,
And to his house we'll go.
The beam that shines from Zion hill
Shall lighten ev'ry land;
The King who reigns in Salem's tow'rs
Shall all the world command.
Among the nations he shall judge;
His judgments truth shall guide;
His sceptre shall protect the just,
And quell the sinner's pride.
Come then, O house of Jacob, come
To worship at his shrine;
And, walking in the light of God,
With holy beauties shine.

title_en: Christ hath a garden walled around
title_ko: 그리스도께서는 벽으로 둘러싸인 동산을 갖고 계십니다. (자체번역)

lines.en: Christ hath a garden walled around,
lines.ko: 그리스도께서는 담으로 둘러싸인 동산을 갖고 계십니다.

lines.en: A Paradise of fruitful ground,
Chosen by love and fenced by grace
From out the world's wide wilderness.
Like trees of spice his servants stand,
There planted by his mighty hand;
By Eden's gracious streams, that flow
lines.ko: 에덴의 은혜로운 시냇물 따라 그 흐름

lines.en: To feed their beauty where they grow.
lines.ko: 그들이 자라는 곳에서 아름다움을 키우기 위해.

lines.en: Awake, O wind of heav'n and bear
Their sweetest perfume through the air:
lines.ko: 공기를 통해 전달되는 가장 달콤한 향기:

lines.en: Stir up, O south, the boughs that bloom,
Till the beloved Master come:
That he may come, and linger yet
Among the trees that he hath set;
That he may evermore be seen
To walk amid the springing green.

title_en: Hail to the brightness of Zion's glad morning

lines.en: Hail to the brightness of Zion's glad morning!
lines.id: Salam atas cerahnya pagi gembira Zi-on!
Sukacita bagi negeri-negeri yang berada dalam kegelapan!
Diamlah aksen kesedihan dan duka
Zi-on dalam kemenangan memulai pemerintahannya yang ringan.

lines.en: Joy to the lands that in darkness have lain!
lines.id: Salam atas cerahnya pagi gembira Zi-on!
Telah lama dinubuatkan oleh para nabi Israel!
Salam untuk jutaan orang yang kembali lagi!
Bangsa-bangsa lain dan Yahudi adalah penglihatan yang paling diberkati.

lines.en: Hushed be the accents of sorrow and mourning;
lines.id: Lihatlah. di gurun, bunga-bunga subur bermunculan!
Aliran sungai yang melimpah terus mengalir dalam waktu lama

lines.ko: 이 산과 저 산이 마주쳐 울려
lines.id: Gema gema dari puncak gunung terdengar keras,
Sampah meningkat dalam ver-dure, dan min-gle dalam lagu.

lines.en: Zion in triumph begins her mild reign.
lines.id: Lihat, dari seluruh daratan, dari pulau-pulau di lautan,
Pujian bagi Ye-ho-vah yang naik ke tempat tinggi
Kejatuhan adalah mesin perang dan keributan,
Teriakan penyelamatan terdengar di langit. Amin.

lines.en: Hail to the brightness of Zion's glad morning!
Long by the prophets of Israel foretold!
Hail to the millions from bondage returning!
Gentiles and Jews the blest vision behold.
Lo, in the desert rich flowers are springing,
Streams ever copious are gliding along;
Loud from the mountain tops echoes are ringing,
Wastes rise in verdure, and mingle in song.
See, from all lands, from the isles of the ocean,
Praise to Jehovah ascending on high;
Fall'n are the engines of war and commotion,
Shouts of salvation are rending the sky.

title_id: Salam atas Cerahnya Pagi Sion yang Bahagia

title_en: Zion stands by hills surrounded

lines.en: Zion stands by hills surrounded,
Zion, kept by pow'r divine;
All her foes shall be confounded,
lines.ko: 그 모든 적들은 당황하게 될 것이며,

lines.en: Though the world in arms combine;
Happy Zion,
What a favored lot is thine!
lines.ko: 당신의 은총을 받은 땅이 얼마나 큰지요!

lines.en: Ev'ry human tie may perish;
lines.ko: Ev'ry 인간 관계는 멸망할 수 있습니다.

lines.en: Friend to friend unfaithful prove;
Mothers cease their own to cherish;
lines.ko: 어머니들은 자신의 자녀를 소중히 여기는 일을 중단합니다.

lines.en: Heav'n and earth at last remove;
But no changes
Can attend Jehovah's love.
In the furnace God may prove thee,
Thence to bring thee forth more bright,
lines.ko: 그러면 당신을 더 밝게 빛나게 해줄 것입니다.

lines.en: But can never cease to love thee;
lines.ko: 그러나 결코 당신을 사랑하는 것을 멈출 수는 없습니다.

lines.en: Thou art precious in his sight;
God is with thee
God, thine everlasting light.

title_en: O 'twas a joyful sound to hear

lines.en: From Psalm 122
O 'twas a joyful sound to hear
Our tribes devoutly say,
Up, Israel! to the temple haste,
And keep your festal day.
At Salem's courts we must appear
With our assembled pow'rs,
In strong and beauteous order ranged,
Like her united tow'rs.
O pray we then for Salem's peace;
lines.ko: 오, 그렇다면 살렘의 평화를 위해 기도해 주십시오.

lines.en: For they shall prosp'rous be,
Thou holy city of our God,
Who bear true love to thee.
May peace within thy sacred walls
lines.ko: 당신의 신성한 성벽 안에 평화가 있기를 빕니다

lines.en: A constant guest be found;
With plenty and prosperity
Thy palaces be crowned.
For my dear brethren's sake, and friends
No less than brethren dear,
I'll pray, May peace in Salem's tow'rs
A constant guest appear.
But most of all I'll seek thy good,
lines.ko: 그러나 무엇보다도 나는 당신의 유익을 구할 것입니다.

lines.en: And ever wish thee well,
For Zion and the temple's sake,
Where God vouchsafes to dwell.

title_en: How glorious Zion's courts appear

lines.en: How glorious Zion's courts appear,
The city of our God!
His throne he hath established here,
Here fixed his loved abode.
Its walls, defended by his grace,
No pow'r shall e'er o'erthrow,
Salvation is its bulwark sure
Against th'assailing foe.
Lift up the everlasting gates,
The doors wide open fling!
Enter, ye nations, who obey
The statutes of our King!
Trust in the Lord, for ever trust,
And banish all your fears;
Strength in the Lord Jehovah dwells
lines.ko: 여호와 안에 있는 힘 여호와께서 거하시느니라

lines.en: Eternal as his years.

title_en: Jesus, with thy church abide

lines.en: Jesus, with thy church abide,
lines.ko: 내가 깊은 곳에서 주를 불러 아뢰니
lines.id: Di bawah sayap-Nya aku menawar dengan aman

lines.en: Be her Saviour, Lord and Guide,
lines.id: Meskipun malam semakin larut dan hama terjadi dengan liar,

lines.en: While on earth her faith is tried:
lines.ko: 보좌 앞에 나가니 은혜 내려 주소서
lines.id: Tetap saja aku bisa mempercayai-Nya, aku tahu Dia akan menjagaku

lines.en: We beseech thee, hear us.
lines.id: Dia telah menganggapku kembali dan aku adalah anak-Nya.

lines.en: Keep her life and doctrine pure;
lines.ko: 주가 죄를 살피면 누가 능히 서리요
lines.id: Di bawah sayap-Nya, sungguh tempat perlindungan dalam kesedihan!

lines.en: Grant her patience to endure,
lines.ko: 오직 주만 모든 죄 용서하여 주시니
lines.id: Betapa kerinduan hati tertuju pada peristirahatan-Nya!

lines.en: Trusting in thy promise sure:
lines.id: Seringkali ketika bumi tidak mempunyai obat untuk penyembuhanku

lines.en: We beseech thee, hear us.
lines.id: Di sana aku menemukan kenyamanan dan di sana aku diberkati.

lines.en: May she one in doctrine be,
lines.id: Di bawah sayap-Nya, hai kenikmatan yang sangat berharga!

lines.en: One in truth and charity,
lines.id: Disana aku akan bersembunyi sampai cobaan hidup selesai

lines.en: Winning all to faith in thee:
lines.id: Terlindung, terlindungi, tidak ada kejahatan yang dapat mencelakakanku

lines.en: We beseech thee, hear us.
lines.id: Beristirahat di dalam Yesus, aku semakin aman.

lines.en: May she guide the poor and blind,
lines.ko: 주의 크신 은혜와 그의 능력 바라라
lines.id: Mengharapkan rahmat Tuhan yang besar dan kuasa-Nya

lines.en: Seek the lost until she find,
lines.ko: 주의 깊은 은총에 우리 구원 있으니
lines.id: Di dalam kasih karunia yang penuh perhatian terletak keselamatan kita

lines.en: And the brokenhearted bind:
lines.id: Saya hanya akan percaya dan menunggu Tuhan yang tidak berubah.

lines.en: We beseech thee, hear us.
Save her love from growing cold,
Make her watchmen strong and bold,
Fence her round, thy peaceful fold:
We beseech thee, hear us.
May her lamp of truth be bright,
Bid her bear aloft its light
Through the realms of heathen night:
We beseech thee, hear us.
Arm her soldiers with the cross,
Brave to suffer toil or loss,
Counting earthly gain but dross:
We beseech thee, hear us.
May she holy triumphs win,
Overthrow the hosts of sin,
Gather all the nations in:
We beseech thee, hear us.

title_id: Dari Kedalaman, ya Tuhan, aku menangis

title_en: O thou who the Shepherd of Israel art

lines.en: O thou who the Shepherd of Israel art,
Give ear to our pray'r and thy favor impart;
lines.ko: 우리의 기도에 귀를 기울이시고 당신의 은혜를 나누어 주소서.

lines.en: Thou leader of Joseph, thou guide of his way,
lines.ko: 당신은 요셉의 지도자시요, 그의 길을 인도하시며

lines.en: 'Mid cherubim dwelling, thy glory display.
lines.ko: '그룹 가운데 거하시는 주여, 주의 영광을 나타내소서.

lines.en: In Ephraim's, Manasseh's and Benjamin's sight,
O come thou and save us; awake in thy might.
lines.ko: 오 오셔서 우리를 구원하소서. 주의 힘으로 깨어나소서.

lines.en: O God, give us favor, restore to thy grace;
lines.ko: 오 하나님, 우리에게 은혜를 베푸시고, 당신의 은혜를 회복시켜 주소서.

lines.en: And then we shall live in the light of thy face.
lines.ko: 그러면 우리는 당신 얼굴의 빛 속에서 살 것입니다.

lines.en: From Egypt's dark border a vine thou didst take;
lines.ko: 이집트의 어두운 국경에서 당신은 포도나무를 취하셨습니다.

lines.en: Destroying the heathen didst room for it make.
Where planted it grew at thy sov'reign command,
lines.ko: 심은 곳에서 당신의 통치 명령으로 자랐습니다.

lines.en: With roots deeply set and boughs filling the land.
lines.ko: 뿌리가 깊게 박혀 있고 가지가 땅을 가득 채우고 있습니다.

lines.en: The axe hews it down; it is burned in the fire;
lines.ko: 도끼가 그것을 쳐부수었다. 그것은 불에 태워졌습니다.

lines.en: They perish, rebuked in thy terrible ire.
lines.ko: 그들은 멸망하고 당신의 무서운 진노로 책망을 받습니다.

lines.en: O lay then thy hand on the Man of thy might,
lines.ko: 오, 그렇다면 주의 능력이 많으신 분에게 주의 손을 얹어 주십시오.

lines.en: The Son of Man made to stand strong in thy sight.
lines.ko: 사람의 아들이 당신 앞에 굳게 서게 되었습니다.

lines.en: No more shall we wander, delighting in shame;
lines.ko: 우리는 더 이상 부끄러움을 즐기며 방황하지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: Revive us, O Lord, we will call on thy Name.
lines.ko: 오 주님, 우리를 살리소서. 우리가 주의 이름을 부르리이다.

lines.en: O Lord God of Hosts, us restore to thy grace,
lines.ko: 오 만군의 하나님 여호와시여, 우리가 주의 은혜를 회복하게 하소서.

lines.en: And then we shall live in the light of thy face.
lines.ko: 그러면 우리는 당신 얼굴의 빛 속에서 살 것입니다.

title_en: I love thy Kingdom, Lord

lines.en: I love thy Kingdom, Lord,
lines.ko: 내 주의 나라와 주 계신 성전과
lines.id: Aku mencintai Kerajaan-Mu, Tuhan,

lines.ko: 피 흘려 사신 교회를 늘 사랑 합니다
lines.id: Rumah tempat tinggal-Mu,
Gereja yang telah diselamatkan oleh Penebus kita yang terberkati
Dengan darah-Nya yang berharga.

lines.en: The house of thine abode,
lines.id: Aku mencintai Gereja-Mu, ya Tuhan

lines.ko: 눈동자 같이 아끼사 늘 보호 하시네
lines.id: Dindingnya di hadapan-Mu berdiri,
Sayang bagaikan biji mata-Mu,
Dan grav-en di tangan-Mu.

lines.en: The church our blest Redeemer saved
lines.id: Baginya air mataku akan jatuh,

lines.ko: 내 생명 다하기까지 늘 봉사 합니다
lines.id: Untuknya doaku naik
Kepadanya kepedulian dan jerih payahku diberikan,
Sampai kerja keras dan kekhawatiran berakhir.

lines.en: With his own precious blood.
lines.id: Melampaui kebahagiaanku yang tertinggi

lines.ko: 구주와 맺은 언약을 늘 기뻐 합니다
lines.id: Aku menghargai cara-cara surgawinya,
Komuni manisnya, sumpah khusyuknya,
Nyanyian cinta dan pujiannya.

lines.en: I love thy church, O God:
lines.id: Tentu saja kebenaran-Mu akan bertahan lama,

lines.ko: 진리와 함께 영원히 시온에 넘치네 아멘
lines.id: Kepada Zi-on akan diberikan
Kemuliaan paling terang yang bisa dihasilkan bumi,
Dan kebahagiaan surga yang lebih cerah. Amin.

lines.en: Her walls before thee stand,
Dear as the apple of thine eye,
And graven on thy hand.
For her my tears shall fall,
For her my prayers ascend;
To her my cares and toils be giv'n,
Till toils and cares shall end.
Beyond my highest joy
I prize her heav'nly ways,
Her sweet communion, solemn vows,
Her hymns of love and praise.
Jesus, thou Friend Divine,
Our Saviour and our King,
Thy hand from ev'ry snare and foe
Shall great deliv'rance bring.
Sure as thy truth shall last,
To Zion shall be giv'n
The brightest glories earth can yield,
And brighter bliss of heav'n.

alt_titles: I love thy Kingdom, Lord (tune 2)

title_en: For all the saints who from their labors rest

lines.en: For all the saints who from their labors rest,
lines.id: Orang Suci Surga yang diselamatkan

lines.en: Who thee by faith before the world confessed,
lines.ko: 믿음으로 주 고백했기에 천국에서 큰 영광 누리네
lines.id: Karena aku mengakui Tuhan dengan iman, aku menerima kemuliaan besar di surga.

lines.en: Thy Name, O Jesus, be for ever blest.
lines.id: Haleluya Haleluya

lines.en: Alleluia! Alleluia!
Thou wast their Rock, their Fortress, and their Might;
lines.id: Selebihnya dinikmati di surga

lines.en: Thou, Lord, their Captain in the well-fought fight;
lines.ko: 새 하늘과 새 땅의 영화라 눈물 슬픔 죽음도 없는 곳
lines.id: Ini adalah film tentang langit baru dan bumi baru, tempat tanpa air mata, kesedihan, atau kematian.

lines.en: Thou, in the darkness drear, their one true Light.
lines.id: Haleluya Haleluya

lines.en: Alleluia! Alleluia!
O may thy soldiers, faithful, true, and bold,
lines.id: Orang-orang kudus yang menjadi martir karena iman mereka

lines.en: Fight as the saints who nobly fought of old,
lines.ko: 하나님께 큰 상급 받으니 성 삼위께 다 찬양 드리세
lines.id: Karena telah mendapat pahala yang besar dari Tuhan, marilah kita semua memuji Tritunggal Mahakudus.

lines.en: And win with them the victor's crown of gold.
lines.id: Haleluya Haleluya

lines.en: Alleluia! Alleluia!
The golden evening brightens in the west;
Soon, soon to faithful warriors comes their rest;
Sweet is the calm of Paradise the blest.
Alleluia! Alleluia!
But lo! there breaks a yet more glorious day;
The saints triumphant rise in bright array;
The King of Glory passes on his way.
Alleluia! Alleluia!
From earth's wide bounds, from ocean's farthest coast,
Through gates of pearl streams in the countless host,
Singing to Father, Son and Holy Ghost,
Alleluia! Alleluia!

title_en: Fountain of good, to own thy love
title_ko: 선의 샘, 당신의 사랑을 소유하기 위해 (자체번역)

lines.en: Fountain of good, to own thy love
lines.ko: 선의 샘, 당신의 사랑을 소유하기 위해

lines.en: Our thankful hearts incline;
What can we render, Lord to thee,
lines.ko: 주님, 당신께 우리가 무엇을 드릴 수 있겠습니까?

lines.en: When all the worlds are thine?
lines.ko: 언제 모든 세상이 당신의 것이 됩니까?

lines.en: But thou hast needy brethren here,
lines.ko: 그러나 여기 네게 궁핍한 형제들이 있으니

lines.en: Partakers of thy grace,
Whose names thou wilt thyself confess
Before the Father's face.
And in their accents of distress
Thy pleading voice is heard;
In them thou may'st be clothed and fed
lines.ko: 그 안에서 당신은 옷을 입고 먹을 수 있습니다

lines.en: And visited and cheered.
Thy face with rev'rence and with love
lines.ko: 당신의 얼굴은 경외심과 사랑으로 가득 차 있습니다

lines.en: We in thy poor would see;
lines.ko: 우리는 당신의 가난한 사람들 가운데서 볼 것입니다.

lines.en: O may we minister to them,
And in them, Lord, to thee.

title_en: How beautiful the sight of brethren who agree

lines.en: From Psalm 133
lines.ko: 죄 짐 맡은 우리 구주 어찌 좋은 친군지
lines.id: Betapa besarnya Sahabat yang kita miliki di dalam Yesus,

lines.en: All our sins and griefs to bear!
lines.ko: 걱정 근심 무거운 짐 우리 주께 맡기세
lines.id: Semua dosa dan kesedihan kita harus ditanggung!

lines.en: What a priv-i-lege to car-ry
lines.ko: 주께 고함 없는 고로 복을 받지 못하네
lines.id: Sungguh sebuah hak istimewa untuk dibawa-bawa

lines.en: Ev-'ry-thing to God in prayer!
lines.id: Semuanya kepada Tuhan dalam doa!

lines.en: How beautiful the sight
lines.ko: 시험 걱정 모든 괴롬 없는 사람 누군가
lines.id: Sudahkah kita menghadapi cobaan dan godaan

lines.en: Of brethren who agree
lines.ko: 부질없이 낙심 말고 기도 드려 아뢰세
lines.id: Apakah ada masalah dimana-mana

lines.en: In friendship to unite,
lines.ko: 이런 진실 하신 친구 찾아 볼 수 있을까
lines.id: Kita tidak boleh berkecil hati:

lines.en: And bonds of charity;
lines.ko: 우리 약함 아시오니 어찌 아니 아뢸까
lines.id: Bawalah itu kepada Tuhan dalam doa!

lines.en: 'Tis like the precious ointment, shed
lines.id: Bisakah kita menemukan teman yang begitu setia,

lines.en: O'er all his robes, from Aaron's head.
lines.id: Siapa yang akan berbagi semua kesedihan kita

lines.en: 'Tis like the dews that fill
lines.ko: 근심 걱정 무거운 짐 아니진 자 누군가
lines.id: Apakah kita lemah dan berat la-den,

lines.en: The cups of Hermon's flow'rs;
lines.ko: 피난처는 우리 예수 주께 기도 드리세
lines.id: Cum-bered dengan penuh perhatian

lines.en: Or Zion's fruitful hill,
lines.ko: 세상 친구 멸시하고 너를 조롱 하여도
lines.id: Penyelamat yang Berharga, tetap Perlindungan kita

lines.en: Bright with the drops of show'rs.
lines.ko: 예수 품에 안기어서 참된 위로 받겠네 아멘
lines.id: Bawalah itu kepada Tuhan dalam doa!

lines.en: When mingling odors breathe around,
lines.id: Apakah teman-temanmu memandang rendah, demi kamu

lines.en: And glory rests on all the ground.
lines.id: Bawalah itu kepada Tuhan dalam doa!

lines.en: For there the Lord commands
Blessings, a boundless store,
From his unsparing hands,
Yea, life for evermore;
Thrice happy they who meet above
To spend eternity in love!

title_id: Sungguh Sahabat yang Kita Miliki di dalam Yesus

title_en: Let our choir new anthems raise

lines.en: Let our choir new anthems raise,
lines.ko: 우리 합창단이 새로운 성가를 부르게 해주세요.

lines.en: Wake the mourn with gladness;
God himself to joy and praise
Turns the martyrs' sadness:
Bright the day that won their crown,
Opened heav'ns bright portal,
As they laid the mortal down
And put on th'immortal.
Never flinched they from the flame,
From the torture never;
Vain the foeman's sharpest aim,
Satan's best endeavor;
For by faith they saw the land
Decked in all its glory,
Where triumphant now they stand
lines.ko: 이제 그들은 승리의 자리에 서 있다

lines.en: With the victor's story.
Faith they had that knew not shame,
Love that could not languish;
And eternal hope o'ercame
Momentary anguish.
Up and follow, Christian men!
Press through toil and sorrow;
Spurn the night of fear, and then,
O the glorious morrow!

title_en: Blest be the tie that binds our hearts

lines.en: Blest be the tie that binds
lines.id: Terberkatilah ikatan yang mengikat

lines.ko: 천국의 교제 같으니 참 좋은 친교라
lines.id: Hati kami dalam kasih Kristiani:
Persaudaraan yang memiliki pikiran yang sama
Seperti itu di atas.

lines.en: Our hearts in Christian love:
lines.ko: 하나님 보좌 앞 다 기도 드리니
lines.id: Di hadapan takhta Bapa kita

lines.ko: 우리의 믿음 소망이 주 안에 하나라
lines.id: Kami memanjatkan doa-doa kami yang tekun
Ketakutan kita, harapan kita, tujuan kita adalah satu,
Kenyamanan dan kepedulian kita.

lines.en: The fellowship of kindred minds
lines.id: Kita berbagi kesengsaraan satu sama lain,

lines.ko: 늘 동고동락 하면서 참 사랑 나누네
lines.id: Beban yang ditanggung masing-masing,
Dan sering kali mengalir satu sama lain
Air mata simpati.

lines.en: Is like to that above.
lines.ko: 또 이별할 때에 맘 비록 슬퍼도
lines.id: Saat kita berpisah,

lines.ko: 주 안에 교제 하면서 또 다시 만나리
lines.id: Ini memberi kita rasa sakit di dalam diri kita
Tapi kita akan tetap bersatu dalam hati,
Dan berharap untuk mendapatkan keuntungan.

lines.en: Before our Father's throne
We pour our ardent prayers;
Our fears, our hopes, our aims, are one,
Our comforts and our cares.
We share our mutual woes,
Our mutual burdens bear,
And often for each other flows
The sympathizing tear.
When we asunder part,
It gives us inward pain;
But we shall still be joined in heart,
And hope to meet again.
This glorious hope revives
Our courage by the way,
While each in expectation lives,
And longs to see the day.
From sorrow, toil and pain,
And sin, we shall be free;
And perfect love and friendship reign
Through all eternity.

alt_titles: Blest be the tie that binds our hearts (tune 2)

title_en: We gather together to ask the Lord's blessing

lines.en: We gather together to ask the Lord's blessing;
lines.id: Kami berkumpul untuk memohon berkat Tuhan

lines.en: He chastens and hastens his will to make known;
lines.id: Dia menghajar dan mendesakkan kehendak-Nya untuk menyatakan.

lines.en: The wicked oppressing now cease from distressing:
lines.ko: 내 고통의 멍에를 다 벗게 되니
lines.id: Penindasan jahat kini berhenti menyusahkan,

lines.en: Sing praises to his Name; he forgets not his own.
lines.id: Nyanyikanlah puji-pujian bagi nama-Nya: Dia tidak melupakan nama-Nya.

lines.en: Beside us to guide us, our God with us joining,
lines.id: Di samping kita untuk membimbing kita, Tuhan bersama kita bergabung,

lines.en: Ordaining, maintaining his kingdom divine;
lines.id: Or-dian-ing, mempertahankan kerajaan-Nya yang ilahi

lines.en: So from the beginning the fight we were winning:
lines.id: Jadi sejak awal pertarungan kami menang.

lines.en: Thou, Lord, wast at our side: all glory be thine!
lines.id: Engkau, Tuhan, berada di sisi kami, segala kemuliaan menjadi milik-Mu!

lines.en: We all do extol thee, thou Leader triumphant,
lines.ko: 주 우리의 방패와 창 검 되시니
lines.id: Kami semua melakukan ex-tol kepada-Mu, Engkau Pemimpin yang menang,

lines.en: And pray that thou still our Defender wilt be.
lines.id: Dan berdoalah agar Engkau tetap menjaga pertahanan kami.

lines.en: Let thy congregation escape tribulation:
lines.ko: 큰 환난을 당할 때 늘 도우시니
lines.id: Biarlah jemaah-Mu lepas dari kesengsaraan.

lines.en: Thy Name be ever praised! O Lord, make us free!
lines.id: Namamu selalu dipuji! Ya Tuhan, bebaskan kami! Amin.

title_id: Kita Berkumpul Bersama Memohon Berkat Tuhan

title_en: Lord, thou hast been our dwelling place

lines.en: Lord, thou hast been our dwelling-place
In ev'ry generation;
Thy people still have known thy grace,
lines.ko: 당신의 백성은 아직도 당신의 은혜를 알고 있습니다.

lines.en: And blessed thy consolation:
Through ev'ry age thou heard'st our cry
lines.ko: 모든 시대에 걸쳐 당신은 우리의 외침을 들었습니다

lines.en: Through ev'ry age we found thee nigh,
lines.ko: 모든 시대를 통해 우리는 당신을 가까이서 찾았습니다.

lines.en: Our Strength and our Salvation.
Our cleaving sins we oft have wept,
lines.ko: 우리의 죄를 깨뜨리기 위해 우리는 자주 울었습니다.

lines.en: And oft thy patience proved;
But still thy faith we fast have kept,
lines.ko: 그러나 우리가 금식하는 네 믿음을 여전히 지켰으니

lines.en: Thy Name we still have loved;
lines.ko: 당신의 이름은 우리가 아직도 사랑하고 있습니다.

lines.en: And thou hast kept and loved us well,
lines.ko: 그리고 당신은 우리를 잘 지켜주시고 사랑해 주셨습니다.

lines.en: Hast granted us in thee to dwell,
Unshaken, unremoved.
No, nothing from those arms of love
lines.ko: 아니, 그 사랑의 팔에서는 아무것도 없어

lines.en: Shall thine own people sever;
Our Helper never will remove,
Our God will fail us never.
lines.ko: 우리 하나님은 결코 우리를 실망시키지 않으실 것입니다.

lines.en: Thy people, Lord, have dwelt in thee,
lines.ko: 주님, 당신의 백성이 당신 안에 거했습니다.

lines.en: Our dwelling place thou still wilt be
lines.ko: 당신은 여전히 우리의 거처가 될 것입니다

lines.en: For ever and for ever.

title_en: O praise ye the Lord and sing a new song
title_ko: 오 너희는 여호와를 찬양하고 새 노래를 부르라 (자체번역)

lines.en: From Psalm 149
O praise ye the Lord
And sing a new song,
Amid all his saints
His praises prolong;
The praise of their Maker
His people shall sing,
And children of Zion
Rejoice in their King.
With timbrel and harp
And joyful acclaim,
With gladness and mirth,
Sing praise to his Name;
For God in his people
lines.ko: 자기 백성 안에 계신 하나님을 위하여

lines.en: His pleasure doth seek,
With robes of salvation
He clotheth the meek.
In glory exult,
Ye saints of the Lord;
With songs in the night
High praises accord;
Go forth in his service,
Be strong in his might
To conquer all evil
And stand for the right.
For this is his word:
His saints shall not fail,
But over the earth
Their pow'r shall prevail;
All kingdoms and nations
Shall yield to their sway.
To God give the glory
And praise him for aye.

title_en: O happy land, whose sons in youth
title_ko: 오 행복한 나라여, 그 아들들이 젊어서 (자체번역)

lines.en: From Psalm 144:12-15
O people blest, whose sons in youth,
lines.ko: 오 축복받은 백성이여, 그 아들들은 젊어서,

lines.en: In sturdy strength and noble truth,
Like plants in vigor spring;
Whose daughters fair, a queenly race,
lines.ko: 그 딸들은 아름답고, 여왕 같은 종족이요,

lines.en: Are like the cornerstones that grace
The palace of a king.
O people blest, when flock and field
lines.ko: 오 사람들은 축복을 받습니다, 양 떼와 들판에 있을 때

lines.en: Their rich, abundant increase yield,
And blessings multiply;
When plenty all thy children share,
lines.ko: 네 모든 자녀들이 많이 나눌 때,

lines.en: And no invading foe is there,
And no distressful cry.
O happy people, favored land,
To whom the Lord with liberal hand
Has thus his goodness shown;
Yea, surely is that people blest
By whom Jehovah is confessed
To be their God alone.

alt_titles: O people blest, whose sons in youth

title_en: When in his might the Lord arose

lines.en: From Psalm 126
When in his might the Lord
Arose to set us free,
And Zion was restored
From her captivity,
In transports then of joy and mirth
We praised the Lord of all the earth.
The nations saw with fear
The might of God displayed,
When he at last drew near
To give his people aid;
Great things for us the Lord has wrought,
lines.ko: 여호와께서 우리를 위하여 큰 일을 행하셨으니

lines.en: And gladness to our hearts has brought.
Again refresh us, Lord,
lines.ko: 주님, 다시 한 번 우리를 새롭게 해주세요.

lines.en: With thy reviving love,
And be thy blessing poured
In mercy from above;
By grace revive our hearts again,
lines.ko: 은혜로 우리 마음을 다시 소성케 하소서

lines.en: As streams refreshed by copious rain.
Although with bitter tears
The sower bears his seed,
When harvest time appears
He shall be glad indeed;
For they that in the sowing weep
Shall yet in joy and gladness reap.

title_en: Unless the Lord the house shall build

lines.en: From Psalm 127
Unless the Lord the house shall build,
The weary builders toil in vain;
Unless the Lord the city shield,
The guards a useless watch maintain.
In vain you rise ere morning break,
lines.ko: 아침 쉬기 전에 일어나는 네가 헛되이

lines.en: And late your nightly vigils keep,
lines.ko: 그리고 늦은 밤의 철야 기도는 계속됩니다.

lines.en: And of the bread of toil partake;
God gives to his beloved sleep.
lines.ko: 하나님은 그 사랑하시는 자에게 잠을 주시는도다

lines.en: Lo, children are a great reward,
A gift from God in very truth;
With arrows is his quiver stored
lines.ko: 그의 화살통은 화살과 함께 보관되어 있습니다

lines.en: Who joys in children of his youth.
And blest the man whose age is cheered
By stalwart sons and daughters fair;
No enemies by him are feared,
lines.ko: 그 분 앞에는 어떤 적도 두려워하지 않습니다.

lines.en: No lack of love, no want of care.
lines.ko: 사랑이 부족하지도 않고 보살핌이 부족하지도 않습니다.

title_en: God is the refuge of his saints

lines.en: From Psalm 46
God is the refuge of his saints,
When storms of sharp distress invade;
Ere we can offer our complaints,
Behold him present with his aid.
lines.ko: 그가 그의 도움을 받아 참석하고 있는 것을 보십시오.

lines.en: Let mountains from their seats be hurled
Down to the deep, and buried there,
Convulsions shake the solid world,
Our faith shall never yield to fear.
lines.ko: 우리의 믿음은 결코 두려움에 굴복하지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: Loud may the troubled ocean roar;
In sacred peace our souls abide,
lines.ko: 신성한 평화 속에 우리 영혼이 머물며,

lines.en: While ev'ry nation, ev'ry shore,
Trembles, and dreads the swelling tide.
There is a stream whose gentle flow
Supplies the city of our God;
Life, love, and joy, still gliding through,
lines.ko: 삶, 사랑, 기쁨이 여전히 미끄러지듯 흘러가는데,

lines.en: And wat'ring our divine abode.
lines.ko: 그리고 우리의 신성한 거처를 지켜보고 있습니다.

lines.en: That sacred stream, thy holy Word,
lines.ko: 저 신성한 시내, 당신의 거룩한 말씀,

lines.en: Our grief allays, our fear controls;
Sweet peace thy promises afford,
And give new strength to fainting souls.
Zion enjoys her Monarch's love,
Secure against a threat'ning hour;
Nor can her firm foundations move,
lines.ko: 그 견고한 기초도 움직일 수 없고,

lines.en: Built on his truth, and armed with pow'r.
lines.ko: 그의 진실 위에 세워졌고, 힘으로 무장했습니다.

title_en: Let children hear the mighty deeds

lines.en: From Psalm 78:1-7
Let children hear the mighty deeds
Which God performed of old;
Which in our younger years we saw,
And which our fathers told.
He bids us make his glories know,
lines.ko: 그분은 우리에게 그분의 영광을 알리라고 명하십니다.

lines.en: His works of pow'r and grace;
And we'll convey his wonders down
lines.ko: 그리고 우리는 그의 경이로움을 아래로 전할 것입니다

lines.en: Through ev'ry rising race.
Our lips shall tell them to our sons,
lines.ko: 우리 입술이 그것을 우리 아들들에게 전하기를

lines.en: And they again to theirs;
lines.ko: 그리고 그들은 다시 그들의 것으로 돌아갔습니다.

lines.en: That generations yet unborn
May teach them to their heirs.
Thus shall they learn in God alone
Their hope securely stands,
That they may ne'er forget his works,
lines.ko: 그들이 그의 업적을 결코 잊지 않도록,

lines.en: But practice his commands.

title_en: The Lord will come and not be slow

lines.en: The Lord will come and not be slow,
His footsteps cannot err;
Before him righteousness shall go,
His royal harbinger.
Truth from the earth, like to a flow'r,
Shall bud and blossom then;
And justice, from her heav'nly bow'r,
Look down on mortal men.
Rise, God, judge thou the earth in might,
lines.ko: 하나님이여 일어나사 권능으로 이 땅을 심판하사

lines.en: This wicked earth redress;
For thou art he who shall by right
lines.ko: 당신은 옳은 일을 할 사람이기 때문입니다

lines.en: The nations all possess.
For great thou art, and wonders great
By thy strong hand are done:
Thou in thine everlasting seat
Remainest God alone.

title_en: All earth to him her homage brings
title_ko: 그녀의 경의는 온 땅을 그에게 가져옵니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: From Psalm 22:27-30
The ends of all the earth shall hear
And turn unto the Lord in fear;
All kindreds of the earth shall own
And worship him as God alone.
All earth to him her homage brings,
lines.ko: 온 땅이 그에게 그녀의 경의를 가져오며,

lines.en: The Lord of lords, the King of kings.
For his the kingdom, his of right,
He rules the nations by his might;
All earth to him her homage brings,
lines.ko: 온 땅이 그에게 그녀의 경의를 가져오며,

lines.en: The Lord of lords, the King of kings.
Both rich and poor, both bond and free,
lines.ko: 부자와 가난한 자, 매인 자나 자유로운 자나

lines.en: Shall worship him on bended knee,
And children's children shall proclaim
The glorious honor of his Name.

alt_titles: The ends of all the earth shall hear

title_en: O Christ, our true and only Light

lines.en: O Christ, our true and only Light,
lines.ko: 주의 음성을 내가 들으니 사랑한단 말일세
lines.id: Akulah milikMu ya Tuhan, aku telah mendengar suaraMu,

lines.en: Illumine those who sit in night;
lines.ko: 믿는 맘으로 주께 가오니 나를 영접 하소서
lines.id: Dan itu menyatakan cinta-Mu kepadaku

lines.en: Let those afar now hear thy voice,
lines.ko: 내가 매일 십자가 앞에 더 가까이 가오니
lines.id: Tapi aku rindu untuk bangkit dalam pelukan iman,

lines.en: And in thy fold with us rejoice.
lines.ko: 구세주의 흘린 보배피로써 나를 정케 하소서
lines.id: Dan kehendakku hilang di dalam milik-Mu.

lines.en: And all who else have strayed from thee,
lines.ko: 주여 넓으신 은혜 베푸사 나를 받아 주시고
lines.id: Konsekrasikan aku sekarang ke dalam pelayanan-Mu, Tuhan,

lines.en: O gently seek; thy healing be
lines.ko: 나의 품은 뜻 주의 뜻 같이 되게 하여 주소서
lines.id: Dengan kuasa rahmat ilahi

lines.en: To ev'ry wounded conscience giv'n;
lines.ko: 내가 매일 십자가 앞에 더 가까이 가오니
lines.id: Biarkan jiwaku memandang dengan harapan yang teguh,

lines.en: And let them also share thy heav'n.
lines.ko: 구세주의 흘린 보배피로써 나를 정케 하소서
lines.id: Dan kehendakku hilang di dalam milik-Mu.

lines.en: O make the deaf to hear thy Word;
lines.ko: 주의 보좌로 나아갈 때에 어찌 아니 기쁠까
lines.id: Wahai kenikmatan murni dari satu jam yang penuh dosa

lines.en: And teach the dumb to speak, dear Lord,
lines.ko: 주의 얼굴을 항상 뵈오니 더욱 친근합니다
lines.id: Itu sebelum takhta-Mu kuhabiskan,

lines.en: Who dare not yet the faith avow,
lines.ko: 내가 매일 십자가 앞에 더 가까이 가오니
lines.id: Saat aku berlutut dalam doa, dan bersamaMu, Tuhanku,

lines.en: Though secretly they hold it now.
lines.ko: 구세주의 흘린 보배피로써 나를 정케 하소서
lines.id: Saya berkomunikasi sebagai teman dengan teman!

lines.en: Shine on the darkened and the cold;
lines.ko: 우리 구주의 넓은 사랑을 측량할 자 없으며
lines.id: Ada kedalaman cinta yang tidak bisa kuketahui

lines.en: Recall the wand'rers from thy fold;
lines.ko: 주가 주시는 참된 기쁨도 헤아릴 수 없도다
lines.id: Sampai aku menyeberangi lautan sempit

lines.en: Unite those now who walk apart;
lines.ko: 내가 매일 십자가 앞에 더 가까이 가오니
lines.id: Ada puncak kebahagiaan yang mungkin tidak bisa kucapai

lines.en: Confirm the weak and doubting heart.
lines.ko: 구세주의 흘린 보배피로써 나를 정케 하소서 아멘
lines.id: Sampai aku beristirahat dalam damai bersamaMu.

lines.en: So they with us may evermore
Such grace with wond'ring thanks adore,
And endless praise to thee be giv'n
By all the church in earth and heav'n.

title_id: Akulah milikMu ya Tuhan, aku telah mendengar suaraMu

title_en: Revive thy work, O Lord

lines.en: Revive thy work, O Lord,
Thy mighty arm make bare;
Speak with the voice that wakes the dead,
And make thy people hear.
Revive thy work, O Lord,
Disturb this sleep of death;
Quicken the smould'ring embers now
By thine almighty breath.
Revive thy work, O Lord,
Create soul-thirst for thee;
And hung'ring for the Bread of Life
O may our spirits be.
Revive thy work, O Lord,
Exalt thy precious Name;
And, by the Holy Ghost, our love
For thee and thine inflame.
Revive thy work, O Lord,
Give pentecostal show'rs:
The glory shall be all thine own,
lines.ko: 영광은 모두 당신의 것이 될 것입니다.

lines.en: The blessing, Lord, be ours.
lines.ko: 주님, 축복이 우리의 것이 되게 하소서.
