title_en: Shout, for the blessed Jesus reigns

lines.en: Mas-ter, the tem-pest is rag-ing!
lines.ko: 구주여 광풍이 불어 큰 물결이 일어나
lines.id: Tuan, badai sedang melanda!

lines.en: The bil-lows are toss-ing high!
lines.ko: 온 하늘이 어둠에 싸여 피할 곳을 모르니
lines.id: Gelombang pasang surut melonjak tinggi!

lines.en: The sky is o'er shad-owed with black-ness,
lines.ko: 우리가 죽게 된 것을 안 돌아봅니까
lines.id: Langit dinaungi kegelapan,

lines.en: No shel-ter or help is nigh
lines.ko: 깊은 바다에 빠지게 된 때 주무시려 합니까
lines.id: Tidak ada tempat berteduh atau pertolongan di dekat sini

lines.en: Car-est Thou not that we per-ish?
lines.id: Apakah Engkau tidak ingin kami binasa?

lines.en: How canst Thou lie a-sleep,
lines.ko: 사납게 뛰노는 파도나 저 흉악한 마귀나 아무것도
lines.id: Bagaimana Engkau bisa tidur,

lines.en: When each mo-ment so mad-ly is threat-'ning
lines.ko: 주 편안히 잠들어 누신 배 뒤엎어 놀 능력이 없도다
lines.id: Ketika setiap momen begitu gilanya menjadi ancaman

lines.en: A grave in the an-gry deep?
lines.ko: 주 예수 풍파를 꾸짖어 잔잔해 잔잔해
lines.id: Kuburan di tengah kemarahan?

lines.en: The winds and the waves shall o-
lines.id: Angin dan ombak akan o-

lines.en: bey My will, Peace, be still!
lines.id: hei kehendak-Ku, Damai, tenanglah!

lines.en: Wheth-er the wrath of the storm-tossed sea,
lines.id: Entah kemurkaan laut yang diombang-ambingkan badai,

lines.en: Or de-mons, or men or what-ev-er it be,
lines.id: Atau setan, atau manusia atau apa pun itu,

lines.en: No wa-ter can swal-low the ship where lies
lines.id: Tidak ada air yang dapat menelan kapal di mana ia berada

lines.en: the Mas-ter of o-cean and earth and skies
lines.id: Penguasa lautan, bumi, dan langit

lines.en: They all shall sweet-ly o-bey My will
lines.id: Mereka semua akan dengan manis menuruti kehendak-Ku

lines.en: Peace, be still! Peace, be still!
lines.id: Damai, tenanglah! Damai, tenanglah!

lines.en: They all shall sweet-ly o-bey My will
lines.id: Mereka semua akan dengan manis menuruti kehendak-Ku

lines.en: Peace, peace, be still.
lines.id: Damai, damai, tenanglah.

lines.en: Through distant lands his triumphs spread;
lines.ko: 구주여 떨리는 내 맘 저 풍랑 과 같아서
lines.id: Master, dengan kesedihan dalam semangatnya

lines.en: And sinners, freed from endless pains,
lines.ko: 사나운 광풍이 자고 큰 물결이 그치니
lines.id: Tuan, teror sudah berakhir,

lines.en: Own him their Saviour and their Head.
He calls his chosen from afar,
They all at Zion's gates arrive;
Those who were dead in sin before
By sovereign grace are made alive.
Gentiles and Jews his laws obey;
Nations remote their off'rings bring,
And unconstrained their homage pay
To their exalted God and King.
O may his holy church increase,
His Word and Spirit still prevail,
While angels celebrate his praise,
And saints his growing glories hail.
Loud hallelujahs to the Lamb,
From all below, and all above!
In lofty songs exalt his Name,
In songs as lasting as his love.

title_en: Sow in the morn thy seed

lines.en: Sow in the morn thy seed,
At eve hold not thy hand;
To doubt and fear give thou no heed,
lines.ko: 의심하고 두려워하는 것에 주의를 기울이지 마십시오.

lines.en: Broadcast it o'er the land.
Thou know'st not which may thrive,
The late or early sown,
God keeps his precious seed alive,
lines.ko: 하나님께서는 당신의 소중한 씨앗을 살아있게 하십니다.

lines.en: When and wherever strown.
Thou canst not toil in vain;
Cold, heat, and moist, and dry,
Shall foster and mature the grain
For garners in the sky.
Thence, when the glorious end,
The day of God is come,
The angel reapers shall descend,
And heav'n cry "Harvest Home."

title_en: Hark! the song of Jubilee

lines.en: Hark the song of jubilee,
lines.ko: 나의 믿음 약할 때 주가 붙드네
lines.id: Ketika saya takut iman saya akan gagal, Kristus akan memegang teguh saya

lines.en: Loud as mighty thunders' roar,
lines.ko: 마귀 나를 꾀일 때 주가 붙드네
lines.id: Ketika si penggoda menang, Dia dapat menahan saya dengan erat.

lines.en: Or the fullness of the sea
lines.id: Dia akan memelukku erat, Dia akan memelukku erat

lines.en: When it breaks upon the shore.
lines.id: Karena Juruselamatku sangat mencintaiku. Dia akan memelukku dengan cepat.

lines.en: Hallelujah! for the Lord
God omnipotent shall reign;
Hallelujah! let the word
Echo round the earth and main.
Hallelujah! hark, the sound,
lines.id: Aku tidak akan pernah bisa menahan tanganku, Dia akan memelukku erat

lines.en: From the depths unto the skies,
lines.ko: 나의 사랑 식을 때 주가 붙드네
lines.id: Karena cintaku seringkali dingin, Dia harus memelukku erat-erat.

lines.en: Wakes above, beneath, around,
lines.id: Dia akan memelukku erat, Dia akan memelukku erat

lines.en: All creation's harmonies:
lines.id: Karena Juruselamatku sangat mencintaiku. Dia akan memelukku dengan cepat.

lines.en: See Jehovah's banner furled,
Sheathed his sword; he speaks'tis done,
And the kingdoms of his world
Are the kingdoms of his Son.
He shall reign from pole to pole
lines.id: Aku berharga di mata-Nya, Dia akan memelukku erat-erat

lines.en: With illimitable sway;
lines.id: Mereka yang Dia selamatkan adalah kesenangan-Nya, Dia akan memelukku erat-erat.

lines.en: He shall reign when, like a scroll,
lines.id: Dia akan memelukku erat, Dia akan memelukku erat

lines.en: Yonder heav'ns have passed away;
lines.id: Karena Juruselamatku sangat mencintaiku. Dia akan memelukku dengan cepat.

lines.en: Then the end; beneath his rod
Man's last enemy shall fall;
Hallelujah! Christ in God,
God in Christ, is all in all.

title_en: My people, give ear, attend to my word
title_ko: 내 백성아, 귀를 기울여 내 말에 주의하라 (자체번역)

lines.en: From Psalm 78
My people, give ear, attend to my word,
lines.ko: 내 백성아, 귀를 기울여 내 말에 주의하라.

lines.en: In parables new deep truths shall be heard;
lines.ko: 비유를 통해 새롭고 깊은 진리를 듣게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: The wonderful story our fathers made known
To children succeeding by us must be shown.
lines.ko: 우리가 성공하는 모습을 아이들에게 보여줘야 합니다.

lines.en: Instructing our sons we gladly record
lines.ko: 우리 아들들에게 지시하는 내용을 기꺼이 녹음합니다.

lines.en: The praises, the works, the might of the Lord,
For he has commanded that what he has done
Be passed in tradition from father to son.
Let children thus learn from history's light
To hope in our God and walk in his sight,
lines.ko: 우리 하나님께 소망을 두고 그의 앞에서 행하기를 원하노라

lines.en: The God of their fathers to fear and obey,
lines.ko: 그들의 조상의 하나님을 경외하고 순종하게 하셨으니

lines.en: And ne'er like their fathers to turn from his way.
lines.ko: 그리고 그들의 아버지가 그의 길에서 돌아서는 것을 결코 좋아하지 않습니다.

lines.en: The story be told, to warn and restrain,
Of hearts that were hard, rebellions, and vain,
Of soldiers who faltered when battle was near,
Who kept not God's cov'nant nor walked in his fear.
lines.ko: 그는 하나님의 언약을 지키지 아니하고 하나님을 경외함으로 행하지 아니한 자라

lines.en: God's wonderful works to them he had shown,
His marvelous deeds their fathers had known;
lines.ko: 그분의 놀라운 일들을 그들의 조상들은 알고 있었습니다.

lines.en: He made for their pathway the waters divide,
lines.ko: 그분께서는 그들의 길을 위해 물이 갈라지게 하시고

lines.en: His glorious pillar of cloud was their guide.
lines.ko: 그분의 영광스러운 구름 기둥이 그들의 인도자가 되었습니다.

lines.en: Unharmed through the sea, where perished their foe,
lines.ko: 그들의 적들이 멸망한 바다를 무사히 통과하여,

lines.en: He caused them with ease and safety to go;
lines.ko: 그분은 그들을 편안하고 안전하게 가게 하셨습니다.

lines.en: His holy land gaining, in peace they were brought
lines.ko: 그의 성지를 획득하고, 평화롭게 그들은 데려왔네

lines.en: To dwell in the mountain the Lord's hand had bought.
lines.ko: 주님의 손으로 사신 산에 거하게 하셨습니다.

lines.en: He gave them the land, a heritage fair;
lines.ko: 그분은 그들에게 유산 시장인 땅을 주셨습니다.

lines.en: The nations that dwelt in wickedness there
He drove out before them with great overthrow,
lines.ko: 그는 큰 패망으로 그들 앞에서 몰아냈고

lines.en: And gave to his people the tents of the foe.
His servant he called, a shepherd of sheep,
From tending his flock, the people to keep;
lines.ko: 그의 양 떼를 돌보는 것에서 사람들을 지키십시오.

lines.en: So David, their shepherd, with wisdom and might
lines.ko: 그리하여 그들의 목자인 다윗은 지혜와 능력을 가지고

lines.en: Protected and fed them and led them aright.
lines.ko: 그들을 보호하고 먹이며 올바른 방향으로 인도했습니다.

title_en: Lord of the worlds above

lines.en: From Psalm 84
Lord of the worlds above,
How pleasant and how fair
The dwellings of thy love,
Thine earthly temples, are:
To thine abode my heart aspires,
With warm desires to see my God.
lines.ko: 나의 하나님을 뵙고 싶은 뜨거운 소망으로.

lines.en: O happy souls that pray
Where God appoints to hear!
O happy men that pay
Their constant service there!
They praise thee still; and happy they
lines.ko: 그들은 여전히 ​​당신을 찬양합니다. 그리고 그들은 행복하다

lines.en: That love the way to Zion's hill.
They go from strength to strength,
Through this dark vale of tears,
Till each arrives at length,
Till each in heav'n appears:
O glorious seat, where God, our King,
lines.ko: 오 영광스러운 보좌, 우리의 왕이신 하느님께서 계신 곳,

lines.en: Shall thither bring our willing feet!
God is our Sun and Shield,
Our Light and our Defense;
With gifts his hands are filled;
lines.ko: 그의 손은 선물로 가득 차 있습니다.

lines.en: We draw our blessings thence.
Thrice happy he, O God of hosts,
lines.ko: 오 만군의 하나님, 그분은 세 배로 기뻐하십니다.

lines.en: Whose spirit trusts alone in thee.

title_en: O God of hosts, the mighty Lord

lines.en: O God of hosts, the mighty Lord,
How lovely is the place
Where thou, enthroned in glory, show'st
lines.ko: 영광 중에 계신 주께서 어디를 보이시나이까

lines.en: The brightness of thy face.
O Lord of hosts, my King and God,
lines.ko: 오 만군의 여호와, 나의 왕이시며 하나님이시여,

lines.en: How highly blest are they
Who in thy temple always dwell,
And there thy praise display.
Thrice happy they whose choice has thee
lines.ko: 당신을 선택하는 사람들은 세 배로 행복합니다

lines.en: Their sure protection made;
Who long to tread the sacred ways
That to thy dwelling lead.
For in thy courts one single day
'Tis better to attend,
Than, Lord, in any place besides
A thousand days to spend.
For God, who is our Sun and Shield,
Will grace and glory give;
And no good thing will he withhold
lines.ko: 그리고 그는 어떤 좋은 것도 아끼지 않을 것입니다

lines.en: From them that justly live.
Thou God, whom heav'nly hosts obey,
How highly blest is he
lines.ko: 그 사람은 얼마나 큰 축복을 받았나요?

lines.en: Whose hope and trust, securely placed,
lines.ko: 누구의 희망과 신뢰가 안전하게 놓여 있는지,

lines.en: Is still reposed on thee.

title_en: Open now the gates of beauty

lines.en: From Psalm 84
Open now thy gates of beauty,
Zion, let me enter there,
Where my soul in joyful duty
lines.ko: 내 영혼이 즐거운 의무를 다하는 곳

lines.en: Waits for him who answers prayer.
Oh, how blessed is this place,
Filled with solace, light, and grace!
lines.ko: 위안과 빛과 은혜로 가득 차 있습니다!

lines.en: Lord, my God, I come before thee,
lines.ko: 주 나의 하나님, 내가 주 앞에 섰습니다.

lines.en: Come thou also unto me;
Where we find thee and adore thee,
lines.ko: 우리가 당신을 찾고 당신을 숭배하는 곳,

lines.en: There a heav'n on earth must be.
To my heart, O enter thou,
Let it be thy temple now!
lines.ko: 이제 그것이 당신의 성전이 되게 하십시오!

lines.en: Here thy praise is gladly chanted,
lines.ko: 여기서는 당신의 찬양이 기쁘게 노래되고 있습니다.

lines.en: Here thy seed is duly sown;
Let my soul, where it is planted,
Bring forth precious sheaves alone,
So that all I hear may be
Fruitful unto life in me.
lines.ko: 내 안에 생명에 이르게 하는 열매를 맺는다.

lines.en: Thou my faith increase and quicken,
Let me keep thy gift divine,
Howsoe'er temptations thicken;
May thy Word still o'er me shine
lines.ko: 당신의 말씀이 여전히 나를 빛나게 하소서

lines.en: As my guiding star through life,
As my comfort in my strife.
Speak, O God, and I will hear thee,
Let thy will be done indeed;
May I undisturbed draw near thee
lines.ko: 내가 방해받지 않고 당신에게 가까이 다가갈 수 있기를 바랍니다

lines.en: While thou dost thy people feed.
Here of live the fountain flows,
Here is balm for all our woes.
lines.ko: 여기 우리의 모든 불행을 위한 유향이 있습니다.

title_en: O Lord of hosts, how lovely the place

lines.en: From Psalm 84
lines.ko: 주 사랑 안에 살면 두려움 없으며
lines.id: Dalam tawaran cinta surgawi,

lines.en: No change my heart shall fear,
lines.ko: 그 사랑 변함없어 늘 마음 편하다
lines.id: Tidak ada perubahan yang akan membuat hatiku takut,

lines.en: And safe is such con-fid-ing,
lines.ko: 저 폭풍 몰아쳐서 내 마음 떨려도
lines.id: Dan aman adalah rasa percaya diri,

lines.en: For noth-ing chan-ges here.
lines.ko: 주 나의 곁에 계셔 겁 낼 것 없어라
lines.id: Tidak ada perubahan apa pun di sini.

lines.en: O Lord of Hosts, how lovely
lines.id: Kemana pun Dia membimbingku,

lines.en: The place where thou dost dwell!
lines.ko: 주 인도 하는 대로 늘 따라가리라
lines.id: Tidak ada keinginan yang akan membuat saya kembali

lines.en: Thy tabernacles holy
lines.ko: 그 지혜 나를 깨쳐 내 앞길 밝히니
lines.id: Gembalaku ada di sampingku,

lines.en: In pleasantness excel.
lines.ko: 나 주의 길을 따라 주 함께 살리라
lines.id: Dan tidak ada yang kurang dariku.

lines.en: My soul is longing, fainting,
lines.id: Kebijaksanaannya selalu terjaga,

lines.en: Jehovah's courts to see;
lines.id: Cahaya-Nya tidak pernah redup

lines.en: My heart and flesh are crying,
lines.id: Dia mengetahui jalan yang Dia ambil,

lines.en: O living God, for thee.
lines.id: Dan aku akan berjalan bersama Dia.

lines.en: Blest who thy house inhabit,
lines.ko: 저 넓고 푸른 들판 내 앞에 열리고
lines.id: Padang rumput hijau ada di hadapanku,

lines.en: They ever give thee praise;
lines.ko: 그 검은 구름 걷혀 새 하늘 보인다
lines.id: Yang belum saya lihat

lines.en: Blest all whom thou dost strengthen,
lines.ko: 끝 없는 나의 소망 저 환한 생명 길
lines.id: Langit cerah akan segera menimpaku,

lines.en: Who love the sacred ways.
lines.ko: 참 보배 되신 주님 늘 함께 하소서 아멘
lines.id: Tempat dimana awan paling gelap berada.

lines.en: So they from strength unwearied
lines.id: Harapanku tak dapat kuukur,

lines.en: Go forward unto strength,
lines.id: Jalan menuju hidup itu gratis,

lines.en: Till they appear in Zion
lines.id: Juruselamatku mempunyai hartaku,

lines.en: Before the Lord at length.
lines.id: Dan Dia akan berjalan bersamaku. Amin.

lines.en: O hear, Lord God of Jacob,
To me an answer yield;
The face of thine Anointed,
Behold, O God, our shield.
One day excels a thousand
If spent thy courts within;
I'll choose thy threshold, rather
Than dwell in tents of sin.
Our sun and shield, Jehovah,
Will grace and glory give;
No good will he deny them
That uprightly do live.
O God of Hosts, Jehovah,
How blest is ev'ry one
Who confidence reposes
On thee, O Lord, alone.

title_en: Praise waits for thee in Zion

lines.en: From Psalm 65:1-5
Praise waits for thee in Zion;
All men shall worship there
And pay their vows before thee,
O God who hearest prayer.
Our sins rise up against us,
Prevailing day by day,
But thou wilt show us mercy
lines.ko: 그러나 당신은 우리에게 자비를 베푸실 것입니다

lines.en: And take their guilt away.
How blest the man thou callest
lines.ko: 네가 부르는 사람은 얼마나 복된 사람인가

lines.en: And bringest near to thee,
That in thy courts for ever
His dwelling place may be;
He shall within thy temple
Be satisfied with grace,
And filled with all the goodness
lines.ko: 그리고 모든 좋은 것으로 가득 차

lines.en: Of thy most holy place.
O God of our salvation,
Since thou dost love the right,
Thou wilt an answer send us
In wondrous deeds of might.
In all earth's habitations,
On all the boundless sea,
Man finds no sure reliance,
No peace, apart from thee.

title_en: Within thy temple, Lord

lines.en: From Psalm 48:9-14
Within thy temple, Lord,
We on thy mercies dwell;
Far as thy Name is known,
There doth thy praise excel:
Thy praises sound through ev'ry land,
lines.ko: 당신의 찬양이 온 땅에 울려 퍼지고,

lines.en: And right thy scepter shall command.
lines.ko: 그리고 당신의 홀이 바로 명령할 것입니다.

lines.en: Let Zion's mount rejoice,
Let Judah's daughters praise
The Lord with cheerful voice,
For judgment he displays;
Go round the walls on Zion's mount,
Go round her splendors to recount.
The tow'rs of Zion tell,
Her palaces survey,
Mark all her bulwarks well,
And to your children say:
This God for ever shall abide,
Ev'n unto death, our God and guide.

title_en: Lo! God is here:  let us adore
title_ko: 봐라! 하느님은 여기 계십니다. 우리가 경배합시다 (자체번역)

lines.en: Lo! God is here: let us adore,
lines.ko: 로! 하느님께서 여기 계십니다. 우리가 흠숭합시다.

lines.en: And own how dreadful is this place;
lines.ko: 그리고 이곳이 얼마나 무서운 곳인지 알아보세요.

lines.en: Let all within us feel his pow'r,
lines.ko: 우리 안의 모든 사람이 그분의 능력을 느끼게 해주세요.

lines.en: And humbly bow before his face.
lines.ko: 그리고 그의 얼굴 앞에 겸손히 절하십시오.

lines.en: Lo! God is here, whom day and night
United choirs of angels praise;
To him, enthron'd above all height,
The host of heav'n their anthems raise.
Almighty Father, may our praise
lines.ko: 전능하신 아버지, 우리의 찬양이 되게 하소서

lines.en: Thy courts with grateful fragrance fill;
lines.ko: 당신의 뜰은 감사하는 향기로 가득 차 있습니다.

lines.en: Still may we stand before thy face,
lines.ko: 그래도 우리가 당신 앞에 설 수 있게 하소서.

lines.en: Still hear and do thy sovereign will.
lines.ko: 여전히 당신의 주권적인 뜻을 듣고 행하십시오.

lines.en: To Father, Son, and Holy Ghost,
The God whom earth and heav'n adore,
From men and from the angel host
Be praise and glory evermore.

title_en: Jesus, where'er thy people meet

lines.en: Jesus, where'er thy people meet,
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, di mana pun umat-Mu bertemu,

lines.en: There they behold thy mercy-seat;
lines.id: Di sana mereka melihat kursi belas kasihan-Mu

lines.en: Where'er they seek thee, thou art found,
lines.id: Di mana pun mereka mencari Engkau, Engkau ditemukan,

lines.en: And ev'ry place is hallowed ground.
lines.id: Dan di setiap tempat di tanah suci.

lines.en: For thou, within no walls confined,
lines.id: Bagi-Mu, tanpa tembok yang terkurung,

lines.en: Inhabitest the humble mind;
lines.id: Jangan tinggal bersama orang-orang yang berpikiran rendah hati

lines.en: Such ever bring thee where they come,
lines.id: Orang-orang seperti itu selalu membawa-Mu ke mana pun mereka datang,

lines.en: And going, take thee to their home.
lines.id: Dan, pergi, bawalah Engkau ke rumah mereka.

lines.en: Dear Shepherd of thy chosen few,
lines.id: Gembala Agung dari segelintir orang pilihan-Mu,

lines.en: Thy former mercies here renew;
lines.id: Rahmat-Mu yang dulu ada di sini kembali baru

lines.en: Here to our waiting hearts proclaim
lines.id: Di sini, di hati kami yang menunggu, nyatakan

lines.en: The sweetness of thy saving Name.
lines.id: Manisnya Nama-Mu yang menyelamatkan.

lines.en: Here may we prove the pow'r of prayer
lines.id: Di sini mungkin kita bisa membuktikan kekuatan doa

lines.en: To strengthen faith and sweeten care,
lines.id: Untuk memperkuat iman dan mempermanis kepedulian

lines.en: To teach our faint desires to rise,
lines.id: Untuk mengajarkan keinginan lemah kita untuk bangkit,

lines.en: And bring all heav'n before our eyes.
lines.id: Dan bawalah seluruh surga ke depan mata kita. Amin.

lines.en: Lord, we are few, but thou art near;
Nor short thine arm, nor deaf thine ear;
O rend the heav'ns, come quickly down,
And make a thousand hearts thine own.

title_en: Here, O my Lord, I see thee face to face

lines.en: Here, O my Lord, I see thee face to face;
lines.ko: 오 나의 주님 친히 뵈오니 영원한 세계 밝히 나타나
lines.id: Di sini, ya Tuhanku, aku melihatMu secara langsung,

lines.en: Here would I touch and handle things unseen,
lines.ko: 한없는 은혜 길이 누리니 주님께 모든 염려 맡기리
lines.id: Di sini saya akan menyentuh dan menangani hal-hal yang tidak terlihat,

lines.en: Here grasp with firmer hand th'eternal grace,
lines.id: Di sini genggamlah dengan tangan yang lebih erat rahmat kekal,

lines.en: And all my weariness upon thee lean.
lines.id: Dan segala keletihanku bersandar pada-Mu.

lines.en: Here would I feed upon the bread of God,
lines.ko: 주님의 떡을 내가 먹으며 주님의 잔을 내가 마시고
lines.id: Di sini aku akan makan roti Tuhan,

lines.en: Here drink with thee the royal wine of heav'n;
lines.ko: 근심의 짐을 벗어 버리니 죄 사함 받아 내 맘 새롭다
lines.id: Di sini minum bersamaMu anggur kerajaan surga,

lines.en: Here would I lay aside each earthly load,
lines.id: Di sini aku akan mengesampingkan setiap beban duniawi,

lines.en: Here taste afresh the calm of sin forgiven.
lines.id: Di sini rasakan segarnya ketenangan dosa yang diberikan.

lines.en: This is the hour of banquet and of song;
lines.ko: 주 예수 밖에 도움 없어서 주님의 팔에 의지 합니다
lines.id: Aku tidak mempunyai pertolongan selain dari-Mu, aku juga tidak memerlukannya

lines.en: This is the heav'nly table spread for me:
lines.ko: 주 권능으로 힘이 솟아서 주 안에 내가 만족 합니다
lines.id: Lengan lain menyelamatkan tangan-Mu untuk bersandar

lines.en: Here let me feast, and, feasting, still prolong
lines.id: Sudah cukup, Tuanku, sungguh sudah cukup!

lines.en: The brief, bright hour of fellowship with thee.
lines.id: Kekuatanku ada pada kekuatan-Mu, pada kekuatan-Mu sendiri.

lines.en: I have no help but thine, nor do I need
lines.ko: 주님의 성찬 받을 때마다 하늘의 기쁨 미리 맛보고
lines.id: Pesta demi pesta datang dan berlalu,

lines.en: Another arm save thine to lean upon:
lines.ko: 어린 양 잔치 참여함 같이 영원한 복을 내가 누리리 아멘
lines.id: Namun, sambil lalu, menunjuk pada pesta gembira di atas,

lines.en: It is enough, my Lord, enough indeed;
lines.id: Memberikan rasa awal yang manis dari kegembiraan pesta,

lines.en: My strength is in thy might, thy might alone.
lines.id: Pesta kebahagiaan dan cinta pengantin Anak Domba yang luar biasa. Amin.

lines.en: Mine is the sin, but thine the righteousness;
Mine is the guilt, but thine the cleansing blood;
Here is my robe, my refuge, and my peace,
Thy blood, thy righteousness, O Lord my God.

title_id: Di sini, ya Tuhanku, aku melihatmu secara langsung

title_en: Father, again in Jesus' Name we meet

lines.en: Father, again in Jesus' Name we meet,
lines.id: Jauh di lubuk hati saya malam ini

lines.en: And bow in penitence beneath thy feet:
lines.id: Menggulung mel-o-d lebih manis dari pada mazmur

lines.en: Again to thee our feeble voices raise,
lines.id: Pada strain yang mirip dengan alam semesta, ia terus-menerus turun

lines.en: To sue for mercy, and to sing thy praise.
lines.id: O'er jiwaku seperti ketenangan yang tak terhingga.

lines.en: Peace! Peace! won-der-ful peace,
lines.id: Perdamaian! Perdamaian! kedamaian yang luar biasa,

lines.en: Com-ing down from the Fa-ther a-bove!
lines.ko: 그 사랑의 물결이 영원토록 내 영혼을 덮으소서
lines.id: Turun dari Bapa di atas!

lines.en: O we would bless thee for thy ceaseless care,
lines.id: Betapa berharganya harta yang kumiliki dalam kedamaian yang menakjubkan ini,

lines.en: And all thy works from day to day declare:
lines.id: Terkubur jauh di lubuk jiwaku,

lines.en: Is not our life with hourly mercies crowned?
lines.id: Amankanlah agar tidak ada kekuatan yang bisa menambangnya

lines.en: Does not thine arm encircle us around?
lines.id: Sementara tahun-tahun e-ter-ni-ty bergulir!

lines.en: Peace! Peace! won-der-ful peace,
lines.id: Perdamaian! Perdamaian! kedamaian yang luar biasa,

lines.en: Com-ing down from the Fa-ther a-bove!
lines.ko: 그 사랑의 물결이 영원토록 내 영혼을 덮으소서
lines.id: Turun dari Bapa di atas!

lines.en: Alas, unworthy of thy boundless love,
lines.id: Aku sedang beristirahat malam ini dalam kedamaian yang menakjubkan ini,

lines.en: Too oft with careless feet from thee we rove;
lines.id: Beristirahat dengan tenang dalam kendali Yesus

lines.en: But now, encouraged by thy voice, we come,
lines.id: Sebab aku terlindung dari segala bahaya siang dan malam,

lines.en: Returning sinners to a Father's home.
lines.id: Dan kemuliaan-Nya membanjiri jiwaku.

lines.en: Peace! Peace! won-der-ful peace,
lines.id: Perdamaian! Perdamaian! kedamaian yang luar biasa,

lines.en: Com-ing down from the Fa-ther a-bove!
lines.ko: 그 사랑의 물결이 영원토록 내 영혼을 덮으소서
lines.id: Turun dari Bapa di atas!

lines.en: O by that Name in whom all fullness dwells,
lines.ko: 이 땅위의 험한 길 가는 동안
lines.id: Ah! jiwa, apakah kamu di sini tanpa kenyamanan atau istirahat,

lines.en: O by that love which ev'ry love excels,
lines.id: Berbaris menyusuri jalur waktu yang sulit

lines.en: O by that blood so freely shed for sin,
lines.id: Jadikan Yesus Temanmu sebelum bayangan menjadi gelap.

lines.en: Open blest mercy's gate, and take us in.
lines.id: Oh, terimalah kedamaian yang manis ini dengan sangat halus!

lines.en: Peace! Peace! won-der-ful peace,
lines.id: Perdamaian! Perdamaian! kedamaian yang luar biasa,

lines.en: Com-ing down from the Fa-ther a-bove!
lines.ko: 그 사랑의 물결이 영원토록 내 영혼을 덮으소서
lines.id: Turun dari Bapa di atas!

title_en: Lord Jesus Christ, be present now

lines.en: Lord Jesus Christ, be present now,
Our hearts in true devotion bow,
Thy Spirit send with grace divine,
lines.ko: 당신의 성령은 은혜로 신성한 것을 보내시며,

lines.en: And let thy truth within us shine.
lines.ko: 그리고 우리 안에서 당신의 진리가 빛나게 해주세요.

lines.en: Unseal our lips to sing thy praise,
lines.ko: 우리 입술을 열어 당신을 찬양하게 하소서.

lines.en: Our souls to thee in worship raise,
lines.ko: 우리 영혼을 예배 가운데 올려 주소서

lines.en: Make strong our faith, in crease our light
lines.ko: 우리의 믿음을 강하게 하시고, 우리의 빛을 더하여 주소서

lines.en: That we may know thy Name aright:
lines.ko: 우리가 당신의 이름을 바로 알게 하소서.

lines.en: Until we join the hosts that cry,
"Holy art thou, O Lord, most high!"
And in the light of that blest place
lines.ko: 그리고 그 축복받은 곳의 빛 속에서

lines.en: For e'er behold thee face to face.
Glory to God the Father, Son,
And Holy Spirit, Three in One!
To thee, O blessed Trinity,
Be praise throughout eternity!

title_en: To thy temple I repair

lines.en: To thy temple I repair;
Lord, I love to worship there,
lines.ko: 주님, 제가 그곳에서 예배드리는 것을 좋아합니다.

lines.en: When within the veil I meet
Christ before the mercy-seat.
While thy glorious praise is sung,
Touch my lips, unloose my tongue,
lines.ko: 내 입술을 만지고, 내 혀를 풀고,

lines.en: That my joyful soul may bless
lines.ko: 나의 즐거운 영혼이 축복할 수 있도록

lines.en: Thee, the Lord my Righteousness.
While the prayers of saints ascend,
God of love, to mine attend;
Hear me, for thy Spirit pleads;
lines.ko: 내 말을 들으십시오. 당신의 영이 간구하오니,

lines.en: Hear, for Jesus intercedes.
While I hearken to thy law,
Fill my soul with humble awe,
lines.ko: 내 영혼을 겸손한 경외심으로 채워 주소서.

lines.en: Till thy gospel bring to me
Life and immortality.
While thy ministers proclaim
Peace and pardon in thy Name,
Through their voice, by faith, may I
Hear thee speaking from the sky.
From thy house when I return,
May my heart within me burn,
And at evening let me say,
"I have walked with God today."

title_en: Hosanna, Lord! Hosanna in the highest!
title_ko: 호산나, 주님! 가장 높은 곳에서 호산나! (자체번역)

lines.en: Hosanna to the living Lord!
Hosanna to the Incarnate Word!
To Christ, Creator, Saviour, King,
Let earth, let heav'n, hosanna sing!
Hosanna, Lord!
Hosanna in the highest!
Hosanna, Lord! thine angels cry;
lines.ko: 호산나, 주님! 당신의 천사들이 울고 있습니다.

lines.en: Hosanna, Lord! thy saints reply;
Above, beneath us, and around,
The dead and living swell the sound:
lines.ko: 죽은 자와 산 자가 소리를 증폭시킨다:

lines.en: O Saviour, with protecting care
Return to this thy house of prayer,
Where we thy parting promise claim,
lines.ko: 우리가 당신의 이별 약속을 주장하는 곳,

lines.en: Assembled in thy sacred Name.
But, chiefest, in our cleansed breast,
Eternal! bid thy Spirit rest:
And make our secret soul to be
A temple pure, and worthy thee:
So in the last and dreadful day,
When earth and heav'n shall melt away,
Thy flock, redeemed from sinful stain,
lines.ko: 죄 많은 얼룩에서 구원받은 당신의 양 떼,

lines.en: Shall swell the sound of praise again:

alt_titles: Hosanna to the living Lord

title_en: God himself is with us

lines.en: God himself is with us:
Let us now adore him,
And with awe appear before him.
lines.ko: 그리고 그 앞에 경외심을 가지고 나타나리라.

lines.en: God is in his temple
All within keep silence,
Prostrate lie with deepest rev'rence.
Him alone
God we own,
Him, our God and Saviour;
Praise his Name for ever.
God himself is with us:
Hear the harps resounding!
See the crowds the throne surrounding!
"Holy, Holy, Holy"
Hear the hymn ascending,
Angels, saints, their voices blending!
lines.ko: 천사들이여, 성자들이여, 그들의 목소리가 섞여 있도다!

lines.en: Bow thine ear
To us here:
Hear, O Christ, the praises
That thy church now raises.
lines.ko: 당신의 교회가 지금 그것을 키우고 있습니다.

title_en: Saviour, again to thy dear Name we raise
title_ko: 구주여, 다시 당신의 사랑하는 이름을 높이세 (자체번역)

lines.en: Saviour, again to thy dear Name we raise
lines.ko: 구주여, 다시 당신의 사랑하는 이름을 높이세

lines.en: With one accord our parting hymn of praise;
We stand to bless thee ere our worship cease;
lines.ko: 우리의 예배가 끝나기 전에 우리는 당신을 축복하기 위해 서 있습니다.

lines.en: Then, lowly kneeling, wait thy word of peace.
lines.ko: 그런 다음 겸손하게 무릎을 꿇고 당신의 평화의 말씀을 기다리십시오.

lines.en: Grant us thy peace upon our homeward way;
lines.ko: 집으로 돌아가는 길에 우리에게 평화를 주소서.

lines.en: With thee began, with thee shall end the day:
lines.ko: 당신과 함께 시작했고, 당신과 함께 하루를 끝낼 것입니다.

lines.en: Guard thou the lips from sin, the hearts from shame,
lines.ko: 입술을 죄에서 지키시고, 마음을 수치에서 지키소서.

lines.en: That in this house have called upon thy Name.
lines.ko: 이 집에서 당신의 이름을 부르는 자들입니다.

lines.en: Grant us thy peace, Lord, through the coming night;
lines.ko: 주님, 다가오는 밤 동안 우리에게 평화를 주소서.

lines.en: Turn thou for us its darkness into light;
lines.ko: 우리를 위해 그 어둠을 빛으로 바꿔 주소서.

lines.en: From harm and danger keep thy children free,
lines.ko: 해악과 위험으로부터 당신의 자녀를 자유롭게 하시고,

lines.en: For dark and light are both alike to thee.
lines.ko: 당신에게는 어둠과 빛이 모두 비슷하기 때문입니다.

lines.en: Grant us thy peace throughout our earthly life,
lines.ko: 우리의 지상 생활 내내 당신의 평화를 주소서.

lines.en: Our balm in sorrow, and our stay in strife;
lines.ko: 슬픔 속에서 우리를 위로하고, 분쟁 속에서 우리를 머물게 하소서.

lines.en: Then, when thy voice shall bid our conflict cease,
lines.ko: 그러면 당신의 목소리가 우리의 갈등을 멈추라고 명령할 때,

lines.en: Call us, O Lord, to thine eternal peace.
lines.ko: 오 주님, 당신의 영원한 평화로 우리를 부르소서.

title_en: Almighty God, thy Word is cast like seed
title_ko: 전능하신 하나님, 당신의 말씀이 씨앗처럼 뿌려졌습니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: Almighty God, thy Word is cast
Like seed into the ground;
Now let the dew of heav'n descend,
And righteous fruits abound.
Let not the foe of Christ and man
lines.ko: 그리스도와 사람의 원수가 되지 못하게 하라

lines.en: This holy seed remove,
But give it root in ev'ry heart
lines.ko: 하지만 모든 사람의 마음에 뿌리를 내리세요

lines.en: To bring forth fruits of love.
Let not the world's deceitful cares
The rising plant destroy,
But let it yield a hundredfold
The fruits of peace and joy.
Oft as the precious seed is sown,
Thy quick'ning grace bestow,
That all those souls the truth receive
Its saving pow'r may know.
lines.ko: 그 절약 능력은 알 수 있습니다.

title_en: Now may he who from the dead

lines.en: I have wan-der'd far in-deed!
lines.id: Aku sudah mengembara jauh!

lines.en: Now I'm wea-ry, weak, and lame,
lines.id: Sekarang aku letih, lemah, dan timpang,

lines.en: Lost in sad-ness, tears, and need,
lines.ko: 예수 예수 내 주여 지금 내게 오셔서
lines.id: Tersesat dalam kesedihan, air mata, dan kebutuhan,

lines.en: Drift-ing list-less, with-out aim!
lines.id: Melayang tanpa daftar, tanpa tujuan!

lines.en: Brought the Shepherd of the sheep,
lines.ko: 예수 예수 내 주여 마음 아파 울 때에
lines.id: Yesus, Yesus, Tuhan dan Sahabat,

lines.en: Jesus Christ, our King and Head,
lines.ko: 다니다가 쉴 때에 쓸쓸한 곳 만나도
lines.id: Saat wan-d'ringku berhenti sejenak untuk beristirahat,

lines.en: All our souls in safety keep.
May he teach us to fulfill
What is pleasing in his sight;
Perfect us in all his will,
And preserve us day and night.
To that dear Redeemer's praise,
Who the cov'nant sealed with blood,
Let our hearts and voices raise
Loud thanksgivings to our God.

title_id: Memang benar aku telah mengembara jauh

title_en: Lord, dismiss us with thy blessing

lines.en: Lord, dismiss us with thy blessing;
lines.ko: 주여 복을 구하오니 편히 가게 하시고
lines.id: Tuhan, rindukan kami dengan nyanyian berkat-Mu,

lines.en: Fill our hearts with joy and peace;
lines.id: Penuhi hati kami dengan sukacita dan kedamaian

lines.en: Let us each, thy love possessing,
lines.ko: 광야 같은 세상에서 항상 인도 하소서
lines.id: Marilah kita masing-masing, pos-ses-cinta-Mu bernyanyi,

lines.en: Triumph in redeeming grace:
lines.id: Kemenangan dalam mempertimbangkan kembali anugerah.

lines.en: O refresh us, O refresh us,
lines.id: Oh, segarkan kembali kami, Oh, segarkan kembali kami,

lines.en: Traveling through this wilderness.
lines.id: Berkelana melewati hutan belantara ini.

lines.en: Thanks we give and adoration
lines.ko: 주의 복된 말씀 듣고 무한 감사합니다
lines.id: Terima kasih kami berikan, dan ad-o-ra-tion,

lines.en: For thy gospel's joyful sound:
lines.ko: 구원받은 주의 성도 열매 맺게 하시며
lines.id: Karena suara Injil-Mu yang penuh sukacita

lines.en: May the fruits of thy salvation
lines.ko: 하나님이 우리 함께 항상 계시옵소서 아멘
lines.id: Semoga buah keselamatan-Mu

lines.en: In our hearts and lives abound:
lines.id: Dalam hati dan kehidupan kita terikat.

lines.en: Ever faithful, ever faithful,
lines.id: Selalu setia, Selalu setia

lines.en: To the truth may we be found.
lines.id: Semoga kita ditemukan kebenarannya. Amin.

lines.en: So that when thy love shall call us,
Saviour, from the world away,
Let no fear of death appall us,
Glad thy summons to obey:
May we ever, may we ever,
Reign with thee in endless day.

title_en: Safely through another week

lines.en: Safely through another week
lines.ko: 지난 이레 동안에 예수 인도 했으니
lines.id: Dengan aman melewati minggu berikutnya

lines.en: God has brought us on our way;
lines.ko: 주의 전에 모여서 감사 찬송 합니다
lines.id: Tuhan telah membawa kita pada jalan kita

lines.en: Let us now a blessing seek,
lines.ko: 가장 복된 이 날은 하늘 안식표로다
lines.id: Marilah kita sekarang mencari berkah,

lines.en: Waiting in his courts today;
lines.ko: 가장 복된 이 날은 하늘 안식표로다
lines.id: Menunggu di istana-Nya hari ini.

lines.en: Day of all the week the best,
lines.id: Hari sepanjang minggu yang terbaik,

lines.en: Emblem of eternal rest.
lines.id: Lambang istirahat abadi!
Hari sepanjang minggu yang terbaik,
Lambang istirahat abadi!

lines.en: While we pray for pard'ning grace,
lines.ko: 주의 공로 힘입어 은혜 주심 빌 때에
lines.id: Sementara kita berdoa memohon rahmat par-d'ning,

lines.en: Through the dear Redeemer's Name,
lines.id: Melalui nama Re-deem-er tersayang,

lines.en: Show thy reconciled face;
lines.ko: 세상 걱정 버리고 은혜 받게 하소서
lines.id: Tunjukkan wajahmu yang sadar,

lines.en: Take away our sin and shame;
lines.ko: 세상 걱정 버리고 은혜 받게 하소서
lines.id: Singkirkan dosa dan rasa malu kami.

lines.en: From our worldly cares set free,
lines.id: Dari kekuatiran duniawi kita terbebas,

lines.en: May we rest this day in thee.
lines.id: Semoga kami beristirahat hari ini di dalam Engkau
Dari kekuatiran duniawi kita terbebas,
Semoga kami beristirahat hari ini di dalam Engkau.

lines.en: Here we come thy Name to praise,
lines.id: Inilah kami datang untuk memuji nama-Mu

lines.en: Let us feel thy presence near;
lines.id: Semoga kami merasakan kehadiran-Mu dekat.

lines.en: May thy glory meet our eyes,
lines.ko: 기쁜 하늘 잔치에 참여 하게 하소서
lines.id: Semoga kemuliaan-Mu terlihat di mata kami,

lines.en: While we in thy house appear:
lines.ko: 기쁜 하늘 잔치에 참여 하게 하소서
lines.id: Sementara kami di rumah-Mu muncul.

lines.en: Here afford us, Lord, a taste
lines.id: Di sini berikan kami, Tuhan, dan rasakan

lines.en: Of our everlasting feast.
lines.id: Dari pesta kita yang abadi
Di sini berikan kami, Tuhan, dan rasakan
Dari pesta kita yang abadi.

lines.en: May thy gospel's joyful sound
lines.ko: 주의 기쁜 복음을 모두 듣게 하시고
lines.id: Semoga Injil-Mu terdengar penuh sukacita

lines.en: Conquer sinners, comfort saints;
lines.id: Taklukkan orang-orang berdosa, hiburlah orang-orang kudus

lines.en: May the fruits of grace abound,
lines.ko: 주님 오실 때까지 이 날 지키리로다
lines.id: Jadikanlah buah rahmat berlimpah,

lines.en: Bring relief for all complaints:
lines.ko: 주님 오실 때까지 이 날 지키리로다 아멘
lines.id: Membawa keringanan kembali untuk semua keluhan

lines.en: Thus may all our Sabbaths prove,
lines.id: Semoga semua hari Sabat kita terbukti

lines.en: Till we join the church above.
lines.id: Sampai kita bergabung dengan Gereja di atas
Semoga semua hari Sabat kita terbukti
Sampai kita bergabung dengan Gereja di atas. Amin.

title_en: O day of rest and gladness

lines.en: O day of rest and gladness,
lines.ko: 즐겁게 안식할 날 반갑고 좋은 날
lines.id: Wahai hari istirahat dan kegembiraan,

lines.en: O day of joy and light,
lines.ko: 내 맘을 편케 하니 즐겁고 기쁜 날
lines.id: Wahai hari yang penuh kegembiraan dan cahaya,

lines.en: O balm of care and sadness,
lines.ko: 이 날에 천하 만민 다 보좌 앞에서
lines.id: Wahai balsem kepedulian dan kesedihan,

lines.en: Most beautiful, most bright;
lines.ko: 참 되신 삼위 일체 다 찬송 부르네
lines.id: Paling cantik, paling cemerlang

lines.en: On thee the high and lowly,
lines.id: PadaMu yang tinggi dan rendah,

lines.en: Through ages joined in tune,
lines.id: Melalui a-ges bergabung selaras,

lines.en: Sing Holy, Holy, Holy,
lines.id: Bernyanyilah Suci, Suci, Suci,

lines.en: To the great God Triune,
lines.id: Kepada Dewa Tritunggal yang agung.

lines.en: On thee, at the creation,
lines.ko: 이 날에 하늘에서 새 양식 내리네
lines.id: Hari ini di negara-negara yang lelah

lines.en: The light first had its birth;
lines.id: Man-na surgawi jatuh

lines.en: On thee, for our salvation,
lines.ko: 복음의 밝은 빛은 온 세상 비치며
lines.id: Untuk kon-vo-ca-tion suci

lines.en: Christ rose from depths of earth;
lines.ko: 또 영생 물이 흘러 시원케 하시네
lines.id: Panggilan terompet perak

lines.en: On thee our Lord, victorious,
lines.id: Dimana cahaya Injil bersinar

lines.en: The Spirit sent from heav'n;
lines.id: Dengan sinar yang murni dan bercahaya,

lines.en: And thus on thee, most glorious,
lines.id: Dan air hidup mengalir

lines.en: A triple light was giv'n.
lines.id: Dengan aliran sungai yang menyegarkan jiwa.

lines.en: Thou art a port protected
lines.ko: 이 주일 지킴으로 새 은혜 입어서
lines.id: Anugerah baru terus diperoleh

lines.en: From storms that round us rise;
lines.id: Mulai hari ini istirahat kita,

lines.en: A garden intersected
lines.ko: 성부께 찬미 하고 성자와 또 성령
lines.id: Kami mencapai sisanya dengan tetap mempertahankannya

lines.en: With streams of Paradise;
lines.ko: 참되신 삼위 일체 다 찬송 부르세 아멘
lines.id: Untuk membangkitkan yang terbaik,

lines.en: Thou art a cooling fountain
lines.id: “Kepada Roh Kudus terpujilah,

lines.en: In life's dry, dreary sand;
lines.id: Untuk Ayah dan anakku!"

lines.en: From thee, like Pisgah's mountain,
lines.id: Gereja meninggikan suaranya

lines.en: We view the promised land.
lines.id: KepadaMu, terberkatilah Tiga dalam Satu. Amin.

lines.en: Today on weary nations
The heav'nly manna falls;
To holy convocations
The silver trumpet calls,
Where gospel light is glowing
With pure and radiant beams,
And living water flowing
With soul-refreshing streams.
New graces ever gaining
From this our day of rest,
We reach the rest remaining
To spirits of the blest.
To Holy Ghost be praises,
To Father and to Son;
The church her voice upraises
To thee, blest Three in One.

title_en: Lord of the Sabbath, hear us pray

lines.en: Lord of the Sabbath, hear us pray,
lines.id: Ada sebuah air mancur yang penuh dengan darah

lines.en: In this thy house, on this thy day;
lines.id: Diambil dari urat nadi Im-man-uel

lines.en: And own, as grateful sacrifice,
lines.id: Dan para pendosa, yang terjerumus ke dalam banjir itu,

lines.en: The songs which from thy temple rise.
lines.id: Hilangkan semua noda rasa bersalah mereka:

lines.en: Now met to pray and bless thy Name,
lines.ko: 저 도적 회개 하고서 보혈에 씻었네
lines.id: Pencuri yang sekarat itu kembali bersukacita melihatnya

lines.en: Whose mercies flow each day the same,
lines.ko: 저 도적 같은 이 몸도 죄 씻기 원하네
lines.id: Air mancur itu pada zamannya

lines.en: Whose kind compassions never cease,
lines.ko: 죄 씻기 원하네 죄 씻기 원하네
lines.id: Dan di sanalah aku, meskipun jahat seperti dia,

lines.en: We seek instruction, pardon, peace.
lines.ko: 저 도적 같은 이 몸도 죄 씻기 원하네
lines.id: Cucilah semua dosaku:

lines.en: Thine earthly Sabbaths, Lord, we love,
lines.ko: 죄 속함 받은 백성은 영생을 얻겠네
lines.id: Anak Domba yang sekarat, darah-Mu yang berharga

lines.en: But there's a nobler rest above;
lines.ko: 샘솟듯 하는 피 권세 한 없이 크도다
lines.id: Tidak akan pernah kehilangan kekuatannya,

lines.en: To that our lab'ring souls aspire
lines.ko: 한 없이 크도다 한 없이 크도다
lines.id: Sampai seluruh Gereja Tuhan ditebus,

lines.en: With ardent hope and strong desire.
lines.ko: 샘솟듯 하는 피 권세 한 없이 크도다
lines.id: Selamat, jangan berbuat dosa lagi:

lines.en: In thy blest kingdom we shall be
lines.ko: 날 정케 하신 피 보니 그 사랑 한없네
lines.id: Sejak saat itu, dengan iman aku melihat sungai itu

lines.en: From ev'ry mortal trouble free;
lines.ko: 살 동안 받는 사랑을 늘 찬송 하겠네
lines.id: Luka-lukamu mengalir,

lines.en: No sighs shall mingle with the songs
lines.ko: 늘 찬송 하겠네 늘 찬송 하겠네
lines.id: Menganggap kembali cinta telah menjadi temaku,

lines.en: Resounding from immortal tongues;
lines.ko: 살 동안 받는 사랑을 늘 찬송 하겠네
lines.id: Dan akan terus sampai aku mati:

lines.en: No rude alarms of raging foes;
lines.ko: 이 후에 천국 올라가 더 좋은 노래로
lines.id: Saat lidahnya terbata-bata dan terbata-bata

lines.en: No cares to break the long repose;
lines.ko: 날 구속하신 은혜를 늘 찬송 하겠네
lines.id: Kebohongan yang dipinjamkan dosa di dalam kubur,

lines.en: No midnight shade, no waning moon,
lines.ko: 늘 찬송 하겠네 늘 찬송 하겠네
lines.id: Kemudian dalam lagu yang lebih mulia dan lebih manis,

lines.en: But sacred, high, eternal noon.
lines.ko: 날 구속 하신 은혜를 늘 찬송 하겠네 아멘
lines.id: Aku akan menyanyikan kekuatan-Mu untuk menyelamatkan:

lines.en: O long-expected day, begin,
Dawn on these realms of woe and sin!
Break, morn of God, upon our eyes;
And let the world's true Sun arise!

title_en: Come, let us join with one accord

lines.en: Come, let us join with one accord
lines.id: Batu A-ges, celah untukku,

lines.en: In hymns around the throne:
lines.ko: 창에 허리 상하여 물과 피를 흘린 것
lines.id: Izinkan aku menyembunyikan diriku di dalam Engkau

lines.en: This is the day our rising Lord
lines.id: Biarkan air dan darah,

lines.en: Hath made and called his own.
lines.id: Dari sisi luka-Mu yang mengalir,

lines.en: This is the day that God hath blessed,
lines.ko: 내가 공을 세우나 은혜 갚지 못하네
lines.id: Bukan hasil kerja tanganku

lines.en: The brightest of the sev'n,
lines.ko: 쉼이 없이 힘쓰고 눈물 근심 많으나
lines.id: Dapat memenuhi tuntutan hukum-Mu

lines.en: Type of that everlasting rest
lines.ko: 구속 못할 죄인을 예수 홀로 속하네
lines.id: Bisakah semangatku tidak tahu lagi,

lines.en: The saints enjoy in heav'n.
lines.id: Bisakah air mataku mengalir selamanya,

lines.en: Then let us in his Name sing on,
lines.ko: 빈 손 들고 앞에 가 십자가를 붙드네
lines.id: Tidak ada apa pun di tanganku yang kubawa,

lines.en: And hasten to that day
lines.ko: 의가 없는 자라도 도와 주심 바라고
lines.id: Cukup pada salib-Mu aku berpegang teguh

lines.en: When our Redeemer shall come down,
lines.id: Telanjang, datanglah kepadamu untuk berpakaian,

lines.en: And shadows pass away.
lines.id: Tak berdaya, mohon rahmat dari-Mu

lines.en: Not one, but all our days below,
lines.ko: 살아 생전 숨 쉬고 죽어 세상 떠나서
lines.id: Selagi aku menarik napas sekilas ini,

lines.en: Let us in hymns employ;
lines.ko: 거룩하신 주 앞에 끝날 심판 당할 때
lines.id: Saat mataku terpejam dalam kematian,

lines.en: And in our Lord rejoicing, go
lines.ko: 만세반석 열리니 내가 들어 갑니다 아멘
lines.id: Ketika saya terbang ke dunia yang tidak diketahui,

lines.en: To his eternal joy.
lines.id: Sampai jumpa di singgasana penghakiman-Mu,

title_en: This day at thy creating word

lines.en: This day at thy creating word
First o'er the earth the light was poured:
O Lord, this day upon us shine
lines.ko: 오 주님, 오늘 우리에게 빛을 비춰주소서

lines.en: And fill our souls with light divine.
lines.ko: 그리고 우리의 영혼을 신성한 빛으로 채우십시오.

lines.en: This day the Lord for sinners slain
lines.ko: 오늘 주님은 죽임을 당한 죄인들을 위해

lines.en: In might victorious rose again:
lines.ko: 승리의 장미가 다시 피어날 수도 있습니다:

lines.en: O Jesus, may we raised be
From death of sin to life in thee!
lines.ko: 죄의 죽음에서 당신 안에 있는 생명으로!

lines.en: This day the Holy Spirit came
With fiery tongues of cloven flame:
O Spirit, fill our hearts this day
lines.ko: 오 성령이시여, 오늘 우리 마음을 채워주소서

lines.en: With grace to hear and grace to pray.
O day of light and life and grace,
From earthly toil sweet resting place,
Thy hallowed hours, blest gift of love,
lines.ko: 당신의 신성한 시간, 사랑의 축복받은 선물,

lines.en: Give we again to God above.
lines.ko: 우리를 위에 계신 하나님께 다시 드리라.

lines.en: All praise to God the Father be,
All praise, eternal Son, to thee,
lines.ko: 영원하신 아들이여, 모든 찬미를 당신께 드립니다.

lines.en: Whom, with the Spirit, we adore
For ever and for evermore.

title_en: Welcome, delightful morn

lines.en: Welcome, delightful morn,
Thou day of sacred rest!
I hail thy kind return,
Lord, make these moments blest;
From the low train of mortal toys
I soar to reach immortal joys.
lines.ko: 나는 불멸의 기쁨에 도달하기 위해 날아오릅니다.

lines.en: Now may the King descend,
And fill his throne of grace;
Thy scepter, Lord, extend,
While saints address thy face;
Let sinners feel thy quick'ning Word,
lines.ko: 죄인들이 당신의 빠른 말씀을 느끼게 하시고,

lines.en: And learn to know and fear the Lord.
lines.ko: 그리고 주님을 알고 경외하는 법을 배우십시오.

lines.en: Descend, celestial Dove,
Will all thy quick'ning pow'rs;
lines.ko: 당신의 모든 빠른 힘이 발휘될 것입니다.

lines.en: Disclose a Saviour's love,
And bless these sacred hours;
Then shall my soul new life obtain,
lines.ko: 그러면 내 영혼이 새 생명을 얻으리라.

lines.en: Nor Sabbaths e'er be spent in vain.

title_en: This is the day the Lord hath made

lines.en: This is the day the Lord hath made;
lines.ko: 이 날 은 주님 정하신 참 기쁜 날일세
lines.id: Inilah hari yang telah Tuhan jadikan

lines.en: He calls the hours his own;
lines.ko: 온 천하 만민 주 앞에 다 찬송 하여라
lines.id: Dia menyebut jam-jam itu sebagai milik-Nya

lines.en: Let heav'n rejoice, let earth be glad,
lines.id: Biarlah surga bergembira, biarlah bumi bergembira,

lines.en: And praise surround the throne.
lines.id: Dan puji-pujian mengelilingi takhta itu.

lines.en: Today he rose and left the dead,
lines.ko: 주 오늘 부활 하시고 사망을 이겼네
lines.id: Hari ini Dia bangkit dan meninggalkan orang mati,

lines.en: And Satan's empire fell;
lines.ko: 구주를 믿는 성도들 그 복음 전하세
lines.id: Dan kerajaan Setan pun jatuh

lines.en: Today the saints his triumphs spread,
lines.id: Hari ini orang-orang kudus kemenangannya menyebar,

lines.en: And all his wonders tell.
lines.id: Dan segala keajaiban-Nya terungkap.

lines.en: Hosanna to th'anointed King,
lines.id: Ho-san-na kepada Raja yang diurapi,

lines.en: To David's holy Son!
lines.ko: 이 날에 주가 오셔서 다 구원 하시리
lines.id: Kepada Putra Suci Daud!

lines.en: Help us, O Lord; descend and bring
lines.id: Tolong kami, ya Tuhan, turun dan bawa

lines.en: Salvation from the throne.
lines.id: Keselamatan dari takhta.

lines.en: Blest be the Lord, who comes to men
lines.ko: 큰 권능 가진 구세주 살 길을 주려고
lines.id: Terpujilah Tuhan yang datang kepada manusia

lines.en: With messages of grace;
lines.ko: 온 세상 만민 가운데 주 함께 계시네
lines.id: Dengan pesan rahmat,

lines.en: Who comes in God his Father's Name
lines.id: Yang datang dalam nama Tuhan Bapa-Nya

lines.en: To save our sinful race.
lines.id: Untuk menyelamatkan ras kita yang penuh dosa!

lines.en: Hosanna in the highest strains
lines.id: Ho-san-na di strain tertinggi

lines.en: The church on earth can raise!
lines.ko: 저 하늘 천군 천사도 다 화답 하여라 아멘
lines.id: Gereja di bumi dapat membangkitkan

lines.en: The highest heav'ns in which he reigns
lines.id: Langit tertinggi tempat Dia bertakhta

lines.en: Shall give him nobler praise.
lines.id: Akan memberi Dia pujian yang mulia. Amin.

title_en: This is the day of light

lines.en: This is the day of light:
Let there be light today;
O Dayspring, rise upon our night,
lines.ko: 오 여명의 봄이시여, 우리의 밤 위에 일어나시어

lines.en: And chase its gloom away.
This is the day of rest:
Our failing strength renew;
On weary brain and troubled breast
Shed thou thy fresh'ning dew.
This is the day of peace:
Thy peace our spirits fill;
lines.ko: 당신의 평화가 우리 영혼을 가득 채웁니다.

lines.en: Bid thou the blasts of discord cease,
The waves of strife be still.
This is the day of prayer:
Let earth to heav'n draw near:
Lift up our hearts to seek thee there;
lines.ko: 우리 마음을 들어 올려 그곳에서 당신을 찾으십시오.

lines.en: Come down to meet us here.
This is the first of days:
Send forth thy quick'ning breath,
And wake dead souls to love and praise,
lines.ko: 그리고 죽은 영혼들을 깨워 사랑하고 찬양하게 하시고,

lines.en: O Vanquisher of death!

title_en: Every morning mercies new

lines.en: Ev'ry morning mercies new
Fall as fresh as morning dew;
Ev'ry morning let us pay
Tribute with the early day:
For thy mercies, Lord, are sure;
Thy compassion doth endure.
Still the greatness of thy love
Daily doth our sins remove;
Daily, far as east from west,
Lifts the burden from the breast;
Gives unbought to those who pray
lines.ko: 기도하는 자에게 사지 아니한 것을 주시느니라

lines.en: Strength to stand in evil day.
lines.ko: 악한 날에도 설 수 있는 힘.

lines.en: Let our pray'rs each morn prevail,
lines.ko: 매일 아침 우리의 기도가 승리하게 하소서.

lines.en: That these gifts may never fail;
lines.ko: 이 선물은 결코 실패하지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: And, as we confess the sin
And the tempter's pow'r within,
Ev'ry morning, for the strife,
Feed us with the Bread of Life.
As the morning light returns,
As the sun with splendor burns,
Teach us still to turn to thee,
lines.ko: 우리에게 여전히 당신께로 향할 수 있도록 가르쳐 주십시오.

lines.en: Ever-blessed Trinity,
With our hands our hearts to raise,
In unfailing prayer and praise.

title_en: As the sun doth daily rise

lines.en: As the sun doth daily rise,
lines.ko: 내 임금 예수 내 주여 이 죄인이 주님 앞에
lines.id: Yesus, Rajaku, di hadapan wajah-Mu

lines.en: Bright'ning all the morning skies,
lines.ko: 한없는 은혜 받고서 내 생명 모두 드리오니
lines.id: Seorang pendosa berdiri, dianggap kembali oleh kasih karunia.

lines.en: So to thee with one accord
lines.ko: 그 풍성하신 은총을 주 내게 내려 주소서
lines.id: Dan atas rahmat ilahi yang tak terbatas itu,

lines.en: Lift we up our hearts, O Lord.
lines.id: KepadaMu kupersembahkan tubuhku ini.

lines.en: Day by day provide us food,
lines.ko: 내 임금 예수 내 주여 내 허물은 덮으시고
lines.id: Rajaku, Tuanku, lihatlah hati ini,

lines.en: For from thee come all things good:
lines.ko: 주 십자가에 흘리신 그 피를 믿는 마음 보사
lines.id: Engkau yang tidak mengetahui bagian terdalamnya,

lines.en: Strength unto our souls afford
lines.ko: 내 중한 죄를 사하여 참 평안한 맘 주소서
lines.id: Lihatlah, itu adalah keyakinan pada Cal-va-ry,

lines.en: From thy living Bread, O Lord!
lines.id: Dan dengan darah yang ditumpahkan Tuhanku untukku.

lines.en: Be our Guard in sin and strife;
lines.ko: 내 임금 예수 내 주여 주 은혜에 감격하여
lines.id: Rajaku, Tuanku, takjub dan terharu

lines.en: Be the Leader of our life;
lines.ko: 한없는 감사 찬송을 내 주님 앞에 드리오며
lines.id: Dengan rahmat melimpah yang telah Engkau berikan,

lines.en: Lest like sheep we stray abroad,
lines.ko: 내 맘과 정성 다하여 늘 기뻐하며 살리라
lines.id: Ucapan terima kasih yang tiada habisnya dan pujian yang tiada habisnya

lines.en: Stay our wayward feet, O Lord!
lines.id: Kepada-Mu ya Tuhan, hati yang gembira ini akan bangkit,

lines.en: Quickened by the Spirit's grace
lines.ko: 내 임금 예수 내 주여 이 마음과 이 천한 몸
lines.id: Rajaku, Tuanku, karena daging ini,

lines.en: All thy holy will to trace,
lines.ko: 그 보배피로 값 주고 주 친히 사신 것이오니
lines.id: Jadi tanpa nilai dan kegunaan,

lines.en: While we daily search thy Word,
lines.ko: 나 이제 사나 죽으나 주 뜻만 따라 살리라
lines.id: Apakah daging dianggap kembali dan dibeli dengan harga mahal

lines.en: Wisdom true impart, O Lord!
lines.id: Demi darah-Mu sendiri yang tidak diberikan dengan sia-sia,

lines.en: When the sun withdraws his light,
When we seek our beds at night,
Thou, by sleepless hosts adored,
Hear the pray'r of faith, O Lord!
Praise we, with the heavn'ly host,
Father, Son, and Holy Ghost;
Thee would we with one accord
Praise and magnify, O Lord!

title_en: Christ, whose glory fills the skies

lines.en: Christ, whose glory fills the skies,
Christ the true, the only Light,
Sun of Righteousness, arise,
Triumph o'er the shades of night;
Dayspring from oh high, be near;
lines.ko: 오 높은 곳에서 오는 여명이여, 가까이 오소서.

lines.en: Daystar, in my heart appear.
Dark and cheerless is the morn
Unaccompanied by thee;
Joyless is the day's return
Till thy mercy's beams I see;
Till thy inward light impart,
Glad my eyes and warm my heart.
Visit, then, this soul of mine;
Pierce the gloom of sin and grief;
Fill me, Radiancy Divine;
Scatter all my unbelief;
More and more thyself display,
Shining to the perfect day.

title_en: Awake, my soul, and with the sun

lines.en: Awake, my soul, and with the sun
Thy daily stage of duty run:
lines.ko: 귀하의 일일 임무 단계는 다음과 같습니다.

lines.en: Shake off dull sloth, and joyful rise
To pay thy morning sacrifice.
By influence of the light Divine
Let thine own light to others shine;
lines.ko: 당신 자신의 빛을 다른 사람들에게 비추십시오.

lines.en: Reflect all heav'n's propitious rays
In ardent love and cheerful praise.
All praise to thee, who safe hast kept,
lines.ko: 안전하게 지켜주신 당신께 모든 찬미를 드립니다.

lines.en: And hast refreshed me whilst I slept:
lines.ko: 그리고 내가 자는 동안 나에게 활력을 불어넣었습니다:

lines.en: Grant, Lord, when I from death shall wake,
I may of endless light partake.
lines.ko: 나는 끝없는 빛을 누릴 수 있습니다.

lines.en: Lord, I my vows to thee renew,
lines.ko: 주님, 당신께 드리는 나의 서원을 새롭게 하여

lines.en: Disperse my sins as morning dew;
Guard my first springs of thought and will,
lines.ko: 내 생각과 의지의 첫 샘을 지켜 주소서.

lines.en: And with thyself my spirit fill.
lines.ko: 그리고 당신으로 인해 내 영혼이 채워집니다.

lines.en: Praise God from whom all blessings flow;
Praise him, all creatures here below;
lines.ko: 여기 아래 있는 모든 피조물이여, 그를 찬양하라.

lines.en: Praise him above, ye heav'nly host:
lines.ko: 위에서 그를 찬양하라, 너희 하늘의 주인이여:

lines.en: Praise Father, Son, and Holy Ghost.

title_en: Lord, in the morning thou shalt hear

lines.en: From Psalm 5
Lord, in the morning thou shalt hear
My voice ascending high;
To thee will I direct my prayer,
To thee lift up mine eye:
Up to the heav'ns, where Christ is gone
To plead for all his saints,
Presenting at his Father's throne
Our songs and our complaints.
Thou art a God before whose sight
The wicked shall not stand;
Sinners shall ne'er be thy delight,
lines.ko: 죄인들은 결코 당신의 기쁨이 될 수 없습니다.

lines.en: Now dwell at thy right hand.
But to thy house will I resort,
To taste thy mercies there;
I will frequent thy holy court,
lines.ko: 내가 주의 거룩한 뜰에 자주 드나들며

lines.en: And worship in thy fear.
O may thy Spirit guide my feet
lines.ko: 오 당신의 영이 내 발을 인도하게 하소서

lines.en: In ways of righteousness;
Make ev'ry path of duty straight
And plain before my face.

title_en: Light of light, enlighten me

lines.en: Light of light, enlighten me,
Now anew the day is dawning;
Sun of grace, the shadows flee;
Brighten thou my Sabbath morning;
With thy joyous sunshine blest,
Happy is my day of rest.
Fount of all our joy and peace,
To thy living waters lead me;
Thou from earth my soul release,
lines.ko: 당신은 땅에서 내 영혼을 해방시켜 주시고,

lines.en: And with grace and mercy feed me;
Bless thy Word, that it may prove
Rich in fruits that thou dost love.
Kindle thou the sacrifice
That upon my lips is lying;
Clear the shadows from mine eyes,
That, from ev'ry error flying,
No strange fire may in me glow
lines.ko: 내 안에서 이상한 불이 타오를 수는 없습니다

lines.en: That thine altar doth not know.
Let me with my heart today,
Holy, Holy, Holy, singing,
Rapt awhile from earth away,
lines.ko: 멀리 떨어진 지구에서 잠시 랩을 하고,

lines.en: All my soul to thee upspringing,
Have a foretaste inly giv'n
How they worship thee in heav'n.
Hence all care, all vanity,
For the day to God is holy;
Come, thou glorious Majesty,
Deign to fill this temple lowly;
Naught today my soul shall move,
lines.ko: 오늘은 아무것도 내 영혼이 움직이지 않을 것이다.

lines.en: Simply resting in thy love.

title_en: Come, my soul, thou must be waking

lines.en: Come, my soul, thou must be waking;
lines.ko: 오라, 내 영혼아, 너는 깨어나야 한다.

lines.en: Now is breaking o'er the earth another day:
lines.ko: 이제 또 다른 날이 지구를 무너뜨리고 있습니다.

lines.en: Come to him who made this splendor;
See thou render all thy feeble pow'rs can pay.
lines.ko: 당신이 지불할 수 있는 모든 미약한 힘을 렌더링하는 것을 보십시오.

lines.en: Thou, too, hail the light returning;
Ready burning be the incense of thy pow'rs;
lines.ko: 주의 힘의 향을 태울 준비를 하십시오.

lines.en: For the night is safely ended,
God hath tended with his care thy helpless hours.
Pray that he may prosper ever
lines.ko: 그가 항상 번영할 수 있도록 기도해 주세요

lines.en: Each endeavor, when thine aim is good and true;
lines.ko: 각 노력은 당신의 목표가 좋고 진실할 때 이루어집니다.

lines.en: But that he may ever thwart thee,
lines.ko: 그러나 그 사람이 당신을 방해할 수도 있으니,

lines.en: And convert thee, when thou evil wouldst pursue.
lines.ko: 그리고 악이 당신을 쫓을 때 당신을 개종시키십시오.

lines.en: Think that he thy ways beholdeth;
He unfoldeth ev'ry fault that lurks within;
lines.ko: 그는 속에 숨어 있는 모든 결점을 드러내십니다.

lines.en: Ev'ry stain of shame glossed over
Can discover, and discern each deed of sin.
lines.ko: 죄의 모든 행위를 발견하고 분별할 수 있습니다.

lines.en: Only God's free gifts abuse not,
lines.ko: 오직 하나님께서 거저 주시는 선물만을 남용하지 마십시오.

lines.en: Light refuse not, but his Spirit's voice obey;
lines.ko: 빛은 거절하지 않으나 성령의 음성은 순종합니다.

lines.en: Thou with him shalt dwell, beholding
Light enfolding all things in unclouded day.
lines.ko: 구름 없는 낮에 만물을 감싸는 빛.

title_en: Abide with me:  fast falls the eventide

lines.en: Abide with me: fast falls the eventide:
lines.id: Tinggallah bersamaku: air pasang surut dengan cepat
Kegelapan semakin dalam, Tuhan, tinggallah bersamaku:

lines.ko: 내 친구 나를 위로 못할 때
lines.id: Ketika penolong lain gagal dan kenyamanan hilang,
Bantuan bagi mereka yang tidak berdaya, ya, tinggallah bersamaku.

lines.en: The darkness deepens; Lord, with me abide:
lines.id: Swift hampir mengakhiri hari kecil dalam hidup
Kegembiraan bumi semakin redup, kejayaannya lenyap
Saya melihat perubahan dan kemunduran di segala arah
Wahai Engkau yang tidak berubah, tinggallah bersamaku.

lines.en: When other helpers fail, and comforts flee,
lines.id: Aku membutuhkan kehadiran-Mu setiap saat
Apa lagi kalau bukan kasih karunia-Mu yang mampu menggagalkan kuasa si penggoda
Siapa yang menyukai diri-Mu, pemandu dan tempat tinggalku bisa menjadi
Melalui awan dan sinar matahari, wahai, tinggallah bersamaku.

lines.en: Help of the helpless, O abide with me.
lines.ko: 이 육신 쇠해 눈을 감을 때
lines.id: Pegang salibmu di depan mataku yang terpejam
Bersinar menembus kegelapan dan arahkan aku ke langit
Pagi hari di surga dan bayang-bayang bumi yang sia-sia menghilang
Dalam hidup, dalam kematian, ya Tuhan, tinggallah bersamaku. Amin.

lines.en: Swift to its close ebbs out life's little day;
Earth's joys grow dim, its glories pass away;
Change and decay in all around I see;
O thou who changest not, abide with me.
I need thy presence ev'ry passing hour;
What but thy grace can foil the tempter's pow'r?
Who like thyself my guide and stay can be?
Through cloud and sunshine, O abide with me.
I fear no foe, with thee at hand to bless:
Ills have no weight and tears no bitterness.
Where is death's sting? where, grave, thy victory?
I triumph still, if thou abide with me.
Hold thou thy cross before my closing eyes:
Shine through the gloom, and point me to the skies:
Heav'n's morning breaks, and earth's vain shadows flee:
In life, in death, O Lord, abide with me.

title_en: At even, when the sun was set

lines.en: At even, when the sun was set,
The sick, O Lord, around thee lay;
lines.ko: 주님, 주님 주위에는 병자들이 누워 있었습니다.

lines.en: O in what divers pains they met!
lines.ko: 오, 그들은 얼마나 많은 고통을 겪었습니까!

lines.en: O with what joy they went away!
Once more 'tis eventide, and we,
lines.ko: 다시 한 번 저녁이 됐고, 우리는

lines.en: Oppressed with various ills, draw near:
lines.ko: 여러 가지 질병에 사로잡혀서 가까이 가십시오.

lines.en: What if thy form we cannot see;
lines.ko: 우리가 당신의 모습을 볼 수 없다면 어떻게 될까요?

lines.en: We know and feel that thou art here.
lines.ko: 우리는 당신이 여기 계시다는 것을 알고 느낍니다.

lines.en: O Saviour Christ, our woes dispel:
lines.ko: 오 구세주 그리스도여, 우리의 비애를 없애소서:

lines.en: For some are sick, and some are sad,
lines.ko: 어떤 사람은 아프고 어떤 사람은 슬프다.

lines.en: And some have never loved thee well,
lines.ko: 그리고 어떤 사람들은 당신을 제대로 사랑한 적이 없습니다.

lines.en: And some have lost the love they had;
lines.ko: 어떤 사람들은 자신이 가졌던 사랑을 잃었습니다.

lines.en: And none, O Lord, have perfect rest,
lines.ko: 오 주님, 누구도 완전한 안식을 누리지는 못합니다.

lines.en: For none are wholly free from sin;
lines.ko: 죄에서 완전히 자유로운 사람은 아무도 없습니다.

lines.en: And they who fain would serve thee best
lines.ko: 그리고 당신을 가장 잘 섬기는 사람들은

lines.en: Are conscious most of wrong within.
O Saviour Christ, thou too art man,
Thou hast been troubled, tempted, tried;
lines.ko: 당신은 고민하고, 유혹을 받고, 시련을 겪었습니다.

lines.en: Thy kind but searching glance can scan
lines.ko: 당신은 친절하지만 검색하는 눈으로 스캔할 수 있습니다.

lines.en: The very wounds that shame would hide.
Thy touch has still its ancient pow'r;
lines.ko: 당신의 손길에는 여전히 고대의 힘이 남아 있습니다.

lines.en: No word from thee can fruitless fall:
lines.ko: 당신의 어떤 말도 무익한 것이 될 수 없습니다.

lines.en: Hear in this solemn evening hour,
And in thy mercy heal us all.
lines.ko: 그리고 당신의 자비로 우리 모두를 고쳐주소서.

title_en: Ere I sleep, for every favor

lines.en: Ere I sleep, for ev'ry favor
This day showed
By my God,
I will bless my Saviour.
O my Lord, what shall I render
lines.ko: 오 나의 주님, 제가 무엇으로 보답해야 합니까?

lines.en: To thy Name,
Still the same,
Gracious, good, and tender?
Leave me not, but ever love me;
lines.ko: 나를 떠나지 말고 언제나 나를 사랑해 주십시오.

lines.en: Let thy peace
Be my bliss,
Till thou hence remove me.

title_en: The day thou gavest, Lord, is ended

lines.en: The day thou gavest, Lord, is ended,
The darkness falls at thy behest;
To thee our morning hymns ascended,
Thy praise shall hallow now our rest.
lines.ko: 당신의 찬양이 이제 우리의 안식을 거룩하게 할 것입니다.

lines.en: We thank thee that thy church, unsleeping
lines.ko: 잠들지 않는 당신의 교회를 인하여 우리는 당신께 감사드립니다.

lines.en: While earth rolls onward into light,
Through all the world her watch is keeping,
lines.ko: 온 세상을 통해 그녀의 시계가 지키고 있습니다.

lines.en: And rests not now by day or night.
lines.ko: 그리고 이제는 낮이나 밤이나 쉬지 않습니다.

lines.en: As o'er each continent and island
The dawn leads on another day,
The voice of prayer is never silent,
Nor dies the strain of praise away.
The sun, that bids us rest, is waking
lines.ko: 우리에게 휴식을 부르는 태양이 깨어나고 있어요

lines.en: Our brethren 'neath the western sky.
And hour by hour fresh lips are making
lines.ko: 그리고 시간이 지날수록 신선한 입술이 만들어지고 있어요

lines.en: Thy wondrous doings heard on high.
lines.ko: 당신의 놀라운 일이 높은 곳에서 들렸습니다.

lines.en: So be it, Lord; thy throne shall never,
lines.ko: 주님, 그렇게 하십시오. 네 왕좌는 결코 없어지지 않을 것이다.

lines.en: Like earth's proud empires, pass away:
But stand, and rule, and grow for ever,
Till all thy creatures own thy sway.
lines.ko: 당신의 모든 피조물이 당신의 영향력을 소유할 때까지.

title_en: O Trinity, most blessed Light

lines.en: O Trinity, most blessed Light,
O Unity of sov'reign might,
As now the fiery sun departs,
Shed thou thy beams within our hearts.
To thee our morning song of praise,
lines.ko: 우리 아침 찬양의 노래 당신께 바칩니다.

lines.en: To thee our evening prayer we raise;
Thee may our glory evermore
In lowly reverence adore.
All praise to God the Father be,
All praise, eternal Son, to thee,
lines.ko: 영원하신 아들이여, 모든 찬미를 당신께 드립니다.

lines.en: Whom with the Spirit we adore
For ever and for evermore.

title_en: Saviour, breathe an evening blessing

lines.en: Saviour, breath an evening blessing,
lines.id: Lebih banyak cinta kepada-Mu, ya Kristus, Lebih banyak cinta kepada-Mu!

lines.en: Ere repose our spirits seal;
lines.id: Dengarlah doa yang kupanjatkan dengan lutut tertekuk

lines.en: Sin and want we come confessing:
lines.ko: 내 진정 소원이 내 구주 예수를
lines.id: Inilah permohonanku yang sungguh-sungguh, Lebih banyak cinta, ya Kristus, kepada-Mu,

lines.en: Thou can'st save, and thou canst heal.
lines.id: Lebih banyak cinta padamu, lebih banyak cinta padamu!

lines.en: Though destruction walk around us,
lines.id: Kenikmatan duniawi yang kuinginkan, Mencari kedamaian dan ketenangan

lines.en: Though the arrow past us fly,
lines.id: Kini hanya Engkau yang kucari, Berikan yang terbaik

lines.en: Angel guards from thee surround;
lines.ko: 다만 내 비는 말 내 구주 예수를
lines.id: Ini semua doaku agar lebih banyak cinta, ya Kristus, kepada-Mu,

lines.en: We are safe if thou art nigh.
lines.id: Lebih banyak cinta padamu, lebih banyak cinta padamu!

lines.en: Though destruction walk around us,
lines.id: Maka nafas terakhirku akan membisikkan puji-pujian kepada-Mu

lines.en: Darkness cannot hide from thee;
lines.id: Ini adalah seruan perpisahan yang akan membuat hatiku terangkat

lines.en: Thou art he who, never weary,
lines.ko: 다만 내 비는 말 내 구주 예수를
lines.id: Ini tetap doanya agar lebih banyak cinta, ya Kristus, kepada-Mu,

lines.en: Watchest where thy people be.
lines.id: Lebih banyak cinta padamu, lebih banyak cinta padamu!

lines.en: Should swift death this night o'ertake us,
And our couch become our tomb,
May the morn in heav'n awake us,
Clad in light and deathless bloom.

title_id: Lebih Banyak Kasih KepadaMu, ya Kristus

title_en: All praise to thee, my God, this night
title_ko: 나의 하나님, 이 밤에도 당신을 찬양합니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: All praise to thee, my God, this night,
lines.ko: 나의 하나님, 오늘 밤 당신을 찬양합니다.

lines.en: For all the blessings of the light;
Keep me, O keep me, King of kings,
lines.ko: 나를 지키소서, 오 나를 지키소서, 만왕의 왕이여,

lines.en: Beneath thine own almighty wings.
Forgive me, Lord, for thy dear Son,
lines.ko: 주님, 당신의 사랑하는 아들로 인해 저를 용서해 주십시오.

lines.en: The ills that I this day have done;
That with the world, myself, and thee,
I, ere I sleep, at peace may be.
O may my soul on thee repose,
lines.ko: 오 내 영혼이 당신 위에 안식하게 하소서.

lines.en: And with sweet sleep mine eyelids close;
Sleep that may me more vig'rous make
lines.ko: 잠을 자면 더 활발해질 수 있어요

lines.en: To serve my God when I awake.
lines.ko: 내가 깨어 있을 때 나의 하나님을 섬기기 위하여.

lines.en: When in the night I sleepless lie,
lines.ko: 밤에 잠 못 이루고 누워 있을 때,

lines.en: My soul with heav'nly thoughts supply;
Let no ill dreams disturb my rest,
lines.ko: 나쁜 꿈이 내 휴식을 방해하지 않게 해주세요.

lines.en: No pow'rs of darkness me molest.
O when shall I in endless day
lines.ko: 오 끝없는 하루 속에서 나는 언제쯤 살 수 있을까?

lines.en: For ever chase dark sleep away,
And hymns with the supernal choir
Incessant sing, and never tire!
Praise God from whom all blessings flow;
Praise him, all creatures here below;
lines.ko: 여기 아래 있는 모든 피조물이여, 그를 찬양하라.

lines.en: Praise him above, ye heav'nly host:
lines.ko: 위에서 그를 찬양하라, 너희 하늘의 주인이여:

lines.en: Praise Father, Son, and Holy Ghost.

title_en: The day is past and over

lines.en: The day is past and over:
All thanks, O Lord to thee;
lines.ko: 오 주님, 당신께 모든 감사를 드립니다.

lines.en: I pray thee that offenseless
The hours of dark may be.
O Jesus, keep me in thy sight,
lines.ko: 오 예수여, 나를 당신의 눈앞에 지켜 주소서.

lines.en: And save me through the coming night.
lines.ko: 그리고 다가오는 밤 동안 나를 구해주세요.

lines.en: The toils of day are over:
I raise the hymns to thee,
And ask that free from peril
The hours of night may be.
O Jesus, keep me in thy sight,
lines.ko: 오 예수여, 나를 당신의 눈앞에 지켜 주소서.

lines.en: And guard me through the coming night.
lines.ko: 그리고 다가오는 밤 동안 나를 지켜 주소서.

lines.en: Lord, that in death I sleep not,
lines.ko: 주님, 제가 죽어서도 잠을 자지 않게 하소서.

lines.en: And lest my foe should say,
lines.ko: 그리고 내 원수가 다음과 같이 말하지 않도록 하십시오.

lines.en: "I have prevailed against him,"
Lighten mine eyes, I pray:
O Jesus, keep me in thy sight,
lines.ko: 오 예수여, 나를 당신의 눈앞에 지켜 주소서.

lines.en: And guard me through the coming night.
lines.ko: 그리고 다가오는 밤 동안 나를 지켜 주소서.

lines.en: Be thou my soul's Preserver,
O God, for thou dost know
How many are the perils
Through which I have to go
Lover of men, O hear my call,
lines.ko: 남자를 사랑하는 사람이여, 오 내 부름을 들어주소서.

lines.en: And guard and save me from them all.
lines.ko: 그리고 그들 모두로부터 나를 보호하고 구해 주십시오.

title_en: Day is dying in the west

lines.en: Day is dying in the west;
Heav'n is touching earth with rest;
Wait and worship while the night
Sets her ev'ning lamps alight
Through all the sky.
Holy, Holy, Holy, Lord God of hosts!
lines.ko: 거룩하다 거룩하다 거룩하다 만군의 하나님 여호와여!

lines.en: Heav'n and earth are full of thee!
lines.ko: 하늘과 땅이 당신으로 가득 차 있습니다!

lines.en: Heav'n and earth are praising thee,
O Lord Most High.
While the deep'ning shadows fall,
Light of light, on whom we call
Through the glory and the grace
Of the stars that veil thy face,
lines.ko: 당신의 얼굴을 가리고 있는 별들 중에서,

lines.en: Our hearts ascend.
And when fading from our sight
Pass the stars, the day, the night,
Lord of Glory, on our eyes
Let eternal morning rise,
And shadows end.

alt_titles: Holy, Holy, Holy, Lord God of hosts!

title_en: God, that madest earth and heaven

lines.en: God, that madest earth and heaven,
Darkness and light,
Who the day for toil hast given,
For rest the night;
May thine angel guards defend us,
Slumber sweet thy mercy send us,
Holy dreams and hopes attend us,
This livelong night.
And, when morn again shall call us
lines.ko: 그리고 아침이 다시 우리를 부를 때

lines.en: To run life's way,
May we still, whate'er befall us,
lines.ko: 우리는 여전히, 무슨 일이 우리에게 닥칠 수 있습니다

lines.en: Thy will obey.
From the pow'r of evil hide us,
In the narrow pathway guide us,
Nor thy smile be e'er denied us
lines.ko: 네 미소도 우리를 거부할 수 없어

lines.en: The livelong day.
Guard us waking, guard us sleeping;
lines.ko: 깨어 있는 우리를 지켜주시고, 잠자는 우리를 지켜주소서.

lines.en: And, when we die,
May we, in thy mighty keeping,
All peaceful lie:
When the last dread trump shall wake us,
lines.ko: 마지막 무서운 나팔이 우리를 깨울 때,

lines.en: Do not thou, O God, forsake us,
But to reign in glory take us
With thee on high.

title_en: Here from the world we turn

lines.en: Here from the world we turn, Jesus to seek;
Here may his loving voice tenderly speak!
lines.ko: 그분의 사랑스러운 목소리가 다정하게 말하길 바랍니다!

lines.en: Jesus, our dearest Friend, while at thy feet we bend,
lines.ko: 우리의 가장 소중한 친구이신 예수님, 당신의 발 앞에 우리가 몸을 구부릴 때,

lines.en: O let thy smile descend! 'Tis thee we seek.
lines.ko: 오 당신의 미소가 내려오도록 하십시오! '우리가 찾는 것이 바로 당신입니다.

lines.en: Come, Holy Comforter, Presence Divine,
Now in our longing hearts graciously shine;
lines.ko: 이제 우리의 갈망하는 마음에 은혜롭게 빛나십시오.

lines.en: O for thy mighty pow'r! O for a blessed show'r,
lines.ko: 오 당신의 강력한 힘을 위해! 오 축복받은 쇼를 위해,

lines.en: Filling this hallowed hour with joy divine!
lines.ko: 이 신성한 시간을 신성한 기쁨으로 채우십시오!

lines.en: Saviour, thy work revive: here may we see
lines.ko: 구세주여, 당신의 일이 되살아나게 하소서. 여기서 우리가 볼 수 있게 하소서

lines.en: Those who are dead in sin quickened by thee;
lines.ko: 죄로 죽은 자들이 당신으로 말미암아 살리심을 받았나이다

lines.en: Come to our hearts tonight, make ev'ry burden light;
lines.ko: 오늘 밤 우리 마음에 오셔서 모든 짐을 가볍게 해주세요.

lines.en: Cheer thou our waiting sight; we long for thee.
lines.ko: 우리가 기다리는 모습을 응원해 주십시오. 우리는 당신을 갈망합니다.

title_en: Sun of my soul, thou Saviour dear

lines.en: Sun of my soul, thou Saviour dear,
lines.id: Matahari jiwaku, Engkau Selamatkan sayangku,

lines.en: It is not night if thou be near;
lines.id: Bukan malam jika Engkau dekat:

lines.en: O may no earth-born cloud arise
lines.id: Oh, semoga tidak ada awan yang lahir di bumi yang muncul

lines.en: To hide thee from thy servant's eyes.
lines.id: Untuk menyembunyikan-Mu dari mata hamba-Mu.

lines.en: When the soft dews of kindly sleep
lines.id: Saat embun lembut tertidur lelap

lines.en: My weary eyelids gently steep,
lines.id: Kelopak mataku yang lelah perlahan terkulai.

lines.en: Be my last thought, how sweet to rest
lines.id: Jadilah pikiran terakhirku, betapa manisnya beristirahat

lines.en: For ever on my Saviour's breast.
lines.id: Selama-lamanya di dada Juruselamatku.

lines.en: Abide with me from morn till eve,
lines.id: Tinggallah bersamaku dari pagi hingga malam,

lines.en: For without thee I cannot live;
lines.id: Sebab tanpa Engkau aku tidak dapat hidup

lines.en: Abide with me when night is nigh,
lines.id: Tinggallah bersamaku saat malam sudah dekat,

lines.en: For without thee I dare not die.
lines.id: Sebab tanpa Engkau aku tidak berani mati.

lines.en: If some poor wand'ring child of thine
lines.id: Mendekatlah dan memberkati kami ketika kami bangun,

lines.en: Have spurned today the voice Divine,
lines.id: Sebelum melewati dunia dengan cara yang kita ambil

lines.en: Now, Lord, the gracious work begin;
lines.id: Hingga di lautan cinta-Mu

lines.en: Let him no more lie down in sin.
lines.id: Kita kehilangan diri kita sendiri di surga. Amin.

lines.en: Watch by the sick; enrich the poor
With blessings from thy boundless store;
Be ev'ry mourner's sleep tonight,
Like infant's slumbers, pure and light.
Come near and bless us when we wake,
Ere through the world our way we take,
Till in the ocean of thy love
We lose ourselves in heav'n above.

title_en: A little child the Saviour came

lines.en: A little child the Saviour came,
The Mighty God was still his Name;
And angels worshipped as he lay
The seeming infant of a day.
He who, a little child, began
The life Divine to show to man,
Proclaims from heav'n the message free:
"Let little children come to me."
We bring them, Lord, and with the sign
Of sprinkled water name them thine:
lines.ko: 뿌려진 물 중에서 당신의 이름을 지어라.

lines.en: Their souls with saving grace endow;
Baptize them with the Spirit now.
O give thine angels charge, good Lord,
lines.ko: 오, 선하신 주님, 당신의 천사들에게 명령을 내리소서.

lines.en: Them safely in thy way to guard;
Thy blessing on their lives command,
lines.ko: 그들의 삶에 대한 당신의 축복이 명령하오니,

lines.en: And write their names upon thy hand.
lines.ko: 그리고 네 손에 그들의 이름을 적어라.

lines.en: O thou, who by an infant's tongue
Dost hear thy perfect glory sung,
lines.ko: 당신의 완전한 영광이 노래되는 것을 들으소서.

lines.en: May these, with all the heav'nly host,
Praise Father, Son, and Holy Ghost.

title_en: Dear Lord, today, our child

lines.en: Dear Lord, today, our child,
An heritage from thee,
We bring in faith and claim for him
lines.ko: 우리는 그를 위한 믿음과 주장을 가져옵니다

lines.en: Thy promise free.
Dear Lord, today, our child,
Sweet token of thy love,
We bring into thy church
For blessings from above.
Dear Lord, today our child,
Rich treasure of thy grace,
We bring upon his brow
The sign and seal to place.
Dear Lord, today, our child,
A gracious gift of thine,
We bring to set apart,
Baptized in Name Divine.
Dear Lord, today our child,
The fruit of God-blessed seed,
We bring to thee to ask
For help in ev'ry need.

title_en: Gracious Saviour, gentle Shepherd

lines.en: Gracious Saviour, gentle Shepherd,
Our little ones are dear to thee;
Gathered with thine arms and carried
In thy bosom may they be
Sweetly, gently, safely tended,
From all want and danger free.
Tender Shepherd, never leave them
lines.ko: 부드러운 목자시여, 결코 그들을 떠나지 마십시오

lines.en: From thy fold to go astray;
By thy look of love directed,
May they walk the narrow way;
Thus direct them, and protect them,
Lest they fall an easy prey.
Let thy holy Word instruct them:
Fill their minds with heav'nly light;
Let thy love and grace constrain them,
lines.ko: 당신의 사랑과 은혜로 그들을 강권하게 하소서.

lines.en: To approve whate'er is right,
Take thine easy yoke and wear it,
And to prove thy burden light.
lines.ko: 그리고 당신의 부담이 가벼움을 증명하기 위해.

lines.en: Cleanse their hearts from sinful folly
lines.ko: 죄악된 어리석음에서 그들의 마음을 깨끗하게 하시고

lines.en: In the stream thy love supplied;
Mingled streams of blood and water
Flowing from thy wounded side:
And to heav'nly pastures lead them,
Where thine own still waters glide.

title_en: Lord Jesus Christ, our Lord most dear

lines.en: As thou wast once an infant here,
So give this child of thine, we pray,
Thy grace and blessing day by day.
O holy Jesus, Lord Divine,
We pray thee guard this child of thine.

lines.en: As in thy heav'nly Kingdom, Lord,
All things obey thy sacred Word,
Do thou thy mighty succour give,
And shield this child by morn and eve.
lines.ko: 그리고 아침저녁으로 이 아이를 보호해 주십시오.

lines.en: Their watch let angels round him keep
Where'er he be, awake, asleep;

That he in thee may live and grow.

lines.en: My praise can only breathe itself in prayer,
My prayer can only lose itself in thee;
Dwell thou for ever in my breast, and there,
Lord, let me sup with thee; sup thou with me.

title_en: Till he come! O let the words linger
title_ko: 그가 올 때까지! 아, 그 말을 계속 놔두세요 (자체번역)

lines.en: Till he come! O let the words
Linger on the trembling chords;
Let the little while between
In their golden light be seen;
Let us think how heav'n and home
Lie beyond that "Till he come."
When the weary ones we love
Enter on their rest above,
Seems the earth so poor and vast,
All our life joy overcast?
Hush, be ev'ry murmur dumb:
It is only till he come.
Clouds and conflicts round us press:
lines.ko: 우리 주변의 구름과 갈등은 다음과 같습니다.

lines.en: Would we have one sorrow less?
All the sharpness of the cross,
All that tells the world is loss,
Death and darkness, and the tomb,
Only whisper "Till he come."
See, the feast of love is spread,
Drink the wine, and break the bread:
Sweet memorials, till the Lord
lines.ko: 주님이 계신 날까지 달콤한 추억이 되길

lines.en: Call us round his heav'nly board;

Severed only till he come.

And in whose death our sins are dead;
Look on the heart by sorrow broken,

lines.id: Lihatlah air mata yang mengalir dari hatiku, penuh dengan pertobatan atas dosa,

lines.id: Dan Tuhan baru Dia mengucap syukur dan memuji,

lines.en: While kindness in his bosom glowed,
lines.id: Sementara kebaikan di dada-Nya bersinar,

lines.en: And from his lips salvation flowed.
lines.id: Dan dari bibir-Nya keselamatan mengalir.

lines.en: "My blood I thus pour forth," he cries,
lines.ko: 이 잔은 너를 위한 피 너희를 위한 새 언약
lines.id: “Darahku kucurahkan,” serunya,

lines.en: "To cleanse the soul in sin that lies;
lines.ko: 영원한 언약 그대로 큰 은혜 부어 주리라
lines.id: “Untuk menyucikan jiwa dari dosa yang ada

lines.en: In this the covenant is sealed,
lines.id: Dalam hal ini perjanjian dimeteraikan,

lines.en: And heav'n's eternal grace revealed."
lines.id: Dan rahmat abadi surga terungkap kembali."

lines.ko: 이 잔을 입에 댈 때에 너 나를 생각 하여라
lines.id: “Cawan ini penuh dengan cinta kepada manusia

lines.ko: 내 몸과 내 피 네 맘에 영원한 생명 되리라 아멘
lines.id: Biarkan semua pihak mengambil bagian dalam rancangan yang sah
Melalui a-ges terakhir biarkan mengalir,
Untuk mengenang saat-saat terakhirku." Amin.

title_id: Sungguh Pada Malam Itu Ketika Ditakdirkan Untuk Tahu

title_en: According to thy gracious Word

lines.en: According to thy gracious word,
In meek humility,
This will I do, my dying Lord,
lines.ko: 죽어가는 주님, 제가 이 일을 하겠습니다.

lines.en: I will remember thee.
Thy body, broken for my sake,
My bread from heav'n shall be;
Thy testamental cup I take,
And thus remember thee.
Gethsemane can I forget?
Or there thy conflict see,
Thine agony and bloody sweat,
And not remember thee?
When to the cross I turn mine eyes,
lines.ko: 십자가에 달려갈 때 나는 눈을 돌립니다.

lines.en: And rest on Calvary,
O Lamb of God, my Sacrifice,
lines.ko: 오 하느님의 어린 양, 나의 희생이시여,

lines.en: And not remember thee?
Remember thee, and all thy pains,
And all thy love to me:
lines.ko: 그리고 나에 대한 당신의 모든 사랑:

lines.en: When thou shalt in thy Kingdom come,
Jesus, remember me.

title_en: Zion, in thy Saviour singing

lines.en: Zion, to thy Saviour singing,
To thy Prince and Shepherd bringing
Sweetest hymns of love and praise,
Thou wilt never reach the measure
lines.ko: 너는 결코 그 정도에 도달하지 못할 것이다

lines.en: Of his worth, by all the treasure
Of thy most ecstatic lays.
Of all wonders that can thrill thee,
lines.ko: 당신을 감동시킬 수 있는 모든 경이로움 중에서,

lines.en: And with adoration fill thee,
What than this can greater be,
lines.ko: 이보다 더 큰 일이 어디 있겠습니까?

lines.en: That himself to thee he giveth?
He that eateth ever liveth,
For the Bread of Life is he.
Fill thy lips to overflowing
With sweet praise, his mercy showing
Who this heav'nly table spread:
lines.ko: 이 무거운 테이블이 퍼진 사람은 누구입니까?

lines.en: On this day so glad and holy,
To each longing spirit lowly
Giveth he the living Bread.
Here the King hath spread his table,
Whereon eyes of faith are able
Christ our Passover to trace:
Shadows of the law are going,
Light and life and truth inflowing,
Night to day is giving place.
O Good Shepherd, Bread life-giving,
lines.ko: 오 선한 목자시여, 생명을 주시는 빵이시여,

lines.en: Us, thy grace and life receiving,
Feed and shelter evermore;
Thou on earth our weakness guiding,
We in heav'n with thee abiding
With all saints will thee adore.

title_en: Let thy blood in mercy poured

lines.en: Let thy blood in mercy poured,
Let thy gracious body broken,
Be to me, O gracious Lord,
lines.ko: 오 은혜로우신 주님, 저에게 있어 주십시오.

lines.en: Of thy boundless love the token:
lines.ko: 당신의 무한한 사랑의 표시는 다음과 같습니다.

lines.en: Thou didst give thyself for me,
lines.ko: 당신은 나를 위해 당신 자신을 바치셨습니다.

lines.en: Now I give myself to thee.
lines.ko: 이제 나는 당신에게 나 자신을 바칩니다.

lines.en: Thou didst die that I might live;
Blessed Lord, thou cam'st to save me;
lines.ko: 복되신 주님, 당신은 나를 구원하려고 오셨습니다.

lines.en: All that love of God could give
lines.ko: 하나님의 사랑이 줄 수 있는 모든 것

lines.en: Jesus by his sorrows gave me:
lines.ko: 예수님께서는 슬픔을 겪으면서 나에게 이렇게 말씀하셨습니다.

lines.en: By the thorns that crowned thy brow,
By the spear wound and the nailing,
By the pain and death, I now
Claim, O Christ, thy love unfailing:
lines.ko: 오 그리스도여, 당신의 변함없는 사랑을 주장하십시오.

lines.en: Wilt thou own the gift I bring?
lines.ko: 내가 가져온 선물을 당신의 소유로 삼으시겠습니까?

lines.en: All my penitence I give thee;
Thou art my exalted King,
Of thy matchless love forgive me:
lines.ko: 당신의 비할 데 없는 사랑을 용서해 주십시오.

title_en: A parting hymn we sing

lines.en: A parting hymn we sing
Around thy table, Lord;
Again our grateful tribute bring,
lines.ko: 다시 한 번 감사의 마음을 전합니다.

lines.en: Our solemn vows record.
Here have we seen thy face,
And felt thy presence here;
So may the savor of thy grace
In word and life appear.
