The purchase of thy blood,
By sin no longer led,
The path our dear Redeemer trod
May we rejoicing tread.
In self-forgetting love
Be our communion shown,
Until we join the church above,
And know as we are known.

title_en: Shepherd of souls, refresh and bless

lines.en: Shepherd of souls, refresh and bless
Thy chosen pilgrim flock
With manna in the wilderness,
With water from the rock.
Hungry and thirsty, faint and weak,
As thou when here below,
Our souls the joys celestial seek
Which from thy sorrows flow.
We would not live by bread alone,
But by that Word of grace,
In strength of which we travel on
To our abiding place.
Be known to us in breaking bread,
But do not then depart;
Saviour, abide with us, and spread
Thy table in our heart.
There sup with us in love Divine;
lines.ko: 신성한 사랑 속에서 우리와 함께 만찬을 즐기세요.

lines.en: Thy body and thy blood,
That living bread, that heav'nly wine,
lines.ko: 그 살아있는 빵, 그 천국의 포도주,

lines.en: Be our immortal food.

title_en: At the Lamb's high feast we sing

lines.en: At the Lamb's high feast we sing
Praise to our victorious King,
Who hath washed us in the tide
Flowing from his pierced side;
Praise we him whose love divine
Gives his sacred blood for wine,
Gives his body for the feast,
Christ the Victim, Christ the Priest.
Where the paschal blood is poured,
Death's dark angel sheathes his sword;
Israel's hosts triumphant go
Through the wave that drowns the foe.
Praise we Christ, whose blood was shed,
Paschal Victim, Paschal Bread;
With sincerity and love
Eat we manna from above.
Mighty Victim from the sky,
Pow'rs of hell beneath thee lie;
lines.ko: 당신 아래에는 지옥의 힘이 놓여 있습니다.

lines.en: Death is conquered in the fight,
Thou hast brought us life and light:
Hymns of glory and of praise,
Risen Lord, to thee we raise;
Holy Father, praise to thee,
With the Spirit, ever be.

title_en: O God of mercy, God of might

lines.en: O God of mercy, God of might,
In love and pity infinite,
Teach us, as ever in thy sight,
To live our life to thee.
lines.ko: 당신을 위해 우리의 삶을 살기 위해.

lines.en: And thou who cam'st on earth to die,
That fallen man might live thereby,
lines.ko: 그 타락한 인간은 이로써 살 수 있게 되었고,

lines.en: O hear us, for to thee we cry
lines.ko: 오 우리의 말을 들으소서 우리가 당신께 부르짖나이다

lines.en: In hope, O Lord, to thee.
Teach us the lesson thou hast taught,
lines.ko: 당신이 가르친 교훈을 우리에게 가르쳐 주소서.

lines.en: To feel for those thy blood hath bought;
lines.ko: 당신의 피로 사신 이들을 동정하기 위해;

lines.en: That ev'ry word and deed and thought
May work a work for thee.
For they are brethren, far and wide,
lines.ko: 그들은 멀리 떨어져 있는 형제이기 때문입니다.

lines.en: Since thou, O Lord, for them hast died;
Then teach us, whatsoe'er betide,
lines.ko: 그럼 우리에게 가르쳐 주세요. 무슨 일이 있어도

lines.en: To love them all in thee.
lines.ko: 당신 안에 있는 그들 모두를 사랑합니다.

lines.en: In sickness, sorrow, want, or care,
Whate'er it be, 'tis ours to share;
lines.ko: 그것이 무엇이든 공유하는 것은 우리의 것입니다.

lines.en: May we, when help is needed, there
lines.ko: 도움이 필요할 때 우리가 그곳에 있기를 바랍니다

lines.en: Give help as unto thee.

title_en: We give thee but thine own

lines.en: We give thee but thine own,
lines.ko: 우리는 당신에게 주지만 당신의 것을 드립니다.

lines.en: Whate'er the gift may be:
All that we have is thine alone,
lines.ko: 우리가 가진 모든 것은 오직 당신의 것입니다.

lines.en: A trust, O Lord, from thee.
May we thy bounties thus
lines.ko: 우리가 당신의 현상금을 이렇게 하길 바랍니다

lines.en: As stewards true receive,
And gladly, as thou blessest us,
lines.ko: 그리고 당신이 우리를 축복하신 것처럼 기쁘게

lines.en: To thee our firstfruits give.
O hearts are bruised and dead,
And homes are bare and cold,
And lambs for whom the Shepherd bled
lines.ko: 그리고 목자가 위하여 피를 흘린 양들

lines.en: Are straying from the fold.
And we believe thy Word,
Though dim our faith may be,
Whate'er for thine we do, O Lord,
lines.ko: 주님, 당신을 위해 우리는 무엇을 합니까?

lines.en: We do it unto thee.

title_en: Lord, thou lov'st the cheerful giver

lines.en: Lord, thou lov'st the cheerful giver,
lines.ko: 십자가 군병 되어서 예수를 따를 때
lines.id: Apakah aku seorang prajurit salib,

lines.en: Who with open heart and hand
lines.id: Pengikut Anak Domba

lines.en: Blesses freely, as a river
lines.ko: 나의 주 그리스도 나를 속량 했으니
lines.id: Dan aku akan takut untuk mengakui tujuan-Nya,

lines.en: That refreshes all the land.
lines.ko: 그 십자가를 벗은 후 저 면류관 쓰리
lines.id: Atau malu untuk menyebut nama-Nya

lines.en: Grant us then the grace of giving
lines.id: Dalam nama Kristus Raja,

lines.en: With a spirit large and free,
lines.id: yang telah membelikan nyawanya untukku

lines.en: That our life and all our living,
lines.id: Melalui kasih karunia aku akan memakai mahkota pesta prom,

lines.en: We may consecrate to thee.
lines.id: apa pun salibku!

lines.en: We are thine, thy mercy sought us,
lines.ko: 뭇 성도 피를 흘리며 큰 싸움 하는데
lines.id: Haruskah saya dibawa ke langit.

lines.en: Found us in death's dreadful way,
lines.ko: 나 어찌 편히 누워서 상 받기 바랄까
lines.id: Di tempat tidur yang nyaman dan mengalir,

lines.en: To the fold in safety brought us,
lines.ko: 나의 주 그리스도 나를 속량 했으니
lines.id: Sementara yang lain berjuang untuk memenangkan hadiah,

lines.en: Never more from thee to stray.
lines.ko: 그 십자가를 벗은 후 저 면류관 쓰리
lines.id: Dan berlayar melintasi lautan berdarah

lines.en: Thine own life thou freely gavest
lines.id: Dalam nama Kristus Raja,

lines.en: As an off'ring on the cross
lines.id: yang telah membelikan nyawanya untukku

lines.en: For each sinner whom thou savest
lines.id: Melalui kasih karunia aku akan memakai mahkota pesta prom,

lines.en: From eternal shame and loss.
lines.id: apa pun salibku!

lines.en: Blest by thee with gifts and graces,
lines.ko: 이 죄악 많은 세상에 수많은 원수들
lines.id: Apakah tidak ada musuh yang harus aku hadapi

lines.en: May we heed thy church's call;
lines.ko: 날 유혹하고 해치나 내 주만 따르리
lines.id: Apakah aku tidak boleh membendung banjir itu

lines.en: Gladly in all times and places
lines.ko: 나의 주 그리스도 나를 속량 했으니
lines.id: Apakah dunia yang keji ini merupakan teman rahmat,

lines.en: Give to thee who givest all.
lines.ko: 그 십자가를 벗은 후 저 면류관 쓰리
lines.id: Untuk membantuku menuju Tuhan

lines.en: Thou hast bought us, and no longer
lines.id: Dalam nama Kristus Raja,

lines.en: Can we claim to be our own;
lines.id: yang telah membelikan nyawanya untukku

lines.en: Ever free and ever stronger,
lines.id: Melalui kasih karunia aku akan memakai mahkota pesta prom,

lines.en: We shall serve thee, Lord, alone.
lines.id: apa pun salibku!

lines.en: Saviour, thou hast freely given
lines.ko: 나 면류관을 쓰려고 몸 바쳐 싸울 때
lines.id: Tentu saja saya harus bertarung jika saya ingin memerintah.

lines.en: All the blessings we enjoy,
lines.ko: 주 내게 용기 주시사 이기게 하시네
lines.id: Tingkatkan keberanianku, Tuhan.

lines.en: Earthly store and bread of heaven,
lines.ko: 나의 주 그리스도 나를 속량 했으니
lines.id: Aku akan menanggung jerih payah, menahan rasa sakit,

lines.en: Love and peace without alloy;
lines.ko: 그 십자가를 벗은 후 저 면류관 쓰리
lines.id: Didukung oleh firman-Mu.

lines.en: Humbly now we bow before thee,
lines.id: Dalam nama Kristus Raja,

lines.en: And our all to thee resign;
lines.id: yang telah membelikan nyawanya untukku

lines.en: For the kingdom, pow'r, and glory,
lines.id: Melalui kasih karunia aku akan memakai mahkota pesta prom,

lines.en: Are, O Lord, for ever thine.
lines.id: apa pun salibku!

title_en: Zion, founded on the mountains

lines.en: From Psalm 87
Zion, founded on the mountains,
God, thy Maker, loves thee well;
lines.ko: 당신을 만드신 하나님은 당신을 매우 사랑하십니다.

lines.en: He has chosen thee, most precious,
He delights in thee to dwell;
God's own city, God's own city, God's own city,
lines.ko: 하나님의 도시, 하나님의 도시, 하나님의 도시,

lines.en: Who can all thy glory tell?
lines.ko: 주의 모든 영광을 누구에게 말할 수 있으리이까?

lines.en: Heathen lands and hostile peoples
Soon shall come the Lord to know;
lines.ko: 곧 주님께서 오셔서 알게 되실 것입니다.

lines.en: Nations born again in Zion
Shall the Lord's salvation show;
God Almighty, God Almighty, God Almighty,
lines.ko: 전능하신 하나님, 전능하신 하나님, 전능하신 하나님,

lines.en: Shall on Zion strength bestow.
When the Lord shall count the nations,
Sons and daughters he shall see,
lines.ko: 그는 아들과 딸을 보게 될 것이다.

lines.en: Born to endless life in Zion,
And their joyful song shall be:
lines.ko: 그리고 그들의 즐거운 노래는 다음과 같을 것이다:

lines.en: "Blessed Zion, Blessed Zion, Blessed Zion,
All our fountains are in thee."
lines.ko: 우리의 모든 샘이 당신 안에 있습니다."

title_en: We have heard the joyful sound

lines.en: We have heard the joyful sound:
lines.ko: 기쁜 소리 들리니 예수 구원 하신다
lines.id: Selat adalah pintu gerbang menuju penyelamatan,

lines.en: Jesus saves! Jesus saves!
lines.id: Sempitkan jalan menuju ke sana.

lines.en: Spread the tidings all around:
lines.ko: 주님 명령 하시니 산을 넘고 물 건너
lines.id: Rock-y jalan hidup adalah,

lines.en: Jesus saves! Jesus saves!
lines.ko: 온 세상에 전하라 예수 구원 하신다
lines.id: Kasar, dan dibimbing dengan hati-hati.

lines.en: Bear the news to ev'ry land,
lines.id: Namun, meskipun kita semua terjerat.

lines.en: Climb the steeps and cross the waves,
lines.id: Dalam kekotoran dosa,

lines.en: Onward! 'tis our Lord's command;
lines.id: Mari kita tunda setiap pengrusakan,

lines.en: Jesus saves! Jesus saves!
lines.id: Cari gerbang selat dan masuk!
Ayo, masuklah melalui gerbang yang selat,
Jalan dan pintu keselamatan!
Inilah jalannya, berjalanlah kita di dalamnya
Inilah hidup yang lebih baik lagi!

lines.en: Waft it on the rolling tide:
lines.id: Banyak yang lebih suka banyak lengkungan,

lines.en: Jesus saves! Jesus saves!
lines.ko: 모든 죄인 들으라 예수 구원 하신다
lines.id: Jalan yang dilalui luas selama bertahun-tahun.

lines.en: Tell to sinners far and wide:
lines.id: Jalan seperti itu, meski menyenangkan untuk dilalui,

lines.en: Jesus saves! Jesus saves!
lines.id: Berakhir dengan kehancuran dan air mata.

lines.en: Sing, ye islands of the sea;
lines.id: Mari kita tinggalkan harta duniawi,

lines.en: Echo back, ye ocean caves;
lines.id: Kemuliaan dan kawasan loteng

lines.en: Earth shall keep her jubilee:
lines.id: Berjalanlah di jalan Injil,

lines.en: Jesus saves! Jesus saves!
lines.id: Masuklah ke dalam kehidupan melalui gerbang yang sesak.
Ayo, masuklah melalui gerbang yang selat,
Jalan dan pintu keselamatan!
Inilah jalannya, berjalanlah kita di dalamnya
Inilah hidup yang lebih baik lagi!

lines.en: Sing above the battle strife,
lines.ko: 환난 중에 하는 말 예수 구원 하신다
lines.id: Yesus telah membuka keselamatan.

lines.en: Jesus saves! Jesus saves!
lines.id: Berjalanlah dalam kekuatan rahmat-Nya.

lines.en: By his death and endless life,
lines.ko: 지은 죄로 인하여 슬픈 맘이 있어도
lines.id: Keluarlah tanpa ragu-ragu!

lines.en: Jesus saves! Jesus saves!
lines.ko: 숨질 때에 내 할 말 예수 구원 하신다
lines.id: Aktif, untuk tempat tinggal hidup kita!

lines.en: Sing it softly through the gloom,
lines.id: Gerbang kehidupan tidak akan ada selamanya.

lines.en: When the heart for mercy craves;
lines.id: Suatu hari nanti akan tutup dan kemudian

lines.en: Sing in triumph o'er the tomb
lines.id: Semua keinginanmu tidak akan pernah bisa

lines.en: Jesus saves! Jesus saves!
lines.id: Buka penanya untukmu, untung!
Ayo, masuklah melalui gerbang yang selat,
Jalan dan pintu keselamatan!
Inilah jalannya, berjalanlah kita di dalamnya
Inilah hidup yang lebih baik lagi!

lines.en: Give the winds a mighty voice,
lines.id: Berteriaklah kepada angin, Yesus menyelamatkan!

lines.en: Jesus saves! Jesus saves!
lines.id: Bersukacitalah, hai bangsa-bangsa, Yesus menyelamatkan

lines.en: Let the nations now rejoice
lines.id: Beritakan Injil keselamatan ke gunung-gunung dan ladang-ladang

lines.en: Jesus saves! Jesus saves!
lines.id: Yesus, lagu kemenangan kami, selamatkan kami

lines.en: Shout salvation full and free,
Highest hills and deepest caves;
This our song of victory
Jesus saves! Jesus saves!

title_en: Christ for the world we sing

lines.en: Christ for the world we sing;
The world to Christ we bring
With loving zeal;
The poor and them that mourn,
The faint and overborne,
Sin-sick and sorrow-worn,
Whom Christ doth heal.
Christ for the world we sing;
The world to Christ we bring
With fervent pray'r;
The wayward and the lost,
lines.ko: 길을 잃은 자와 길을 잃은 자,

lines.en: By restless passions tossed,
Redeemed at countless cost
lines.ko: 셀 수 없이 많은 비용을 들여 구해낸

lines.en: From dark despair.
Christ for the world we sing;
The world to Christ we bring
With one accord;
With us the work to share,
With us reproach to dare,
With us the cross to bear,
For Christ our Lord.
Christ for the world we sing;
The world to Christ we bring
With joyful song;
The newborn souls whose days,
Reclaimed from error's ways,
Inspired with hope and praise
To Christ belong.

title_en: Arm of the Lord, awake, awake

lines.en: Arm of the Lord, awake, awake!
Put on thy strength, the nations shake,
And let the world, adoring, see
Triumphs of mercy wrought by thee.
Say to the heathen from thy throne:
"I am Jehovah, God alone."
Thy voice their idols shall confound,
lines.ko: 당신의 목소리가 그들의 우상들을 혼란스럽게 할 것입니다.

lines.en: And cast their altars to the ground.
Let Zion's time of favor come;
O bring the tribes of Israel home;
And let our wond'ring eyes behold
Gentile and Jews in Jesus' fold.
lines.ko: 예수님의 우리 안에 있는 이방인과 유대인.

lines.en: Almighty God, thy grace proclaim
In ev'ry clime of every name;
Let adverse pow'rs before thee fall,
lines.ko: 당신이 쓰러지기 전에 불리한 세력이 나타나도록 하십시오.

lines.en: And crown the Saviour Lord of all.
lines.ko: 그리고 구세주를 모든 것의 주님으로 삼으십시오.

title_en: O'er the gloomy hills of darkness

lines.en: O'er the gloomy hills of darkness,
Cheered by no celestial ray,
Sun of Righteousness, arising,
Bring the bright, the glorious day;
Send the gospel
To the earth's remotest bounds.
Kingdoms wide that sit in darkness,
lines.ko: 어둠 속에 앉아 있는 넓은 왕국들,

lines.en: Grant them, Lord, the glorious light;
And from eastern coast to western
May the morning chase the night,
And redemption,
Freely purchased win the day.
Fly abroad, thou mighty gospel,
Win and conquer, never cease;
May thy lasting, wide dominions
lines.ko: 당신의 영속적이고 넓은 통치권이 있기를 바랍니다

lines.en: Multiply and still increase;
Sway thy sceptre,
Saviour, all the world around.

title_en: Jesus shall reign where'er the sun

lines.en: From Psalm 72
lines.ko: 햇빛을 받는 곳마다 주 예수 다스리시고
lines.id: Yesus akan memerintah di mana pun matahari berada

lines.ko: 이 세상 끝날 때까지 그 나라 왕성하리라
lines.id: Apakah perjalanan suksesnya berjalan
Kerajaannya tersebar dari pantai ke pantai,
Sampai bulan tidak akan bertambah dan berkurang lagi.

lines.en: Jesus shall reign where'er the sun
lines.id: Kepada-Nya doa tiada henti dipanjatkan,

lines.en: Does his successive journeys run;
lines.ko: 그 기도 향기 되어서 주 앞에 상달 하도다
lines.id: Dan pujian yang tak ada habisnya memahkotai kepala-Nya.

lines.en: His kingdom stretch from shore to shore,
lines.id: Namanya seperti wewangian manis akan naik daun

lines.en: Till moons shall wax and wane no more.
lines.id: Dengan pengorbanan setiap pagi.

lines.en: For him shall endless prayer be made,
lines.ko: 온 세상 모든 사람들 그 사랑 찬송 하도다
lines.id: Manusia dan alam lidah semua orang

lines.en: And praises throng to crown his head;
lines.id: Tinggallah dalam cinta-Nya dengan nyanyian termanis,

lines.en: His Name, like sweet perfume, shall rise
lines.id: Dan suara-suara bayi akan diumumkan

lines.en: With ev'ry morning sacrifice.
lines.id: Berkat awal mereka atas nama-Nya.

lines.en: People and realms of ev'ry tongue
lines.ko: 주 예수 계신 곳마다 그 은혜 충만 하도다
lines.id: Berkah berlimpah di mana pun Dia memerintah

lines.en: Dwell on his love with sweetest song;
lines.ko: 곤하고 지친 사람들 주님의 사랑 받도다
lines.id: Tahanan itu melompat untuk melepaskan rantainya,

lines.en: And infant voices shall proclaim
lines.id: Yang lelah mendapat istirahat abadi,

lines.en: Their early blessings on his Name.
lines.id: Dan semua anak miskin diberkati.

lines.en: Blessings abound where'er he reigns;
lines.ko: 이 세상 모든 만물아 주 앞에 경배 하여라
lines.id: Biarkan setiap makhluk bangkit dan membawa

lines.en: The pris'ner leaps to lose his chains,
lines.ko: 저 천군 천사 다 함께 주님을 찬송 하여라 아멘
lines.id: Penghormatan khusus untuk Raja kita

lines.en: The weary find eternal rest,
lines.id: Para malaikat turun dengan lagu-lagu yang bermanfaat,

lines.en: And all the sons of want are blest.
lines.id: Dan bumi mengulangi suara A-men yang keras! Amin.

lines.en: Let ev'ry creature rise and bring
Peculiar honors to our King,
Angels descend with songs again,
And earth repeat the loud Amen.

title_en: O Lord our God, arise

lines.en: O Lord our God, arise!
The cause of truth maintain,
And wide o'er all the peopled world
lines.ko: 그리고 모든 사람들이 사는 세상 너머로

lines.en: Extend thy blessed reign.
Thou Prince of life, arise!
Nor let thy glory cease;
Far spread the conquests of thy grace,
And bless the earth with peace.
Thou Holy Ghost, arise!
Expend thy quick'ning wing,
And o'er a dark and ruined world
Let light and order spring.
All on the earth, arise!
To God the Saviour sing;
From shore to shore, from earth to heav'n,
Let echoing anthems ring.

title_en: Thou, whose almighty word

lines.en: Thou, whose almighty word
Chaos and darkness heard,
And took their flight,
Hear us, we humbly pray;
lines.ko: 우리의 말을 들으십시오. 우리는 겸손히 기도합니다.

lines.en: And, where the gospel's day
Sheds not its glorious ray,
Let there be light.
Thou, who didst come to bring
On thy redeeming wing
Healing and sight,
Health to the sick in mind,
Sight to the inly blind,
O now to all mankind
Let there be light.
Spirit of truth and love,
Lifegiving, holy Dove,
Speed forth thy flight;
Move o'er the waters' face,
Bearing the lamp of grace
And in earth's darkest place
Let there be light.
Holy and blessed Three,
Glorious Trinity,
Wisdom, Love, Might!
Boundless as ocean's tide,
Rolling in fullest pride
Through the world far and wide
Let there be light.

title_en: For my sake and the gospel's, go

lines.en: "For my sake and the gospel's go
And tell redemption's story";
His heralds answer, "Be it so,
And thine, Lord, all the glory!"
They preach his birth, his life, his cross,
lines.ko: 그들은 그분의 탄생과 삶과 십자가를 설교합니다.

lines.en: The love of his atonement,
For whom they count the world but loss,
His Easter, his enthronement.
Hark, hark, the trump of jubilee
Proclaims to ev'ry nation,
From pole to pole, by land and sea,
Glad tidings of salvation:
As nearer draws the day of doom,
While still the battle rages,
The heav'nly Dayspring through the gloom
Breaks on the night of ages.
Still on and on the anthems spread
Of alleluia voices,
In concert with the holy dead
The warrior church rejoices;
Their snow white robes are washed in blood,
lines.ko: 그들의 눈처럼 하얀 예복은 피로 씻겨졌고,

lines.en: Their golden harps are ringing;
Earth and the paradise of God
One triumph song are singing.
He comes, whose advent trumpet drowns
lines.ko: 그가 온다, 그의 재림의 나팔소리가 익사한다

lines.en: The last of time's evangels,
Emmanuel crowned with many crowns,
The Lord of saints and angels:
O Life, Light, Love, the great I AM,
lines.ko: 오 생명이요, 빛이요, 사랑이요, 위대하신 나는 존재하는 자이시며,

lines.en: Triune, who changest never,
The throne of God and of the Lamb
Is thine, and thine for ever.

title_en: Fling out the banner! let it float

lines.en: Fling out the banner! let it float
Skyward and seaward, high and wide;
lines.ko: 하늘을 향해, 바다를 향해, 높고 넓은;

lines.en: The sun that lights its shining folds,
The cross on which the Saviour died.
Fling out the banner! angels bend
In anxious silence o'er the sign,
And vainly seek to comprehend
The wonder of the love Divine,
Fling out the banner! heathen lands
Shall see from far the glorious sight,
lines.ko: 멀리서 영광스러운 광경을 보게 될 것이며,

lines.en: And nations, crowding to be born,
Baptize their spirits in its light.
lines.ko: 그 빛으로 그들의 영혼에 세례를 주십시오.

lines.en: Fling out the banner! sin-sick souls,
That sink and perish in the strife,
Shall touch in faith its radiant hem
And spring immortal into life.
Fling out the banner! let it float
Skyward and seaward, high and wide,
lines.ko: 하늘을 향해, 바다를 향해, 높고 넓은,

lines.en: Our glory, only in the cross;
Our only hope, the Crucified!
lines.ko: 우리의 유일한 희망, 십자가에 못 박히신 분!

lines.en: Fling out the banner! wide and high,
Seaward and skyward, let it shine:
lines.ko: 바다를 향하여, 하늘을 향하여 빛나게 하소서:

lines.en: Nor skill, nor might, nor merit ours;
We conquer only in that sign.

title_en: Send thou, O Lord, to every place

lines.en: Send thou, O Lord, to ev'ry place
lines.id: Bangkitlah dan lawanlah iblis Engkau yang dosa-dosanya telah dihapuskan

lines.en: Swift messengers before thy face,
lines.id: Berani melawan pasukan kejahatan datang dan berkumpul untuk pertempuran Lihat

lines.en: The heralds of thy wondrous grace,
lines.ko: 심판날과 멸망의 날 네가 섰는 눈앞에
lines.id: penghakiman semakin dekat Dan hari kebinasaan yang mengerikan Hari itu hampir tiba

lines.en: Where thou thyself wilt come.
lines.id: Kemuliaan kemuliaan haleluya Kemuliaan kemuliaan haleluya

lines.en: Glory glory hallelujah For triumph drawing near
lines.ko: 영광 영광 할렐루야 영광 영광 할렐루야
lines.id: Kemuliaan kemuliaan haleluya Karena kemenangan sudah dekat
Kemuliaan, kemuliaan, haleluya, kita akan segera menang.

lines.en: Send men whose eyes have seen the King,
lines.id: Bangkitlah dan lawanlah iblis Engkau yang dosa-dosanya telah dihapuskan

lines.en: Men in whose ears his sweet words ring;
lines.id: Semakin dekat datanglah keributan dari barisan musuh yang sangat besar. Keluarkan kami

lines.en: Send such thy lost ones home to bring;
lines.ko: 무섭고도 더러운 죄 모두 떨쳐 버리고
lines.id: pelanggaran kita sendiri Dan dosa-dosa yang mengkhianati; Percayalah pada Tuhan dan hilangkan rasa takut

lines.en: Send them where thou wilt come.
lines.id: Kemuliaan kemuliaan haleluya Kemuliaan kemuliaan haleluya

lines.en: Glory glory hallelujah For triumph drawing near
lines.ko: 영광 영광 할렐루야 영광 영광 할렐루야
lines.id: Kemuliaan kemuliaan haleluya Karena kemenangan sudah dekat
Kemuliaan, kemuliaan, haleluya, kita akan segera menang.

lines.en: To bring good news to souls in sin;
lines.id: Bangkitlah dan lawanlah iblis Engkau yang dosa-dosanya telah dihapuskan

lines.en: The bruised and broken hearts to win;
lines.ko: 구주 예수 그리스도 크신 팔을 벌리고
lines.id: Yesus Kristus menunggu dengan tangan terbuka Bagi semua orang yang percaya dan berdoa Dia ada

lines.en: In ev'ry place to bring them in
lines.id: ingin sekali membantu Anda; Datanglah kepada-Nya dan jangan tunda lagi. Datanglah sekarang. Panggilan-Nya sudah jelas

lines.en: Where thou thyself wilt come.
lines.id: Kemuliaan kemuliaan haleluya Kemuliaan kemuliaan haleluya

lines.en: Glory glory hallelujah For triumph drawing near
lines.ko: 영광 영광 할렐루야 영광 영광 할렐루야
lines.id: Kemuliaan kemuliaan haleluya Karena kemenangan sudah dekat
Kemuliaan, kemuliaan, haleluya, kita akan segera menang.

lines.en: Gird each one with the Spirit's sword,
The sword of thine own deathless Word;
And make them conqu'rors, conqu'ring Lord
Where thou thyself wilt come.
Raise up, O Lord the Holy Ghost,
From this broad land a mighty host,
Their war cry, "We will seek the lost
Where thou, O Christ, wilt come."

title_en: Ye Christian heralds, go proclaim

lines.en: Ye Christian heralds, go proclaim
Salvation through Emmanuel's Name!
To distant climes the tidings bear,
And plant the Rose of Sharon there.
God shield you with a wall of fire,
With flaming seal your breasts inspire,
lines.ko: 불타는 봉인으로 당신의 가슴에 영감을 주고,

lines.en: Bid raging winds their fury cease,
And hush the tempests into peace.
lines.ko: 그리고 폭풍우를 잠잠하게 하여 평화롭게 만드십시오.

lines.en: And when our labors all are o'er,
Then we shall meet to part no more;
lines.ko: 그러면 우리는 더 이상 만나서 헤어지지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: Meet with the blood-bought throng to fall,
lines.ko: 피 값으로 사서 넘어질 무리를 만나라

lines.en: And crown our Jesus Lord of all.
lines.ko: 그리고 우리 예수님을 모든 것의 주님으로 삼으십시오.

title_en: All lands, to God in joyful sounds

lines.en: From Psalm 66:1-7
All lands, to God in joyful sounds
Aloft your voices raise;
Sing forth the honor of his Name,
And glorious make his praise.
Say ye to God, how terrible
In all thy works art thou!
To thee thy foes by thy great pow'r
Shall be constrained to bow.
Yea, all the earth shall worship thee,
And unto thee shall sing;
To thy great Name shall songs of joy
lines.ko: 당신의 크신 이름을 위하여 기쁨의 노래를 부르리이다

lines.en: With loud hosannas ring.
O come, behold the works of God,
lines.ko: 오, 와서 하나님께서 하시는 일을 보라.

lines.en: His mighty doings see;
In dealing with the sons of men
Most wonderful is he.
He led in safety through the flood
The people of his choice,
He turned he sea to solid ground;
In him let us rejoice.
He rules for ever by his might,
His eyes the nations try;
Let not the proud, rebellious ones
Exalt themselves on high.

title_en: Speed thy servants, Saviour, speed them

lines.en: Speed thy servants, Saviour, speed them;
Thou art Lord of winds and waves;
They were bound, but thou hast freed them;
lines.ko: 그들은 묶여 있었지만 당신께서는 그들을 풀어 주셨습니다.

lines.en: Now they go to free the slaves:
Be thou with them,
'Tis thine arm alone that saves.
Friends, and home, and all forsaking,
Lord they go at thy command,
As their stay thy promise taking,
While they traverse sea and land:
O be with them;
Lead them safely by the hand.
When they reach the land of strangers,
And the prospect dark appears,
Nothing seen but toils and dangers,
lines.ko: 수고와 위험 외에는 아무것도 보이지 않습니다.

lines.en: Nothing felt but doubts and fears,
lines.ko: 의심과 두려움 외에는 아무것도 느껴지지 않았습니다.

lines.en: Be thou with them,
Hear their sighs and count their tears.
lines.ko: 그들의 한숨을 듣고 그들의 눈물을 세어 보십시오.

lines.en: Where no fruit appears to cheer them,
lines.ko: 그들을 기쁘게 해줄 과일이 전혀 보이지 않는 곳에서,

lines.en: And they seem to toil in vain,
lines.ko: 그리고 그들은 헛된 수고를 하는 것 같습니다.

lines.en: Then in mercy, Lord, draw near them,
lines.ko: 그러면 주님, 자비로 그들에게 가까이 오십시오.

lines.en: Then their sinking hopes sustain:
Thus supported,
Let their zeal revive again.
In the midst of opposition
Let them trust, O Lord, in thee;
When success attends their mission,
Let thy servants humbler be:
Never leave them
Till thy face in heav'n they see.
lines.ko: 하늘에 있는 당신의 얼굴이 보일 때까지.

title_en: From Greenland's icy mountains

lines.en: From Greenland's icy mountains,
lines.ko: 저 북방 얼음산과 또 대양 산호섬
lines.id: Dari pegunungan es di Greenland,

lines.en: From India's coral strand,
lines.ko: 저 남방 모든 나라 수많은 백성들
lines.id: Dari untaian karang India,

lines.en: Were Afric's sunny fountains
lines.ko: 큰 죄악 범한 민족 다 구원 얻으리
lines.id: Dimana air mancur Af-ric yang cerah

lines.en: Roll down their golden sand,
lines.ko: 참 빛을 받은 우리 곧 오라 부른다
lines.id: Gulung pasir emasnya,

lines.en: From many an ancient river,
lines.id: Dari banyak sungai kuno,

lines.en: From many a palmy plain,
lines.id: Dari banyak dataran palem,

lines.en: They call us to deliver
lines.id: Mereka memanggil kami untuk mengirimkan barang

lines.en: Their land from error's chain.
lines.id: Tanah mereka dari rantai kesalahan.

lines.en: What though the spicy breezes
lines.ko: 주 은혜 받은 우리 큰 책임 잊고서
lines.id: Bisakah kita, yang jiwanya menyala-nyala

lines.en: Blow soft o'er Ceylon's isle;
lines.ko: 주 예수 참된 구원 전하지 않으랴
lines.id: Dengan kebijaksanaan dari tempat tinggi,

lines.en: Though ev'ry prospect pleases,
lines.ko: 온 세상 모든 백성 참 구원 얻도록
lines.id: Bisakah kita menjadi malam bagi para pria

lines.en: And only man is vile:
lines.ko: 온몸과 재산 드려 이 복음 전하자
lines.id: Lampu kehidupan de-ny

lines.en: In vain with lavish kindness
lines.id: Selamatkan! Wahai penyelamatan!

lines.en: The gifts of God are strown;
lines.id: Klaim suara gembira,

lines.en: The heathen in his blindness
lines.id: Sampai setiap negara kembali mengalami kesulitan

lines.en: Bows down to wood and stone.
lines.id: Telah mempelajari Nama Mes-si-ah.

lines.en: Can we, whose souls are lighted
lines.ko: 만왕의 왕 된 예수 이 세상 오셔서
lines.id: Waft, waft, kamu angin, cerita-Nya,

lines.en: With wisdom from on high,
lines.id: Dan kamu, kamu yang air, berguling,

lines.en: Can we to men benighted
lines.ko: 저 부는 바람 따라 이 소식 퍼지고
lines.id: Hingga bagaikan lautan kemuliaan

lines.en: The lamp of life deny?
lines.ko: 저 바다 물결 따라 이 복음 전하자 아멘
lines.id: Itu menyebar dari kutub ke kutub

lines.en: Salvation! O salvation!
lines.id: Sampai sifat kita yang rusak

lines.en: The joyful sound proclaim,
lines.id: Anak Domba yang disembelih bagi orang-orang berdosa,

lines.en: Till each remotest nation
lines.id: Anggap kembali, Raja, Pencipta,

lines.en: Has learned Messiah's Name.
lines.id: Dalam kebahagiaan kembali berkuasa. Amin.

lines.en: Waft, waft, ye winds, his story,
And you, ye waters, roll,
Till like a sea of glory
It spreads from pole to pole.
Till o'er our ransomed nature
The Lamb for sinners slain,
Redeemer, King, Creator,
In bliss returns to reign.

title_en: Lift up your heads, ye gates of brass

lines.en: Lift up your heads, ye gates of brass,
Ye bars of iron, yield,
And let the King of Glory pass;
The cross is in the field:
That banner, brighter than the star
That leads the train of night,
Shines on their march, and guides from far
lines.ko: 그들의 행군을 빛나게 하시고 멀리서 인도하시나니

lines.en: His servants to the fight.
A holy war those servants wage;
Mysteriously at strife,
The pow'rs of heav'n and hell engage
For more than death of life.
Ye armies of the living God,
His sacramental host,
Where hallowed footsteps never trod
lines.ko: 신성한 발자취가 결코 밟히지 않은 곳

lines.en: Take your appointed post:
Though few and small and weak your bands,
lines.ko: 비록 적고 작고 약한 너희 무리일지라도,

lines.en: Strong in your Captain's strength
Go to the conquest of all lands;
All must be his at length.
lines.ko: 결국 모든 것이 그의 것이 되어야 합니다.

lines.en: Those spoils at his victorious feet
lines.ko: 그의 승리의 발 밑에 있는 전리품들

lines.en: You shall rejoice to lay,
And lay yourselves, as trophies meet,
In his great judgment day.
O fear not, faint nor, halt not now;
lines.ko: 오, 두려워하지 마십시오. 기절하지도 말고, 멈추지도 마십시오.

lines.en: In Jesus' Name be strong;
To him shall all the nations bow,
And sing with you this song:
"Uplifted are the gates of brass,
The bars of iron yield;
Behold the King of Glory pass;
The cross has won the field."

title_en: O God, to us show mercy

lines.en: Psalm 67
lines.id: Berdiri, Bela Yesus,

lines.en: Ye sol-diers of the cross
lines.id: Hai para prajurit salib

lines.en: Lift high His roy-al ban-ner,
lines.id: Angkat tinggi-tinggi panji kerajaan-Nya,

lines.en: It must not suf-fer loss:
lines.id: Ia tidak boleh mengalami kerugian:

lines.en: O God, to us show mercy
lines.id: Berdiri, membela Yesus,

lines.en: And bless us in thy grace;
lines.ko: 그 나팔 소리 듣고 곧 나가 싸우라
lines.id: Panggilan trum-pet o-bey

lines.en: Cause thou to shine upon us
lines.ko: 수 없는 원수 앞에 주 따라 갈 때에
lines.id: Maju ke konflik yang dahsyat

lines.en: The brightness of thy face;
lines.ko: 주 예수 힘을 주사 강하게 하시네
lines.id: Di hari-Nya yang mulia ini:

lines.en: That so thy way most holy
lines.id: Kamu yang manusia sekarang melayani Dia

lines.en: On earth may soon be known,
lines.id: A-melawan musuh yang tidak terhitung jumlahnya

lines.en: And unto ev'ry people
lines.id: Biarlah keberanian meningkat seiring bahaya,

lines.en: Thy saving grace be shown.
lines.id: Dan kekuatan demi kekuatan berlawanan.

lines.en: O God, let all men praise thee,
lines.id: Berdiri, membela Yesus,

lines.en: Let all the nations sing;
lines.ko: 네 힘이 부족하니 주 권능 믿으라
lines.id: Berdirilah dalam kekuatan-Nya sendirian

lines.en: In ev'ry land let praises
lines.id: Lengan daging akan mengecewakanmu,

lines.en: And songs of gladness ring;
lines.id: Kamu tidak berani mempercayai milikmu sendiri:

lines.en: For thou shalt judge the people
lines.id: Kenakan baju besi injil,

lines.en: In truth and righteousness,
lines.id: Masing-masing bagian dikenakan dengan doa

lines.en: And through the earth the nations
lines.id: Saat tugas memanggil, atau bahaya,

lines.en: Shall thy just rule confess.
lines.id: Jangan pernah ingin berada di sana.

lines.en: O God, let people praise thee,
lines.id: Para prajurit salib, bangkitlah bagi Tuhan

lines.en: Let all the nations sing,
lines.id: Mari kita bertarung pada hari ini dan anjing akan segera memanggil.

lines.en: For earth in rich abundance
lines.id: Prajurit yang menang menerima hidup kekal.

lines.en: To us her fruit shall bring.
lines.ko: 영광의 주와 함께 왕 노릇 하리라
lines.id: Aku akan memerintah bersama Tuhan yang mulia.

lines.en: The Lord our God shall bless us,
Our God shall blessing send,
And all the earth shall fear him
To its remotest end.

title_en: Arise, O God, and shine

lines.en: Arise, O God, and shine
In all thy saving might,
And prosper each design
To spread thy glorious light:
lines.ko: 당신의 영광스러운 빛을 널리 퍼뜨리기 위해:

lines.en: Let healing streams of mercy flow,
That all the earth thy truth may know.
lines.ko: 온 땅이 당신의 진리를 알게 하소서.

lines.en: Bring distant nations near
To sing thy glorious praise;
Let ev'ry people hear
And learn thy holy ways:
Reign, mighty God, assert thy cause,
lines.ko: 전능하신 하나님이시여, 다스리시며 주의 뜻을 주장하소서

lines.en: And govern by thy righteous laws.
Send forth thy glorious pow'r,
That Gentiles all may see,
And earth present her store
In converts born to thee:
God, our own God, thy church O bless,
lines.ko: 하나님, 우리 하나님, 당신의 교회를 축복하소서.

lines.en: And fill the world with righteousness.
To God, the only wise,
The one immortal King,
Let hallelujahs rise
From ev'ry living thing:
Let all that breathe, on ev'ry coast,
lines.ko: 모든 해안에서 모든 것을 숨쉬게 해주세요.

lines.en: Praise Father, Son, and Holy Ghost.

title_en: I love to tell the story

lines.en: I love to tell the story of unseen things above,
lines.ko: 주 예수 넓은 사랑 그 크신 은혜를
lines.id: Saya suka menceritakan kisahnya

lines.en: Of Jesus and his glory, of Jesus and his love.
lines.ko: 나 힘써 전파함은 참 기쁜 일일세
lines.id: Dari hal-hal yang tidak terlihat di atas,

lines.en: I love to tell the story, because I know 'tis true;
lines.ko: 주 예수 복된 말씀 생명과 진리요
lines.id: Tentang Yesus dan kemuliaan-Nya,

lines.en: It satisfies my longings as nothing else could do.
lines.ko: 내 맘의 갈급함을 다 채워 주시네
lines.id: Tentang Yesus dan kasih-Nya:

lines.ko: 예부터 전한 말씀 주 예수 크신 사랑
lines.id: Saya suka menceritakan kisahnya

lines.ko: 나 항상 전파하기 참 기뻐 하도다
lines.id: Karena aku tahu ini mendatang.
Itu memuaskan kerinduanku
Karena tidak ada hal lain yang bisa dilakukan.
Saya suka menceritakan kisahnya!
Ini akan menjadi temaku dalam kejayaan
Untuk menceritakan kisah lama, lama, dan lama
Tentang Yesus dan kasih-Nya.

lines.en: I love to tell the story, 'twill be my theme in glory
lines.ko: 이 말씀 전할 때에 내 맘이 기쁘고
lines.id: Saya suka menceritakan kisahnya

lines.en: To tell the old, old story of Jesus and his love.
lines.ko: 그 말씀 전할 수록 새 기쁨 넘치네
lines.id: Ini menyenangkan untuk diulangi kembali

lines.ko: 구원의 복된 말씀 못 들은 사람이
lines.id: Tampaknya, setiap kali aku menceritakannya
Lebih manis lagi:

lines.ko: 예부터 전한 말씀 주 예수 크신 사랑
lines.id: Saya suka bercerita,

lines.ko: 나 항상 전파하기 참 기뻐 하도다
lines.id: Bagi sebagian orang belum pernah mendengarnya
Pesan keselamatan
Dari Firman Suci Tuhan sendiri.
Saya suka menceritakan kisahnya!
Ini akan menjadi temaku dalam kejayaan
Untuk menceritakan kisah lama, lama, dan lama
Tentang Yesus dan kasih-Nya.

lines.en: I love to tell the story; more wonderful it seems
lines.ko: 이 말씀 들은 사람 또 듣기 원하고
lines.id: Saya suka menceritakan kisahnya

lines.en: Than all the golden fancies of all our golden dreams.
lines.ko: 목 말라 사모하니 그 말씀 진리라
lines.id: Bagi mereka yang paling mengetahuinya

lines.en: I love to tell the story, it did so much for me;
lines.ko: 그 나라 영광 중에 나 부를 새 노래
lines.id: Tampak lapar dan haus

lines.en: And that is just the reason I tell it now to thee.
lines.id: Untuk mendengarnya, seperti istirahat:

lines.ko: 예부터 전한 말씀 주 예수 크신 사랑
lines.id: Dan ketika dalam adegan kemuliaan

lines.ko: 나 항상 전파하기 참 기뻐 하도다
lines.id: Saya menyanyikan lagu baru dan baru,
'Ini akan menjadi kisah yang lama, yang lama
Yang sudah lama aku cintai.
Saya suka menceritakan kisahnya!
Ini akan menjadi temaku dalam kejayaan
Untuk menceritakan kisah lama, lama, dan lama
Tentang Yesus dan kasih-Nya.

lines.en: I love to tell the story; 'tis pleasant to repeat
What seems, each time I tell it, more wonderfully sweet.
I love to tell the story, for some have never heard
The message of salvation from God's own holy Word.
I love to tell the story; for those who know it best
Seem hungering and thirsting to hear it, like the rest,
And when, in scenes of glory, I sing the new, new song,
'Twill be the old, old story, that I have loved so long.

title_en: Today the Saviour calls

lines.en: Today the Saviour calls:
Ye wand'rers, come;
O ye benighted souls,
Why longer roam?
Today the Saviour calls:
O listen now!
Within these sacred walls
To Jesus bow.
Today the Saviour calls:
For refuge fly;
The storm of justice falls,
And death is nigh.
The Spirit calls today:
Yield to his pow'r;
O grieve him not away;
'Tis mercy's hour.

title_en: Art thou weary, art thou languid

lines.en: From Green-land's i-cy moun-tains,
lines.ko: 저 북방 얼음산과 또 대양 산호섬
lines.id: Dari pegunungan es di Greenland,

lines.en: From In-dia's co-ral strand,
lines.ko: 저 남방 모든 나라 수많은 백성들
lines.id: Dari untaian karang India,

lines.en: Where Af-ric's sun-ny foun-tains
lines.ko: 큰 죄악 범한 민족 다 구원 얻으리
lines.id: Dimana air mancur Af-ric yang cerah

lines.en: Roll down their gold-en sand,
lines.ko: 참 빛을 받은 우리 곧 오라 부른다
lines.id: Gulung pasir emasnya,

lines.en: From many an an-cient riv-er,
lines.id: Dari banyak sungai kuno,

lines.en: From many a palm-y plain,
lines.id: Dari banyak dataran palem,

lines.en: They call us to de-liv-er
lines.id: Mereka memanggil kami untuk mengirimkan barang

lines.en: Their land from er-ror's chain.
lines.id: Tanah mereka dari rantai kesalahan.

lines.en: Art thou sore distress'd?
lines.ko: 주 은혜 받은 우리 큰 책임 잊고서
lines.id: Bisakah kita, yang jiwanya menyala-nyala

lines.en: "Come to me," saith One, "and, coming,
lines.ko: 만왕의 왕 된 예수 이 세상 오셔서
lines.id: Waft, waft, kamu angin, cerita-Nya,

lines.en: Be at rest."
Hath he marks to lead me to him,
If he be my Guide?
"In his feet and hands are wound-prints,
And his side."
Is there diadem, as Monarch,
That his brow adorns?
"Yea, a crown, in very surety,
But of thorns."
If I find him, if I follow,
What his guerdon here?
"Many a sorrow, many a labor,
Many a tear."
If I still hold closely to him,
What hath he at last?
"Sorrow vanquished, labor ended,
Jordan passed."
If I ask him to receive me,
Will he say me nay?
"Not till earth and not till heaven
Pass away."
Finding, following, keeping, struggling,
Is he sure to bless?
"Saints, apostles, prophets, martyrs
Answer, 'Yes.'"

alt_titles: Art thou weary, art thou languid (tune 2)

title_en: Come, ye souls by sin afflicted

lines.en: Come, ye souls by sin afflicted,
Bowed with fruitless sorrow down;
By the broken law convicted,
lines.ko: 깨진 법으로 인해 유죄 판결을 받았습니다.

lines.en: Through the cross behold the crown;
Look to Jesus;
Mercy flows through him alone.
Take his easy yoke and wear it;
lines.ko: 그의 쉬운 멍에를 메고 그것을 입으십시오.

lines.en: Love will make obedience sweet;
Christ will give you strength to bear it,
lines.ko: 그리스도께서는 당신이 그것을 견딜 수 있는 힘을 주실 것입니다.

lines.en: While his wisdom guides your feet
lines.ko: 그의 지혜가 네 발을 인도하시는 동안

lines.en: Safe to glory,
Where his ransomed captives meet.
Blessed are the eyes that see him,
Blest the ears that hear his voice;
Blessed are the souls that trust him,
And in him alone rejoice:
His commandments
Then become their happy choice.
Sweet as home to pilgrim's weary,
Light to newly opened eyes,
Or full springs in deserts dreary,
Is the rest the cross supplies:
All who taste it
Shall to rest immortal rise.

title_en: Come, for the feast is spread

lines.en: Come, for the feast is spread,
Hark to the call:
Come to the Living Bread
Offered to all.
Come to his house of wine,
Low on his breast recline,
All that he has is thine;
lines.ko: 그가 가진 모든 것은 당신의 것입니다.

lines.en: Come, sinner, come.
Come where the fountain flows,
River of life;
Healing for all thy woes,
Doubting, and strife.
Millions have been supplied,
No one was e'er denied,
Come to the crimson tide;
Come, sinner, come.
Come to the throne of grace,
Boldly draw near;
He who would win the race
Must tarry here.
Whate'er thy want may be,
Here is the grace for thee,
Jesus thine only plea;
Come, Christian, come.

title_en: Blow ye the trumpet, blow

lines.en: Blow ye the trumpet, blow!
The gladly solemn sound
Let all the nations know,
To earth's remotest bound;
The year of jubilee is come;
Return, ye ransomed sinners, home;
Return, ye ransomed sinners, home.
Jesus, our great High Priest,
Hath full atonement made;
Ye weary spirits, rest;
Ye mournful souls, be glad:
Extol the Lamb of God;
The sacrificial Lamb;
Redemption through his blood
Throughout the world proclaim:
Ye slaves of sin and hell,
Your liberty receive;
And safe in Jesus dwell,
And blest in Jesus live:
Ye who have sold for nought
Your heritage above,
Receive it back unbought,
The gift of Jesus' love:
The gospel trumpet hear,
The news of heav'nly grace;
And, saved from earth, appear
Before your Saviour's face:

title_en: Come, ye sinners, poor and wretched

lines.en: Come, ye sinners, poor and wretched,
Weak and wounded, sick and sore;
Jesus ready stands to save you,
lines.ko: 예수님은 당신을 구원하기 위해 준비되어 계십니다.

lines.en: Full of pity joined with pow'r:
He is able,
He is able,
He is able,
He is willing; doubt no more.
lines.ko: 그분은 기꺼이 하십니다. 더 이상 의심하지 마십시오.

lines.en: Come, ye needy, come and welcome,
God's free bounty glorify;
True belief and true repentance,
Ev'ry grace that brings you nigh,
Without money,
Without money,
Without money,
Come to Jesus Christ and buy.
Come, ye weary, heavy laden,
Bruised and broken by the fall;
If you tarry till you're better,
You will never come at all:
Not the righteous,
Not the righteous,
Not the righteous,
Sinners Jesus came to call.
Let not conscience make you linger,
Nor of fitness fondly dream;
All the fitness he requireth
Is to feel your need of him;
lines.ko: 당신에게 그 사람이 필요하다고 느끼는 것입니다.

lines.en: This he gives you,
This he gives you,
This he gives you;
'Tis the Spirit's rising beam.
Lo! th'incarnate God, ascended,
Pleads the merit of his blood;
Venture on him, venture wholly,
Let no other trust intrude:
None but Jesus,
None but Jesus,
None but Jesus
Can do helpless sinners good.
lines.ko: 무력한 죄인에게 선한 일을 할 수 있습니다.

title_en: Jesus sinners doth receive

lines.en: "Jesus sinners doth receive:"
Word of surest consolation;
Word all sorrow to relieve,
Word of pardon, peace, salvation!
Naught like this can comfort give:
lines.ko: 이와 같은 것은 위로를 줄 수 없습니다:

lines.en: "Jesus sinners doth receive."
On God's grace we have no claim,
lines.ko: 하나님의 은혜에 대해서는 우리가 주장할 것이 없습니다.

lines.en: Yet to us his pledge is given;
He hath sworn by his own Name,
Open are the gates of heaven.
Take to heart this word and live:
"Jesus sinners doth receive."
When a helpless lamb doth stray,
After it, the Shepherd, pressing
Thro' each dark and dang'rous way,
Brings it back, his own possessing.
Jesus seeks thee, O believe:
"Jesus sinners doth receive."
O, how blest it is to know:
lines.ko: 오, 이것을 아는 것이 얼마나 큰 축복입니까?

lines.en: Were as scarlet my transgression,
It shall be as white as snow
By thy blood and bitter passion;
For these words I now believe:
lines.ko: 나는 이제 다음과 같은 말을 믿습니다.

lines.en: "Jesus sinners doth receive."
Now my conscience is at peace,
From the Law I stand acquitted;
Christ hath purchased my release
And my ev'ry sin remitted.
Naught remains my soul to grieve
lines.ko: 내 영혼에는 슬퍼할 것이 아무것도 남아 있지 않습니다.

lines.en: "Jesus sinners doth receive."

title_en: Come to the Saviour now

lines.en: Come to the Saviour now,
lines.ko: 즐겁게 안식할 날 반갑고 좋은 날
lines.id: Wahai hari istirahat dan kegembiraan,

lines.en: He gently calleth thee;
lines.ko: 내 맘을 편케 하니 즐겁고 기쁜 날
lines.id: Wahai hari yang penuh kegembiraan dan cahaya,

lines.en: In true repentance bow,
lines.ko: 이 날에 천하 만민 다 보좌 앞에서
lines.id: Wahai balsem kepedulian dan kesedihan,

lines.en: Before him bend the knee;
lines.ko: 참 되신 삼위 일체 다 찬송 부르네
lines.id: Paling cantik, paling cemerlang

lines.en: He waiteth to bestow
lines.id: PadaMu yang tinggi dan rendah,

lines.en: Salvation, peace and love,
lines.id: Melalui a-ges bergabung selaras,

lines.en: True joy on earth below,
lines.id: Bernyanyilah Suci, Suci, Suci,

lines.en: A home in heav'n above.
lines.id: Kepada Dewa Tritunggal yang agung.

lines.en: Come to the Saviour now,
lines.ko: 이 날에 하늘에서 새 양식 내리네
lines.id: Hari ini di negara-negara yang lelah

lines.en: Ye who have wandered far;
lines.id: Man-na surgawi jatuh

lines.en: Renew your solemn vow,
lines.ko: 복음의 밝은 빛은 온 세상 비치며
lines.id: Untuk kon-vo-ca-tion suci

lines.en: For his by right you are;
lines.ko: 또 영생 물이 흘러 시원케 하시네
lines.id: Panggilan terompet perak

lines.en: Come, like poor wand'ring sheep
lines.id: Dimana cahaya Injil bersinar

lines.en: Returning to his fold;
lines.id: Dengan sinar yang murni dan bercahaya,

lines.en: His arm will safely keep,
lines.id: Dan air hidup mengalir

lines.en: His love will ne'er grow cold.
lines.id: Dengan aliran sungai yang menyegarkan jiwa.

lines.en: Come to the Saviour, all,
lines.ko: 이 주일 지킴으로 새 은혜 입어서
lines.id: Anugerah baru terus diperoleh

lines.en: Whate'er your burdens be;
lines.id: Mulai hari ini istirahat kita,

lines.en: Hear now his loving call,
lines.ko: 성부께 찬미 하고 성자와 또 성령
lines.id: Kami mencapai sisanya dengan tetap mempertahankannya

lines.en: "Cast all your care on me."
lines.ko: 참되신 삼위 일체 다 찬송 부르세 아멘
lines.id: Untuk membangkitkan yang terbaik,

lines.en: Come, and for ev'ry grief
lines.id: “Kepada Roh Kudus terpujilah,

lines.en: In Jesus you will find
lines.id: Untuk Ayah dan anakku!"

lines.en: A sure and safe relief,
lines.id: Gereja meninggikan suaranya

lines.en: A loving Friend and kind.
lines.id: KepadaMu, terberkatilah Tiga dalam Satu. Amin.

title_en: I was a wandering sheep

lines.en: I was a wand'ring sheep,
lines.id: Aku adalah seekor domba wan-d'ring,

lines.en: I did not love the fold;
lines.ko: 목자의 소리 싫어서 먼 길로 나갔네
lines.id: Saya tidak menyukai lipatannya

lines.en: I did not love my Shepherd's voice,
lines.ko: 방탕한 이 몸은 큰 불효 행하여
lines.id: Aku tidak menyukai suara Gembalaku,

lines.en: I would not be controlled.
lines.ko: 아버지 음성 싫어서 먼 길로 나갔네
lines.id: Saya tidak akan dikendalikan.

lines.en: I was a wayward child,
lines.id: Aku adalah anak yang bandel,

lines.en: I did not love my home;
lines.id: Saya tidak mencintai rumah saya

lines.en: I did not love my Father's voice,
lines.id: Aku tidak mencintai milikku

lines.en: I loved afar to roam.
lines.id: suara ayah,
Aku suka sekali menjelajah.

lines.en: The Shepherd sought his sheep,
lines.ko: 양 잃은 목자는 그 양을 찾으러
lines.id: Penggembala mencari domba-domba-Nya,

lines.en: The Father sought his child;
lines.ko: 산 넘고 강을 건너며 사막을 지났네
lines.id: Sang Ayah mencari anak-Nya

lines.en: They followed me o'er vale and hill,
lines.ko: 갈 길을 모르고 나 지쳐있을 때
lines.id: Mereka mengikutiku ke lembah dan bukit,

lines.en: O'er deserts waste and wild:
lines.ko: 그 목자 마침 나타나 날 구원 하셨네
lines.id: Ada gurun pasir dan liar

lines.en: They found me nigh to death,
lines.id: Mereka menemukanku hampir mati,

lines.en: Famished and faint and lone;
lines.id: Bertani, pingsan, dan sendirian

lines.en: They bound me with the bands of love,
lines.id: Mereka mengikatku dengan ikatan cinta,

lines.en: They saved the wand'ring one.
lines.id: Mereka menyelamatkan yang wan-d'ring.

lines.en: Jesus my Shepherd is;
lines.ko: 내 목자 예수는 날 사랑 하셔서
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, gembalaku adalah,

lines.en: 'Twas he that loved my soul,
lines.ko: 그 피로 나를 씻으사 온전케 하셨네
lines.id: 'Sungguh Dia yang mencintai jiwaku,

lines.en: 'Twas he that washed me in his blood,
lines.ko: 길 잃은 양 찾아 큰 위로 주시고
lines.id: 'Sungguh Dia yang memandikanku dengan darah-Nya,

lines.en: 'Twas he that made me whole;
lines.ko: 그 우리 안에 이끌어 늘 보호 하시네
lines.id: 'Sungguh Dia yang membuatku utuh

lines.en: 'Twas he that sought the lost,
lines.id: 'Sungguh Dia yang mencari yang hilang,

lines.en: That found the wand'ring sheep,
lines.id: Itu menemukan domba wan-d'ring,

lines.en: 'Twas he that brought me to the fold,
lines.id: 'Sungguh Dia yang membawaku ke kandang,

lines.en: 'Tis he that still doth keep.
lines.id: Ini Dia yang masih menyimpan.

lines.en: I was a wand'ring sheep,
lines.id: Tidak ada lagi domba yang lemah,

lines.en: I would not be controlled;
lines.ko: 나 목자 음성 들으며 그 길을 따르리
lines.id: Saya suka dikendalikan

lines.en: But now I love my Shepherd's voice,
lines.id: Saya suka suara gembala saya yang lembut,

lines.en: I love, I love the fold.
lines.ko: 내 아버지의 입에서 영원히 살겠네 아멘
lines.id: Saya suka melipat pra-ful,

lines.en: I was a wayward child,
lines.id: Bukan lagi anak yang bandel,

lines.en: I once preferred to roam;
lines.id: Saya tidak ingin berkeliaran lagi

lines.en: But now I love my Father's voice,
lines.id: Aku menyukai suara Bapa surgawiku,

lines.en: I love, I love his home.
lines.id: Saya cinta, saya cinta rumah-Nya. Amin.

title_en: I sought the Lord, and afterward I knew
title_ko: 내가 여호와께 구하고 그 후에 알았노라 (자체번역)

lines.en: I sought the Lord, and afterward I knew
lines.ko: 내가 여호와께 구하고 그 후에 알았노라

lines.en: He moved my soul to seek him, seeking me;
lines.ko: 그분은 내 영혼을 감동시켜 그분을 찾게 하셨습니다.

lines.en: It was not I that found, O Saviour true,
lines.ko: 오 구세주가 참되심을 발견한 것은 내가 아니니라

lines.en: No, I was found of thee.
Thou didst reach forth thy hand and mine enfold;
lines.ko: 당신은 당신의 손을 내밀었고 내 손은 감싸졌습니다.

lines.en: I walked and sank not on the storm-vexed sea,—
lines.ko: 나는 폭풍우가 몰아치는 바다 위를 걸었고 가라앉지 않았습니다.

lines.en: 'Twas not so much that I on thee took hold,
As thou, dear Lord, on me.
I find, I walk, I love, but, O the whole
lines.ko: 나는 찾고, 걷고, 사랑하지만, 오 전체

lines.en: Of love is but my answer, Lord, to thee;
lines.ko: 주님, 당신께 드리는 나의 대답은 사랑뿐입니다.

lines.en: For thou wert long beforehand with my soul,
lines.ko: 당신은 오래 전부터 내 영혼과 함께 계셨고

lines.en: Always thou lovedst me.

alt_titles: I sought the Lord, and afterward I knew (tune 2)

title_en: What though I cannot break my chain
title_ko: 비록 내가 내 사슬을 끊을 수는 없지만 (자체번역)

lines.en: What tho' I cannot break my chain
lines.ko: 그래도 난 내 사슬을 끊을 수 없어

lines.en: Or e'er throw off my load,
The things impossible to men
Are possible to God.
Who, who shall in thy presence stand,
lines.ko: 누가 당신 앞에 설 수 있겠습니까?

lines.en: Or match Omnipotence;
Unfold the grasp of thy right hand
And pluck the sinner thence?
Faith to be healed I fain would have,
lines.ko: 나는 치유받을 수 있는 믿음을 갖고 싶습니다.

lines.en: O might it now be giv'n;
lines.ko: 오 이제 그것이 주어질 수도 있겠네요;

lines.en: Thou canst, thou canst the sinner save,
lines.ko: 당신은 할 수 있습니다, 당신은 죄인을 구원할 수 있습니다,

lines.en: And make me meet for heav'n.
Bound down with twice ten thousand ties,
Yet let me hear thy call;
lines.ko: 그러나 나로 하여금 당신의 부르심을 듣게 하소서.

lines.en: My soul in confidence shall rise,
Shall rise and break through all.
lines.ko: 일어나서 모든 것을 뚫고 나갈 것입니다.

lines.en: Thou canst o'ercome this heart of mine,
lines.ko: 당신은 내 마음을 이겨낼 수 있어요.

lines.en: Thou wilt victorious prove;
But everlasting strength is thine,
And everlasting love.

title_en: By grace I'm saved

lines.en: By grace I'm saved, grace free and boundless;
lines.ko: 이 날 은 주님 정하신 참 기쁜 날일세
lines.id: Inilah hari yang telah Tuhan jadikan

lines.en: My soul, believe and doubt it not.
lines.ko: 온 천하 만민 주 앞에 다 찬송 하여라
lines.id: Dia menyebut jam-jam itu sebagai milik-Nya

lines.en: Why stagger at this word of promise?
lines.id: Biarlah surga bergembira, biarlah bumi bergembira,

lines.en: Hath Scripture ever falsehood taught?
lines.id: Dan puji-pujian mengelilingi takhta itu.

lines.en: Nay; then this word must true remain:
By grace thou, too, shalt heav'n obtain.
By grace! None dare lay claim to merit;
lines.ko: 주 오늘 부활 하시고 사망을 이겼네
lines.id: Hari ini Dia bangkit dan meninggalkan orang mati,

lines.en: Our works and conduct have no worth.
lines.ko: 구주를 믿는 성도들 그 복음 전하세
lines.id: Dan kerajaan Setan pun jatuh

lines.en: God in his love sent our Redeemer,
lines.id: Hari ini orang-orang kudus kemenangannya menyebar,

lines.en: Christ Jesus, to this sinful earth;
lines.id: Dan segala keajaiban-Nya terungkap.

lines.en: His death did for our sins atone,
And we are saved by grace alone.
By grace! O, mark this word of promise
lines.id: Ho-san-na kepada Raja yang diurapi,

lines.en: When thou art by thy sins oppressed,
lines.ko: 이 날에 주가 오셔서 다 구원 하시리
lines.id: Kepada Putra Suci Daud!

lines.en: When Satan plagues thy troubled conscience,
lines.id: Tolong kami, ya Tuhan, turun dan bawa

lines.en: And when thy heart is seeking rest.
lines.id: Keselamatan dari takhta.

lines.en: What reason cannot comprehend
God by his grace to thee doth send.
By grace! This ground of faith is certain;
lines.ko: 큰 권능 가진 구세주 살 길을 주려고
lines.id: Terpujilah Tuhan yang datang kepada manusia

lines.en: So long as God is true, it stands.
lines.ko: 온 세상 만민 가운데 주 함께 계시네
lines.id: Dengan pesan rahmat,

lines.en: What saints have penned by inspiration,
lines.id: Yang datang dalam nama Tuhan Bapa-Nya

lines.en: What in his Word our God commands,
lines.id: Untuk menyelamatkan ras kita yang penuh dosa!

lines.en: What our whole faith must rest upon,
Is grace alone, grace in his Son.

title_en: Come, thou Fount of every blessing

lines.en: Come, thou Fount of ev'ry blessing,
lines.id: Datanglah, Engkau Sumber berkah,

lines.en: Tune my heart to sing thy grace;
lines.ko: 한량없이 자비하심 측량 할 길 없도다
lines.id: selaraskan hatiku untuk menyanyikan rahmat-Mu

lines.en: Streams of mercy, never ceasing,
lines.id: Aliran belas kasihan yang tidak pernah berhenti,

lines.en: Call for songs of loudest praise,
lines.ko: 구속하신 그 사랑을 항상 찬송 합니다
lines.id: Panggilan untuk lagu pujian yang paling keras.

lines.en: Teach me some melodious sonnet,
lines.id: Ajari aku jaring yang me-lo-dious,

lines.en: Sung by flaming tongues above;
lines.id: Dinyanyikan dengan lidah membara di atas

lines.en: Praise the mount! I'm fixed upon it,
lines.id: Pujilah gunung itu! Aku sudah memutuskannya,

lines.en: Mount of God's unchanging love.
lines.id: Gunung kasih Tuhan yang tak pernah berubah.

lines.en: Here I raise my Ebenezer;
lines.ko: 주의 크신 도움 받아 이 때 까지 왔으니
lines.id: Di sini saya menaikkan Eb-en-e-zer saya

lines.en: Hither by thy help I'm come;
lines.id: Di sini, dengan bantuan-Mu, aku datang

lines.en: And I hope, by thy good pleasure,
lines.ko: 하나님의 품을 떠나 죄에 빠진 우리를
lines.id: Dan aku berharap, demi keridhaan-Mu,

lines.en: Safely to arrive at home.
lines.id: Aman untuk tiba di rumah.

lines.en: Jesus sought me when a stranger,
lines.id: Yesus mencariku ketika orang asing,

lines.en: Wand'ring from the fold of God:
lines.id: Wan-d'ring dari lipatan Tuhan

lines.en: He, to rescue me from danger,
lines.id: Dia, untuk menyelamatkanku dari bahaya,

lines.en: Interposed his precious blood.
lines.id: Menginterposisikan darah-Nya yang berharga.

lines.en: O to grace how great a debtor
lines.ko: 주의 귀한 은혜 받고 일생 빚진 자 되네
lines.id: Oh anugerah betapa besarnya hutang-atau

lines.en: Daily I'm constrained to be;
lines.ko: 주의 은혜 사슬되사 나를 주께 매소서
lines.id: Setiap hari aku dibatasi untuk itu

lines.en: Let that grace now, like a fetter,
lines.ko: 우리 맘은 연약하여 범죄 하기 쉬우니
lines.id: Biarlah rahmat itu sekarang, seperti belenggu,

lines.en: Bind my wand'ring heart to thee.
lines.id: Ikatkan hatiku yang lemah padaMu.

lines.en: Prone to wander, Lord, I feel it,
lines.id: Rawan mengembara, Tuhan, aku merasakannya,

lines.en: Prone to leave the God I love;
lines.id: Cenderung meninggalkan Tuhan yang kucintai

lines.en: Here's my heart, O take and seal it,
lines.id: Ini hatiku, hai ambil dan segellah,

lines.en: Seal it for thy courts above.
lines.id: Segellah itu untuk pelataran-Mu di atas.

title_en: Grace! 'tis a charming sound

lines.en: Grace! 'tis a charming sound,
Harmonious to mine ear;
Heav'n with the echo shall resound,
And all the earth shall hear.
lines.ko: 그러면 온 땅이 듣게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: Grace first contrived a way
To save rebellious man,
And all the steps that grace display
Which drew the wondrous plan.
Grace taught my wand'ring feet
To tread the heav'nly road
And new supplies each hour I meet
While pressing on to God.
Grace all the work shall crown
Through everlasting days;
It lays in heav'n the topmost stone,
lines.ko: 그것은 가장 높은 돌 위에 놓여 있으며,

lines.en: And well deserves the praise.

title_en: Amazing grace

lines.en: Amazing gracehow sweet the sound
lines.ko: 나 같은 죄인 살리신 주 은혜 놀라워
lines.id: Ajaib benar anugerah,

lines.en: That saved a wretch like me!
lines.id: Pembaru hidupku!

lines.en: I once was lost, but now am found
lines.id: Dulu 'ku hilang, buta, bercela,

lines.en: Was blind, but now I see.
lines.id: Kini diselamatkan.

lines.en: 'Twas grace that taught my heart to fear,
lines.ko: 큰 죄악에서 건지신 주 은혜 고마워
lines.id: Ketika hati dirundung cemas,

lines.en: And grace my fears relieved;
lines.ko: 나 처음 믿은 그 시간 귀하고 귀하다
lines.id: Anugerah menghiburku.

lines.en: How precious did that grace appear
lines.id: Betapa berharga anugerah-Nya,

lines.en: The hour I first believed!
lines.id: Saat pertama 'ku percaya.

lines.en: Thro' many dangers, toils and snares,
lines.ko: 이제껏 내가 산 것도 주님의 은혜라
lines.id: Lewat bahaya, maut, dan jerat,

lines.en: I have already come;
lines.ko: 또 나를 장차 본향에 인도해 주시리
lines.id: Ku tlah sampai sejauh ini.

lines.en: 'Tis grace has brought me safe thus far,
lines.id: Anugerah-Nya yang memimpinku,

lines.en: And grace will lead me home.
lines.id: Dan menuntunku pulang.

lines.en: And when this flesh and heart shall fail,
lines.id: Di sana, bersama semua kudus,

lines.en: And mortal life shall cease,
lines.ko: 해처럼 밝게 살면서 주 찬양 하리라 아멘
lines.id: Kita akan bersyukur selamanya,

lines.en: I shall possess within the veil
lines.id: Bernyanyi puji nama Tuhan,

lines.en: A life of joy and peace.
lines.id: Selama-lamanya. Amin.

lines.en: When we've been there ten thousand years,
Bright shining as the sun,
We've no less days to sing God's praise
Than when we've first begun.

title_en: Not what these hands have done

lines.en: Not what my hands have done
Can save my guilty soul;
lines.ko: 내 죄 많은 영혼을 구원하실 수 있습니다.

lines.en: Not what my toiling flesh has borne
lines.ko: 내 수고한 육체가 견뎌낸 것이 아닙니다

lines.en: Can make my spirit whole.
lines.ko: 내 영혼을 온전하게 만들 수 있습니다.

lines.en: Not what I feel or do
Can give me peace with God;
lines.ko: 나에게 하나님과의 평화를 줄 수 있습니다.

lines.en: Not all my prayers and sighs and tears
lines.ko: 나의 모든 기도와 한숨과 눈물이 아닌

lines.en: Can bear my awful load.
lines.ko: 내 엄청난 짐을 견딜 수 있어요.

lines.en: Thy work alone, O Christ,
Can ease this weight of sin;
lines.ko: 이 죄의 무게를 덜어줄 수 있습니다.

lines.en: Thy blood alone, O Lamb of God,
Can give me peace within.
Thy love to me, O God,
lines.ko: 나를 향한 당신의 사랑, 오 하느님,

lines.en: Not mine, O Lord to thee,
lines.ko: 내 것이 아닙니다, 오 주님, 당신께는

lines.en: Can rid me of this dark unrest
lines.ko: 이 어두운 불안을 없애줄 수 있어

lines.en: And set my spirit free.
Thy grace alone, O God,
To me can pardon speak;
Thy pow'r alone, O Son of God,
Can this sore bondage break.
lines.ko: 이 아픈 속박이 깨질 수 있을까요?

lines.en: No other work, save thine,
lines.ko: 다른 일은 하지 마세요. 당신만 구하세요.

lines.en: No other blood will do;
No strength, save that which is divine,
Can bear me safely through.
I bless the Christ of God;
I rest on love divine;
And with unfalt'ring lip and heart
I call this Saviour mine.
lines.ko: 나는 이 구원자를 내 것이라 부른다.

lines.en: This cross dispels each doubt;
I bury in his tomb
Each thought of unbelief and fear,
Each ling'ring shade of gloom.
I praise the God of grace;
I trust his truth and might;
He calls me his, I call him mine,
lines.ko: 그 사람은 나를 자기 사람이라고 부르고, 나도 그를 내 사람이라고 부른다.

lines.en: My God, my joy, my light.
lines.ko: 나의 하나님, 나의 기쁨, 나의 빛.

lines.en: 'Tis he who saveth me,
And freely pardon gives;
I love because he loveth me,
lines.ko: 그 사람이 나를 사랑하기 때문에 나는 사랑한다.

lines.en: I live because he lives.
lines.ko: 그 사람이 살기 때문에 나도 산다.

title_en: We sing the glorious conquest

lines.en: We sing the glorious conquest
lines.ko: 주여 복을 구하오니 편히 가게 하시고
lines.id: Tuhan, rindukan kami dengan nyanyian berkat-Mu,

lines.en: Before Damascus gate,
lines.id: Penuhi hati kami dengan sukacita dan kedamaian

lines.en: When Saul, the church's spoiler,
lines.ko: 광야 같은 세상에서 항상 인도 하소서
lines.id: Marilah kita masing-masing, pos-ses-cinta-Mu bernyanyi,

lines.en: Came breathing threats and hate;
lines.id: Kemenangan dalam mempertimbangkan kembali anugerah.

lines.en: The rav'ning wolf rushed forward
lines.id: Oh, segarkan kembali kami, Oh, segarkan kembali kami,

lines.en: Full early to the prey;
lines.id: Berkelana melewati hutan belantara ini.

lines.en: But lo! the Shepherd met him,
And bound him fast today.
O glory most excelling
lines.ko: 주의 복된 말씀 듣고 무한 감사합니다
lines.id: Terima kasih kami berikan, dan ad-o-ra-tion,

lines.en: That smote across his path!
lines.ko: 구원받은 주의 성도 열매 맺게 하시며
lines.id: Karena suara Injil-Mu yang penuh sukacita

lines.en: O light that pierced and blinded
lines.ko: 하나님이 우리 함께 항상 계시옵소서 아멘
lines.id: Semoga buah keselamatan-Mu

lines.en: The zealot in his wrath!
lines.id: Dalam hati dan kehidupan kita terikat.

lines.en: O voice that spake unto him
lines.id: Selalu setia, Selalu setia

lines.en: The calm, reproving word!
lines.id: Semoga kita ditemukan kebenarannya. Amin.

lines.en: O love that sought and held him
The bondman of his Lord!
O Wisdom ord'ring all things
In order strong and sweet,
What nobler spoil was ever
Cast at the victor's feet?
What wiser master builder
E'er wrought at thine employ
Than he, til now so furious
Thy building to destroy?
Lord, teach thy church the lesson,
Still in her darkest hour
Of weakness and of danger,
To trust thy hidden pow'r:
Thy grace by ways mysterious
The wrath of man can bind,
And in thy boldest foeman
Thy chosen saint can find.

title_en: Come unto me, ye weary

lines.en: "Come unto me, ye weary,
And I will give you rest."
O blessed voice of Jesus
Which comes to hearts oppressed!
It tells of benediction,
Of pardon, grace, and peace,
Of joy that hath no ending,
Of love which cannot cease.
"Come unto me, dear children,
And I will give you light."
lines.ko: 그리고 나는 당신에게 빛을 줄 것입니다."

lines.en: O loving voice of Jesus
Which comes to cheer the night!
Our hearts were filled with sadness,
lines.ko: 우리 마음은 슬픔으로 가득 차 있었고,

lines.en: And we had lost our way;
But morning brings us gladness,
lines.ko: 그러나 아침은 우리에게 기쁨을 가져다 주지만,

lines.en: And songs the break of day.
"Come unto me, ye fainting,
And I will give you life."
O peaceful voice of Jesus
Which comes to end our strife!
The foe is stern and eager,
The fight is fierce and long;
But thou hast made us mighty,
And stronger than the strong.
"And whosoever cometh
I will not cast him out."
O patient love of Jesus
Which drives away our doubt;
Which calls us, very sinners,
Unworthy though we be
Of love so free and boundless,
To come, dear Lord, to thee!

title_en: I am coming, Lord; coming now to thee

lines.en: I hear thy welcome voice
lines.id: Aku mendengar suara sambutan-Mu

lines.en: That calls me, Lord to thee
lines.ko: 내 죄를 정케 하신 주 날 오라 하신다
lines.id: Itu memanggilku, Tuhan, kepada-Mu

lines.en: For cleansing in thy precious blood
lines.id: Untuk pembersihan dalam darah-Mu yang berharga

lines.en: That flowed on Calvary.
lines.id: Itu mengalir di Cal-va-ry.
Saya datang, Tuhan
Datang sekarang kepada-Mu
Cuci aku, bersihkan aku, di dalam darah
Itu mengalir di Cal-va-ry.

lines.en: I am coming, Lord;
lines.id: Meski aku lemah dan keji,

lines.en: Coming now to thee:
lines.ko: 힘 주시고 내 추함을 곧 씻어 주시네
lines.id: Engkau mengerahkan kekuatanku dengan pasti

lines.en: Wash me, cleanse me, in the blood
lines.id: Engkau membersihkan keburukanku sepenuhnya,

lines.en: That flowed on Calvary.
lines.id: Hingga bersih semua dan murni.
Saya datang, Tuhan
Datang sekarang kepada-Mu
Cuci aku, bersihkan aku, di dalam darah
Itu mengalir di Cal-va-ry.

lines.en: Though coming weak and vile,
lines.id: Ini Yesus memanggilku

lines.en: Thou dost my strength assure;
lines.ko: 또 사랑함과 평안함 다 주려 함이라
lines.id: Untuk menyempurnakan iman dan cinta,

lines.en: Thou dost my vileness fully cleanse,
lines.id: Untuk menyempurnakan harapan, kedamaian, dan kepercayaan,

lines.en: Til spotless all and pure.
lines.id: Untuk bumi dan surga di atasnya.
Saya datang, Tuhan
Datang sekarang kepada-Mu
Cuci aku, bersihkan aku, di dalam darah
Itu mengalir di Cal-va-ry.

lines.en: 'Tis Jesus calls me on
lines.ko: 큰 죄인 복 받아 살 길을 얻었네
lines.id: Yesuslah yang menegaskan

lines.en: To perfect faith and love,
lines.ko: 한 없이 넓고 큰 은혜 베풀어 주소서
lines.id: Pekerjaan yang diberkati di dalam,

lines.en: To perfect hope, and peace, and trust,
lines.id: Dengan menambahkan rahmat pada rahmat yang diterima,

lines.en: For earth and heav'n above.
lines.id: Dimana kuasa dosa berkuasa.
Saya datang, Tuhan
Datang sekarang kepada-Mu:
Cuci aku, bersihkan aku, di dalam darah
Itu mengalir di Cal-va-ry.

lines.en: 'Tis Jesus who confirms
lines.ko: 그 피가 맘속에 큰 증거 됩니다
lines.id: Darahnya diberikan oleh saksi

lines.en: The blessed work within,
lines.ko: 내 기도 소리 들으사 다 허락 하소서
lines.id: Di dalam hatiku untukku

lines.en: By adding grace to welcomed grace,
lines.id: Ya, Juruselamat, perhatikanlah doaku setiap kali,

lines.en: Where reigned the pow'r of sin.
lines.id: Kepuasan penuhku jadilah!
Saya datang, Tuhan
Datang sekarang kepada-Mu
Cuci aku, bersihkan aku, di dalam darah
Itu mengalir di Cal-va-ry. Amin.

lines.en: And he the witness gives
To loyal hearts and free,
That ev'ry promise is fulfilled,
If faith but brings the plea.

alt_titles: I hear thy welcome voice

title_en: Lord, like the publican I stand

lines.en: Lord, like the publican I stand,
And lift my heart to thee;
Thy pard'ning grace, O God, command,
lines.ko: 오 하나님, 당신의 용서하시는 은혜, 명령하소서.

lines.en: Be merciful to me.
I smite upon my anxious breast,
O'erwhelmed with agony;
O save my soul by sin oppressed,
lines.ko: 오, 죄에 짓눌린 내 영혼을 구원하소서,

lines.en: Be merciful to me.
My guilt, my shame, I all confess:
lines.ko: 나의 죄책감, 나의 수치심, 나는 모두 고백합니다.

lines.en: I have no hope nor plea
But Jesus' blood and righteousness:
lines.ko: 그러나 예수님의 피와 의는 다음과 같습니다.

lines.en: Be merciful to me.
Here at thy cross I still would wait,
lines.ko: 여기 당신 십자가 앞에서 나는 여전히 기다릴 것입니다.

lines.en: Nor from its shelter flee,
Till thou, O God, in mercy great,
Art merciful to me.

title_en: In thy wrath and hot displeasure

lines.en: From Psalm 38
In thy wrath and hot displeasure,
Chasten not thy servant, Lord;
Let thy mercy, without measure,
Help and peace to me afford.
Heavy is my tribulation,
Sore my punishment has been;
Broken by thine indignation,
I am troubled by my sin.
With my burden of transgression
Heavy laden, overborne,
lines.ko: 무거운 짐을 진, 과중한 짐을 진,

lines.en: Humbled low I make confession,
For my folly now I mourn.
lines.ko: 나의 어리석음 때문에 나는 지금 슬퍼합니다.

lines.en: Weak and wounded, I implore thee;
Lord, to me thy mercy show;
lines.ko: 주님, 나에게 당신의 자비를 보여 주십시오.

lines.en: All my pray'r is now before thee,
lines.ko: 나의 모든 기도가 이제 당신 앞에 있사오니

lines.en: All my trouble thou dost know.
lines.ko: 나의 모든 문제를 당신은 알고 계십니다.

lines.en: Darkness gathers, foes assail me,
But I answer not a word;
lines.ko: 그러나 나는 한 마디도 대답하지 않습니다.

lines.en: All my friends desert and fail me,
lines.ko: 내 친구들은 모두 나를 버리고 실망시킵니다.

lines.en: Only thou my cry hast heard.
Lord, in thee am I confiding;
Thou wilt answer when I call,
Lest my foes, the good deriding,
lines.ko: 내 적들, 좋은 조롱거리가 되지 않도록,

lines.en: Triumph in thy servant's fall.
Lord, my God, do not forsake me,
lines.ko: 주 나의 하나님이여 나를 버리지 마옵소서

lines.en: Let me know that thou art near,
lines.ko: 당신이 가까이 있다는 것을 나에게 알려주세요.

lines.en: Under thy protection take me,
As my Saviour now appear.

title_en: Before thee, God, who knowest all
title_ko: 모든 것을 아시는 하나님이 주 앞에서 (자체번역)

lines.en: Before thee, God, who knowest all,
lines.ko: 모든 것을 아시는 하나님이 주의 앞에

lines.en: With grief and shame I prostrate fall.
I see my sins against thee, Lord,
lines.ko: 주님, 당신께 대한 나의 죄를 봅니다.

lines.en: The sins of thought, of deed, and word.
They press me sore: I cry to thee:
lines.ko: 그들이 나를 몹시 압박하고 있습니다. 나는 당신께 부르짖습니다.

lines.en: O God, be merciful to me!
O Lord, my God, to thee I pray:
lines.ko: 오 주님, 나의 하느님, 당신께 기도드립니다.

lines.en: O cast me not in wrath away!
lines.ko: 오, 나를 진노 속에 버리지 마십시오!

lines.en: Let thy good Spirit ne'er depart,
lines.ko: 당신의 선한 영이 결코 떠나지 않게 하시고,

lines.en: But let him draw to thee my heart
lines.ko: 하지만 그 사람이 내 마음을 당신에게 이끌게 해주세요

lines.en: That truly penitent I be:
O God, be merciful to me!
O Jesus, let thy precious blood
Be to my soul a cleansing flood.
lines.ko: 내 영혼을 깨끗하게 하는 홍수가 되어 주소서.

lines.en: Turn not, O Lord, thy guest away,
lines.ko: 오 주님, 당신의 손님을 물리치지 마십시오.

lines.en: But grant that justified I may
lines.ko: 하지만 그럴 수 있다는 걸 인정해줘

lines.en: Go to my house at peace with thee:
lines.ko: 너와 함께 평안히 내 집으로 가라

lines.en: O God, be merciful to me!

title_en: Take me, O my Father, take me

lines.en: Take me, O my Father, take me;
lines.id: Bawalah aku, oh, Ayahku, bawalah aku

lines.en: Take me, save me, through thy Son;
lines.id: Bawalah aku, selamatkan aku, melalui Putra-Mu

lines.en: That which thou wouldst have me, make me,
lines.ko: 아버지를 떠나 산지 벌써 오래 되었고
lines.id: Apa yang Engkau kehendaki untukku, jadikanlah aku

lines.en: Let thy will in me be done.
lines.ko: 험한 길에 곤한 몸이 이제 돌아 옵니다
lines.id: Biarlah kehendak-Mu terjadi dalam diriku.

lines.en: Long from thee my footsteps straying,
lines.id: Jauh dariMu langkah kakiku melenceng,

lines.en: Thorny proved the way I trod;
lines.id: Thorn-y membuktikan caraku melangkah.

lines.en: Weary come I now, and praying,
lines.id: Lelah datanglah aku sekarang, dan berdoa.

lines.en: Take me to thy love, my God.
lines.id: T
Mereka mengikatku dengan ikatan cinta,
Mereka menyelamatkan yang wan-d'ring.

lines.en: Fruitless years with grief recalling,
lines.ko: 전에 하던 헛된 일을 애통하게 여기고
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, gembalaku adalah,

lines.en: Humbly I confess my sin;
lines.id: 'Sungguh Dia yang mencintai jiwaku,

lines.en: At thy feet, O Father, falling,
lines.id: 'Sungguh Dia yang memandikanku dengan darah-Nya,

lines.en: To thy household take me in.
lines.id: 'Sungguh Dia yang membuatku utuh

lines.en: Freely now to thee I proffer
lines.id: 'Sungguh Dia yang mencari yang hilang,

lines.en: This relenting heart of mine;
lines.id: Itu menemukan domba wan-d'ring,

lines.en: Freely life and soul I offer,
lines.id: 'Sungguh Dia yang membawaku ke kandang,

lines.en: Gift unworthy love like thine.
lines.id: Ini Dia yang masih menyimpan.

lines.en: Once the world's Redeemer, dying,
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, gembalaku adalah,

lines.en: Bore our sins upon the tree;
lines.ko: 그 공로를 의지하여 주만 의지 합니다
lines.id: 'Sungguh Dia yang mencintai jiwaku,

lines.en: On that sacrifice relying,
lines.id: 'Sungguh Dia yang memandikanku dengan darah-Nya,

lines.en: Now I look in hope to thee:
lines.ko: 주의 사랑 품안에서 길이 살게 하소서 아멘
lines.id: 'Sungguh Dia yang membuatku utuh

lines.en: Father, take me; all forgiving,
lines.id: 'Sungguh Dia yang mencari yang hilang,

lines.en: Fold me to thy loving breast;
lines.id: Itu menemukan domba wan-d'ring,

lines.en: In thy love for ever living
lines.id: 'Sungguh Dia yang membawaku ke kandang,

lines.en: I must be for ever blest.
lines.id: Ini Dia yang masih menyimpan.

title_id: Bawalah Aku, Oh, Ayahku, Bawalah Aku

title_en: No, not despairingly come I to thee

lines.en: No, not despairingly
lines.id: Selamat, kami angkat nama baik-Mu

lines.en: Come I to thee;
lines.id: Sesuai dengan himne pujian perpisahan kami.

lines.en: No, not distrustingly
lines.id: Kami berdiri untuk memberkati Engkau sebelum ibadah kami berhenti,

lines.en: Bend I the knee:
lines.id: Dan tetap tenangkan hati kami menantikan sabda damai sejahtera-Mu.

lines.en: Sin hath gone over me,
Yet is this still my plea,
Jesus hath died.
Lord, I confess to thee
lines.id: Berilah kami kedamaian-Mu dalam perjalanan pulang kami

lines.en: Sadly my sin;
lines.id: DenganMu dimulai, bersamaMu hari akan berakhir.

lines.en: All am tell I thee,
lines.id: Jagalah bibirmu dari dosa, hatimu dari rasa malu,

lines.en: All I have been:
lines.id: Bahwa di rumah ini telah memanggil nama-Mu.

lines.en: Purge thou my sin away,
Wash thou my soul this day;
Lord, make my clean.
Faithful and just art thou,
lines.id: Beri kami kedamaian-Mu, Tuhan, sepanjang malam yang akan datang

lines.en: Forgiving all;
lines.id: Ubahlah bagi kami kegelapannya menjadi terang.

lines.en: Loving and kind art thou
lines.id: Dari bahaya dan bahaya, bebaskanlah anak-anak-Mu,

lines.en: When poor ones call:
lines.id: Karena gelap dan terang keduanya serupa bagi-Mu.

lines.en: Lord, let the cleansing blood,
Blood of the Lamb of God,
Pass o'er my soul.
Then all is peace and light
lines.id: Berilah kami kedamaian-Mu sepanjang hidup kami di dunia,

lines.en: This soul within;
lines.id: Balsem kami dalam kesedihan dan masa tinggal kami dalam perselisihan.

lines.en: Thus shall I walk with thee,
lines.id: Kemudian, ketika suara-Mu meminta pertikaian kami berhenti,

lines.en: The loved Unseen;
lines.id: Panggil kami, ya Tuhan, menuju kedamaian abadi-Mu. Amin.

lines.en: Leaning on thee, my God,
Guided along the road,
Nothing between.

title_id: Juruselamat, Sekali Lagi Atas Nama-Mu yang Terkasih

title_en: Out of the deep I call to thee

lines.en: Out of the deep I call
To thee, O Lord, to thee.
Before thy throne of grace I fall;
lines.ko: 나는 당신의 은혜의 보좌 앞에 엎드러졌습니다.

lines.en: Be merciful to me.
Out of the deep I cry,
The woeful deep of sin,
Of evil done in days gone by,
Of evil now within;
Out of the deep of fear
And dread of coming shame;
All night till morning watch is near
I plead the precious Name.
Lord, there is mercy now,
As ever was, with thee.
Before thy throne of grace I bow;
lines.ko: 당신의 은혜의 보좌 앞에 나는 경배합니다.

lines.en: Be merciful to me.

title_en: O thou that hear'st when sinners cry
title_ko: 오 죄인들이 부르짖을 때 들으시는 주여 (자체번역)

lines.en: From Psalm 51
O thou that hear'st when sinners cry,
lines.ko: 오 죄인들이 부르짖을 때 들으시는 주여,

lines.en: Though all my crimes before thee lie,
lines.ko: 당신 앞에서 나의 모든 범죄가 거짓말일지라도

lines.en: Behold them not with angry look,
But blot their mem'ry from thy book.
lines.ko: 그러나 당신의 책에서 그들의 기억을 지워 주십시오.

lines.en: Create my nature pure within,
And form my soul averse to sin;
Let thy good Spirit ne'er depart,
lines.ko: 당신의 선한 영이 결코 떠나지 않게 하시고,

lines.en: Not hide thy presence from my heart.
lines.ko: 내 마음에서 당신의 임재를 숨기지 마십시오.

lines.en: I cannot live without thy light,
lines.ko: 나는 당신의 빛 없이는 살 수 없습니다.

lines.en: Cast out and banished from thy sight;
Thy holy joys, my God, restore,
lines.ko: 나의 하느님, 당신의 거룩한 기쁨을 회복시켜 주소서.

lines.en: And guard me, that I fall no more.
lines.ko: 그리고 내가 더 이상 넘어지지 않도록 나를 지켜 주십시오.

lines.en: A broken heart, my God, my King,
lines.ko: 상한 마음이여, 나의 하나님, 나의 왕이시여,

lines.en: Is all the sacrifice I bring;
The God of grace will ne'er despise
lines.ko: 은혜의 하나님은 결코 멸시하지 않으실 것이다

lines.en: A broken heart for sacrifice.
My soul lies humbled in the dust,
lines.ko: 내 영혼은 흙 속에 겸손히 누워 있으며,

lines.en: And owns thy dreadful sentence just:
lines.ko: 그리고 당신의 무서운 문장은 다음과 같습니다.

lines.en: Look down, O Lord, with pitying eye,
And save the soul condemned to die.
Then will I teach the world thy ways;
lines.ko: 그러면 내가 세상에 당신의 길을 가르칠 것입니다.

lines.en: Sinners shall learn thy sov'reign grace;
lines.ko: 죄인들은 당신의 주권적인 은혜를 배우게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: I'll lead them to my Saviour's blood,
lines.ko: 나는 그들을 내 구주의 보혈로 인도할 것입니다.

lines.en: And they shall praise a pard'ning God.
lines.ko: 그리고 그들은 용서하시는 하나님을 찬양할 것입니다.

title_en: O Jesus, thou art standing

lines.en: O Jesus, thou art standing
lines.ko: 주 예수 대문 밖에 기다려 섰으나
lines.id: Ya Yesus, Engkau berdiri

lines.en: Outside the fast-closed door,
lines.id: Di luar pintu yang tertutup rapat,

lines.en: In lowly patience waiting
lines.ko: 나 주를 믿노라고 그 이름 부르나
lines.id: Dalam penantian yang rendah kesabaran

lines.en: To pass the threshold o'er:
lines.ko: 문 밖에 세워 두니 참 나의 수치라
lines.id: Untuk melewati o'er tua:

lines.en: Shame on us, Christian brothers,
lines.id: Sungguh memalukan bagi kami, saudara-saudara Kristiani,

lines.en: His Name and sign who bear,
lines.id: Nama-Nya dan tanda yang menyandangnya,

lines.en: O shame, thrice shame upon us,
lines.id: Wahai malu, tiga kali memalukan bagi kami,

lines.en: To keep him standing there!
lines.id: Untuk menjaga Dia tetap berdiri di sana!

lines.en: O Jesus, thou art knocking;
lines.ko: 문 두드리는 손은 못 박힌 손이요
lines.id: Ya Yesus, Engkau sedang mengetuk

lines.en: And lo, that hand is scarred,
lines.ko: 또 가시 면류관은 그 이마 둘렀네
lines.id: Dan lihatlah! tangan itu penuh bekas luka,

lines.en: And thorns thy brow encircle,
lines.id: Dan singgasana melingkari alismu,

lines.en: And tears thy face have marred:
lines.ko: 문 굳게 닫아 두니 한없는 내 죄라
lines.id: Dan air mata wajah-Mu telah rusak

lines.en: O love that passeth knowledge,
lines.id: Wahai cinta yang melampaui pengetahuan,

lines.en: So patiently to wait!
lines.id: Jadi sabar menunggu!

lines.en: O sin that hath no equal,
lines.id: Wahai dosa yang tidak ada bandingannya,

lines.en: So fast to bar the gate!
lines.id: Begitu cepat untuk menutup gerbangnya!

lines.en: O Jesus, thou art pleading
lines.ko: 주 예수 간곡 하게 원하는 말씀이
lines.id: Ya Yesus, Engkau memohon

lines.en: In accents meek and low,
lines.ko: 네 죄로 죽은 나를 너 박대 할 쏘냐
lines.id: Dalam aksen yang lemah lembut dan rendah,

lines.en: "I died for you, my children,
lines.ko: 나 죄를 회개 하고 곧 문을 엽니다
lines.id: “Aku mati untukmu, anak-anakku,

lines.en: And will ye treat me so?"
lines.ko: 드셔서 좌정 하사 떠나지 마소서 아멘
lines.id: Dan maukah kamu memperlakukan Aku demikian

lines.en: O Lord, with shame and sorrow
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, dengan rasa malu dan duka

lines.en: We open now the door;
lines.id: Kami sekarang membuka pintunya

lines.en: Dear Saviour, enter, enter,
lines.id: Penyelamat yang terhormat, masuk, masuk,

lines.en: And leave us nevermore.
lines.id: Dan jangan pernah tinggalkan kami lagi! A-laki-laki.

title_en: God, be merciful to me

lines.en: From Psalm 51:1-15
lines.id: Tuhan kasihanilah aku,
Atas karunia-Mu, aku memohon permohonanku

lines.ko: 마음 심히 어두니 밝게 하여 주소서
lines.id: Engkau berlimpah kasih sayang,

lines.ko: 나를 보호 하시고 항상 인도 하소서
lines.id: Hapuskan pelanggaranku sekarang
Basuhlah aku, jadikan aku suci di dalam,
Bersihkan, hai, bersihkan aku dari dosaku,
Basuhlah aku, jadikan aku suci di dalam,
Bersihkan, hai, bersihkan aku dari dosaku.

lines.en: God, be merciful to me,
lines.ko: 죄를 지은 까닭에 나의 맘이 곤하니
lines.id: Saya jahat, lahir dalam dosa

lines.en: On thy grace I rest my plea;
lines.id: Engkau menginginkan kebenaran di dalam.

lines.en: Plenteous in compassion thou,
lines.id: Engkaulah satu-satunya penyelamatku,

lines.en: Blot out my transgressions now;
lines.ko: 예수 공로 힘입어 천국 가게 하소서
lines.id: Ajarkan hikmat-Mu pada hatiku

lines.en: Wash me, make me pure within,
lines.id: Jadikanlah aku murni, rahmat-Mu yang melimpah,

lines.en: Cleanse, O cleanse me from my sin.
lines.id: Basuhlah aku lebih putih dari salju,
Jadikanlah aku murni, rahmat-Mu yang melimpah,
Basuhlah aku lebih putih dari salju.

lines.en: My transgressions I confess,
lines.id: Ya Allah, hatiku kembali segar,

lines.en: Grief and guilt my soul oppress;
lines.id: Jadikanlah semangatku benar dan benar

lines.en: I have sinned against thy grace
lines.id: Jangan jauhkan aku dariMu,

lines.en: And provoked thee to thy face;
lines.ko: 복과 영생 예수니 더 원할 것 없도다
lines.id: Biarkan Roh-Mu tinggal di dalam diriku

lines.en: I confess thy judgment just,
lines.id: Kegembiraan penyelamatanmu turut serta,

lines.en: Speechless, I thy mercy trust.
lines.id: Teguhlah membuat hatiku berkeinginan,
Kegembiraan penyelamatanmu turut serta,
Teguh membuat hatiku berkehendak.

lines.en: I am evil, born in sin;
lines.id: Orang-orang berdosa akan belajar dariku

lines.en: Thou desirest truth within.
lines.ko: 어찌 감사하온지 말로 할 수 없도다
lines.id: Dan kembalilah, ya Allah, kepada-Mu

lines.en: Thou alone my Saviour art,
lines.ko: 주의 귀한 형상을 나도 입게 하시고
lines.id: Selamat, hapus semua kesalahanku,

lines.en: Teach thy wisdom to my heart;
lines.id: Dan lidahku akan menyanyikan cinta-Mu

lines.en: Make me pure, thy grace bestow,
lines.id: Sentuhlah bibirku yang sunyi, ya Tuhan,

lines.en: Wash me whiter than the snow.
lines.id: Dan mulutku akan memuji harmoni,
Sentuhlah bibirku yang sunyi, ya Tuhan,
Dan mulutku akan memuji keselarasan. Amin.

lines.en: Broken, humbled to the dust
By thy wrath and judgment just,
Let my contrite heart rejoice
And in gladness hear thy voice;
From my sins O hide thy face,
Blot them out in boundless grace.
Gracious God, my heart renew,
Make my spirit right and true;
Cast me not away from thee,
Let thy Spirit dwell in me;
Thy salvation's joy impart,
Steadfast make my willing heart.
Sinners then shall learn from me
And return, O God, to thee;
