Saviour, all my guilt remove,
And my tongue shall sing thy love;
Touch my silent lips, O Lord,
And my mouth shall praise accord.

title_en: With broken heart and contrite sigh

lines.en: With broken heart and contrite sigh,
A trembling sinner, Lord, I cry;
lines.ko: 떨고 있는 죄인, 주님, 제가 부르짖습니다.

lines.en: Thy pard'ning grace is rich and free:
lines.ko: 당신의 용서의 은혜는 풍성하고 값이 없습니다.

lines.en: O God, be merciful to me.
I smite upon my troubled breast,
With deep and conscious guilt oppressed,
Christ and his cross my only plea:
lines.ko: 그리스도와 그의 십자가 나의 유일한 간청은 다음과 같습니다.

lines.en: O God, be merciful to me.
Far off I stand with tearful eyes,
lines.ko: 멀리서 나는 눈물이 그렁그렁한 눈으로 서 있습니다.

lines.en: Nor dare uplift them to the skies;
lines.ko: 감히 그들을 하늘로 들어올릴 수도 없습니다.

lines.en: But thou dost all my anguish see:
lines.ko: 그러나 당신은 나의 모든 고뇌를 보십니다.

lines.en: O God, be merciful to me.
No alms nor deeds that I have done,
Can for a single sin atone;
lines.ko: 단 하나의 죄도 속죄할 수 있습니다.

lines.en: To Calvary alone I flee:
O God, be merciful to me.
And when, redeemed from sin and hell,
With all the ransomed throng I dwell
lines.ko: 속량함을 받은 모든 무리와 함께 내가 거주하노라

lines.en: My raptured song shall ever be,
"God has been merciful to me."

title_en: Remember not, O God, the sins of long ago

lines.en: From Psalm 79:8-13
Remember not, O God,
The sins of long ago;
In tender mercy visit us,
Distressed and humbled low.
O Lord, our Saviour, help,
And glorify thy Name;
Deliver us from all our sins
And take away our shame.
In thy compassion hear
Thy pris'ners' plaintive sigh,
And in the greatness of thy pow'r
Save those about to die.
Then, safe within thy fold
We will exalt thy Name;
Out thankful hearts with songs of joy
Thy goodness will proclaim.

title_en: We have not known thee as we ought

lines.en: We have not known thee as we ought,
lines.ko: 지난 밤에 보호하사 잠 잘 자게 했으니
lines.id: Nyanyian pagi, ya Tuhan, dengan pujian

lines.en: Nor learned thy wisdom, grace and pow'r;
lines.ko: 고마우신 주의 은총 감사 찬송 합니다
lines.id: Untuk istirahat malam yang lalu

lines.en: The things of earth have filled our thought,
lines.id: Aman di dalamMu, hati terangkat

lines.en: And trifles of the passing hour.
lines.id: Bagi nama-Mu, terberkati selama-lamanya!

lines.en: Lord, give us light thy truth to see,
And make us wise in knowing thee.
We have not feared thee as we ought,
lines.ko: 우리 육신 평안함과 생명 호흡 주시고
lines.id: Kesehatan tubuh, kedamaian jiwa!

lines.en: Nor bowed beneath thine awful eye,
lines.id: Nafas kehidupan dan hati tenang!

lines.en: Nor guarded deed, and word, and thought,
lines.id: Penyakit disembuhkan oleh jasa Yesus!

lines.en: Remembering that God was nigh.
lines.id: Puji Tuhan kami atas semua ini.

lines.en: Lord, give us faith to know thee near,
And grant the grace of holy fear.
We have not loved thee as we ought,
lines.ko: 주 예수의 밝은 빛이 우리 맘에 비치사
lines.id: Sebagaimana kasih-Mu telah memancar ke sekeliling kami

lines.en: Nor cared that we are loved by thee;
lines.ko: 밤중같이 어둔 것을 낮과 같게 하소서
lines.id: Melalui jaga malam.

lines.en: Thy presence we have coldly sought,
lines.id: Jadi, melewati kegelapan malam bumi mengelilingi kita

lines.en: And feebly longed thy face to see.
lines.id: Dengan cahaya abadi-Mu sendiri.

lines.en: Lord, give a pure and loving heart
To feel and own the love thou art.
We have not served thee as we ought;
lines.id: Dengarlah, hai roh, permohonan kami:

lines.en: Alas! the duties left undone,
lines.ko: 맡아 주관하여 주사 온전하게 하소서 아멘
lines.id: Mulai hari ini hidup kita terkendali.

lines.en: The work with little fervor wrought,
lines.id: Jadikan pekerjaan-Mu membuahkan hasil penuh,

lines.en: The battles lost, or scarcely won!
lines.id: Jadikan kami sempurna, jadikan kami utuh! Amin.

lines.en: Lord, give the zeal, and give the might,
For thee to toil, for thee to fight.
When shall we know thee as we ought,
And fear, and love, and serve aright!
When shall we, out of trial brought,
Be perfect in the land of light!
Lord, may we day by day prepare
To see thy face, and serve thee there.

title_en: I need thee, precious Jesus

lines.en: I need thee, precious Jesus,
For I am full of sin;
My soul is dark and guilty,
My heart is dead within.
I need the cleansing fountain
Where I can always flee,
The blood of Christ most precious,
The sinner's perfect plea.
I need thee, precious Jesus,
For I am very poor;
A stranger and a pilgrim,
I have no earthly store.
I need the love of Jesus
To cheer me on my way,
To guide my doubting footsteps,
To be my strength and stay.
I need thee, precious Jesus,
And hope to see thee soon,
Encircled with the rainbow
And seated on thy throne.
There, with thy blood-bought children,
lines.ko: 그곳에서 당신의 피로 사신 자녀들과 함께

lines.en: My joy shall ever be,
To sing my Jesus' praises,
To gaze, O Lord, on thee.

title_en: Blessed Lord, in thee is refuge

lines.en: Blessed Lord, in thee is refuge,
Safety for my trembling soul:
lines.ko: 떨고 있는 내 영혼을 위한 안전:

lines.en: Pow'r to lift my head when drooping
lines.ko: 처진 상태에서 고개를 들어 올려주는 힘

lines.en: 'Midst the angry billow's roll.
I will trust thee,
I will trust thee,
I will trust thee,
All my life thou shalt control.
In the past, too, unbelieving,
'Midst the tempest I have been,
And my heart has slowly trusted
lines.ko: 그리고 내 마음은 천천히 믿음을 갖게 됐어요

lines.en: What my eyes have never seen.
lines.ko: 내 눈이 한 번도 본 적이 없는 것.

lines.en: Blessed Jesus,
Blessed Jesus,
Blessed Jesus,
Teach me on thine arm to lean.
lines.ko: 당신의 팔로 기대는 법을 가르쳐 주소서.

lines.en: O, for trust that brings the triumph
When defeat seems strangely near;
lines.ko: 패배가 이상할 정도로 가까워 보일 때;

lines.en: O, for faith that changes fighting
Into vict'ry's ringing cheer!
Faith triumphant,
Faith triumphant,
Faith triumphant,
Knowing not defeat or fear.

title_en: Rock of Ages, cleft for me

lines.en: Rock of Ages, cleft for me
lines.id: Batu A-ges, celah untukku,

lines.ko: 창에 허리 상하여 물과 피를 흘린 것
lines.id: Izinkan aku menyembunyikan diriku di dalam Engkau
Biarkan air dan darah,
Dari sisi luka-Mu yang mengalir,
Jadilah obat ganda bagi dosa,
Bersihkan aku dari rasa bersalah dan kuasanya.

lines.en: Let me hide myself in thee;
lines.ko: 내가 공을 세우나 은혜 갚지 못하네
lines.id: Bukan hasil kerja tanganku

lines.ko: 쉼이 없이 힘쓰고 눈물 근심 많으나
lines.id: Dapat memenuhi tuntutan hukum-Mu

lines.ko: 구속 못할 죄인을 예수 홀로 속하네
lines.id: Bisakah semangatku tidak tahu lagi,
Bisakah air mataku mengalir selamanya,
Semua karena dosa tidak bisa dinadakan,
Engkau harus menyelamatkan, dan Engkau sendirian.

lines.en: Let the water and the blood,
lines.ko: 빈 손 들고 앞에 가 십자가를 붙드네
lines.id: Tidak ada apa pun di tanganku yang kubawa,

lines.ko: 의가 없는 자라도 도와 주심 바라고
lines.id: Cukup pada salib-Mu aku berpegang teguh
Telanjang, datanglah kepadamu untuk berpakaian,
Tak berdaya, mohon rahmat dari-Mu
Busuk, aku ke air mancur terbang
Basuhlah aku, Juruselamat, atau aku mati.

lines.en: From thy riven side which flowed,
lines.ko: 살아 생전 숨 쉬고 죽어 세상 떠나서
lines.id: Selagi aku menarik napas sekilas ini,

lines.ko: 거룩하신 주 앞에 끝날 심판 당할 때
lines.id: Saat mataku terpejam dalam kematian,

lines.ko: 만세반석 열리니 내가 들어 갑니다 아멘
lines.id: Ketika saya terbang ke dunia yang tidak diketahui,
Sampai jumpa di singgasana penghakiman-Mu,
Batu A-ges, celah untukku,
Izinkan aku menyembunyikan diriku di dalam Engkau. Amin.

lines.en: Be of sin the double cure,
Cleanse me from its guilt and pow'r.
Not the labors of my hands
Can fulfil thy law's demands;
Could my zeal no respite know,
Could my tears for ever flow,
All for sin could not atone;
Thou must save, and thou alone.
Nothing in my hand I bring,
Simply to thy cross I cling;
Naked, come to thee for dress,
Helpless, look to thee for grace;
Foul, I to the Fountain fly;
Wash me, Saviour, or I die.
While I draw this fleeting breath,
When mine eyelids close in death,
When I soar to worlds unknown,
See thee on thy judgment throne,
Rock of Ages, cleft for me,
Let me hide myself in thee.

alt_titles: Rock of Ages, cleft for me (tune 2)

title_en: As when the Hebrew prophet raised

lines.en: As when the Hebrew prophet raised
The brazen serpent high,
The wounded looked, and straight were cured,
The people ceased to die;
So from the Saviour on the cross
A healing virtue flows;
Who looks to him with lively faith
Is saved from endless woes.
For God gave up his Son to death,
So gen'rous was his love,
That all the faithful might enjoy
lines.ko: 모든 충실한 사람들이 즐길 수 있도록

lines.en: Eternal life above.
Not to condemn the sons of men
The Son of God appeared;
No weapons in his hand are seen,
lines.ko: 손에 들고 있는 무기는 보이지 않고,

lines.en: Nor voice of terror heard:
He came to raise our fallen state,
And our lost hopes restore;
Faith leads us to the mercy seat,
And bids us fear no more.
lines.ko: 그리고 우리에게 더 이상 두려워하지 말라고 명하십니다.

title_en: Approach, my soul, the mercy seat

lines.en: Approach, my soul, the mercy-seat
Where Jesus answers prayer;
There humbly fall before his feet,
lines.ko: 거기 그의 발 앞에 겸손히 엎드리어

lines.en: For none can perish there.
Thy promise is my only plea;
With this I venture nigh:
lines.ko: 이것으로 나는 다음과 같은 모험을 감행합니다.

lines.en: Thou callest burdened souls to thee,
lines.ko: 당신은 무거운 짐을 지고 있는 영혼들을 당신께 부르시나이다.

lines.en: And such, O Lord, am I.
lines.ko: 오 주님, 저도 바로 그러한 사람입니다.

lines.en: Bowed down beneath a load of sin,
By Satan sorely pressed,
By war without, and fears within,
I come to thee for rest.
Be thou my shield and hiding place,
That, sheltered near thy side,
I may my fierce accuser face,
lines.ko: 나는 나의 맹렬한 고소인의 얼굴을 보게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: And tell him, thou hast died.
O wondrous love! to bleed and die,
lines.ko: 오 놀라운 사랑이여! 피를 흘리며 죽고,

lines.en: To bear the cross and shame,
That guilty sinners, such as I,
Might plead thy gracious Name!
lines.ko: 당신의 은혜로운 이름을 간청할 수도 있습니다!

title_en: I am trusting thee, Lord Jesus

lines.en: I am trusting thee, Lord Jesus
Trusting only thee:
Trusting thee for full salvation,
Great and free.
I am trusting thee for pardon;
At thy feet I bow,
For thy grace and tender mercy,
Trusting now.
I am trusting thee for cleansing
In the crimson flood;
Trusting thee to make me holy
By thy blood.
I am trusting thee to guide me;
lines.ko: 나는 당신이 나를 인도하실 것을 믿습니다.

lines.en: Thou alone shalt lead,
Ev'ry day and hour supplying
All my need.
I am trusting thee, Lord Jesus;
Never let me fall;
I am trusting thee for ever,
And for all.

title_en: Jesus, and shall it ever be

lines.en: Jesus, and shall it ever be,
A mortal man ashamed of thee?
Ashamed of thee whom angels praise,
Whose glories shine through endless days!
lines.ko: 끝없는 나날을 통해 누구의 영광이 빛나는가!

lines.en: Ashamed of Jesus! sooner far
Let evening blush to own a star:
lines.ko: 별을 소유하기 위해 저녁을 붉게 만드십시오.

lines.en: He sheds the beams of light Divine
O'er this benighted soul of mine.
Ashamed of Jesus! just as soon
Let midnight be ashamed of noon;
'Tis midnight with my soul till he,
lines.ko: 내 영혼과 함께 자정이 될 때까지,

lines.en: Bright Morning Star, bid darkness flee.
lines.ko: 밝은 새벽 별이시여, 어둠이 물러가도록 명하소서.

lines.en: Ashamed of Jesus, that dear Friend
On whom my hopes of heav'n depend!
lines.ko: 천국에 대한 나의 희망은 누구에게 달려 있습니까!

lines.en: No; when I blush, be this my shame,
lines.ko: 아니요; 내가 얼굴을 붉힐 때, 이것이 나의 부끄러운 일이 되십시오.

lines.en: That I no more revere his Name.
lines.ko: 나는 더 이상 그분의 이름을 존경하지 않습니다.

lines.en: Ashamed of Jesus! yes, I may
lines.ko: 예수님을 부끄럽게 생각합니다! 응, 그럴 수도 있지

lines.en: When I've no guilt to wash away,
No tear to wipe, no good to crave,
lines.ko: 닦아야 할 눈물도 없고, 갈망해도 좋은 것이 없고,

lines.en: No fears to quell, no soul to save.
lines.ko: 진압할 두려움도 없고, 구원할 영혼도 없습니다.

lines.en: Till thennor is my boasting vain
Till then I boast a Saviour slain;
lines.ko: 그때까지 나는 죽임을 당한 구세주를 자랑합니다.

lines.en: And O may this my glory be,
That Christ is not ashamed of me.

title_en: Thou hidden source of calm repose

lines.en: Thou hidden source of calm repose,
Thou all-sufficient love divine,
lines.ko: 당신은 모든 것을 충족시키는 신성한 사랑이시며,

lines.en: My help and refuge from my foes,
lines.ko: 내 원수들에게서 나의 도움과 피난처가 되시니

lines.en: Secure I am, if thou art mine:
And lo! from sin, and grief and shame
I hide me, Jesus, in thy Name.
Thy mighty Name salvation is,
And keeps my happy soul above;
lines.ko: 그리고 내 행복한 영혼을 위에서 지켜주십니다.

lines.en: Comfort it brings, and pow'r, and peace,
And joy, and everlasting love:
To me, with thy dear Name are giv'n
Pardon and holiness and heav'n.
Jesus, my all in all thou art;
My rest in toil, my ease in pain,
lines.ko: 수고 중에 나의 안식을, 고통 중에 나의 안식을,

lines.en: The medicine of my broken heart,
In war my peace, in loss my gain,
lines.ko: 전쟁에서는 나의 평화를, 손실에서는 나의 이득을,

lines.en: My smile beneath the tyrant's frown,
lines.ko: 폭군의 찌푸린 얼굴 아래에 있는 나의 미소,

lines.en: In shame my glory and my crown:
lines.ko: 부끄러움 속에서 나의 영광과 나의 면류관이여:

lines.en: In want my plentiful supply,
In weakness my almighty pow'r,
In bonds my perfect liberty,
My light in Satan's darkest hour,
lines.ko: 사탄의 가장 어두운 시간에 나의 빛이여,

lines.en: My help and stay whene'er I call,
lines.ko: 내가 부를 때마다 나의 도움과 함께 있어주세요

lines.en: My life in death, my heav'n, my all.
lines.ko: 죽음 속의 내 삶, 나의 천국, 나의 전부.

title_en: Jesus, Lover of my soul

lines.en: Jesus, Lover of my soul,
lines.ko: 비바람이 칠 때와 물결높이 일 때에
lines.id: Yesus, Kekasih jiwaku,

lines.ko: 사랑 많은 우리 주 나를 품어 주소서
lines.id: Biarkan aku terbang ke dada-Mu,
Sementara air di dekatnya mengalir,

lines.ko: 안식 얻는 곳으로 주여 인도 하소서
lines.id: Mumpung suhu hama masih tinggi!
Sembunyikan aku, wahai Juruselamatku, sembunyikan,
Hingga badai kehidupan berlalu.
Aman dalam panduan ha-ven.
Oh, akhirnya terima kembali jiwaku!

lines.en: Let me to thy bosom fly,
lines.ko: 나의 영혼 피할 데 예수 밖에 없으니
lines.id: Saya tidak punya tempat perlindungan lain

lines.ko: 혼자 있게 마시고 위로 하여 주소서
lines.id: Menggantungkan jiwaku yang tak berdaya pada-Mu.
Tinggalkan, ah, jangan tinggalkan aku sendirian

lines.ko: 할 수 없는 죄인을 주여 보호 하소서
lines.id: Masih mendukung dan menghibur saya!
Semua kepercayaanku pada-Mu tetap ada
Semua pertolonganku dariMu kubawa.
Tutupi kepalaku yang tidak punya pertahanan
Dengan naungan sayap-Mu.

lines.en: While the nearer waters roll,
lines.id: Engkau, ya Kristus, adalah semua yang kuinginkan
Lebih dari segalanya Lalu aku temukan.
Angkat yang jatuh, hibur yang pingsan,
Sembuhkanlah orang sakit, dan pimpinlah orang buta.
Adil dan sucilah nama-Mu
Saya semua tidak benar.
Aku palsu dan penuh dosa
Engkau penuh dengan kebenaran dan rahmat.

lines.en: While the tempest still is high:
lines.ko: 나의 죄를 사하는 주의 은혜 크도다
lines.id: Anugerah berlimpah pada-Mu ditemukan,
Kasih karunia untuk menutupi segala dosaku
Biarkan aliran penyembuhan mengalir deras

lines.ko: 샘물처럼 내 맘에 솟아나게 하소서 아멘
lines.id: Jadikan dan peliharalah aku suci di dalam:
Engkaulah kehidupan seni air mancur,
Dengan bebas izinkan aku mengambil milikMu
Musim Semi Engkau di dalam hatiku,
Bangkitlah selamanya. Amin.

lines.en: Hide me, O my Saviour, hide,
Till the storm of life is past;
Safe into the haven guide,
O receive my soul at last!
Other refuge have I none,
Hangs my helpless soul on thee;
Leave, ah! leave me not alone,
Still support and comfort me!
All my trust on thee is stayed,
All my help from thee I bring;
Cover my defenseless head
With the shadow of thy wing.
Thou, O Christ, art all I want;
More than all in thee I find:
Raise the fallen, cheer the faint,
Heal the sick, and lead the blind.
Just and holy is thy Name;
I am all unrighteousness;
False and full of sin I am,
Thou art full of truth and grace.
Plenteous grace with thee is found,
Grace to cover all my sin;
Let the healing streams abound;
Make and keep me pure within:
Thou of life the Fountain art,
Freely let me take of thee;
Spring thou up within my heart,
Rise to all eternity.

alt_titles: Jesus, Lover of my soul (tune 2)
Jesus, Lover of my soul (tune 3)

title_en: Lord, I believe; thy power I own
title_ko: 주님, 저는 믿습니다. 당신의 힘은 내가 소유하고 있습니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: Lord, I believe; thy pow'r I own,
lines.ko: 주님, 저는 믿습니다. 당신의 힘은 내가 소유하고 있습니다.

lines.en: Thy Word I would obey;
I wander comfortless and lone
When from thy truth I stray.
Lord, I believe; but gloomy fears
lines.ko: 주님, 저는 믿습니다. 하지만 우울한 두려움

lines.en: Sometimes bedim my sight;
I look to thee with pray'rs and tears,
lines.ko: 나는 기도와 눈물로 당신을 바라보고 있습니다.

lines.en: And cry for strength and light.
Lord, I believe; but thou dost know
lines.ko: 주님, 저는 믿습니다. 하지만 당신은 알고 있어요

lines.en: My faith is cold and weak;
Pity my frailty and bestow
lines.ko: 나의 연약함을 불쌍히 여기시고 베풀어 주소서

lines.en: The confidence I seek.
Yes, I believe; and only thou
Canst give my soul relief:
lines.ko: 내 영혼에 안도감을 줄 수는 없네:

lines.en: Lord, to thy truth my spirit bow;
lines.ko: 주님, 당신의 진리에 내 영혼이 경배합니다.

lines.en: Help thou mine unbelief.

title_en: I'm not ashamed to own my Lord
title_ko: 나는 나의 주님을 소유하는 것을 부끄러워하지 않습니다. (자체번역)

lines.en: I'm not ashamed to own my Lord,
lines.ko: 나는 나의 주님을 소유하는 것을 부끄러워하지 않습니다.

lines.en: Or to defend his cause,
Maintain the honor of his Word,
The glory of his cross.
Jesus, my God! I know his Name,
lines.ko: 예수님, 나의 하나님! 나는 그의 이름을 안다.

lines.en: His Name is all my trust;
Nor will he put my soul to shame,
Nor let my hope be lost.
Firm as his throne his promise stands,
lines.ko: 그의 보좌만큼 굳건하시며 그의 약속은 굳건하며

lines.en: And he can well secure
lines.ko: 그리고 그는 보안을 잘 유지할 수 있습니다

lines.en: What I've committed to his hands
lines.ko: 내가 그 사람 손에 맡긴 것은

lines.en: Till the decisive hour.
Then will he own my worthless name
lines.ko: 그러면 그 사람은 내 쓸모없는 이름을 소유하게 될까요?

lines.en: Before his Father's face,
And in the new Jerusalem
Appoint my soul a place.

title_en: I lay my sins on Jesus

lines.en: I lay my sins on Jesus,
lines.ko: 성부의 어린 양이 죄 지고 가시니
lines.id: Aku menyerahkan dosa-dosaku pada Yesus,

lines.en: The spotless Lamb of God;
lines.ko: 내 몸에 당할 형벌 다 대신 하셨네
lines.id: Anak Domba Allah yang tak bernoda

lines.en: He bears them all, and frees us
lines.ko: 내 죄가 추악하나 그 피로 씻으면
lines.id: Dia menanggung semuanya, dan membebaskan kita

lines.en: From the accursed load:
lines.ko: 눈 같이 희게 되어 티 하나 없으리
lines.id: Dari beban terkutuk.

lines.en: I bring my guilt to Jesus,
lines.id: Aku membawa kesalahanku kepada Yesus,

lines.en: To wash my crimson stains
lines.id: Untuk mencuci noda penjahatku

lines.en: White in his blood most precious,
lines.id: Putih dalam darah-Nya yang paling berharga,

lines.en: Till not a spot remains.
lines.id: Sampai tidak ada satu tempat pun yang tersisa.

lines.en: I lay my wants on Jesus;
lines.ko: 내 죄를 회개할 때 용서해 주시고
lines.id: Aku serahkan keinginanku pada Yesus,

lines.en: All fullness dwells in him;
lines.ko: 병든 몸 고쳐 주사 새 생명 주시네
lines.id: Segala kepenuhan tinggal di dalam Dia

lines.en: He heals all my diseases,
lines.ko: 내 속에 쌓인 근심 한없이 크건만
lines.id: Dia menyembuhkan semua penyakitku,

lines.en: He doth my soul redeem:
lines.ko: 주 친히 벗겨 주사 위로해 주시네
lines.id: Dialah yang menilai kembali jiwaku.

lines.en: I lay my griefs on Jesus,
lines.id: Aku menaruh kesedihanku pada Yesus,

lines.en: My burdens and my cares;
lines.id: Bebanku dan kekhawatiranku

lines.en: He from them all releases,
lines.id: Dia melepaskan semuanya dari mereka,

lines.en: He all my sorrows shares.
lines.id: Dia berbagi semua kesedihanku.

lines.en: I rest my soul on Jesus,
lines.ko: 내 주를 의지하니 내 맘이 편하고
lines.id: Aku mengistirahatkan jiwaku pada Yesus,

lines.en: This weary soul of mine;
lines.ko: 주 나를 붙드시니 내 앞길 환하다
lines.id: Jiwaku yang lelah ini

lines.en: His right hand me embraces,
lines.ko: 임마누엘 주 예수 끝없는 그 사랑
lines.id: Tangan kanannya memelukku,

lines.en: I on his breast recline.
lines.ko: 그 향기 바람 타고 온 땅에 퍼지네
lines.id: Aku bersandar di dada-Nya.

lines.en: I love the Name of Jesus,
lines.id: Aku suka nama Yesus,

lines.en: Immanuel, Christ, the Lord;
lines.id: Im-man-uel Kristus, Tuhan

lines.en: Like fragrance on the breezes
lines.id: Bagaikan wewangian ditiup angin,

lines.en: His Name abroad is poured.
lines.id: Namanya dituangkan secara luas.

lines.en: I long to be like Jesus,
lines.ko: 주 예수 본을 받아 온유한 마음과
lines.id: Aku ingin menjadi, seperti Yesus,

lines.en: Meek, loving, lowly, mild;
lines.id: Lemah lembut, penuh kasih, rendah hati, lemah lembut

lines.en: I long to be like Jesus,
lines.ko: 나 주의 뒤를 따라 저 천국 이르러
lines.id: Aku ingin menjadi, seperti Yesus,

lines.en: The Father's holy Child;
lines.id: Anak suci Bapa,

lines.en: I long to be with Jesus
lines.id: Aku rindu untuk bersama Yesus,

lines.en: Amid the heav'nly throng,
lines.id: Di tengah-tengah kerumunan orang surgawi

lines.en: To sing with saints his praises,
lines.id: Untuk bernyanyi bersama orang-orang kudus pujian-Nya,

lines.en: To learn the angels' song.
lines.id: Untuk mempelajari lagu malaikat.

title_en: Just as I am, without one plea

lines.en: Just as I am, without one plea
lines.ko: 큰 죄에 빠진 날 위해 주 보혈 흘려 주시고
lines.id: Sama seperti saya, tanpa satu permohonan pun,

lines.ko: 또 나를 오라 하시니 주께로 거저 갑니다
lines.id: Namun darah-Mu telah tertumpah untukku,
Dan Engkau yang memintaku datang kepadaMu,
Ya Anak Domba Allah, aku datang, aku datang.

lines.en: But that thy blood was shed for me,
lines.ko: 내 죄를 씻는 능력은 주 보혈밖에 없으니
lines.id: Sama seperti saya, dan tidak menunggu

lines.ko: 정하게 되기 원하여 주께로 거저 갑니다
lines.id: Untuk menghilangkan jiwaku dari satu noda hitam,
KepadaMu yang darahnya dapat membersihkan setiap noda,
Ya Anak Domba Allah, aku datang, aku datang.

lines.en: And that thou bidd'st me come to thee,
lines.ko: 큰 죄악 씻기 원하나 내 힘이 항상 약하니
lines.id: Sama sepertiku, meski terombang-ambing

lines.ko: 보혈의 공로 믿고서 주께로 거저 갑니다
lines.id: Dengan banyak konflik, banyak keraguan,
Perkelahian dan ketakutan di dalam, di luar,
Ya Anak Domba Allah, aku datang, aku datang.

lines.en: O Lamb of God, I come, I come.
lines.ko: 내 죄가 심히 무거워 구하여 줄 이 없으니
lines.id: Sama seperti aku, miskin, malang, buta;

lines.ko: 내 의심 떨쳐 버리고 주께로 거저 갑니다
lines.id: Penglihatan, kekayaan, penyembuhan pikiran,
Ya, semua yang kubutuhkan pada-Mu untuk kutemukan,
Ya Anak Domba Allah, aku datang, aku datang.

lines.en: Just as I am, and waiting not
lines.ko: 죄 용서하여 주시고 내 마음 위로하심을
lines.id: Sama seperti aku, Engkau akan menerima,

lines.ko: 나 항상 믿고 고마워 주께로 거저 갑니다
lines.id: Layu menyambut, memaafkan, membersihkan, meringankan;
Karena janji-Mu aku percaya,
Ya Anak Domba Allah, aku datang, aku datang.

lines.en: To rid my soul of one dark blot,
lines.ko: 주 예수 베푼 사랑이 한 없이 크고 넓으니
lines.id: Sama seperti aku, cintamu tidak diketahui

lines.ko: 내 뜻을 모두 버리고 주께로 거저 갑니다 아멘
lines.id: Telah menghancurkan setiap penghalang;
Sekarang, untuk menjadi milik-Mu, ya, hanya milik-Mu,
Ya Anak Domba Allah, aku datang, aku datang.

lines.en: To thee, whose blood can cleanse each spot,
O Lamb of God, I come, I come.
Just as I am, though tossed about
With many a conflict, many a doubt,
Fightings and fears within, without,
O Lamb of God, I come, I come.
Just as I am, poor, wretched, blind;
Sight, riches, healing of the mind,
Yea, all I need, in thee to find,
O Lamb of God, I come, I come.
Just as I am! thou wilt receive,
Wilt welcome, pardon, cleanse, relieve;
Because thy promise I believe,
O Lamb of God, I come, I come.
Just as I am! thy love unknown
Has broken ev'ry barrier down;
Now, to be thine, yea, thine alone,
O Lamb of God, I come, I come.

alt_titles: Just as I am, without one plea (tune 2)
title_id: Sama seperti saya, Tanpa Satu Permohonan

title_en: Jesus! what a Friend for sinners
title_ko: 예수! 죄인을 위한 얼마나 좋은 친구인가 (자체번역)

lines.en: Jesus! what a Friend for sinners!
lines.ko: 예수님! 죄인들을 위한 얼마나 좋은 친구입니까!

lines.en: Jesus! Lover of my soul;
Friends may fail me, foes assail me,
lines.ko: 친구들은 나를 실망시킬 수도 있고, 적들이 나를 공격할 수도 있지만,

lines.en: He, my Saviour, makes me whole.
lines.ko: 나의 구주이신 그분은 나를 완전하게 만드십니다.

lines.en: Hallelujah! what a Saviour!
Hallelujah, what a Friend!
Saving, helping, keeping, loving,
He is with me to the end.
Jesus! what a strength in weakness!
Let me hide myself in him;
lines.ko: 나 자신을 그분 안에 숨기도록 하십시오.

lines.en: Tempted, tried, and sometimes failing,
lines.ko: 유혹을 받고, 시도하고, 때로는 실패하기도 하지만,

lines.en: He, my strength, my vict'ry wins.
lines.ko: 그분, 나의 힘, 나의 승리가 승리합니다.

lines.en: Jesus! what a help in sorrow!
While the billows o'er me roll,
Even when my heart is breaking,
He, my comfort, helps my soul.
lines.ko: 나의 위로이신 그분은 내 영혼을 도우십니다.

lines.en: Jesus! what a guide and keeper!
While the tempest still is high,
Storms about me, night o'ertakes me,
lines.ko: 나를 둘러싼 폭풍우, 밤이 나를 데려가네,

lines.en: He, my pilot, hears my cry.
lines.ko: 나의 조종사인 그는 나의 외침을 듣는다.

lines.en: Jesus! I do now receive him,
More than all in him I find,
lines.ko: 나는 그에게서 무엇보다도 더 많은 것을 발견했습니다.

lines.en: He hath granted me forgiveness,
I am his, and he is mine.
lines.ko: 나는 그의 것이고 그는 내 것입니다.

title_en: I've found a Friend, O such a Friend

lines.en: I've found a Friend, O such a Friend!
lines.ko: 주 예수 내가 아기 전 날 먼저 사랑했네
lines.id: Saya telah menemukan seorang Teman, oh, seorang Teman yang hebat!

lines.en: He loved me ere I knew him;
lines.ko: 그 크신 사랑 나타나 내 영혼 거듭났네
lines.id: Dia mengasihiku sebelum aku mengenal-Nya

lines.en: He drew me with the cords of love,
lines.ko: 주 내 맘에 늘 계시고 나 주의 안에 있어
lines.id: Dia menarikku dengan tali cinta,

lines.en: And thus he bound me to him;
lines.ko: 저 포도 비유 같으니 참 좋은 나의 친구
lines.id: Dan demikianlah Dia mengikatku pada-Nya.

lines.en: And round my heart still closely twine
lines.id: Dan di sekeliling hatiku masih terjalin erat

lines.en: Those ties which nought can sever,
lines.id: Ikatan yang tidak dapat diputuskan oleh siapa pun

lines.en: For I am his, and he is mine,
lines.id: Karena aku adalah Dia, dan Dia milikku,

lines.en: For ever and for ever.
lines.id: Selama-lamanya dan selamanya.

lines.en: I've found a Friend, O such a Friend!
lines.ko: 내 친구 되신 예수님 날 구원 하시려고
lines.id: Saya telah menemukan seorang Teman, oh, seorang Teman yang hebat!

lines.en: He bled, he died to save me;
lines.ko: 그 귀한 몸을 버리사 내 죄를 대속했네
lines.id: Dia mati untuk menyelamatkanku

lines.en: And not alone the gift of life,
lines.ko: 나 주님을 늘 믿으며 그 손을 의지하고
lines.id: Dan bukan satu-satunya anugerah kehidupan,

lines.en: But his own self he gave me!
lines.ko: 내 몸과 맘을 바쳐서 끝까지 충성하리
lines.id: Tapi dirinya sendiri Dia berikan padaku.

lines.en: Nought that I have mine own I'll call,
lines.id: Tidak ada yang saya punya sendiri, saya menelepon

lines.en: I'll hold it for the Giver,
lines.id: Aku menyimpannya untuk Sang Pemberi.

lines.en: My heart, my strength, my life, my all
lines.id: Hatiku, kekuatanku, hidupku, segalanya bagiku

lines.en: Are his, and his for ever.
lines.id: Milik-Nya, dan milik-Nya selama-lamanya.

lines.en: I've found a Friend, O such a Friend!
lines.ko: 내 진실하신 친구여 큰 은혜 내려주사
lines.id: Saya telah menemukan seorang Teman, oh, seorang Teman yang hebat!

lines.en: All pow'r to him is given,
lines.ko: 날 항상 보호 하시고 내 방패 되옵소서
lines.id: Begitu baik, jujur, dan lembut,

lines.en: To guard me on my onward course,
lines.ko: 그 풍성한 참 사랑을 뉘 능히 끊을 쏘냐
lines.id: Begitu bijaknya seorang Penasihat dan Pemandu,

lines.en: And bring me safe to heaven:
lines.ko: 날 구원하신 예수는 참 좋은 나의 친구
lines.id: Jadi, mungkin kamu seorang Pembela!

lines.en: Eternal glory gleams afar,
lines.id: Dari Dia yang sangat mencintaiku sekarang

lines.en: To nerve my faint endeavor:
lines.id: Kekuatan apa yang bisa diputus oleh jiwaku

lines.en: So now to watch, to work, to war;
lines.id: Apakah hidup atau mati, atau bumi atau neraka

lines.en: And then to rest for ever.
lines.id: Tidak! Aku milik-Nya selamanya.

lines.en: I've found a Friend, O such a Friend!
So kind and true and tender,
So wise a Counselor and Guide,
So mighty a Defender!
From him who loves me now so well
What pow'r my soul can sever?
Shall life or death, shall earth or hell?
No! I am his for ever.

title_en: How lovely shines the Morning Star

lines.en: How lovely shines the Morning Star!
The nations see and hail afar
The light in Judah shining.
Thou David's Son of Jacob's race,
My Bridegroom and my King of Grace,
For thee my heart is pining.
lines.ko: 당신을 위해 내 마음은 고정되어 있습니다.

lines.en: Lowly, holy,
Great and glorious,
Thou victorious
Prince of graces,
Filling all the heav'nly places.
Now richly to my waiting heart,
O thou, my God, deign to impart
lines.ko: 오, 나의 하느님, 당신은 나누어 주시기를 정하셨습니다

lines.en: The grace of love undying.
In thy blest body let me be,
lines.ko: 당신의 축복받은 몸으로 저를 있게 하소서.

lines.en: E'en as the branch is in the tree,
Thy life my life supplying.
Sighing, crying,
For the savor
Of thy favor
Resting never
Till I rest in thee for ever.
lines.ko: 내가 영원히 당신 안에 안식할 때까지.

lines.en: Thou, mighty Father, in thy Son
Didst love me ere thou hadst begun
This ancient world's foundation.
Thy Son hath made a friend of me,
And when in spirit him I see,
I joy in tribulation.
What bliss
Is this!
He that liveth
To me giveth
Life forever;
Nothing me from him can sever.
lines.ko: 나는 그에게서 아무것도 끊을 수 없습니다.

title_en: What, ye ask me, is my prize
title_ko: 너희가 내게 묻는 것은 내 상이니라 (자체번역)

lines.en: What, ye ask me, is my prize?
What the secret to be wise?
What the wealth I value most?
lines.ko: 내가 가장 소중히 여기는 부는 무엇인가?

lines.en: What the Name wherein I boast?
Jesus, Jesus,
Jesus Christ, the Crucified.
Who the ground of my belief?
Who from guilt doth give relief?
Who my ransom once hath been?
Who forgiveth all my sin?
lines.ko: 누가 내 모든 죄를 용서해 주나요?

lines.en: Jesus, Jesus,
Jesus Christ, the Crucified.
Who doth comfort me in woe?
lines.ko: 재난 중에 있는 나를 위로할 사람은 누구입니까?

lines.en: Who protect me from my foe?
lines.ko: 누가 내 원수로부터 나를 보호해 주나요?

lines.en: Who revives my fainting soul?
Who doth heal and make me whole?
Jesus, Jesus,
Jesus Christ, the Crucified.
Who by death hath conquered death?
Who receives my parting breath?
Who can grant me endless rest?
lines.ko: 나에게 끝없는 안식을 줄 수 있는 사람은 누구입니까?

lines.en: Who enrolls me 'mid the blest?
lines.ko: 축복 속에 나를 등록한 사람은 누구입니까?

lines.en: Jesus, Jesus,
Jesus Christ, the Crucified.

title_en: O mystery of love divine

lines.en: O mystery of love divine
That thought and thanks o'erpow'rs!
Lord Jesus, was our portion thine,
lines.ko: 주 예수님, 우리의 몫은 당신의 것이었습니다.

lines.en: And is thy portion ours?
Didst thou fulfil each righteous deed,
God's perfect will express,
lines.ko: 하나님의 완전한 것은 다음과 같이 표현될 것입니다.

lines.en: That we th'unfaithful ones might plead
lines.ko: 우리 불성실한 자들이 간청할 수 있도록

lines.en: Thy perfect faithfulness?
For thee the Father's hidden face?
For thee the bitter cry?
For us the Father's endless grace,
The song of victory?
Our load of sin and misery
Didst thou, the Sinless, bear?
Thy spotless robe of purity
Do we the sinners wear?
Thou, who our very place didst take,
Dwell in our very heart:
Thou, who thy portion ours dost make,
Thyself, thyself impart.
lines.ko: 당신 자신, 당신 자신이 나누어 주십니다.

title_en: Christ of all my hopes the ground

lines.en: Christ, of all my hopes the ground,
lines.ko: 그리스도여, 나의 모든 소망 가운데 땅이여,

lines.en: Christ, the spring of all my joy,
Still in thee may I be found,
lines.ko: 여전히 당신 안에서 나를 찾을 수 있게 하소서.

lines.en: Still for thee my pow'rs employ.
lines.ko: 아직도 당신을 위해 내 힘이 고용되어 있습니다.

lines.en: Let thy love my heart inflame;
lines.ko: 당신의 사랑으로 내 마음이 불타오르게 해주세요.

lines.en: Keep thy fear before my sight;
Be thy praise my highest aim;
lines.ko: 당신의 찬양이 나의 최고의 목표가 되십시오.

lines.en: Be thy smile my chief delight.
lines.ko: 당신의 미소가 나의 최고의 기쁨이 되어주세요.

lines.en: Fountain of o'erflowing grace,
Freely from thy fullness give;
Till I close my earthly race,
May I prove it "Christ to live."
Firmly trusting in thy blood,
Nothing shall my heart confound;
lines.ko: 아무것도 내 마음에 혼란을 주지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: Safely I shall pass the flood,
Safely reach Immanuel's ground.
Thus, O thus, an entrance give
To the land of cloudless sky;
Having known it "Christ to live,"
Let me know it "gain to die."

title_en: Jesus, I live to thee

lines.en: Jesus, I live to thee,
The loveliest and best;
My life in thee, thy life in me,
lines.ko: 당신 안에 있는 내 생명, 내 안에 있는 당신의 생명,

lines.en: In thy blest love I rest.
lines.ko: 당신의 축복받은 사랑 안에서 나는 쉬겠습니다.

lines.en: Jesus, I die to thee,
Whenever death shall come;
To die in thee is life to me
lines.ko: 당신 안에서 죽는 것이 나에게는 생명입니다

lines.en: In my eternal home.
Whether to live or die,
I know not which is best;
lines.ko: 나는 어느 것이 가장 좋은지 모릅니다.

lines.en: To live in thee is bliss to me,
lines.ko: 당신 안에 사는 것이 나에게 복입니다.

lines.en: To die is endless rest.
Living or dying, Lord,
I ask but to be thine;
My life in thee, thy life in me,
lines.ko: 당신 안에 있는 내 생명, 내 안에 있는 당신의 생명,

lines.en: Makes heav'n for ever mine.

title_en: Jesus, thy blood and righteousness

lines.en: Jesus, thy blood and righteousness
My beauty are, my glorious dress;
'Midst flaming worlds, in these arrayed,
With joy shall I lift up my head.
Bold shall I stand in thy great day;
lines.ko: 주의 큰 날에 내가 담대히 서리라.

lines.en: For who aught to my charge shall lay?
Fully absolved through these I am
From sin and fear, from guilt and shame.
When from the dust of death I rise
To claim my mansion in the skies,
lines.ko: 하늘에 있는 나의 저택을 차지하기 위해,

lines.en: Ev'n then this shall be all my plea,
lines.ko: 그럼에도 불구하고 이것이 나의 모든 간청이 될 것입니다.

lines.en: Jesus hath lived, hath died, for me.
Jesus, be endless praise to thee,
Whose boundless mercy hath for me
For me a full atonement made,
An everlasting ransom paid.
O let the dead now hear thy voice;
lines.ko: 오 이제 죽은 자들이 주의 음성을 듣게 하소서.

lines.en: Now bid thy banished ones rejoice;
lines.ko: 이제 당신의 추방된 자들에게 기뻐하라고 명하십시오.

lines.en: Their beauty this, their glorious dress,
lines.ko: 그들의 아름다움은 이렇고, 그들의 영광스러운 옷은 이렇습니다.

lines.en: Jesus, thy blood and righteousness.

title_en: Fountain of never-ceasing grace

lines.en: Fountain of never-ceasing grace,
Thy saints' exhaustless theme,
Great object of immortal praise,
Essentially supreme;
We bless thee for the glorious fruits
Thine incarnation gives;
The righteousness which grace imputes,
And faith alone receives.
In thee we have a righteousness
By God himself approved;
Our rock, our sure foundation this,
lines.ko: 우리의 반석, 우리의 확실한 기초 이것이니

lines.en: Which never can be moved.
Our ransom by thy death was paid,
For all thy people giv'n,
The law thou perfectly obeyed,
That they might enter heav'n.
lines.ko: 그들이 천국에 들어갈 수도 있다는 것입니다.

lines.en: As all, when Adam sinned alone,
lines.ko: 마찬가지로, 아담이 홀로 죄를 지었을 때,

lines.en: In his transgression died,
So by the righteousness of one
Are sinners justified;
We to thy merit, gracious Lord,
With humblest joy submit,
Again to Paradise restored,
In thee alone complete.

title_en: Thy works, not mine, O Christ
title_ko: 나의 일이 아닌 당신의 일, 오 그리스도여 (자체번역)

lines.en: Thy works, not mine, O Christ,
lines.ko: 오 그리스도여, 나의 일이 아니라 당신의 일입니다.

lines.en: Speak gladness to this heart;
They tell me all is done;
lines.ko: 그들은 나에게 모든 것이 끝났다고 말합니다.

lines.en: They bid my fear depart.
To whom, save thee,
Who canst alone
For sin atone,
Lord, shall I flee?
Thy pains, not mine, O Christ,
lines.ko: 나의 고통이 아닌 당신의 고통, 오 그리스도여,

lines.en: Upon the shameful tree,
Have paid the law's full price
And purchased peace for me.
Thy cross, not mine, O Christ,
lines.ko: 나의 십자가가 아닌 당신의 십자가, 오 그리스도여,

lines.en: Has borne the awful load
Of sins that none in heav'n
Or earth could bear but God.
lines.ko: 아니면 땅은 하나님 외에는 견딜 수 없습니다.

lines.en: Thy righteousness, O Christ,
Alone can cover me:
No righteousness avails
Save that which is of thee.

title_en: Behold th' amazing gift of love

lines.en: Behold th'amazing gift of love
The Father hath bestowed
On us, the sinful sons of men,
To call us sons of God!
Concealed as yet this honor lies,
By this dark world unknown,
lines.ko: 알 수 없는 이 어두운 세계로,

lines.en: A world that knew not when he came,
E'en God's eternal Son.
High is the rank we now possess;
lines.ko: 우리가 지금 갖고 있는 지위는 높습니다.

lines.en: But higher we shall rise;
lines.ko: 그러나 우리는 더 높이 올라갈 것입니다.

lines.en: Though what we shall hereafter be
Is hid from mortal eyes:
Our souls, we know, when God appears,
Shall bear his image bright;
For then his glory, as he is,
Shall open to our sight.

title_en: Blessed are the sons of God

lines.en: Blessed are the sons of God,
They are bought with Christ's own blood;
lines.ko: 그들은 그리스도 자신의 피로 산 바 되었습니다.

lines.en: They are ransomed from the grave,
Life eternal they shall have:
With them numbered may we be,
Here and in eternity.
They are justified by grace,
They enjoy the Saviour's peace;
All their sins are washed away,
They shall stand in God's great day:
lines.ko: 그들은 하나님의 큰 날에 설 것입니다.

lines.en: They are lights upon the earth,
Children of a heav'nly birth;
One with God, with Jesus one,
Glory is in them begun:

title_en: Father, I know that all my life
title_ko: 아버지, 저는 평생 동안 그것을 알고 있습니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: Father, I know that all my life
lines.ko: 아버지, 저는 평생 동안 그것을 알고 있습니다

lines.en: Is portioned out for me;
The changes that are sure to come,
I do not fear to see:
I ask thee for a present mind,
Intent on pleasing thee.
I would not have the restless will
lines.ko: 나는 불안한 의지를 갖지 않을 것이다

lines.en: That hurries to and fro,
Seeking for some great thing to do,
Or secret thing to know;
I would be treated as a child,
And guided where I go.
I ask thee for the daily strength,
To none that ask denied,
lines.ko: 요청한 사람 중 누구도 거부하지 않았으며,

lines.en: A mind to blend with outward life,
While keeping at thy side,
Content to fill a little space,
If thou be glorified.
In service which thy will appoints
There are no bonds for me;
My secret heart is taught the truth
That makes thy children free;
A life of self-renouncing love
Is one of liberty.

title_en: Lord, who shall come to thee

lines.en: From Psalm 15
Lord, who shall come to thee,
And stand before thy face?
Who shall abide, a welcome guest,
Within thy holy place?
The man of upright life,
Sincere in word and deed,
Who slanders neither friend nor foe,
No idle tales will heed.
Who honors godly men,
But scorns the false and vile,
Who keeps his promised word to all,
lines.ko: 모든 사람에게 약속하신 말씀을 지키시는 분,

lines.en: Though loss be his the while.
Who loves not usury,
Nor takes a base reward;
Unmoved for ever he shall be,
And stand before the Lord.

title_en: That man is blest who, fearing God
title_ko: 하나님을 경외하는 이 사람은 복이 있도다 (자체번역)

lines.en: From Psalm 1
That man is blest who, fearing God,
lines.ko: 하나님을 경외하는 이 사람은 복이 있도다

lines.en: From sin restrains his feet,
Who will not stand with wicked men,
Who shuns the scorners' seat.
Yea, blest is he who makes God's law
lines.ko: 참으로 하나님의 법을 만드는 자는 복이 있도다

lines.en: His portion and delight,
And meditates upon that law
With gladness day and night.
That man is nourished like a tree
Set by the rivers' side;
Its leaf is green, its fruit is sure,
lines.ko: 그 잎사귀는 푸르고 그 열매는 확실하며

lines.en: And thus his works abide.
The wicked like the driven chaff
Are swept from off the land;
They shall not gather with the just,
lines.ko: 그들은 의로운 자들과 함께 모이지 않을 것이며,

lines.en: Nor in the judgment stand.
The Lord will guard the righteous well,
Their way to him is known;
The way of sinners, far from God,
Shall surely be o'erthrown.

title_en: Blest are the undefiled in heart
title_ko: 마음이 더럽혀지지 않은 자는 복이 있도다 (자체번역)

lines.en: From Psalm 119
Blest are the undefiled in heart,
lines.ko: 마음이 더럽혀지지 않은 자는 복이 있나니

lines.en: Whose ways are right and clean,
Who never from the law depart,
But fly from ev'ry sin.
Blest are the men who keep thy Word
lines.ko: 주의 말씀을 지키는 사람은 복이 있도다

lines.en: And practice thy commands;
With their whole heart they seek the Lord,
And serve thee with their hands.
Great is their peace who love thy law;
lines.ko: 당신의 법을 사랑하는 이들에게는 큰 평화가 있습니다.

lines.en: How firm their souls abide!
Nor can a bold temptation draw
Their steady feet aside.
Then shall my heart have inward joy,
lines.ko: 그러면 내 마음은 내적인 기쁨을 누리게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: And keep my face from shame,
When all thy statutes I obey,
lines.ko: 내가 주의 모든 율례를 지킬 때에는

lines.en: And honor all thy Name.

title_en: Jehovah's perfect law restores the soul
title_ko: 여호와의 완전한 법은 영혼을 회복시켜 줍니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: From Psalm 19:7-14
Jehovah's perfect law
Restores the soul again;
His testimony sure
Gives wisdom unto men;
The precepts of the Lord are right,
And fill the heart with great delight.
The Lord's commands are pure,
They light and joy restore;
Jehovah's fear is clean,
Enduring evermore;
His statutes, let the world confess,
Are wholly truth and righteousness.
They are to be desired
Above the finest gold;
Than honey from the comb
More sweetness far they hold;
lines.ko: 그들은 더 많은 단맛을 갖고 있습니다.

lines.en: With warnings they thy servant guard,
In keeping them is great reward.
His errors who can know?
lines.ko: 그의 실수를 누가 알 수 있겠는가?

lines.en: Cleanse me from hidden stain;
lines.ko: 숨은 얼룩에서 나를 깨끗이 씻어 주소서.

lines.en: Keep me from wilful sins,
Nor let them o'er me reign;
And then I upright shall appear
And be from great transgressions clear.
When thou dost search my life,
May all my thoughts within
lines.ko: 내 모든 생각이 그 안에 있기를

lines.en: And all the words I speak
Thy full approval win.
O Lord, thou art a Rock to me,
And my Redeemer thou shalt be.
lines.ko: 그리고 당신은 나의 구속자가 되실 것입니다.

title_en: The law of God is good and wise

lines.en: The law of God is good and wise
And sets his will before our eyes,
Shows us the way of righteousness,
And dooms to death when we transgress.
lines.ko: 그리고 우리가 범법하면 죽음에 이르게 됩니다.

lines.en: Its light of holiness imparts
The knowledge of our sinful hearts
That we may see our lost estate
lines.ko: 우리의 잃어버린 재산을 볼 수 있도록

lines.en: And seek deliv'rance ere too late.
lines.ko: 그리고 너무 늦기 전에 구원을 구하라.

lines.en: To those who help in Christ have found
And would in works of love abound
It shows what deeds are his delight
And should be done as good and right.
lines.ko: 그리고 선하고 옳은 일을 해야 합니다.

lines.en: When men the offered help disdain
And wilfully in sin remain,
Its terror in their ear resounds
And keeps their wickedness in bounds.
The law is good; but since the fall
Its holiness condemns us all;
It dooms us for our sin to die
lines.ko: 우리의 죄가 죽는 것은 우리를 정죄하는 것입니다

lines.en: And has no pow'r to justify.
To Jesus we for refuge flee,
Who from the curse has set us free,
And humbly worship at his throne,
Saved by his grace through faith alone.
lines.ko: 오직 믿음을 통해 그분의 은혜로 구원을 받았습니다.

title_en: Most perfect is the law of God

lines.en: From Psalm 19:7-11 and Psalm 119:97
lines.ko: 천지에 있는 이름 중 귀하고 높은 이름
lines.id: Tidak ada nama yang begitu manis di bumi,

lines.en: No name so sweet in heav-en,
lines.ko: 주 나시기 전 지으신 구주의 이름 예수
lines.id: Tidak ada nama yang begitu manis di surga,

lines.en: The Name be-fore His won-drous birth
lines.ko: 후렴 : 주 앞에 내가 엎드려 그 이름 찬송함은
lines.id: Nama sebelum kelahiran-Nya yang menakjubkan

lines.en: To Christ the Sav-iour giv-en.
lines.ko: 내 귀에 들린 말씀 중 귀하신 이름 예수 아멘
lines.id: Kepada Kristus Juruselamat yang diberikan.

lines.en: Most perfect is the law of God,
lines.ko: 주 십자가에 달릴 때 명패에 쓰인 대로
lines.id: Dan ketika dia tergantung di pohon,

lines.en: Restoring those that stray;
lines.ko: 저 유대인의 왕이요 곧 우리 왕이시라
lines.id: Mereka menulis Nama ini di atas Dia

lines.en: His testimony is most sure,
lines.id: Itu semua mungkin melihat alasan kita

lines.en: Proclaiming wisdom's way.
lines.id: Selama-lamanya harus lebih mengasihi Dia.

lines.en: O how love I thy law! O how love I thy law!
lines.ko: 지금도 살아 계셔서 언제나 하시는 일
lines.id: Jadi sekarang, di atas takhta Bapa-Nya,

lines.en: It is my meditation all the day.
lines.ko: 나 같은 죄인 부르사 참 소망 주시도다
lines.id: Al-might-y untuk menyewakan kembali kami

lines.en: O how love I thy law! O how love I thy law!
lines.id: Dari dosa dan kesakitan, Dia dengan senang hati memerintah,

lines.en: It is my meditation all the day.
lines.id: Pangeran dan Juruselamat Yesus.

lines.en: The precepts of the Lord are right;
lines.id: Ya Yesus, dengan nama yang tak tertandingi itu,

lines.en: With joy they fill the heart;
lines.ko: 그 이름으로 우리게 참 복을 내리신다
lines.id: Kasih karunia-Mu tidak akan pernah mengecewakan kami

lines.en: The Lord's commandments all are pure,
lines.id: Hari ini sama seperti hari kemarin,

lines.en: And clearest light impart.
lines.id: Engkau tetap sama selamanya.

lines.en: The fear of God is undefiled
And ever shall endure;
The statutes of the Lord are truth
And righteousness most pure.
They warn from ways of wickedness
Displeasing to the Lord,
And in the keeping of his Word
There is a great reward.

alt_titles: O how love I thy law!
title_id: Tidak Ada Nama yang begitu Manis

title_en: Teach me, O Lord, thy way of truth
title_ko: 여호와여 주의 진리의 길을 내게 가르치소서 (자체번역)

lines.en: From Psalm 119:33-40
Teach me, O Lord, thy way of truth,
lines.ko: 여호와여 주의 진리의 길을 내게 가르치소서

lines.en: And from it I will not depart;
lines.ko: 그리고 나는 거기서 떠나지 않을 것이다.

lines.en: That I may steadfastly obey,
Give me an understanding heart.
In thy commandments make me walk,
For in thy law my joy shall be;
Give me a heart that loves thy will,
lines.ko: 당신의 뜻을 사랑하는 마음을 제게 주소서.

lines.en: From discontent and envy free.
Turn thou mine eyes from vanity,
And cause me in thy ways to tread;
O let thy servant prove thy Word
lines.ko: 오 당신의 종으로 당신의 말씀을 증명하게 하소서

lines.en: And thus to godly fear be led.
Turn thou away reproach and fear;
Thy righteous judgments I confess;
To know thy precepts I desire;
Revive me in thy righteousness.

title_en: Saviour, blessed Saviour, listen while we sing
title_ko: 구세주, 복되신 구세주, 우리가 노래할 때 들어주세요 (자체번역)

lines.en: Saviour, blessed Saviour,
Listen while we sing;
Hearts and voices raising
Praises to our King:
All we have we offer,
All we hope to be,
Body, soul, and spirit,
All we yield to thee.
Nearer, ever nearer,
Christ we draw to thee,
Deep in adoration
Bending low the knee;
Thou for our redemption
Cam'st on earth to die;
Thou, that we might follow,
Hast gone up on high.
Great and ever greater,
Are thy mercies here;
True and everlasting
Are the glories there,
Where no pain nor sorrow,
Fear nor care, is known,
Where the angel legions
Circle round thy throne.
Higher then, and higher,
Bear the ransomed soul,
Earthly toils forgotten,
Saviour, to its goal;
Where, in joys unthought of,
Saints with angels sing,
Never weary, raising
Praises to their King.

title_en: O the deep, deep love of Jesus

lines.en: O the deep, deep love of Jesus!
Vast, unmeasured, boundless, free;
lines.ko: 광대하고 측량할 수 없으며 끝이 없고 자유롭다.

lines.en: Rolling as a mighty ocean
In its fullness over me.
Underneath me, all around me,
lines.ko: 내 아래, 내 주변의 모든 것,

lines.en: Is the current of thy love;
Leading onward, leading homeward,
To thy glorious rest above.
O the deep, deep love of Jesus!
Spread his praise from shore to shore;
lines.ko: 그분을 찬양하는 마음을 이 해안에서 저 해안으로 퍼뜨리십시오.

lines.en: How he loveth, ever loveth,
Changeth never, nevermore;
How he watches o'er his loved ones,
Died to call them all his own;
lines.ko: 그것들을 모두 자기 것이라고 부르기 위해 죽으셨습니다.

lines.en: How for them he intercedeth,
Watcheth o'er them from the throne.
O the deep, deep love of Jesus!
Love of ev'ry love the best:
'Tis an ocean vast of blessing,
'Tis a haven sweet of rest.
O the deep, deep love of Jesus!
'Tis a heav'n of heav'ns to me;
And it lifts me up to glory,
For it lifts me up to thee.

title_en: My faith looks up to thee

lines.en: My faith looks up to thee,
lines.ko: 못 박혀 죽으신 하나님 어린양 믿습니다
lines.id: Imanku tertuju pada-Mu,

lines.en: Thou Lamb of Calvary,
lines.ko: 죄 속함 받고서 이 몸과 맘 드려 간절히 빌 때에 들으소서
lines.id: Engkau Anak Domba Cal-va-ry, Juruselamat Ilahi kami:

lines.en: Saviour Divine;
lines.id: Sekarang dengarkan aku saat aku berdoa, Singkirkan semua rasa bersalahku,

lines.en: Now hear me while I pray,
lines.id: O izinkan aku mulai hari ini menjadi milik-Mu seutuhnya.

lines.en: Take all my guilt away,
O let me from this day
Be wholly thine.
May thy rich grace impart
lines.ko: 풍성한 은혜로 약한 맘 도우사 열심주고
lines.id: Semoga rahmat-Mu yang berlimpah turut serta

lines.en: Strength to my fainting heart,
lines.ko: 날 대속 했으니 주 사랑하는 맘 불같이 뜨겁게 하옵소서
lines.id: Kekuatan bagi hatiku yang lemah, Semangatku menginspirasi

lines.en: My zeal inspire;
lines.id: Sebagaimana Engkau telah mati untukku, ya semoga cintaku kepadaMu

lines.en: As thou hast died for me,
lines.id: Murni, hangat, dan tak berubah, Api yang hidup.

lines.en: O may my love to thee
Pure, warm and changeless be,
A living fire.
While life's dark maze I tread,
lines.ko: 이 세상 어두워 길 찾지 못하니 인도하사
lines.id: Sementara labirin gelap kehidupan aku injak,

lines.en: And griefs around me spread,
lines.ko: 내 슬픈 눈물을 다 씻어 주시고 그 밝은 빛으로 이끄소서
lines.id: Dan dukacita menyebar ke sekelilingku, Jadilah Engkau pembimbingku

lines.en: Be thou my guide;
lines.id: Tawarkan kegelapan berganti hari, Hapuslah air mata kesedihan,

lines.en: Bid darkness turn to day,
lines.id: Jangan biarkan aku menyimpang dariMu.

lines.en: Wipe sorrow's tears away,
Nor let me ever stray
From thee aside.
When ends life's transient dream,
lines.ko: 내 생명 꿈같이 이 세상 떠날 때 부르시고
lines.id: Ketika mimpi hidup yang sementara berakhir,

lines.en: When death's cold, sullen stream
lines.ko: 사랑을 베푸사 평안케 하시며 영생을 누리게 하옵소서 아멘
lines.id: Saat kematian mengalir dingin dan suram, Maukah aku berguling

lines.en: Shall o'er me roll,
lines.id: Maka, Juruselamat yang Terberkati, dalam cinta, Ketakutan dan ketidakpercayaan kembali hilang

lines.en: Blest Saviour, then, in love,
lines.id: O, berikan aku Sage a-bobe, Jiwa yang tertebus! Amin.

lines.en: Fear and distrust remove;
O bear me safe above,
A ransomed soul.

title_en: Searcher of hearts, from mine erase

lines.en: Searcher of hearts, from mine erase,
lines.ko: 마음을 찾는 자, 내 마음을 지우고,

lines.en: All thoughts that should not be,
And in its deep recesses trace
lines.ko: 그리고 그 깊은 오목한 부분에는 흔적이 남아 있습니다.

lines.en: My gratitude to thee.
Hearer of prayer, O guide aright
lines.ko: 기도를 들으시는 분, 오 올바른 인도자이시여

lines.en: Each word and deed of mine;
Life's battle teach me how to fight,
lines.ko: 인생의 전투는 나에게 싸우는 법을 가르쳐 주었고,

lines.en: And be the vict'ry thine.
Giver of allfor ev'ry good
lines.ko: 모든 사람의 선을 위해 모든 것을 주시는 분

lines.en: In the Redeemer came
For raiment, shelter, and for food,
I thank thee in his Name.
Father and Son and Holy Ghost,
Thou glorious Three in One,
Thou knowest best what I need most,
lines.ko: 나에게 가장 필요한 것이 무엇인지 당신이 가장 잘 아십니다.

lines.en: And let thy will be done.

title_en: Teach me, O Lord, thy holy way
title_ko: 여호와여 주의 거룩한 도를 내게 가르치소서 (자체번역)

lines.en: Teach me, O Lord, thy holy way
lines.ko: 여호와여 주의 거룩한 도를 내게 가르치소서

lines.en: And give me an obedient mind;
That in thy service I may find
lines.ko: 당신을 섬기는 일에서 내가 찾을 수 있는 것은

lines.en: My soul's delight from day to day.
Guide me, O Saviour, with thy hand,
lines.ko: 오 구세주여, 주의 손으로 나를 인도하소서.

lines.en: And so control my thoughts and deeds,
That I may tread the path which leads
lines.ko: 내가 인도하는 길을 밟을 수 있도록

lines.en: Right onward to the blessed land.
lines.ko: 바로 축복받은 땅을 향해 나아가는 것입니다.

lines.en: Help me, O Saviour, here to trace
lines.ko: 오 구세주여, 저를 도와주세요. 여기 추적하러 왔습니다

lines.en: The sacred footsteps thou hast trod;
And, meekly walking with my God,
To grow in goodness, truth, and grace.
Guard me, O Lord, that I may ne'er
Forsake the right, or do the wrong:
lines.ko: 옳은 것을 버리거나, 나쁜 일을 하십시오:

lines.en: Against temptation make me strong,
And round me spread thy shelt'ring care.
lines.ko: 그리고 내 주위에 당신의 피난처를 돌보아 주십시오.

lines.en: Bless me in ev'ry task, O Lord,
lines.ko: 오 주님, 모든 일에 저를 축복해 주십시오.

lines.en: Begun, continued, done for thee:
Fulfil thy perfect work in me;
lines.ko: 내 안에서 당신의 완전한 일을 이루어 주십시오.

lines.en: And thine abounding grace afford.
lines.ko: 그리고 당신의 풍성한 은혜가 감당할 수 있습니다.

title_en: O thou from whom all goodness flows

lines.en: O thou from whom all goodness flows,
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, pikiranmu yang sebenarnya

lines.en: I lift my soul to thee;
lines.ko: 주 얼굴 뵈올 때에야 얼마나 좋으랴
lines.id: Dengan manisnya memenuhi dadaku

lines.en: In all my sorrows, conflicts, woes,
lines.id: Namun jauh lebih manis melihat wajah-Mu,

lines.en: Good Lord, remember me.
lines.id: Dan di hadirat-Mu istirahatlah.

lines.en: When on my aching, burdened heart
lines.id: Suara juga tidak dapat menyanyi, dan hati tidak dapat membingkai,

lines.en: My sins lie heavily,
lines.ko: 천지에 있는 이름 중 비할 데 없도다
lines.id: Mem-'ry juga tidak dapat menemukannya

lines.en: Thy pardon grant, new peace impart:
lines.id: Suara yang lebih merdu dari nama-Mu yang terberkati,

lines.en: Good Lord, remember me.
lines.id: O Sav-iour of mankind!

lines.en: When trials sore obstruct my way,
lines.ko: 참 회개 하는 자에게 소망이 되시고
lines.id: Wahai Harapan dari setiap hati yang menyesal,

lines.en: And ills I cannot flee,
lines.id: Wahai Kegembiraan semua orang yang lemah lembut,

lines.en: O let my strength be as my day:
lines.id: Kepada mereka yang bertanya, betapa baiknya Engkau!

lines.en: Good Lord, remember me.
lines.id: Betapa baiknya bagi mereka yang mencari!

lines.en: If, for thy sake, upon my name
lines.ko: 예수의 넓은 사랑을 어찌 다 말하랴
lines.id: Namun bagaimana dengan mereka yang menemukannya? Ah! ini

lines.en: Shame and reproach shall be,
lines.ko: 주 사랑 받은 사람만 그 사랑 알도다
lines.id: Baik lidah maupun pena tidak dapat terlihat.

lines.en: All hail reproach, and welcome shame!
lines.id: Kasih Yesus, apa adanya,

lines.en: Good Lord, remember me.
lines.id: Tidak seorang pun kecuali orang-orang yang dikasihi-Nya yang mengetahuinya.

lines.en: If worn with pain, disease, or grief,
lines.ko: 사랑의 구주 예수여 내 기쁨 되시고
lines.id: Ya Tuhan! satu-satunya kegembiraan kami adalah Engkau,

lines.en: This feeble frame should be,
lines.id: Sesuai dengan Engkau, hadiah kami akan menjadi

lines.en: Grant patience, rest, and kind relief:
lines.id: Ya Tuhan! jadilah Engkau kemuliaan kami sekarang,

lines.en: Good Lord, remember me.
lines.id: Dan melalui e-ter-ni-ty. Amin.

lines.en: When, in the solemn hour of death,
I wait thy just decree,
Be this the pray'r of my last breath:
Good Lord, remember me.

title_en: For ever here my rest shall be
title_ko: 영원히 여기서 나의 안식은 있을 것이다 (자체번역)

lines.en: For ever here my rest shall be,
lines.ko: 영원히 여기서 나의 안식이 있을 것입니다.

lines.en: Close to thy bleeding side;
This all my hope and all my plea,
lines.ko: 이것이 나의 모든 희망이고 나의 모든 간청입니다.

lines.en: "For me the Saviour died."
My dying Saviour and my God,
Fountain for guilt and sin,
Sprinkle me ever with thy blood,
And cleanse and keep me clean.
lines.ko: 그리고 나를 깨끗이 씻어 깨끗하게 유지해 주십시오.

lines.en: The atonement of thy blood apply,
Till faith to sight improve;
Till hope in full fruition die,
lines.ko: 완전한 결실을 맺는 희망이 사라질 때까지,

lines.en: And all my soul be love.
I do believe, I now believe,
That Jesus died for me;
And through his blood, His precious blood,
lines.ko: 그리고 그의 보혈, 그의 보혈로 말미암아

lines.en: I shall from sin be free.

title_en: Jesus, merciful and mild

lines.en: Jesus, merciful and mild,
Lead me as a helpless child:
On no other arm but thine
Would my weary soul recline.
lines.ko: 내 지친 영혼이 기댈 수 있을까요?

lines.en: Thou art ready to forgive,
Thou canst bid the sinner live;
lines.ko: 당신은 죄인에게 살려달라고 명하실 수 있습니다.

lines.en: Guide the wand'rer, day by day,
In the strait and narrow way.
Thou canst fit me by thy grace
lines.ko: 당신은 당신의 은혜로 나를 적합하게 할 수 있습니다

lines.en: For the heav'nly dwelling-place;
All thy promises are sure,
Ever shall thy love endure;
Then what more could I desire,
lines.ko: 그렇다면 내가 무엇을 더 바랄 수 있겠는가?

lines.en: How to greater bliss aspire?
lines.ko: 더 큰 행복을 열망하는 방법은 무엇입니까?

lines.en: All I need, in thee I see;
lines.ko: 나에게 필요한 모든 것은 당신에게서 보입니다.

lines.en: Thou art all in all to me.
Jesus, Saviour all Divine,
Hast thou made me truly thine?
Hast thou bought me by thy blood?
Reconciled my heart to God?
Hearken to my tender prayer,
Let me thine own image bear,
Let me love thee more and more
Till I reach heav'n's blissful shore.
lines.ko: 내가 천국의 행복한 해안에 도달할 때까지.

title_en: Love Divine, all loves excelling

lines.en: Love Divine, all loves excelling,
lines.id: Cinta ilahi, semua cinta ex-cel-ling,

lines.ko: 우리 맘에 항상 계셔 온전하게 하소서
lines.id: Kegembiraan surga, turun ke bumi!

lines.ko: 우리 주는 자비하사 사랑 무한 하시니
lines.id: Perbaiki dalam diri kami tempat tinggal-Mu yang sederhana
Segala kemurahan-Mu yang setia dimahkotai.
Ya Tuhan, Engkau penuh belas kasihan
Kasih-Mu yang murni dan tak terbatas.
Kunjungi kami dengan keselamatan-Mu
Masuki setiap hati yang gemetar.

lines.en: Joy of heav'n, to earth come down:
lines.id: Bernafaslah, oh, hiruplah Roh kasih-Mu

lines.ko: 복과 은혜 사랑 받아 평안하게 하소서
lines.id: Dalam setiap payudara yang bermasalah!

lines.ko: 첨과 끝이 되신 주님 항상 인도 하셔서
lines.id: Marilah kita semua di dalam Engkau di dalam dirinya

lines.ko: 마귀 유혹 받는 것을 속히 끊게 하소서
lines.id: Mari kita temukan istirahat kedua itu.
Hilangkan kecenderungan kita untuk berbuat dosa
Al-pha dan O-me-ga menjadi.
Akhir dari iman, sebagai Permulaannya,
Tetapkan hati kami pada kebebasan.

lines.en: Fix in us thy humble dwelling,
lines.id: Ayo, Yang Maha Kuasa, ke De-liver-er
Biarlah kami menerima kembali seluruh hidup-Mu.

lines.ko: 주께 영광 항상 돌려 천사처럼 섬기며
lines.id: Tiba-tiba kembali, dan tidak pernah,
Bait-Mu tidak akan pernah lagi pergi.
Kepadamu kami akan selalu memberkati,
Layani Engkau sebagai tuan rumah-Mu di atas,
Berdoalah dan pujilah Engkau tanpa henti,
Kemuliaan dalam kasih-Mu yang sempurna.

lines.en: All thy faithful mercies crown:
lines.id: Selesaikanlah ciptaan-Mu yang baru

lines.ko: 주의 크신 구원 받아 온전하게 하소서
lines.id: Biarlah kita menjadi murni dan tanpa noda.
Marilah kami mengarungi keselamatan-Mu yang besar,

lines.ko: 크신 사랑 감격하여 경배하게 하소서 아멘
lines.id: Tersimpan kembali secara sempurna pada-Mu:
Berubah dari kemuliaan ke dalam kemuliaan,
Sampai di surga kita mengambil tempat kita,
Sampai kami melemparkan mahkota kami ke hadapan-Mu,
Tersesat dalam keajaiban, cinta, dan pujian. Amin.

lines.en: Jesus, thou art all compassion,
Pure, unbounded love thou art;
Visit us with thy salvation,
Enter ev'ry trembling heart.
Breathe, O breathe thy loving Spirit
Into ev'ry troubled breast;
Let us all in thee inherit,
Let us find the promised rest:
Take away the love of sinning;
Alpha and Omega be;
End of faith, as its Beginning,
Set our hearts at liberty.
Come, Almighty to deliver,
Let us all thy life receive;
Suddenly return, and never,
Never more thy temples leave.
Thee we would be always blessing,
Serve thee as thy hosts above,
Pray, and praise thee, without ceasing,
Glory in thy perfect love.
Finish, then, thy new creation;
Pure and spotless let us be:
Let us see thy great salvation
Perfectly restored in thee;
Changed from glory into glory,
Till in heav'n we take our place,
Till we cast our crowns before thee,
Lost in wonder, love and praise.

alt_titles: Love Divine, all loves excelling (tune 2)

title_en: From depths of woe I raise to thee

lines.en: From depths of woe I raise to thee
lines.ko: 슬픈 마음 있는 사람 예수 이름 믿으면
lines.id: Bawalah nama Yesus bersamamu,

lines.en: The voice of lamentation;
lines.id: Anak kesedihan dan Celaka

lines.en: Lord, turn a gracious ear to me
lines.id: Itu akan memberi Anda kegembiraan dan kenyamanan,

lines.en: And hear my supplication:
lines.id: Ambillah lalu kemana kamu pergi.

lines.en: If thou iniquities dost mark,
lines.id: Nama yang berharga, oh betapa manisnya! Harapan bumi dan kegembiraan surga,

lines.en: Our secret sins and misdeeds dark,
lines.id: Nama yang berharga, hai betapa manisnya- Harapan bumi dan kegembiraan surga

lines.en: O who shall stand before thee?
To wash away the crimson stain,
lines.ko: 거룩하신 주의 이름 너의 방패 삼으라
lines.id: Ambil nama Yesus selamanya,

lines.en: Grace, grace alone availeth;
lines.ko: 환난 시험 당할 때에 주께 기도 드려라
lines.id: Sebagai tameng dari segala jerat

lines.en: Our works, alas! are all in vain;
lines.id: Jika godaan ada disekitarmu, berkumpullah

lines.en: In much the best life faileth:
lines.id: Hembuskan nama suci itu dalam doa.

lines.en: No man can glory in thy sight,
lines.id: Nama yang berharga, oh betapa manisnya! Harapan bumi dan kegembiraan surga,

lines.en: All must alike confess thy might,
lines.id: Nama yang berharga, hai betapa manisnya- Harapan bumi dan kegembiraan surga

lines.en: And live alone by mercy.
Therefore my trust is in the Lord,
lines.ko: 존귀하신 주의 이름 우리 기쁨 되도다
lines.id: Wahai nama Yesus yang berharga!

lines.en: And not in mine own merit;
lines.ko: 주의 품에 안길 때에 기뻐 찬송 부르리
lines.id: Betapa hal itu menggetarkan jiwa kita dengan sukacita

lines.en: On him my soul shall rest, his Word
lines.id: Saat lengan kasih-Nya menerima kita,

lines.en: Upholds my fainting spirit:
lines.id: Hembuskan nama suci itu dalam doa.

lines.en: His promised mercy is my fort,
lines.id: Nama yang berharga, oh betapa manisnya! Harapan bumi dan kegembiraan surga,

lines.en: My comfort and my sweet support;
lines.id: Nama yang berharga, hai betapa manisnya- Harapan bumi dan kegembiraan surga

lines.en: I wait for it with patience.
What though I wait the livelong night,
lines.ko: 우리 갈 길 다 간 후에 보좌 앞에 나아가
lines.id: Atas nama Yesus Membungkuk,

lines.en: And till the dawn appeareth,
lines.id: Jatuh bersujud di kaki-Nya,

lines.en: My heart still trusteth in his might;
lines.id: Raja segala raja di surga kita akan memahkotai Dia,

lines.en: It doubteth not nor feareth:
lines.id: Saat perjalanan kita selesai.

lines.en: Do thus, O ye of Israel's seed,
lines.id: Nama yang berharga, oh betapa manisnya! Harapan bumi dan kegembiraan surga,

lines.en: Ye of the Spirit born indeed;
lines.id: Nama yang berharga, hai betapa manisnya- Harapan bumi dan kegembiraan surga

lines.en: And wait till God appeareth.
Though great our sins and sore our woes
His grace much more aboundeth;
His helping love no limit knows,
Our utmost need it soundeth.
Our Shepherd good and true is he,
Who will at last his Israel free
From all their sin and sorrow.

title_en: How blest is he whose trespass
title_ko: 불법을 범한 자는 얼마나 복이 있느뇨 (자체번역)

lines.en: From Psalm 32
How blest is he whose trespass
lines.ko: 불법을 범한 자는 얼마나 복이 있느뇨

lines.en: Has freely been forgiv'n,
Whose sin is wholly covered
Before the sight of heav'n.
Blest he to whom Jehovah
Will not impute his sin.
Who has a guileless spirit,
Whose heart is true within.
While I kept guilty silence
lines.ko: 내가 죄책감을 갖고 침묵을 지킨 동안

lines.en: My strength was spent with grief,
Thy hand was heavy on me,
My soul found no relief;
But when I owned my trespass,
lines.ko: 그러나 내가 불법 침입을 소유했을 때,

lines.en: My sin hid not from thee,
When I confessed transgression,
Then thou forgavest me.
So let the godly seek thee
lines.ko: 그러므로 경건한 자들이 주를 찾게 하소서

lines.en: In times when thou art near;
No whelming floods shall reach them,
lines.ko: 어떤 큰 홍수도 그들에게 이르지 못하며

lines.en: Nor cause their hearts to fear.
In thee, O Lord, I hide me,
lines.ko: 여호와여 내가 나를 당신 안에 숨기니

lines.en: Thou savest me from ill,
And songs of thy salvation
My heart with rapture thrill.
I graciously will teach thee
The way that thou shalt go,
And with mine eye upon thee
lines.ko: 그리고 내 눈이 너를 바라보고 있어

lines.en: My counsel make thee know.
But be ye not unruly,
Or slow to understand,
Be not perverse, but willing
lines.ko: 비뚤어진 마음을 품지 말고 자원하는 마음을 품으십시오

lines.en: To heed my wise command.
The sorrows of the wicked
In number shall abound,
But those that trust Jehovah,
His mercy shall surround.
Then in the Lord be joyful,
In song lift up your voice;
Be glad in God, ye righteous,
Rejoice, ye saints, rejoice.

title_en: From out the depths I cry, O Lord
title_ko: 오 주님, 깊은 곳에서 내가 부르짖습니다. (자체번역)

lines.en: From Psalm 130
From out the depths I cry, O Lord, to thee;
lines.ko: 오 주님, 제가 깊은 곳에서 당신께 부르짖습니다.

lines.en: Lord, hear my call.
I love thee, Lord, for thou dost heed my plea,
lines.ko: 주님, 당신이 내 간구에 귀를 기울이시니, 내가 당신을 사랑합니다.

lines.en: Forgiving all.
If thou dost mark our sins, who then shall stand?
lines.ko: 주께서 우리 죄를 지적하시면 누가 서리요?

lines.en: But grace and mercy dwell at thy right hand.
lines.ko: 오직 은혜와 인자하심이 주의 우편에 있사오니

lines.en: I wait for God, the Lord, and on his Word
lines.ko: 나는 하나님, 주님, 그리고 그분의 말씀을 기다립니다.

lines.en: My hope relies;
My soul still waits and looks unto the Lord
lines.ko: 내 영혼이 아직도 주님을 기다리며 바라봅니다

lines.en: Till light arise.
I look for him to drive away my night,
lines.ko: 나는 내 밤을 몰아낼 그를 찾습니다.

lines.en: Yea, more than watchmen look for morning light.
lines.ko: 그렇습니다. 파수꾼이 아침 햇살을 찾는 것보다 더 많은 것이 있습니다.

lines.en: Hope in the Lord, ye waiting saints, and he
Will well provide;
For mercy and redemption full and free
With him abide.
From sin and evil, mighty though they seem,
His arm almighty will his saints redeem.
lines.ko: 그분의 전능하신 팔이 그분의 성도들을 구속하실 것입니다.

title_en: My sins, my sins, my Saviour
title_ko: 나의 죄 나의 죄 나의 구원자 (자체번역)

lines.en: My sins, my sins, my Saviour!
lines.ko: 나의 죄, 나의 죄, 나의 구세주!

lines.en: They take such hold on me,
I am not able to look up,
Save only, Christ, on thee;
In thee is all forgiveness,
In thee abundant grace,
My shadow and my sunshine
The brightness of thy face.
My sins, my sins, my Saviour!
lines.ko: 나의 죄, 나의 죄, 나의 구세주!

lines.en: Their guilt I never knew
lines.ko: 나는 결코 알지 못했던 그들의 죄책감

lines.en: Till with thee in the desert
I near thy passion drew;
Till with thee in the garden
I heard thy pleading pray'r,
And saw the sweat-drops bloody
That told thy sorrow there.
Therefore my songs, my Saviour,
E'en in this time of woe,
Shall tell of all thy goodness
To suff'ring man below;
Thy goodness and thy favor,
Whose presence from above
Rejoice those hearts, my Saviour,
lines.ko: 나의 구세주여, 그 마음을 기뻐해 주소서.

lines.en: That live in thee and love.

title_en: Though your sins be as scarlet

lines.en: "Though your sins be as scarlet,
They shall be as white as snow;
Though your sins be as scarlet,
They shall be as white as snow;
Though they be red like crimson,
They shall be as wool.
Though your sins be as scarlet,
They shall be as white as snow."
Hear the voice that entreats you,
O return ye unto God!
Hear the voice that entreats you,
O return ye unto God!
He is great compassion,
And of wondrous love.
Hear the voice that entreats you,
O return ye unto God!
He'll forgive your transgressions,
And remember them no more:
lines.ko: 그리고 더 이상 그것들을 기억하지 말라:

lines.en: He'll forgive your transgressions,
And remember them no more:
lines.ko: 그리고 더 이상 그것들을 기억하지 말라:

lines.en: "Look unto me, ye people,"
Saith the Lord your God.
He'll forgive your transgressions,
And remember them no more.
lines.ko: 그리고 더 이상 그들을 기억하지 마십시오.

title_en: God of pity, God of grace

lines.en: God of pity, God of grace,
lines.ko: 내 진정 사모하는 친구가 되시는 구주 예수님은 아름다워라
lines.id: Aku telah menemukan sahabat dalam diri Yesus, Dia segalanya bagiku,

lines.en: When we humbly seek thy face,
lines.ko: 산 밑에 백합화요 빛나는 새벽별 주님 형언할 길 아주 없도다
lines.id: Dia yang tercantik dari sepuluh ribu pasir bagi jiwaku

lines.en: Bend from heav'n, thy dwelling-place;
lines.ko: 내 맘이 아플 적에 큰 위로되시며 나 외로울 때 좋은 친구라
lines.id: Lil-y dari Lembah, di dalam Dia saja aku melihat

lines.en: Hear, forgive, and save.
lines.ko: 주는 저 산 밑에 백합 빛나는 새벽 별 이 땅 위에 비길 것이 없도다
lines.id: Yang saya perlukan untuk membersihkan dan menjadikan saya utuh sepenuhnya.

lines.en: When we in thy temple meet,
lines.ko: 내 맘의 모든 염려 이 세상 고락도 주님 항상 같이 하여 주시고
lines.id: Dialah yang menanggung semua dukacitaku, dan menanggung semua dukacitaku

lines.en: Spread our wants before thy feet,
lines.ko: 시험을 당할 때에 악마의 계교를 즉시 물리치사 나를 지키네
lines.id: Dalam godaan Dialah menaraku yang kuat dan perkasa

lines.en: Pleading at thy mercy-seat,
lines.ko: 온 세상 날 버려도 주 예수 안 버려 끝까지 나를 돌아보시니
lines.id: Aku telah menyerahkan segalanya untuk-Nya, dan semua idolaku terkoyak

lines.en: Look from heav'n and save.
lines.ko: 주는 저 산 밑에 백합 빛나는 새벽 별 이 땅 위에 비길 것이 없도다
lines.id: Dari hatiku, dan sekarang Dia menjagaku dengan kuasa-Nya.

lines.en: When thy love our hearts shall fill,
lines.ko: 내 맘을 다하여서 주님을 따르면 길이길이 나를 사랑하리니
lines.id: Dia tidak akan pernah, tidak akan pernah meninggalkanku, dan tidak akan pernah meninggalkanku di sini,

lines.en: And we long to do thy will,
lines.ko: 물 불이 두렵잖고 창 검도 겁없네 주는 높은 산성 내 방패시라
lines.id: Sementara aku hidup dengan iman dan melakukan kehendak-Nya yang diberkati

lines.en: Turning to thy holy hill,
lines.ko: 내 영혼 먹이시는 그 은혜 누리고 나 친히 주를 뵙기 원하네
lines.id: Dinding api di sekitarku, kini aku tidak perlu takut,

lines.en: Lord, accept and save.
lines.ko: 주는 저 산 밑에 백합 빛나는 새벽 별 이 땅 위에 비길 것이 없도다 아멘
lines.id: Dengan man-na-Nya Dia akan memenuhi jiwaku yang lapar.

lines.en: Should we wander from thy fold,
And our love to thee grow cold,
With a pitying eye behold;
Lord, forgive and save.
Should the hand of sorrow press,
Earthly care and want distress,
May our souls thy peace possess;
Jesus, hear and save.
And, whate'er our cry may be,
When we lift our hearts to thee,
From our burden set us free;
Hear, forgive, and save.

title_id: Saya Telah Menemukan Teman di dalam Yesus

title_en: Weary of earth, and laden with my sin

lines.en: Weary of earth, and laden with my sin,
I look at heav'n and long to enter in;
lines.ko: 나는 천국을 바라보며 그 안으로 들어가기를 갈망합니다.

lines.en: But there no evil thing may find a home;
lines.ko: 그러나 어떤 악한 것도 집을 찾을 수 없습니다.

lines.en: And yet I hear a voice that bids me "Come."
lines.ko: 그러나 나는 나에게 “오라”고 명령하는 음성을 듣습니다.

lines.en: So vile I am, how dare I hope to stand
lines.ko: 나는 너무 비열해서 감히 설 수 있겠습니까?

lines.en: In the pure glory of that holy land?
lines.ko: 그 거룩한 땅의 순수한 영광 속에서?

lines.en: Before the whiteness of that throne appear?
lines.ko: 그 보좌의 흰 것이 나타나기 전에는?

lines.en: Yet there are hands stretched out to draw me near.
lines.ko: 그러나 나를 가까이 끌어당기기 위해 뻗어 있는 손이 있습니다.

lines.en: The while I fain would tread the heav'nly way,
lines.ko: 내가 하늘의 길을 걷고 싶어하는 동안,

lines.en: Evil is ever with me day by day;
Yet on mine ears the gracious tidings fall,
lines.ko: 그러나 내 귀에는 은혜로운 소식이 들려온다.

lines.en: "Repent, confess, thou shalt be loosed from all."
It is the voice of Jesus that I hear;
His are the hands stretched out to draw me near,
lines.ko: 그분은 나를 가까이 끌어들이기 위해 뻗은 손입니다.

lines.en: And his the blood that can for all atone
lines.ko: 그리고 그의 피는 모두를 속죄할 수 있는 것

lines.en: And set me faultless there before the throne.
lines.ko: 그리고 나를 거기 보좌 앞에 흠 없이 세우소서.

lines.en: O great Absolver, grant my soul may wear
lines.ko: 오 위대한 절대자시여, 내 영혼이 지치게 하소서

lines.en: The lowliest garb of penitence and prayer,
That in the Father's courts my glorious dress
lines.ko: 아버지의 뜰에서 나의 영광스러운 옷을 입으리로다

lines.en: May be the garment of thy righteousness.
Yea, thou wilt answer for me, righteous Lord;
lines.ko: 그렇습니다. 의로우신 주님, 당신께서는 저를 위해 응답해 주실 것입니다.

lines.en: Thine all the merits, mine the great reward;
lines.ko: 모든 공덕은 당신의 것이요, 나의 큰 상은 나의 것입니다.

lines.en: Thine the sharp thorns, and mine the golden crown;
lines.ko: 날카로운 가시는 당신의 것이요, 황금 왕관은 나의 것입니다.

lines.en: Mine the life won, and thine the life laid down.
lines.ko: 승리한 생명은 나의 것이고, 버린 생명은 당신의 것입니다.

title_en: O God of Truth, whose living Word
title_ko: 오 진리의 하느님, 그분의 살아 있는 말씀 (자체번역)

lines.en: O God of truth, whose living Word
lines.ko: 오 진리의 하느님, 그분의 살아 있는 말씀

lines.en: Upholds whate'er hath breath,
Look down on thy creation, Lord,
Enslaved by sin and death,
Set up thy standard, Lord, that we
Who claim a heav'nly birth,
May march with thee to smite the lies
lines.ko: 거짓말을 물리치기 위해 당신과 함께 행진할 수 있습니다

lines.en: That vex thy groaning earth.
lines.ko: 그것은 당신의 신음하는 지구를 괴롭히는 것입니다.

lines.en: Ah! would we join that blest array,
lines.ko: 아! 우리도 그 축복받은 무리에 합류하시겠습니까?

lines.en: And follow in the might
Of him, the Faithful and the True,
In raiment clean and white!
Then, God of truth for whom we long,
Thou who wilt hear our pray'r,
Do thine own battle in our hearts,
lines.ko: 우리 마음 속에서 당신의 싸움을 행하소서.

lines.en: And slay the falsehood there.

title_en: O Lord, how are my foes increased
title_ko: 주 예수보다 더 귀한 것은 없네

lines.en: From Psalm 3
lines.ko: 주 예수보다 더 귀한 것은 없네
lines.id: Aku lebih memilih memiliki Yesus daripada perak atau emas

lines.en: I'd rath-er be - His then have rich-es un-told
lines.ko: 이 세상 부귀와 바꿀 수 없네
lines.id: Aku lebih suka menjadi - Dia punya kekayaan yang tak terhitung

lines.en: I'd rath-er have - Jesus than houses or lands.
lines.id: Saya lebih memilih memiliki - Yesus daripada rumah atau tanah.

lines.en: I'd rath-er be - led by His nail-pierced hand
lines.id: Saya lebih suka dipimpin oleh tangan-Nya yang tertusuk paku

lines.en: Than to be the king of a vast do-main
lines.ko: 세상 즐거움 다 버리고 세상 자랑 다 버렸네
lines.id: Daripada menjadi raja dari sebuah wilayah yang luas

lines.en: Or be held in sin's drea-d sway.
lines.ko: 주 예수보다 더 귀한 것은 없네 예수 밖에는 없네
lines.id: Atau terjebak dalam pengaruh ketakutan akan dosa.

lines.en: O Lord, how are my foes increased!
lines.ko: 주 예수보다 더 귀한 것은 없네
lines.id: Aku lebih suka memiliki Yesus daripada - laki-laki - tepuk tangan

lines.en: Against me many rise;
lines.ko: 이 세상 명예와 바꿀 수 없네
lines.id: Saya lebih suka - setia pada tujuan mulia-Nya

lines.en: How many say, "In vain for help
lines.id: Saya lebih memilih memiliki - Yesus daripada ketenaran di seluruh dunia.

lines.en: He on his God relies."
lines.id: Saya lebih suka - setia pada nama suci-Nya.

lines.en: Than to be the king of a vast do-main
lines.ko: 세상 즐거움 다 버리고 세상 자랑 다 버렸네
lines.id: Daripada menjadi raja dari sebuah wilayah yang luas

lines.en: Or be held in sin's drea-d sway.
lines.ko: 주 예수보다 더 귀한 것은 없네 예수 밖에는 없네
lines.id: Atau terjebak dalam pengaruh ketakutan akan dosa.

lines.en: Thou art my shield and glory Lord,
lines.ko: 주 예수보다 더 귀한 것은 없네
lines.id: Dia lebih cantik dari - seperti yang paling langka - mekar

lines.en: My Saviour, O Most High.
lines.ko: 이 세상 행복과 바꿀 수 없네
lines.id: Dia lebih manis dari pada sayang dari luar - sisir

lines.en: The Lord from out his holy hill
lines.id: Dialah yang dibutuhkan oleh semangat laparku,

lines.en: Gives answer when I cry.
lines.ko: 주 섬기는 내 맘 변치 않아
lines.id: Saya lebih suka - Yesus dan - membiarkan Dia memimpin

lines.en: Than to be the king of a vast do-main
lines.ko: 세상 즐거움 다 버리고 세상 자랑 다 버렸네
lines.id: Daripada menjadi raja dari sebuah wilayah yang luas

lines.en: Or be held in sin's drea-d sway.
lines.ko: 주 예수보다 더 귀한 것은 없네 예수 밖에는 없네
lines.id: Atau terjebak dalam pengaruh ketakutan akan dosa.

lines.en: I laid me down and slept, I waked,
Because the Lord sustains;
Though many thousands compass me,
Unmoved my soul remains.
Arise, O Lord; save me, my God;
For thou hast owned my cause,
And oft hast beaten down my foes
Who scorn thy righteous laws.
Salvation to the Lord belongs;
In him his saints are blest;
O let thy blessing evermore
Upon thy people rest.

score_path: assets/scores/094_주 예수보다 더 귀한 것은 없네.gif

title_en: Fear not, O little flock, the foe
title_ko: 오 적은 무리여, 두려워하지 말라, 원수여 (자체번역)

lines.en: Fear not, O little flock, the foe
lines.ko: 오 적은 무리여, 두려워하지 말라, 원수여

lines.en: Who madly seeks your overthrow;
lines.ko: 누가 미친 듯이 당신을 전복시키려고 합니까?

lines.en: Dread not his rage and pow'r:
What though your courage sometimes faints,
His seeming triumph o'er God's saints
lines.ko: 하나님의 성도들에 대한 그의 겉보기 승리

lines.en: Lasts but a little hour.
Be of good cheer; your cause belongs
To him who can avenge your wrongs;
lines.ko: 당신의 잘못을 복수하실 수 있는 분에게;

lines.en: Leave it to him, our Lord:
Though hidden yet from all our eyes,
He sees the Gideon who shall rise
To save us and his Word.
As true as God's own Word is true,
Nor earth nor hell with all their crew
lines.ko: 그들의 선원들과 함께라면 지구도 지옥도 아니다

lines.en: Against us shall prevail.
A jest and byword are they grown;
God is with us, we are his own;
lines.ko: 하나님은 우리와 함께 계십니다. 우리는 그분의 것입니다.

lines.en: Our vict'ry cannot fail.
Amen, Lord Jesus, grant our pray'r;
lines.ko: 아멘, 주 예수님, 우리의 기도를 들어주소서.

lines.en: Great Captain, now thine arm make bare,
lines.ko: 위대한 선장님, 이제 당신의 팔이 드러났습니다.

lines.en: Fight for us once again;
lines.ko: 다시 한 번 우리를 위해 싸워주세요.

lines.en: So shall thy saints and martyrs raise
A mighty chorus to thy praise,
World without end. Amen.

title_en: Christian, seek not yet repose

lines.en: Christian, seek not yet repose,
Cast thy dreams of ease away;
Thou art in the midst of foes:
Watch and pray.
Principalities and pow'rs,
Must'ring their unseen array,
Wait for thine unguarded hours:
Watch and pray.
Gird thy heav'nly armor on,
Wear it ever, night and day;
Ambushed lies the evil one:
lines.ko: 매복해 있는 악마가 거짓말을 하고 있다:

lines.en: Watch and pray.
Hear the victors who o'ercame:
Still they mark each warrior's way;
lines.ko: 여전히 그들은 각 전사의 길을 표시합니다.

lines.en: All with one sweet voice exclaim,
"Watch and pray."
Hear, above all, hear thy Lord,
Him thou lovest to obey;
Hide within thy heart his word,
lines.ko: 그의 말씀을 네 마음 속에 간직하라.

lines.en: "Watch and pray."
Watch, as if on that alone
Hung the issue of the day;
Pray, that help may be sent down:
lines.ko: 도움이 보내질 수 있도록 기도해 주십시오.

lines.en: Watch and pray.

title_en: Jesus, Lord of life and glory

lines.en: Jesus, Lord of life and glory,
Bend from heav'n thy gracious ear;
While our waiting souls adore thee,
lines.ko: 우리의 기다리는 영혼이 당신을 사랑하는 동안,

lines.en: Friend of helpless sinners, hear:
By thy mercy, O deliver us, good Lord.
lines.ko: 당신의 자비로 우리를 구원하소서, 선하신 주님.

lines.en: From the depth of nature's blindness,
From the hard'ning pow'r of sin,
From all malice and unkindness,
From the pride that lurks within,
When temptation sorely presses,
In the day of Satan's pow'r,
In our times of deep distresses,
In each dark and trying hour,
When the world around is smiling,
In the time of wealth and ease,
Earthly joys our hearts beguiling,
In the day of health and peace,
In our weary hours of sickness,
In our times of grief and pain,
When we feel our mortal weakness,
When the creature's help is vain,
In the solemn hour of dying,
In the awful judgment day,
May our souls, on thee relying,
Find thee still our Rock and Stay:
lines.ko: 여전히 우리의 Rock and Stay를 찾아보세요:

title_en: Lord of our life, and God of our salvation

lines.en: Lord of our life, and God of our salvation,
lines.ko: 주는 귀한 보배 참 기쁨의 근원 참 된 내 친구
lines.id: Yesus, Harta yang tak ternilai harganya, Sumber kesenangan paling murni,

lines.en: Star of our night, and hope of ev'ry nation,
lines.ko: 갈급한 내 마음 주를 사모하여 목이 탑니다
lines.id: Sahabat sejati bagiku,

lines.en: Hear and receive thy church's supplication,
lines.ko: 흠이 없는 어린 양 그 품 안에 괴롬 없어
lines.id: Lama hatiku terengah-engah, Hingga nyaris pingsan,

lines.en: Lord God Almighty.
lines.id: Haus setelah Engkau.

lines.en: See round thine ark the hungry billows curling,
lines.ko: 주의 품에 안겨 편히 쉬는 나를 누가 해치랴
lines.id: Di tangan-Mu kuistirahatkan aku, Musuh-musuh yang akan menganiaya aku

lines.en: See how thy foes their banners are unfurling;
lines.ko: 땅이 흔들리고 모두 떨지라도 겁낼 것 없네
lines.id: Tidak dapat menghubungi saya di sini.

lines.en: Lord, while their darts envenomed they are hurling,
lines.id: Sekalipun bumi berguncang, setiap hati gemetar,

lines.en: Thou canst preserve us.
lines.id: Tuhan menghilangkan rasa takut kita

lines.en: Lord, thou canst help when earthly armor faileth;
lines.ko: 기쁨의 주 예수 우리 함께하니 슬픔 없어라
lines.id: Oleh karena itu, semua pikiran tentang kesedihan! Demi Tuhan yang penuh kegembiraan,

lines.en: Lord, thou canst save when sin itself assaileth;
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, masuklah

lines.en: Christ, o'er thy Rock nor death nor hell prevaileth:
lines.ko: 무슨 일을 만나도 주 안에는 기쁨 있네
lines.id: Mereka yang mengasihi Bapa, Meski badai menerpa,

lines.en: Grant us thy peace, Lord:
lines.id: Masih memiliki kedamaian di dalam.

lines.en: Peace in our hearts, our evil thoughts assuaging,
Peace in thy church, where brothers are engaging,
Peace, when the world its busy war is waging:
Calm thy foes' raging.
Grant us thy help till backward they are driven;
Grant them thy truth, that they may be forgiven;
Grant peace on earth, or, after we have striven,
Peace in thy heaven.

title_id: Yesus, Harta yang Tak Ternilai harganya

title_en: From heaven the Lord with searching eye

lines.en: From Psalm 14:2-7
From heav'n the Lord with searching eye
Looked down the sons of men to try,
To see if any understood
And sought for God, the only good.
From righteousness they all depart,
Corrupt are all, and vile in heart;
Yea, ev'ry man has evil done;
lines.ko: 그렇습니다, 모든 사람은 악한 일을 저질렀습니다.

lines.en: Not one does good, not even one.
lines.ko: 선한 일은 하나도 없고 단 한 명도 없습니다.

lines.en: Has knowledge with the wicked failed,
That they my people have assailed,
That they delight in works of shame,
And call not on Jehovah's Name?
Thy lowly servant they despise,
Because he on the Lord relies;
But they shall tremble yet in fear,
lines.ko: 그러나 그들은 여전히 두려움에 떨 것이며,

lines.en: For to the righteous God is near.
O that from Zion his abode
Salvation were on us bestowed!
When God his exiles shall restore,
They shall in song his grace adore.
lines.ko: 그들은 노래하며 그분의 은혜를 찬양할 것입니다.

title_en: In the hour of trial, Jesus, plead for me

lines.en: In the hour of trial,
lines.id: Di saat pencobaan, Yesus, mohonlah padaku

lines.en: Jesus, plead for me;
lines.id: Jangan sampai dengan dasar de-ni-al aku berangkat dariMu
