lines.en: Lest by base denial
lines.ko: 떨며 주저 할 때 나를 붙드사
lines.id: Ketika Engkau melihatku bimbang, Dengan melihat kembali,

lines.en: I depart from thee;
lines.id: Juga bukan karena rasa takut atau bantuan, biarkan aku terjatuh.

lines.en: When thou seest me waver,
With a look recall,
Nor for fear or favor
Suffer me to fall.
With its witching pleasures
lines.id: Dengan kesenangannya yang mempesona Apakah dunia yang sia-sia ini akan memesona,

lines.en: Would this vain world charm,
lines.id: Atau harta karunnya yang kotor Menyebar untuk menyakitiku,

lines.en: Or its sordid treasures
lines.id: Bawalah ke ingatanku Sedih Geth-sem-a-ne,

lines.en: Spread to work me harm,
lines.id: Atau, dalam bentuk yang lebih gelap, Cal-va-ry yang bermahkota silang.

lines.en: Bring to my remembrance
Sad Gethsemane,
Or, in darker semblance,
Cross-crowned Calvary.
If with sore affliction
lines.id: Jika dengan penderitaan yang berat Engkau menghukum dengan cinta,

lines.en: Thou in love chastise,
lines.ko: 근심 걱정 고통 내가 당할 때
lines.id: Tuangkan berkat-Mu pada kurban

lines.en: Pour thy benediction
lines.id: Kemudian, di atas altar-Mu dipersembahkan dengan bebas,

lines.en: On the sacrifice;
lines.id: Meskipun daging mungkin goyah, Iman akan meminum cawan itu.

lines.en: Then, upon thine altar
Freely offered up,
Though the flesh may falter,
Faith shall drink the cup.
When in dust and ashes
lines.id: Saat saat terakhirku tiba, Penuh dengan perselisihan dan kesakitan,

lines.en: To the grave I sink,
lines.id: Saat debuku kembali menjadi debu kembali

lines.en: While heav'n's glory flashes
lines.id: Atas kebenaran-Mu yang berbohong, Melalui perselisihan fana itu,

lines.en: O'er the shelving brink,
lines.ko: 영생 하는 곳에 인도 하소서 아멘
lines.id: Yesus, bawalah aku, sekarat, menuju kehidupan kekal. Amin.

lines.en: On thy truth relying
Through that mortal strife,
Lord, receive me, dying,
To eternal life.

title_en: Rise, my soul, to watch and pray

lines.en: Rise, my soul, to watch and pray,
From thy sleep awaken;
Be not by the evil day
Unawares o'ertaken.
For the foe,
Well we know,
Oft his harvest reapeth
While the Christian sleepeth.
Watch against the devil's snares
Lest asleep he find thee;
lines.ko: 그가 자고 있는 너를 발견하지 않도록 하라.

lines.en: For indeed no pains he spares
To deceive and blind thee.
Satan's prey
Oft are they
Who secure are sleeping
And no watch are keeping.
Watch! Let not the wicked world
lines.ko: 보다! 악한 세상이 되지 않게 하라

lines.en: With its pow'r defeat thee.
Watch lest with her pomp unfurled
She betray and cheat thee.
Watch and see
Lest there be
Faithless friends to charm thee,
Who but seek to harm thee.
Watch against thyself, my soul,
Lest with grace thou trifle;
Let not self thy thoughts control
Nor God's mercy stifle.
Pride and sin
Lurk within
All thy hopes to scatter;
Heed not when they flatter.
But while watching, also pray
To the Lord unceasing.
He will free thee, be thy stay,
lines.ko: 그분은 당신을 자유롭게 하시고, 당신의 체류자가 되실 것입니다.

lines.en: Strength and faith increasing.
O Lord, bless
In distress
And let nothing swerve me
lines.ko: 그리고 아무것도 나를 바꾸지 못하게 해주세요

lines.en: From the will to serve thee.

title_en: Stand up, stand up for Jesus

lines.en: Stand up, stand up for Jesus,
lines.id: Berdiri, Bela Yesus,

lines.en: Ye soldiers of the cross;
lines.id: Hai para prajurit salib

lines.en: Lift high his royal banner,
lines.id: Angkat tinggi-tinggi panji kerajaan-Nya,

lines.en: It must not suffer loss:
lines.id: Ia tidak boleh mengalami kerugian:

lines.en: From vict'ry unto vict'ry
lines.id: Dari kemenangan ke kemenangan

lines.en: His army he shall lead,
lines.id: Ar-my Dia akan memimpin,

lines.en: Till ev'ry foe is vanquished
lines.id: Sampai semua musuh dikalahkan,

lines.en: And Christ is Lord indeed.
lines.id: Dan Kristus sesungguhnya adalah Tuhan.

lines.en: Stand up, stand up for Jesus,
lines.id: Berdiri, membela Yesus,

lines.en: The trumpet call obey;
lines.ko: 그 나팔 소리 듣고 곧 나가 싸우라
lines.id: Panggilan trum-pet o-bey

lines.en: Forth to the mighty conflict
lines.ko: 수 없는 원수 앞에 주 따라 갈 때에
lines.id: Maju ke konflik yang dahsyat

lines.en: In this his glorious day:
lines.ko: 주 예수 힘을 주사 강하게 하시네
lines.id: Di hari-Nya yang mulia ini:

lines.en: Ye that are men now serve him
lines.id: Kamu yang manusia sekarang melayani Dia

lines.en: Against unnumbered foes;
lines.id: A-melawan musuh yang tidak terhitung jumlahnya

lines.en: Let courage rise with danger,
lines.id: Biarlah keberanian meningkat seiring bahaya,

lines.en: And strength to strength oppose.
lines.id: Dan kekuatan demi kekuatan berlawanan.

lines.en: Stand up, stand up for Jesus,
lines.id: Berdiri, membela Yesus,

lines.en: Stand in his strength alone;
lines.ko: 네 힘이 부족하니 주 권능 믿으라
lines.id: Berdirilah dalam kekuatan-Nya sendirian

lines.en: The arm of flesh will fail you,
lines.id: Lengan daging akan mengecewakanmu,

lines.en: Ye dare not trust your own:
lines.id: Kamu tidak berani mempercayai milikmu sendiri:

lines.en: Put on the gospel armor,
lines.id: Kenakan baju besi injil,

lines.en: Each piece put on with pray'r;
lines.id: Masing-masing bagian dikenakan dengan doa

lines.en: Where duty calls, or danger,
lines.id: Saat tugas memanggil, atau bahaya,

lines.en: Be never wanting there.
lines.id: Jangan pernah ingin berada di sana.
Hari ini kebisingan pertempuran,
Lagu pemenang berikutnya:
Kepada Dia yang memenangkan pertempuran
Akan ada mahkota kehidupan
Dia bersama Raja Kemuliaan
Akan memerintah selamanya. Amin.

lines.en: Stand up, stand up for Jesus,
lines.id: Para prajurit salib, bangkitlah bagi Tuhan

lines.en: The strife will not be long;
lines.id: Mari kita bertarung pada hari ini dan anjing akan segera memanggil.

lines.en: This day the noise of battle,
lines.id: Prajurit yang menang menerima hidup kekal.

lines.en: The next the victor's song:
lines.ko: 영광의 주와 함께 왕 노릇 하리라
lines.id: Aku akan memerintah bersama Tuhan yang mulia.

lines.en: To him that overcometh
A crown of life shall be;
He with the King of Glory
Shall reign eternally.

title_en: Stand up, my soul  shake off thy fears
title_ko: 일어서세요, 내 영혼이 당신의 두려움을 떨쳐버리게 해주세요 (자체번역)

lines.en: Stand up, my soul; shake off thy fears,
And gird the gospel armor on;
March to the gates of endless joy,
Where thy great Captain Saviour's gone.
lines.ko: 당신의 위대한 구세주 선장이 가신 곳.

lines.en: Hell and thy sins resist thy course;
lines.ko: 지옥과 당신의 죄는 당신의 길에 저항합니다.

lines.en: But hell and sin are vanquished foes:
Thy Jesus nailed them to the cross,
lines.ko: 네 예수께서 그들을 십자가에 못 박으셨느니라

lines.en: And sung the triumph when he rose.
lines.ko: 그리고 그가 일어섰을 때 승리를 노래했습니다.

lines.en: Then let my soul march boldly on,
lines.ko: 그러면 내 영혼이 담대하게 행진하게 하소서.

lines.en: Press forward to the heav'nly gate;
There peace and joy eternal reign,
And glitt'ring robes for conqu'rors wait.
lines.ko: 그리고 정복자들을 위한 빛나는 로브가 기다리고 있습니다.

lines.en: There shall I wear a starry crown,
lines.ko: 거기서 나는 별빛 왕관을 쓸 것이다.

lines.en: And triumph in almighty grace;
While all the armies of the skies
Join in my glorious Leader's praise.

title_en: Oft in danger, oft in woe
title_ko: 자주 위험에 처하고, 자주 비탄에 빠지다 (자체번역)

lines.en: Oft in danger, oft in woe,
lines.ko: 위험에 처할 때도 있고, 재난에 처할 때도 많으며,

lines.en: Onward, Christians, onward go,
Fight the fight, maintain the strife,
Strengthened with the Bread of Life.
Onward, Christians, onward go,
Join the war, and face the foe;
Faint not, much doth yet remain;
lines.ko: 희미하지 마십시오. 아직 많이 남아 있습니다.

lines.en: Dreary is the long campaign.
Shrink not, Christians: will ye yield?
Will ye quit the painful field?
Will ye flee in danger's hour?
Know ye not your Captain's pow'r?
Let your drooping hearts be glad;
March, in heav'nly armor clad;
Fight, nor think the battle long;
lines.ko: 싸우거나 전투가 오래 걸릴 것이라고 생각하지 마십시오.

lines.en: Vict'ry soon shall tune your song.
lines.ko: Victory는 곧 당신의 노래를 튜닝할 것입니다.

lines.en: Let not sorrow dim your eye,
lines.ko: 슬픔으로 인해 눈이 어두워지지 않게 하시고,

lines.en: Soon shall ev'ry tear be dry;
lines.ko: 곧 모든 눈물이 마르게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: Let not woe your course impede,
lines.ko: 당신의 길을 방해하는 것을 슬퍼하지 마십시오.

lines.en: Great your strength, if great your need.
lines.ko: 당신의 필요가 크다면 당신의 힘은 대단합니다.

lines.en: Onward then to battle move;
More than conqu'rors ye shall prove:
lines.ko: 정복자보다 더 많은 것을 증명해야 합니다:

lines.en: Though opposed by many a foe,
Christian soldiers, onward go.

title_en: Awake, my soul, stretch every nerve
title_ko: 깨어라 내 영혼아 모든 신경을 펴라 (자체번역)

lines.en: Awake, my soul, stretch ev'ry nerve,
lines.ko: 깨어나라, 내 영혼아, 모든 신경을 펴라,

lines.en: And press with vigor on;
A heav'nly race demands thy zeal,
And an immortal crown.
A cloud of witnesses around
Hold thee in full survey;
Forget the steps already trod,
And onward urge thy way.
'Tis God's all-animating voice
lines.ko: 이것이 바로 하나님의 생기 넘치는 음성입니다

lines.en: That calls thee from on high;
lines.ko: 그것이 높은 곳에서 당신을 부르는 것입니다.

lines.en: 'Tis his own hand presents the prize
To thine aspiring eye.
That prize with peerless glories bright,
lines.ko: 비길 데 없는 영광을 지닌 그 상은 밝게 빛나고,

lines.en: Which shall new lustre boast,
When victors' wreaths and monarch's gems
lines.ko: 승자의 화환과 군주의 보석이 있을 때

lines.en: Shall blend in common dust.
Blest Saviour, introduced by thee,
Have I my race begun;
And, crowned with vict'ry, at thy feet
lines.ko: 그리고 승리의 관을 쓰고 당신의 발 앞에

lines.en: I'll lay my honors down.

title_en: Am I a soldier of the cross

lines.en: Am I a soldier of the cross,
lines.ko: 십자가 군병 되어서 예수를 따를 때
lines.id: Apakah aku seorang prajurit salib,

lines.en: A foll'wer of the Lamb,
lines.id: Pengikut Anak Domba

lines.en: And shall I fear to own his cause,
lines.ko: 나의 주 그리스도 나를 속량 했으니
lines.id: Dan aku akan takut untuk mengakui tujuan-Nya,

lines.en: Or blush to speak his Name?
lines.ko: 그 십자가를 벗은 후 저 면류관 쓰리
lines.id: Atau malu untuk menyebut nama-Nya
Dalam nama Kristus Raja,
yang telah membelikan nyawanya untukku
Melalui kasih karunia aku akan memakai mahkota pesta prom,
apa pun salibku!

lines.en: Must I be carried to the skies
lines.ko: 뭇 성도 피를 흘리며 큰 싸움 하는데
lines.id: Haruskah saya dibawa ke langit.

lines.en: On flow'ry beds of ease,
lines.ko: 나 어찌 편히 누워서 상 받기 바랄까
lines.id: Di tempat tidur yang nyaman dan mengalir,

lines.en: While others fought to win the prize,
lines.ko: 나의 주 그리스도 나를 속량 했으니
lines.id: Sementara yang lain berjuang untuk memenangkan hadiah,

lines.en: And sailed through bloody seas?
lines.ko: 그 십자가를 벗은 후 저 면류관 쓰리
lines.id: Dan berlayar melintasi lautan berdarah
Dalam nama Kristus Raja,
yang telah membelikan nyawanya untukku
Melalui kasih karunia aku akan memakai mahkota pesta prom,
apa pun salibku!

lines.en: Are there no foes for me to face?
lines.ko: 이 죄악 많은 세상에 수많은 원수들
lines.id: Apakah tidak ada musuh yang harus aku hadapi

lines.en: Must I not stem the flood?
lines.ko: 날 유혹하고 해치나 내 주만 따르리
lines.id: Apakah aku tidak boleh membendung banjir itu

lines.en: Is this vile world a friend to grace,
lines.ko: 나의 주 그리스도 나를 속량 했으니
lines.id: Apakah dunia yang keji ini merupakan teman rahmat,

lines.en: To help me on to God?
lines.ko: 그 십자가를 벗은 후 저 면류관 쓰리
lines.id: Untuk membantuku menuju Tuhan
Dalam nama Kristus Raja,
yang telah membelikan nyawanya untukku
Melalui kasih karunia aku akan memakai mahkota pesta prom,
apa pun salibku!

lines.en: Sure I must fight if I would reign:
lines.ko: 나 면류관을 쓰려고 몸 바쳐 싸울 때
lines.id: Tentu saja saya harus bertarung jika saya ingin memerintah.

lines.en: Increase my courage, Lord;
lines.ko: 주 내게 용기 주시사 이기게 하시네
lines.id: Tingkatkan keberanianku, Tuhan.

lines.en: I'll bear the toil, endure the pain,
lines.ko: 나의 주 그리스도 나를 속량 했으니
lines.id: Aku akan menanggung jerih payah, menahan rasa sakit,

lines.en: Supported by thy Word.
lines.ko: 그 십자가를 벗은 후 저 면류관 쓰리
lines.id: Didukung oleh firman-Mu.
Dalam nama Kristus Raja,
yang telah membelikan nyawanya untukku
Melalui kasih karunia aku akan memakai mahkota pesta prom,
apa pun salibku!

lines.en: Thy saints, in all this glorious war,
lines.id: Ketika hari yang mulia itu tiba,

lines.en: Shall conquer, though they die;
lines.id: Dan semua pasukan-Mu bersinar

lines.en: They view the triumph from afar,
lines.ko: 나의 주 그리스도 나를 속량 했으니
lines.id: Dalam jubah kemenangan melintasi langit,

lines.en: And seize it with their eye.
lines.ko: 그 십자가를 벗은 후 저 면류관 쓰리
lines.id: Kemuliaan akan menjadi milik-Mu.
Dalam nama Kristus Raja,
yang telah membelikan nyawanya untukku
Melalui kasih karunia aku akan memakai mahkota pesta prom,
apa pun salibku!

lines.en: When that illustrious day shall rise,
And all thine armies shine
In robes of vict'ry through the skies,
The glory shall be thine.

title_en: Soldiers of Christ, arise

lines.en: Soldiers of Christ, arise,
And put your armor on,
Strong in the strength which God supplies
Through his Eternal Son.
Strong in the Lord of hosts,
And in his mighty pow'r,
Who in the strength of Jesus trusts
Is more than conqueror.
Stand then in his great might,
With all his strength endued;
But take, to arm you for the fight,
lines.ko: 하지만 싸움을 위해 당신을 무장시키기 위해,

lines.en: The panoply of God.
Leave no unguarded place,
No weakness of the soul;
Take ev'ry virtue, ev'ry grace,
And fortify the whole.
To keep your armor bright,
Attend with constant care;
Still walking in your Captain's sight,
lines.ko: 여전히 당신의 선장의 시야에서 걷고 있습니다.

lines.en: And watching unto prayer.
From strength to strength go on;
Wrestle and fight and pray;
Tread all the pow'rs of darkness down,
And win the well-fought day.

title_en: Christian, dost thou see them

lines.en: Christian, dost thou see them
On the holy ground,
How the pow'rs of darkness
Rage thy steps around?
Christian, up and smite them,
Counting gain but loss,
In the strength that cometh
By the holy cross.
Christian, dost thou feel them,
How they work within,
Striving, tempting, luring,
Goading into sin?
Christian, never tremble;
Never be downcast;
Gird thee for the battle,
Watch and pray and fast.
Christian, dost thou hear them,
How they speak thee fair?
lines.ko: 그들이 당신을 공정하게 말하는 방법은 무엇입니까?

lines.en: "Always fast and vigil?
Always watch and prayer?"
Christian, answer boldly,
"While I breathe I pray!"
Peace shall follow battle,
Night shall end in day.
Hear the words of Jesus:
"O my servant true:
Thou art very weary,
I was weary too;
But that toil shall make thee
lines.ko: 하지만 그 수고가 너를 만들 것이다

lines.en: Some day all mine own,
lines.ko: 언젠가는 모두 내 소유가 될 거야

lines.en: And the end of sorrow
Shall be near my throne."

title_en: Fight the good fight with all thy might
title_ko: 네 힘을 다하여 선한 싸움을 싸우라 (자체번역)

lines.en: Fight the good fight with all thy might;
lines.ko: 네 힘을 다하여 선한 싸움을 싸우라.

lines.en: Christ is thy Strength and Christ thy Right:
lines.ko: 그리스도는 당신의 힘이시며 그리스도는 당신의 권리이십니다.

lines.en: Lay hold on life, and it shall be
Thy joy and crown eternally.
Run the straight race through God's good grace,
lines.ko: 하나님의 선하신 은혜로 곧은 경주를 달리게 하소서.

lines.en: Lift up thine eyes, and seek his face;
Life with its way before us lies,
Christ is the Path and Christ the Prize.
Cast care aside; upon thy Guide
Lean, and his mercy will provide;
Lean, and the trusting soul shall prove,
lines.ko: 기대어라, 그러면 신뢰하는 영혼은 증명할 것이다.

lines.en: Christ is its Life and Christ its Love.
Faint not, nor fear, his arms are near;
lines.ko: 기절하거나 두려워하지 마십시오. 그분의 팔이 가까이 있습니다.

lines.en: He changeth not, and thou art dear;
Only believe, and thou shalt see
That Christ is all in all to thee.

title_en: Soldiers who to Christ belong

lines.en: Soldiers who to Christ belong,
lines.ko: 성부의 어린 양이 죄 지고 가시니
lines.id: Aku menyerahkan dosa-dosaku pada Yesus,

lines.en: Trust ye in his Word, be strong;
lines.ko: 내 몸에 당할 형벌 다 대신 하셨네
lines.id: Anak Domba Allah yang tak bernoda

lines.en: For his promises are sure,
lines.ko: 내 죄가 추악하나 그 피로 씻으면
lines.id: Dia menanggung semuanya, dan membebaskan kita

lines.en: His rewards for aye endure.
lines.ko: 눈 같이 희게 되어 티 하나 없으리
lines.id: Dari beban terkutuk.

lines.en: His no crowns that pass away,
lines.ko: 내 죄를 회개할 때 용서해 주시고
lines.id: Aku serahkan keinginanku pada Yesus,

lines.en: His no palm that sees decay,
lines.ko: 병든 몸 고쳐 주사 새 생명 주시네
lines.id: Segala kepenuhan tinggal di dalam Dia

lines.en: His the joy that shall not fade,
lines.ko: 내 속에 쌓인 근심 한없이 크건만
lines.id: Dia menyembuhkan semua penyakitku,

lines.en: His the light that knows no shade;
lines.ko: 주 친히 벗겨 주사 위로해 주시네
lines.id: Dialah yang menilai kembali jiwaku.

lines.en: His the home for spirits blest,
lines.ko: 내 주를 의지하니 내 맘이 편하고
lines.id: Aku mengistirahatkan jiwaku pada Yesus,

lines.en: Where he gives them peaceful rest,
lines.ko: 주 나를 붙드시니 내 앞길 환하다
lines.id: Jiwaku yang lelah ini

lines.en: For above the starry skies,
lines.ko: 임마누엘 주 예수 끝없는 그 사랑
lines.id: Tangan kanannya memelukku,

lines.en: In the bliss of Paradise.
lines.ko: 그 향기 바람 타고 온 땅에 퍼지네
lines.id: Aku bersandar di dada-Nya.

lines.en: Here on earth ye can but clasp
lines.ko: 주 예수 본을 받아 온유한 마음과
lines.id: Aku ingin menjadi, seperti Yesus,

lines.en: Things that perish in the grasp:
lines.id: Lemah lembut, penuh kasih, rendah hati, lemah lembut

lines.en: Lift your hearts, then, to the skies;
lines.ko: 나 주의 뒤를 따라 저 천국 이르러
lines.id: Aku ingin menjadi, seperti Yesus,

lines.en: God himself shall be your prize.
lines.id: Anak suci Bapa,

lines.en: Praise we now with saints at rest
Father, Son and Spirit blest;
For his promises are sure,
His rewards shall aye endure.

title_en: When thy soldiers take their swords

lines.en: When thy soldiers take their swords,
When they speak the solemn words,
When they kneel before thee here,
lines.ko: 그들이 여기 당신 앞에 무릎을 꿇을 때,

lines.en: Feeling thee, their Father, near;
lines.ko: 그들의 아버지이신 당신이 가까이 계시다는 것을 느끼며;

lines.en: These thy children, Lord, defend;
To their help thy Spirit send.
lines.ko: 그들을 돕기 위해 당신의 성령을 보내소서.

lines.en: When the world's sharp strife is nigh,
When they hear the battle-cry,
When they rush into the fight,
Knowing not temptation's might;
These thy children, Lord, defend;
To their zeal thy wisdom lend.
lines.ko: 그들의 열심에 당신의 지혜를 빌려 주소서.

lines.en: When their hearts are lifted high
With success or victory,
When they feel the conqu'ror's pride;
Lest they grow self-satisfied,
These thy children, Lord, defend;
Teach their souls to thee to bend.
When the vows that they have made,
When the pray'rs that they have prayed,
Shall be fading from their hearts;
When their first warm faith departs;
lines.ko: 그들의 첫 번째 따뜻한 믿음이 떠날 때;

lines.en: These thy children, Lord, defend;
Keep them faithful to the end.
Through life's conflict guard us all,
lines.ko: 인생의 갈등 속에서 우리 모두를 지켜 주소서.

lines.en: Or if wounded some should fall
Ere the victory be won,
For the sake of Christ, thy Son
These thy children, Lord, defend;
And in death thy comfort lend.
lines.ko: 그리고 죽음 속에서도 당신의 위로를 빌려 주소서.

title_en: Faith of our fathers! living still

lines.en: Faith of our fathers! living still
lines.ko: 환난과 핍박 중에도 성도는 신앙 지켰네
lines.id: Keyakinan nenek moyang kita, yang masih hidup, Meskipun ada penjara bawah tanah, api dan pedang;

lines.en: In spite of dungeon, fire and sword;
lines.ko: 이 신앙 생각 할 때에 기쁨이 충만하도다
lines.id: Oh, betapa hati kami berdebar kencang dengan sukacita Setiap kali kami mendengar Firman yang mulia itu!

lines.en: O how our hearts beat high with joy
lines.ko: 성도의 신앙 따라서 죽도록 충성 하겠네
lines.id: Iman nenek moyang kita, iman yang suci!

lines.en: Whene'er we hear God's glorious Word:
lines.id: Kami akan setia padamu sampai mati.

lines.en: Faith of our fathers, holy faith!
lines.ko: 옥중에 매인 성도나 양심은 자유 얻었네
lines.id: Ayah kami dirantai di penjara yang gelap dimana masih dalam hati dan

lines.en: We will be true to thee till death.

lines.id: bebas hati nurani Dan terberkatilah nasib anak-anak mereka Jika mereka menyukainya, mereka harus mati untukmu

lines.en: Faith of our fathers, holy faith!
lines.ko: 성도의 신앙 따라서 죽도록 충성 하겠네
lines.id: Iman nenek moyang kita, iman yang suci!

lines.en: Our fathers, chained in prisons dark,
lines.ko: 성도의 신앙 본받아 원수도 사랑 하겠네
lines.id: Iman nenek moyang kami, kami akan mencintai baik kawan maupun lawan dalam segala perselisihan kami;

lines.en: Were still in heart and conscience free;
lines.ko: 인자한 언어 행실로 이 신앙 전파하리라
lines.id: Dan beritakanlah Engkau juga, sebagaimana cinta mengetahui caranya

lines.en: And blest would be their children's fate
lines.ko: 성도의 신앙 따라서 죽도록 충성 하겠네 아멘
lines.id: Dengan kata-kata yang baik dan kehidupan yang berbudi luhur.

lines.en: If they, like them, should die for thee:
lines.id: Iman nenek moyang kita, iman yang suci!

lines.en: Faith of our fathers! God's great pow'r
Shall draw all nations unto thee;
And through the truth that comes from God
His people shall indeed be free:
Faith of our fathers! we will love
Both friend and foe in all our strife,
And preach thee, too, as love knows how
By witness true and virtuous life:

title_en: Lead on, O King eternal

lines.en: Lead on, O King eternal,
The day of march has come;
Henceforth in fields of conquest
Thy tents shall be our home:
lines.ko: 당신의 천막이 우리의 집이 될 것입니다.

lines.en: Through days of preparation
Thy grace has made us strong,
And now, O King eternal,
We lift our battle song.
Lead on, O King eternal,
Till sin's fierce war shall cease,
And Holiness shall whisper
The sweet amen of peace;
For not with swords loud clashing,
lines.ko: 칼을 휘두르며 시끄럽게 부딪치는 것이 아니라,

lines.en: Nor roll of stirring drums,
But deeds of love and mercy,
The heav'nly kingdom comes.
Lead on, O King eternal,
We follow, not with fears;
For gladness breaks like morning
Where'er thy face appears;
Thy cross is lifted o'er us;
We journey in its light:
The crown awaits the conquest;
Lead on, O God of might.

lines.id: Bergabunglah dengan kelompok kami yang bahagia,

lines.en: Brothers, we are treading
lines.id: Padukan dengan suara kami

lines.en: Where the saints have trod;
lines.id: Dalam lagu kemenangan

lines.en: We are not divided,
lines.id: Kemuliaan, pujian, dan kehormatan

lines.en: All one body we,
lines.id: Kepada Kristus Raja kita

lines.en: One in hope and doctrine,
lines.id: Ini telah melewati usia yang tak terhitung jumlahnya

lines.en: One in charity.
lines.id: Manusia dan malaikat bernyanyi
Selanjutnya, tentara Kristen,
Berbaris seperti berperang,
Dengan salib Yesus
Terjadi sebelumnya. Amin.

lines.en: Crowns and thrones may perish,
Kingdoms rise and wane,
But the church of Jesus
Constant will remain;
Gates of hell can never
'Gainst that church prevail;
We have Christ's own promise
And that cannot fail.
Onward, then, ye people,
Join our happy throng,
Blend with ours your voices
In the triumph song;
Glory, laud, and honor
Unto Christ the King;
This through countless ages
Men and angels sing.

title_en: Jesus calls us:  o'er the tumult

lines.en: Jesus calls us: o'er the tumult
lines.ko: 어지러운 세상 중에 기쁜 소리 들리네
lines.id: Yesus memanggil kita, di luar tugas itu

lines.en: Of our life's wild, restless sea,
lines.ko: 예수 말씀 하시기를 믿는 자여 따르라
lines.id: Laut hidup kita yang liar dan tak pernah tenang,

lines.en: Day by day his sweet voice soundeth,
lines.id: Hari demi hari suara merdunya terdengar,

lines.en: Saying, "Christian, follow me."
lines.id: Mengatakan "Kristen, ikutilah Aku."

lines.en: As, of old, apostles heard it
lines.ko: 세상 헛된 신과 영화 모두 내어 버렸네
lines.id: Yesus memanggil kita dari ibadah

lines.en: By the Galilean lake,

lines.id: Dari gudang emas dunia yang sia-sia,

lines.en: Turned from home and toil and kindred,
lines.id: Dari setiap idola yang akan menjaga kita,

lines.en: Leaving all for his dear sake.
lines.id: Mengatakan, "Kristen, lebih mengasihi Aku."

lines.en: Jesus calls us from the worship
lines.ko: 기쁜 때나 슬픈 때나 바쁜 때나 틈날 때
lines.id: Dalam suka dan duka kami,

lines.en: Of the vain world's golden store,
lines.ko: 예수 친히 하신 말씀 날 더 귀히 여겨라
lines.id: Hari-hari kerja keras dan jam-jam santai,

lines.en: From each idol that would keep us,
lines.id: Tetap saja Dia memanggil, dalam kepedulian dan kesenangan,

lines.en: Saying, "Christian, love me more."
lines.id: “Christian, kasihilah Aku lebih dari ini.”

lines.en: In our joys and in our sorrows,
lines.ko: 주님 크신 은혜로써 부름 듣게 하시고
lines.id: Yesus memanggil kami dengan belas kasihan-Mu,

lines.en: Days of toil and hours of ease,
lines.id: Juruselamat, semoga kami mendengar panggilan-Mu,

lines.en: Still he calls, in cares and pleasures,
lines.id: Serahkanlah hati kami pada ketaatan-Mu,

lines.en: "Christian, love me more than these."
lines.id: Melayani dan mencintai-Mu yang terbaik dari semuanya.

lines.en: Jesus calls us: by thy mercies,
Saviour, may we hear thy call,
Give our hearts to thine obedience,
Serve and love thee best of all.

title_id: Yesus Memanggil Kita, O'er the Gejolak

title_en: Take my life, and let it be consecrated

lines.en: Take my life, and let it be
lines.ko: 나의 생명 드리니 주여 받아 주셔서
lines.id: Ambil hidupku, dan biarkan saja

lines.en: Consecrated, Lord, to thee.
lines.id: Dikuduskan, Tuhan, kepada-Mu.

lines.en: Take my moments and my days;
lines.id: Ambillah momen dan hari-hariku

lines.en: Let them flow in ceaseless praise.
lines.id: Biarlah mereka mengalir dalam pujian yang tak henti-hentinya.

lines.en: Take my hands, and let them move
lines.ko: 손과 발을 드리니 주여 받아 주셔서
lines.id: Pegang tanganku, dan biarkan bergerak

lines.en: At the impulse of thy love.
lines.ko: 주의 일을 위하여 민첩 하게 하소서
lines.id: Atas dorongan cinta-Mu.

lines.en: Take my feet, and let them be
lines.id: Ambil kakiku, dan biarkan saja

lines.en: Swift and beautiful for thee.
lines.id: Cepat dan indah bagi-Mu.

lines.en: Take my voice, and let me sing,
lines.ko: 나의 음성 드리니 주여 받아 주셔서
lines.id: Ambil suaraku, dan biarkan aku bernyanyi,

lines.en: Always, only, for my King.
lines.ko: 주의 진리 말씀만 전파 하게 하소서
lines.id: Selalu, hanya saja, untuk Rajaku.

lines.en: Take my lips, and let them be
lines.id: Ambil bibirku, dan biarkan saja

lines.en: Filled with messages from thee.
lines.id: Penuh dengan pesan-pesan dari-Mu.

lines.en: Take my silver and my gold;
lines.ko: 나의 보화 드리니 주여 받아 주셔서
lines.id: Ambil perak dan emasku

lines.en: Not a mite would I withhold
lines.id: Tidak ada satupun uang yang akan saya tahan.

lines.en: Take my intellect, and use
lines.id: Ambillah sudut pandang saya, dan gunakanlah

lines.en: Ev'ry pow'r as thou shalt choose.
lines.id: Segala kekuatan sesuai pilihanmu.

lines.en: Take my will, and make it thine;
lines.ko: 나의 시간 드리니 주여 받아 주셔서
lines.id: Ambillah momen dan hari-hariku.

lines.en: It shall be no longer mine.
lines.ko: 평생토록 주 위해 봉사 하게 하소서 아멘
lines.id: Biarkan mereka mengalir dalam pujian yang tiada habisnya.

lines.en: Take my heart, it is thine own;
lines.id: Ambillah diriku sendiri, dan aku akan menjadi diriku sendiri

lines.en: It shall be thy royal throne.
lines.id: Selamanya, hanya saja, semuanya untukMu. Amin.

lines.en: Take my love; my Lord, I pour
At thy feet its treasure store.
Take myself, and I will be
Ever, only, all for thee.

lines.en: Who is on the Lord's side?

lines.en: Who will be his helpers,

lines.en: Other lives to bring?
lines.id: Siapa yang berada di pihak Tuhan Siapa yang akan pergi demi Dia

lines.en: Who will leave the world's side?
lines.id: Atas seruan belas kasihan-Mu, Atas rahmat Ilahi-Mu,

lines.en: Who will face the foe?
lines.id: We are on the Lord's side, Sav-iour, we are Thine.

lines.en: Who is on the Lord's side?
Who for him will go?
By thy call of mercy,
By thy grace Divine,
We are on the Lord's side,
lines.id: Not for weight of glo-ry, Not for crown and palm,

lines.en: Saviour, we are thine.
lines.id: Masuklah kami pasukanku, Angkatlah mazmur prajurit
But for Love that claim-eth Lives for whom He died
Dia yang diberi nama Yesus Harus berada di pihak-Nya.
By Thy love con-strain-ing, By Thy grace Di-vine,
We are on the Lord's side, Sav-iour, we are Thine.

lines.en: Not for weight of glory,
lines.id: Fierce may be the con-flict Strong may be the foe,

lines.en: Not for crown and palm,
lines.id: But the King's own ar-my None can o-ver-throw

lines.en: Enter we the army,
lines.id: Di sekeliling Stand-ard-nya, Kemenangan terjamin

lines.en: Raise the warrior psalm;
lines.id: For His truth un-chang-ing, Makes the tri-umph sure.

lines.en: But for Love that claimeth
lines.id: Mendaftar dengan gembira Dengan rahmat Ilahi-Mu,

lines.en: Lives for whom he died:
lines.id: We are on the Lord's side, Sav-iour, we are Thine.

lines.en: He whom Jesus nameth
Must be on his side.
By thy love constraining,
By thy grace Divine,
Jesus, thou has bought us,
Not with gold or gem,
But with thine own lifeblood
For thy diadem:
With thy blessing filling
Each who comes to thee,
Thou hast made us willing,
Thou has made us free.
By thy grand redemption,
By thy grace Divine,
Fierce may be the conflict,
Strong may be the foe,
But the King's own army
None can overthrow:
Round his standard ranging,
Vict'ry is secure;
For his truth unchanging
Makes the triumph sure.
Joyfully enlisting
By thy grace Divine,

title_id: Siapa yang berada di pihak Tuhan

title_en: Jesus, Master, whose I am

lines.en: Jesus, Master, whose I am,
Purchased thine alone to be
By thy blood, O spotless Lamb,
lines.ko: 오 흠 없는 어린 양이여, 주의 피를 의지하여

lines.en: Shed so willingly for me,
Let my heart be all thine own,
lines.ko: 내 마음이 온전히 당신의 것이 되게 하소서.

lines.en: Let me live to thee alone.
Jesus, Master, I am thine:
Keep me faithful, keep me near;
lines.ko: 나를 충실하게 지켜주시고, 가까이 있게 해주세요.

lines.en: Let thy presence in me shine
lines.ko: 내 안에 당신의 존재를 빛나게 하소서

lines.en: All my homeward way to cheer.
Jesus, at thy feet I fall,
lines.ko: 예수여, 내가 당신 발 앞에 엎드러지나이다

lines.en: O be thou my all in all.
Jesus, Master, whom I serve,
Though so feebly and so ill,
Strengthen hand and heart and nerve
All thy bidding to fulfil.
Open thou mine eyes to see
All the work thou hast for me.
lines.ko: 당신이 나를 위해 모든 일을 하셨습니다.

lines.en: Lord, thou needest not, I know,
lines.ko: 주님, 그럴 필요가 없다는 것을 압니다.

lines.en: Service such as I can bring;
Yet I long to prove and show
Full allegiance to my King.
Thou an honor art to me:
Let me be a praise to thee.

title_en: Fill thou my life, O Lord my God
title_ko: 나의 하나님 여호와여 내 생명을 채우소서 (자체번역)

lines.en: Fill thou my life, O Lord my God,
lines.ko: 나의 하나님 여호와여 내 생명을 채우소서

lines.en: In ev'ry part with praise,
That my whole being may proclaim
lines.ko: 내 온 존재가 선포할 수 있도록

lines.en: Thy being and thy ways.
Not for the lip of praise alone,
Nor e'en the praising heart,
I ask, but for a life made up
Of praise in ev'ry part;
Praise in the common things of life,
Its goings out and in,
Praise in each duty and each deed,
However small and mean.
Fill ev'ry part of me with praise;
lines.ko: 나의 모든 부분을 찬양으로 채워 주소서.

lines.en: Let all my being speak
Of thee and of they love, O Lord,
Poor though I be, and weak.
So shalt thou, Lord, from me, e'en me,
Receive the glory due,
And so shall I begin on earth
The song for ever new.
So shall no part of day or night
lines.ko: 그러므로 낮이나 밤의 일부가 되지 않을 것이다

lines.en: From sacredness be free:
But all my life, in ev'ry step,
Be fellowship with thee.

title_en: Go, labor on, spend, and be spent

lines.en: Go, labor on: spend, and be spent,
Thy joy to do the Father's will;
lines.ko: 아버지의 뜻을 행하는 것이 당신의 기쁨입니다.

lines.en: It is the way the Master went;
Should not the servant tread it still?
Go, labor on: 'tis not for naught;
Thine earthly loss is heav'nly gain;
Men heed thee, love thee, praise thee not;
lines.ko: 사람들은 당신에게 주의를 기울이고, 당신을 사랑하지만, 당신을 칭찬하지 않습니다.

lines.en: The Master praiseswhat are men?
Go, labor on: enough while here
lines.ko: 가서 노력하세요. 여기 있는 동안은 그만해요

lines.en: If he shall praise thee, if he deign
Thy willing heart to mark and cheer:
No toil for him shall be in vain.
lines.ko: 그를 위한 어떤 수고도 헛되지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: Go, labor on while it is day:
The world's dark night is hast'ning on.
Speed, speed thy work, cast sloth away;
lines.ko: 속도를 높이고, 작업 속도를 높이며, 나태를 쫓아내십시오.

lines.en: It is not thus that souls are won.
lines.ko: 이렇게 해서 영혼을 얻는 것은 아닙니다.

lines.en: Toil on, faint not, keep watch and pray;
Be wise the erring soul to win;
Go forth into the world's highway,
Compel the wand'rer to come in.
Toil on, and in thy toil rejoice;
For toil comes rest, for exile home;
Soon shalt thou hear the Bridegroom's voice,
lines.ko: 머지않아 신랑의 음성을 듣게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: The midnight peal, "Behold, I come."

title_en: O God of Bethel, by whose hand

lines.en: O God of Bethel, by whose hand
Thy people still are fed,
lines.ko: 당신의 백성은 여전히 먹을 것을 먹고 있습니다.

lines.en: Who through this weary pilgrimage
Hast all our fathers led.
Our vows, our pray'rs, we now present
lines.ko: 우리의 서약, 우리의 기도, 우리는 지금 제시합니다

lines.en: Before thy Throne of grace;
God of our fathers, be the God
Of their succeeding race.
Through each perplexing path of life
Our wand'ring footsteps guide;
Give us each day our daily bread,
And raiment fit provide.
O spread thy cov'ring wings around
lines.ko: 오 당신의 덮개 날개를 주위에 펴십시오

lines.en: Till all our wand'rings cease
And at our Father's loved abode
Our souls arrive in peace.
Such blessings from thy gracious hand
lines.ko: 당신의 은혜로운 손에서 나오는 이러한 축복

lines.en: Our humble pray'rs implore;
And thou shalt be our chosen God,
lines.ko: 그리고 당신은 우리가 선택한 하나님이 되실 것입니다.

lines.en: And portion evermore.

title_en: Children of the heavenly King

lines.en: Children of the heav'nly King,
As ye journey, sweetly sing;
Sing your Saviour's worthy praise,
Glorious in his works and ways.
We are trav'ling home to God
lines.ko: 우리는 하나님이 계신 집으로 여행 중입니다

lines.en: In the way the fathers trod;
They are happy now, and we
Soon their happiness shall see.
lines.ko: 곧 그들의 행복을 보게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: Shout, ye little flock and blest;
You on Jesus' throne shall rest;
There your seat is now prepared,
There your kingdom and reward.
Lift your eyes, ye sons of light,
Zion's city is in sight;
There our endless home shall be,
lines.ko: 거기엔 우리의 끝없는 집이 있을 것이다.

lines.en: There our Lord we soon shall see.
lines.ko: 그곳에서 우리는 곧 우리 주님을 보게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: Fear not, brethren; joyful stand
On the borders of your land;
Jesus Christ, your Father's Son,
Bids you undismayed go on.
Lord, obediently we go,
Gladly leaving all below;
Only thou our Leader be,
And we still will follow thee.
lines.ko: 그리고 우리는 여전히 당신을 따를 것입니다.

Since God through Jordan leadeth me.

title_id: Bimbinglah Aku, ya Yehova yang Agung

title_en: Rejoice, rejoice, rejoice, give thanks, and sing

lines.en: Rejoice, ye pure in heart,
Rejoice, give thanks, and sing:
Your festal banner wave on high,
The cross of Christ your King.
Rejoice, rejoice,
Rejoice, give thanks and sing.
Bright youth and snow-crowned age,
Strong men and maidens meek,
Raise high your free, exulting song,
lines.ko: 당신의 자유롭고 환희에 찬 노래를 높이 올려라.

lines.en: God's wondrous praises speak.
With all the angel choirs,
With all the saints on earth,
Pour out the strains of joy and bliss,
True rapture, noblest mirth!
Yes, on through life's long path,
Still chanting as ye go;
lines.ko: 당신이 가면서 여전히 노래를 부르고 있습니다.

lines.en: From youth to age, by night and day,
In gladness and in woe.
At last the march shall end,
The wearied ones shall rest,
The pilgrims find their Father's house,
Jerusalem the blest.
Then on, ye pure in heart,
Rejoice, give thanks, and sing;
Your glorious banner wave on high,
The cross of Christ your King.

alt_titles: Rejoice, ye pure in heart

title_en: Through good report and evil, Lord
title_ko: 좋은 평판과 나쁜 평판을 통해 주님 (자체번역)

lines.en: Through good report and evil, Lord,
lines.ko: 좋은 평판과 나쁜 평판을 통해 주님,

lines.en: Still guided by Thy faithful Word,
Our staff, our buckler, and our sword,
We follow Thee.
In silence of the lonely night,
In the full glow of day's clear light,
lines.ko: 낮의 맑은 빛이 가득 찬 빛 속에서,

lines.en: Through life's strange windings, dark or bright,
lines.ko: 어둡거나 밝거나 삶의 이상한 굴곡을 통해

lines.en: We follow Thee.
Strengthened by Thee we forward go,
'Mid smile or scoff of friend or foe,
Through pain or ease, through joy or woe,
We follow Thee.
With enemies on every side,
We lean on Thee, the Crucified;
lines.ko: 우리는 십자가에 못 박히신 당신께 의지합니다.

lines.en: Forsaking all on earth beside,
lines.ko: 옆에 있는 땅의 모든 것을 버리고,

lines.en: We follow Thee.
O Master, point Thou out the way,
Nor suffer Thou our steps to stray;
lines.ko: 당신은 우리의 발걸음이 빗나가는 것을 허락하지 않으십니다.

lines.en: Then in the path that leads to day,
We follow Thee.
Thou hast passed on before our face;
Thy footsteps on the way we trace;
lines.ko: 우리가 가는 길에 당신의 발자국이 있습니다.

lines.en: O keep us, aid us by Thy grace:
lines.ko: 오, 우리를 지켜주시고, 당신의 은혜로 우리를 도우소서.

lines.en: We follow Thee.
Whom have we in the heaven above,
Whom on this earth, save Thee, to love?
lines.ko: 이 땅에서 당신을 구원할 사람은 누구입니까?

lines.en: Still in Thy light we onward move;
lines.ko: 여전히 당신의 빛 안에서 우리는 전진합니다.

lines.en: We follow Thee.

title_en: Jesus, lead thou on

lines.en: Jesus, lead thou on
Till our rest is won:
And although the way be cheerless,
We will follow calm and fearless:
lines.ko: 우리는 침착하고 두려움 없이 따를 것입니다:

lines.en: Guide us by thy hand
To our fatherland.
If the way be drear,
If the foe be near,
Let not faithless fears o'ertake us;
lines.ko: 믿음 없는 두려움이 우리를 사로잡지 않도록 하십시오.

lines.en: Let not faith and hope forsake us;
lines.ko: 믿음과 희망이 우리를 버리지 않도록 하십시오.

lines.en: For through many a woe
To our home we go.
When we seek relief
From a long-felt grief;
When temptations come alluring,
Make us patient and enduring;
Show us that bright shore
Where we weep no more.
lines.ko: 우리가 더 이상 울지 않는 곳.

lines.en: Jesus, lead thou on
Till our rest is won.
Heav'nly Leader, still direct us,
Still support, control, protect us,
Till we safely stand
In our fatherland.

lines.id: Di rumah Ayahku di atas

lines.en: When my spirit, clothed, immortal,
lines.ko: 영영 부를 나의 찬송 예수 인도 하셨네 아멘
lines.id: Saat rohku berpakaian, abadi,

lines.en: Wings its flight to realms of day,
lines.id: Sayapkan penerbangannya ke alam siang hari,

lines.en: This my song through endless ages:
lines.id: Ini laguku sepanjang masa tanpa akhir

lines.en: Jesus led me all the way!
lines.id: Yesus menuntunku sepanjang jalan
Ini laguku sepanjang masa tanpa akhir
Yesus menuntunku sepanjang jalan. Amin.

title_en: Why should cross and trial grieve me
title_ko: 왜 십자가와 시련이 나를 슬프게 해야 합니까? (자체번역)

lines.en: Why should cross and trial grieve me?
lines.ko: 왜 십자가와 시련이 나를 슬프게 해야 합니까?

lines.en: Christ is near
With his cheer;
Never will he leave me.
lines.ko: 그는 결코 나를 떠나지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: Who can rob me of the heaven
lines.ko: 누가 나에게서 천국을 빼앗을 수 있겠는가?

lines.en: That God's Son
For my own
To my faith hath given?
God oft gives me days of gladness;
lines.ko: 하나님은 종종 나에게 기쁨의 날을 주십니다.

lines.en: Shall I grieve
If he give
Seasons, too, of sadness?
God is good and tempers ever
All my ill,
And he will
Wholly leave me never.
Death cannot destroy for ever;
From our fears,
Cares, and tears
It will us deliver.
It will close life's mournful story,
Make a way
That we may
Enter heav'nly glory.
Lord, my Shepherd, take me to thee.
lines.ko: 나의 목자이신 주님, 저를 당신께 데려가 주십시오.

lines.en: Thou art mine;
I was thine,
Even ere I knew thee.
I am thine, for thou hast bought me;
lines.ko: 나는 당신 것입니다. 당신이 나를 사셨기 때문입니다.

lines.en: Lost I stood,
But thy blood
Free salvation brought me.
Thou art mine; I love and own thee.
lines.ko: 너는 내 것이다. 나는 당신을 사랑하고 소유합니다.

lines.en: Light of Joy,
Ne'er shall I
From my heart dethrone thee.
Saviour, let me soon behold thee
lines.ko: 구원자여, 내가 곧 당신을 뵙게 하소서

lines.en: Face to face,
May thy grace
Evermore enfold me!

title_en: Take up thy cross, the Saviour said

lines.en: "Take up thy cross," the Saviour said,
lines.ko: 만유의 주재 존귀하신 예수 사람이 되신 하나님
lines.id: Tuhan Yesus yang paling adil, Penguasa seluruh alam,

lines.en: "If thou wouldst my disciple be;
lines.ko: 나 사모하여 영원히 섬길 내 영광 되신 주로다
lines.id: Wahai Engkau Tuhan dan manusia Putra

lines.en: Take up thy cross with willing heart,
lines.id: Engkau akan kuhormati,

lines.en: And humbly follow after me."
lines.id: Engkaulah kemuliaan, kegembiraan dan mahkota jiwaku.

lines.en: Take up thy cross; let not its weight
lines.ko: 화려한 동산 무성한 저 수목 다 아름답고 묘하나
lines.id: Padang rumputnya indah, Hutannya masih lebih indah,

lines.en: Fill thy weak soul with vain alarm;
lines.ko: 순전한 예수 더 아름다워 봄 같은 기쁨 주시네
lines.id: Mengenakan pakaian musim semi yang mekar

lines.en: His strength shall bear thy spirit up,
lines.id: Yesus lebih adil, Yesus lebih murni,

lines.en: And brace thy heart and nerve thine arm.
lines.id: Yang membuat hati sedih bernyanyi.

lines.en: Take up thy cross; nor heed the shame,
lines.ko: 광명한 해와 명랑한 저 달빛 수 많은 별들 빛나나
lines.id: Cerahnya sinar matahari, Lebih cerah lagi cahaya bulan,

lines.en: And let thy foolish pride be still;
lines.ko: 주 예수 빛은 더 찬란하여 참 비교 할 수 없도다 아멘
lines.id: Dan semua tuan rumah yang berkelap-kelip dan menatap

lines.en: Thy Lord refused not e'en to die
lines.id: Yesus bersinar lebih terang, Yesus bersinar lebih murni,

lines.en: Upon a cross, on Calv'ry's hill.
lines.id: Dari semua malaikat yang bisa dibanggakan surga. Amin.

lines.en: Take up thy cross, then, in his strength,
And calmly sin's wild deluge brave;
'Twill guide thee to a better home,
It points to glory o'er the grave.
Take up thy cross, and follow on,
Nor think till death to lay it down;
For only he who bears the cross
May hope to wear the glorious crown.

title_en: Why dost thou stand afar

lines.en: From Psalm 10
Why dost thou stand afar,
O Lord, in our distress?
lines.ko: 오 주님, 우리가 고난 중에 있습니까?

lines.en: And why dost thou conceal thyself
When troublous times oppress?
Do thou, O Lord, arise;
O God, lift up thy hand;
Forget thou not the suff'ring poor,
lines.ko: 고난 받는 가난한 자들을 잊지 말라.

lines.en: The humble in the land.
Their foes thou dost behold,
Their wrongs thou wilt repay;
The poor commit themselves to thee,
Thou art the orphan's stay.
Thou, Lord, hast heard their pray'r
When humble hearts drew nigh;
Thou also wilt revive their strength
And ever hear their cry.
Defend the fatherless,
And all who are oppressed,
That they by human pride and pow'r
May be no more distressed.
lines.ko: 더 이상 괴로워하지 않을 수도 있습니다.

title_en: To God my earnest voice I raise

lines.en: From Psalm 142
To God my earnest voice I raise,
To God my voice imploring prays;
Before his face my grief I show
lines.ko: 그의 얼굴 앞에 내 슬픔을 보여주네

lines.en: And tell my trouble and my woe.
lines.ko: 그리고 나의 고난과 불행을 말하여 주십시오.

lines.en: When gloom and sorrow compass me,
The path I take is known to thee,
And all the toils that foes do lay
To snare thy servant in his way.
lines.ko: 주의 종의 길을 올무에 빠뜨리려 함이니이다

lines.en: O Lord, my Saviour, now to thee,
lines.ko: 오 주님, 나의 구세주여, 이제 당신께

lines.en: Without a hope besides, I flee,
To thee, my shelter from the strife,
My portion in the land of life.
Be thou my help when troubles throng,
lines.ko: 환난이 닥쳤을 때 나의 도움이 되소서.

lines.en: For I am weak and foes are strong;
My captive soul from prison bring,
And thankful praises I will sing.

title_en: Thy loving-kindness, Lord, is good and free
title_ko: 주님, 당신의 사랑의 친절은 선하고 값이 없습니다. (자체번역)

lines.en: Thy lovingkindness, Lord, is good and free:
lines.ko: 주님, 당신의 사랑은 선하고 값없이 베푸십니다.

lines.en: In tender mercy turn thou unto me;
Hide not thy face from me in my distress,
lines.ko: 내가 고난 중에 있을 때 주의 얼굴을 나에게서 숨기지 마소서.

lines.en: In mercy hear my pray'r, thy servant bless.
lines.ko: 자비로이 내기도를 들어주십시오. 당신의 종이 축복합니다.

lines.en: Needy and sorrowful, to thee I cry;
Let thy salvation set my soul on high;
Then I will sing and praise thy holy Name,
lines.ko: 그리하면 내가 주의 거룩하신 이름을 노래하고 찬양하리이다

lines.en: My thankful song thy mercy shall proclaim.
lines.ko: 나의 감사의 노래는 당신의 자비가 선포될 것입니다.

lines.en: With joy the meek shall see my soul restored;
lines.ko: 온유한 자들은 내 영혼이 회복되는 것을 기쁨으로 볼 것입니다.

lines.en: Your heart shall live, ye saints that seek the Lord;
lines.ko: 주님을 찾는 성도들아, 너희 마음은 살아날 것이다.

lines.en: He helps the needy and regards their cries,
lines.ko: 그는 궁핍한 자를 도우시며 그들의 부르짖음을 돌아보시며

lines.en: Those in distress the Lord will not despise.
lines.ko: 여호와께서는 환난 중에 있는 자를 멸시하지 아니하시리로다

lines.en: Let heav'n above his grace and glory tell
lines.ko: 그의 은혜와 영광 위에 높이 올라가서 말하게 하소서

lines.en: Let earth and sea and all that in them dwell;
lines.ko: 땅과 바다와 그 가운데 모든 것이 거하게 하라.

lines.en: Salvation to his people God will give,
And they that love his Name with him shall live.
lines.ko: 그리고 그와 함께 그의 이름을 사랑하는 자는 살리라.

title_en: No longer, Lord, despise me
title_ko: 주님, 더 이상 저를 경멸하지 마십시오 (자체번역)

lines.en: From Psalm 6
No longer, Lord despise me,
lines.ko: 더 이상 주님께서 저를 멸시하지 않으십니다.

lines.en: Nor in thy wrath chastise me,
Thy mercy I implore.
How long thine anger cherish?
Consumed thereby I perish;
My soul is troubled sore.
To me, O Lord, returning,
Save thou, with pity yearning.
Shall death thy mem'ry keep?
Or shall the grave confess thee?
Or I give thanks and bless thee,
While day and night I weep?
The Lord will ever hear me,
lines.ko: 주님은 언제나 내 말을 들으실 것입니다.

lines.en: And when I pray be near me,
lines.ko: 그리고 내가 기도할 때, 내 곁에 있어 주십시오.

lines.en: To put my foes to shame;
Turned back, no more to grieve me,
lines.ko: 돌아섰으니 더 이상 나를 슬프게 하지 말고

lines.en: They suddenly shall leave me.
All glory to his Name!

title_en: Give Thanks unto the Lord, Jehovah

lines.en: From Psalm 118:1–9, 17–25
Give thanks unto the Lord, Jehovah,
For he is good, O praise his Name!
Let Israel say: The Lord be praised,
His mercy ever is the same.
Let Aaron's house now praise Jehovah;
The Lord is good, O praise his Name;
Let all that fear the Lord extol him,
His mercy ever is the same.
In a large place the Lord hath set me,
In my distress he heard my cry;
lines.ko: 내가 환난 중에 내 부르짖음을 들으셨으니

lines.en: I will not fear; the Lord is with me,
lines.ko: 나는 두려워하지 않을 것이다. 주님이 나와 함께 계십니다.

lines.en: What can man do, when God is nigh?
lines.ko: 하나님이 가까이 계시면 사람이 무엇을 할 수 있겠는가?

lines.en: The Lord is chief among my helpers;
lines.ko: 여호와는 나를 돕는 자 중에 으뜸이시니

lines.en: And I shall see my foes o'erthrown:
lines.ko: 그리고 나는 내 적들이 무너지는 것을 보게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: Far better than in man or princes,
My trust I place in God alone.
I shall not die, but live, declaring
The works of God, who tried me sore,
And chastened me; but in his mercy
lines.ko: 그리고 나를 징계하셨습니다. 그러나 그의 자비하심으로

lines.en: Not unto death hath giv'n me o'er.
lines.ko: 죽음에 이르기까지 나에게 o'er를 주지 않았습니다.

lines.en: The gates of righteousness set open,
The gate of God! I'll enter in
To praise thee, Lord, who pray'r hast answered,
lines.ko: 주님을 찬양하기 위해 기도하신 분이 응답하셨습니다.

lines.en: And savedst me from all my sin.
The stone—O Lord, it is thy doing—
lines.ko: 그 돌은 - 오 주님, 그것은 당신이 만드신 것입니다 -

lines.en: The stone, the builders did despise,
Is made the headstone of the corner,
And it is marv'lous in our eyes.
This is the day, of days most glorious,
The Lord hath made; we'll joy and sing:
lines.ko: 주님께서 만드셨습니다. 우리는 기뻐하며 노래할 것입니다:

lines.en: Send now prosperity, we pray thee;
And, O our God, salvation bring!
lines.ko: 그리고 오 우리 하나님, 구원을 주소서!

title_en: Fierce was the wild billow

lines.en: Fierce was the wild billow,
Dark was the night;
Oars labored heavily,
Foam glimmered white;
Trembled the mariners,
Peril was nigh:
Then said the God of God,
"Peace! it is I."
Ridge of the mountain-wave,
Lower thy crest!
Wail of Euroclydon,
Be thou at rest!
Sorrow can never be,
Darkness must fly,
Where saith the Light of Light,
"Peace! it is I."
Jesus, Deliverer,
Come thou to me;
Soothe thou my voyaging
Over life's sea:
Thou, when the storm of death
Roars, sweeping by,
Whisper, O Truth of Truth,
"Peace! it is I."

title_en: Now Israel may say, and that in truth
title_ko: 이제 이스라엘은 이렇게 말할 수 있습니다. 그리고 그것은 사실입니다. (자체번역)

lines.en: From Psalm 124
Now Israel may say, and that in truth,
lines.ko: 이제 이스라엘은 다음과 같이 말할 수 있습니다.

lines.en: If that the Lord had not our right maintained,
lines.ko: 만약 주님께서 우리의 권리를 지키지 않으셨다면,

lines.en: If that the Lord had not with us remained,
lines.ko: 만일 여호와께서 우리와 함께 계시지 아니하셨더라면

lines.en: When cruel men against us rose to strive,
lines.ko: 우리를 대적하는 잔인한 자들이 일어나 싸우려고 했을 때,

lines.en: We surely had been swallowed up alive.
lines.ko: 우리는 분명히 산 채로 삼켜졌을 것입니다.

lines.en: Yea when their wrath against us fiercely rose,
lines.ko: 그렇습니다. 우리를 향한 그들의 분노가 격렬해졌을 때,

lines.en: The swelling tide had o'er us spread its wave,
lines.ko: 부풀어오르는 조수는 우리에게 파도를 퍼뜨리게 했고,

lines.en: The raging stream had then become our grave,
lines.ko: 성난 시냇물은 그때 우리의 무덤이 되었고,

lines.en: The surging flood, in proudly swelling roll,
Most surely then had overwhelmed our soul.
lines.ko: 그렇다면 확실히 우리의 영혼을 압도했을 것입니다.

lines.en: Blest be the Lord who made us not their prey:
lines.ko: 우리를 먹이로 삼지 아니하신 여호와를 찬송할지어다

lines.en: As from the snare a bird escapeth free,
Their net us rent and so escaped are we:
Our only help is in Jehovah's Name,
lines.ko: 우리의 유일한 도움은 여호와의 이름에 있습니다.

lines.en: Who made the earth and all the heav'nly frame.
lines.ko: 땅과 하늘의 모든 구조를 만드신 분.

title_en: If we have forgotten the Name of our God

lines.en: From Psalm 44:20-26
If we have forgotten the Name of our God,
Or unto an idol our hands spread abroad,
lines.ko: 아니면 우리 손이 널리 퍼져 있는 우상에게,

lines.en: Shall not the Almighty uncover this sin?
He knows all our hearts and the secrets within.
lines.ko: 그분은 우리의 모든 마음과 내면의 비밀을 모두 알고 계십니다.

lines.en: Rise, help and redeem us, thy mercy we trust;
lines.ko: 일어나서 우리를 도우시고 구속하소서. 우리가 신뢰하는 당신의 자비여.

lines.en: Rise, help and redeem us, thy mercy we trust.
lines.ko: 일어나서 우리를 도우시고 구속하소서. 주님의 자비를 우리는 믿습니다.

lines.en: We all the day long for thy sake are consumed,
lines.ko: 우리는 하루 종일 당신을 위해 지쳤습니다.

lines.en: Defeated and helpless, to death we are doomed;
lines.ko: 패배하고 무력해지면 우리는 죽을 운명에 처해 있습니다.

lines.en: They why dost thou tarry? Jehovah, awake;
lines.ko: 왜 당신은 지체하고 있습니까? 여호와여, 깨어나소서.

lines.en: Nor spurn us for ever; arise for our sake.
lines.ko: 우리를 영원히 버리지 마십시오. 우리를 위하여 일어나소서.

lines.en: O why art thou hiding the light of thy face,
lines.ko: 오, 너는 어찌하여 얼굴의 빛을 숨기느냐?

lines.en: Forgetting our burden of grief and disgrace?
Our soul is bowed down, yea, we cleave to the dust;
lines.ko: 우리 영혼은 구부려지고, 참으로 우리는 흙에 붙었습니다.

lines.en: Rise, help and redeem us, thy mercy we trust.
lines.ko: 일어나서 우리를 도우시고 구속하소서. 주님의 자비를 우리는 믿습니다.

alt_titles: Rise, help, and redeem us

title_en: Come, let us to the Lord our God

lines.en: Come, let us to the Lord our God
With contrite hearts return;
Our God is gracious, nor will leave
The desolate to mourn.
His voice commands the tempest forth,
And stills the stormy wave;
And, though his arm be strong to smite,
lines.ko: 그리고 비록 그의 팔이 강하여 칠지라도

lines.en: 'Tis also strong to save.
Long hath the night of sorrow reigned;
The dawn shall bring us light:
lines.ko: 새벽이 우리에게 빛을 가져다 줄 것이다:

lines.en: God shall appear, and we shall rise
With gladness in his sight.
Our hearts, if God we seek to know,
Shall know him, and rejoice;
His coming like the morn shall be,
Like morning songs his voice.
As dew upon the tender herb,
Diffusing fragrance round,
As show'rs that usher in the spring,
And cheer the thirsty ground;
So shall his presence bless our souls,
lines.ko: 그리하여 그분의 임재가 우리 영혼을 축복하게 하소서.

lines.en: And shed a joyful light;
That hallowed morn shall chase away
The sorrows of the night.

title_en: There is no sorrow, Lord, too light

lines.en: There is no sorrow, Lord, too light
To bring in pray'r to thee;
There is no anxious care too slight
To wake thy sympathy.
Thou, who hast trod the thorny road,
Wilt share each small distress;
The love, which bore the greater load,
Will not refuse the less.
There is no secret sigh we breathe,
But meets thine ear divine;
lines.ko: 그러나 당신의 귀에는 신성한 귀가 닿습니다.

lines.en: And ev'ry cross grows light beneath
lines.ko: 그리고 모든 십자가는 아래에서 빛을 발산합니다

lines.en: The shadow, Lord, of thine.
Life's ills without, sin's strife within,
lines.ko: 밖으로는 인생의 불행이 있고, 안으로는 죄의 다툼이 있으며,

lines.en: The heart would overflow,
But for that love which died for sin,
lines.ko: 그러나 죄를 위하여 죽으신 그 사랑으로 말미암아

lines.en: That love which wept with woe.

title_en: Come, ye disconsolate

lines.en: Come, ye disconsolate, where'er ye languish,
lines.id: Ayo, kamu terlambat,

lines.en: Come to the mercy-seat, fervently kneel:
lines.id: di mana kamu merana

lines.en: Here bring your wounded hearts, here tell your anguish;
lines.id: Datanglah ke kursi mer-cy,

lines.en: Earth has no sorrows that heav'n cannot heal.
lines.id: Berlututlah dengan sungguh-sungguh,
Ini bawalah hatimu yang terluka
di sini bilang kamu sedih.
Bumi tidak memiliki baris kesedihan
surga itu tidak dapat menyembuhkan.

lines.en: Joy of the comfortless, light of the straying,
lines.ko: 이 샘에 솟는 물 강같이 흘러
lines.id: Sukacita di akhir zaman,

lines.en: Hope of the penitent, fadeless and pure!
lines.id: cahaya yang tersesat

lines.en: Here speaks the Comforter, in mercy saying,
lines.id: Harapan dari pen-i-tenda,

lines.en: "Earth has no sorrows that heav'n cannot cure."
lines.id: tidak pudar dan murni,
Di sini berbicara penghibur,
ucapannya yang lembut
“Bumi tidak mempunyai kesedihan
surga itu tidak dapat menyembuhkannya."

lines.en: Here see the Bread of Life; see waters flowing
lines.id: Di sini lihatlah roti kehidupan

lines.en: Forth from the throne of God, pure from above:
lines.id: melihat air mengalir

lines.en: Come to the feast prepared; come ever knowing
lines.id: Keluar dari takhta Tuhan,

lines.en: Earth has no sorrows but heav'n can remove.
lines.id: murni dari atas.
Datanglah ke pesta cinta
datang dengan penuh pengetahuan
Bumi tidak memiliki baris kesedihan
tapi surga bisa bergerak kembali.
Semua yang mendekat dan mengambil,

lines.ko: 저 수정 빛 같이 늘 맑도다
lines.id: di sini dari hadiah Cod
Akan mengetahui sumber Kehidupan,
masih meningkat,
Air kehidupan akan mengalir
muncul dari dalam diri mereka,
Mengakhiri semua rasa haus,
dan tidak pernah berhenti.

title_en: The Lord is rich and merciful

lines.en: The Lord is rich and merciful,
The Lord is very kind;
O come to him, come now to him,
lines.ko: 오 그에게로 오라, 지금 그에게로 오라,

lines.en: With a believing mind:
His comforts, they shall strengthen thee,
Like flowing waters cool;
And he shall for thy spirit be
A fountain ever full.
The Lord is glorious and strong,
Our God is very high;
O trust in him, trust now in him,
lines.ko: 오 그분을 믿으십시오. 이제 그분을 신뢰하십시오.

lines.en: And have security:
He shall be to thee like the sea,
And thou shalt surely feel
His wind, that bloweth healthily
Thy sicknesses to heal.
The Lord is wonderful and wise,
As all the ages tell;
O learn of him, learn now of him,
lines.ko: 오 그에게서 배우십시오. 지금 그에게서 배우십시오.

lines.en: Then with thee it is well;
And with his light thou shalt be blest,
lines.ko: 그리고 그분의 빛으로 당신은 축복을 받을 것입니다.

lines.en: Therein to work and live;
And he shall be to thee a rest
When evening hours arrive.

title_en: Sometimes a light surprises

lines.en: Sometimes a light surprises
The Christian while he sings;
It is the Lord, who rises
With healing in his wings:
When comforts are declining,
He grants the soul again
A season of clear shining,
To cheer it after rain.
In holy contemplation
We sweetly then pursue
The theme of God's salvation,
And find it ever new;
lines.ko: 그리고 그것이 항상 새로운 것임을 발견하십시오.

lines.en: Set free from present sorrow,
We cheerfully can say,
lines.ko: 우리는 유쾌하게 이렇게 말할 수 있습니다.

lines.en: Let the unknown tomorrow
Bring with it what it may.
It can bring with it nothing
But he will bear us through;
lines.ko: 그러나 그분은 우리를 견디어 주실 것입니다.

lines.en: Who gives the lilies clothing
Will clothe his people too:
Beneath the spreading heavens
No creature but is fed;
lines.ko: 먹이를 주는 것 외에는 어떤 생물도 없습니다.

lines.en: And he who feeds the ravens
Will give his children bread.
Though vine nor fig tree neither
Their wonted fruit shall bear,
Though all the field should wither,
Nor flocks nor herds be there;
Yet God the same abiding,
His praise shall tune my voice,
lines.ko: 그분을 찬양하면 내 목소리가 조화를 이룰 것입니다.

lines.en: For, while in him confiding,
lines.ko: 왜냐하면 그에게 확신을 갖고 있는 동안,

lines.en: I cannot but rejoice.

lines.en: Tell me the old, old story
lines.ko: 주 예수 크신 사랑 늘 말해 주시오
lines.id: Pelita kaki kita, kemana kita menelusuri

lines.en: Of unseen things above,
lines.ko: 나 항상 듣던 말씀 또 들려 주시오
lines.id: Jalan kita ketika biasa tersesat

lines.id: Mengalir dari sumber rahmat surgawi,

lines.id: Brook, di sisi musafir.

lines.en: Tell me the story simply,

lines.id: Tuhan Yesus, tolong beritahu saya sekali lagi kasih-Mu yang besar

lines.en: For I am weak and weary,
And helpless and defiled.
Tell me the old, old story,
lines.id: Roti jiwa kita, dimana kita memberi makan,

lines.id: Man-na sejati dari tempat tinggi

lines.id: Tuhan Yesus, tolong beritahu saya sekali lagi kasih-Mu yang besar

lines.ko: 주 예수 나를 위해 이 세상 오셔서
lines.id: Tiang api, menembus kegelapan,

lines.en: With earnest tones and grave;
lines.id: Atau awan yang sangat cerah di siang hari

lines.ko: 나 같은 사람 위해 주 보혈 흘렸네
lines.id: Saat ombak menghantam kulit kita yang terombang-ambing

lines.ko: 이 복스러운 말씀 또 들려 주시오
lines.id: Jangkar kami dan masa tinggal kami

lines.ko: 나 항상 듣던 말씀 나 항상 듣던 말씀

lines.id: Tuhan Yesus, tolong beritahu saya sekali lagi kasih-Mu yang besar

A comforter to me.

lines.id: Tanpamu bagaimana bumi bisa diinjak,

lines.id: Atau surga itu sendiri akan dimenangkan A-men.

lines.ko: 나 항상 듣던 말씀 나 항상 듣던 말씀
lines.id: Kata-kata yang selalu kudengar, kata-kata yang selalu kudengar

lines.en: Is dawning on my soul,

lines.id: Tuhan Yesus, tolong beritahu saya sekali lagi kasih-Mu yang besar

lines.en: Tell me the old, old story,
"Christ Jesus makes thee whole."

title_id: Ceritakan padaku Kisah Lama dan Lama

title_en: Through all the changing scenes of life

lines.en: From Psalm 34:1-4, 7-9
Through all the changing scenes of life,
In trouble and in joy,
The praises of my God shall still
My heart and tongue employ.
Of his deliv'rance I will boast,
Till all that are distressed
From my example comfort take,
And charm their griefs to rest.
O magnify the Lord with me,
With me exalt his Name;
When in distress to him I called,
He to my rescue came.
The hosts of God encamp around
The dwellings of the just;
Deliv'rance he affords to all
Who on his succor trust.
O make but trial of his love;
Experience will decide
How blest they are, and only they,
Who in his truth confide.
Fear him, ye saints; and you will then
lines.ko: 성도들아, 그를 두려워하라. 그리고 당신은 그때

lines.en: Have nothing else to fear:
Make you his service your delight,
lines.ko: 그분을 섬기는 일이 기쁨이 되도록 하십시오.

lines.en: He'll make your wants his care.
lines.ko: 그는 당신의 필요를 그의 관심으로 만들 것입니다.

title_en: I waited for the Lord most high

lines.en: Psalm 40:1-5
I waited for the Lord most high,
And he inclined to hear my cry;
lines.ko: 그리고 그는 내 부르짖음을 듣고자 하셨습니다.

lines.en: He took me from destruction's pit
And from the miry clay;
Upon a rock he set my feet,
And steadfast made my way.
A new and joyful song of praise
He taught my thankful heart to raise;
lines.ko: 그는 내 감사하는 마음을 키우도록 가르쳤습니다.

lines.en: And many, seeing me restored,
lines.ko: 그리고 많은 사람들이 내가 회복된 것을 보고,

lines.en: Shall fear the Lord and trust;
And blest are they that trust the Lord,
The humble and the just.
O Lord my God, how manifold
lines.ko: 오 주 나의 하나님, 얼마나 다양합니까?

lines.en: Thy wondrous works which I behold,
And all thy loving, gracious thought
lines.ko: 그리고 당신의 모든 사랑스럽고 은혜로운 생각

lines.en: Thou hast bestowed on man;
To count thy mercies I have sought,
lines.ko: 내가 구한 당신의 자비를 헤아리기 위해,

lines.en: But boundless is their span.

title_en: O God, my Strength and Fortitude

lines.en: O God, my Strength and Fortitude,
Of force I must love thee;
Thou art my Castle and Defense
In my necessity;
My God, my Rock, in whom I trust,
lines.ko: 나의 하나님, 나의 반석, 내가 의뢰하는 바

lines.en: The worker of my wealth,
My Refuge, Buckler, and my Shield,
The horn of all my health.
I, when beset with pain and grief,
Did pray to God for grace;
And he forthwith did hear my plaint
lines.ko: 그리고 그는 즉시 내 불평을 들었다.

lines.en: Out of his holy place.
The Lord descended from above
And bowed the heavens high,
And underneath his feet he cast
The darkness of the sky.
On cherub and on cherubim
Full royally he rode,
And on the wings of all the winds
Came flying all abroad.
Unspotted are the ways of God,
His word is purely tried;
He is a sure defence to such
lines.ko: 그는 그러한 것에 대한 확실한 방어자입니다

lines.en: As in his faith abide.

title_en: O thou to whose all-searching sight
title_ko: 오 당신은 모든 것을 살피는 광경에 (자체번역)

lines.en: O thou to whose all-searching sight
lines.ko: 오 당신은 모든 것을 살피는 광경에

lines.en: The darkness shineth as the light,
Search, prove my heart; it pants for thee;
lines.ko: 검색하여 내 마음을 증명해 보세요. 그것은 당신을 위해 바지됩니다;

lines.en: O burst these bands and set it free.
lines.ko: 오, 이 띠를 부수고 자유롭게 해주세요.

lines.en: Wash out its stains, refine its cross;
lines.ko: 그 얼룩을 씻어내고 그 십자가를 다듬어라.

lines.en: Nail my affections to the cross;
Hallow each thought; let all within
lines.ko: 각 생각을 거룩하게 하라. 모두 안에 있게 해라

lines.en: Be clean, as thou, my Lord, art clean.
lines.ko: 나의 주여, 당신께서 깨끗하신 것처럼 깨끗이 되어 주십시오.

lines.en: If in this darksome wild I stray,
lines.ko: 만약 이 어두운 야생 속에서 내가 방황한다면,

lines.en: Be thou my Light, be thou my Way;
lines.ko: 너는 나의 빛이 되고 나의 길이 되라.

lines.en: No foes, no violence I fear,
lines.ko: 적도 없고, 폭력도 없고, 내가 두려워하는 것은

lines.en: No harm, while thou, my God, art near.
lines.ko: 나의 하나님, 당신이 가까이 계시는 동안에는 해를 끼치지 마십시오.

lines.en: Saviour, where'er thy steps I see,
lines.ko: 구세주여, 내가 당신의 발걸음을 어디에서 보았는지,

lines.en: Dauntless, untired, I follow thee:
lines.ko: 담대하고 지치지 않고 나는 당신을 따릅니다.

lines.en: O let thy hand support me still,
lines.ko: 오 당신의 손이 나를 여전히 지탱하게 해주세요.

lines.en: And lead me to thy holy hill.
lines.ko: 그리고 나를 당신의 거룩한 산으로 인도해 주십시오.

lines.en: If rough and thorny be my way,
My strength proportion to my day;
lines.ko: 나의 하루에 대한 나의 힘의 비율;

lines.en: Till toil and grief and pain shall cease
Where all is calm and joy and peace.
lines.ko: 모든 것이 고요하고 기쁨과 평화가 있는 곳.

title_en: O Lord, by thee delivered

lines.en: From Psalm 30
O Lord, by thee delivered,
I thee with songs extol;
My foes thou hast not suffered
lines.ko: 나의 원수들아 너는 고통을 당하지 아니하였느니라

lines.en: To glory o'er my fall.
O Lord, my God, I sought thee,
lines.ko: 오 여호와 나의 하나님, 내가 당신을 찾았습니다.

lines.en: And thou didst heal and save;
Thou, Lord, from death didst ransom
lines.ko: 주님, 당신은 죽음에서 대속물을 마련해 주셨으니

lines.en: And keep me from the grave.
His holy Name remember,
Ye saints, Jehovah praise;
His anger lasts a moment,
His favor all our days;
lines.ko: 우리의 평생 동안 그분의 은총을 누리십시오.

lines.en: For sorrow, like a pilgrim,
May tarry for a night,
But joy the heart will gladden
lines.ko: 그러나 기쁨은 마음을 기쁘게 할 것입니다

lines.en: When dawns the morning light.
In prosp'rous days I boasted,
Unmoved I shall remain,
lines.ko: 나는 흔들리지 않고 그대로 있을 것이다.

lines.en: For, Lord, by thy good favor
My cause thou didst maintain;
I soon was sorely troubled,
For thou didst hide thy face;
I cried to thee, Jehovah,
I sought Jehovah's grace.
What profit if I perish,
If life thou dost not spare?
Shall dust repeat thy praises,
Shall it thy truth declare?
O Lord, on me have mercy,
And my petition hear;
That thou mayst be my helper,
lines.ko: 당신이 나의 돕는 자가 되어 주시옵소서.

lines.en: In mercy, Lord, appear.
My grief is turned to gladness,
To thee my thanks I raise,
Who hast removed my sorrow
And girded me with praise;
And now, no longer silent,
lines.ko: 그리고 이제 더 이상 침묵하지 않고,

lines.en: My heart thy praise will sing;
O Lord, my God, for ever
My thanks to thee I bring.

lines.id: Bahkan aku, bahkan aku,

lines.en: Sinful though my heart may be!
lines.id: Mungkin hatiku penuh dosa

lines.id: Kamu mungkin akan meninggalkanku, tapi sebaliknya

lines.en: Let thy mercy light on me,
lines.id: Biarkan belas kasihan-Mu menimpaku

lines.en: Even me, even me,
lines.id: Bahkan aku, bahkan aku,

lines.en: Let thy mercy light on me.
lines.id: Biarkan berkat-Mu jatuh ke atasku.

lines.en: Pass me not, O tender Saviour!
lines.ko: 온유하신 나의 주여 내 손 잡아 주시고
lines.id: Jangan lewati aku, wahai Juruselamat yang lembut!

lines.en: Let me love and cling to thee;
lines.ko: 주의 은혜 갈망하는 나를 불러 주소서
lines.id: Biarkan aku mencintai dan melekat pada-Mu

lines.en: I am longing for thy favor;
lines.id: Aku merindukan nikmat-Mu

lines.en: When thou comest, call for me,
lines.id: Selagi Engkau menelepon, teleponlah aku

lines.en: Even me, even me,
lines.id: Bahkan aku, bahkan aku,
