lines.id: Biarkan berkat-Mu jatuh ke atasku.

lines.en: Pass me not, O mighty Spirit!
lines.id: Jangan lewati aku, hai, Semangat!

lines.en: Thou canst make the blind to see;
lines.ko: 능력 있는 주의 말씀 바로 듣게 하소서
lines.id: Engkau tidak dapat membuat orang buta melihat

lines.en: Witnesser of Jesus' merit,
lines.id: Saksi atas kebaikan Yesus,

lines.en: Speak the word of pow'r to me,
lines.id: Sampaikanlah kata-kata yang penuh kuasa kepadaku

lines.en: Even me, even me,
lines.id: Bahkan aku, bahkan aku,

lines.en: Speak the word of pow'r to me.
lines.id: Biarkan berkat-Mu jatuh ke atasku.
Cinta Tuhan, begitu murni dan tidak berubah,

lines.ko: 풍성하신 주의 보혈 나의 맘에 넘치네
lines.id: Darah Kristus, begitu kaya, begitu bebas
Anugerah Tuhan, begitu kuat dan tak terbatas,
Mag-ni-fy mereka semua dalam diriku
Bahkan aku, bahkan aku,
Biarkan berkat-Mu jatuh ke atasku.

title_en: From every stormy wind that blows

lines.en: From ev'ry stormy wind that blows,
lines.ko: 이 세상 풍파 심하고 또 환난 질고 많으나
lines.id: Dari setiap badai angin yang bertiup,

lines.en: From ev'ry swelling tide of woes,
lines.ko: 나 편히 쉬게 될 곳은 주 예비하신 주의 전
lines.id: Dari setiap gelombang kesengsaraan yang semakin besar,

lines.en: There is a calm, a sure retreat,
lines.id: Ada ketenangan, suguhan ulang yang pasti:

lines.en: 'Tis found beneath the mercy-seat.
lines.id: Ini ditemukan sebelum kursi belas kasihan.

lines.en: There is a place where Jesus sheds
lines.ko: 그 향기로운 기름을 주 내게 부어주셔서
lines.id: Ada tempat di mana Yesus ditumpahkan

lines.en: The oil of gladness on our heads,
lines.ko: 내 기쁨 더해주는 곳 주 피로 사신 주의 전
lines.id: Minyak kegembiraan di kepala kita

lines.en: A place than all besides more sweet;
lines.id: Tempat yang lebih manis dari semuanya:

lines.en: It is the blood-stained mercy-seat.
lines.id: Itu adalah kursi pertumpahan darah.

lines.en: There is a spot where spirits blend,
lines.ko: 주 믿는 형제자매들 그 몸은 떠나 있으나
lines.id: Ada adegan dimana roh menyatu,

lines.en: Where friend holds fellowship with friend,
lines.ko: 주 앞에 기도 드릴 곳 다 함께 모일 주의 전
lines.id: Dimana teman memegang kapal bersama temannya,

lines.en: Tho' sundered far; by faith they meet
lines.id: Meski jauh, karena iman mereka bertemu

lines.en: Around the common mercy-seat.
lines.id: Sebelum satu kursi belas kasihan bersama.

lines.en: Ah, whither could we flee for aid,
lines.ko: 내 손과 혀가 굳어도 내 몸의 피가 식어도
lines.id: Oh, biarkan tanganku melupakan keahliannya,

lines.en: When tempted, desolate, dismayed,
lines.ko: 나 영영 잊지 못할 곳 은혜의 보좌 주의 전 아멘
lines.id: Lidahku menjadi sunyi, dingin dan hening,

lines.en: Or how the hosts of hell defeat,
lines.id: Jantung yang terikat ini tak dapat dikalahkan,

lines.en: Had suff'ring saints no mercy-seat?
lines.id: Jika aku lupa mendapatkan kursi belas kasihan-Mu. Amin.

lines.en: There, there on eagle wings we soar,
And time and sense seem all no more,
And heav'n comes down our souls to greet,
And glory crowns the mercy-seat.
O may my hand forget her skill,
My tongue be silent, cold, and still,
This bounding heart forget to beat,
If I forget the mercy-seat.

title_id: Dari Setiap Angin Badai yang Berhembus

title_en: My God, is any hour so sweet

lines.en: My God, is any hour so sweet,
From blush of morn to evening star,
As that which calls me to thy feet,
The hour of prayer?
Then is my strength by thee renewed;
lines.ko: 그러면 당신으로 인해 나의 힘이 새로워집니다.

lines.en: Then are my sins by thee forgiv'n;
lines.ko: 그러면 당신으로 인해 내 죄가 용서되었습니다.

lines.en: Then dost thou cheer my solitude
With hope of heav'n.
No words can tell what sweet relief
lines.ko: 어떤 말로도 그 달콤한 안도감을 알 수 없어요

lines.en: There for my ev'ry want I find,
lines.ko: 내가 원하는 모든 것을 위해 그곳에서 찾았습니다.

lines.en: What strength for warfare, balm for grief,
lines.ko: 전쟁을 위한 힘이요, 슬픔을 위한 유향이요,

lines.en: What peace of mind!
Hushed is each doubt, gone ev'ry fear;
lines.ko: 모든 의심은 조용해지고 모든 두려움은 사라졌습니다.

lines.en: My spirit seems in heav'n to stay:
lines.ko: 내 영혼은 천국에 머물 것 같습니다.

lines.en: And e'en the penitential tear
Is wiped away.
Lord, till I reach yon blissful shore,
lines.ko: 주님, 제가 저 행복한 해변에 닿을 때까지,

lines.en: No privilege so dear shall be
As thus my inmost soul to pour
lines.ko: 이렇게 내 가장 깊은 영혼을 쏟아 붓는다면

lines.en: In prayer to thee.

title_en: Behold the Throne of grace

lines.en: Behold the Throne of grace!
The promise calls me near:
There Jesus shows a smiling face
And waits to answer prayer.
My soul, ask what thou wilt;
Thou canst not be too bold;
Since his own blood for thee he spilt,
What else can he withhold?
lines.ko: 그는 또 무엇을 보류할 수 있습니까?

lines.en: Thine image, Lord, bestow,
Thy presence and thy love;
I ask to serve thee here below,
lines.ko: 나는 여기 아래에서 당신을 섬기기를 요청합니다.

lines.en: And reign with thee above.
Teach me to live by faith;
Conform my will to thine;
Let me victorious be in death,
And then in glory shine.

title_en: Come, my soul, thy suit prepare
title_ko: 오라, 내 영혼아, 네 옷을 준비하라 (자체번역)

lines.en: Come, my soul, thy suit prepare:
lines.ko: 오라, 내 영혼아, 네 옷을 준비하라:

lines.en: Jesus loves to answer pray'r;
He himself has bid thee pray,
Therefore will not say thee nay.
Thou art coming to a King,
Large petitions with thee bring;
For his grace and pow'r are such,
None can ever ask too much.
lines.ko: 누구도 너무 많은 것을 요구할 수 없습니다.

lines.en: With my burden I begin:
Lord, remove this load of sin;
lines.ko: 주님, 이 죄의 짐을 제거해 주소서.

lines.en: Let thy blood, for sinners spilt,
lines.ko: 죄인들을 위하여 주의 피를 흘리게 하소서

lines.en: Set my conscience free from guilt.
Lord, I come to thee for rest,
Take possession of my breast;
There thy blood-bought right maintain,
lines.ko: 거기에서 당신의 피로 사신 권리를 유지하십시오.

lines.en: And without a rival reign.
While I am a pilgrim here,
Let thy love my spirit cheer;
lines.ko: 당신의 사랑이 내 영혼을 응원하게 해주세요.

lines.en: As my Guide, my Guard, my Friend,
lines.ko: 나의 안내자, 나의 수호자, 나의 친구로서,

lines.en: Lead me to my journey's end.
lines.ko: 내 여행이 끝날 때까지 나를 이끌어주세요.

lines.en: Show me what I have to do,
Ev'ry hour my strength renew:
Let me live a life of faith,
Let me die thy people's death.
lines.ko: 당신 백성의 죽음으로 나도 죽게 하소서.

title_en: When the weary, seeking rest

lines.en: When the weary, seeking rest,
To thy goodness flee;
When the heavy-laden cast
All their load on thee;
When the troubled, seeking peace,
On thy Name shall call;
When the sinner, seeking life,
At thy feet shall fall:
Hear then in love, O Lord, the cry
lines.ko: 주님, 사랑 안에서 부르짖는 소리를 들으소서

lines.en: In heav'n, thy dwelling place on high.
lines.ko: 천국에, 높은 곳에 당신의 거처가 있사옵니다.

lines.en: When the stranger asks a home,
All his toils to end;
When the hungry craveth food,
And the poor a friend;
When the widow weeps to thee,
Sad and lone and low;
When the orphan brings to thee
All his orphan woe:
When the worldling, sick at heart,
Lifts his soul above;
When the prodigal looks back
To his Father's love;
When the proud man, in his pride,
Stoops to seek thy face;
When the burdened brings his guilt
lines.ko: 무거운 짐을 진 자가 죄를 가져올 때

lines.en: To thy Throne of grace:

title_en: What a Friend we have in Jesus

lines.en: What a Friend we have in Jesus,
lines.ko: 죄 짐 맡은 우리 구주 어찌 좋은 친군지
lines.id: Betapa besarnya Sahabat yang kita miliki di dalam Yesus,

lines.en: All our sins and griefs to bear!
lines.ko: 걱정 근심 무거운 짐 우리 주께 맡기세
lines.id: Semua dosa dan kesedihan kita harus ditanggung!

lines.en: What a privilege to carry
lines.ko: 주께 고함 없는 고로 복을 받지 못하네
lines.id: Sungguh sebuah hak istimewa untuk dibawa-bawa

lines.en: Ev'rything to God in prayer!
lines.id: Semuanya kepada Tuhan dalam doa!

lines.en: O what peace we often forfeit,
lines.id: Oh betapa kedamaian yang sering kita hilangkan,

lines.en: O what needless pain we bear,
lines.id: Oh, betapa tidak perlunya rasa sakit yang kita tanggung,

lines.en: All because we do not carry
lines.id: Semua karena kita tidak membawanya

lines.en: Ev'rything to God in prayer.
lines.id: Semuanya kepada Tuhan dalam doa.

lines.en: Have we trials and temptations?
lines.ko: 시험 걱정 모든 괴롬 없는 사람 누군가
lines.id: Sudahkah kita menghadapi cobaan dan godaan

lines.en: Is there trouble anywhere?
lines.ko: 부질없이 낙심 말고 기도 드려 아뢰세
lines.id: Apakah ada masalah dimana-mana

lines.en: We should never be discouraged:
lines.ko: 이런 진실 하신 친구 찾아 볼 수 있을까
lines.id: Kita tidak boleh berkecil hati:

lines.en: Take it to the Lord in prayer!
lines.ko: 우리 약함 아시오니 어찌 아니 아뢸까
lines.id: Bawalah itu kepada Tuhan dalam doa!

lines.en: Can we find a friend so faithful,
lines.id: Bisakah kita menemukan teman yang begitu setia,

lines.en: Who will all our sorrows share?
lines.id: Siapa yang akan berbagi semua kesedihan kita

lines.en: Jesus knows our ev'ry weakness
lines.id: Yesus mengetahui setiap kelemahan kita

lines.en: Take it to the Lord in prayer!
lines.id: Bawalah itu kepada Tuhan dalam doa!

lines.en: Are we weak and heavy laden,
lines.ko: 근심 걱정 무거운 짐 아니진 자 누군가
lines.id: Apakah kita lemah dan berat la-den,

lines.en: Cumbered with a load of care?
lines.ko: 피난처는 우리 예수 주께 기도 드리세
lines.id: Cum-bered dengan penuh perhatian

lines.en: Precious Saviour, still our Refuge
lines.ko: 세상 친구 멸시하고 너를 조롱 하여도
lines.id: Penyelamat yang Berharga, tetap Perlindungan kita

lines.en: Take it to the Lord in prayer!
lines.ko: 예수 품에 안기어서 참된 위로 받겠네 아멘
lines.id: Bawalah itu kepada Tuhan dalam doa!

lines.en: Do thy friends despise, forsake thee?
lines.id: Apakah teman-temanmu memandang rendah, demi kamu

lines.en: Take it to the Lord in prayer!
lines.id: Bawalah itu kepada Tuhan dalam doa!

lines.en: In his arms he'll take and shield thee,
lines.id: Dalam pelukan-Nya Dia akan mengambil dan melindungimu,

lines.en: Thou wilt find a solace there.
lines.id: Anda akan menemukan renda di sana, A-men.

title_id: Sungguh Sahabat yang Kita Miliki di dalam Yesus

title_en: Sweet hour of prayer

lines.en: Sweet hour of prayer, sweet hour of prayer,
lines.ko: 내 기도하는 그 시간 그 때가 가장 즐겁다
lines.id: Saat doa yang manis, saat doa yang manis,

lines.en: That calls me from a world of care,
lines.ko: 이 세상 근심 걱정에 얽매인 나를 부르사
lines.id: Itu memanggilku dari dunia perawatan,

lines.en: And bids me at my Father's throne,
lines.ko: 내 진정 소원 주 앞에 낱낱이 바로 아뢰어
lines.id: Dan mengajakku ke singgasana Ayahku,

lines.en: Make all my wants and wishes known!
lines.ko: 큰 불행 당해 슬플 때 나 위로 받게 하시네
lines.id: Sampaikan semua keinginan dan harapanku!

lines.en: In seasons of distress and grief,
lines.id: Di musim kesusahan dan kesedihan,

lines.en: My soul has often found relief,
lines.id: Jiwaku sering kali mendapat kelegaan,

lines.en: And oft escaped the tempter's snare,
lines.id: Dan sering kali luput dari godaan para penggoda,

lines.en: By thy return, sweet hour of prayer.
lines.id: Dengan kembalinyamu saat doa yang manis.

lines.en: Sweet hour of prayer, sweet hour of prayer,
lines.ko: 내 기도하는 그 시간 내게는 가장 귀하다
lines.id: Saat doa yang manis, saat doa yang manis,

lines.en: The joys I feel, the bliss I share
lines.ko: 저 광야 같은 세상을 끝없이 방황 하면서
lines.id: Kegembiraan yang saya rasakan, kebahagiaan yang saya bagikan

lines.en: Of those whose anxious spirits burn
lines.ko: 위태한 길로 나갈 때 주께서 나를 이끌어
lines.id: Dari mereka yang semangatnya membara

lines.en: With strong desires for thy return!
lines.ko: 그 보좌 앞에 나아가 큰 은혜 받게 하시네
lines.id: Dengan keinginan yang kuat untuk kedatangan-Mu kembali!

lines.en: With such I hasten to the place
lines.id: Dengan itu aku punya sepuluh sampai di tempat

lines.en: Where God, my Saviour, shows his face,
lines.id: Dimana Tuhan, Juruselamatku, menampakkan wajah-Nya.

lines.en: And gladly take my station there,
lines.id: Dan dengan senang hati mengambil tempatku di sana,

lines.en: And wait for thee, sweet hour of prayer.
lines.id: Dan tunggulah engkau, saat doa yang manis.

lines.en: Sweet hour of prayer, sweet hour of prayer,
lines.ko: 내 기도하는 그 시간 그 때가 가장 즐겁다
lines.id: Saat doa yang manis, saat doa yang manis,

lines.en: Thy wings shall my petition bear
lines.ko: 이때껏 지은 큰 죄로 내 마음 심히 아파도
lines.id: Sayap-sayapmu akan memikul permohonanku

lines.en: To him, whose truth and faithfulness
lines.ko: 참 마음으로 뉘우쳐 다 숨김없이 아뢰면
lines.id: Kepada Dia yang memiliki kebenaran dan kesetiaan

lines.en: Engage the waiting the soul to bless:
lines.ko: 주 나를 위해 복 주사 새 은혜 부어 주시네
lines.id: Libatkan jiwa yang menunggu untuk memberkati

lines.en: And since he bids me seek his face,
lines.id: Dan karena Dia memintaku mencari wajah-Nya,

lines.en: Believe his Word, and trust his grace,
lines.id: Percayalah pada Firman-Nya, dan percayalah pada kasih karunia-Nya,

lines.en: I'll cast on him my ev'ry care,
lines.id: Aku akan menyerahkan semua perhatianku pada-Nya,

lines.en: And wait for thee, sweet hour of prayer.
lines.id: Dan tunggulah engkau, saat doa yang manis.

lines.ko: 내 기도하는 그 시간 그 때가 가장 즐겁다
lines.id: Saat doa yang manis, saat doa yang manis,

lines.ko: 주 세상에서 일찍이 저 요란한 곳 피하여
lines.id: Tuhan kita sendiri mengetahui kegembiraan di sana

lines.ko: 빈 들에서나 산에서 온밤을 새워 지내사
lines.id: Dan sering kali, ketika berkerumun,

lines.ko: 주 예수 친히 기도로 큰 본을 보여 주셨네 아멘
lines.id: Akan menyelinap dan mencarinya,
Dan berdoa sepanjang malam di ladang atau bukit,
Sementara seluruh dunia kerang masih tumbuh.
Cara-Nya berjalan, Sukacita-Nya untuk dibagikan,
Inilah yang kami perlukan, saat berdoa yang manis. Amin

title_en: How good it is to thank the Lord

lines.en: From Psalm 92:1-9, 12-15
lines.ko: 저 높은 곳을 향하여 날마다 나아갑니다
lines.id: Aku sedang menekan ke atas,

lines.en: New heights I'm gain-ing ev-'ry day
lines.ko: 내 뜻과 정성 모아서 날마다 기도합니다
lines.id: Ketinggian baru yang saya peroleh setiap hari

lines.en: Still pray-ing as I'm on-ward bound,
lines.ko: 내 주여 내 맘 붙드사 그 곳에 있게 하소서
lines.id: Masih berdoa saat aku sedang dalam perjalanan,

lines.en: "Lord, plant my feet on high-er ground."
lines.id: “Tuhan, tanamkan kakiku di tempat yang lebih tinggi.”

lines.en: How good it is to thank the Lord,
lines.ko: 괴롬과 죄가 있는 곳 나 비록 여기 살아도
lines.id: Panasku tak punya keinginan untuk tetap tinggal

lines.en: And praise to thee, Most High, accord,
lines.ko: 빛나고 높은 저 곳을 날마다 바라봅니다
lines.id: Dimana keraguan muncul dan ketakutan menghilang

lines.en: To show thy love with morning light,
lines.ko: 내 주여 내 맘 붙드사 그 곳에 있게 하소서
lines.id: Ada yang mungkin tinggal di tempat yang terbatas,

lines.en: And tell thy faithfulness each night;
lines.id: Doaku, tujuanku, adalah tujuan yang lebih tinggi.

lines.en: Yea, good it is thy praise to sing,
lines.id: Tuhan, angkat aku dan biarkan aku berdiri

lines.en: And all our sweetest music bring.
lines.id: Dengan iman di meja makan Surga,

lines.en: O Lord, with joy my heart expands
lines.ko: 의심의 안개 걷히고 근심의 구름 없는 곳
lines.id: Saya ingin hidup di atas dunia,

lines.en: Before the wonders of thy hands;
lines.ko: 기쁘고 참 된 평화가 거기만 있사옵니다
lines.id: Anak panah Setan ke arahku dilemparkan

lines.en: Great works, Jehovah, thou hast wrought,
lines.ko: 내 주여 내 맘 붙드사 그 곳에 있게 하소서
lines.id: Karena iman telah menangkap suara kegembiraan,

lines.en: Exceeding deep thine ev'ry thought;
lines.id: Nyanyian orang suci di tempat yang lebih tinggi.

lines.en: A foolish man knows not their worth,
lines.id: Tuhan, angkat aku dan biarkan aku berdiri

lines.en: Nor he whose mind is of the earth.
lines.id: Dengan iman di meja makan Surga,

lines.en: When as the grass the wicked grow,
lines.ko: 험하고 높은 이 길을 싸우며 나아갑니다
lines.id: Saya ingin mengukur ketinggian tertinggi,

lines.en: When sinners flourish here below,
lines.ko: 다시금 기도 하오니 내 주여 인도 하소서
lines.id: Dan menangkap pancaran cahaya yang cemerlang

lines.en: Then is there endless ruin nigh,
lines.ko: 내 주여 내 맘 붙드사 그 곳에 있게 하소서
lines.id: Tapi tetap saja aku akan berdoa sampai surga kutemukan,

lines.en: But thou, O Lord, art throned on high;
lines.id: "Tuhan, tuntunlah aku ke tempat yang lebih tinggi."

lines.en: Thy foes shall fall before thy might,
lines.id: Tuhan, angkat aku dan biarkan aku berdiri

lines.en: The wicked shall be put to flight.
lines.id: Dengan iman di meja makan Surga,

lines.en: The righteous man shall flourish well,
lines.ko: 내 주를 따라 올라가 저 높은 곳에 우뚝 서
lines.id: Tuhanku, aku akan mengikuti, sampai aku berdiri

lines.en: And in the house of God shall dwell;
lines.ko: 영원한 복락 누리며 즐거운 노래 부르리
lines.id: Berdiri di atas loteng itu-y dan,

lines.en: He shall be like a goodly tree,
lines.ko: 내 주여 내 맘 붙드사 그 곳에 있게 하소서
lines.id: Dan, diberkati selamanya, nyanyikan rahmat-Nya,

lines.en: And all his life shall fruitful be;
lines.id: Yang memimpin dan menempatkanku di tempat ini.

lines.en: For righteous is the Lord and just,
lines.id: Tuhan, angkat aku dan biarkan aku berdiri

lines.en: He is my Rock, in him I trust.
lines.id: Dengan iman di meja makan Surga,

title_en: Thy life was given for me

lines.en: Thy life was given for me,
Thy blood, O Lord, was shed,
That I might ransomed be,
And quickened from the dead;
Thy life was given for me;
What have I given for thee?
Long years were spent for me
In weariness and woe,
That through eternity
Thy glory I might know:
lines.ko: 나는 당신의 영광을 알 수 있습니다:

lines.en: Long years were spent for me;
Have I spent one for thee?
lines.ko: 내가 당신을 위해 한 푼이라도 썼나요?

lines.en: Thou, Lord, hast borne for me
More than my tongue can tell
lines.ko: 내 혀가 말할 수 있는 것보다 더 많은 걸

lines.en: Of bitt'rest agony,
To rescue me from hell;
Thou suff'redst all for me;
lines.ko: 당신은 나를 위해 모든 것을 참으셨습니다.

lines.en: What have I borne for thee?
And thou hast brought to me
Down from thy home above
Salvation full and free,
Thy pardon and thy love;
Great gifts thou broughtest me;
What have I brought to thee?
O let my life be given
My years for thee be spent;
lines.ko: 당신을 위한 나의 세월은 다 지나갔습니다.

lines.en: World-fetters all be riven
And joy with suff'ring blent:
Thou gav'st thyself for me,
lines.ko: 당신은 나를 위해 당신 자신을 바쳤습니다.

lines.en: I give myself to thee.

title_en: What shall I render to my God

lines.en: From Psalm 116:12-19
What shall I render to my God
For all his kindness shown?
My feet shall visit thine abode,
lines.ko: 내 발이 당신의 거처를 방문할 것입니다.

lines.en: My songs address thy throne.
How much is mercy thy delight,
Thou ever blessed God!
How dear thy servants in thy sight!
lines.ko: 당신의 종들이 당신 눈에는 얼마나 사랑스럽습니까!

lines.en: How precious is their blood!
How happy all thy servants are!
How great thy grace to me!
My life, which thou hast made thy care,
Lord, I devote to thee.
Now I am thine, for ever thine,
lines.ko: 이제 나는 당신의 것입니다. 영원히 당신의 것입니다.

lines.en: Nor shall my purpose move,
Thy hand hath loosed my bonds of pain,
lines.ko: 당신의 손이 나의 고통을 풀어 주셨고,

lines.en: And bound me with thy love.
Here in thy courts I leave my vow,
lines.ko: 여기 당신의 궁정에서 나는 서원을 남깁니다.

lines.en: And thy rich grace record;
Witness, ye saints who hear me now,
lines.ko: 증인이여, 지금 내 말을 듣고 있는 성도 여러분,

lines.en: If I forsake the Lord.

title_en: Saviour, thy dying love

lines.en: Saviour, thy dying love
lines.id: Penyelamat! Cintamu yang sekarat

lines.en: Thou gavest me,
lines.id: Engkau memberiku,

lines.id: Aku juga tidak boleh menahan diri,

lines.en: Dear Lord, from thee:
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, dariMu

lines.en: In love my soul would bow,
lines.id: Dalam cinta, jiwaku akan tunduk,

lines.en: My heart fulfil its vow,
lines.id: Hatiku memenuhi sumpahnya

lines.en: Some off'ring bring thee now,
lines.id: Beberapa persembahan membawakanMu sekarang,

lines.en: Something for thee.
lines.id: Sesuatu untukMu.

lines.en: O'er the blest mercy-seat,
lines.id: Di kursi belas kasihan yang terberkati,

lines.en: Pleading for me,
lines.id: Memohon padaku,

lines.en: Upward in faith I look,
lines.id: Raithku yang lemah mendongak,

lines.en: Jesus, to thee:
lines.id: Yesus, bagiMu,

lines.en: Help me the cross to bear,
lines.id: Bantu aku memikul salib,

lines.en: Thy wondrous love declare,
lines.id: Cintamu yang menakjubkan terungkap,

lines.en: Some song to raise, or prayer,
lines.id: Beberapa lagu untuk diangkat, atau doa,

lines.en: Something for thee.
lines.id: Sesuatu untukMu.

lines.en: Give me a faithful heart,
lines.id: Beri aku hati yang setia,

lines.en: Guided by thee,
lines.id: Dipandu oleh-Mu

lines.en: That each departing day
lines.id: Itu setiap hari keberangkatan

lines.en: Henceforth may see
lines.id: Untuk seterusnya mungkin akan terlihat

lines.en: Some work of love begun,
lines.id: Beberapa pekerjaan cinta dimulai,

lines.en: Some deed of kindness done,
lines.id: Beberapa perbuatan baik telah dilakukan,

lines.en: Some wand'rer sought and won,
lines.id: Beberapa pengembara mencari dan menang,

lines.en: Something for thee.
lines.id: Sesuatu untukMu.

lines.en: All that I am and have
lines.id: Semua yang saya miliki dan miliki-

lines.en: Thy gifts so free
lines.id: Hadiahmu sangat gratis-

lines.en: Ever in joy or grief,
lines.id: Dalam suka, duka, dalam hidup,

lines.en: My Lord, for thee;
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, untukmu!

lines.en: And when thy face I see,
lines.id: Dan ketika wajah-Mu kulihat,

lines.en: My ransomed soul shall be,
lines.id: Jiwaku yang terkoyak akan menjadi seperti itu

lines.en: Through all eternity,
lines.id: Melalui segala kekekalan,

lines.en: Offered to thee.
lines.id: Sesuatu untukMu. Amin.

title_en: Judge me, God of my salvation

lines.en: From Psalm 43
lines.id: Ketika kedamaian, seperti sungai, mengikuti jalanku,

lines.en: when sor-rows like sea- bil-lows roll
lines.id: ketika baris-baris kesedihan seperti gelombang laut bergulung

lines.en: what-ev-er my lot, Thou hast taught me to say,
lines.id: apa pun nasibku, Engkau telah mengajariku untuk berkata,

lines.en: "It is well, it is well with my soul"
lines.id: "Baiklah, baiklah jiwaku"

lines.en: It is well with my soul
lines.id: Jiwaku baik-baik saja

lines.en: It is well, it is well with my soul.
lines.id: Baiklah, baiklah dengan jiwaku.

lines.en: Judge me, God of my salvation,
lines.id: Setan yang tangguh harus dihajar, meskipun cobaan harus datang,

lines.en: Plead my cause, for thee I trust:
lines.id: Biarkan ini memberkati kendali jaminan,

lines.en: Hear my earnest supplication,
lines.id: Bahwa Kristus telah menghargai keadaanku yang tak berdaya,

lines.en: Save me from my foes unjust.
lines.id: Dan telah menumpahkan darah-Nya sendiri demi jiwaku.

lines.en: O my soul, why art thou grieving?
lines.id: Jiwaku baik-baik saja

lines.en: What disquiets and dismays?
lines.id: Baiklah, baiklah dengan jiwaku.

lines.en: Hope in God, his help receiving,
I shall yet my Saviour praise.
For my Strength, my God, thou art:
lines.id: Dosaku, oh berkah dari pemikiran mulia ini!

lines.en: Why am I cast off by thee
lines.id: Dosaku, bukan sebagian, tapi seluruhnya,

lines.en: In the sorrow of my heart,
lines.id: Dipakukan di kayu salib dan saya tidak menanggungnya lagi

lines.en: While the foe oppresses me?
lines.id: Puji Tuhan, puji Tuhan, hai jiwaku!

lines.en: Light and truth, my way attending,
lines.id: Jiwaku baik-baik saja

lines.en: Send thou forth to be my guide,
lines.id: Baiklah, baiklah dengan jiwaku.

lines.en: Till thy holy mount ascending,
I within thy house abide.
At thy sacred altar bending,
lines.id: Dan ya Tuhan, bersegeralah hari dimana iman akan terlihat,

lines.en: God, my God, my boundless joy,
lines.id: Awan digulung kembali seperti gulungan,

lines.en: Harp and voice, in worship blending,
lines.id: Terompet akan berbunyi kembali dan Tuhan akan turun,

lines.en: For thy praise will I employ.
lines.id: "Meski begitu" itu baik-baik saja dengan jiwaku.

lines.en: O my soul, why art thou grieving?
lines.id: Jiwaku baik-baik saja

lines.en: What disquiets and dismays?
lines.id: Baiklah, baiklah dengan jiwaku.

lines.en: Hope in God; his help receiving,
I shall yet my Saviour praise.

title_id: Saat Kedamaian, Bagaikan Sungai, Menghadiri Jalanku

title_en: To thee, O Lord, I lift mine eyes

lines.en: Psalm 123
To thee, O Lord, I lift mine eyes,
O thou enthroned above the skies;
As servants watch their master's hand,
Or maidens by their mistress stand,
lines.ko: 아니면 처녀들이 여주인 옆에 서 있거나,

lines.en: So to the Lord our eyes we raise,
lines.ko: 그러므로 우리는 주님을 향해 눈을 듭니다.

lines.en: Until his mercy he displays.
O Lord, our God, thy mercy show,
lines.ko: 오 주 우리 하느님, 당신의 자비를 보여 주소서.

lines.en: For man's contempt and scorn we know;
lines.ko: 사람이 멸시받고 멸시당하는 것을 우리는 알고 있습니다.

lines.en: Reproach and shame thy saints endure
From wicked men who dwell secure;
Man's proud contempt and scorn we know;
lines.ko: 인간의 교만한 경멸과 경멸을 우리는 알고 있습니다.

lines.en: O Lord, our God, thy mercy show.
lines.ko: 오 주 우리 하나님, 당신의 자비를 보여 주소서.

title_en: How long wilt thou forget me

lines.en: From Psalm 13
How long wilt thou forget me,
O Lord, thou God of grace?
How long shall fears beset me,
While darkness hides thy face?
How long shall griefs distress me
And turn my day to night?
How long shall foes oppress me
And triumph in their might?
lines.ko: 그리고 그들의 힘으로 승리를 거둘 것인가?

lines.en: O Lord my God, behold me,
lines.ko: 오 여호와 나의 하나님이여 나를 보소서

lines.en: And hear my earnest cries;
Lest sleep of death enfold me,
Enlighten thou mine eyes;
Lest now my foe insulting
Should boast of his success,
And enemies exulting
Rejoice in my distress.
But I with expectation
Have on thy grace relied;
My heart in thy salvation
lines.ko: 내 마음은 주의 구원 안에 있습니다

lines.en: Shall still with joy confide;
And I with voice of singing
Will praise the Lord above,
Who, richest bounties bringing,
Hast dealt with me in love.

title_en: Jesus, the very thought of thee

lines.en: Jesus, the very thought of thee
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, pikiranmu yang sebenarnya

lines.en: With sweetness fills my breast;
lines.ko: 주 얼굴 뵈올 때에야 얼마나 좋으랴
lines.id: Dengan manisnya memenuhi dadaku

lines.en: But sweeter far thy face to see,
lines.id: Namun jauh lebih manis melihat wajah-Mu,

lines.en: And in thy presence rest.
lines.id: Dan di hadirat-Mu istirahatlah.

lines.en: Nor voice can sing, nor heart can frame,
lines.id: Suara juga tidak dapat menyanyi, dan hati tidak dapat membingkai,

lines.en: Nor can the mem'ry find,
lines.ko: 천지에 있는 이름 중 비할 데 없도다
lines.id: Mem-'ry juga tidak dapat menemukannya

lines.en: A sweeter sound than thy blest Name,
lines.id: Suara yang lebih merdu dari nama-Mu yang terberkati,

lines.en: O Saviour of mankind.
lines.id: O Sav-iour of mankind!

lines.en: O Hope of ev'ry contrite heart,
lines.ko: 참 회개 하는 자에게 소망이 되시고
lines.id: Wahai Harapan dari setiap hati yang menyesal,

lines.en: O Joy of all the meek,
lines.id: Wahai Kegembiraan semua orang yang lemah lembut,

lines.en: To those who fall, how kind thou art!
lines.id: Kepada mereka yang bertanya, betapa baiknya Engkau!

lines.en: How good to those who seek!
lines.id: Betapa baiknya bagi mereka yang mencari!

lines.en: But what to those who find? Ah, this
lines.ko: 예수의 넓은 사랑을 어찌 다 말하랴
lines.id: Namun bagaimana dengan mereka yang menemukannya? Ah! ini

lines.en: Nor tongue nor pen can show:
lines.ko: 주 사랑 받은 사람만 그 사랑 알도다
lines.id: Baik lidah maupun pena tidak dapat terlihat.

lines.en: The love of Jesus, what it is
lines.id: Kasih Yesus, apa adanya,

lines.en: None but his loved ones know.
lines.id: Tidak seorang pun kecuali orang-orang yang dikasihi-Nya yang mengetahuinya.

lines.en: Jesus, our only Joy be thou,
lines.ko: 사랑의 구주 예수여 내 기쁨 되시고
lines.id: Ya Tuhan! satu-satunya kegembiraan kami adalah Engkau,

lines.en: As thou our Prize wilt be;
lines.id: Sesuai dengan Engkau, hadiah kami akan menjadi

lines.en: Jesus, be thou our Glory now,
lines.id: Ya Tuhan! jadilah Engkau kemuliaan kami sekarang,

lines.en: And through eternity.
lines.id: Dan melalui e-ter-ni-ty. Amin.

title_en: O Lord, I would delight in thee

lines.en: O Lord, I would delight in thee,
And on thy care depend;
To thee in ev'ry trouble flee,
My best, my only Friend.
When all created streams are dried,
Thy fulness is the same;
May I with this be satisfied,
And glory in thy Name.
No good in creatures can be found,
lines.ko: 피조물에서는 좋은 것을 찾을 수 없고,

lines.en: But may be found in thee;
I must have all things and abound,
lines.ko: 나는 모든 것을 갖고 풍부해야 하며,

lines.en: While God is God to me.
O that I had a stronger faith,
lines.ko: 오, 내가 더 강한 믿음을 가졌더라면,

lines.en: To look within the veil!
To credit what my Saviour saith,
Whose Word can never fail!
lines.ko: 그분의 말씀은 결코 실패할 수 없습니다!

lines.en: He that has made my heav'n secure,
Will here all good provide;
lines.ko: 여기에 모든 좋은 것이 제공될 것입니다.

lines.en: While Christ is rich, can I be poor?
lines.ko: 그리스도께서 부유하신데, 나는 가난할 수 있습니까?

lines.en: What can I want beside?
O Lord, I cast my care on thee;
lines.ko: 오 주님, 나는 당신께 나의 관심을 맡깁니다.

lines.en: I triumph and adore:
Henceforth my great concern shall be
To love and please thee more.
lines.ko: 당신을 더욱 사랑하고 기쁘게 해드리기 위해.

title_en: How sweet the Name of Jesus sounds

lines.en: How sweet the Name of Jesus sounds
In a believer's ear!
It soothes his sorrows, heals his wounds,
lines.ko: 그의 슬픔을 달래주고 그의 상처를 치유하며

lines.en: And drives away his fear.
It makes the wounded spirit whole,
And calms the troubled breast;
'Tis manna to the hungry soul,
And to the weary rest.
Dear Name! the Rock on which I build,
lines.ko: 친애하는 이름! 내가 그 위에 건축하는 반석,

lines.en: My Shield and hiding place,
My never-failing Treasury filled
lines.ko: 한 번도 실패하지 않는 나의 금고가 가득 찼어요

lines.en: With boundless stores of grace;
Jesus, my Shepherd, Brother, Friend,
My Prophet, Priest, and King,
My Lord, my Life, my Way, my End,
lines.ko: 나의 주님, 나의 생명, 나의 길, 나의 끝,

lines.en: Accept the praise I bring.
Weak is the effort of my heart,
And cold my warmest thought;
lines.ko: 그리고 나의 가장 따뜻한 생각은 차갑습니다.

lines.en: But when I see thee as thou art,
lines.ko: 그러나 내가 당신의 모습을 볼 때,

lines.en: I'll praise thee as I ought.
Till then I would thy love proclaim
With ev'ry fleeting breath;
And may the music of thy Name
Refresh my soul in death.
lines.ko: 죽음 속에서 내 영혼을 새롭게 하소서.

title_en: Jesus, these eyes have never seen
title_ko: 맙소사, 이 눈은 본 적이 없어 (자체번역)

lines.en: Jesus, these eyes have never seen
lines.ko: 맙소사, 이 눈은 본 적이 없어

lines.en: That radiant form of thine;
The veil of sense hangs dark between
lines.ko: 감각의 베일은 그 사이에 어둡게 드리워져 있습니다.

lines.en: Thy blessed face and mine.
I see thee not, I hear thee not,
lines.ko: 나는 당신을 보지 못하고, 당신의 말을 듣지 못합니다.

lines.en: Yet art thou oft with me;
lines.ko: 그러나 당신은 나와 자주 함께 계십니다.

lines.en: And earth hath ne'er so dear a spot
lines.ko: 그리고 지구는 그토록 소중한 곳이 아니었습니다

lines.en: As where I meet with thee.
Yet though I have not seen, and still
Must rest in faith alone;
I love thee, dearest Lord, and will,
Unseen, but not unknown.
When death these mortal eyes shall seal,
lines.ko: 죽음이 오면 이 필멸의 눈은 봉인될 것입니다.

lines.en: And still this throbbing heart,
The rending veil shall thee reveal,
All glorious as thou art.

title_en: Jesus, thy Name I love

lines.en: Jesus, thy Name I love
All other names above,
Jesus, my Lord:
O thou art all to me;
Nothing to please I see,
lines.ko: 내가 볼 때 기분 좋은 일은 하나도 없어

lines.en: Nothing apart from thee,
Jesus, my Lord.
Thou blessed Son of God,
Hast bought me with thy blood,
Jesus, my Lord:
O how great is thy love,
lines.ko: 오, 당신의 사랑이 어찌 그리 크신지요,

lines.en: All other loves above,
Love that I daily prove,
Jesus, my Lord.
When unto thee I flee,
Thou wilt my refuge be,
Jesus, my Lord:
What need I now to fear,
What earthly grief or care,
Since thou art ever near?
Jesus, my Lord.
Soon thou wilt come again;
I shall be happy then,
Jesus, my Lord:
Then thine own face I'll see,
lines.ko: 그러면 나는 당신의 얼굴을 보게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: Then I shall like thee be,
Then evermore with thee,
Jesus, my Lord.

title_en: My Jesus, I love thee
title_ko: 내 주 되신 주를 참 사랑하고

lines.en: My Jesus, I love thee, I know thou art mine;
lines.ko: 내 주 되신 주를 참 사랑하고
lines.id: Yesusku, aku cinta padaMu, aku tahu Engkau milikku

lines.en: For thee all the follies of sin I resign.
lines.id: BagiMu segala kebodohan dosa kutandatangani kembali.

lines.en: My gracious Redeemer, my Saviour art thou;
lines.id: Pertimbanganku yang Maha Pemurah, Penyelamatku adalah Engkau

lines.en: If ever I loved thee, my Jesus, 'tis now.
lines.id: Jika dulu aku mencintaiMu, Yesusku, sekaranglah saatnya.

lines.en: I love thee because thou hast first loved me,
lines.id: Aku mencintai-Mu karena Engkau yang lebih dulu mencintaiku,

lines.en: And purchased my pardon on Calvary's tree.
lines.id: Dan membeli pengampunanku di pohon Cal-va-ry.

lines.en: I love thee for wearing the thorns on thy brow;
lines.ko: 그 가시관 쓰신 내 주 뵈오니
lines.id: Aku mencintai-Mu karena memakai duri di alis-Mu

lines.en: If ever I loved thee, my Jesus, 'tis now.
lines.id: Jika dulu aku mencintaiMu, Yesusku, sekaranglah saatnya.

lines.en: I'll love thee in life, I will love thee in death;
lines.ko: 내 평생에 힘 쓸 그 큰 의무는
lines.id: Aku akan mencintai-Mu dalam hidup, aku akan mencintai-Mu dalam kematian

lines.en: And praise thee as long as thou lendest me breath;
lines.id: Dan pujilah Engkau selama Engkau memberiku nafas

lines.en: And say, when the death-dew lies cold on my brow:
lines.ko: 숨질 때에 까지 내 할 말씀은
lines.id: Dan katakanlah, ketika embun kematian terasa dingin di keningku

lines.en: If ever I loved thee, my Jesus, 'tis now.
lines.id: Jika dulu aku mencintaiMu, Yesusku, sekaranglah saatnya.

lines.en: In mansions of glory and endless delight,
lines.id: Di rumah-rumah mewah dan kesenangan tiada akhir,

lines.en: I'll ever adore thee in heaven so bright;
lines.id: Aku akan selalu memuja-Mu di surga yang begitu terang

lines.en: I'll sing with the glittering crown on my brow:
lines.ko: 금 면류관 쓰고 나 찬송할 말
lines.id: Aku akan bernyanyi dengan mahkota berkilauan di alisku

lines.en: If ever I loved thee, my Jesus, 'tis now.
lines.id: Jika dulu aku mencintaiMu, Yesusku, sekaranglah saatnya.

score_path: assets/scores/315_내 주 되신 주를 참 사랑하고.gif

title_en: More love to thee, O Christ

lines.en: More love to thee, O Christ,
lines.id: Lebih banyak cinta kepada-Mu, ya Kristus, Lebih banyak cinta kepada-Mu!

lines.en: More love to thee!
lines.id: Dengarlah doa yang kupanjatkan dengan lutut tertekuk

lines.en: Hear thou the prayer I make
lines.ko: 내 진정 소원이 내 구주 예수를
lines.id: Inilah permohonanku yang sungguh-sungguh, Lebih banyak cinta, ya Kristus, kepada-Mu,

lines.en: On bended knee;
lines.id: Lebih banyak cinta padamu, lebih banyak cinta padamu!

lines.en: This is my earnest plea,
More love, O Christ, to thee,
More love to thee,
More love to thee.
Once earthly joy I craved,
lines.id: Kenikmatan duniawi yang kuinginkan, Mencari kedamaian dan ketenangan

lines.en: Sought peace and rest;
lines.id: Kini hanya Engkau yang kucari, Berikan yang terbaik

lines.en: Now thee alone I seek;
lines.ko: 다만 내 비는 말 내 구주 예수를
lines.id: Ini semua doaku agar lebih banyak cinta, ya Kristus, kepada-Mu,

lines.en: Give what is best:
lines.id: Lebih banyak cinta padamu, lebih banyak cinta padamu!

lines.en: This all my prayer shall be,
More love, O Christ, to thee,
More love to thee,
More love to thee.
Let sorrow do its work,
lines.id: Maka nafas terakhirku akan membisikkan puji-pujian kepada-Mu

lines.en: Send grief and pain;
lines.id: Ini adalah seruan perpisahan yang akan membuat hatiku terangkat

lines.en: Sweet are thy messengers,
lines.ko: 다만 내 비는 말 내 구주 예수를
lines.id: Ini tetap doanya agar lebih banyak cinta, ya Kristus, kepada-Mu,

lines.en: Sweet their refrain,
lines.id: Lebih banyak cinta padamu, lebih banyak cinta padamu!

lines.en: When they can sing with me,
More love, O Christ, to thee,
More love to thee,
More love to thee.
Then shall my latest breath
Whisper thy praise;
This be the parting cry
My heart shall raise,
This still its prayer shall be,
More love, O Christ, to thee,
More love to thee,
More love to thee.

title_id: Lebih Banyak Kasih KepadaMu, ya Kristus

title_en: Jesus, thou Joy of loving hearts

lines.en: Jesus, thou Joy of loving hearts,
Thou Fount of life, thou Light of men,
From the best bliss that earth imparts
We turn unfilled to thee again.
lines.ko: 우리는 채워지지 않은 채 다시 당신께로 돌아갑니다.

lines.en: Thy truth unchanged hath ever stood;
Thou savest those that on thee call;
To them that seek thee thou art good,
To them that find thee all in all.
We taste thee, O thou living Bread,
lines.ko: 우리는 당신을 맛봅니다, 오 당신의 살아 있는 빵이여,

lines.en: And long to feast upon thee still;
lines.ko: 그리고 여전히 당신을 향하여 잔치를 벌이기를 갈망합니다.

lines.en: We drink of thee, the Fountainhead,
And thirst our souls from thee to fill.
lines.ko: 그리고 우리 영혼을 당신에게서 채우려고 목말라 합니다.

lines.en: Our restless spirits yearn for thee,
Where'er our changeful lot is cast;
Glad when thy gracious smile we see,
Blest when our faith can hold thee fast.
lines.ko: 우리의 믿음이 당신을 굳게 붙들 수 있을 때 축복을 받습니다.

lines.en: O Jesus, ever with us stay,
lines.ko: 오 예수여, 언제나 우리와 함께 계십시오.

lines.en: Make all our moments calm and bright;
lines.ko: 우리의 모든 순간을 차분하고 밝게 만드십시오.

lines.en: Chase the dark night of sin away,
Shed o'er the world thy holy light.

alt_titles: Jesus, thou Joy of loving hearts (tune 2)

title_en: Jesus, priceless treasure

lines.en: Jesus, priceless treasure,
lines.ko: 주는 귀한 보배 참 기쁨의 근원 참 된 내 친구
lines.id: Yesus, Harta yang tak ternilai harganya, Sumber kesenangan paling murni,

lines.en: Fount of purest pleasure,
lines.ko: 갈급한 내 마음 주를 사모하여 목이 탑니다
lines.id: Sahabat sejati bagiku,

lines.en: Truest friend to me:
lines.ko: 흠이 없는 어린 양 그 품 안에 괴롬 없어
lines.id: Lama hatiku terengah-engah, Hingga nyaris pingsan,

lines.en: Ah, how long in anguish
lines.id: Haus setelah Engkau.

lines.en: Shall my spirit languish,
lines.id: Akulah milikmu, hai Anak Domba yang tak bernoda,

lines.en: Yearning, Lord, for thee?
lines.id: Aku tidak akan menderita apa pun untuk menyembunyikan Dikau,

lines.en: Thine I am, O spotless Lamb!
lines.id: Jangan meminta apa pun di sisi-Mu.

lines.en: I will suffer naught to hide thee,
Naught I ask beside thee.
In thine arms I rest me;
lines.ko: 주의 품에 안겨 편히 쉬는 나를 누가 해치랴
lines.id: Di tangan-Mu kuistirahatkan aku, Musuh-musuh yang akan menganiaya aku

lines.en: Foes who would molest me
lines.ko: 땅이 흔들리고 모두 떨지라도 겁낼 것 없네
lines.id: Tidak dapat menghubungi saya di sini.

lines.en: Cannot reach me here.
lines.id: Sekalipun bumi berguncang, setiap hati gemetar,

lines.en: Though the earth be shaking,
lines.id: Tuhan menghilangkan rasa takut kita

lines.en: Ev'ry heart be quaking,
lines.id: Dosa dan neraka dalam konflik pun jatuh

lines.en: Jesus calms my fear.
lines.id: Dengan badai terberat yang menghadang kita:

lines.en: Lightnings flash and thunders crash;
lines.id: Yesus tidak akan mengecewakan kita.

lines.en: Yet, though sin and hell assail me,
Jesus will not fail me.
Satan, I defy thee;
lines.ko: 기쁨의 주 예수 우리 함께하니 슬픔 없어라
lines.id: Oleh karena itu, semua pikiran tentang kesedihan! Demi Tuhan yang penuh kegembiraan,

lines.en: Death, I now decry thee;
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, masuklah

lines.en: Fear, I bid thee cease.
lines.ko: 무슨 일을 만나도 주 안에는 기쁨 있네
lines.id: Mereka yang mengasihi Bapa, Meski badai menerpa,

lines.en: World, thou shalt not harm me
lines.id: Masih memiliki kedamaian di dalam.

lines.en: Nor thy threats alarm me
lines.id: Ya, apa pun yang harus kita tanggung di sini,

lines.en: While I sing of peace.
lines.id: Masih pada-Mu terletak kesenangan paling murni,

lines.en: God's great pow'r guards ev'ry hour;
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, Harta yang tak ternilai harganya! Amin.

lines.en: Earth and all its depths adore him,
Silent bow before him.
Hence with earthly treasure!
Thou art all my pleasure,
Jesus, all my choice.
Hence, thou empty glory!
Naught to me thy story,
Told with tempting voice.
Pain or loss or shame or cross
Shall not from my Saviour move me,
Since he deigns to love me.
Hence, all fear and sadness!
For the Lord of gladness,
Jesus, enters in.
Those who love the Father,
Though the storms may gather,
Still have peace within.
Yea, whate'er I here must bear,
Thou art still my purest pleasure,
Jesus, priceless treasure.

title_id: Yesus, Harta yang Tak Ternilai harganya

title_en: Hiding in thee, hiding in thee

lines.en: O safe to the Rock that is higher than I
lines.id: Wahai Zi-on, cepatlah, misimu tercapai,

lines.en: My soul in its conflicts and sorrows would fly;
lines.id: Untuk memberitahukan kepada seluruh dunia bahwa Tuhan adalah Cahaya

lines.en: So sinful, so weary, thine, thine would I be;
lines.id: Bahwa Dia yang menjadikan segala bangsa tidak menghendakinya

lines.en: Thou blest Rock of Ages, I'm hiding in thee.
lines.id: Satu jiwa harus binasa, tersesat dalam bayang-bayang malam.

lines.en: Pub-lish glad tid-ings, ti-dings of peace,
lines.id: Publikasikan kabar gembira, kabar perdamaian,

lines.en: Ti-dings of Je-sus, re-demp-tion and re-lease.
lines.id: Kabar tentang Yesus, penebusan kembali dan penyewaan kembali.

lines.en: Hiding in thee, hiding in thee
lines.id: Lihatlah betapa masih banyak ribuan pasir yang berbohong

lines.en: Thou blest Rock of Ages, I'm hiding in thee.
lines.ko: 하도 많아 다 셀 수 없구나
lines.id: Terikat dalam kegelapan—penjara di rumah dosa,

lines.en: With none to tell them of the Sav-iour's dy-ing,
lines.ko: 이 형제들 다 건져 내기 위해
lines.id: Tanpa ada yang memberitahu mereka tentang kematian Juruselamat,

lines.en: Or of the life He died for them to win.
lines.id: Atau kehidupan yang Dia mati agar mereka menangkan.

lines.en: Pub-lish glad tid-ings, ti-dings of peace,
lines.id: Publikasikan kabar gembira, kabar perdamaian,

lines.en: Ti-dings of Je-sus, re-demp-tion and re-lease.
lines.id: Kabar tentang Yesus, penebusan kembali dan penyewaan kembali.

lines.en: In the calm of the noontide, in sorrow's lone hour,
lines.id: Proklamasikan kepada setiap orang, bahasa, dan bangsa

lines.en: In times when temptation casts o'er me its power,
lines.id: Tuhan yang di dalamnya mereka hidup dan bergerak adalah Cinta:

lines.en: In the tempests of life, on its wide, heaving sea,
lines.id: Ceritakan bagaimana Dia membungkuk untuk menyelamatkan ciptaan-Nya yang hilang,

lines.en: Thou blest Rock of Ages, I'm hiding in thee.
lines.id: Dan mati di makan agar manusia bisa hidup di atas.

lines.en: Pub-lish glad tid-ings, ti-dings of peace,
lines.id: Publikasikan kabar gembira, kabar perdamaian,

lines.en: Ti-dings of Je-sus, re-demp-tion and re-lease.
lines.id: Kabar tentang Yesus, penebusan kembali dan penyewaan kembali.

lines.en: How oft in the conflict, when pressed by the foe,
lines.id: Berikan putra-putramu untuk menyampaikan pesan mulia

lines.en: I have fled to my refuge and breathed out my woe!
lines.id: Berikanlah hartamu untuk mempercepat perjalanan mereka

lines.en: How often when trials like sea-billows roll,
lines.id: Curahkan jiwamu untuk mereka dalam doa kemenangan

lines.en: Have I hidden in thee, O thou Rock of my soul!
lines.id: Dan semua yang kamu belanjakan akan dibayar kembali oleh Yesus.

lines.en: Pub-lish glad tid-ings, ti-dings of peace,
lines.id: Publikasikan kabar gembira, kabar perdamaian,

lines.en: Ti-dings of Je-sus, re-demp-tion and re-lease.
lines.id: Kabar tentang Yesus, penebusan kembali dan penyewaan kembali.

alt_titles: O safe to the Rock that is higher than I

title_en: O Jesus, I have promised

lines.en: O Jesus, I have promised
lines.ko: 이 세상 끝 날까지 주 섬겨 살리니
lines.id: Ya Yesus, aku telah berjanji

lines.en: To serve thee to the end;
lines.ko: 내 친구 되신 주여 늘 함께 하소서
lines.id: Untuk melayani Engkau sampai akhir

lines.en: Be thou for ever near me,
lines.ko: 주 나와 함께 하면 전쟁도 겁 없고
lines.id: Jadilah Engkau selamanya di dekatku,

lines.en: My Master and my Friend:
lines.ko: 주 나를 인도 하면 늘 안심하리라
lines.id: Tuanku dan Temanku:

lines.en: I shall not fear the battle
lines.id: Saya tidak akan takut dengan pertempuran itu

lines.en: If thou art by my side,
lines.id: Jika Engkau ada di sisiku,

lines.en: Nor wander from the pathway
lines.id: Juga tidak menyimpang dari jalan setapak

lines.en: If thou wilt be my guide.
lines.id: Jika Engkau mau menjadi Pembimbingku.

lines.en: O let me feel thee near me,
lines.ko: 나 주를 따를 때에 주 약속하신 것
lines.id: Ya Yesus, sementara aku mengikuti

lines.en: The world is ever near;
lines.id: Sesuai dengan firman-Mu

lines.en: I see the sights that dazzle,
lines.ko: 나 주의 뒤를 따라 섬기며 살리니
lines.id: Penuhi setiap janji yang berharga

lines.en: The tempting sounds I hear:
lines.ko: 그 크신 은혜 속에 날 인도 하소서
lines.id: Dalam kemuliaan seperti yang pernah saya dengar

lines.en: My foes are ever near me,
lines.id: Dan tetap saja aku akan mengikuti setelahnya,

lines.en: Around me and within;
lines.id: Untuk melayani Engkau sepanjang hariku

lines.en: But, Jesus, draw thou nearer,
lines.id: Jika Engkau, dalam kasih karunia yang berlimpah

lines.en: And shield my soul from sin.
lines.id: Tapi tuntunlah aku di jalan.

lines.en: O Jesus, thou hast promised
lines.ko: 이 세상 온갖 시험 내 맘을 흔들고
lines.id: O biarkan aku merasakan Engkau di dekatku,

lines.en: To all who follow thee
lines.id: Dunia sudah dekat

lines.en: That where thou art in glory
lines.ko: 주 나를 돌보시사 내 방패 되시고
lines.id: Aku melihat pemandangan yang mempesona,

lines.en: There shall my servant be;
lines.ko: 내 옆에 계신 것을 늘 알게 하소서
lines.id: Suara menggoda yang kudengar

lines.en: And, Jesus, I have promised
lines.id: Musuhku selalu ada di dekatku,

lines.en: To serve thee to the end;
lines.id: Di sekelilingku dan di dalam

lines.en: O give me grace to follow,
lines.id: Tapi, Yesus, mendekatlah pada-Mu,

lines.en: My Master and my Friend.
lines.id: Dan lindungi jiwaku dari dosa.

lines.ko: 저 영광 빛난 곳을 주 허락 했으니
lines.id: Ya Yesus, Engkau telah berjanji

lines.ko: 그 허락 하신 곳을 늘 사모 합니다
lines.id: Kepada semua orang yang mengikuti-Mu,

lines.ko: 끝까지 쉬지 않고 주 따라 가리니
lines.id: Di situlah Engkau berada dalam kemuliaan

lines.ko: 주 넓은 사랑으로 늘 인도 하소서 아멘
lines.id: Di sanalah hamba-Mu akan berada
Dan, Yesus, aku telah berjanji
Untuk melayani Engkau sampai akhir
O, beri aku rahmat untuk mengikuti,
Tuanku dan Temanku, A-men.

title_en: Thou art my hiding-place, O Lord

lines.en: Thou art my hiding place, O Lord,
In thee I put my trust;
Encouraged by thy holy Word,
A feeble child of dust:
I have no argument beside,
I urge no other plea;
And 'tis enough my Saviour died,
My Saviour died for me.
When storms of fierce temptation beat,
And furious foes assail,
My refuge is the mercy-seat,
My hope within the veil.
From strife of tongues and bitter words
My spirit flies to thee:
Joy to my heart the thought affords,
lines.ko: 생각이 주는 기쁨은 내 마음에 있고,

lines.en: My Saviour died for me.
'Mid trials heavy to be borne,
When mortal strength is vain,
A heart with grief and anguish torn,
A body racked with pain,
Ah! what could give the suff'rer rest,
lines.ko: 아! 무엇이 환자에게 휴식을 줄 수 있겠는가?

lines.en: Bid ev'ry murmur flee,
But this, the witness in my breast
That Jesus died for me.
And when thine awful voice commands
lines.ko: 그리고 너의 끔찍한 목소리가 명령을 내릴 때

lines.en: This body to decay,
And life, in its last lingering sands,
lines.ko: 그리고 인생은 마지막 남은 모래 속에서,

lines.en: Is ebbing fast away,
Then, though it be in accents weak,
And faint and tremblingly,
O give me strength in death to speak,
lines.ko: 오, 죽음 속에서도 말할 수 있는 힘을 주소서.

lines.en: My Saviour died for me.

title_en: As pants the hart for cooling streams

lines.en: From Psalm 42
As pants the hart for cooling streams
When heated in the chase,
So longs my soul, O God, for thee,
lines.ko: 오 하나님, 내 영혼이 당신을 갈망합니다.

lines.en: And thy refreshing grace.
For thee, my God, the living God,
My thirsty soul doth pine;
lines.ko: 나의 목마른 영혼이 소나무를 삼키고 있습니다.

lines.en: O when shall I behold thy face,
lines.ko: 오 내가 언제 주의 얼굴을 뵈오리이까

lines.en: Thou Majesty Divine!
Why restless, why cast down, my soul?
lines.ko: 내 영혼이여, 왜 불안하고, 왜 낙담합니까?

lines.en: Trust God; and he'll employ
lines.ko: 하나님을 신뢰하십시오. 그리고 그 사람은 고용할 거야

lines.en: His aid for thee, and change these sighs
lines.ko: 당신을 위한 그분의 도움, 그리고 이 한숨을 바꾸십시오

lines.en: To thankful hymns of joy.
Why restless, why cast down, my soul?
lines.ko: 내 영혼이여, 왜 불안하고, 왜 낙담합니까?

lines.en: Hope still; and thou shalt sing
lines.ko: 아직도 희망이 있습니다. 그리고 너는 노래할지니라

lines.en: The praise of him who is thy God,
Thy health's eternal spring.

title_en: Teach me, my God and King
title_ko: 나의 왕이신 하느님, 저에게 가르쳐 주십시오. (자체번역)

lines.en: Teach me, my God and King,
lines.ko: 나의 왕이신 하느님, 저에게 가르쳐 주십시오.

lines.en: In all things thee to see,
And what I do in anything,
To do it as for thee.
A man that looks on glass,
On it may stay his eye,
lines.ko: 그것에 그의 눈이 머무를 수도 있고,

lines.en: Or, if he pleaseth, through it pass,
And then the heav'n espy.
All may of thee partake:
Nothing can be so mean
lines.ko: 그 어떤 것도 그렇게 의미심장할 수는 없어

lines.en: Which with this motive, "For thy sake,"
Will not grow bright and clean.
This is the famous stone
That turneth all to gold;
For that which God doth touch and own
Cannot for less be told.

title_en: O God, thou art my God alone

lines.en: From Psalm 63:1-8 and 73:25
O God, thou art my God alone;
lines.ko: 오 하나님, 당신은 홀로 나의 하나님이십니다.

lines.en: Early to thee my soul shall cry;
lines.ko: 내 영혼이 일찍 당신께 부르짖을 것입니다.

lines.en: A pilgrim in a land unknown,
A thirsty land whose springs are dry.
O that it were as it hath been!
When, praying in the holy place,
Thy pow'r and glory I have seen,
And marked the footsteps of thy grace.
Yet, through this rough and thorny maze,
lines.ko: 하지만 이 거칠고 가시밭인 미로를 뚫고

lines.en: I follow hard on thee, my God:
lines.ko: 나의 하나님, 나는 당신을 열심히 따릅니다.

lines.en: Thy hand, unseen, upholds my ways;
lines.ko: 눈에 보이지 않는 당신의 손이 내 길을 붙드십니다.

lines.en: I safely tread where thou hast trod.
lines.ko: 나는 당신이 밟은 곳을 안전하게 밟습니다.

lines.en: Thee, in the watches of the night,
When I remember on my bed,
Thy presence makes the darkness light,
Thy guardian wings are round my head.
lines.ko: 당신의 수호 날개가 내 머리 주위에 있습니다.

lines.en: Better than life itself thy love,
lines.ko: 생명 그 자체보다 더 나은 당신의 사랑,

lines.en: Dearer than all beside to me:
lines.ko: 내 옆에 있는 모든 것보다 더 소중한:

lines.en: For whom have I in heav'n above,
lines.ko: 나는 누구를 위해 높은 하늘에 있는가?

lines.en: Or what on earth, compared to thee?
Praise with my heart, my mind, my voice,
lines.ko: 내 마음으로, 내 뜻으로, 내 목소리로 찬양해

lines.en: For all thy mercy I will give;
lines.ko: 나는 당신의 모든 자비를 베풀 것입니다.

lines.en: My soul shall still in God rejoice;
lines.ko: 내 영혼은 여전히 ​​하나님 안에서 기뻐할 것입니다.

lines.en: My tongue shall bless thee while I live.
lines.ko: 내가 사는 동안 내 혀가 당신을 축복할 것입니다.

title_en: In sweet communion, Lord, with thee
title_ko: 주님, 당신과 함께 감미로운 교제를 나누십시오 (자체번역)

lines.en: From Psalm 73:23-28
In sweet communion, Lord, with thee
lines.ko: 주님, 당신과 함께 감미로운 교제를 나누십시오

lines.en: I constantly abide;
My hand thou holdest in thine own
To keep me near thy side.
lines.ko: 나를 당신 곁에 머물게 하기 위해.

lines.en: Thy counsel through my earthly way
lines.ko: 나의 세상적인 길을 통한 당신의 조언

lines.en: Shall guide me and control,
And then to glory afterward
Thou wilt receive my soul.
Whom have I, Lord, in heav'n but thee,
lines.ko: 주님, 하늘에서 당신 외에 나에게 누가 있겠습니까?

lines.en: To whom my thoughts aspire?
And, having thee, on earth is nought
lines.ko: 그리고 당신을 갖는 것은 지구상에서 아무것도 아닙니다

lines.en: That I can yet desire.
lines.ko: 나는 아직 그것을 원할 수 있습니다.

lines.en: Though flesh and heart should faint and fail,
The Lord will ever be
The strength and portion of my heart,
My God eternally.
To live apart from God is death,
'Tis good his face to seek;
lines.ko: 그의 얼굴을 찾는 것은 좋은 일입니다.

lines.en: My refuge is the living God,
His praise I long to speak.

title_en: Who trusts in God, a strong abode

lines.en: Who trusts in God, a strong abode
In heav'n and earth possesses;
Who looks in love to Christ above,
lines.ko: 위에 계신 그리스도를 사랑으로 바라보는 자는

lines.en: No fear his heart oppresses.
lines.ko: 그의 마음이 억압되는 것을 두려워하지 마십시오.

lines.en: In thee alone, dear Lord, we own
lines.ko: 사랑하는 주님, 오직 당신 안에만 우리가 있습니다

lines.en: Sweet hope and consolation;
Our shield from foes, our balm for woes,
lines.ko: 적으로부터의 우리의 방패, 비애에 대한 우리의 향유,

lines.en: Our great and sure salvation.
Though Satan's wrath beset our path,
And worldly scorn assail us,
While thou art near we will not fear,
lines.ko: 당신이 가까이 계시는 동안 우리는 두려워하지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: Thy strength shall never fail us:
lines.ko: 당신의 힘은 결코 우리를 실망시키지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: Thy rod and staff shall keep us safe,
lines.ko: 주의 지팡이와 지팡이가 우리를 안전하게 지키시리이다

lines.en: And guide our steps for ever;
Nor shades of death, nor hell beneath,
lines.ko: 죽음의 그늘도 없고 그 아래 지옥도 없고

lines.en: Our souls from thee shall sever.
In all the strife of mortal life
Our feet shall stand securely;
Temptation's hour shall lose its power,
lines.ko: 유혹의 시간은 그 힘을 잃을 것이다.

lines.en: For thou shalt guard us surely.
O God, renew, with heav'nly dew,
lines.ko: 오 하나님, 하늘의 이슬로 새롭게 하소서.

lines.en: Our body, soul, and spirit,
Until we stand at thy right hand,
Through Jesus' saving merit.

title_en: Cast thy burden on the Lord

lines.en: Cast thy burden on the Lord,
lines.id: Her-alds of Christ, yang mengemban perintah Raja

lines.en: Only lean upon his word;
lines.id: Kabar abadi ada di tangan fanamu,

lines.en: Thou wilt soon have cause to bless
lines.id: Sampaikan dan sebarkan dengan cepat berita yang kamu bawa:

lines.en: His eternal faithfulness.
lines.id: Luruskan, luruskan jalan raya Raja.

lines.en: He sustains thee by his hand,
lines.id: Melalui jalan gurun, rawa gelap, dan rawa yang dalam,

lines.en: He enables thee to stand;
lines.id: Melewati hutan belantara, lautan yang lamban, dan celah gunung,

lines.en: Those whom Jesus once hath loved
lines.id: Bangunlah jalanmu, dan jangan goyah, jangan pula tinggal diam

lines.en: From his grace are never moved.
lines.id: Persiapkanlah melintasi bumi jalan raya Raja.

lines.en: Human counsels come to naught;
lines.id: Tuhan, berilah kami iman dan kekuatan untuk membangun jalan,

lines.en: That shall stand which God hath wrought;
lines.id: Untuk melihat janji hari ini terpenuhi,

lines.en: His compassion love, and power
lines.id: Ketika perang tidak ada lagi dan perselisihan akan berhenti

lines.en: Are the same for evermore.
lines.id: Di jalan raya Pangeran perdamaian. Amin.

lines.en: Heav'n and earth may pass away,
God's free grace shall not decay;
He hath promised to fulfil
All the pleasure of his will.
Jesus, Guardian of thy flock,
Be thyself our constant rock;
Make us, by thy powerful hand,
Strong as Zion's mountain stand.

title_id: Pemberita Kristus, yang Memikul Perintah Raja

title_en: Commit thou all thy griefs and ways

lines.en: Commit thou all thy griefs
And ways into his hands;
To his sure truth and tender care,
Who earth and heav'n commands.
Who points the clouds their course,
Whom winds and seas obey,
He shall direct thy wandering feet,
lines.ko: 그분께서 네 방황하는 발을 지도하실 것이며,

lines.en: He shall prepare thy way.
Give to the winds thy fears;
Hope, and be undismayed;
God hears thy sighs, and counts thy tears,
lines.ko: 하나님은 네 한숨을 들으시고 네 눈물을 세시며

lines.en: God shall lift up thy head.
What though thou rulest not?
Yet heav'n and earth and hell
Proclaim, God sitteth on the throne,
And ruleth all things well.
Leave to his sovereign sway
To choose and to command;
So shalt thou wond'ring own, his way
lines.ko: 그러니 당신은 그의 방식을 소유하게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: How wise, how strong his hand!
lines.ko: 그분의 손은 얼마나 지혜로우며 얼마나 강한지요!

title_en: How gentle God's commands

lines.en: How gentle God's commands,
How kind his precepts are!
Come, cast your burdens on the Lord,
And trust his constant care.
While providence supports,
Let saints securely dwell;
That hand, which bears all nature up,
Shall guide his children well.
Why should this anxious load
lines.ko: 왜 이 불안한 짐을 져야 하는가?

lines.en: Press down your weary mind?
Haste to your heav'nly Father's throne,
lines.ko: 하늘에 계신 아버지의 보좌로 서둘러 가십시오.

lines.en: And sweet communion find.
His goodness stands approved,
Down to the present day;
I'll drop my burden at his feet,
lines.ko: 내 짐을 그 발 앞에 내려 놓으리라

lines.en: And bear a song away.

title_en: Father, whate'er of earthly bliss

lines.en: Father, whate'er of earthly bliss
Thy sovereign will denies,
Accepted at thy throne of grace,
Let this petition rise:
Give me a calm, a thankful heart,
From ev'ry murmur free;
The blessings of thy grace impart,
And make me live to thee.
Let the sweet hope that thou art mine
lines.ko: 당신이 내 것이라는 달콤한 희망을 가지십시오

lines.en: My life and death attend;
Thy presence through my journey shine,
lines.ko: 나의 여행을 통해 당신의 존재가 빛나고,

lines.en: And crown my journey's end.

title_en: How great the goodness kept in store

lines.en: From Psalm 31:19-24
How great the goodness kept in store
For those who fear thee and adore
In meek humility.
How great the deeds with mercy fraught
Which openly thy hand has wrought
lines.ko: 이는 주의 손으로 공개적으로 이루신 것입니다

lines.en: For those who trust in thee.
Secured by thine unfailing grace,
In thee they find a hiding place
When foes their plots devise;
A sure retreat thou wilt prepare,
And keep them safely sheltered there,
lines.ko: 그리고 그들을 그곳에 안전하게 보호해 주세요.

lines.en: When strife of tongues shall rise.
Blest be the Lord, for he has showed,
While giving me a safe abode,
His love beyond compare;
Although his face he seemed to hide,
lines.ko: 비록 그의 얼굴은 숨겨져 있는 것처럼 보였지만,

lines.en: He ever heard me when I cried,
lines.ko: 내가 울 때 그 사람은 내 말을 들어본 적이 있어요.

lines.en: And made my wants his care.
lines.ko: 그리고 내가 원하는 것을 그의 관심으로 만들었습니다.

lines.en: Ye saints, Jehovah love and serve,
For he the faithful will preserve,
And shield from men of pride;
Be strong, and let your hearts be brave,
All ye that wait for him to save,
In God the Lord confide.

title_en: What time I am afraid

lines.en: From Psalm 56:3-4, 11-13
What time I am afraid
I put my trust in thee;
In God I rest, and praise
His Word, so rich and free.
In God I put my trust,
I neither doubt nor fear,
For man can never harm
lines.ko: 사람은 결코 해를 끼칠 수 없기 때문이다

lines.en: With God, my Helper, near.
In God, the Lord, I rest,
His Word of grace I praise,
His promise stands secure,
Nor fear nor foe dismays.
Upon me are thy vows,
O God, in whom I live;
lines.ko: 오 하나님, 내가 그 안에 살고 있습니다.

lines.en: The sacrifice of praise
To thee I now will give.
For thou hast saved from death,
From falling kept me free,
That in the light of life
My walk may be with thee.
lines.ko: 나의 산책은 당신과 함께 할 수 있습니다.

title_en: Before thy people I confess

lines.en: From Psalm 40:9-11, 16-17
Before thy people I confess
The wonders of thy righteousness;
Thou knowest, Lord, that I have made
lines.ko: 여호와여 내가 만든 것을 주께서 아시나이다

lines.en: Thy great salvation known,
Thy truth and faithfulness displayed,
Thy lovingkindness shown.
Withhold not thou thy grace from me,
O Lord, thy mercy let me see,
lines.ko: 오 주님, 당신의 자비를 나에게 보여 주소서.

lines.en: To me thy lovingkindness show,
Thy truth be still my stay;
lines.ko: 당신의 진리가 여전히 나의 체류가 되어 주소서.

lines.en: Let them preserve me where I go,
lines.ko: 내가 가는 곳마다 그들이 나를 보호하게 해주세요.

lines.en: And keep me ev'ry day.
Let all who seek to see thy face
lines.ko: 주의 얼굴을 구하는 자마다 주의 얼굴을 보게 하소서

lines.en: Be glad and joyful in thy grace;
Let those who thy salvation love
Forevermore proclaim:
O praise the Lord who dwells above,
And magnify his name.
Although I poor and needy be,
The Lord in love takes thought for me;
Thou art my help in time of need,
lines.ko: 당신은 필요할 때 나의 도움이 되시며,

lines.en: My Saviour, Lord, art thou;
Then, O my God, I pray, I plead:
lines.ko: 그렇다면 오 나의 하나님, 나는 기도하고 간구합니다.

lines.en: Stay not, but save me now.

title_en: Call Jehovah thy salvation

lines.en: From Psalm 91
Call Jehovah thy Salvation,
Rest beneath th'Almighty's shade,
lines.ko: 전능하신 하나님의 그늘 아래서 편히 쉬소서

lines.en: In his secret habitation
Dwell, and never be dismayed:
There no tumult shall alarm thee,
lines.ko: 어떤 소란도 당신을 놀라게 하지 못할 것입니다.

lines.en: Thou shalt dread no hidden snare:
lines.ko: 너는 숨겨진 올무를 두려워하지 않을 것이다.

lines.en: Guile nor violence can harm thee,
lines.ko: 교활함이나 폭력도 당신에게 해를 끼칠 수 없습니다.

lines.en: In eternal safeguard there.
From the sword at noonday wasting,
From the noisome pestilence,
In the depth of midnight blasting,
God shall be thy sure Defence:
He shall charge his angel legions
lines.ko: 그는 그의 천사 군단을 지휘할 것이다

lines.en: Watch and ward o'er thee to keep;
Though thou walk through hostile regions,
Though in desert wilds thou sleep.
lines.ko: 비록 사막의 황야에서 당신은 잠을 자고 있습니다.

lines.en: Since, with pure and firm affection
Thou on God hast set thy love,
With the wings of his protection
He will shield thee from above:
lines.ko: 그분께서 너를 위에서 보호해 주실 것이다.

lines.en: Thou shalt call on him in trouble,
He will hearken, he will save;
Here for grief reward thee double,
lines.ko: 여기서 슬픔에 대한 보상으로 두 배로 보상받으십시오.

lines.en: Crown with life beyond the grave.

title_en: If thou but suffer God to guide thee

lines.en: If thou but suffer God to guide thee,
lines.ko: 너 하나님께 이끌리어 일평생 주만 바라면
lines.id: Jika kamu membiarkan Tuhan membimbingmu

lines.en: And hope in him through all thy ways,
lines.ko: 너 어려울 때 힘 주시고 언제나 지켜주시리
lines.id: Dan berharaplah kepada-Nya melalui segala jalanmu,

lines.en: He'll give thee strength, whatever betide thee,
lines.ko: 주 크신 사랑 믿는 자 그 반석 위에 서리라
lines.id: Dia akan memberimu kekuatan, apa pun yang ada di sampingmu,

lines.en: And bear thee through the evil days:
lines.id: Dan membawamu melewati hari-hari yang jahat.

lines.en: Who trusts in God's unchanging love
lines.id: Siapa yang percaya pada kasih Tuhan yang tidak berubah

lines.en: Builds on the rock that naught can move.
lines.id: Dibangun di atas batu yang tidak dapat digerakkan oleh apa pun.

lines.en: What can these anxious cares avail thee,
lines.ko: 너 설레는 맘 가다듬고 희망 중 기다리면서
lines.id: Taatilah hatimu yang gelisah, tenanglah

lines.en: These never-ceasing moans and sighs?
lines.ko: 그 은혜로신 주의 뜻과 사랑에 만족 하여라
lines.id: dan menunggu dengan penuh harapan ceria Untuk mengambil apa pun

lines.en: What can it help, if thou bewail thee
lines.ko: 우리를 불러 주신 주 마음의 소원 아신다
lines.id: Kehendak-Nya yang penuh rahmat

lines.en: O'er each dark moment as it flies?
lines.id: Kasih-Nya yang penuh pengertian tidak mengirimkan keraguan

lines.en: Our cross and trials do but press
lines.id: keinginan kita yang paling banyak diketahui

lines.en: The heavier for our bitterness.
lines.id: Kepada dia yang memilih kita untuk dirinya sendiri

lines.en: Only be still, and wait his leisure
lines.ko: 주 찬양하고 기도하며 네 본분 힘써 다하라
lines.id: Bernyanyi, berdoa,

lines.en: In cheerful hope, with heart content
lines.ko: 주 약속하신 모든 은혜 네게서 이뤄지리라
lines.id: dan jangan menyimpang dari jalan-Nya,

lines.en: To take whate'er thy Father's pleasure
lines.ko: 참되고 의지 하는 자 주께서 기억하시리 아멘
lines.id: Tetapi lakukanlah bagianmu dengan setia Percayalah pada janji kasih karunia-Nya yang melimpah,

lines.en: And all deserving love hath sent;
lines.id: Demikianlah hal-hal itu akan tergenapi di dalam kamu

lines.en: Nor doubt our inmost wants are known
lines.id: Tuhan belum pernah mengambil jiwa-jiwa yang membutuhkan

lines.en: To him who chose us for his own.
lines.id: yang benar-benar mempercayai-Nya.

lines.en: All are alike before the highest;
'Tis easy to our God, we know,
To raise thee up though low thou liest,
To make the rich man poor and low;
True wonders still by him are wrought
Who setteth up and brings to naught.
Sing, pray, and keep his ways unswerving,
So do thine own part faithfully,
And trust his word, though undeserving,
Thou yet shalt find it true for thee;
God never yet forsook at need
The soul that trusted him indeed.

title_id: Jika Aku Menderita Tuhan untuk Membimbingmu

title_en: God is my strong Salvation

lines.en: From Psalm 27
God is my strong Salvation;
What foe have I to fear?
In darkness and temptation
My Light, my Help is near.
lines.ko: 나의 빛, 나의 도움이 가까이 왔느니라.

lines.en: Though hosts encamp around me,
lines.ko: 호스트들이 내 주위에 진을 치고 있지만,

lines.en: Firm to the fight I stand;
What terror can confound me,
lines.ko: 어떤 공포가 나를 혼란스럽게 할 수 있는가?

lines.en: With God at my right hand?
Place on the Lord reliance,
My soul, with courage wait;
His truth be thine affiance,
lines.ko: 그의 진실이 당신의 서약이 되게 하소서.

lines.en: When faint and desolate.
His might thy heart shall strengthen,
His love thy joy increase;
Mercy thy days shall lengthen;
lines.ko: 자비를 베풀어 당신의 날이 길어질 것입니다.

lines.en: The Lord will give thee peace.

title_en: For ever trusting in the Lord

lines.en: From Psalm 37:3-7
lines.id: Tuhan, beri kami kesabaran

lines.ko: 슬픔 가득 차고 질병 있을 때
lines.id: Saat kamu penuh kesedihan dan sakit
Tuhan, Tuhan, Tuhan, kesabaran hatiku
Tuhan, Tuhan, Tuhan, kesabaran hatiku

lines.en: Forever trusting in the Lord,
lines.id: Tuhan, beri kami kesabaran

lines.en: Take heed to do his will;
lines.id: Ketika godaan datang dan Anda merasa tertekan

lines.en: So shalt thou dwell within the land,
lines.id: Tuhan, Tuhan, Tuhan, kesabaran hatiku

lines.en: And he thy needs shall fill.
lines.id: Tuhan, Tuhan, Tuhan, kesabaran hatiku

lines.en: Delight thee in the Lord, and he
lines.id: Tuhan, beri kami kesabaran

lines.en: Will grant thy heart's request;
lines.id: Hiburlah aku ketika aku menderita

lines.en: To him commit thy way in faith,
lines.id: Tuhan, Tuhan, Tuhan, kesabaran hatiku

lines.en: And thus thou shalt be blessed.
lines.id: Tuhan, Tuhan, Tuhan, kesabaran hatiku

lines.en: And he shall make thy righteousness
lines.id: Tuhan, beri kami kesabaran

lines.en: Shine brightly as the light,
lines.id: Lindungi aku ketika aku dikutuk

lines.en: And as the burning noonday sun
lines.id: Tuhan, Tuhan, Tuhan, kesabaran hatiku

lines.en: Thy judgment shall be bright.
lines.id: Tuhan, Tuhan, Tuhan, kesabaran hatiku

lines.en: Rest in the Lord with quiet trust,
lines.id: Tuhan, beri kami kesabaran

lines.en: Wait patiently for him;
lines.id: Saat bebannya berat dan Anda tertekan

lines.en: Though wickedness triumphant seem,
lines.id: Tuhan, Tuhan, Tuhan, kesabaran hatiku

lines.en: Let not thy faith grow dim.
lines.id: Tuhan, Tuhan, Tuhan, kesabaran hatiku

title_en: From the depths my prayer ascendeth

lines.en: From Psalm 130
From the depths my prayer ascendeth
Unto God on high;
Hear, O Lord, my supplication
And my cry.
None can stand unscathed and blameless
lines.ko: 누구도 상처받지 않고 흠 없이 설 수는 없다

lines.en: In thy judgment just,
But the contrite in thy mercy
Humbly trust.
Lord, my hope is in thy promise,
lines.ko: 주님, 나의 희망은 당신의 약속에 있습니다.

lines.en: And I wait for thee
More than they who watch for morning,
Light to see.
With the Lord is tender mercy,
And redeeming love;
Israel, look for full salvation
From above.

title_en: My soul in silence waits for God

lines.en: From Psalm 62
My soul in silence waits for God,
My Saviour he has proved;
He only is my Rock and Tow'r;
lines.ko: 그 사람만이 나의 Rock and Tow'r입니다.

lines.en: I never shall be moved.
My honor is secure with God,
My Saviour he is known;
My Refuge and my Rock of strength
Are found in God alone.
On him, ye people, evermore
Rely with confidence;
Before him pour ye out your heart,
For God is our defense.
For God has spoken o'er and o'er,
And unto me has shown,
That saving pow'r and lasting strength
Belong to him alone.
Yea, lovingkindness evermore
Belongs to thee, O Lord;
And thou according to his work
Dost ev'ry man reward.

title_en: My Jesus, as thou wilt

lines.en: My Jesus, as thou wilt!
lines.id: Yesusku, sesuai keinginanmu!

lines.en: O may thy will be mine;
lines.ko: 온 몸과 영혼을 다 주께 드리니
lines.id: Oh semoga kehendak-Mu menjadi milikku

lines.en: Into thy hand of love
lines.ko: 이 세상 고락간 주 인도 하시고
lines.id: Ke dalam tangan cinta-Mu

lines.en: I would my all resign.
lines.id: Saya akan menandatangani ulang semuanya.

lines.en: Through sorrow, or through joy,
lines.id: Melalui kesedihan, atau melalui kegembiraan,

lines.en: Conduct me as thine own;
lines.id: Perlakukan aku seperti milik-Mu

lines.en: And help me still to say,
lines.id: Dan bantulah aku untuk tetap berkata, Ya Tuhanku,

lines.en: My Lord, thy will be done.
lines.id: Kehendak-Mu jadi.

lines.en: My Jesus, as thou wilt!
lines.id: Yesusku, sesuai keinginanmu!

lines.en: If needy here and poor,
lines.id: Meskipun terlihat melalui banyak air mata,

lines.en: Give me thy people's bread,
lines.id: Janganlah bintang harapanku

lines.en: Their portion rich and sure.
lines.id: Menjadi redup atau menghilang.

lines.en: The manna of thy Word
lines.id: Sejak Engkau di bumi menangis,

lines.en: Let my soul feed upon;
lines.id: Dan kesedihan sering mendayung sendirian,

lines.en: And if all else should fail,
lines.id: Jika aku harus menangis bersamaMu,

lines.en: My Lord, thy will be done.
lines.id: Ya Tuhanku, kehendak-Mu terlaksana.

lines.en: My Jesus, as thou wilt!
lines.id: Yesusku, sesuai keinginanmu!

lines.en: Though seen through many a tear,
lines.ko: 내 모든 일들을 다 주께 맡기고
lines.id: Semuanya akan baik-baik saja bagiku

lines.en: Let not my star of hope
lines.id: Setiap adegan masa depan yang berubah

lines.en: Grow dim or disappear.
lines.id: Aku dengan senang hati percaya pada-Mu.

lines.en: Since thou on earth hast wept,
lines.id: Langsung ke rumah saya di atas

lines.en: And sorrowed oft alone,
lines.id: Saya melakukan perjalanan dengan tenang

lines.en: If I must weep with thee,
lines.id: Dan bernyanyi, dalam hidup atau mati,

lines.en: My Lord, thy will be done.
lines.id: Ya Tuhanku, kehendak-Mu terlaksana. Amin.

lines.en: My Jesus, as thou wilt!
All shall be well for me;
Each changing future scene
I gladly trust with thee.
Straight to my home above
I travel calmly on,
And sing, in life or death,
"My Lord, thy will be done."

title_en: Thy way, not mine, O Lord

lines.en: Thy way, not mine, O Lord,
lines.ko: 우리 다시 만날 때까지 하나님이 함께 계셔
lines.id: Tuhan menyertaimu sampai kita bertemu suatu keuntungan,

lines.en: How ever dark it be!
lines.id: Demi penuntun nasihat-Nya, penopanglah kamu,

lines.en: Lead me by thine own hand,
lines.ko: 다시 만날 때 다시 만날 때 예수 앞에 만날 때
lines.id: Dengan domba-domba-Nya dengan aman melipatmu:

lines.en: Choose out the path for me;
lines.ko: 다시 만날 때 다시 만날 때 그 때까지 계심 바라네
lines.id: Tuhan menyertaimu sampai kita bertemu suatu keuntungan.

lines.en: Smooth let it be or rough,
lines.id: Sampai kita bertemu, sampai kita bertemu,

lines.en: It will be still the best;
lines.id: Sampai kita bertemu di kaki Yesus

lines.en: Winding or straight, it leads
lines.id: Sampai kita bertemu, sampai kita bertemu,

lines.en: Right onward to thy rest.
lines.id: Tuhan menyertaimu sampai kita bertemu suatu keuntungan.

lines.en: The kingdom that I seek
lines.ko: 우리 다시 만날 때까지 하나님이 함께 계셔
lines.id: Tuhan menyertaimu sampai kita bertemu suatu keuntungan,

lines.en: Is thine; so let the way
lines.ko: 간 데마다 보호하며 양식 주시기를 바라네
lines.id: 'Di bawah sayap-Nya dengan aman menyembunyikanmu,

lines.en: That leads to it be thine,
lines.ko: 다시 만날 때 다시 만날 때 예수 앞에 만날 때
lines.id: Dai-ly man-na masih memberi Anda:

lines.en: Else I must surely stray.
lines.ko: 다시 만날 때 다시 만날 때 그 때까지 계심 바라네
lines.id: Tuhan menyertaimu sampai kita bertemu suatu keuntungan.

lines.en: I dare not choose my lot;
lines.id: Sampai kita bertemu, sampai kita bertemu,

lines.en: I would not if I might:
lines.id: Sampai kita bertemu di kaki Yesus

lines.en: Choose thou for me, my God,
lines.id: Sampai kita bertemu, sampai kita bertemu,

lines.en: So shall I walk aright.
lines.id: Tuhan menyertaimu sampai kita bertemu suatu keuntungan.

lines.en: Take thou my cup, and it
lines.ko: 우리 다시 만날 때까지 하나님이 함께 계셔
lines.id: Tuhan menyertaimu sampai kita bertemu suatu keuntungan,

lines.en: With joy or sorrow fill
lines.id: Ketika bahaya hidup membingungkanmu,

lines.en: As best to thee may seem;
lines.ko: 다시 만날 때 다시 만날 때 예수 앞에 만날 때
lines.id: Letakkan tangan-Nya yang penuh kasih di sekeliling Anda:

lines.en: Choose thou my good and ill.
lines.ko: 다시 만날 때 다시 만날 때 그 때까지 계심 바라네
lines.id: Tuhan menyertaimu sampai kita bertemu suatu keuntungan.

lines.en: Not mine, not mine the choice
lines.id: Sampai kita bertemu, sampai kita bertemu,

lines.en: In things or great or small;
lines.id: Sampai kita bertemu di kaki Yesus

lines.en: Be thou my Guide, my Strength,
lines.id: Sampai kita bertemu, sampai kita bertemu,

lines.en: My Wisdom, and my All.
lines.id: Tuhan menyertaimu sampai kita bertemu suatu keuntungan.

title_id: Tuhan menyertaimu sampai kita bertemu lagi

title_en: Have thine own way, Lord

lines.en: Have thine own way, Lord! Have thine own way!
lines.ko: 주님의 뜻을 이루소서 고요한 중에 기다리니
lines.id: Milikilah jalan-Mu sendiri, Tuhan! Milikilah jalan-Mu sendiri!

lines.en: Thou art the Potter; I am the clay.
lines.ko: 진흙과 같은 날 빚으사 주님의 형상 만드소서
lines.id: Engkau adalah pembuat tembikar, aku adalah tanah liat.

lines.en: Mold me and make me after thy will
lines.id: Bentuklah aku dan jadikanlah aku menurut kehendak-Mu,

lines.en: While I am waiting, yielded and still.
lines.id: Sementara aku menunggu, menyerah dan diam.

lines.en: Have thine own way, Lord! Have thine own way!
lines.ko: 주님의 뜻을 이루소서 주님 발 앞에 엎드리니
lines.id: Milikilah jalan-Mu sendiri, Tuhan! Milikilah jalan-Mu sendiri!

lines.en: Search me and try me, Master, today!
lines.ko: 나의 맘속을 살피시사 눈보다 희게 하옵소서
lines.id: Cari saya dan coba saya, Guru, hari ini!

lines.en: Whiter than snow, Lord, wash me just now,
lines.id: Lebih putih dari salju, Tuhan, basuhlah aku sekarang,

lines.en: As in thy presence humbly I bow.
lines.id: Seperti di hadapanMu dengan rendah hati aku bersujud.

lines.en: Have thine own way, Lord! Have thine own way!
lines.ko: 주님의 뜻을 이루소서 병들어 몸이 피곤할 때
lines.id: Milikilah jalan-Mu sendiri, Tuhan! Milikilah jalan-Mu sendiri!

lines.en: Wounded and weary, help me, I pray!
lines.ko: 권능의 손을 내게 펴사 강건케 하여 주옵소서
lines.id: Terluka dan letih, tolonglah aku, aku berdoa!

lines.en: Powerall powersurely is thine!
lines.id: Kekuatan-er-segala kekuatan-er-pastinya adalah milik-Mu!

lines.en: Touch me and heal me, Saviour divine!
lines.id: Sentuh aku dan sembuhkan aku, Juruselamat ilahi kita!

lines.en: Have thine own way, Lord! Have thine own way!
lines.ko: 주님의 뜻을 이루소서 온전히 나를 주장하사
lines.id: Milikilah jalan-Mu sendiri, Tuhan! Milikilah jalan-Mu sendiri!

lines.en: Hold o'er my being absolute sway!
lines.ko: 주님과 함께 동행함을 만민이 알게 하옵소서 아멘
lines.id: Tahanlah posisiku yang mutlak!

lines.en: Fill with thy Spirit till all shall see
lines.id: Penuhi dengan Roh-Mu Sampai semua orang melihat

lines.en: Christ only, always, living in me!
lines.id: Hanya Kristus, selalu, Hidup di dalam aku!

title_en: My God and Father, day by day

lines.en: My God and Father, day by day,
Far from my home in life's rough way,
lines.ko: 인생의 험난한 길 속에서 집에서 멀리 떨어진 곳,

lines.en: O teach me from my heart to say,
lines.ko: 오, 나에게 진심으로 이렇게 말할 수 있도록 가르쳐 주십시오.

lines.en: "Thy will be done."
Though dark my path and sad my lot,
lines.ko: 내 길은 어둡고 내 운명은 슬프지만

lines.en: Let me be still and murmur not,
lines.ko: 나로 가만히 있어 불평하지 않게 하소서

lines.en: Or breathe the prayer divinely taught,
"Thy will be done."
What though in lonely grief I sigh
For friends belov'd, no longer nigh,
lines.ko: 더 이상 가까이 있지 않은 사랑하는 친구들을 위해,

lines.en: Submissive still would I reply,
"Thy will be done."
If thou shouldst call me to resign
What most I prize, it ne'er was mine;
lines.ko: 내가 가장 소중히 여기는 것은 결코 내 것이 아니었다.

lines.en: I only yield thee what was thine,
"Thy will be done."
Let but my fainting heart be blest
With thy sweet Spirit for its guest,
lines.ko: 손님을 위한 당신의 감미로운 성령과 함께,

lines.en: My God, to thee I leave the rest:
"Thy will be done."

title_en: Dear Lord and Master mine

lines.en: Dear Lord and Master mine,
Thy happy servant see;
My Conqu'ror, with what joy divine
Thy captive clings to thee!
I love thy yoke to wear,
lines.ko: 나는 당신의 멍에를 메는 것을 좋아합니다.

lines.en: To feel thy gracious bands;
Sweetly restrained by thy care
And happy in thy hands.
No bar would I remove,
No bond would I unbind;
lines.ko: 나는 어떤 유대도 풀지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: Within the limits of thy love
Full liberty I find.
I would not walk alone,
But still with thee, my God;
lines.ko: 그러나 나의 하나님, 여전히 당신과 함께 계십니다.

lines.en: At ev'ry step my blindness own,
And ask of thee the road.
Dear Lord and Master mine,
Still keep thy servant true;
lines.ko: 여전히 당신의 종을 진실하게 지켜 주십시오.

lines.en: My Guardian and my Guide divine,
Bring, bring thy pilgrim through.
My Conqueror and my King,
Still keep me in thy train;
lines.ko: 아직도 나를 당신의 기차에 머물게 해주세요.

lines.en: And with thee thy glad captive bring
lines.ko: 그리고 당신의 기쁜 포로를 당신과 함께 데려오십시오.

lines.en: When thou return'st to reign.

title_en: My times are in thy hand

lines.en: My times are in thy hand;
My God, I wish them there;
My life, my friends, my soul, I leave
lines.ko: 내 삶, 내 친구, 내 영혼, 난 떠나요

lines.en: Entirely to thy care.
My times are in thy hand;
Whatever they may be;
Pleasing or painful, dark or bright,
As best may seem to thee.
My times are in thy hand;
Why should I doubt or fear?
My Father's hand will never cause
His child a needless tear.
My times are in thy hand;
Jesus the Crucified;
Those hands my cruel sins had pierced
lines.ko: 내 잔혹한 죄가 꿰뚫었던 그 손

lines.en: Are now my guard and guide.

title_en: Not haughty is my heart

lines.en: From Psalm 131
Not haughty is my heart,
Not lofty is my pride;
I do not seek to know the things
God's wisdom hath denied.
With childlike trust, O Lord,
In thee I calmly rest,
lines.ko: 나는 당신 안에서 조용히 쉬고 있습니다.

lines.en: Contented as a little child
Upon its mother's breast.
Ye people of the Lord,
In him alone confide;
From this time forth and evermore
His wisdom be your guide.
lines.ko: 그분의 지혜가 당신의 인도자가 되어 주십시오.

title_en: Be still, my soul:  the Lord is on thy side
title_ko: 내 영혼아 잠잠하라 여호와께서 네 편이시라 (자체번역)

lines.en: Be still, my soul: the Lord is on thy side;
lines.ko: 내 영혼아 잠잠하라 여호와께서 네 편이시라

lines.en: Bear patiently the cross of grief or pain;
lines.ko: 슬픔과 고통의 십자가를 참을성 있게 짊어지십시오.

lines.en: Leave to thy God to order and provide;
In ev'ry change he faithful will remain.
lines.ko: 모든 변화 속에서도 그는 충실하게 남을 것입니다.

lines.en: Be still, my soul: thy best, thy heav'nly Friend
lines.ko: 내 영혼아 잠잠하라: 너의 가장 좋은 친구, 너의 하늘에 계신 친구

lines.en: Through thorny ways leads to a joyful end.
Be still, my soul: thy God doth undertake
lines.ko: 내 영혼아 잠잠하라 네 하나님이 이루시리라

lines.en: To guide the future as he has the past.
Thy hope, thy confidence let nothing shake;
lines.ko: 당신의 희망, 당신의 확신은 아무것도 흔들리지 않게 하십시오.

lines.en: All now mysterious shall be bright at last.
lines.ko: 이제 신비했던 모든 것이 마침내 밝아질 것입니다.

lines.en: Be still, my soul: the waves and winds still know
lines.ko: 가만히 있어라, 내 영혼아, 파도와 바람은 여전히 알고 있다

lines.en: His voice who ruled them while he dwelt below.
lines.ko: 그가 아래에 머무는 동안 그들을 다스리던 그의 목소리.

lines.en: Be still, my soul: when dearest friends depart,
lines.ko: 내 영혼아 잠잠하라 사랑하는 친구들이 떠날 때

lines.en: And all is darkened in the vale of tears,
lines.ko: 그리고 모든 것이 눈물의 골짜기로 어두워지고,

lines.en: Then shalt thou better know his love, his heart,
lines.ko: 그러면 당신은 그의 사랑, 그의 마음,

lines.en: Who comes to soothe thy sorrow and thy fears.
lines.ko: 당신의 슬픔과 두려움을 달래기 위해 오시는 분.

lines.en: Be still, my soul: thy Jesus can repay
lines.ko: 내 영혼아 잠잠하라 네 예수께서 갚으시리라

lines.en: From his own fullness all he takes away.
lines.ko: 그는 자신의 충만함에서 모든 것을 빼앗는다.

lines.en: Be still, my soul: the hour is hast'ning on
lines.ko: 가만히 있어라, 내 영혼아, 시간이 다가오고 있다

lines.en: When we shall be for ever with the Lord,
lines.ko: 우리가 영원히 주님과 함께 있을 때,

lines.en: When disappointment, grief, and fear are gone,
Sorrow forgot, love's purest joys restored.
lines.ko: 슬픔은 잊혀졌고, 사랑의 가장 순수한 기쁨이 회복되었습니다.

lines.en: Be still, my soul: when change and tears are past,
lines.ko: 내 영혼아 잠잠하라 변화와 눈물이 지나고

lines.en: All safe and blessed we shall meet at last.
lines.ko: 모든 안전하고 축복받은 우리는 마침내 만날 것입니다.

title_en: It is well with my soul

lines.en: When peace, like a river, attendeth my way,
lines.id: Berjalan di bawah sinar matahari sepanjang perjalananku,

lines.en: When sorrows like sea billows roll;
lines.id: Melewati pegunungan, melewati lembah yang dalam,

lines.en: Whatever my lot, thou hast taught me to say,
lines.id: Yesus telah berkata, “Aku tidak akan pernah meninggalkan engkau,”

lines.en: It is well, it is well with my soul.
lines.id: Janji ilahi yang tidak akan pernah gagal.
Cahaya matahari surgawi, cahaya matahari surgawi,
Membanjiri jiwaku dengan kemuliaan ilahi

lines.en: It is well with my soul;
lines.id: Bayangan di sekelilingku, bayangan di atasku,

lines.en: It is well, it is well with my soul.
lines.id: Jangan pernah menyembunyikan Juruselamat dan Pembimbingku
Dialah terang, di dalam Dia tidak ada kegelapan,
Setiap kali aku berjalan dekat ke sisi-Nya.
Cahaya matahari surgawi, cahaya matahari surgawi,
Membanjiri jiwaku dengan kemuliaan ilahi

lines.en: Though Satan should buffet, though trials should come,
lines.id: Di bawah sinar matahari yang cerah, selalu bergembira,

lines.en: Let this blest assurance control,
lines.id: Menekan jalanku ke rumah-rumah mewah di atas,

lines.en: That Christ has regarded my helpless estate,
lines.id: Menyanyikan pujiannya dengan gembira aku berjalan,

lines.en: And has shed his own blood for my soul.
lines.id: Berjalan di bawah sinar mentari, sinar mentari cinta.
