Cahaya matahari surgawi, cahaya matahari surgawi,
Membanjiri jiwaku dengan kemuliaan ilahi

lines.en: My sinO the bliss of this glorious thought!
My sin, not in part, but the whole,
Is nailed to the cross and I bear it no more;
Praise the Lord, praise the Lord, O my soul!
O Lord, haste the day when the faith shall be sight,
The clouds be rolled back as a scroll,
The trump shall resound and the Lord shall descend;
"Even so"it is well with my soul.

alt_titles: When peace, like a river
title_id: Saat Kedamaian, Bagaikan Sungai, Menghadiri Jalanku

title_en: To thee, O Lord, I fly

lines.en: From Psalm 16:1-2, 5-8, 11
To thee, O Lord, I fly
And on thy help depend;
Thou art my Lord and King Most High;
lines.ko: 당신은 나의 주님이시며 지극히 높으신 왕이십니다.

lines.en: Do thou my soul defend.
A heritage for me Jehovah will remain;
lines.ko: 나에게 유산은 여호와께서 남아 있을 것입니다.

lines.en: My portion rich and full is he,
My right he will maintain.
The lot to me that fell
Is beautiful and fair;
The heritage in which I dwell
Is good beyond compare.
I praise the Lord above
Whose counsel guides aright;
My heart instructs me in his love
lines.ko: 내 마음이 그의 사랑으로 나를 교훈하시느니라

lines.en: In seasons of the night.
I keep before me still
The Lord whom I have proved;
At my right hand he guards from ill,
lines.ko: 그가 내 우편에서 질병을 지켜 주시며

lines.en: And I shall not be moved.
Life's pathway thou wilt show,
To thy right hand wilt guide,
Where streams of pleasure ever flow,
And boundless joys abide.

title_en: My hope is built

lines.en: My hope is built on nothing less
lines.ko: 이 몸의 소망 무언가 우리 주 예수 뿐일세
lines.id: Harapanku dibangun di atas dasar yang tidak kurang dari itu

lines.en: Than Jesus' blood and righteousness;
lines.ko: 우리 주 예수 밖에는 믿을 이 아주 없도다
lines.id: Darah dan kebenaran Yesus

lines.en: I dare not trust the sweetest frame,
lines.id: Saya tidak berani mempercayai bingkai termanis,

lines.en: But wholly lean on Jesus' name.
lines.ko: 그 위에 내가 서리라 그 위에 내가 서리라
lines.id: Namun bersandar sepenuhnya pada nama Yesus.
Di atas Kristus, Batu Karang yang kokoh, aku berdiri
Semua tanah lainnya adalah pasir yang tenggelam,
Tanah lainnya hanyalah pasir yang tenggelam.

lines.en: On Christ, the solid Rock, I stand;
lines.ko: 무섭게 바람 부는 밤 물결이 높이 설렐 때
lines.id: Saat kegelapan menutupi wajah manis-Nya,

lines.en: All other ground is sinking sand.
lines.ko: 우리 주 크신 은혜에 소망의 닻을 주리라
lines.id: Aku bersandar pada kasih karunia-Nya yang tidak berubah
Di setiap badai dan badai yang tinggi,

lines.ko: 그 위에 내가 서리라 그 위에 내가 서리라
lines.id: Jangkarku tertahan di dalam tabir.
Di atas Kristus, Batu Karang yang kokoh, aku berdiri
Semua tanah lainnya adalah pasir yang tenggelam,
Tanah lainnya hanyalah pasir yang tenggelam.

lines.en: When darkness veils his lovely face,
lines.ko: 세상에 믿던 모든 것 끊어질 그 날 되어도
lines.id: Otath-Nya, perjanjian-Nya, darah-Nya,

lines.en: I rest upon unchanging grace;
lines.ko: 구주의 언약 믿사와 내 소망 더욱 크리라
lines.id: Dukunglah aku di tengah banjir besar

lines.en: In ev'ry rough and stormy gale
lines.id: Ketika seluruh jiwaku menyerah

lines.en: My anchor holds within the veil.
lines.ko: 그 위에 내가 서리라 그 위에 내가 서리라
lines.id: Dia kemudian menjadi harapan dan tempat tinggalku.
Di atas Kristus, Batu Karang yang kokoh, aku berdiri
Semua tanah lainnya adalah pasir yang tenggelam,
Tanah lainnya hanyalah pasir yang tenggelam.

lines.en: His oath, his covenant, his blood
lines.ko: 바라던 천국 올라가 하나님 앞에 뵈올 때
lines.id: Ketika Dia datang dengan bunyi terompet,

lines.en: Support me in the whelming flood;
lines.ko: 구주의 의를 힘입어 어엿이 바로 서리라
lines.id: Oh, semoga aku ditemukan di dalam Dia,

lines.en: When all around my soul gives way,
lines.id: Mengenakan kebenaran-Nya sendirian,

lines.en: He then is all my hope and stay.
lines.ko: 그 위에 내가 서리라 그 위에 내가 서리라
lines.id: Tanpa kesalahan untuk berdiri di depan takhta.
Di atas Kristus, Batu Karang yang kokoh, aku berdiri
Semua tanah lainnya adalah pasir yang tenggelam,
Tanah lainnya hanyalah pasir yang tenggelam.

lines.en: When I shall launch in worlds unseen,
O may I then be found in him;
Dressed in his righteousness alone,
Faultless to stand before the throne.

title_id: Harapanku Dibangun di Atas Dasar Yang Kurang

title_en: Lord, I lift my soul to thee

lines.en: Lord, I lift my soul to thee,
O my God, I trust thy might;
lines.ko: 오 나의 하나님, 나는 당신의 능력을 신뢰합니다.

lines.en: Let not foes exult o'er me,
Shame me not before their sight.
lines.ko: 그들이 보는 앞에서 나를 부끄럽게 하지 마십시오.

lines.en: Yea, may none be put to shame,
lines.ko: 그래요, 누구도 부끄러움을 당하지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: None who wait for thee to bless;
lines.ko: 당신의 축복을 기다리는 사람은 아무도 없습니다.

lines.en: But dishonored be their name
Who without a cause transgress.
Lord, to me thy ways make known,
lines.ko: 여호와여 주의 도를 내게 알게 하소서

lines.en: Guide in truth and teach thou me;
Thou my Saviour art alone,
All the day I wait for thee.
Lord, remember in thy love
All thy mercies manifold,
Tender mercies from above,
Changeless from the days of old.
Sins of youth remember not,
Nor my trespasses record;
Let not mercy be forgot,
For thy goodness' sake, O Lord.
Grace and truth shall mark the way
Where the Lord his own will lead,
If his word they still obey
lines.ko: 만일 그들이 그의 말씀을 여전히 순종하면

lines.en: And his testimonies heed.

title_en: By grace I am an heir of heaven

lines.en: By grace I am an heir of heaven:
Why doubt this, O my trembling heart?
lines.ko: 오, 나의 떨리는 마음이여, 왜 이것을 의심합니까?

lines.en: If what the Scriptures promise clearly
Is true and firm in ev'ry part,
This also must be truth divine:
By grace a crown of life is mine.
lines.ko: 은혜로 생명의 면류관이 나의 것이 되었느니라.

lines.en: By grace alone shall I inherit
That blissful home beyond the skies.
Works count for naught, the Lord incarnate
Hath won for me the heav'nly prize.
Salvation by his death he wrought,
His grace alone my pardon bought.
By grace! These precious words remember
When sorely by thy sins oppressed,
lines.ko: 네 죄로 말미암아 심히 압박을 받을 때에

lines.en: When Satan comes to vex thy spirit,
lines.ko: 사탄이 와서 네 영을 괴롭게 하면

lines.en: When troubled conscience sighs for rest;
What reason cannot comprehend,
God doth to thee by grace extend.
By grace! Be this in death my comfort;
lines.ko: 은혜로! 이것이 나의 죽음의 위로가 되소서.

lines.en: Despite my fears, 'tis well with me.
I know my sin in all its greatness,
lines.ko: 나는 내 죄가 얼마나 큰지 알고 있습니다.

lines.en: But also him who sets me free.
lines.ko: 그러나 나를 자유롭게 하시는 분도 계십니다.

lines.en: My heart to naught but joy gives place
lines.ko: 내 마음은 아무것도 아니지만 기쁨이 자리를 잡습니다

lines.en: Since I am saved by grace, by grace.
lines.ko: 나는 은혜로, 은혜로 구원을 받았기 때문입니다.

title_en: Like Zion's steadfast mount are they

lines.en: From Psalm 125
lines.ko: 내 평생 소원 이것 뿐 주의 일 하다가
lines.id: Satu-satunya harapanku, Tuhan, adalah ini saja

lines.en: To serve Thee all my days,
lines.ko: 이 세상 이별 하는 날 주 앞에 가리라
lines.id: Untuk melayaniMu sepanjang hari-hariku,

lines.en: Like Zion's steadfast mount are they
lines.ko: 꿈 같이 헛된 세상 일 취할 것 무어냐
lines.id: Mengapa aku harus melekat pada hal-hal duniawi,

lines.en: Who in the Lord confide;
lines.ko: 이 수고 암만 하여도 헛된 것 뿐일세
lines.id: Seperti mimpi yang berlalu,

lines.en: Secure, immovable they stand,
lines.id: Impian dan kerja keras seperti itu tidak ada gunanya

lines.en: For ever to abide.
lines.id: Di hari kekal surga.

lines.en: As round about Jerusalem
lines.ko: 불 같은 시험 많으나 겁내지 맙시다
lines.id: Cobaan berat yang menimpa iman kita,

lines.en: The mountains give defense,
lines.id: Meskipun tidak terhitung jumlahnya,

lines.en: Jehovah is his people's guard,
lines.id: Jangan takut pada lebih dari sekedar penakluk

lines.en: Their lasting confidence.
lines.id: Melalui Yesus Kristus kita ada.

lines.en: O thou Jehovah, to the good
lines.ko: 금보다 귀한 믿음은 참 보배 되도다
lines.id: Iman lebih berharga dari pada permata dan emas

lines.en: Thy goodness now impart,
lines.ko: 이 진리 믿는 사람들 다 복을 받겠네
lines.id: Permata kaya yang kami terima kembali

lines.en: Thy lovingkindness show to them
lines.id: Sebenarnya, banjir adalah berkah yang tak terkira

lines.en: That upright are in heart.
lines.id: Pada semua orang kecuali percaya.

lines.en: All those that turn from righteousness
lines.ko: 살 같이 빠른 광음을 주 위해 아끼세
lines.id: Bagaikan lari-lari panah, momen-momen berlalu!

lines.en: With wayward, wandering feet,
lines.ko: 온 몸과 맘을 바치고 힘써서 일하세 아멘
lines.id: Pertimbangkan kembali, dalam kendali Kristus,

lines.en: With sinners God will lead them forth,
lines.id: Hari-harimu, dan berikan atas nama-Nya

lines.en: The sinner's doom to meet.
lines.id: Hati, tubuh, kekuatan dan jiwa! Amin.

lines.en: O thou who art thy people's shield,
Their helper and their guide,
Upon them let thy grace and peace
For evermore abide.

title_id: Satu-satunya Keinginanku, Tuhan, adalah Ini Sendiri

title_en: I know that my Redeemer lives

lines.en: I know that my Redeemer lives,
lines.id: Saya tahu bahwa Penebus Ulang saya hidup,

lines.en: And ever prays for me;
lines.ko: 그 큰 사랑 인하여서 나 자유 얻었네
lines.id: Dan selalu berdoa untukku

lines.en: A token of his love he gives,
lines.id: Tanda kasih sayang-Nya yang Dia berikan,

lines.en: A pledge of liberty.
lines.id: Sebuah janji kebebasan.

lines.en: I find him lifting up my head;
lines.ko: 나의 구원되신 주님 내 소망 되신 주
lines.id: Dia menghendaki agar aku menjadi kudus

lines.en: He brings salvation near;
lines.ko: 항상 나와 함께 하셔 곧 다시 오시리
lines.id: Siapa yang dapat menahan kehendak-Nya

lines.en: His presence makes me free indeed
lines.id: Nasihat kasih karunia-Nya ada dalam diriku

lines.en: And he will soon appear.
lines.id: Dia pasti akan memenuhinya.

lines.en: He wills that I should holy be:
lines.ko: 나를 거룩하게 하려 주 나를 부르니
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, aku menutup telepon pada firman-Mu

lines.en: Who can withstand his will?
lines.ko: 주의 은혜 내게 넘쳐 주 뜻을 이루리
lines.id: Saya sangat percaya

lines.en: The counsel of his grace in me
lines.id: Engkau akan kembali dan mengklaim aku, Tuhan,

lines.en: He surely shall fulfil.
lines.id: Dan untuk menerima kembali diri sendiri.

lines.en: Jesus, I hang upon thy Word:
lines.ko: 굳센 믿음 나가지고 주 말씀 따르면
lines.id: Ketika Tuhan adalah milikku, dan aku milik-Nya,

lines.en: I steadfastly believe
lines.ko: 주님 다시 강림할 때 날 영접 하시리 아멘
lines.id: Dari kepemilikan Par-a-dise

lines.en: Thou wilt return and claim me, Lord,
lines.id: Aku merasakan kebahagiaan yang tak terkira,

lines.en: And to thyself receive.
lines.id: Dan istirahat yang abadi.

title_id: Saya Tahu bahwa Penebus Saya Hidup

title_en: Like a river glorious

lines.en: Like a river glorious
Is God's perfect peace,
Over all victorious
In its bright increase;
Perfect, yet it floweth
Fuller ev'ry day,
Perfect, yet it groweth
Deeper all the way.
Stayed upon Jehovah,
Hearts are fully blest,
Finding, as he promised,
Perfect peace and rest.
Hidden in the hollow
Of his blessed hand,
Never foe can follow,
Never traitor stand;
Not a surge of worry,
Not a shade of care,
Not a blast of hurry
Touch the spirit there.
Ev'ry joy or trial
Falleth from above,
Traced upon our dial
By the Sun of Love.
We may trust him fully
lines.ko: 우리는 그분을 온전히 신뢰할 수 있습니다

lines.en: All for us to do;
They who trust him wholly
Find him wholly true.
lines.ko: 그 사람이 전적으로 사실이라는 것을 알아내십시오.

alt_titles: Stayed upon Jehovah, hearts are fully blest

title_en: Come, we that love the Lord
title_ko: 주 사랑하는 자 다 찬송할 때에

lines.en: Come, we that love the Lord,
lines.ko: 주 사랑하는 자 다 찬송할 때에
lines.id: Aku mencintai Kerajaan-Mu, Tuhan,

lines.en: And let our joys be known;
lines.ko: 그 보좌 앞에 둘러서 그 보좌 앞에 둘러서
lines.id: Rumah tempat tinggal-Mu,

lines.en: Join in a song with sweet accord,
lines.ko: 큰 영광 돌리세 큰 영광 돌리세
lines.id: Gereja yang telah diselamatkan oleh Penebus kita yang terberkati

lines.en: And thus surround the throne.
lines.ko: 저 밝고도 묘한 시온성 향하여 가세
lines.id: Dengan darah-Nya yang berharga.

lines.ko: 내 주의 찬란한 성에 찬송하며 올라가세
lines.id: Biarkan aku naik dengan pujian ke kota Tuhanku yang indah.

lines.en: Let those refuse to sing
lines.ko: 주 믿지 않는 자 다 찬송 못하나
lines.id: Aku mencintai Gereja-Mu, ya Tuhan

lines.en: That never knew our God;
lines.ko: 하나님 자녀 된 자들 하나님 자녀 된 자들
lines.id: Dindingnya di hadapan-Mu berdiri,

lines.en: But children of the heav'nly King
lines.ko: 그 기쁨 전하세 그 기쁨 전하세
lines.id: Sayang bagaikan biji mata-Mu,

lines.en: May speak their joys abroad.
lines.ko: 저 밝고도 묘한 시온성 향하여 가세
lines.id: Dan grav-en di tangan-Mu.

lines.ko: 내 주의 찬란한 성에 찬송하며 올라가세
lines.id: Biarkan aku naik dengan pujian ke kota Tuhanku yang indah.

lines.en: The men of grace have found
lines.ko: 저 하늘 황금 길 나 올라갈 때에
lines.id: Baginya air mataku akan jatuh,

lines.en: Glory begun below;
lines.ko: 시온성 언덕 위에서 시온성 언덕 위에서
lines.id: Untuknya doaku naik

lines.en: Celestial fruits on earthly ground
lines.id: Kepadanya kepedulian dan jerih payahku diberikan,

lines.en: From faith and hope may grow.
lines.ko: 저 밝고도 묘한 시온성 향하여 가세
lines.id: Sampai kerja keras dan kekhawatiran berakhir.

lines.ko: 내 주의 찬란한 성에 찬송하며 올라가세
lines.id: Biarkan aku naik dengan pujian ke kota Tuhanku yang indah.

lines.en: The hill of Zion yields
lines.ko: 내 눈물 다 씻고 늘 찬송부르리
lines.id: Melampaui kebahagiaanku yang tertinggi

lines.en: A thousand sacred sweets,
lines.ko: 저 임마누엘 주 앞에 저 임마누엘 주 앞에
lines.id: Aku menghargai cara-cara surgawinya,

lines.en: Before we reach the heav'nly fields,
lines.ko: 나 영광 누리리 나 영광 누리리
lines.id: Komuni manisnya, sumpah khusyuknya,

lines.en: Or walk the golden streets.
lines.ko: 저 밝고도 묘한 시온성 향하여 가세
lines.id: Nyanyian cinta dan pujiannya.

lines.ko: 내 주의 찬란한 성에 찬송하며 올라가세
lines.id: Biarkan aku naik dengan pujian ke kota Tuhanku yang indah.

lines.en: Then let our songs abound,
lines.id: Tentu saja kebenaran-Mu akan bertahan lama,

lines.en: And ev'ry tear be dry;
lines.id: Kepada Zi-on akan diberikan

lines.en: We're marching through Immanuel's ground
lines.id: Kemuliaan paling terang yang bisa dihasilkan bumi,

lines.en: To fairer worlds on high.
lines.id: Dan kebahagiaan surga yang lebih cerah. Amin.

title_en: O happy day, that fixed my choice

lines.en: O happy day, that fixed my choice
lines.ko: 주의 말씀 받은 그 날 참 기쁘고 복 되도다
lines.id: Semuanya berubah sejak dosaku diampuni,

lines.en: On thee, my Saviour and my God!
lines.ko: 이 기쁜 맘 못 이겨서 온 세상에 전하노라
lines.id: Semuanya berubah sejak saya mengenal Tuhan

lines.en: Well may this glowing heart rejoice,
lines.ko: 기쁜 날 기쁜 날 주 나의 죄 다 씻은 날
lines.id: Kini kakiku sedang menapaki jalan menuju surga

lines.en: And tell its raptures all abroad.
lines.ko: 늘 깨어서 기도하고 늘 기쁘게 살아가리
lines.id: Semua rasa bersalah di masa lalu sekarang ada di bawah darah.

lines.ko: 기쁜 날 기쁜 날 주 나의 죄 다 씻은 날
lines.id: Semuanya berubah, puji Tuhan!
Sekarang aku dianggap kembali melalui darah
Bebas dari kutukan, Tuhan adalah Penyelamatku,
Semuanya berubah, puji Tuhan!

lines.en: O happy bond, that seals my vows
lines.ko: 이 좋은 날 내 천한 몸 새 사람이 되었으니
lines.id: Semuanya berubah, bagi nama Tuhan yang mulia!

lines.en: To him who merits all my love!
lines.ko: 이 몸과 맘 다 바쳐서 영광의 주 늘 섬기리
lines.id: Cahaya, bukannya kegelapan, memenuhi jiwaku

lines.en: Let cheerful anthems fill his house,
lines.ko: 기쁜 날 기쁜 날 주 나의 죄 다 씻은 날
lines.id: Semuanya berubah, inilah cerita lama yang diberkati,

lines.en: While to that sacred shrine I move.
lines.ko: 늘 깨어서 기도하고 늘 기쁘게 살아가리
lines.id: Percaya pada Kristus, sekarang aku sudah sembuh sedikit pun.

lines.ko: 기쁜 날 기쁜 날 주 나의 죄 다 씻은 날
lines.id: Semuanya berubah, puji Tuhan!
Sekarang aku dianggap kembali melalui darah
Bebas dari kutukan, Tuhan adalah Penyelamatku,
Semuanya berubah, puji Tuhan!

lines.en: 'Tis done! The great transaction's done!
lines.ko: 새 사람 된 그 날부터 평안한 맘 늘 있어서
lines.id: Semuanya berubah sejak Roh merasukiku,

lines.en: I am my Lord's, and he is mine;
lines.ko: 이 복된 말 전하는 일 나의 본분 삼았도다
lines.id: Karena Dia memenuhi hatiku dengan kasih Juruselamat,

lines.en: He drew me, and I followed on,
lines.ko: 기쁜 날 기쁜 날 주 나의 죄 다 씻은 날
lines.id: Karena Dia menghilangkan semua ketakutan yang menyusahkanku,

lines.en: Charmed to confess the voice Divine.
lines.ko: 늘 깨어서 기도하고 늘 기쁘게 살아가리
lines.id: Membantu saya menetapkan hati pada hal-hal di atas.

lines.ko: 기쁜 날 기쁜 날 주 나의 죄 다 씻은 날 아멘
lines.id: Semuanya berubah, puji Tuhan!
Sekarang aku dianggap kembali melalui darah
Bebas dari kutukan, Tuhan adalah Penyelamatku,
Semuanya berubah, puji Tuhan!

lines.en: Now rest, my long-divided heart;
Fixed on this blissful center, rest;
With ashes who would grudge to part,
When called on angels' bread to feast?
High heav'n, that heard the solemn vow,
That vow renewed shall daily hear,
Till in life's latest hour I bow,
And bless in death a bond so dear.

title_id: Wahai Hari Bahagia, Itu Memperbaiki Pilihanku

title_en: Peace, perfect peace

lines.en: Peace, perfect peace, in this dark world of sin?
lines.ko: 이 어두운 죄의 세상에 평화, 완전한 평화가 있습니까?

lines.en: The blood of Jesus whispers peace within.
Peace, perfect peace, by thronging duties pressed?
lines.ko: 평화, 완전한 평화, 수많은 의무로 인해 압박을 받습니까?

lines.en: To do the will of Jesus, this is rest.
Peace, perfect peace, with sorrows surging round?
On Jesus' bosom naught but calm is found.
lines.ko: 예수님의 품에는 평온함 외에는 아무것도 없습니다.

lines.en: Peace, perfect peace, with loved ones far away?
lines.ko: 평화, 완벽한 평화, 사랑하는 사람들과 멀리 떨어져 계시나요?

lines.en: In Jesus' keeping we are safe and they.
lines.ko: 예수님의 보호하심 안에서 우리와 그들도 안전합니다.

lines.en: Peace, perfect peace, our future all unknown?
lines.ko: 평화, 완전한 평화, 우리의 미래를 모두 알 수 없나요?

lines.en: Jesus we know, and he is on the throne.
lines.ko: 우리가 아는 예수님은 보좌에 앉아 계십니다.

lines.en: Peace, perfect peace, death shad'wing us and ours?
lines.ko: 평화, 완전한 평화, 죽음이 우리와 우리를 뒤덮고 있습니까?

lines.en: Jesus has vanquished death and all its powers.
lines.ko: 예수님은 죽음과 그 모든 권세를 이기셨습니다.

lines.en: It is enough: earth's struggles soon shall cease,
lines.ko: 그것으로 충분합니다. 지구의 투쟁은 곧 그칠 것입니다.

lines.en: And Jesus call us to heav'n's perfect peace.
lines.ko: 그리고 예수님은 천국의 완전한 평화로 우리를 부르십니다.

title_en: Fountain of grace, rich, full and free
title_ko: 은혜의 샘이여 풍성하고 충만하고 거저 있도다 (자체번역)

lines.en: Fountain of grace, rich, full and free,
lines.ko: 은혜의 샘이시니 풍성하고 충만하고 값이 없으시니

lines.en: What need I, that is not in thee?
lines.ko: 당신에게 없는 것이 나에게 필요한 것이 무엇입니까?

lines.en: Full pardon, strength to meet the day,
And peace which none can take away.
lines.ko: 그리고 그 누구도 빼앗아 갈 수 없는 평화를 누리십시오.

lines.en: Doth sickness fill my heart with fear,
lines.ko: 질병이 내 마음을 두려움으로 가득 채울 수 있습니까?

lines.en: 'Tis sweet to know that thou art near;
lines.ko: 당신이 가까이 계시다는 것을 아는 것은 정말 즐거운 일입니다.

lines.en: Am I with dread of justice tried,
'Tis sweet to know that Christ hath died.
lines.ko: 그리스도께서 돌아가셨다는 사실을 아는 것은 참으로 즐거운 일입니다.

lines.en: In life, thy promises of aid
Forbid my heart to be afraid;
In death, peace gently veils the eyes:
lines.ko: 죽음 속에서는 평화가 눈을 부드럽게 가리고 있습니다.

lines.en: Christ rose, and I shall surely rise.
lines.ko: 그리스도께서 부활하셨으니 나도 반드시 일어날 것입니다.

title_en: I've found the pearl of greatest price

lines.en: I've found the pearl of greatest price!
My heart doth sing for joy;
And sing I must, for Christ is mine!
lines.ko: 그리고 나는 노래해야 합니다. 왜냐하면 그리스도는 나의 것이기 때문입니다!

lines.en: Christ shall my song employ.
I've found the pearl of greatest price!
My heart doth sing for joy;
And sing I must, for Christ is mine!
lines.ko: 그리고 나는 노래해야 합니다. 왜냐하면 그리스도는 나의 것이기 때문입니다!

lines.en: Christ shall my song employ.
Christ is my Prophet, Priest, and King;
My Prophet full of light,
My great High Priest before the throne,
lines.ko: 보좌 앞에 계신 나의 큰 대제사장이시여,

lines.en: My King of heav'nly might.
For he indeed is Lord of lords,
And he the King of kings;
He is the Sun of Righteousness,
With healing in his wings.
Christ is my peace; he died for me,
lines.ko: 그리스도는 나의 평화이십니다. 그는 나를 위해 죽었습니다.

lines.en: For me he shed his blood;
And as my wondrous Sacrifice,
Offered himself to God.
Christ Jesus is my all in all,
My comfort and my love;
My life below, and he shall be
lines.ko: 내 인생은 아래에 있고 그는 그럴 것이다

lines.en: My joy and crown above.

title_en: Jesus, I my cross have taken

lines.en: Jesus, I my cross have taken,
lines.ko: 십자가를 내가 지고 주를 따라 갑니다
lines.id: Yesus, aku telah mengambil salibku,

lines.en: All to leave, and follow thee;
lines.id: Semua harus pergi, dan melayang rendah pada-Mu

lines.en: Destitute, despised, forsaken,
lines.id: Des-ti-tute, dibenci,untuk-sak-en,

lines.en: Thou from hence my all shalt be:
lines.ko: 주의 평안 내가 받고 영생복을 받겠네
lines.id: Engkau, mulai saat ini, segalanya akan menjadi milikku.

lines.en: Perish ev'ry fond ambition,
lines.id: Per-ish setiap ambisi yang menyenangkan,

lines.en: All I've sought, or hoped, or known;
lines.id: Semua yang saya cari, dan harapkan, atau ketahui

lines.en: Yet how rich is my condition,
lines.id: Namun betapa kayanya kondisiku,

lines.en: God and heav'n are still my own.
lines.id: Tuhan dan surga masih milikku.

lines.en: Man may trouble and distress me,
lines.ko: 주도 곤욕 당했으니 나도 곤욕 당하리
lines.id: Biarkan dunia yang membenci pasir meninggalkanku,

lines.en: 'Twill but drive me to thy breast;
lines.id: Selamat juga

lines.en: Life with trials hard may press me,
lines.ko: 예수 나를 사랑하사 빛난 얼굴 보이면
lines.id: Hati manusia dan lihatlah menipuku,

lines.en: Heav'n will bring me sweeter rest:
lines.id: Anda tidak, seperti manusia, tidak benar

lines.en: O 'tis not in grief to harm me
lines.id: Dan sementara Engkau tersenyum kepadaku,

lines.en: While thy love is left to me;
lines.id: Dewa kebijaksanaan, cinta, dan kekuatan,

lines.en: O 'twere not in joy to charm me,
lines.id: Musuh mungkin membenci, dan teman mungkin menjauhi saya:

lines.en: Were that joy unmixed with thee.
lines.id: Tunjukkan wajah-Mu, dan semuanya cerah.

lines.en: Take, my soul, thy full salvation,
lines.ko: 내가 핍박 당할 때에 주의 품에 안기고
lines.id: Manusia mungkin menyusahkan dan membenciku,

lines.en: Rise o'er sin and fear and care;
lines.ko: 세상 고초 당할수록 많은 위로 받겠네
lines.id: 'Twill tapi antarkan aku ke dada-Mu

lines.en: Joy to find in ev'ry station
lines.ko: 주가 주신 기쁨 외에 기뻐할 것 무어냐
lines.id: Hidup dengan cobaan yang berat mungkin akan menekanku,

lines.en: Something still to do or bear;
lines.ko: 주가 나를 사랑하니 기뻐할 것 뿐일세 아멘
lines.id: Surga akan memberiku istirahat yang lebih manis

lines.en: Think what spirit dwells within thee,
lines.id: O 'tidak dalam kesedihan untuk menyakitiku

lines.en: What a Father's smile is thine,
lines.id: Sementara cinta-Mu serahkan padaku

lines.en: What a Saviour died to win thee:
lines.id: Oh, aku tidak senang memikatku:

lines.en: Child of heav'n, shouldst thou repine?
lines.id: Dimana kegembiraan itu tak tercampur denganMu. Amin.

lines.en: Haste then on from grace to glory,
Armed by faith, and winged by prayer;
Heav'n's eternal day's before thee,
God's own hand shall guide thee there.
Soon shall close thy earthly mission;
Swift shall pass thy pilgrim days;
Hope soon change to glad fruition,
Faith to sight, and prayer to praise.

title_en: O Love that wilt not let me go

lines.en: O Love that wilt not let me go,
I rest my weary soul in thee;
lines.ko: 내 지친 영혼을 당신 안에서 쉬게 하소서.

lines.en: I give thee back the life I owe,
That in thine ocean depths its flow
May richer, fuller be.
lines.ko: 더 풍부하고 더 충만해질 수 있습니다.

lines.en: O Light that followest all my way,
I yield my flickering torch to thee;
My heart restores its borrowed ray,
That in thy sunshine's blaze its day
May brighter, fairer be.
O Joy that seekest me through pain
lines.ko: 오 고통 중에 나를 찾는 기쁨이여

lines.en: I cannot close my heart to thee;
lines.ko: 나는 당신에게 내 마음을 닫을 수 없습니다.

lines.en: I trace the rainbow through the rain,
And feel the promise is not vain
lines.ko: 그리고 그 약속이 헛되지 않았음을 느껴보세요

lines.en: That morn shall tearless be.
O Cross that liftest up my head,
lines.ko: 오 내 머리를 높이 드는 십자가여,

lines.en: I dare not ask to fly from thee;
lines.ko: 나는 감히 당신에게서 날아가달라고 요청할 수 없습니다.

lines.en: I lay in dust life's glory dead,
lines.ko: 나는 죽은 삶의 영광을 먼지 속에 누웠고,

lines.en: And from the ground there blossoms red
Life that shall endless be.

title_en: Your harps, ye trembling saints

lines.en: Your harps, ye trembling saints,
Down from the willows take;
Loud to the praise of love divine
Bid ev'ry string awake.
Though in a foreign land,
We are not far from home;
And nearer to our house above
lines.ko: 그리고 위의 우리 집에 더 가깝습니다.

lines.en: We ev'ry moment come.
His grace will to the end
Stronger and brighter shine;
Nor present things, nor things to come,
Shall quench the grace divine.
When we in darkness walk,
Nor feel the heav'nly flame,
Then is the time to trust our God,
And rest upon his Name.
lines.ko: 그리고 그분의 이름 위에 안식을 누리십시오.

lines.en: Soon shall our doubts and fears
Subside at his control;
His lovingkindness shall break through
The midnight of the soul.
Blest is the man, O God,
lines.ko: 오 하느님, 그 사람은 복이 있습니다.

lines.en: That stays himself on thee:
Who wait for thy salvation, Lord,
Shall thy salvation see.

title_en: Jesus lives, and so shall I

lines.en: Jesus lives, and so shall I.
lines.ko: 예수님은 살아 계시고 나도 그러할 것입니다.

lines.en: Death! thy sting is gone forever!
lines.ko: 죽음! 네 쏘는 것이 영원히 사라졌느니라!

lines.en: He who deigned for me to die,
Lives, the bands of death to sever.
He shall raise me from the dust:
Jesus is my Hope and Trust.
Jesus lives, and reigns supreme,
And, his kingdom still remaining,
I shall also be with him,
Ever living, ever reigning.
God has promised: be it must:
Jesus is my Hope and Trust.
Jesus lives, and by his grace,
Vict'ry o'er my passions giving,
I will cleanse my heart and ways,
Ever to his glory living.
Me he raises from the dust.
Jesus is my Hope and Trust.
Jesus lives, I know full well
lines.ko: 예수님은 살아 계십니다. 나는 잘 압니다.

lines.en: Nought from him my heart can sever,
lines.ko: 내 마음은 그에게서 어떤 것도 떼어낼 수 없습니다.

lines.en: Life nor death nor powers of hell,
Joy nor grief, hence forth forever.
None of all his saints is lost;
lines.ko: 그의 모든 성도들 중 어느 누구도 잃어버린 바 되지 않았습니다.

lines.en: Jesus is my Hope and Trust.
Jesus lives, and death is now
But my entrance into glory.
Courage, then, my soul, for thou
Hast a crown of life before thee;
Thou shalt find thy hopes were just;
lines.ko: 당신은 당신의 희망이 정당했다는 것을 알게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: Jesus is the Christian's Trust.

title_en: There is a land of pure delight

lines.en: There is a land of pure delight,
Where saints immortal reign;
Infinite day excludes the night,
And pleasures banish pain.
There everlasting spring abides,
And never with'ring flowers;
Death, like a narrow sea, divides
This heav'nly land from ours.
Sweet fields beyond the swelling flood
Stand dressed in living green;
So to the Jews old Canaan stood,
lines.ko: 그래서 유대인들에게는 옛 가나안이 서서 말했습니다.

lines.en: While Jordan rolled between.
But tim'rous mortals start and shrink
To cross this narrow sea;
And linger, shivering, on the brink,
And fear to launch away.
O could we make our doubts remove,
lines.ko: 오, 우리의 의심을 없앨 수 있을까요?

lines.en: Those gloomy doubts that rise,
And see the Canaan that we love
With unbeclouded eyes;
Could we but climb where Moses stood,
lines.ko: 모세가 서 있던 곳으로 우리가 올라갈 수 밖에 없습니까?

lines.en: And view the landscape o'er,
Not Jordan's stream, nor death's cold flood,
lines.ko: 요단의 시냇물도 아니고 죽음의 차가운 홍수도 아니고,

lines.en: Should fright us from the shore.

title_en: There is no night in heaven

lines.en: There is no night in heav'n;
In that blest world above
Work never can bring weariness,
For work itself is love.
There is no grief in heav'n;
For life is one glad day;
And tears are of those former things
lines.ko: 그리고 눈물은 이전 것들에 대한 것입니다

lines.en: Which all have passed away.
There is no sin in heav'n;
Behold that blessed throng
All holy is their spotless robe,
All holy in their song!
There is no death in heav'n;
For they who gain that shore
Have won their immortality,
And they can die no more.
lines.ko: 그리고 그들은 더 이상 죽을 수 없습니다.

lines.en: Lord Jesus, be our Guide;
lines.ko: 주 예수님, 우리의 인도자가 되어 주십시오.

lines.en: O lead us safely on,
Till night and grief and sin and death
Are past, and heav'n is won!

title_en: The sands of time are sinking

lines.en: The sands of time are sinking,
The dawn of heaven breaks,
The summer morn I've sighed for,
The fair sweet morn awakes;
Dark, dark, hath been the midnight,
But dayspring is at hand,
And glory, glory dwelleth
In Emmanuel's land.
The King there in his beauty
Without a veil is seen;
It were a well-spent journey
Though seven deaths lay between:
The Lamb with his fair army
Doth on Mount Zion stand,
And glory, glory dwelleth
In Emmanuel's land.
O Christ, he is the fountain,
The deep sweet well of love!
The streams on earth I've tasted
More deep I'll drink above:
There to an ocean fullness
His mercy doth expand,
And glory, glory dwelleth
In Emmanuel's land.
The bride eyes not her garment,
But her dear bridegroom's face;
I will not gaze at glory,
But on my King of grace;
Not at the crown he gifteth,
But on his pierced hand:
The Lamb is all the glory
Of Emmanuel's land.

title_en: When this passing world is done

lines.en: There's sun-shine in my soul to-day,
lines.ko: 내 영혼에 햇빛 비치니 주 영광 찬란해
lines.id: Ada sinar matahari di jiwaku hari ini,

lines.en: More glo-ri-ous and bright
lines.ko: 이 세상 어떤 빛보다 이 빛 더 빛나네
lines.id: Lebih mulia dan cemerlang

lines.en: Than glows in an-y earth-ly sky,
lines.id: Daripada bersinar di langit bumi mana pun,

lines.en: For Je-sus is my Light.
lines.id: Karena Yesus adalah Terangku.

lines.en: O there's sun-shine, bless-ed sun-shine,
lines.ko: 그 밝은 얼굴 뵈올 때 나의 영혼 기쁘다
lines.id: O ada sinar matahari, sinar matahari yang diberkati,

lines.en: When the peace-ful, hap-py mo-ments roll
lines.id: Saat momen damai dan bahagia bergulir

lines.en: When Je-sus shows His smil-ing face,
lines.id: Ketika Yesus menampakkan wajah-Nya yang tersenyum,

lines.en: There is sun-shine in my soul.
lines.id: Ada sinar matahari di jiwaku.

lines.en: When has sunk yon glaring sun,
lines.ko: 내 영혼에 노래 있으니 주 찬양 합니다
lines.id: Ada musik di jiwaku hari ini,

lines.en: When we stand with Christ in glory,
lines.ko: 내 영혼에 봄날 되어서 주 함께 하실 때
lines.id: Ada musim semi di jiwaku hari ini,

lines.en: Looking o'er life's finished story,
lines.ko: 내 영혼에 희락이 있고 큰 소망 넘치네
lines.id: Ada kegembiraan dalam jiwaku hari ini,

lines.en: Then, Lord, shall I fully know,
Not till then, how much I owe.
When I hear the wicked call
On the rocks and hills to fall,
When I see them start and shrink
On the fiery deluge brink,
Then, Lord, shall I fully know,
Not till then, how much I owe.
When I stand before the throne,
Dressed in beauty not my own,
When I see thee as thou art,
Love thee with unsinning heart,
Then, Lord, shall I fully know,
Not till then, how much I owe.
When the praise of heav'n I hear,
Loud as thunders to the ear,
Loud as many waters' noise,
Sweet as harp's melodious voice,
Then, Lord, shall I fully know,
Not till then, how much I owe.
Chosen not for good in me,
Wakened up from wrath to flee,
Hidden in the Saviour's side,
By the Spirit sanctified,
Teach me, Lord, on earth to show,
By my love, how much I owe.

title_id: Ada Sinar Matahari di Jiwaku Hari Ini

title_en: Lo! what a glorious sight appears

lines.en: Lo! what a glorious sight appears
To our admiring eyes!
The former seas have passes away,
The former earth and skies.
The God of glory down to men
Removes his blest abode;
He dwells with men; his people they,
lines.ko: 그분은 사람들과 함께 거하십니다. 그의 사람들은,

lines.en: And he his people's God.
His gracious hand shall wipe the tear
lines.ko: 그분의 은혜로운 손이 눈물을 닦아 주실 것입니다

lines.en: From ev'ry weeping eye;
And pains, and groans, and griefs, and fears,
lines.ko: 그리고 고통과 신음과 슬픔과 두려움이 있습니다.

lines.en: And death itself, shall die.
lines.ko: 그리고 죽음 그 자체도 죽을 것이다.

lines.en: How long, dear Saviour, O how long
Shall this bright hour delay?
Fly swifter round, ye wheels of time,
And bring the welcome day!
O may we stand before the Lamb,
lines.ko: 오, 우리가 어린양 앞에 서게 하소서,

lines.en: When earth and seas are fled,
And hear the Judge pronounce our name
lines.ko: 그리고 판사가 우리 이름을 발음하는 것을 들어보세요

lines.en: With blessings on our head.

title_en: Who are these like stars appearing

lines.en: Who are these like stars appearing,
These before God's throne who stand?
lines.ko: 하나님의 보좌 앞에 서 있는 이 사람들은 누구입니까?

lines.en: Each a golden crown is wearing;
Who are all this glorious band?
Alleluia! hark, they sing,
Praising loud their heav'nly King.
lines.ko: 큰 소리로 그들의 하늘의 왕을 찬양합니다.

lines.en: Who are these of dazzling brightness,
These in God's own truth arrayed,
lines.ko: 이것들은 하나님 자신의 진리 안에 배열되어 있으며,

lines.en: Clad in robes of purest whiteness,
Robes whose lustre ne'er shall fade,
Ne'er be touched by time's rude hand?
lines.ko: 시간의 무례한 손에 닿을 수 없나요?

lines.en: Whence come all this glorious band?
lines.ko: 이 영광스러운 밴드는 모두 어디서 왔는가?

lines.en: These are they who have contended
For their Saviour's honor long,
Wrestling on till life was ended,
Foll'wing not the sinful throng;
These, who well the fight sustained,
Triumph through the Lamb have gained.
These are they whose hearts were riven,
Sore with woe and anguish tried,
Who in prayer full oft have striven
With the God they glorified;
Now, their painful conflict o'er,
God has bid them weep no more.
lines.ko: 하나님께서는 그들에게 더 이상 울지 말라고 명하셨습니다.

lines.en: These like priests have watched and waited,
Off'ring up to Christ their will;
Soul and body consecrated,
Day and night to serve him still:
Now in God's most holy place
Blest they stand before his face.
lines.ko: 그들이 그의 얼굴 앞에 서기를 축복합니다.

title_en: O Mother dear, Jerusalem

lines.en: O mother dear, Jerusalem,
When shall I come to thee?
When shall my sorrows have an end?
Thy joys when shall I see?
lines.ko: 당신의 기쁨을 언제 볼 수 있습니까?

lines.en: O happy harbor of the saints!
O sweet and pleasant soil!
In thee no sorrow may be found,
No grief, no care, no toil.
lines.ko: 슬픔도 없고, 걱정도 없고, 수고도 없습니다.

lines.en: Thy walls are made of precious stones,
Thy bulwarks diamonds square;
Thy gates are of right orient pearl,
Exceeding rich and rare.
Thy turrets and thy pinnacles
With garnets rare do shine;
Thy very streets are paved with gold,
Surpassing clear and fine.
Thy gardens and thy gallant walks
Continually are green,
There grow such sweet and pleasant flow'rs
lines.ko: 이렇게 다정하고 기분 좋은 꽃들이 자라고 있어요

lines.en: As nowhere else are seen.
Quite through the streets, with silver sound,
lines.ko: 은빛 소리와 함께 꽤 거리를 지나,

lines.en: The flood of life doth flow;
Upon whose banks on ev'ry side
The wood of life doth grow.
There trees for evermore bear fruit,
And evermore do spring;
There evermore the angels sit,
And evermore do sing.
Jerusalem, my happy home,
Would God I were in thee!
lines.ko: 하느님, 제가 당신 안에 있었으면 좋겠습니다!

lines.en: Would God my woes were at an end,
Thy joys that I might see!
lines.ko: 내가 볼 수 있는 당신의 기쁨!

title_en: Jerusalem the golden

lines.en: Jerusalem the golden,
With milk and honey blest,
Beneath thy contemplation
Sink heart and voice oppressed.
I know not, O I know not,
What joys await us there;
lines.ko: 그곳에서는 어떤 기쁨이 우리를 기다리고 있습니까?

lines.en: What radiancy of glory,
What bliss beyond compare.
lines.ko: 비교할 수 없을 만큼 큰 행복입니다.

lines.en: They stand, those halls of Zion,
All jubilant with song,
And bright with many an angel,
And all the martyr throng.
The Prince is ever in them,
The daylight is serene;
The pastures of the blessed
Are decked in glorious sheen.
There is the throne of David;
And there, from care released,
The song of them that triumph,
The shout of them that feast;
And they who with their Leader
lines.ko: 그리고 그들의 지도자와 함께 있는 사람들은

lines.en: Have conquered in the fight,
For ever and for ever
Are clad in robes of white.
O sweet and blessed country,
The home of God's elect!
O sweet and blessed country,
That eager hearts expect!
Jesus, in mercy bring us
To that dear land of rest;
Who art, with God the Father
And Spirit, ever blest.

title_en: I'm but a stranger here, heaven is my home

lines.en: I'm but a stranger here,
lines.id: Aku hanyalah orang asing di sini, Surga adalah rumahku

lines.en: Heav'n is my home;
lines.id: Bumi adalah gurun pasir yang suram, Surga adalah rumahku.

lines.en: Earth is a desert drear,
lines.id: Bahaya dan kesedihan selalu ada di sekelilingku

lines.en: Heav'n is my home;
lines.id: Surga adalah tanah airku, Surga adalah rumahku.

lines.en: Danger and sorrow stand
Round me on ev'ry hand;
Heav'n is my fatherland,
Heav'n is my home.
What though the tempest rage,
lines.id: Walaupun badai sedang berkecamuk, Surga adalah rumahku

lines.en: Heav'n is my home;
lines.id: Singkatlah masa ziarahku, Surga adalah rumahku.

lines.en: Short is my pilgrimage,
lines.id: Waktu yang dingin dan penuh kemenangan akan segera berakhir

lines.en: Heav'n is my home;
lines.id: Akhirnya aku akan sampai di rumah, Surga adalah rumahku.

lines.en: And time's wild wintry blast
Soon shall be over past;
I shall reach home at last,
Heav'n is my home;
There, at my Saviour's side,
lines.id: Di sana, di sisi Juruselamatku, Surga adalah rumahku

lines.en: Heav'n is my home;
lines.id: Aku akan ditaklukkan, Surga adalah rumahku.

lines.en: I shall be glorified,
lines.id: Ada yang baik dan terberkati, Yang paling kucintai dan terbaik,

lines.en: Heav'n is my home;
lines.id: Di sana juga, aku akan segera beristirahat, Surga adalah rumahku. Amin.

lines.en: There are the good and blest,
Those I love most and best;
And there I too shall rest,
Heav'n is my home;
Therefore I murmur not,
Heav'n is my home;
Whate'er my earthly lot,
Heav'n is my home;
And I shall surely stand
There at my Lord's right hand;
Heav'n is my fatherland,
Heav'n is my home.

title_id: Aku hanyalah Orang Asing di Sini

title_en: How bright these glorious spirits shine
title_ko: 이 영광스러운 영혼들이 얼마나 밝게 빛나는가 (자체번역)

lines.en: How bright these glorious spirits shine!
lines.ko: 이 영광스러운 영혼들은 얼마나 밝게 빛나고 있습니까!

lines.en: Whence all their white array?
lines.ko: 그 흰색 배열은 모두 어디서 왔습니까?

lines.en: How came they to the blissful seats
Of everlasting day?
Lo! these are they from sufferings great
lines.ko: 봐라! 이들은 큰 고통을 겪고 있는 사람들입니다

lines.en: Who came to realms of light!
And in the blood of Christ have washed
Those robes which shine so bright.
Now, with triumphal palms, they stand
lines.ko: 이제 그들은 승리의 손바닥을 들고 서 있습니다.

lines.en: Before the throne on high,
And serve the God they love, amidst
The glories of the sky.
His presence fills each heart with joy,
lines.ko: 그분의 현존은 각 사람의 마음을 기쁨으로 가득 채우고,

lines.en: Tunes ev'ry mouth to sing:
By day, by night, the sacred courts
With glad hosannas ring.
Hunger and thirst are felt no more,
lines.ko: 더 이상 배고픔과 목마름이 느껴지지 않고,

lines.en: Nor suns with scorching ray;
God is their Sun, whose cheering beams
lines.ko: 신은 그들의 태양이시며, 그의 환호하는 빛은

lines.en: Diffuse eternal day.
The Lamb which dwells amidst the throne
Shall o'er them still preside,
Feed them with nourishment divine,
And all their footsteps guide.
'Mong pastures green he'll lead his flock
lines.ko: 푸른 풀밭에서 그는 양 떼를 이끌 것이다

lines.en: Where living streams appear;
And God the Lord from ev'ry eye
lines.ko: 그리고 모든 사람의 눈으로 본 주 하나님

lines.en: Shall wipe off ev'ry tear.
To him who sits upon the throne,
The God whom we adore,
And to the Lamb that once was slain,
Be glory evermore!

title_en: Hark! the sound of holy voices

lines.en: Hark! the sound of holy voices,
Chanting at the crystal sea,
Alleluia! Alleluia!
Alleluia! Lord, to thee:
Multitude, which none can number,
Like the stars in glory stand
Clothed in white apparel, holding
Palms of vict'ry in their hand.
lines.ko: 그들의 손에는 승리의 손바닥이 들려 있습니다.

lines.en: They have come from tribulation,
And have washed their robes in blood,
Washed them in the blood of Jesus;
Tried they were, and firm they stood;
lines.ko: 그들은 시험을 받고 굳건히 서 있었습니다.

lines.en: Mocked, imprisoned, stoned, tormented,
lines.ko: 조롱을 받고, 옥에 갇히고, 돌로 맞고, 고문을 당하고,

lines.en: Sawn asunder, slain with sword,
They have conquered death and Satan
By the might of Christ the Lord.
Marching with thy cross their banner,
They have triumphed, following
Thee, the Captain of salvation,
Thee, their Saviour and their King;
Gladly, Lord, with thee they suffered;
lines.ko: 주님, 당신과 함께 그들은 기꺼이 고난을 받았습니다.

lines.en: Gladly, Lord, with thee they died;
lines.ko: 주님, 다행히도 그들은 당신과 함께 죽었습니다.

lines.en: And by death to life immortal
They were born and glorified.
God of God, the One-begotten,
Light of light, Emmanuel,
In whose body joined together
All the saints for ever dwell;
Pour upon us of thy fullness
That we may for evermore
God the Father, God the Son, and
God the Holy Ghost adore.

title_en: Safe in the arms of Jesus

lines.en: Safe in the arms of Jesus,
lines.ko: 주 예수 넓은 품에 나 편히 안겨서
lines.id: Aman dalam pelukan Yesus,

lines.en: Safe on his gentle breast,
lines.ko: 그 크신 사랑 안에 나 편히 쉬겠네
lines.id: Aman di dada lembut-Nya,

lines.en: There by his love o'ershaded,
lines.ko: 영광의 들을 지나 저 푸른 바다 건너
lines.id: Disanalah kasih-Nya di atas bayangan,

lines.en: Sweetly my soul shall rest.
lines.id: Manisnya jiwaku akan beristirahat.

lines.en: Hark! 'tis the voice of angels,
lines.ko: 주 예수 넓은 품에 나 편히 안겨서
lines.id: Mendengar! Ini suara malaikat,

lines.en: Borne in a song to me,
lines.ko: 그 크신 사랑 안에 나 편히 쉬겠네
lines.id: Terlahir dalam sebuah lagu untukku,

lines.en: Over the fields of glory,
lines.id: Di atas ladang kemuliaan,

lines.en: Over the jasper sea.
lines.id: Di atas jas-per laut.
Aman dalam pelukan Yesus,
Aman di dada lembut-Nya,
Disanalah kasih-Nya di atas bayangan,
Manisnya jiwaku akan beristirahat.

lines.en: Safe in the arms of Jesus,
lines.ko: 주 예수 넓은 품에 나 편히 안기니
lines.id: Aman dalam pelukan Yesus,

lines.en: Safe on his gentle breast,
lines.ko: 이 세상 악한 세력 날 해치 못하네
lines.id: Aman dari perawatan korosi,

lines.en: There by his love o'ershaded,
lines.id: Aman dari godaan dunia,

lines.en: Sweetly my soul shall rest.
lines.id: Dosa tidak dapat merugikan saya di sana.

lines.ko: 주 예수 넓은 품에 나 편히 안겨서
lines.id: Bebas dari penyakit derita,

lines.ko: 그 크신 사랑 안에 나 편히 쉬겠네
lines.id: Bebas dari keraguan dan ketakutanku
Hanya tinggal beberapa percobaan lagi,
Hanya beberapa air mata lagi!
Aman dalam pelukan Yesus,
Aman di dada lembut-Nya,
Disanalah kasih-Nya di atas bayangan,
Manisnya jiwaku akan beristirahat.

lines.en: Safe in the arms of Jesus,
lines.ko: 주 예수 죄인 위해 십자가 졌으니
lines.id: Yesus, perlindungan hatiku yang terkasih,

lines.en: Safe from corroding care,
lines.ko: 이 만세 반석 위에 나 굳게 서겠네
lines.id: Yesus telah mati untukku

lines.en: Safe from the world's temptations,
lines.id: Teguh di Batu A-ges,

lines.en: Sin cannot harm me there.
lines.ko: 새 아침 동터 올 때 주 만나 뵙겠네
lines.id: Kapan pun turku akan terjadi.

lines.en: Free from the blight of sorrow,
lines.ko: 주 예수 넓은 품에 나 편히 안겨서
lines.id: di sini biarkan aku menunggu dengan sabar,

lines.en: Free from my doubts and fears,
lines.ko: 그 크신 사랑 안에 나 편히 쉬겠네
lines.id: Tunggu sampai malam tiba

lines.en: Only a few more trials,
lines.id: Tunggu sampai aku melihat pagi hari

lines.en: Only a few more tears.
lines.id: Istirahatlah di pantai emas.
Aman dalam pelukan Yesus,
Aman di dada lembut-Nya,
Disanalah kasih-Nya di atas bayangan,
Manisnya jiwaku akan beristirahat.

lines.en: Jesus, my heart's dear Refuge,
Jesus has died for me;
Firm on the Rock of Ages
Ever my trust shall be.
Here let me wait with patience,
Wait till the night is o'er,
Wait till I see the morning
Break on the golden shore.

title_en: A few more years shall roll

lines.en: A few more years shall roll,
lines.ko: 앞으로 몇 년은 더 굴러갈 것이다.

lines.en: A few more seasons come,
And we shall be with those that rest
lines.ko: 그리고 우리는 쉬는 이들과 함께 있을 것이다

lines.en: Asleep within the tomb:
Then, O my Lord, prepare
My soul for that great day;
lines.ko: 그 위대한 날을 위한 내 영혼;

lines.en: O wash me in thy precious blood,
lines.ko: 오, 당신의 보혈로 나를 씻어 주소서.

lines.en: And take my sins away.
A few more storms shall beat
lines.ko: 폭풍이 몇 번 더 닥칠 것이다

lines.en: On this wild rocky shore,
And we shall be where tempests cease,
lines.ko: 그러면 우리는 폭풍우가 그치는 곳에 있게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: And surges swell no more:
lines.ko: 그리고 파도가 더 이상 커지지 않습니다.

lines.en: Then, O my Lord, prepare
My soul for that calm day;
lines.ko: 그 평온한 날을 위한 내 영혼;

lines.en: A few more sabbaths here
lines.ko: 여기에 안식일이 몇 번 더 있습니다

lines.en: Shall cheer us on our way,
And we shall reach the endless rest,
lines.ko: 그리고 우리는 끝없는 안식에 도달할 것입니다.

lines.en: Th'eternal sabbath day:
Then, O my Lord, prepare
My soul for that sweet day;
lines.ko: 그 달콤한 날을 위한 내 영혼;

lines.en: 'Tis but a little while,
And he shall come again
Who died that we might live, who lives
lines.ko: 우리를 살게 하려고 죽으신 분, 살아 계신 분

lines.en: That we with him may reign:
Then, O my Lord, prepare
My soul for that glad day;
lines.ko: 그 기쁜 날을 위한 내 영혼;

title_en: At thy feet, our God and Father

lines.en: At thy feet, our God and Father,
lines.ko: 오늘까지 복과 은혜 내려 주신 주 앞에
lines.id: Di kaki-Mu, Tuhan dan Bapa kami,

lines.en: Who hast blessed us all our days,
lines.ko: 감사 찬송 부르면서 새해 맞이 합니다
lines.id: Siapa yang telah memberkati kita sepanjang hari-hari kita,

lines.en: We with grateful hearts would gather,
lines.ko: 우리 갈길 비춰주는 주의 빛을 기리고
lines.id: Kami dengan hati bersyukur akan berkumpul

lines.en: To begin the year with praise:
lines.id: Untuk memulai hari dengan pujian

lines.en: Praise for light so brightly shining
lines.id: Pujian atas cahaya yang bersinar terang

lines.en: On our steps from heav'n above;
lines.id: Pada langkah kita dari surga di atas

lines.en: Praise for mercies daily twining
lines.id: Pujian atas belas kasihan yang terjadi setiap hari

lines.en: Round us golden cords of love.
lines.id: Kelilingi kami dengan tali cinta emas.

lines.en: Jesus, for thy love most tender,
lines.ko: 죄인 위해 십자가에 희생하신 우리 주
lines.id: Yesus atas kasih-Mu yang paling lembut

lines.en: On the cross for sinners shown,
lines.ko: 그 사랑에 감격하여 이 몸 바치옵니다
lines.id: Di kayu salib bagi orang-orang berdosa ditunjukkan,

lines.en: We would praise thee, and surrender
lines.ko: 우리 갈길 다가도록 친구 되어 주시고
lines.id: Kami akan memuji-muji-Mu dan berserah diri

lines.en: All our hearts to be thine own:
lines.id: Segenap hati kami menjadi milik-Mu.

lines.en: With so blest a friend provided,
lines.id: Dengan begitu diberkatinya seorang Teman yang disediakan,

lines.en: We upon our way would go,
lines.id: Kami sedang dalam perjalanan untuk berangkat.

lines.en: Sure of being safely guided,
lines.id: Yakin dibimbing dengan aman,

lines.en: Guarded well from ev'ry foe.
lines.id: Dilindungi dengan baik dari setiap musuh.

lines.en: Ev'ry day will be the brighter
lines.ko: 주의 얼굴 뵙고 살면 하루하루 즐겁고
lines.id: Setiap hari akan menjadi lebih cerah

lines.en: When thy gracious face we see;
lines.ko: 주와 함께 짐을 지면 나의 짐이 가벼워
lines.id: Saat wajah anggunmu kami lihat

lines.en: Ev'ry burden will be lighter
lines.ko: 이 땅 위에 영광의 날 밝아오는 때까지
lines.id: Setiap beban akan lebih ringan

lines.en: When we know it comes from thee.
lines.ko: 사랑 깃발 휘날리며 봉사하며 살리라 아멘
lines.id: Ketika kami mengetahui itu berasal dariMu.

lines.en: Spread thy love's broad banner o'er us,
lines.id: Sebarkan panji lebar kasih-Mu di hadapan kami

lines.en: Give us strength to serve and wait,
lines.id: Beri kami kekuatan untuk mengabdi dan menunggu,

lines.en: Till the glory breaks before us
lines.id: Sampai kemuliaan-Mu pecah di hadapan kami

lines.en: Through the city's open gate.
lines.id: Melalui gerbang kota yang terbuka. Amin.

title_id: Di kaki-Mu, Tuhan dan Bapa kami

title_en: For thy mercy and thy grace

lines.en: For thy mercy and thy grace,
Faithful through another year,
Hear our song of thankfulness;
Father, and Redeemer, hear.
Lo! our sins on thee we cast,
Thee, our perfect sacrifice;
And, forgetting all the past,
Press towards our glorious prize.
Dark the future; let thy light
Guide us, Bright and Morning Star:
Fierce our foes, and hard the fight;
lines.ko: 우리의 적들을 맹렬하게 몰아붙이고, 치열한 싸움을 벌이십시오.

lines.en: Arm us, Saviour, for the war.
In our weakness and distress,
Rock of strength, be thou our stay;
In the pathless wilderness
Be our true and living way.
Keep us faithful, keep us pure,
Keep us evermore thine own;
lines.ko: 우리를 영원히 당신의 것으로 지켜 주소서.

lines.en: Help, O help us to endure;
lines.ko: 도와주세요, 오 우리가 견딜 수 있도록 도와주세요.

lines.en: Fit us for the promised crown.
So within thy palace gate
We shall praise, on golden strings,
Thee, the only Potentate,
Lord of lords, and King of kings.

title_en: Great God, we sing that mighty hand
title_ko: 위대하신 하나님, 우리는 그 강력한 손을 노래합니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: Great God, we sing that mighty hand
lines.ko: 위대하신 하나님, 우리는 그 강력한 손을 노래합니다

lines.en: By which supported still we stand;
The opening year thy mercy shows;
That mercy crowns it till it close.
lines.ko: 그 자비는 그것이 끝날 때까지 그것을 면류관으로 삼습니다.

lines.en: By day, by night, at home, abroad,
Still are we guarded by our God;
lines.ko: 아직도 우리는 우리 하나님의 보호를 받고 있습니다.

lines.en: By his incessant bounty fed,
By his unerring counsel led.
With grateful hearts the past we own;
lines.ko: 감사하는 마음으로 우리는 과거를 소유하고 있습니다.

lines.en: The future, all to us unknown,
lines.ko: 우리 모두가 알 수 없는 미래,

lines.en: We to thy guardian care commit,
And peaceful leave before thy feet.
lines.ko: 그리고 당신의 발 앞에 평화롭게 떠나십시오.

lines.en: In scenes exalted or depressed,
Thou art our Joy, and thou our Rest;
Thy goodness all our hopes shall raise,
lines.ko: 당신의 선하심이 우리의 모든 희망을 불러일으킬 것입니다.

lines.en: Adored through all our changing days.
lines.ko: 우리의 변화하는 모든 날을 통해 사랑 받았습니다.

lines.en: When death shall interrupt these songs,
And seal in silence mortal tongues,
lines.ko: 그리고 필멸의 혀를 침묵 속에 봉인하고,

lines.en: Our Helper God, in whom we trust,
Shall keep our souls and guard our dust.
lines.ko: 우리 영혼을 지키시고 우리 먼지를 지키시리이다.

title_en: While with ceaseless course the sun

lines.en: While with ceaseless course the sun
Hasted through the former year,
Many souls their race have run,
Never more to meet us here:
lines.ko: 더 이상 여기서 우리를 만나지 마세요:

lines.en: Fixed in an eternal state,
They have done with all below;
We a little longer wait,
But how little none can know.
As the winged arrow flies
Speedily the mark to find,
As the lightning from the skies
Darts, and leaves no trace behind,
Swiftly thus our fleeting days
Bear us down life's rapid stream;
Upward, Lord, our spirits raise,
lines.ko: 위로, 주님, 우리 영혼이 일어나게 하소서.

lines.en: All below is but a dream.
Thanks for mercies past receive;
Pardon of our sins renew;
Teach us henceforth how to live
lines.ko: 앞으로는 어떻게 살아야 하는지 가르쳐 주세요

lines.en: With eternity in view;
Bless thy Word to young and old;
lines.ko: 젊은이와 노인 모두에게 당신의 말씀을 축복하십시오.

lines.en: Fill us with a Saviour's love;
And when life's short tale is told,
lines.ko: 그리고 인생의 짧은 이야기를 할 때,

lines.en: May we dwell with thee above.
lines.ko: 우리가 위에서 당신과 함께 거하게 하소서.

title_en: All good gifts around us are sent from heav'n above
title_ko: 우리 주변의 모든 좋은 선물은 하늘로부터 보내집니다. (자체번역)

lines.en: We plough the fields, and scatter
The good seed on the land,
But it is fed and watered
By God's almighty hand;
He sends the snow in winter,
The warmth to swell the grain,
The breezes and the sunshine,
And soft refreshing rain.
All good gifts around us
Are sent from heav'n above,
Then thank the Lord, O thank the Lord
lines.ko: 그럼 주님께 감사해, 오 주님께 감사해

lines.en: For all his love.
He only is the Maker
Of all things near and far;
He paints the wayside flower,
He lights the evening star;
The winds and waves obey him,
By him the birds are fed;
lines.ko: 그 분에 의해 새들은 먹이를 받습니다.

lines.en: Much more to us, his children,
lines.ko: 그분의 자녀들인 우리에게는 훨씬 더 많은 것입니다.

lines.en: He gives our daily bread.
We thank thee, then, O Father,
For all things bright and good,
The seed time and the harvest,
Our life, our health, our food:
No gifts have we to offer
For all thy love imparts,
But that which thou desirest,
Our humble, thankful hearts.

alt_titles: We plough the fields, and scatter

title_en: Come, ye thankful people, come

lines.en: Come, ye thankful people, come,
lines.id: Lihatlah burung-burung yang terbang di angkasa,

lines.en: Raise the song of harvest home:
lines.ko: 추운 겨울 오기 전 염려 없게 거뒀네
lines.id: Bagaimana mereka tidak membajak tanah.

lines.en: All is safely gathered in,
lines.id: Juga belum berkumpul untuk gudang

lines.en: Ere the winter storms begin;
lines.ko: 주의 전에 모여서 추수 찬송 부르세
lines.id: Buah apa pun yang dihasilkan tanah.

lines.en: God, our Maker, doth provide
lines.id: Namun Bapa Surgawi Anda memberi mereka makan

lines.en: For our wants to be supplied:
lines.id: Lalu masa depan apa yang bisa Anda takuti?

lines.en: Come to God's own temple, come,
lines.id: Bagi-Nya, kamu jauh lebih berharga,

lines.en: Raise the song of harvest home.
lines.id: Tidakkah kamu ingin mereka diberi makan?

lines.en: All the world is God's own field,
lines.ko: 이 세상은 밭이요 주는 씨를 뿌리네
lines.id: Lihatlah bunga lili di padang rumput,

lines.en: Fruit unto his praise to yield;
lines.ko: 좋은 곡식 싹 날 때 가라지도 나도다
lines.id: Bagaimana mereka tidak bekerja keras dan tidak memintal.

lines.en: Wheat and tares together sown,
lines.ko: 싹과 잎이 자라서 열매 맺게 되나니
lines.id: Namun pakaian mereka membuat kemegahan

lines.en: Unto joy or sorrow grown:
lines.id: Raja Sol-o-mon tampak redup.

lines.en: First the blade, and then the ear,
lines.id: Maka Tuhan tidak akan mendandani anak-anak-Nya,

lines.en: Then the full corn shall appear:
lines.id: Siapa yang Dia cintai, yang Dia sayangi,

lines.en: Lord of harvest, grant that we
lines.id: Jika Dia memang menghiasi rumput

lines.en: Wholesome grain and pure may be.
lines.id: Yang mana yang ditebang dan dibakar oleh petani?

lines.en: For the Lord our God shall come,
lines.id: Jangan cemas akan masa depan,

lines.en: And shall take his harvest home;
lines.ko: 밭에 있는 나쁜 것 모두 소멸 하실 때
lines.id: Apa yang harus dimakan atau diminum atau dipakai,

lines.en: From his field shall in that day
lines.id: Untuk ketakutan dan kekhawatiran yang bodoh

lines.en: All offences purge away;
lines.id: Apakah mereka peduli pada orang-orang non-Yahudi.

lines.en: Give his angels charge at last
lines.id: Namun karunia Bapa Surgawi Anda

lines.en: In the fire the tares to cast,
lines.id: Membawamu ke sayap elang,

lines.en: But the fruitful ears to store
lines.id: Dan sebelum Anda bertanya, Ayah Anda

lines.en: In his garner evermore.
lines.id: Tahu Anda membutuhkan semua hal ini.

lines.en: Even so, Lord, quickly come
lines.id: Carilah dahulu Kerajaan Ayahmu,

lines.en: To thy final harvest home;
lines.ko: 죄와 슬픔 중에서 우리 건져 주소서
lines.id: Dan kebenaran-Nya, dan lakukan

lines.en: Gather thou thy people in,
lines.id: Bukan kehendak Anda, melainkan kehendak-Nya, dan pastinya

lines.en: Free from sorrow, free from sin;
lines.ko: 천군천사 어울려 추수 찬송 부르리 아멘
lines.id: Hal-hal ini juga harus ditambahkan.

lines.en: There for ever purified,
lines.id: Jangan cemas untuk hari esok,

lines.en: In thy presence to abide:
lines.id: Tidak memikul beban sehari dua kali.

lines.en: Come, with all thine angels, come,
lines.id: Tuhan telah merencanakan kesulitan setiap hari

lines.en: Raise the glorious harvest home.
lines.id: Karena hari mereka sendiri sudah cukup.

title_id: Ayo, Hai Orang-orang yang Bersyukur, Ayo

title_en: God of our fathers, whose almighty hand

lines.en: God of our fathers, whose almighty hand
Leads forth in beauty all the starry band
lines.ko: 모든 별빛 밴드를 아름다움으로 이끌어 가세요

lines.en: Of shining worlds in splendor through the skies,
Our grateful songs before thy throne arise.
lines.ko: 당신의 보좌가 일어나기 전에 우리의 감사의 노래를 부르나이다.

lines.en: Thy love divine hath led us in the past;
lines.ko: 당신의 신성한 사랑이 과거에도 우리를 인도하셨습니다.

lines.en: In this free land by thee our lot is cast;
lines.ko: 이 자유로운 땅에서 우리의 운명은 당신에 의해 결정되었습니다.

lines.en: Be thou our Ruler, Guardian, Guide, and Stay;
lines.ko: 우리의 통치자, 수호자, 안내자, 머무름이 되십시오.

lines.en: Thy Word our law, thy paths our chosen way.
lines.ko: 당신의 말씀은 우리의 법이고, 당신의 길은 우리가 선택한 길입니다.

lines.en: From war's alarms, from deadly pestilence,
Be thy strong arm our ever sure defence;
lines.ko: 당신의 강한 팔이 우리의 영원한 방어자가 되소서.

lines.en: Thy true religion in our hearts increase,
lines.ko: 우리 마음속에 당신의 참된 종교가 증가하고,

lines.en: Thy bounteous goodness nourish us in peace.
lines.ko: 당신의 풍성한 선하심이 우리를 평화롭게 양육합니다.

lines.en: Refresh thy people on their toilsome way,
lines.ko: 당신의 백성의 수고한 길을 새롭게 하시고,

lines.en: Lead us from night to never-ending day;
lines.ko: 우리를 밤에서 끝없는 낮으로 이끌어 주소서.

lines.en: Fill all our lives with love and grace divine,
lines.ko: 우리의 모든 삶을 신성한 사랑과 은혜로 채우시어,

lines.en: And glory, laud, and praise be ever thine.
lines.ko: 그리고 영광과 찬양과 찬양이 항상 당신의 것이 될 것입니다.

title_en: God the All terrible! King, who ordainest

lines.en: God the All-terrible! King, who ordainest
lines.ko: 어둔 밤 쉬 되리니 네 직분 지켜서
lines.id: Bekerja, karena malam akan tiba:

lines.en: Great winds thy clarions, lightnings thy sword,
lines.ko: 찬 이슬 맺힐 때에 일찍 일어나

lines.id: Bekerja, karena malam akan tiba:

lines.en: Watching invisible, judging unheard,
lines.id: Bekerjalah pada siang hari yang cerah

lines.en: Save us in mercy, O save us from danger;
lines.id: Isi jam-jam paling terang dengan kerja,

lines.en: Give to us peace in our time, O Lord.
lines.ko: 일할 수 없는 밤이 속히 오리라
lines.id: Istirahat pasti datang dan segera

lines.en: God the All-merciful! Earth hath forsaken
lines.ko: 어둔 밤 쉬 되리니 네 직분 지켜서
lines.id: Bekerja, karena malam akan tiba:

lines.en: Thy ways of blessedness, slighted thy Word;
lines.ko: 지는 해 비낀 볕에 힘써 일하고
lines.id: Di bawah langit matahari terbenam,

lines.en: Bid not thy wrath in its terrors awaken;
lines.id: Sementara warna cerahnya bersinar,

lines.en: Give to us peace in our time, O Lord.
lines.ko: 할 수만 있는 대로 힘써 일하라
lines.id: Bekerja, untuk lalat siang hari

lines.en: God the All-righteous One! Man hath defied thee;
Yet to eternity standeth thy Word;
Falsehood and wrong shall not tarry beside thee;
Give to us peace in our time, O Lord.
God the All-wise! By the fire of thy chastening,
Earth shall to freedom and truth be restored;
Through the thick darkness thy kingdom is hastening;
Thou wilt give peace in thy time, O Lord.

title_en: To thee, our God, we fly for mercy
title_ko: 우리 하느님 당신께로 우리는 자비를 구하러 날아갑니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: To thee, our God, we fly
For mercy and for grace:
O hear our lowly cry,
And hide not thou thy face:
O Lord, stretch forth thy mighty hand,
lines.ko: 오 주님, 당신의 강한 손을 펴시어,

lines.en: And guard and bless our fatherland.
Arise, O Lord of Hosts;
Be jealous for thy Name,
And drive from out our coasts
The sins that put to shame:
The powers ordained by thee
With heav'nly wisdom bless;
May they thy servants be,
And rule in righteousness:
The church of thy dear Son
Inflame with love's pure fire;
Bind her once more in one,
And life and truth inspire:
Give peace, Lord, in our time;
O let no foe draw nigh,
lines.ko: 오 어떤 적도 가까이 다가오지 못하게 하시고,

lines.en: Nor lawless deed of crime
Insult thy majesty:

title_en: Almighty God, thy lofty throne

lines.en: From Psalm 89:14-18
Almighty God, thy lofty throne
Has justice for its cornerstone,
And shining bright before thy face
Are truth and love and boundless grace.
With blessing is the nation crowned
Whose people know the joyful sound;
They in the light, O Lord, shall live,
The light thy face and favor give.
Thy name with gladness they confess,
Exalted in thy righteousness;
Their fame and might to thee belong,
For in thy favor they are strong.
All glory unto God we yield,
Jehovah is our Help and Shield;
All praise and honor we will bring
lines.ko: 우리는 모든 칭찬과 명예를 가져올 것입니다

lines.en: To Israel's Holy One, our King.

title_en: Judge Eternal, throned in splendor

lines.en: Judge Eternal, throned in splendor,
Lord of lords and King of kings,
With thy living fire of judgment
Purge this land of bitter things;
Solace all its wide dominion
lines.ko: 그 넓은 지배권을 모두 위로해 주세요

lines.en: With the healing of thy wings.
Still the weary folk are pining
For the hour that brings release;
And the city's crowded clangor
Cries aloud for sin to cease;
And the homesteads and the woodlands
Plead in silence for their peace.
Crown, O God, thine own endeavor;
lines.ko: 오 하나님, 당신 자신의 노력으로 면류관을 얻으소서.

lines.en: Cleave our darkness with thy sword;
Feed the faint and hungry heathen
With the richness of thy Word;
Cleanse the body of this nation
Through the gospel of the Lord.

title_en: Great King of nations, hear our prayer

lines.en: Great King of nations, hear our prayer,
lines.id: Jiwaku di pengasingan yang sedih muncul di lautan kehidupan,

lines.en: While at thy feet we fall,
lines.id: Begitu terbebani dengan dosa dan kesusahan,

lines.en: And humbly, with united cry,
lines.ko: 내 주 예수 날 오라 부르시니
lines.id: Hingga aku mendengar suara manis berkata, "Tentukan aku pilihanmu",

lines.en: To thee for mercy call.
lines.id: Dan aku memasuki "Tempat Peristirahatan".

lines.en: I've anchor-ed my soul in the "Ha-ven of Rest,"
lines.id: Aku telah menambatkan jiwaku di "Tempat Istirahat",

lines.en: I'll sail the wide seas- no more
lines.id: Aku akan mengarungi lautan luas – tidak lebih

lines.en: The tempest may sweep o'er the wild strom-y deep
lines.id: Badai mungkin menyapu lautan yang dalam

lines.en: In Je-sus I'm safe ev-er-more.
lines.id: Di dalam Yesus aku semakin aman.

lines.en: The guilt is ours, but grace is thine,
lines.id: Aku menyerahkan diriku pada pelukan lembut-Nya,

lines.en: O turn us not away;
lines.id: Dan iman memegang Firman,

lines.en: But hear us from thy lofty throne,
lines.id: Belengguku terlepas, dan jiwaku tertambat

lines.en: And help us when we pray.
lines.id: "Tempat Istirahat" adalah Tuhanku.

lines.en: I've anchor-ed my soul in the "Ha-ven of Rest,"
lines.id: Aku telah menambatkan jiwaku di "Tempat Istirahat",

lines.en: I'll sail the wide seas- no more
lines.id: Aku akan mengarungi lautan luas – tidak lebih

lines.en: The tempest may sweep o'er the wild strom-y deep
lines.id: Badai mungkin menyapu lautan yang dalam

lines.en: In Je-sus I'm safe ev-er-more.
lines.id: Di dalam Yesus aku semakin aman.

lines.en: Our fathers' sins were manifold,
lines.id: Nyanyian jiwaku, karena Tuhan telah membuatku utuh,

lines.en: And ours no less we own,
lines.id: Telah menjadi cerita lama yang sangat diberkati,

lines.en: Yet wondrously from age to age
lines.ko: 내 주 예수 날 건져 주시오니
lines.id: Tentang Yesus yang akan menyelamatkan siapa pun yang memilikinya

lines.en: Thy goodness hath been shown.
lines.id: Sebuah rumah di "Ha-ven of Rest."

lines.en: I've anchor-ed my soul in the "Ha-ven of Rest,"
lines.id: Aku telah menambatkan jiwaku di "Tempat Istirahat",

lines.en: I'll sail the wide seas- no more
lines.id: Aku akan mengarungi lautan luas – tidak lebih

lines.en: The tempest may sweep o'er the wild strom-y deep
lines.id: Badai mungkin menyapu lautan yang dalam

lines.en: In Je-sus I'm safe ev-er-more.
lines.id: Di dalam Yesus aku semakin aman.

lines.en: When dangers, like a stormy sea,
Beset our country round,
To thee we looked, to thee we cried,
And help in thee was found.
With one consent we meekly bow
Beneath thy chastening hand,
And, pouring forth confession meet,
Mourn with our mourning land.
With pitying eye behold our need,
As thus we lift our prayer;
Correct us with thy judgments, Lord,
Then let thy mercy spare.

title_en: O God of love, O King of peace
title_ko: 오 사랑의 하나님, 오 평화의 왕이시여 (자체번역)

lines.en: O God of love, O King of peace,
lines.ko: 오 사랑의 하느님, 오 평화의 왕이시여,

lines.en: Make wars throughout the world to cease;
The wrath of sinful man restrain;
Give peace, O God, give peace again.
lines.ko: 오 하나님, 평화를 주소서, 다시 평화를 주소서.

lines.en: Remember, Lord, thy works of old,
The wonders that our fathers told;
Remember not our sin's dark stain;
lines.ko: 우리 죄의 어두운 얼룩을 기억하지 마십시오.

lines.en: Give peace, O God, give peace again.
lines.ko: 오 하나님, 평화를 주소서, 다시 평화를 주소서.

lines.en: Whom shall we trust but thee, O Lord?
lines.ko: 여호와여, 우리가 당신 외에 누구를 의뢰하리이까?

lines.en: Where rest but on thy faithful Word?
lines.ko: 당신의 신실한 말씀 외에 어디에 쉴 곳이 있겠습니까?

lines.en: None ever called on thee in vain;
Give peace, O God, give peace again.
lines.ko: 오 하나님, 평화를 주소서, 다시 평화를 주소서.

lines.en: Where saints and angels dwell above
All hearts are knit in holy love;
lines.ko: 모든 마음은 거룩한 사랑으로 엮여 있습니다.

lines.en: O bind us in that heav'nly chain;
lines.ko: 오, 저 하늘의 사슬에 우리를 묶으소서;

lines.en: Give peace, O God, give peace again.
lines.ko: 오 하나님, 평화를 주소서, 다시 평화를 주소서.

title_en: Christ, by heavenly hosts adored

lines.en: Christ, by heav'nly hosts adored,
lines.ko: 주 예수 넓은 사랑 그 크신 은혜를
lines.id: Saya suka menceritakan kisahnya

lines.en: Gracious, mighty, sovereign Lord,
lines.ko: 나 힘써 전파함은 참 기쁜 일일세
lines.id: Dari hal-hal yang tidak terlihat di atas,

lines.en: God of nations, King of kings,
lines.ko: 주 예수 복된 말씀 생명과 진리요
lines.id: Tentang Yesus dan kemuliaan-Nya,

lines.en: Head of all created things,
lines.ko: 내 맘의 갈급함을 다 채워 주시네
lines.id: Tentang Yesus dan kasih-Nya:

lines.en: By the Church with joy confessed,
lines.ko: 예부터 전한 말씀 주 예수 크신 사랑
lines.id: Saya suka menceritakan kisahnya

lines.en: God o'er all, for ever blessed,
lines.ko: 나 항상 전파하기 참 기뻐 하도다
lines.id: Karena aku tahu ini mendatang.

lines.en: Pleading at thy throne we stand,
lines.id: Itu memuaskan kerinduanku

lines.en: Save thy people, bless our land.
lines.id: Karena tidak ada hal lain yang bisa dilakukan.

lines.en: On our fields of grass and grain
lines.ko: 이 말씀 전할 때에 내 맘이 기쁘고
lines.id: Saya suka menceritakan kisahnya

lines.en: Send, O Lord, the kindly rain;
lines.ko: 그 말씀 전할 수록 새 기쁨 넘치네
lines.id: Ini menyenangkan untuk diulangi kembali

lines.en: O'er our wide and goodly land
lines.ko: 구원의 복된 말씀 못 들은 사람이
lines.id: Tampaknya, setiap kali aku menceritakannya

lines.en: Crown the labors of each hand.
lines.id: Lebih manis lagi:

lines.en: Let thy kind protection be
lines.ko: 예부터 전한 말씀 주 예수 크신 사랑
lines.id: Saya suka bercerita,

lines.en: O'er our commerce on the sea.
lines.ko: 나 항상 전파하기 참 기뻐 하도다
lines.id: Bagi sebagian orang belum pernah mendengarnya

lines.en: Open, Lord, thy bounteous hand;
lines.id: Pesan keselamatan

lines.en: Bless our people, bless our land.
lines.id: Dari Firman Suci Tuhan sendiri.

lines.en: Let our rulers ever be
lines.ko: 이 말씀 들은 사람 또 듣기 원하고
lines.id: Saya suka menceritakan kisahnya

lines.en: Men that love and honor thee;
lines.ko: 목 말라 사모하니 그 말씀 진리라
lines.id: Bagi mereka yang paling mengetahuinya

lines.en: Let the pow'rs by thee ordained
lines.ko: 그 나라 영광 중에 나 부를 새 노래
lines.id: Tampak lapar dan haus

lines.en: Be in righteousness maintained.
lines.id: Untuk mendengarnya, seperti istirahat:

lines.en: In the people's hearts increase
lines.ko: 예부터 전한 말씀 주 예수 크신 사랑
lines.id: Dan ketika dalam adegan kemuliaan

lines.en: Love of piety and peace.
lines.ko: 나 항상 전파하기 참 기뻐 하도다
lines.id: Saya menyanyikan lagu baru dan baru,

lines.en: Thus united, may we stand
lines.id: 'Ini akan menjadi kisah yang lama, yang lama

lines.en: One wide, free, and happy land.
lines.id: Yang sudah lama aku cintai.

title_en: O happy house, where thou art loved
title_ko: 오 행복한 집이여, 당신이 사랑받는 곳이여 (자체번역)

lines.en: O happy home, where thou art loved the dearest,
lines.ko: 오 행복한 집이여, 당신이 가장 사랑하는 사람을 사랑하는 곳이여,

lines.en: Thou loving Friend and Saviour of our race,
lines.ko: 당신은 우리 인류의 사랑하는 친구이자 구원자이시며,

lines.en: And where among the guests there never cometh
lines.ko: 그리고 손님 중에 결코 오지 않는 곳

lines.en: One who can hold such high and honored place!
lines.ko: 이렇게 높고 영광스러운 자리를 차지할 수 있는 분!

lines.en: O happy home, where two in heart united
lines.ko: 오 행복한 집, 두 사람이 마음으로 하나가 된 곳

lines.en: In holy faith and blessed hope are one,
Whom death a little while alone divideth,
And cannot end the union here begun!
lines.ko: 그리고 여기서 시작된 결합은 끝낼 수 없습니다!

lines.en: O happy home, whose little ones are given
lines.ko: 오 행복한 집, 어린아이를 주는 집이여

lines.en: Early to thee in humble faith and prayer,
lines.ko: 겸손한 믿음과 기도로 일찍 당신에게 다가가십시오.

lines.en: To thee, their friend, who from the heights of heaven
lines.ko: 하늘 높은 곳에서 온 그들의 친구인 너에게

lines.en: Guides them, and guards with more than mother's care!
lines.ko: 그들을 인도하고 어머니의 보살핌 이상의 보살핌으로 보호합니다!

lines.en: O happy home, where each one serves thee, lowly,
lines.ko: 오 행복한 집이여, 저마다 당신을 섬기는 곳,

lines.en: Whatever his appointed work may be,
Till ev'ry common task seems great and holy,
lines.ko: 모든 공동 작업이 위대하고 거룩해 보일 때까지,

lines.en: When it is done, O Lord, as unto thee!
lines.ko: 오 주님, 그것이 이루어지면 당신께도 마찬가지입니다!

lines.en: O happy home, where thou art not forgotten
lines.ko: 오 행복한 집이여, 당신이 잊혀지지 않는 곳

lines.en: When joy is overflowing, full and free,
O happy home, where ev'ry wounded spirit
lines.ko: 오 행복한 집, 모든 상처받은 영혼이 있는 곳

lines.en: Is brought, Physician, Comforter, to thee,
Until at last, when earth's day's work is ended,
All meet thee in the blessed home above,
lines.ko: 위의 축복받은 집에서 모두 당신을 만나요.

lines.en: From whence thou camest, where thou hast ascended,
Thine everlasting home of peace and love.

title_en: O perfect Love

lines.en: O perfect Love, all human thought transcending,
lines.id: Wahai Cinta yang sempurna, semua pemikiran manusia melampaui,

lines.en: Lowly we kneel in prayer before thy throne,
lines.id: Dengan rendah hati kami berlutut berdoa di hadapan takhta-Mu,

lines.en: That theirs may be the love which knows no ending,
lines.ko: 둘 한 몸 되어 보람 있게 살라
lines.id: Semoga cinta mereka tiada akhir,

lines.en: Whom thou for evermore dost join in one.
lines.id: Yang Engkau selamanya bergabung menjadi satu.

lines.en: O perfect Life, be thou their full assurance
lines.id: Wahai Kehidupan yang Sempurna, Jadilah Engkau yang memberikan jaminan penuh bagi mereka

lines.en: Of tender charity and steadfast faith,
lines.id: Dari amal yang lembut dan keimanan yang teguh,

lines.en: Of patient hope, and quiet, brave endurance,
lines.id: Harapan yang sabar, dan daya tahan yang tenang dan berani,

lines.en: With childlike trust that fears nor pain nor death.
lines.id: Dengan kepercayaan seperti anak kecil yang tidak takut akan rasa sakit atau kematian.

lines.en: Grant them the joy which brightens earthly sorrow;
lines.id: Berilah mereka kegembiraan yang mencerahkan kesedihan duniawi

lines.en: Grant them the peace which calms all earthly strife,
lines.id: Berilah mereka kedamaian yang menenangkan segala perselisihan di dunia,

lines.en: And to life's day the glorious unknown morrow
lines.id: Dan pada hari-hari kehidupan, hari esok yang mulia dan tidak diketahui

lines.en: That dawns upon eternal love and life.
lines.id: Hal itulah yang memunculkan cinta dan kehidupan abadi. Amin.

lines.en: Hear us, O Father, gracious and forgiving,
Through Jesus Christ thy co-eternal Word,
Who, with the Holy Ghost, by all things living
Now and to endless ages art adored.

title_id: Wahai Cinta Sempurna, Seluruh Pikiran Manusia Melampaui

title_en: Blest the man that fears Jehovah

lines.en: From Psalm 128
Blest the man that fears Jehovah,
Walking ever in his ways,
By thy toil thou shalt be prospered
And be happy all thy days.
In thy wife thou shalt have gladness,
lines.ko: 네 아내로 말미암아 네가 즐거움을 얻을 것이요

lines.en: She shall fill thy home with good,
lines.ko: 그가 네 집을 좋은 것으로 채우리라.

lines.en: Happy in her loving service
And the joys of motherhood.
Joyful children, sons and daughters,
Shall about thy table meet,
lines.ko: 네 식탁 주위에서 만날 수 있겠느냐?

lines.en: Olive plants, in strength and beauty,
Full of hope and promise sweet.
Lo, on him that fears Jehovah
Shall this blessedness attend,
For Jehovah out of Zion
Shall to thee his blessing send.
Thou shalt see God's kingdom prosper
lines.ko: 너는 하나님의 나라가 번영하는 것을 보게 될 것이다

lines.en: All thy days, till life shall cease,
lines.ko: 너의 모든 날, 생명이 다할 때까지,

lines.en: Thou shalt see thy children's children;
lines.ko: 너는 네 자녀의 자녀를 보게 될 것이다.

lines.en: On thy people, Lord, be peace.
lines.ko: 주님, 당신의 백성에게 평화가 있기를 빕니다.

title_en: Happy the home when God is there

lines.en: Happy the home when God is there,
And love fills ev'ry breast:
When one their wish, and one their prayer,
And one their heav'nly rest.
Happy the home where Jesus' name
Is sweet to ev'ry ear;
Where children early lisp his fame,
lines.ko: 아이들이 일찍부터 그의 명성을 헛소리하는 곳,

lines.en: And parents hold him dear.
Happy the home where prayer is heard,
And praise is wont to rise,
Where parents love the sacred Word,
That makes us truly wise.
Lord, let us in our homes agree,
This blessed peace to gain;
Unite our hearts in love to thee,
lines.ko: 당신을 향한 사랑으로 우리 마음을 하나로 묶어 주소서.

lines.en: And love to all will reign.
lines.ko: 그리고 모든 사람에 대한 사랑이 다스리게 될 것입니다.

title_en: O Father all creating

lines.en: O Father all creating,
Whose wisdom, love, and power
First bound two lives together
lines.ko: 먼저 두 사람의 삶을 하나로 묶었습니다.

lines.en: In Eden's primal hour,
Today to these thy children
Thine earliest gifts renew,
A home by thee made happy,
A love by thee kept true.
O Saviour, guest most bounteous
Of old in Galilee,
Vouchsafe today thy presence
With these who call on thee;
Their store of earthly gladness
Transform to heav'nly wine,
And teach them in the tasting
To know the gift is thine.
lines.ko: 그 선물이 당신의 것이라는 것을 아는 것입니다.

lines.en: O Spirit of the Father,
Breathe on them from above,
So mighty in thy pureness
So tender in thy love,
That, guarded by thy presence,
From sin and strife kept free,
Their lives may own thy guidance,
lines.ko: 그들의 삶은 당신의 인도를 소유할 수 있으며,

lines.en: Their hearts be ruled by thee.
Except thou build it, Father,
The house is built in vain;
Except thou, Saviour, bless it,
The joy will turn to pain;
But nought can break the union
lines.ko: 하지만 그 어떤 것도 노조를 깨뜨릴 수는 없어요

lines.en: Of hearts in thee made one;
lines.ko: 당신 안에 있는 마음들이 하나가 되었습니다.

lines.en: And love thy Spirit hallows
Is endless love begun.

title_en: Eternal Father, strong to save

lines.en: Eternal Father, strong to save,
Whose arm doth bind the restless wave,
lines.ko: 그 분의 팔이 불안한 파도를 묶으시고,

lines.en: Who bidd'st the mighty ocean deep
Its own appointed limits keep:
O hear us when we cry to thee
lines.ko: 오 우리가 당신께 부르짖을 때 우리의 말을 들어주소서

lines.en: For those in peril on the sea.
O Saviour, whose almighty word
The winds and waves submissive heard,
Who walkedst on the foaming deep
lines.ko: 누가 거품이 이는 깊은 곳을 걸었는가

lines.en: And calm amid its rage didst sleep:
lines.ko: 그리고 그 분노 속에서도 잠을 자지 못했습니다.

lines.en: O hear us when we cry to thee
lines.ko: 오 우리가 당신께 부르짖을 때 우리의 말을 들어주소서

lines.en: For those in peril on the sea.
O Sacred Spirit, who didst brood
Upon the chaos dark and rude,
Who badd'st its angry tumult cease,
lines.ko: 누가 그 분노한 소동을 멈추라고 했습니까?

lines.en: And gavest light and life and peace:
O hear us when we cry to thee
lines.ko: 오 우리가 당신께 부르짖을 때 우리의 말을 들어주소서

lines.en: For those in peril on the sea.
O Trinity of love and pow'r,
Our brethren shield in danger's hour;
lines.ko: 우리 형제들은 위험의 순간에 방패를 삼습니다.

lines.en: From rock and tempest, fire and foe,
Protect them wheresoe'er they go;
And ever let there rise to thee
Glad hymns of praise from land and sea.

title_en: Holy Father, in thy mercy, hear

lines.en: Holy Father, in thy mercy
Hear our anxious prayer;
Keep our loved ones, now far absent,
lines.ko: 지금은 멀리 떨어져 있는 사랑하는 사람들을 지켜주세요.

lines.en: 'Neath thy care.
Jesus, Saviour, let thy presence
Be their light and guide;
Keep, O keep them, in their weakness,
At thy side.
When in sorrow, when in danger,
When in loneliness,
In thy love look down and comfort
Their distress.
May the joy of thy salvation
Be their strength and stay;
May they love, and may they praise thee
Day by day.
Holy Spirit, let thy teaching
Sanctify their life;
Send thy grace that they may conquer
lines.ko: 그들이 승리할 수 있도록 은혜를 보내소서

lines.en: In the strife.
Father, Son, and Holy Spirit,
God, the One in Three,
Bless them, guide them, save them, keep them
Near to thee.

title_en: Shine thou upon us, Lord

lines.en: Shine thou upon us, Lord,
lines.ko: 온유한 주님의 음성 네 귀에 속삭이네
lines.id: Dengan sabar, memohon dengan lembut,

lines.en: True Light of men, today,
lines.ko: 네 마음 문을 두드리니 곧 주님을 영접하라
lines.id: Yesus berdiri hari ini

lines.en: And through the written Word
lines.id: Di pintu hatimu Dia mengetuk seperti sebelumnya,

lines.en: Thy very self display,
lines.ko: 우리가 결 길로 피해도 맘속에 오시리
lines.id: Oh, jangan tinggalkan Dia lagi.

lines.en: That so from hearts which burn
lines.ko: 심판 날 당할 때 주님을 너 맞을 준비해

lines.en: With gazing on thy face

lines.en: The wonders of thy grace.
lines.id: Meskipun kamu tersesat

lines.id: Rahmat yang ramah dan penuh kasih sayang

lines.en: Thy Spirit's living flame,

lines.id: Oh, menyerahlah pada kasih-Nya yang luar biasa.

lines.id: Lihat! Dia akan setia sampai akhir.

lines.en: That so thy lambs may know

lines.id: Dia telah kembali lagi ke hatimu,

lines.en: And in his love rejoice.
lines.id: Meskipun kamu tersesat

lines.en: Live thou within us, Lord;

lines.id: Sekaranglah waktunya untuk menerima kembali Dia,

lines.id: Beri Dia penerimaan misi hari ini

lines.en: And served with all our powers,

lines.id: Dan jangan menjauhkan Dia lagi.

lines.id: Jangan memalingkan Dia

lines.en: Thy children what thou art,
lines.id: Jangan memalingkan Dia,

lines.en: And plead, by more than speech,

lines.en: For thee with ev'ry heart.

Ya, Yesus mengasihiku!
Ya, Yesus mengasihiku!
Ya, Yesus mengasihiku!

lines.id: Meskipun aku sangat lemah dan sakit

lines.id: Datang untuk mengawasiku dari mana aku berbohong.
Ya, Yesus mengasihiku!
Ya, Yesus mengasihiku!
Ya, Yesus mengasihiku!

lines.en: Jesus loves me, loves me still,
lines.ko: 세상 사는 동안에 나와 함께 하시고

Ya, Yesus mengasihiku!

lines.en: Jesus loves me, he will stay
Close beside me all the way:
If I love him, when I die
He will take me home on high.

title_en: Hallelujah! thine the glory

lines.en: We praise thee, O God!
For the days of our youth,
For the bright lamp that shineth
The Word of thy truth.
Hallelujah! thine the glory,
Hallelujah we sing;
Hallelujah! thine the glory,
Our praise now we bring.
We praise thee, O God!
For the Son of thy love,
For Jesus who died
And is now gone above.
We praise thee, O God!
For thy Spirit of light,
Who has shown us our Saviour
And scattered our night.
All glory and praise
To the Lamb that was slain,
Who has borne all our sins and
Has cleansed ev'ry stain!

alt_titles: We praise thee, O God! for the days of our youth

title_en: God sees the little sparrow fall
title_ko: 하나님은 작은 참새가 떨어지는 것을 보신다 (자체번역)

lines.en: God sees the little sparrow fall,
lines.ko: 하나님은 작은 참새가 떨어지는 것을 보시고,

lines.en: It meets his tender view;
If God so loves the little birds,
I know he loves me too.
lines.ko: 그 사람도 나를 사랑한다는 걸 알아요.

lines.en: He loves me too, he loves me too,
lines.ko: 그 사람도 나를 사랑해, 그 사람도 나를 사랑해

lines.en: I know loves me too,
Because he loves the little things,
lines.ko: 그 사람은 작은 것을 좋아하기 때문에

lines.en: I know loves me too.
He paints the lily of the field,
Perfumes each lily bell;
If he so loves the little flow'rs,
lines.ko: 만약 그가 그토록 작은 꽃을 사랑한다면,

lines.en: I know he loves me well.
lines.ko: 나는 그가 나를 잘 사랑한다는 것을 압니다.

lines.en: God made the little birds and flowers,
And all things large and small;
He'll not forget his little ones,

lines.en: I know he loves them all.
lines.ko: 나는 그가 그들 모두를 사랑한다는 것을 압니다.

title_en: Each little flower that opens

lines.id: Mengapa kita harus menunda-nunda ketika Yesus sedang memohon,

lines.id: Waktu kini berlalu dengan cepat, momen pun berlalu

lines.id: Oh atas cinta luar biasa yang Dia janjikan,

lines.en: Yes, all things bright and beautiful,
All creatures great and small,
And all things wise and wonderful,
The Lord God made them all.
The purple-headed mountain,
The river running by,
The sunset and the morning
That brightens up the sky.
The cold wind in the winter,
The pleasant summer sun,
The ripe fruits in the garden—
He made them ev'ry one.
The tall trees in the greenwood,
The meadows where we play,
The flowers by the water
We gather ev'ry day.
He gave us eyes to see them,
And lips that we might tell
How great is God Almighty,
Who doeth all things well.

alt_titles: Yes, all things bright and beautiful
All things bright and beautiful
title_id: Dengan Lembut dan Lembut Yesus Memanggil

title_en: God, who made the earth

lines.en: God, who made the earth,
The air, the sky, the sea,
Who gave the light its birth,
Careth for me.
God who made the grass,
The flow'r, the fruit, the tree,
The day and night to pass,
Careth for me.
God who made the sun,
The moon, the stars, is he
Who, when life's clouds come on,
Careth for me.
God who made all things,
On earth, in air, in sea,
Who changing seasons brings,
Careth for me.
God who sent his Son
To die on Calvary,
He, if I lean on him,
lines.ko: 그 사람, 내가 그 사람에게 기대면,

lines.en: Will care for me.
When in heav'n's bright land
I all his loved ones see,
lines.ko: 나는 그의 사랑하는 사람들 모두를 본다.

lines.en: I'll sing with that blest band,
lines.ko: 나는 그 축복받은 밴드와 함께 노래할 것이다.

lines.en: God cared for me.

Holy Spirit, prompt us

lines.en: When we kneel to pray;

What we ought to say.
Holy Spirit, shine thou
