lines.en: On the book we read;
lines.id: Sepuh halaman sucinya dengan cahaya yang kita perlukan.

lines.en: Gild its holy pages
With the light we need.
Holy Spirit, give us
lines.id: Semangat Kudus, perbuatan jerih payah yang kecil

lines.en: Each a lowly mind;
lines.id: Dan jangan sampai kebodohan kita rusak.

lines.en: Make us more like Jesus,
Gentle, pure, and kind.
Holy Spirit, keep us
lines.id: Roh Kudus, berilah kami masing-masing pikiran yang rendah hati

lines.en: Safe from sins which lie
lines.ko: 우리 주와 같이 되게 하소서 아멘
lines.id: Jadikan kami semakin serupa dengan Yesus, Lembut, murni, dan baik hati. Amin.

lines.en: Hidden by some pleasure
From our youthful eye.
Holy Spirit, help us
Daily by thy might,
What is wrong to conquer,
And to choose the right.

lines.en: Who is God and Lord of all,
lines.id: Siapakah Tuhan dan Tuhan atas segalanya,

lines.en: And his shelter was a stable,
lines.id: Dan tempat berlindung-Nya adalah sebuah kandang,

lines.en: And his cradle was a stall:
lines.id: Dan tempat lahirnya adalah sebuah kios:

lines.en: With the poor, and mean, and lowly,
lines.id: Dengan orang miskin, dan jahat, dan rendahan

lines.en: Lived on earth our Saviour holy.
lines.id: Tinggal di bumi, Juruselamat kita yang suci.

lines.en: And, through all his wondrous childhood
lines.ko: 착하셔라 어릴 때에 모친 순종 하시고
lines.id: Dan, melalui masa kanak-kanak-Nya yang menakjubkan,

lines.en: He would honor and obey,
lines.ko: 사랑으로 섬기신 것 참된 본이 되셨네
lines.id: Dia akan menghormati dan mematuhi,

lines.en: Love and watch the lowly maiden
lines.id: Cintai dan perhatikan gadis rendahan itu

lines.en: In whose gentle arms he lay:
lines.id: Dalam pelukan lembut siapa Dia berbaring:

lines.en: Christian children all must be
lines.id: Anak-anak Kristen semuanya pasti begitu

lines.en: Mild, obedient, good as he.
lines.id: Lembut, patuh, baik seperti Dia.

lines.en: And our eyes at last shall see him,
lines.ko: 하늘에서 오신 예수 우리 위해 죽으사
lines.id: Dan mata kita pada akhirnya akan melihat Dia,

lines.en: Through his own redeeming love;
lines.id: Melalui cintanya yang dianggap kembali

lines.en: For that Child so dear and gentle
lines.ko: 그가 계신 곳으로 우리 인도 하시리
lines.id: Untuk anak itu begitu sayang dan lembut

lines.en: Is our Lord in heav'n above,
lines.id: Apakah Tuhan kita ada di surga,

lines.en: And he leads his children on
lines.id: Dan Dia memimpin anak-anak-Nya

lines.en: To the place where he is gone.
lines.id: Ke tempat di mana Dia pergi.

lines.en: Not in that poor lowly stable,
With the oxen standing by,
We shall see him, but in heaven,
Set at God's right hand on high;
When like stars his children crowned
All in white shall wait around.

title_en: Gentle Mary laid her child

lines.en: Gentle Mary laid her child
lines.id: Maria membaringkan bayi itu di dalam palungan

lines.en: Lowly in a manger;
lines.ko: 이 세상에 나신 주 강보 속에 싸여
lines.id: Tuhan yang lahir ke dunia ini terbungkus lampin

lines.en: There he lay, the undefiled,
lines.ko: 천한 곳에 나신 주 우리 구주시라
lines.id: Tuhan, yang lahir di tempat yang sederhana, adalah Juruselamat kita.

lines.en: To the world a stranger.
lines.id: Tuhan yang pengasih telah datang dalam kemuliaan

lines.en: Such a babe in such a place,
Can he be the Saviour?
Ask the saved of all the race
Who have found his favor.
Angels sang about his birth,
lines.id: Orang-orang majus datang menyanyikan himne malaikat

lines.en: Wise men sought and found him;
lines.id: Cahaya bintang berkelap-kelip dan kemuliaan Tuhan bersinar

lines.en: Heaven's star shone brightly forth
lines.id: Para gembala mendengarkan pujian para malaikat

lines.en: Glory all around him.
lines.ko: 어둔 밤은 빛나고 높은 산은 진동해
lines.id: Malam yang gelap bersinar dan gunung-gunung tinggi bergetar

lines.en: Shepherds saw the wondrous sight,
Heard the angels singing;
All the plains were lit that night,
All the hills were ringing.
Gentle Mary laid her child
lines.id: Maria membaringkan bayi itu di dalam palungan

lines.en: Lowly in a manger;
lines.ko: 이 세상에 나신 주 우리 구주시니
lines.id: Tuhan yang lahir ke dunia ini adalah Juruselamat kita

lines.en: He is still the undefiled,
lines.id: Kelahiran bayi Yesus adalah kabar indah

lines.en: But no more a stranger.
lines.ko: 온 세상은 노래로 소리 높여 찬양해
lines.id: Seluruh dunia menyanyikan pujian dengan lantang

lines.en: Son of God of humble birth,
Beautiful the story;
Praise his Name in all the earth,
Hail! the King of Glory!

title_en: Away in a manger

lines.en: Away in a manger, no crib for a bed,
lines.ko: 그 어린 주 예수 눌 자리 없어
lines.id: Jauh di dalam palungan, Tidak ada tempat tidur bayi untuk tempat tidur,

lines.en: The little Lord Jesus laid down his sweet head;
lines.id: Tuhan Yesus yang kecil Meletakkan kepala-Nya yang manis.

lines.en: The stars in the sky looked down where he lay,
lines.id: Bintang-bintang di langit Melihat ke bawah di mana Dia berbaring,

lines.en: The little Lord Jesus, asleep on the hay.
lines.ko: 그 어린 주 예수 꼴 위에 자네
lines.id: Tuhan Yesus yang kecil, tidurlah di atas jerami.

lines.en: The cattle are lowing, the Baby awakes,
lines.id: Ternak sedang merendah. Ba-by yang malang terbangun,

lines.en: But little Lord Jesus no crying he makes;
lines.id: Taruhan kecil Tuhan Yesus, Dia tidak menangis,

lines.en: I love thee, Lord Jesus! look down from the sky,
lines.id: Aku cinta padaMu, Tuhan Yesus! Lihat ke bawah dari langit,

lines.en: And stay by my cradle, till morning is nigh.
lines.id: Dan tetaplah di buaianku Untuk menonton lul-la-by.

lines.en: Be near me, Lord Jesus, I ask thee to stay
lines.ko: 주 예수 내 곁에 가까이 계셔
lines.id: Beradalah di dekatku, Tuhan Yesus, aku mohon kepada-Mu untuk tinggal

lines.en: Close by me for ever, and love me, I pray;
lines.id: Dekat denganku selamanya, Dan cintai aku, aku berdoa.

lines.en: Bless all the dear children in thy tender care,
lines.ko: 온 세상 아기들 다 품어 주사
lines.id: Memberkati semua anak-anak terkasih Dalam perawatan lembut-Mu,

lines.en: And fit us for heaven, to live with thee there.
lines.ko: 주 품 안에 안겨 살게 하소서 아멘
lines.id: Dan bawalah kami ke surga, Untuk tinggal bersamaMu di sana.

title_en: Jesus, tender Shepherd, hear me

lines.en: Jesus, tender Shepherd, hear me,
lines.ko: 다정하신 목자 예수 어린 양을 돌보사
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, Gembala yang lembut, dengarkan aku,

lines.en: Bless thy little lamb tonight;
lines.ko: 캄캄한 밤 지낼 동안 나를 품어 주소서
lines.id: Berkatilah domba kecil-Mu malam ini

lines.en: Through the darkness be thou near me,
lines.id: Melalui kegelapan, jadilah Engkau di dekatku,

lines.en: Keep me safe till morning light.
lines.id: Jagalah aku tetap aman sampai pagi hari.

lines.en: All this day thy hand has led me,
lines.ko: 선한 목자 내 주 예수 나의 기도 들으사
lines.id: Sepanjang hari, Penggembala yang Baik, bimbing aku

lines.en: And I thank thee for thy care;
lines.ko: 내일 아침 될 때까지 나를 지켜 주소서
lines.id: Melalui jalan yang lurus dan sempit

lines.en: Thou hast clothed me, warmed and fed me,
lines.id: Dan sepanjang malam tetap dekat di sisiku,

lines.en: Listen to my ev'ning pray'r.
lines.id: Tetap berjaga sampai subuh.

lines.en: Let my sins be all forgiven;
lines.ko: 좋은 옷을 입히시고 맛난 음식 먹이사
lines.id: Sepanjang hari ini tangan-Mu menuntunku,

lines.en: Bless the friends I love so well;
lines.id: Dan aku berterima kasih kepada-Mu atas perhatian-Mu

lines.en: Take me, when I die, to heav'n,
lines.id: Engkau telah memberiku pakaian, menghangatkan dan memberiku makan,

lines.en: Happy there with thee to dwell.
lines.id: Dengarkan sepuluh doa malamku.

lines.ko: 주여 나의 지난 허물 용서하여 주시고
lines.id: Biarlah semua dosaku diampuni

lines.ko: 친구들도 저와 같이 복을 받게 하소서 아멘
lines.id: Memberkati teman-teman yang sangat saya cintai
Bawalah aku, ketika aku mati, ke surga,
Senang tinggal di sana bersamaMu. Amin.

title_id: Yesus, Gembala yang Lembut, Dengarkan Aku

title_en: I am Jesus' little lamb

lines.en: I am Jesus' little lamb,
Ever glad at heart I am;
For my Shepherd gently guides me,
Knows my need, and well provides me,
lines.ko: 내 필요를 아시고 나에게 잘 공급해 주십니다.

lines.en: Loves me ev'ry day the same,
Even calls me by my name.
Day by day, at home, away,
Jesus is my staff and stay.
When I hunger, Jesus feeds me,
Into pleasant pastures leads me;
When I thirst, he bids me go
lines.ko: 내가 목마를 때 그는 나에게 가라고 명한다

lines.en: Where the quiet waters flow.
Who so happy as I am,
Even now the Shepherd's lamb?
And when my short life is ended,
By his angel host attended,
He shall fold me to his breast,
lines.ko: 그는 나를 그의 가슴에 접을 것이다.

lines.en: There within his arms to rest.

title_en: Saviour, like a Shepherd lead us

lines.en: Saviour, like a Shepherd lead us,
lines.ko: 선한 목자 되신 우리 주 항상 인도 하시고
lines.id: Selamatkan kami, seperti kawanan domba yang menuntun kami

lines.en: Much we need thy tend'rest care;
lines.ko: 푸른 풀밭 좋은 곳에서 우리 먹여 주소서
lines.id: Kami sangat membutuhkan perhatian lembut-Mu.

lines.en: In thy pleasant pastures feed us,
lines.ko: 선한 목자 구세주여 항상 인도 하소서
lines.id: Di padang rumput-Mu yang menyenangkan, beri kami makan

lines.en: For our use thy folds prepare:
lines.ko: 선한 목자 구세주여 항상 인도 하소서
lines.id: Untuk kami gunakan lipatan-Mu yang sudah disiapkan sebelumnya.

lines.en: Blessed Jesus, blessed Jesus,
lines.id: Yesus yang terberkati, Yesus yang terberkati!

lines.en: Thou hast bought us, thine we are.
lines.id: Engkau telah membeli kami milik-Mu.
Yesus yang terberkati, Yesus yang terberkati!
Engkau telah membeli kami milik-Mu.

lines.en: We are thine; do thou befriend us,
lines.ko: 양의 문이 되신 예수여 우리 영접 하시고
lines.id: Kami adalah milik-Mu, jadilah teman kami

lines.en: Be the Guardian of our way;
lines.ko: 길을 잃은 양의 무리를 항상 인도 하소서
lines.id: Jadilah Penjaga jalan kami.

lines.en: Keep thy flock, from sin defend us,
lines.ko: 선한 목자 구세주여 기도 들어 주소서
lines.id: Jagalah kawanan-Mu dari dosa, lindungi kami

lines.en: Seek us when we go astray:
lines.ko: 선한 목자 구세주여 기도 들어 주소서
lines.id: Carilah kami saat kami tersesat.

lines.en: Blessed Jesus, blessed Jesus,
lines.id: Yesus yang terberkati, Yesus yang terberkati!

lines.en: Hear the children when they pray.
lines.id: Dengarlah, hai, dengarkanlah kami ketika kami berdoa.
Yesus yang terberkati, Yesus yang terberkati!
Dengarlah, hai, dengarkanlah kami ketika kami berdoa.

lines.en: Thou hast promised to receive us,
lines.ko: 흠이 많고 약한 우리를 용납 하여 주시고
lines.id: Engkau telah berjanji untuk menerima kami kembali

lines.en: Poor and sinful though we be;
lines.ko: 주의 넓고 크신 은혜로 자유 얻게 하셨네
lines.id: Kita memang miskin dan penuh dosa

lines.en: Thou hast mercy to relieve us,
lines.id: Engkau berbelas kasihan untuk membebaskan kami kembali,

lines.en: Grace to cleanse, and pow'r to free:
lines.id: Anugerah untuk menyucikan, dan kuasa untuk memerdekakan.

lines.en: Blessed Jesus, blessed Jesus,
lines.id: Yesus yang terberkati, Yesus yang terberkati!

lines.en: Let us early turn to thee.
lines.id: Kami akan segera berpaling kepada-Mu.
Yesus yang terberkati, Yesus yang terberkati!
Kami akan segera berpaling kepada-Mu.

lines.en: Early let us seek thy favor;
lines.ko: 일찍 주의 뜻을 따라서 살아가게 하시고
lines.id: Marilah kami memohon kemurahan-Mu sejak dini,

lines.en: Early let us do thy will;
lines.ko: 주의 크신 사랑 베푸사 따라 가게 하소서
lines.id: Marilah kami segera melakukan kehendak-Mu

lines.en: Blessed Lord and only Saviour,
lines.ko: 선한 목자 구세주여 항상 인도 하소서
lines.id: Tuhan Yang Terberkati dan satu-satunya Juruselamat,

lines.en: With thy love our bosoms fill
lines.ko: 선한 목자 구세주여 항상 인도 하소서 아멘
lines.id: Dengan cinta-Mu isi dada kami.

lines.en: Blessed Jesus, blessed Jesus,
lines.id: Yesus yang terberkati, Yesus yang terberkati!

lines.en: Thou hast loved us, love us still.
lines.id: Engkau telah mencintai kami, tetap mencintai kami
Yesus yang terberkati, Yesus yang terberkati!
Engkau telah mencintai kami, masih mencintai kami. Amin.

title_en: Can a little child like me thank the Father
title_ko: 나 같은 어린아이도 아버지께 감사할 수 있을까? (자체번역)

lines.en: Can a little child like me
lines.ko: 나 같은 어린아이도 그럴 수 있을까?

lines.en: Thank the Father fittingly?
Yes, O yes! be good and true,
Patient, kind in all you do;
lines.ko: 인내심을 갖고 당신이 하는 모든 일에 친절하십시오.

lines.en: Love the Lord, and do your part;
Learn to say with all your heart,
lines.ko: 온 마음을 다해 말하는 법을 배우십시오.

lines.en: Father, we thank thee! Father, we thank thee!
Father in heaven, we thank thee!
For the fruit upon the tree,
For the birds that sing of thee,
For the earth in beauty dressed,
Father, mother, and the rest,
For thy precious, loving care,
For thy bounty ev'rywhere,
For the sunshine warm and bright,
For the day and for the night,
For the lessons of our youth
Honor, gratitude and truth,
For the love that met us here,
For the home and for the cheer,
For our comrades and our plays,
And our happy holidays,
For the joyful work and true
That a little child may do,
For our lives but just begun,
lines.ko: 우리의 삶을 위해, 이제 막 시작했지만,

lines.en: For the great gift of thy Son,

alt_titles: Father, we thank thee! Father, we thank thee!

title_en: When, his salvation bringing

lines.en: When his salvation bringing,
To Zion Jesus came,
The children all stood singing
Hosanna to his name:
Nor did their zeal offend him,
lines.ko: 또한 그들의 열심이 그에게 노여움을 주지도 아니하였으니

lines.en: But as he rode along,
He let them still attend him,
lines.ko: 그는 그들이 여전히 그에게 참석하도록 허용했습니다.

lines.en: And smiled to hear their song.
lines.ko: 그리고 그들의 노래를 들으며 미소를 지었습니다.

lines.en: And since the Lord retaineth
His love for children still,
Though now as King he reigneth
On Zion's heav'nly hill,
We'll flock around his banner
lines.ko: 우리는 그의 깃발 주위로 모여들 것이다

lines.en: Who sits upon his throne,
And cry aloud, "Hosanna
To David's royal Son!"
For should we fail proclaiming
Our great Redeemer's praise,
The stones, our silence shaming,
lines.ko: 돌들, 우리의 침묵을 부끄럽게 하는 것,

lines.en: Would their Hosannas raise.
But shall we only render
The tribute of our words?
No; while our hearts are tender,
They too shall be the Lord's.

title_en: I am so glad that Jesus loves me

lines.en: I am so glad that our Father in heav'n
lines.ko: 하나님 아버지 주신 책은 귀하고 중하신 말씀일세
lines.id: Saya sangat senang bahwa Bapa kita ada di surga

lines.en: Tells of his love in the book he has giv'n:
lines.ko: 기쁘고 반가운 말씀 중에 날 사랑한단 말 참 좋도다
lines.id: Menceritakan cinta-Nya dalam Kitab yang Dia berikan,

lines.en: Wonderful things in the Bible I see;
lines.id: Saya melihat hal-hal menakjubkan dalam Alkitab

lines.en: This is the dearest, that Jesus loves me.
lines.ko: 주께서 나를 사랑하니 나는 참 기쁘다
lines.id: Inilah yang tersayang, bahwa Yesus mengasihiku.
Aku sangat senang Yesus mengasihiku,
Yesus mengasihiku, Yesus mengasihiku,
Aku sangat senang Yesus mengasihiku,
Yesus bahkan mencintaiku.

lines.en: I am so glad that Jesus loves me,
lines.ko: 구속의 은혜를 저버리고 어긋난 딴 길로 가다가도
lines.id: Meskipun aku melupakan Dia dan mengembara,

lines.en: Jesus loves me, Jesus loves me,
lines.ko: 예수의 사랑만 생각하면 곧 다시 예수께 돌아오리
lines.id: Tetap saja Dia tetap mencintaiku di mana pun aku menyimpang

lines.en: I am so glad that Jesus loves me,
lines.id: Kembali ke pelukan kasih-Nya aku akan lari,

lines.en: Jesus loves even me.
lines.ko: 주께서 나를 사랑하니 나는 참 기쁘다
lines.id: Saat aku mengingat kembali bahwa Yesus mengasihiku.
Aku sangat senang Yesus mengasihiku,
Yesus mengasihiku, Yesus mengasihiku,
Aku sangat senang Yesus mengasihiku,
Yesus bahkan mencintaiku.

lines.en: Though I forget him, and wander away,
lines.ko: 구주의 영광을 바라보며 예수의 이름을 찬양하리
lines.id: O, jika hanya ada satu lagu yang bisa aku nyanyikan,

lines.en: Still he doth love me wherever I stray;
lines.ko: 영원히 찬양할 나의 노래 예수의 이름이 귀하도다
lines.id: Ketika dalam keindahan-Nya aku melihat Raja yang agung,

lines.en: Back to his dear loving arms do I flee,
lines.id: Ini akan menjadi laguku selamanya

lines.en: When I remember that Jesus loves me.
lines.ko: 주께서 나를 사랑하니 나는 참 기쁘다
lines.id: "Oh, sungguh menakjubkan bahwa Yesus mengasihiku."
Aku sangat senang Yesus mengasihiku,
Yesus mengasihiku, Yesus mengasihiku,
Aku sangat senang Yesus mengasihiku,
Yesus bahkan mencintaiku.

lines.en: O if there's only one song I can sing,
lines.ko: 주 예수 날 사랑하시오니 나 또한 예수를 사랑하네
lines.id: Yesus mengasihi saya, dan saya tahu saya mengasihi Dia

lines.en: When in his beauty I see the great King,
lines.ko: 날 구원하시려 내려오사 십자가 위에서 죽으셨네
lines.id: Cinta membawa Dia turun ke jiwaku yang malang untuk ditebus kembali

lines.en: This shall my song in eternity be,
lines.id: Ya, cinta itulah yang membuatnya mati di pohon

lines.en: "O what a wonder that Jesus loves me."
lines.ko: 주께서 나를 사랑하니 나는 참 기쁘다
lines.id: Oh, aku yakin Yesus mengasihiku.
Aku sangat senang Yesus mengasihiku,
Yesus mengasihiku, Yesus mengasihiku,
Aku sangat senang Yesus mengasihiku,
Yesus bahkan mencintaiku.

lines.ko: 주 예수 날 사랑하시오니 마귀가 놀라서 물러가네
lines.id: Dalam jaminan ini aku menemukan ketenangan yang paling manis,

lines.ko: 주 나를 이렇게 사랑하니 그 사랑 어떻게 보답할까
lines.id: Percaya pada Yesus, saya tahu saya diberkati
Setan, kecewa, dari jiwaku kini lari,

lines.ko: 주께서 나를 사랑하니 나는 참 기쁘다
lines.id: Ketika saya baru saja mengatakan kepadanya bahwa Yesus mengasihi saya.
Aku sangat senang Yesus mengasihiku,
Yesus mengasihiku, Yesus mengasihiku,
Aku sangat senang Yesus mengasihiku,
Yesus bahkan mencintaiku.

alt_titles: I am so glad that our Father in heaven
title_id: Saya sangat Senang bahwa Bapa Kami di Surga

title_en: Around the throne of God in heaven

lines.en: Around the throne of God in heav'n
Thousands of children stand,
Children whose sins are all forgiv'n,
A holy, happy band,
Singing, "Glory, glory,
Glory be to God on high."
lines.ko: 높은 곳에 계신 하나님께 영광을 돌립니다."

lines.en: In flowing robes of spotless white
lines.ko: 티끌 하나 없는 하얀 옷을 입고

lines.en: See ev'ry one arrayed;
Dwelling in everlasting light
And joys that never fade,
What brought them to that world above,
lines.ko: 무엇이 그들을 저 위의 세계로 데려왔는지,

lines.en: That heav'n so bright and fair,
Where all is peace, and joy, and love;
lines.ko: 모든 것이 평화와 기쁨과 사랑이 있는 곳;

lines.en: How came those children there,
Because the Saviour shed his blood
To wash away their sin;
Bathed in that pure and precious flood,
Behold them white and clean,
On earth they sought the Saviour's grace,
On earth they loved his Name;
So now they see his blessed face,
lines.ko: 이제 그들은 그의 축복받은 얼굴을 봅니다.

lines.en: And stand before the Lamb,

alt_titles: Singing, Glory, glory, glory be to God on high

title_en: I belong to Jesus

lines.en: I belong to Jesus;
I am not my own;
All I have and all I am,
lines.ko: 내가 가진 모든 것과 나의 전부,

lines.en: Shall be his alone.
I belong to Jesus;
He is Lord and King,
Reigning in my inmost heart,
lines.ko: 내 마음 속 깊은 곳을 다스리며,

lines.en: Over ev'rything.
I belong to Jesus;
Blessed, blessed thought!
With his own most precious blood
Has my soul been bought.
I belong to Jesus;
He has died for me;
I am his and he is mine,
lines.ko: 나는 그의 것이고 그는 내 것이다.

lines.en: Through eternity.
I belong to Jesus;
He will keep my soul,
When the deathly waters dark
Round about me roll.
I belong to Jesus;
And ere long I'll stand
lines.ko: 그리고 머지않아 나는 서 있을 것이다

lines.en: With my precious Saviour there
In the glory land.

title_en: I think when I read that sweet story of old
title_ko: 내 생각엔 그 달콤한 옛날 이야기를 읽을 때면 (자체번역)

lines.en: I think when I read that sweet story of old,
lines.ko: 내 생각엔 그 달콤한 옛날 이야기를 읽을 때면,

lines.en: When Jesus was here among men,
lines.ko: 예수께서 여기 사람들 가운데 계실 때,

lines.en: How he called little children as lambs to his fold,
lines.ko: 그분께서 어떻게 어린아이들을 양 떼처럼 부르셨는지,

lines.en: I should like to have been with them then.
lines.ko: 그때 나는 그들과 함께 있었으면 좋았을 텐데.

lines.en: I wish that his hands had been placed on my head,
lines.ko: 그의 손이 내 머리 위에 얹혀졌더라면 좋았을 텐데,

lines.en: That his arm had been thrown around me,
lines.ko: 그의 팔이 내 주위에 던져졌다는 것,

lines.en: And that I might have seen his kind look when he said,
lines.ko: 그리고 그가 말했을 때 나는 그의 친절한 표정을 볼 수 있었을 것입니다.

lines.en: "Let the little ones come unto Me."
Yet still to his footstool in prayer I may go,
lines.ko: 그러나 나는 여전히 기도하며 그분의 발등상에 갈 수 있습니다.

lines.en: And ask for a share in his love;
lines.ko: 그리고 그분의 사랑에 동참해 달라고 청하십시오.

lines.en: And if I now earnestly seek him below,
lines.ko: 그리고 내가 지금 아래에서 간절히 그분을 찾는다면,

lines.en: I shall see him and hear him above.
lines.ko: 나는 그를 보고 위에서 그의 말을 들을 것이다.

lines.en: In that beautiful place he is gone to prepare
lines.ko: 그 아름다운 곳에서 그는 준비하러 갔습니다

lines.en: For all who are washed and forgiv'n;
And many dear children are gathering there,
lines.ko: 그리고 많은 사랑하는 아이들이 그곳에 모여 있습니다.

lines.en: For of such is the kingdom of heav'n.

title_en: Like the stars of the morning

lines.en: When he cometh, when he cometh
lines.ko: 예수께서 오실 때에 그 귀중한 보배
lines.id: Kapan Dia datang, kapan Dia datang

lines.en: To make up his jewels,
lines.id: Untuk melengkapi perhiasan-perhiasan-Nya,

lines.en: All his jewels, precious jewels,
lines.ko: 샛별 같은 그 보배 면류관에 달려
lines.id: Semua permata-Nya, permata-permata yang berharga,

lines.en: His loved and his own.
lines.id: Kekasihnya dan milik-Nya.
Bagaikan bintang di pagi hari,
Mahkotanya yang cemerlang berdengung,
Mereka akan bersinar dalam keindahannya,
Permata cerah untuk mahkota-Nya.

lines.en: Like the stars of the morning,
lines.ko: 정한 보배 빛난 보배 주 예수의 보배
lines.id: Dia akan mengumpulkan, Dia akan mengumpulkan

lines.en: His bright crown adorning,
lines.id: Permata untuk kerajaan-Nya,

lines.en: They shall shine in their beauty,
lines.ko: 샛별 같은 그 보배 면류관에 달려
lines.id: Semua yang murni, semua yang cemerlang,

lines.en: Bright gems for his crown.
lines.id: Kekasihnya dan milik-Nya.
Bagaikan bintang di pagi hari,
Mahkotanya yang cemerlang berdengung,
They shall shine in their beau-ty,
Permata cerah untuk mahkota-Nya.

lines.en: He will gather, he will gather
lines.ko: 주를 사랑하는 아이 이 세상에 살 때
lines.id: Anak kecil, anak kecil

lines.en: The gems for his kingdom,
lines.ko: 주의 말씀 순종 참 하면 보배로다
lines.id: Yang mencintai Re-deem-er mereka,

lines.en: All the pure ones, all the bright ones,
lines.ko: 샛별 같은 그 보배 면류관에 달려
lines.id: Apakah orang-orang Yahudi, orang-orang Yahudi yang berharga,

lines.en: His loved and his own.
lines.id: Kekasihnya dan milik-Nya.
Bagaikan bintang di pagi hari,
Mahkotanya yang cemerlang berdengung,
Mereka akan bersinar dalam keindahannya,
Permata cerah untuk mahkota-Nya.

lines.en: Little children, little children
Who love their Redeemer,
Are the jewels, precious jewels,
His loved and his own.

alt_titles: When he cometh, when he cometh

title_en: There is no name so sweet on earth

lines.en: There is no name so sweet on earth,
lines.ko: 천지에 있는 이름 중 귀하고 높은 이름
lines.id: Tidak ada nama yang begitu manis di bumi,

lines.en: No name so sweet in heaven,
lines.ko: 주 나시기 전 지으신 구주의 이름 예수
lines.id: Tidak ada nama yang begitu manis di surga,

lines.en: The Name before his wondrous birth
lines.ko: 후렴 : 주 앞에 내가 엎드려 그 이름 찬송함은
lines.id: Nama sebelum kelahiran-Nya yang menakjubkan

lines.en: To Christ the Saviour given.
lines.ko: 내 귀에 들린 말씀 중 귀하신 이름 예수 아멘
lines.id: Kepada Kristus Juruselamat yang diberikan.
Kami senang bernyanyi tentang Kristus Raja kami,
Dan pujilah Dia Yesus yang terberkati
Karena tidak ada kata yang pernah didengar telinga
Sangat sayang, sangat manis seperti “Yesus.”

lines.en: We love to sing around our King,
lines.ko: 주 십자가에 달릴 때 명패에 쓰인 대로
lines.id: Dan ketika dia tergantung di pohon,

lines.en: And hail him blessed Jesus;
lines.ko: 저 유대인의 왕이요 곧 우리 왕이시라
lines.id: Mereka menulis Nama ini di atas Dia

lines.en: For there's no word ear ever heard
lines.id: Itu semua mungkin melihat alasan kita

lines.en: So dear, so sweet as Jesus.
lines.id: Selama-lamanya harus lebih mengasihi Dia.
Kami senang bernyanyi tentang Kristus Raja kami,
Dan pujilah Dia Yesus yang terberkati
Karena tidak ada kata yang pernah didengar telinga
Sangat sayang, sangat manis seperti “Yesus.”

lines.en: And, when he hung upon the tree,
lines.ko: 지금도 살아 계셔서 언제나 하시는 일
lines.id: Jadi sekarang, di atas takhta Bapa-Nya,

lines.en: They wrote this Name above him;
lines.ko: 나 같은 죄인 부르사 참 소망 주시도다
lines.id: Al-might-y untuk menyewakan kembali kami

lines.en: That all might see the reason we
lines.id: Dari dosa dan kesakitan, Dia dengan senang hati memerintah,

lines.en: For evermore must love him.
lines.id: Pangeran dan Juruselamat Yesus.
Kami senang bernyanyi tentang Kristus Raja kami,
Dan pujilah Dia Yesus yang terberkati
Karena tidak ada kata yang pernah didengar telinga
Sangat sayang, sangat manis seperti “Yesus.”

lines.en: So now, upon his Father's throne,
lines.id: Ya Yesus, dengan nama yang tak tertandingi itu,

lines.en: Almighty to release us
lines.ko: 그 이름으로 우리게 참 복을 내리신다
lines.id: Kasih karunia-Mu tidak akan pernah mengecewakan kami

lines.en: From sin and pains, he gladly reigns,
lines.id: Hari ini sama seperti hari kemarin,

lines.en: The Prince and Saviour Jesus.
lines.id: Engkau tetap sama selamanya.
Kami senang bernyanyi tentang Kristus Raja kami,
Dan pujilah Dia Yesus yang terberkati
Karena tidak ada kata yang pernah didengar telinga
Sangat sayang, sangat manis seperti “Yesus.”

lines.en: To Jesus ev'ry knee shall bow,
And ev'ry tongue confess him,
And we unite with saints in light,
Our only Lord to bless him.
O Jesus, by that matchless Name,
Thy grace shall fail us never;
Today as yesterday the same,
Thou art the same for ever.

title_id: Tidak Ada Nama yang begitu Manis

title_en: Jesus bids us shine

lines.en: Jesus bids us shine
With a pure, clear light,
Like a little candle
Burning in the night.
In this world of darkness
So let us shine
You in your small corner,
And I in mine.
Jesus bids us shine,
First of all for him;
Well he sees and knows it,
lines.ko: 그 사람은 그것을 보고 알고 있어요.

lines.en: If our light grows dim.
He looks down from heaven
To see us shine
You in your small corner,
And I in mine.
Jesus bids us shine,
Then, for all around;
Many kinds of darkness
In the world are found
Sin and want and sorrow;
So we must shine
You in your small corner,
And I in mine.

title_en: Saviour, teach me, day by day

lines.en: Saviour, teach me, day by day,
Love's sweet lesson to obey;
Sweeter lesson cannot be,
lines.ko: 이보다 더 달콤한 교훈은 있을 수 없습니다.

lines.en: Loving him who first loved me.
With a child's glad heart of love,
At thy bidding may I move;
lines.ko: 당신의 명령에 따라 제가 움직일 수 있게 하소서.

lines.en: Prompt to serve and follow thee,
Loving him who first loved me.
Teach me thus thy steps to trace,
lines.ko: 따라가는 당신의 발걸음을 나에게 가르쳐 주십시오.

lines.en: Strong to follow in thy grace;
Learning how to love from thee,
Loving him who first loved me.
Love in loving finds employ,
In obedience all her joy;
Ever new that joy will be,
lines.ko: 그 기쁨은 언제나 새로운 것이 될 것입니다.

lines.en: Loving him who first loved me.

title_en: Hushed was the evening hymn

lines.en: Hushed was the evening hymn,
The temple courts were dark;
The lamp was burning dim
Before the sacred ark;
When suddenly a voice divine
Rang through the silence of the shrine.
The old man, meek and mild,
The priest of Israel, slept;
His watch the temple child,
The little Levite, kept;
And what from Eli's sense was sealed
lines.ko: 그리고 엘리의 의미에서 봉인된 것은 무엇입니까?

lines.en: The Lord to Hannah's son revealed.
O give me Samuel's ear,
The open ear, O Lord,
Alive and quick to hear
Each whisper of thy Word,
Like him to answer at thy call,
And to obey thee first of all.
O give me Samuel's heart,
A lowly heart, that waits
Where in thy house thou art,
Or watches at thy gates;
By day and night, a heart that still
Moves at the breathing of thy will.
O give me Samuel's mind,
A sweet unmurm'ring faith,
Obedient and resigned
To thee in life and death,
That I may read with childlike eyes
lines.ko: 어린아이 같은 눈으로 읽을 수 있도록

lines.en: Truths that are hidden from the wise.

title_en: Ye children, come, give ear to me
title_ko: 자녀들아, 와서 내 말에 귀를 기울여라 (자체번역)

lines.en: From Psalm 34:11-15
Ye children, come, give ear to me
lines.ko: 자녀들아, 와서 내 말에 귀를 기울여라

lines.en: And learn Jehovah's fear;
He who would long and happy live,
Let him my counsel hear.
Children, come, hither come,
And unto me give ear,
I shall you teach to understand
How ye the Lord should fear.
Restrain thy lips from speaking guile,
lines.ko: 네 입술을 금하여 교활한 말을 하지 말고

lines.en: From wicked speech depart,
From evil turn and do the good,
Seek peace with all thy heart.
Jehovah's eyes are on the just,
He hearkens to their cry;
Against the wicked sets his face,
Their very name shall die.

title_en: The wise may bring their learning
title_ko: 현명한 사람은 배움을 가져올 수 있다 (자체번역)

lines.en: The wise may bring their learning,
lines.ko: 현명한 사람은 배움을 얻을 수 있고,

lines.en: The rich may bring their wealth,
And some may bring their greatness,
lines.ko: 그리고 어떤 사람들은 그들의 위대함을 가져올 수도 있고,

lines.en: And some bring strength and health;
We, too, would bring our treasures
To offer to the King;
We have no wealth or learning:
What shall we children bring?
We'll bring him hearts to love him;
lines.ko: 우리는 그에게 그를 사랑하는 마음을 가져다줄 것입니다.

lines.en: We'll bring him thankful praise,
lines.ko: 우리는 그에게 감사의 찬양을 전할 것입니다.

lines.en: And young souls meekly striving
To walk in holy ways:
And these shall be the treasures
We offer to the King,
And these are gifts that even
The poorest child may bring.
lines.ko: 가장 가난한 아이가 가져올 수 있습니다.

lines.en: We'll bring the little duties
We have to do each day;
We'll try our best to please him,
lines.ko: 우리는 그를 기쁘게 하기 위해 최선을 다할 것입니다.

lines.en: At home, at school, at play:
And better are these treasures
To offer to the King
Than richest gifts without them;
Yet these a child may bring.
lines.ko: 하지만 이런 것들은 어린이가 가져올 수도 있습니다.

title_en: Ask the Saviour to help you

lines.en: Yield not to temptation,
lines.id: Jangan menyerah pada godaan, karena menyerah adalah dosa;

lines.en: For yielding is sin;
lines.id: Setiap kemenangan akan membantu Anda meraih kemenangan lainnya;

lines.en: Each victory will help you
lines.ko: 너 시험을 이겨 새 힘을 얻고
lines.id: Bertarunglah dengan gagah berani, kalahkan nafsu gelap,

lines.en: Some other to win;
lines.id: Pandanglah selalu Yesus, Dia akan membantu Anda melewatinya.

lines.en: Fight manfully onward;
lines.ko: 우리 구주의 힘과 그의 위로를 빌라
lines.id: Mintalah Juruselamat untuk membantu Anda,

lines.en: Dark passions subdue;
lines.ko: 주님 네 편에 서서 항상 도우시리
lines.id: Menghibur, menguatkan dan menjagamu;

lines.en: Look ever to Jesus,
lines.id: Dia bersedia membantu Anda,

lines.en: He will carry you through.
lines.id: Dia akan membawamu melewatinya.

lines.en: Ask the Saviour to help you,
lines.id: Hindari teman yang jahat, hina bahasa yang buruk,

lines.en: Comfort, strengthen, and keep you;
lines.id: Nama Tuhan dijunjung tinggi dan jangan disia-siakan;

lines.en: He is willing to aid you,
lines.id: Jadilah bijaksana dan sungguh-sungguh, baik hati dan jujur,

lines.en: He will carry you through.
lines.id: Pandanglah selalu Yesus, Dia akan membantu Anda melewatinya.

lines.ko: 우리 구주의 힘과 그의 위로를 빌라
lines.id: Mintalah Juruselamat untuk membantu Anda,

lines.ko: 주님 네 편에 서서 항상 도우시리
lines.id: Menghibur, menguatkan dan menjagamu;
Dia bersedia membantu Anda,
Dia akan membawamu melewatinya.

lines.en: Shun evil companions;
lines.id: Kepada dia yang datang, Tuhan memberikan sebuah mahkota;

lines.en: Bad language disdain;
lines.id: Melalui iman kita akan menang, meski sering kali terjatuh;

lines.en: God's name hold in reverence,
lines.id: Dia yang adalah Juruselamat kita, kekuatan kita akan diperbarui;

lines.en: Nor take it in vain;
lines.id: Pandanglah selalu Yesus, Dia akan membantu Anda melewatinya.

lines.en: Be thoughtful and earnest,
lines.ko: 우리 구주의 힘과 그의 위로를 빌라
lines.id: Mintalah Juruselamat untuk membantu Anda,

lines.en: Kindhearted and true;
lines.ko: 주님 네 편에 서서 항상 도우시리
lines.id: Menghibur, menguatkan dan menjagamu;

lines.en: Look ever to Jesus,
lines.id: Dia bersedia membantu Anda,

lines.en: He will carry you through.
lines.id: Dia akan membawamu melewatinya.

lines.en: To him that o'ercometh
God giveth a crown;
Through faith we shall conquer,
Though often cast down;
He who is the Saviour
Our strength will renew;
Look ever to Jesus,
He will carry you through.

alt_titles: Yield not to temptation

title_en: Cast thy burden on the Lord

lines.en: Father, we thank thee for the night,
And for the pleasant morning light;
lines.ko: 그리고 기분 좋은 아침 햇살을 위해;

lines.en: For rest and food and loving care,
And all that makes the day so fair.
lines.ko: 그리고 그 모든 것이 그날을 매우 공평하게 만듭니다.

lines.en: Help us to do the things we should,
lines.ko: 우리가 해야 할 일을 할 수 있도록 도와주세요.

lines.en: To be to others kind and good;
In all we do, in work, or play,
lines.ko: 우리가 하는 모든 일에서, 일할 때나 놀 때,

lines.en: To grow more loving ev'ry day.

alt_titles: Father, we thank thee for the night

title_en: Dare to be a Daniel! Dare to stand alone!
title_ko: 다니엘이 되어 보세요! 감히 혼자 서세요! (자체번역)

lines.en: Standing by a purpose true,
Heeding God's command,
Honor them, the faithful few!
All hail to Daniel's band!
Dare to be a Daniel!
Dare to stand alone!
Dare to have a purpose firm!
Dare to make it known!
Many mighty men are lost,
Daring not to stand,
Who for God had been a host
By joining Daniel's band.
Many giants, great and tall,
Stalking through the land,
Headlong to the earth would fall,
If met by Daniel's band.
Hold the gospel banner high;
On to vict'ry grand;
Satan and his host defy,
And shout for Daniel's band.

alt_titles: Standing by a purpose true

title_en: Jesus, high in glory

lines.en: Jesus, high in glory,
Lend a listening ear;
When we bow before thee,
Children's praises hear.
Though thou art so holy,
Heav'n's almighty King,
Thou wilt stoop to listen
lines.ko: 너는 몸을 굽혀 귀를 기울일 것이다

lines.en: When thy praise we sing.
We are little children,
Weak and apt to stray,
Saviour, guide and keep us
In the heav'nly way.
Save us, Lord, from sinning;
Watch us day by day;
Help us now to love thee;
lines.ko: 이제 우리가 당신을 사랑할 수 있도록 도와주소서.

lines.en: Take our sins away.
Then, when thou shalt call us
To our heav'nly home,
We will gladly answer,
Saviour, Lord, we come.

title_en: There is a city bright

lines.en: There is a city bright;
Closed are its gates to sin;
Naught that defileth,
Naught that defileth,
Can ever enter in.
Saviour, I come to thee;
O Lamb of God, I pray,
Cleanse me and save me,
Cleanse me and save me,
Wash all my sins away.
Lord, make me, from this hour,
Thy loving child to be,
Kept by thy power,
Kept by thy power,
From all that grieveth thee,
Till in the snow-white dress
Of thy redeemed I stand,
lines.ko: 나는 당신의 구원받은 자들 가운데 서 있습니다.

lines.en: Faultless and stainless,
Faultless and stainless,
Safe in that happy land.

title_en: The Lord is my Shepherd, no want shall I know
title_ko: 여호와는 나의 목자시니 내가 어찌 알랴 (자체번역)

lines.en: From Psalm 23
The Lord is my Shepherd, no want shall I know;
lines.ko: 여호와는 나의 목자시니 내가 부족함을 알지 못하리니

lines.en: I feed in green pastures, safe-folded I rest;
lines.ko: 나는 푸른 초장에서 먹이를 주고, 안전하게 접혀서 쉬고 있습니다.

lines.en: He leadeth my soul where the still waters flow,
lines.ko: 잔잔한 물 흐르는 곳으로 내 영혼을 인도하시는도다

lines.en: Restores me when wandering, redeems when oppressed.
lines.ko: 방황할 때 나를 회복시키시며, 환난 중에 구속하시느니라.

lines.en: Through the valley and shadow of death tho' I stray,
lines.ko: 나는 죽음의 계곡과 그늘을 지나 방황하고 있습니다.

lines.en: Since thou art my Guardian, no evil I fear;
lines.ko: 당신이 나의 수호자이시니 나는 악을 두려워하지 않습니다.

lines.en: Thy rod shall defend me, thy staff be my stay;
lines.ko: 당신의 지팡이가 나를 보호하고 당신의 지팡이가 나의 버팀목이 될 것입니다.

lines.en: No harm can befall with my Comforter near.
lines.ko: 나의 보혜사가 가까이 계시면 어떤 해도 닥칠 수 없습니다.

lines.en: In the midst of affliction my table is spread;
lines.ko: 고난 중에 나의 식탁이 펼쳐져 있습니다.

lines.en: With blessings unmeasured my cup runneth o'er;
lines.ko: 측량할 수 없는 축복으로 나의 잔이 흘러나옵니다.

lines.en: With perfume and oil thou anointest my head;
O what shall I ask of thy providence more?
lines.ko: 오, 내가 당신의 섭리에 무엇을 더 바랄 수 있겠습니까?

lines.en: Let goodness and mercy, my bountiful God,
Still follow my steps till I meet thee above:
lines.ko: 내가 위에서 당신을 만날 때까지 여전히 내 발걸음을 따르십시오.

lines.en: I seek by the path which my forefathers trod,
lines.ko: 나는 내 조상들이 밟았던 길을 따라 찾고,

lines.en: Thro' the land of their sojourn, Thy kingdom of love.
lines.ko: 그들이 머무는 땅, 당신의 사랑의 왕국이여.

title_en: Conquering now and still to conquer
title_ko: 지금도 정복하고 있고 앞으로도 정복할 것이다 (자체번역)

lines.en: Conquering now and still to conquer,
lines.ko: 지금도 이기고 있고, 지금도 이기고 있으며,

lines.en: Rideth a King in his might,
Leading the host of all the faithful
Into the midst of the fight;
See them with courage advancing,
Clad in their brilliant array,
Shouting the name of their Leader,
Hear them exultingly say:
lines.ko: 그들이 기쁨에 넘쳐 이렇게 말하는 것을 들어 보십시오:

lines.en: Not to the strong is the battle,
Not to the swift is the race,
Yet to the true and the faithful
Vict'ry is promised through grace.
Conquering now and still to conquer,
lines.ko: 지금도 이기고 있고, 지금도 이기고 있으며,

lines.en: Who is this wonderful King?
Whence are the armies which he leadeth,
While of his glory they sing?
He is our Lord and Redeemer,
Saviour and Monarch divine;
They are the stars that for ever
Bright in his Kingdom will shine.
Conquering now and still to conquer,
lines.ko: 지금도 이기고 있고, 지금도 이기고 있으며,

lines.en: Jesus, thou Ruler of all,
Thrones and their scepters all shall perish,
Crowns and their splendor shall fall,
Yet shall the armies thou leadest,
Faithful and true to the last,
Find in thy mansions eternal
Rest, when their warfare is past.

alt_titles: Not to the strong is the battle

title_en: Now the day is over

lines.en: Now the day is over,
Night is drawing nigh,
Shadows of the evening
Steal across the sky.
Jesus, give the weary
Calm and sweet repose;
With thy tend'rest blessing
May our eyelids close.
Grant to little children
Visions bright of thee;
Guard the sailors, tossing
On the deep blue sea.
Comfort ev'ry sufferer
Watching late in pain;
Those who plan some evil
From their sin restrain.
Through the long night watches
May thine angels spread
Their white wings above me,
lines.ko: 내 위에 있는 그들의 하얀 날개,

lines.en: Watching round my bed.
Glory to the Father,
Glory to the Son,
And to thee, blest Spirit,
Whilst all ages run.

title_en: Come, let us sing of a wonderful love

lines.en: Come, let us sing of a wonderful love,
Tender and true, tender and true,
Out of the heart of the Father above,
Streaming to me and to you:
Wonderful love, wonderful love,
Dwells in the heart of the Father above.
Jesus the Saviour this gospel to tell
Joyfully came, joyfully came,
Came with the helpless and hopeless to dwell,
lines.ko: 무력하고 소망 없는 자들과 함께 와서 거하리니

lines.en: Sharing their sorrow and shame:
Seeking the lost, seeking the lost,
lines.ko: 잃어버린 자를 찾고, 잃어버린 자를 찾고,

lines.en: Saving, redeeming at measureless cost.
lines.ko: 헤아릴 수 없는 비용으로 절약하고 상환합니다.

lines.en: Jesus is seeking the wanderers yet;
Why do they roam? why do they roam?
lines.ko: 그들은 왜 배회합니까? 그들은 왜 돌아다니는 걸까?

lines.en: Love only waits to forgive and forget;
Home, weary wanderers, home!
Wonderful love, wonderful love,
Dwells in the heart of the Father above.
Come to my heart, O thou wonderful Love!
lines.ko: 내 마음에 오소서, 오 놀라운 사랑이여!

lines.en: Come and abide, come and abide,
Lifting my life till it rises above
lines.ko: 내 삶이 위로 올라갈 때까지 들어올려

lines.en: Envy and falsehood and pride:
Seeking to be, seeking to be,
Lowly and humble, a learner of thee.

alt_titles: Wonderful Love

title_en: Thy God reigneth

lines.en: Trembling soul, beset by fears,
"Thy God reigneth!"
Look above and dry thy tears:
"Thy God reigneth!"
Though thy foes with power assail,
Naught against thee shall prevail;
lines.ko: 당신을 대적하는 어떤 것도 승리하지 못할 것입니다.

lines.en: Trust in him, he'll never fail:
lines.ko: 그를 믿으십시오. 그는 결코 실패하지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: "Thy God reigneth! Thy God reigneth!"
Sinful soul, thy debt is paid;
lines.ko: 죄 많은 영혼아, 네 빚은 다 갚았느니라.

lines.en: "Thy God reigneth!"
On the Lord thy sins were laid;
"Thy God reigneth!"
On the cross of Calvary,
Jesus shed his blood for thee,
From all sin to set thee free:
"Thy God reigneth! Thy God reigneth!"
Seeking soul, to Jesus turn;
"Thy God reigneth!"
None that seek him will he spurn;
lines.ko: 그를 찾는 사람은 아무도 그를 물리치지 않으실 것이다.

lines.en: "Thy God reigneth!"
Wandering sheep the Shepherd seeks,
And when found he ever keeps,
lines.ko: 그리고 발견되었을 때 그는 계속해서 보관했습니다.

lines.en: For he slumbers not nor sleeps:
"Thy God reigneth! Thy God reigneth!"
Join, ye saints, the truth proclaim,
"Thy God reigneth!"
Shout it forth with glad acclaim,
"Thy God reigneth!"
Zion, wake! the morn is nigh,
See it break from yonder sky;
Loud and clear the watchmen cry:
"Thy God reigneth! Thy God reigneth!"
Church of Christ, awake, awake!
"Thy God reigneth!"
Forward, then, fresh courage take:
"Thy God reigneth!"
Soon, descending from his throne,
He shall claim thee for his own;
lines.ko: 그가 너를 자기 소유로 주장할 것이다.

lines.en: Sin shall then be overthrown:
"Thy God reigneth! Thy God reigneth!"

alt_titles: Trembling soul, beset by fears

title_en: Thy Word have I hid in my heart

lines.en: Thy Word is a lamp to my feet,
A light to my path alway,
To guide and to save me from sin,
And show me the heav'nly way.
Thy Word have I hid in my heart
That I might not sin against thee;
lines.ko: 내가 당신께 죄를 짓지 않으려고 합니다.

lines.en: That I might not sin, that I might not sin,
lines.ko: 내가 죄를 짓지 않으려고, 죄를 짓지 않으려고,

lines.en: Thy word have I hid in my heart.
lines.ko: 당신의 말씀을 내 마음 속에 숨겨 두었나이다.

lines.en: Forever, O Lord, is thy Word
Established and fixed on high;
Thy faithfulness unto all men
Abideth for ever nigh.
At morning, at noon, and at night
I ever will give thee praise;
For thou art my portion, O Lord,
And shall be through all my days!
lines.ko: 그리고 나의 모든 날이 지나갈 것이다!

lines.en: Through him whom thy Word hath foretold,
The Saviour and Morning Star,
Salvation and peace have been brought
To those who have strayed afar.

alt_titles: Thy Word is a lamp to my feet

lines.id: Hal-hal ini juga harus ditambahkan.

lines.en: Now on a higher plane I dwell,
And with my soul I know 'tis well;
Yet how or why, I cannot tell,
He should have lifted me.

alt_titles: In loving-kindness, Jesus came
He lifted Me
title_id: Ayo, Hai Orang-orang yang Bersyukur, Ayo

title_en: He was wounded for our transgressions
title_ko: 그가 상처를 입은 것은 우리의 범법 때문이요 (자체번역)

lines.en: Who hath believed after hearing the message,
To whom is the arm of the Lord revealed?
He shall grow up as a plant new and tender,
And as a root out of a barren field.
He was wounded for our transgressions,
lines.ko: 그가 상처를 입은 것은 우리의 범법 때문이요

lines.en: He was bruised for our iniquities;
The chastisement of our peace was upon him,
lines.ko: 그에게 형벌이 임하여 우리가 평화를 누리고

lines.en: And with his stripes we are healed.
lines.ko: 그리고 그의 채찍으로 우리는 나음을 받았습니다.

lines.en: He was despised and by all men rejected,
lines.ko: 그는 멸시를 받아 모든 사람에게 버린 바 되었으며

lines.en: Weighted with sorrows, acquainted with grief;
Smitten, afflicted, by God was forsaken,
lines.ko: 하나님께 맞으며 고난을 받고 버림을 받았으나

lines.en: He suffered alone; no one could bring relief.
lines.ko: 그는 혼자 고통을 겪었습니다. 아무도 구제를 가져올 수 없습니다.

lines.en: Like as a lamb he was brought to the slaughter,
Speechless as sheep to the shearers was led;
lines.ko: 말 못하는 양들이 털 깎는 자에게 끌려가듯이,

lines.en: He was cut off from the land of the living,
For our transgressions on Calvary bled.
lines.ko: 갈보리에서 우리의 범법으로 인해 피가 흘렀습니다.

alt_titles: Who hath believed

title_en: Holy Bible, book divine

lines.en: Holy Bible, book divine,
Precious treasure, thou art mine;
Mine to tell me whence I came;
lines.ko: 내가 어디서 왔는지 알려주는 것이 내 것입니다.

lines.en: Mine to teach me what I am;
Mine to chide me when I rove;
lines.ko: 내가 돌아다닐 때 나를 꾸짖는 나의 것;

lines.en: Mine to show a Saviour's love;
Mine thou art to guide and guard;
Mine to punish or reward;
Mine to comfort in distress,
lines.ko: 고난 중에 위로를 주는 나의 것,

lines.en: Suffering in this wilderness;
Mine to show by living faith,
lines.ko: 나의 것은 산 믿음으로 보여 주고,

lines.en: Man can triumph over death;
Mine to tell of joys to come,
lines.ko: 앞으로 다가올 기쁨에 대해 이야기하고 싶습니다.

lines.en: And the rebel sinner's doom;
O thou holy book divine,
Precious treasure, thou art mine.

lines.id: Penyelamat yang luar biasa adalah Yesus, Tuhanku,

Dan menyelimutiku di sana dengan tangan-Nya.

lines.en: He hideth my soul in the cleft of the rock,
lines.id: Dengan berkah yang tak terhitung banyaknya setiap saat, Dia memahkotai,
Dan, dipenuhi dengan kepenuhan ilahi-Nya,
Aku bernyanyi dalam kegembiraanku, oh, kemuliaan bagi Tuhan
Untuk Penebus Ulang seperti milikku!
Dia menyembunyikan jiwaku di celah batu
Itu menaungi tanah yang kering dan haus

lines.ko: 저 위험한 곳 내가 이를 때면
lines.id: Dia menyembunyikan hidupku di kedalaman kasih-Nya,

lines.ko: 큰 바위에 숨기시고 주 손으로 덮으시네
lines.id: Dan menyelimutiku di sana dengan tangan-Nya,
Dan menyelimutiku di sana dengan tangan-Nya.

lines.en: Where rivers of pleasure I see.
lines.id: Saat mengenakan kecerahan-Nya, aku terangkat
Untuk menemui-Nya di awan-awan di langit,
Penyelamatan-Nya yang sempurna, kasih-Nya yang luar biasa,
Saya akan berteriak dengan jutaan orang di tempat tinggi.
Dia menyembunyikan jiwaku di celah batu
Itu menaungi tanah yang kering dan haus

lines.ko: 저 위험한 곳 내가 이를 때면
lines.id: Dia menyembunyikan hidupku di kedalaman kasih-Nya,

lines.ko: 큰 바위에 숨기시고 주 손으로 덮으시네
lines.id: Dan menyelimutiku di sana dengan tangan-Nya,
Dan menyelimutiku di sana dengan tangan-Nya.

lines.en: He hideth my soul in the cleft of the rock
That shadows a dry, thirsty land;
He hideth my life in the depths of his love,
And covers me there with his hand.
A wonderful Saviour is Jesus my Lord,
He taketh my burden away,
He holdeth me up, and I shall not be moved,
He giveth me strength as my day.
With numberless blessings each moment he crowns,
And filled with a fullness divine,
I sing in my rapture, O glory to God
For such a Redeemer as mine!
When clothed in his brightness, transported I rise
To meet him in clouds of the sky,
His perfect salvation, his wonderful love,
I'll shout with the millions on high.

title_en: Christ shall have dominion over land and sea

lines.en: From Psalm 72:8-14, 17-19
Christ shall have dominion
Over land and sea,
Earth's remotest regions
Shall his empire be;
They that wilds inhabit
Shall their worship bring,
Kings shall render tribute,
Nations serve our King.
Christ shall have dominion
Over land and sea,
Earth's remotest regions
Shall his empire be;
When the needy seek him,
He will mercy show;
Yea, the weak and helpless
Shall his pity know;
He will surely save them
lines.ko: 그 분은 반드시 그들을 구원하실 것이다

lines.en: From oppression's might,
For their lives are precious
In his holy sight.
Ever and for ever
Shall his Name endure,
Long as suns continue
It shall stand secure;
And in him for ever
All men shall be blest,
And all nations hail him
King of kings confessed.
Unto God Almighty
Joyful Zion sings;
He alone is glorious,
Doing wondrous things.
Evermore, ye people,
Bless his glorious name,
His eternal glory
Through the earth proclaim.

title_en: Come to the light, 'tis shining for thee
title_ko: 빛으로 오세요, 당신을 위해 빛나고 있어요 (자체번역)

lines.en: The whole world was lost in the darkness of sin;
lines.ko: 온 세상은 죄의 어둠 속에서 멸망당했습니다.

lines.en: The Light of the world is Jesus;
Like sunshine at noonday his glory shone in,
The Light of the world is Jesus.
Come to the Light, 'tis shining for thee;
lines.ko: 빛으로 오세요. 당신을 위해 빛나고 있습니다.

lines.en: Sweetly the Light has dawned upon me;
Once I was blind, but now I can see;
lines.ko: 한때 나는 눈이 멀었지만 이제는 볼 수 있게 되었습니다.

lines.en: The Light of the world is Jesus.
No darkness have we who in Jesus abide,
lines.ko: 예수 안에 거하는 우리에게는 어둠이 없나니

lines.en: The Light of the world is Jesus;
We walk in the Light when we follow our Guide,
lines.ko: 우리가 인도자를 따를 때 우리는 빛 가운데 걷습니다.

lines.en: The Light of the world is Jesus.
Ye dwellers in darkness with sin-blinded eyes,
lines.ko: 죄로 눈이 먼 너희 어둠 속에 거하는 자들아,

lines.en: The Light of the world is Jesus;
Go, wash at his bidding, and light will arise,
lines.ko: 가서 그분의 명령에 따라 몸을 씻으십시오. 그러면 빛이 일어날 것입니다.

lines.en: The Light of the world is Jesus.
No need of the sunlight in heaven, we're told,
The Light of the world is Jesus;
The Lamb is the Light in the City of Gold,
The Light of the world is Jesus.

lines.en: On the cruel cross he suffered,
lines.ko: 크신 사랑 찬양하리 나의 죄 사하려고
lines.id: Di Salib yang kejam Dia menderita,

lines.en: From the curse to set me free.
lines.ko: 십자가에 죽임 당한 나의 주 찬양하리(찬양하리)
lines.id: Dari kutukan untuk membebaskanku.
Nyanyikan, oh, nyanyikan Penebusku.
Dengan darah-Nya Dia membeli aku.
Di kayu Salib Dia memeteraikan pengampunanku,
Sakiti hutang dan bebaskan aku.

lines.en: Sing, O sing of my Redeemer!
lines.ko: 내가 구원 받은 증거 기뻐 전파하리라
lines.id: Saya akan menceritakan kisah yang menakjubkan,

lines.en: With his blood he purchased me;
lines.ko: 내 죄 모두 담당 하신 주의 사랑 크셔라
lines.id: Bagaimana, harta milikku yang hilang harus diselamatkan,

lines.en: On the cross he sealed my pardon,
lines.ko: 크신 사랑 찬양하리 나의 죄 사하려고
lines.id: Dalam kasih dan rahmat-Nya yang tak terbatas

lines.en: Paid the debt and made me free.
lines.ko: 십자가에 죽임 당한 나의 주 찬양하리(찬양하리)
lines.id: Dia memberikan tebusan dengan cuma-cuma.
Nyanyikan, oh, nyanyikan Penebusku.
Dengan darah-Nya Dia membeli aku.
Di kayu Salib Dia memeteraikan pengampunanku,
Sakiti hutang dan bebaskan aku.

lines.en: I will tell the wondrous story,
lines.id: Aku akan memuji Penebusku yang terkasih

lines.en: How my lost estate to save,
lines.ko: 죄와 죽음 지옥 권세 주가 모두 이겼네
lines.id: Kekuatan kemenangannya akan kukatakan,

lines.en: In his boundless love and mercy,
lines.ko: 크신 사랑 찬양하리 나의 죄 사하려고
lines.id: Betapa kemenangan yang Dia berikan

lines.en: He the ransom freely gave.
lines.ko: 십자가에 죽임 당한 나의 주 찬양하리(찬양하리)
lines.id: Atas dosa, dan kematian, dan neraka.
Nyanyikan, oh, nyanyikan Penebusku.
Dengan darah-Nya Dia membeli aku.
Di kayu Salib Dia memeteraikan pengampunanku,
Sakiti hutang dan bebaskan aku.

lines.en: I will praise my dear Redeemer,
lines.id: Aku akan bernyanyi tentang Penebusku

lines.en: His triumphant power I'll tell,
lines.id: Dan kasih surgawi-Nya kepadaku

lines.en: How the victory he giveth
lines.ko: 크신 사랑 찬양하리 나의 죄 사하려고
lines.id: Dia dari kematian ke kehidupan bukan lagi aku,

lines.en: Over sin and death and hell.
lines.ko: 십자가에 죽임 당한 나의 주 찬양하리(찬양하리)
lines.id: Anak Allah, bersama Dia.
Nyanyikan, oh, nyanyikan Penebusku.
Dengan darah-Nya Dia membeli aku.
Di kayu Salib Dia memeteraikan pengampunanku,
Sakiti hutang dan bebaskan aku.

lines.en: I will sing of my Redeemer
And his heav'nly love to me;
He from death to life has brought me,
Son of God, with him to be.

alt_titles: Sing, O sing of my Redeemer!

title_en: Simply trusting every day

lines.en: Simply trusting ev'ry day,
lines.ko: 어려운 일 당할 때 나의 믿음 적으나
lines.id: Cukup percaya setiap hari,

lines.en: Trusting through a stormy way;
lines.ko: 의지하는 내 주를 더욱 의지 합니다
lines.id: Percaya melalui badai-y

lines.en: Even when my faith is small,
lines.ko: 세월 지나 갈수록 의지 할 것 뿐일세
lines.id: Bahkan ketika imanku masih kecil,

lines.en: Trusting Jesus, that is all.
lines.ko: 무슨 일을 당해도 예수 의지 합니다
lines.id: Percaya pada Yesus, itu saja.
Percaya saat momen berlalu,
Percaya seiring berjalannya waktu
Mempercayai Dia apa pun yang terjadi,
Percaya pada Yesus, itu saja.

lines.en: Trusting as the moments fly,
lines.ko: 성령께서 내 마음 밝히 비춰 주시니
lines.id: Terang-terang Roh-Nya bersinar

lines.en: Trusting as the days go by;
lines.id: Ke dalam hatiku yang malang ini

lines.en: Trusting him whate'er befall,
lines.ko: 세월 지나 갈수록 의지 할 것 뿐일세
lines.id: Sementara Dia memimpin saya tidak bisa jatuh

lines.en: Trusting Jesus, that is all.
lines.ko: 무슨 일을 당해도 예수 의지 합니다
lines.id: Percaya pada Yesus, itu saja.
Percaya saat momen berlalu,
Percaya seiring berjalannya waktu
Mempercayai Dia apa pun yang terjadi,
Percaya pada Yesus, itu saja.

lines.en: Brightly doth his Spirit shine
lines.ko: 밝을 때에 노래와 어둘 때에 기도로
lines.id: Bernyanyi jika jalanku jelas

lines.en: Into this poor heart of mine;
lines.ko: 위태할 때 도움을 주께 간구 합니다
lines.id: Berdoalah jika jalannya suram

lines.en: While he leads I cannot fall;
lines.ko: 세월 지나 갈수록 의지 할 것 뿐일세
lines.id: Jika dalam bahaya, panggillah Dia

lines.en: Trusting Jesus, that is all.
lines.ko: 무슨 일을 당해도 예수 의지 합니다
lines.id: Percaya pada Yesus, itu saja.
Percaya sebagai yang paling penting
Percaya seiring berjalannya waktu
Mempercayai Dia apa pun yang terjadi,
Percaya pada Yesus, itu saja.

lines.en: Singing if my way is clear;
lines.ko: 생명 있을 동안에 예수 의지 합니다
lines.id: Mempercayai-Nya selagi hidup masih ada,

lines.en: Praying if the path be drear;
lines.ko: 천국 올라 가도록 의지할 것 뿐일세
lines.id: Mempercayai Dia sampai bumi berlalu

lines.en: If in danger, for him call;
lines.ko: 세월 지나 갈수록 의지 할 것 뿐일세
lines.id: Sampai di dalam dinding jas-per

lines.en: Trusting Jesus, that is all.
lines.ko: 무슨 일을 당해도 예수 의지 합니다
lines.id: Percaya pada Yesus, itu saja.
Percaya saat momen berlalu,
Percaya seiring berjalannya waktu
Mempercayai Dia apa pun yang terjadi,
Percaya pada Yesus, itu saja.

lines.en: Trusting him while life shall last,
Trusting him till earth be past;
Till within the jasper wall;
Trusting Jesus, that is all.

alt_titles: Trusting as the moments fly, trusting as the days go by
Trusting Jesus

title_en: Praise him! praise him! tell of his excellent greatness

lines.en: Praise him! praise him! Jesus, our blessed Redeemer!
lines.id: Pujilah Dia! pujilah Dia! Ya Tuhan, Re-deem-er kami yang terberkati!

lines.en: Sing, O earth, his wonderful love proclaim!
lines.id: Bernyanyilah, hai Bumi, nyatakan kasih-Nya yang luar biasa!

lines.en: Hail him! hail him! highest archangels in glory;
lines.id: Salam Dia! puji Dia! malaikat agung dosa tertinggi

lines.en: Strength and honor give to his holy name!
lines.id: Kekuatan dan kehormatan-atau berikan kepada nama suci!

lines.en: Like a shepherd, Jesus will guard his children,
lines.id: Seperti seorang penggembala, Yesus akan menjaga anak-anak-Nya

lines.en: In his arms he carries them all day long:
lines.id: Dalam pelukan-Nya Dia menggendong mereka sepanjang hari.
Pujilah Dia! pujilah Dia! menceritakan kehebatan-Nya yang luar biasa.
Pujilah Dia! pujilah Dia! selamanya dalam lagu yang menyenangkan!

lines.en: Praise him! praise him! tell of his excellent greatness,
lines.id: Pujilah Dia! pujilah Dia! Ya Tuhan, Re-deem-er kami yang terberkati!

lines.en: Praise him! praise him! ever in joyful song!
lines.id: Karena dosa-dosa kita, Dia menderita, mengeluarkan darah, dan mati.
Dia, Batu Karang kami, Pengharapan kami akan keselamatan kekal,
Salam Dia! puji Dia Yesus, Yang Tersalib!
Suarakan pujian-Nya! Yesus, yang menanggung duka kami!
Cinta yang tidak terikat, menakjubkan, dalam, dan kuat!
Pujilah Dia! pujilah Dia! menceritakan kehebatan-Nya yang luar biasa.
Pujilah Dia! pujilah Dia! selamanya dalam lagu yang menyenangkan!

lines.en: Praise him! praise him! Jesus, our blessed Redeemer!
lines.id: Pujilah Dia! pujilah dia! Ya Tuhan, Penebusan Kembali kami yang terberkati!

lines.en: For our sins he suffered and bled and died;
lines.id: Portal surgawi nyaring dengan dering ho-san-nas!

lines.en: He our Rock, our hope of eternal salvation,
lines.id: Yesus, Juruselamat, hidup selama-lamanya

lines.en: Hail him! hail him! Jesus the crucified.
lines.id: Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia! Nabi, dan Imam, dan Raja!

lines.en: Sound his praises! Jesus who bore our sorrows,
lines.id: Kristus akan datang, dengan kemenangan atas dunia

lines.en: Love unbounded, wonderful, deep and strong:
lines.id: Kekuasaan dan kemuliaan hanya bagi Tuhan.
Pujilah Dia! pujilah Dia! menceritakan kehebatan-Nya yang luar biasa.
Pujilah Dia! pujilah Dia! selamanya dalam lagu yang menyenangkan!

lines.en: Praise him! praise him! Jesus, our blessed Redeemer!
Heav'nly portals loud with hosannas ring!
Jesus, Saviour, reigneth for ever and ever;
Crown him! crown him! Prophet and Priest and King!
Christ is coming! Over the world victorious,
Power and glory unto the Lord belong:

title_en: Hark! 'tis the Shepherd's voice I hear
title_ko: 듣다! 내가 듣는 목자의 목소리는 이것이다 (자체번역)

lines.en: Hark! 'tis the Shepherd's voice I hear,
lines.ko: 들어봐! 내가 듣는 것은 목자의 음성입니다.

lines.en: Out in the desert dark and drear,
Calling the sheep who've gone astray
Far from the Shepherd's fold away.
Bring them in, bring them in,
Bring them in, from the fields of sin;
Bring them in, bring them in,
Bring the wandering ones to Jesus.
Who'll go and help this Shepherd kind,
lines.ko: 누가 가서 이 양치기 종류를 도울 것인가?

lines.en: Help him the wand'ring ones to find?
lines.ko: 그 사람이 지팡이를 찾을 수 있도록 도와주실 건가요?

lines.en: Who'll bring the lost ones to the fold,
Where they'll be sheltered from the cold?
lines.ko: 추위를 피할 수 있는 곳은 어디일까요?

lines.en: Out in the desert hear their cry,
Out on the mountains wild and high;
Hark! 'tis the Master speaks to thee,
"Go find my sheep where'er they be."

alt_titles: Bring them in, bring them in

title_en: Tell me the story of Jesus

lines.en: Tell me the story of Jesus,
Write on my heart ev'ry word;
Tell me the story most precious,
Sweetest that ever was heard.
lines.ko: 지금까지 들어본 것 중 가장 감미로운 말이에요.

lines.en: Tell how the angels, in chorus,
Sang as they welcomed his birth,
"Glory to God in the highest!
Peace and good tidings to earth."
Tell me the story of Jesus,
Write on my heart ev'ry word;
Tell me the story most precious,
Sweetest that ever was heard.
lines.ko: 지금까지 들어본 것 중 가장 감미로운 말이에요.

lines.en: Fasting alone in the desert,
Tell of the days that are past,
How for our sins he was tempted,
lines.ko: 그가 어찌 우리 죄 때문에 시험을 받으셨는고

lines.en: Yet was triumphant at last.
Tell of the years of his labor,
Tell of the sorrow he bore,
He was despised and afflicted,
Homeless, rejected and poor.
Tell of the cross where they nailed him,
lines.ko: 그분을 못 박은 십자가에 대해 말해주세요.

lines.en: Writhing in anguish and pain;
Tell of the grave where they laid him,
Tell how he liveth again.
Love in that story so tender,
lines.ko: 그 이야기 속의 사랑은 너무 부드러워요

lines.en: Clearer than ever I see:
Stay, let me weep while you whisper,
lines.ko: 머물러라, 당신이 속삭이는 동안 내가 울게 해주세요

lines.en: Love paid the ransom for me.

title_en: Rouse, then, soldiers! Rally round the banner!

lines.en: Sound the battle cry!
See! the foe is nigh!
Raise the standard high
For the Lord:
Gird your armor on,
Stand firm ev'ry one;
Rest your cause upon his holy Word.
lines.ko: 당신의 대의를 그분의 거룩한 말씀에 두십시오.

lines.en: Rouse, then, soldiers!
Rally round the banner!
Ready, steady, pass the word along;
Onward, forward,
Shout aloud, hosanna!
Christ is captain of the mighty throng!
Strong to meet the foe,
Marching on we go,
While our cause we know,
lines.ko: 우리의 원인을 우리가 알고 있는 동안,

lines.en: Must prevail;
Shield and banner bright,
Gleaming in the light,
Battling for the right
We ne'er can fail.
O thou God of all,
Hear us when we call,
lines.ko: 우리가 부를 때 우리의 말을 들으십시오.

lines.en: Help us one and all
By thy grace;
When the battle's done,
And the victory won,
May we wear the crown
Before thy face.

alt_titles: Sound the battle cry

title_en: He is coming again, he is coming again
title_ko: 그 사람이 또 온다, 그 사람이 또 온다 (자체번역)

lines.en: Lift up your heads, pilgrims aweary,
See day's approach now crimson the sky;
lines.ko: 이제 하늘이 진홍색으로 다가오는 날을 보십시오.

lines.en: Night shadows flee, and your Beloved,
lines.ko: 밤의 그림자는 달아나고, 당신의 사랑하는 이는

lines.en: Awaited with longing, at last draweth nigh.
He is coming again, he is coming again,
lines.ko: 그분이 다시 오십니다, 그분이 다시 오십니다.

lines.en: The very same Jesus, rejected of men;
lines.ko: 바로 그 예수께서 사람들에게 버림을 받으셨느니라.

lines.en: He is coming again, he is coming again,
lines.ko: 그분이 다시 오십니다, 그분이 다시 오십니다.

lines.en: With power and great glory, he is coming again.
lines.ko: 능력과 큰 영광으로 그분께서 다시 오십니다.

lines.en: Dark was the night, sin warred against us;
lines.ko: 밤은 어두웠고 죄가 우리를 대항하여 전쟁을 벌였습니다.

lines.en: Heavy the load of sorrow we bore;
But now we see signs of his coming;
lines.ko: 그러나 이제 우리는 그분이 오실 징조를 봅니다.

lines.en: Our hearts glow within us, joy's cup runneth o'er!
lines.ko: 우리 마음은 우리 안에서 빛나고, 기쁨의 잔이 흘러나옵니다!

lines.en: O blessed hope! O blissful promise!
lines.ko: 오 복된 희망이여! 오, 행복한 약속이여!

lines.en: Filling our hearts with rapture divine;
O day of days! hail thine appearing!
lines.ko: 오 날의 날이여! 당신이 나타나기를 환영합니다!

lines.en: Thy transcendent glory for ever shall shine.
lines.ko: 당신의 초월적인 영광이 영원히 빛날 것입니다.

lines.en: Even so come, precious Lord Jesus;
lines.ko: 그럼에도 불구하고 존귀하신 주 예수여, 오시옵소서.

lines.en: Creation waits redemption to see;
Caught up in clouds, soon we shall meet thee;
lines.ko: 구름 속에 갇힌 우리는 곧 당신을 만날 것입니다.

lines.en: O blessed assurance, for ever with thee!
lines.ko: 오 복된 확신이여, 영원히 당신과 함께하소서!

alt_titles: Lift up your heads, pilgrims aweary

title_en: Yes, for me, for me he careth

lines.en: Yes, for me, for me he careth
lines.id: Salam atas cerahnya pagi gembira Zi-on!

lines.en: With a brother's tender care;
lines.id: Sukacita bagi negeri-negeri yang berada dalam kegelapan!

lines.en: Yes, with me, with me he shareth
lines.id: Diamlah aksen kesedihan dan duka

lines.en: Ev'ry burden, ev'ry fear.
lines.id: Zi-on dalam kemenangan memulai pemerintahannya yang ringan.

lines.en: Yes, o'er me, o'er me he watcheth,
Ceaseless watcheth, night and day;
Yes, e'en me, e'en me he snatcheth
From the perils of the way.
Yes, for me, he standeth pleading
lines.id: Salam atas cerahnya pagi gembira Zi-on!

lines.en: At the mercy seat above;
lines.id: Telah lama dinubuatkan oleh para nabi Israel!

lines.en: Ever for me interceding,
lines.id: Salam untuk jutaan orang yang kembali lagi!

lines.en: Constant in untiring love.
lines.id: Bangsa-bangsa lain dan Yahudi adalah penglihatan yang paling diberkati.

lines.en: Yes, in me, in me he dwelleth;
I in him, and he in me!
And my empty soul he filleth,
Here and through eternity.

title_id: Salam atas Cerahnya Pagi Sion yang Bahagia

title_en: Living, he loved me; dying, he saved me

lines.en: One day when heaven was filled with his praises,
lines.ko: 하늘에 찬송이 들리던 그 날 죄악이 가득한 그날 밤에
lines.id: Suatu hari ketika surga dipenuhi dengan pujian-pujian-Nya,

lines.en: One day when sin was as black as could be,
lines.ko: 동정녀 몸에서 탄생한 주님 우리를 구하러 오신 예수
lines.id: Suatu hari ketika dosa begitu hitam,

lines.en: Jesus came forth to be born of a virgin
lines.ko: 살아서 사랑 죽어서 구원 묻혀서 내 죄를 담당하사
lines.id: Yesus datang untuk dilahirkan dari seorang perawan,

lines.en: Dwelt amongst men, my example is he!
lines.ko: 부활로 우리를 구하신 예수 다시 오시리 영광의 그 날
lines.id: Tinggal di antara manusia, Mantanku adalah Dia
Hidup, Dia mencintaiku, sekarat Dia menyelamatkanku
Terkubur, Dia membawa dosa-dosaku jauh-jauh
Bangkit, Dia hanya bermain bebas untuk selama-lamanya
Suatu hari Dia akan datang -oh, hari yang mulia!

lines.en: Living, he loved me; dying, he saved me;
lines.ko: 갈보리산으로 끌려 가시사 십자가 위에서 죽으신 날
lines.id: Suatu hari mereka membawa Dia mendaki gunung Cal-va-ry

lines.en: Buried, he carried my sins far away;
lines.ko: 가시관 쓰시고 피 흘리시사 우리를 구하신 구주 예수
lines.id: Suatu hari mereka memaku Dia hingga mati di pohon

lines.en: Rising, he justified freely, for ever:
lines.ko: 살아서 사랑 죽어서 구원 묻혀서 내 죄를 담당하사
lines.id: Menderita kesedihan, dihina dan ditolak

lines.en: One day he's comingO, glorious day!
lines.ko: 부활로 우리를 구하신 예수 다시 오시리 영광의 그 날
lines.id: Menanggung dosa-dosa kita, Penebusku adalah Dia!
Hidup, Dia mencintaiku, sekarat Dia menyelamatkanku
Terkubur, Dia membawa dosa-dosaku jauh-jauh
Bangkit, Dia hanya bermain bebas untuk selama-lamanya
Suatu hari Dia akan datang -oh, hari yang mulia!

lines.en: One day they led him up Calvary's mountain,
lines.ko: 동산에 주 홀로 묻히신 그 날 고난을 이기고 쉬신 그 날
lines.id: Suatu hari mereka meninggalkan Dia sendirian di taman

lines.en: One day they nailed him to die on the tree;
lines.ko: 천사들 내려와 무덤을 지켜 우리게 소망을 주신 예수
lines.id: Suatu hari Dia beristirahat dari penderitaan dan bebas

lines.en: Suffering anguish, despised and rejected:
lines.ko: 살아서 사랑 죽어서 구원 묻혀서 내 죄를 담당하사
lines.id: Para malaikat turun dari makam-Nya untuk berjaga-jaga

lines.en: Bearing our sins, my Redeemer is he!
lines.ko: 부활로 우리를 구하신 예수 다시 오시리 영광의 그 날
lines.id: Pengharapan bagi mereka yang putus asa, Dialah Juruselamatku!
Hidup, Dia mencintaiku, sekarat Dia menyelamatkanku
Terkubur, Dia membawa dosa-dosaku jauh-jauh
Bangkit, Dia hanya bermain bebas untuk selama-lamanya
Suatu hari Dia akan datang -oh, hari yang mulia!

lines.en: One day they left him alone in the garden,
lines.ko: 무덤이 예수를 못 가둔 그 날 인봉한 그 돌이 굴러간 날
lines.id: Suatu hari nanti kuburan tidak dapat lagi menyembunyikan-Nya,

lines.en: One day he rested, from suffering free;
lines.ko: 죽음의 권세를 깨뜨린 주님 하늘에 오르신 내주 예수
lines.id: Suatu hari batu itu terguling dari pintu,

lines.en: Angels came down o'er his tomb to keep vigil;
lines.ko: 살아서 사랑 죽어서 구원 묻혀서 내 죄를 담당하사
lines.id: Kemudian Dia bangkit, atas kematian Dia taklukkan

lines.en: Hope of the hopeless, my Saviour is he!
lines.ko: 부활로 우리를 구하신 예수 다시 오시리 영광의 그 날
lines.id: Sekarang sudah naik, Tuhanku selamanya!
Hidup, Dia mencintaiku, sekarat Dia menyelamatkanku
Terkubur, Dia membawa dosa-dosaku jauh-jauh
Bangkit, Dia hanya bermain bebas untuk selama-lamanya
Suatu hari Dia akan datang -oh, hari yang mulia!

lines.en: One day the grave could conceal him no longer,
lines.ko: 천사장 나팔이 울리는 그 날 하늘의 영광이 나타날 때
lines.id: Suatu hari nanti trum-pet akan dibunyikan untuk kedatangan-Nya,

lines.en: One day the stone rolled away from the door;
lines.ko: 날 사랑하시는 참되신 친구 날 영접하시러 오실 예수
lines.id: Suatu hari nanti langit dengan kemuliaan-Nya akan bersinar

lines.en: Then he arose, over death he had conquered;
lines.ko: 살아서 사랑 죽어서 구원 묻혀서 내 죄를 담당하사
lines.id: Hari yang indah, orang-orang tercintaku membawakannya

lines.en: Now is ascended, my Lord evermore!
lines.ko: 부활로 우리를 구하신 예수 다시 오시리 영광의 그 날
lines.id: Juruselamat Yang Mulia, Yesus ini milikku!
Hidup, Dia mencintaiku, sekarat Dia menyelamatkanku
Terkubur, Dia membawa dosa-dosaku jauh-jauh
Bangkit, Dia hanya bermain bebas untuk selama-lamanya
Suatu hari Dia akan datang -oh, hari yang mulia!

lines.en: One day the trumpet will sound for his coming,
One day the skies with his glories will shine;
Wonderful day, my beloved ones bringing;
Glorious Saviour, this Jesus is mine!

alt_titles: One day when heaven was filled with his praises
title_id: Suatu Hari Ketika Surga Penuh dengan Pujian-Nya

title_en: I hear the Saviour say

lines.en: I hear the Saviour say,
lines.ko: 이 세상 험하고 나 비록 약하나
lines.id: Saya mendengar Juruselamat berkata,

lines.en: "Thy strength indeed is small,
lines.ko: 늘 기도 힘쓰면 큰 권능 얻겠네
lines.id: “Kekuatanmu sesungguhnya kecil,

lines.en: Child of weakness, watch and pray,
lines.id: Anak yang lemah, berjaga-jaga dan berdoa,

lines.en: Find in me thine all in all."
lines.ko: 피와 같이 붉은 죄 눈 같이 희겠네
lines.id: Temukan dalam diriku segala milikmu."
Yesus membayar semuanya,
Semua padanya aku berhutang budi
Dosa telah meninggalkan noda kriminal,
Dia mencucinya seputih salju.

lines.en: Jesus paid it all,
lines.id: Tuhan, kini aku benar-benar menemukannya

lines.en: All to him I owe;
lines.ko: 돌 같은 내 마음 곧 녹여 주소서
lines.id: Kekuatanmu, dan kekuatanmu sendiri,

lines.en: Sin had left a crimson stain,
lines.id: Dapat mengubah flek penderita kusta,

lines.en: He washed it white as snow.
lines.ko: 피와 같이 붉은 죄 눈 같이 희겠네
lines.id: Dan meluluhkan hati batu.
Yesus membayar semuanya,
Semua padanya aku berhutang budi
Dosa telah meninggalkan noda kriminal,
Dia mencucinya seputih salju.

lines.en: Lord, now indeed I find
lines.id: Tidak ada gunanya bagiku

lines.en: Thy power, and thine alone,
lines.ko: 주 예수 힘 주사 굳세게 하소서
lines.id: Dimana-dengan rahmat-Mu untuk menuntut

lines.en: Can change the leper's spots,
lines.id: Aku akan mencuci pakaianku hingga putih

lines.en: And melt the heart of stone.
lines.ko: 피와 같이 붉은 죄 눈 같이 희겠네
lines.id: Dalam darah Anak Domba Cal-v'ry.
Yesus membayar semuanya,
Semua padanya aku berhutang budi
Dosa telah meninggalkan noda kriminal,
Dia mencucinya seputih salju.

lines.en: For nothing good have I
lines.ko: 죄 사함 받은 후 새 사람 되어서
lines.id: Dan ketika, di depan takhta,

lines.en: Whereby thy grace to claim
lines.ko: 주 앞에 서는 날 늘 찬송 하겠네
lines.id: Aku berdiri di dalam Dia sepenuhnya,

lines.en: I will wash my garments white
lines.id: "Yesus mati jiwaku untuk menyelamatkan,"

lines.en: In the blood of Calvary's lamb.
lines.ko: 피와 같이 붉은 죄 눈 같이 희겠네 아멘
lines.id: Bibirku masih akan mengulanginya.
Yesus membayar semuanya,
Semua padanya aku berhutang budi
Dosa telah meninggalkan noda kriminal,
Dia mencucinya seputih salju. Amin.

lines.en: And when, before the throne,
I stand in him complete,
"Jesus died my soul to save,"
My lips shall still repeat.

alt_titles: Jesus paid it all, all to him I owe

title_en: Hark! the voice of Jesus crying

lines.en: Hark! the voice of Jesus crying,
"Who will go and work today?
Fields are white, and harvests waiting;
Who will bear the sheaves away?"
Loud and long the Master calleth,
Rich reward he offers free;
Who will answer, gladly saying,
"Here am I; send me, send me."
lines.ko: "내가 여기 있습니다. 나를 보내십시오. 나를 보내십시오."

lines.en: If you cannot cross the ocean,
And the heathen lands explore,
You can find the heathen nearer,
lines.ko: 이방인을 더 가까이에서 찾을 수 있고,

lines.en: You can help them at your door.
lines.ko: 당신은 당신의 문앞에서 그들을 도울 수 있습니다.

lines.en: If you cannot give your thousands,
You can give the widow's mite;
And the least you give for Jesus
lines.ko: 그리고 당신이 예수님을 위해 최소한으로 바치는 것은

lines.en: Will be precious in his sight.
If you cannot be a watchman,
Standing high on Zion's wall,
Pointing out the path to heaven,
Off'ring life and peace to all,
With your prayers and with your bounties
You can do what God demands;
lines.ko: 당신은 하나님이 요구하시는 것을 할 수 있습니다.

lines.en: You can be like faithful Aaron,
lines.ko: 당신도 충실한 아론처럼 될 수 있습니다.

lines.en: Holding up the prophet's hands.
Let none hear you idly saying,
lines.ko: 아무도 당신이 멍하니 말하는 것을 듣지 못하게 하세요.

lines.en: "There is nothing I can do,"
lines.ko: "내가 할 수 있는 일은 아무것도 없어,"

lines.en: While the sons of men are dying,
And the Master calls for you:
Take the task he gives you gladly,
lines.ko: 그가 당신에게 주는 임무를 기꺼이 받아들이십시오.

lines.en: Let his work your pleasure be;
Answer quickly when he calleth,
"Here am I; send me, send me."
lines.ko: "내가 여기 있습니다. 나를 보내십시오. 나를 보내십시오."

title_en: Glad day! Glad day! Is it the crowning day
title_ko: 좋은 하루! 좋은 하루! 오늘이 대관식날인가 (자체번역)

lines.en: Jesus may come today,
Glad day! Glad day!
And I would see my Friend;
lines.ko: 그리고 나는 내 친구를 만날 것이다.

lines.en: Dangers and troubles would end
If Jesus should come today.
Glad day! Glad day! Is it the crowning day?
I'll live for today, nor anxious be,
lines.ko: 나는 오늘을 위해 살 것이다. 불안하지도 않을 것이다.

lines.en: Jesus, my Lord, I soon shall see;
lines.ko: 나의 주 예수여, 내가 곧 보게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: Glad day! Glad day! Is it the crowning day?
I may go home today,
Glad day! Glad day!
Seemeth I hear their song;
Hail to the radiant throng!
If I should go home today.
Why should I anxious be?
Glad day! Glad day!
Lights appear on the shore,
Storms will affright nevermore,
lines.ko: 폭풍은 더 이상 겁을 주지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: For he is at hand today.
lines.ko: 왜냐하면 그분이 오늘 가까이 계시기 때문입니다.

lines.en: Faithful I'll be today,
Glad day! Glad day!
And I will freely tell
Why I should love him so well,
lines.ko: 내가 그 사람을 그토록 사랑해야 하는 이유는,

lines.en: For he is my all today.
lines.ko: 왜냐하면 그는 오늘 나의 전부이기 때문입니다.

alt_titles: Jesus may come today
Is it the crowning day

title_en: Come to the Saviour, make no delay

lines.en: Come to the Saviour, make no delay:
lines.id: Datanglah kepada Juruselamat, jangan menunda-nunda

lines.en: Here in his Word he's shown us the way;
lines.id: Di sini, di dalam Firman-Nya, Dia menunjukkan jalannya kepada kita

lines.en: Here in our midst he's standing today,
lines.id: Di sini, di tengah-tengah kita, Dia berdiri hari ini,

lines.en: Tenderly saying, "Come!"
lines.id: Dengan lembut berkata, "Ayo!"
Menyenangkan, penuh kegembiraan, akankah pertemuan ini menjadi,
Ketika dari dosa hati kita suci dan bebas
Dan kami akan berkumpul, Juruselamat, bersamaMu,
Di rumah abadi kita.

lines.en: Joyful, joyful, will the meeting be,
lines.id: "Penderitakan anak-anak!" Oh, dengarlah suara-Nya!

lines.en: When from sin our hearts are pure and free;
lines.id: Biarlah setiap hati melompat maju dan bersukacita kembali

lines.en: And we shall gather, Saviour, with thee,
lines.id: Dan marilah kita dengan bebas menjadikan Dia sebagai pilihan kita

lines.en: In our eternal home.
lines.id: Jangan menunda, tapi datanglah.
Menyenangkan, penuh kegembiraan, akankah pertemuan ini menjadi,
Ketika dari dosa hati kita suci dan bebas
Dan kami akan berkumpul, Juruselamat, bersamaMu,
Di rumah abadi kita.

lines.en: Suffer the children! O hear his voice!
lines.id: Coba pikirkan sekali lagi, Dia ada bersama kita hari ini

lines.en: Let ev'ry heart leap forth and rejoice;
lines.id: Perhatikanlah sekarang perintah-perintah-Nya yang terberkati, dan patuhi

lines.en: And let us freely make him our choice:
lines.id: Dengarkan sekarang aksen-Nya yang diucapkan dengan lembut.

lines.en: Do not delay, but come.
lines.id: “Maukah kamu, anak-anakku, datang?”
Menyenangkan, penuh kegembiraan, akankah pertemuan ini menjadi,
Ketika dari dosa hati kita suci dan bebas
Dan kami akan berkumpul, Juruselamat, bersamaMu,
Di rumah abadi kita.

lines.en: Think once again, he's with us today;
Heed now his blest command, and obey;
Hear now his accents tenderly say,
"Will you, my children, come?"

alt_titles: Joyful, joyful, will the meeting be

title_en: Come home, come home, ye who are weary, come home

lines.en: Softly and tenderly Jesus is calling,
lines.ko: 예수가 우리를 부르는 소리 그 음성 부드러워
lines.id: Dengan lembut dan lembut Yesus memanggil

lines.en: Calling for you and for me;
lines.ko: 문 앞에 나와서 사면을 보며 우리를 기다리네
lines.id: Memanggilmu dan untukku

lines.en: See, on the portals he's waiting and watching,
lines.ko: 후렴 : 오라 오라 방황치 말고 오라
lines.id: Lihat, di portal Dia menunggu dan mengawasi,

lines.en: Watching for you and for me.
lines.ko: 죄 있는 자들아 이리로 오라 주 예수 앞에 오라
lines.id: Memperhatikanmu dan untukku.
Pulanglah, pulanglah,
Kamu yang lelah, pulanglah (Pulanglah)
Dengan sungguh-sungguh, dengan lembut, Yesus memanggil,
Memanggil, hai orang berdosa, pulanglah!

lines.en: Come home, come home,
lines.ko: 간절히 오라고 부르실 때에 우리는 지체하랴
lines.id: Mengapa kita harus menunda-nunda ketika Yesus sedang memohon,

lines.en: Ye who are weary, come home;
lines.ko: 주님의 은혜를 왜 아니 받고 못 들은 체 하려나
lines.id: Memohon untukmu dan untukku

lines.en: Earnestly, tenderly Jesus is calling,
lines.id: Mengapa kita harus berlama-lama dan tidak mengindahkan rahmat-Nya,

lines.en: Calling, O sinner, come home.
lines.id: Kasihanilah untukmu dan untukku
Pulanglah, pulanglah,
Kamu yang lelah, pulanglah (Pulanglah)
Dengan sungguh-sungguh, dengan lembut, Yesus memanggil,
Memanggil, hai orang berdosa, pulanglah!

lines.en: Why should we tarry when Jesus is pleading,
lines.ko: 세월이 살같이 빠르게 지나 쾌락이 끝이 나고
lines.id: Waktu kini berlalu dengan cepat, momen pun berlalu

lines.en: Pleading for you and for me?
lines.ko: 사망의 그늘이 너와 내 앞에 둘리며 가리우네
lines.id: Melewati darimu dan dariku

lines.en: Why should we linger and heed not his mercies,
lines.id: Tempat-tempat teduh sedang berkumpul, ranjang kematian akan datang,

lines.en: Mercies for you and for me?
lines.id: Datang untukmu dan untukku.
Pulanglah, pulanglah,
Kamu yang lelah, pulanglah (Pulanglah)
Dengan sungguh-sungguh, dengan lembut, Yesus memanggil,
Memanggil, hai orang berdosa, pulanglah!

lines.en: Time is now fleeting, the moments are passing,
lines.ko: 우리를 위하여 예비해 두신 영원한 집이 있어
lines.id: Oh atas cinta luar biasa yang Dia janjikan,

lines.en: Passing from you and from me;
lines.ko: 죄 많은 세상을 떠나게 될 때 영접해 주시겠네
lines.id: Dijanjikan untukmu dan untukku!

lines.en: Shadows are gathering, deathbeds are coming,
lines.id: Meskipun kita telah berdosa, Dia mempunyai belas kasihan dan pengampunan,

lines.en: Coming for you and for me.
lines.id: Maaf untuk Anda dan untuk saya.
Pulanglah, pulanglah,
Kamu yang lelah, pulanglah (Pulanglah)
Dengan sungguh-sungguh, dengan lembut, Yesus memanggil,
Memanggil, hai orang berdosa, pulanglah!

lines.en: Oh! for the wonderful love he has promised
Promised for you and for me;
Though we have sinned, he has mercy and pardon,
Pardon for you and for me.

alt_titles: Softly and tenderly, Jesus is calling
title_id: Dengan Lembut dan Lembut Yesus Memanggil

title_en: I am a stranger here

lines.en: I am a stranger here, within a foreign land;
lines.id: Aku orang asing di sini, di negeri asing

lines.en: My home is far away, upon a golden strand;
lines.id: Rumahku jauh sekali, di atas untaian emas

lines.en: Ambassador to be of realms beyond the sea,
lines.ko: 이 세상 있을 때 주 예수 위하여
lines.id: Am-bas-sa-dor berada di alam seberang lautan,

lines.en: I'm here on business for my King.
lines.id: Aku di sini untuk urusan bisnis demi Rajaku.
Inilah pesan yang kubawa,
Seorang pesan-sage angels fain akan bernyanyi:
“Oh, berhati-hatilah,” demikianlah firman Tuan dan Rajaku,
"Oh, berdamailah dengan Tuhan."

lines.en: This is the message that I bring,
lines.ko: 주 예수 말씀이 온 세상 만민들
lines.id: Inilah perintah Raja: agar semua orang, di mana pun,

lines.en: A message angels fain would sing:
lines.id: Bertobatlah dan berpaling dari jerat dosa yang menggoda

lines.en: "Oh, be ye reconciled,"
lines.ko: 이 말씀 듣고서 새 생명 얻으라
lines.id: Bahwa semua orang yang mau taat, bersama Dia akan memerintah selamanya,

lines.en: Thus saith my Lord and King,
lines.id: Dan itu urusanku untuk Rajaku.

lines.en: "Oh, be ye reconciled to God."
lines.id: Inilah pesan yang kubawa,
Seorang pesan-sage angels fain akan bernyanyi:
“Oh, berhati-hatilah,” demikianlah firman Tuan dan Rajaku,
"Oh, berdamailah dengan Tuhan."

lines.en: This is the King's command: that all men, ev'rywhere,
lines.id: Rumahku lebih terang daripada dataran Shar-on yang kemerahan,

lines.en: Repent and turn away from sin's seductive snare;
lines.id: Kehidupan kekal dan kegembiraan melalui tugas-tugas terbuang

lines.en: That all who will obey, with him shall reign for aye,
lines.ko: 주 예수 말씀이 이 복음 전하라
lines.id: Pemerintahanku memintaku menceritakan bagaimana manusia bisa tinggal di sana,

lines.en: And that's my business for my King.
lines.id: Dan itu urusanku untuk Rajaku.
Inilah pesan yang kubawa,
Seorang pesan-sage angels fain akan bernyanyi:
“Oh, berhati-hatilah,” demikianlah firman Tuan dan Rajaku,
"Oh, berdamailah dengan Tuhan."

lines.en: My home is brighter far than Sharon's rosy plain,
Eternal life and joy throughout its vast domain;
My Sovereign bids me tell how mortals there may dwell,
And that's my business for my King.

alt_titles: This is the message that I bring

lines.en: God will take care of you;

karena tidak ada cara lain

lines.en: To be happy in Jesus, but to trust and obey.
Not a shadow can rise, not a cloud in the skies,
But his smile quickly drives it away;
Not a doubt or a fear, not a sigh nor a tear,
Can abide while we trust and obey.
Not a burden we bear, not a sorrow we share,
But our toil he doth richly repay;
Not a grief nor a loss, not a frown or a cross,
But is blest if we trust and obey.
But we never can prove the delights of his love
Until all on the altar we lay;
For the favor he shows, and the joy he bestows,
Are for them who will trust and obey.
Then in fellowship sweet we will sit at his feet,
Or we will walk by his side in the way;
What he says we will do, where he sends we will go,
Never fear, only trust and obey.

lines.en: Master, the terror is over,

And rest on the blissful shore.

title_en: Wonderful grace of Jesus

lines.en: Wonderful grace of Jesus,
Greater than all my sin;
How shall my tongue describe it,
Where shall its praise begin?
Taking away my burden,
Setting my spirit free;
For the wonderful grace of Jesus reaches me.
lines.ko: 예수님의 놀라운 은혜가 나에게 임했기 때문입니다.

lines.en: Wonderful the matchless grace of Jesus,
lines.ko: 예수님의 비할 데 없는 은혜가 놀랍습니다.

lines.en: Deeper than the mighty rolling sea;
Higher than the mountain, sparkling like a fountain,
All sufficient grace for even me,
Broader than the scope of my transgressions,
Greater far than all my sin and shame,
lines.ko: 나의 모든 죄와 부끄러움보다 훨씬 더 크시니,

lines.en: O magnify the precious name of Jesus,
Praise his name!
Wonderful grace of Jesus,
Reaching a mighty host,
By it I have been pardoned,
Saved to the uttermost,
Chains have been torn asunder,
Giving me liberty;
For the wonderful grace of Jesus reaches me.
lines.ko: 예수님의 놀라운 은혜가 나에게 임했기 때문입니다.

lines.en: Wonderful grace of Jesus,
Reaching the most defiled,
By its transforming power,
Making him God's dear child,
Purchasing peace and heaven,
For all eternity;
And the wonderful grace of Jesus reaches me.
lines.ko: 그리고 예수님의 놀라운 은혜가 나에게 임했습니다.

alt_titles: Wonderful the matchless grace of Jesus
