lines.en: My Saviour's praises I will sing,

My Saviour and my King;
My confidence in him I place,
To him my soul would cling.

title_en: I will sing the wondrous story

lines.en: I will sing the wondrous story
Of the Christ who died for me,
How he left the realms of glory
For the cross on Calvary.
Yes, I'll sing the wondrous story
Of the Christ who died for me,
Sing it with the saints in glory,
Gathered by the crystal sea.
I was lost: but Jesus found me,
lines.ko: 나는 길을 잃었으나 예수께서 나를 찾으셨으니

Raised me up and gently led me
Back into the narrow way.
Faint was I, and fears possessed me,
Bruised was I from many a fall;

But his love has pardoned all.

dan saya yakin bahwa Dia mampu

lines.id: Tentang hari-hari yang melelahkan-atau-emas,

lines.ko: 늘 보호해 주실 것을 나는 확실히 아네
lines.id: Di-depan wajah-Nya- Aku- mengerti.
Namun “Saya tahu kepada siapa saya percaya,
dan saya yakin bahwa Dia mampu
Untuk menjaga apa yang telah saya berkomitmen
Bagi-Nya keuntungan pada hari itu.”

lines.en: But "I know whom I have believed,
And am persuaded that he is able
To keep that which I've committed
Unto him against that day."
I know not how this saving faith
To me he did impart,
Nor how believing in his Word
Wrought peace within my heart.
I know not how the Spirit moves,
Convincing men of sin,
Revealing Jesus through the Word,
Creating faith in him.
I know not what of good or ill
May be reserved for me,
Of weary ways or golden days,
Before his face I see.
I know not when my Lord may come,
At night or noonday fair,
Nor if I'll walk the vale with him,
Or "meet him in the air."

Tariklah aku lebih dekat, lebih dekat, lebih dekat, lebih dekat, Tuhan yang terberkati,

lines.id: Saat aku berlutut dalam doa, dan bersamaMu, Tuhanku,

lines.en: O the pure delight of a single hour

lines.id: Sampai aku beristirahat dalam damai bersamaMu.
Dekatkan aku, dekatkan aku, Tuhan yang terberkati,

Tariklah aku lebih dekat, lebih dekat, lebih dekat, lebih dekat, Tuhan yang terberkati,

lines.en: There are depths of love that I cannot know
Till I cross the narrow sea;
There are heights of joy that I may not reach
Till I rest in peace with thee.

title_en: With harps and with viols

lines.en: With harps and with viols, there stand a great throng

lines.en: In the presence of Jesus, and sing this new song:
lines.ko: 예수님 앞에서 이 새 노래를 부르십시오.

lines.en: Unto him who hath loved us and washed us from sin,
lines.ko: 우리를 사랑하사 우리를 죄에서 씻어 주신 이에게

lines.en: Unto him be the glory for ever. Amen.
lines.ko: 그분께 영원히 영광이 있기를 빕니다. 아멘.

lines.en: All these once were sinners, defiled in his sight,

lines.ko: 이제 그들은 순결한 옷을 입고 찬양하며 연합합니다.

He hath bought us and taught us this new song to sing:
lines.ko: 그분은 우리를 사셨고 우리에게 이 새 노래를 가르쳐 주셨습니다.

lines.en: "There shall be showers of blessing,"

lines.en: And the roll is called up yonder, I'll be there.
When the roll is called up yonder,
When the roll is called up yonder,
When the roll is called up yonder,
When the roll is called up yonder, I'll be there.
On that bright and cloudless morning when the dead in Christ shall rise,
And the glory of his resurrection share;
When his chosen ones shall gather to their home beyond the skies,
And the roll is called up yonder, I'll be there.
Let us labor for the Master from the dawn till setting sun,
Let us talk of all his wondrous love and care;
Then when all of life is over, and our work on earth is done,
And the roll is called up yonder, I'll be there.

title_en: Work, for the night is coming

lines.en: Work, for the night is coming;
lines.ko: 어둔 밤 쉬 되리니 네 직분 지켜서
lines.id: Bekerja, karena malam akan tiba:

lines.ko: 찬 이슬 맺힐 때에 일찍 일어나
lines.id: Bekerja sepanjang pagi
Bekerjalah selagi embun masih berkilau

lines.ko: 일할 수 없는 밤이 속히 오리라
lines.id: Kerjakan bunga di pertengahan musim semi
Bekerjalah selagi hari semakin cerah,
Di bawah terik matahari
Bekerjalah, karena malam akan tiba,
Ketika pekerjaan manusia selesai.

lines.en: Work through the morning hours;
lines.ko: 어둔 밤 쉬 되리니 네 직분 지켜서
lines.id: Bekerja, karena malam akan tiba:
Bekerjalah pada siang hari yang cerah
Isi jam-jam paling terang dengan kerja,

lines.ko: 일할 수 없는 밤이 속히 오리라
lines.id: Istirahat pasti datang dan segera
Berikan setiap menit terbang
Sesuatu yang perlu disimpan
Bekerjalah, karena malam akan tiba,
Ketika manusia tidak lagi bekerja.

lines.en: Work while the dew is sparkling;
lines.ko: 어둔 밤 쉬 되리니 네 직분 지켜서
lines.id: Bekerja, karena malam akan tiba:

lines.ko: 지는 해 비낀 볕에 힘써 일하고
lines.id: Di bawah langit matahari terbenam,
Sementara warna cerahnya bersinar,

lines.ko: 할 수만 있는 대로 힘써 일하라
lines.id: Bekerja, untuk lalat siang hari
Bekerja sampai sinar terakhir fad-eth,
Fad-eth tidak bersinar lagi
Bekerja selagi malam gelap,
Ketika pekerjaan manusia selesai.

lines.en: Work 'mid springing flowers;
Work while the day grows brighter,
Under the glowing sun;
Work for the night is coming,
When man's work is done.
Work for the night is coming,
Work through the sunny noon;
Fill brightest hours with labor,
Rest comes sure and soon;
Give ev'ry flying minute
Something to keep in store;
Work for the night is coming,
When man works no more.
Work for the night is coming,
Under the sunset skies,
While their bright tints are glowing,
Work, for daylight flies;
Work till the last beam fadeth,
Fadeth to shine no more;
Work while the night is dark'ning,
When man's work is o'er.

title_en: Home of the Soul

lines.en: I will sing you a song of that beautiful land,
lines.id: Aku akan menyanyikan untukmu sebuah lagu tentang negeri yang indah itu,

lines.en: The far away home of the soul,
lines.id: Rumah jiwa yang jauh,

lines.en: Where no storms ever beat on the glittering strand,
lines.ko: 무궁한 세월이 거기 흘러갈 때 고난 풍파가 일지 않네
lines.id: Dimana tidak ada badai yang menerjang untaian yang berkilauan,

lines.en: While the years of eternity roll.
lines.id: Sementara tahun-tahun e-ter-ni-ty bergulir,

lines.en: O that home of the soul! In my visions and dreams,
lines.id: Wahai rumah jiwa itu! Dalam visi dan mimpiku

lines.en: Its bright jasper walls I can see;
lines.id: Dindingnya yang terang dan jas-per bisa kulihat

lines.id: Antara kota adil dan aku,

Sampai aku membayangkan tapi tipis-tipis tabir di sela-selanya
Antara kota adil dan aku.

lines.en: That unchangeable home is for you and for me,
lines.id: Rumah yang tidak dapat diubah itu adalah untukmu dan untukku,

lines.en: Where Jesus of Nazareth stands;
lines.id: Tempat Yesus dari Naz-a-reth berdiri

lines.en: The King of all kingdoms for ever is he,
lines.ko: 왕의 왕 되신 주 우리 쓸 면류관 손에 들고서 기다리네
lines.id: Raja segala kerajaan selamanya adalah Dia,

lines.en: And he holdeth our crowns in his hands.
lines.id: Dan Dia memegang mahkota kita di tangan-Nya,

lines.id: Dan Dia memegang mahkota kita di tangan-Nya
Raja segala kerajaan selamanya adalah Dia,
Dan Dia memegang mahkota kita di tangan-Nya.

lines.en: O how sweet it will be in that beautiful land,
lines.id: Oh betapa manisnya di negeri yang indah itu,

lines.en: So free from all sorrow and pain,
lines.id: Jadi bebas dari segala duka dan kesakitan,

lines.en: With songs on our lips and with harps in our hands,
lines.ko: 거문고 들고서 함께 찬송할 때 우리가 서로 만나겠네
lines.id: Dengan nyanyian di bibir kami dan kecapi di tangan kami,

lines.en: To meet one another again.
lines.id: Untuk memenuhi keuntungan satu sama lain

Dengan nyanyian di bibir kami dan kecapi di tangan kami,
Untuk memenuhi keuntungan satu sama lain. Amin.

title_en: God shall wipe away all tears
title_ko: 하나님은 모든 눈물을 닦아 주실 것이다 (자체번역)

lines.en: In the land of fadeless day
Lies the city four-square;
It shall never pass away,
And there is no night there.
God shall wipe away all tears;
lines.ko: 하나님께서는 모든 눈물을 닦아 주실 것입니다.

lines.en: There's no death, no pain, nor fears;
And they count not time by years;
lines.ko: 그리고 그들은 시간을 연 단위로 세지 않습니다.

lines.en: For there is no night there.
All the gates of pearl are made
In the city four-square;
All the streets with gold are laid,
And there is no night there.
And the gates shall never close
lines.ko: 그리고 그 문은 결코 닫히지 않을 것이다

lines.en: To the city four-square;
There life's crystal river flows,
And there is no night there.
There they need no sunshine bright,
In that city four-square;
For the Lamb is all the light,
And there is no night there.

alt_titles: In the land of fadeless day
No Night There
